Matthew1:1 Abraham chapa, David chapa, Jesu Christa khangui thubu." 
Matthew1:2 Abraham'in Isaac ahingin; Isaac'in Jacob ahingin; Jacob'in Juda le asopiteho ahingin; 
Matthew1:3 Juda'in Tamar toh Pharez le Zera ahingin; Pharez'in Esrom ahingin; Esrom'in Aram ahingin; 
Matthew1:4 Aram'in Aminadab ahingin; Aminadab'in Nahson ahingin; Nahson'in Salmon ahingin; 
Matthew1:5 Salmon'in Rahab toh Boaz ahingin; Boaz'in Ruth toh Obed ahingin; Obed chun Jesse ahingin; 
Matthew1:6 Jesse'in David lengpa ahingin ahi. 
Matthew1:7 Chuin David'in Uriah inneipi toh Solomon ahingin; Solomon'in Rehoboam ahingin; Rehoboam'in Abijah ahingin; Abijah'in Asa ahingin; 
Matthew1:8 Asa'in Josaphat ahingin; Josaphat'in Joram ahingin; Joram'in Uzziah ahingin; 
Matthew1:9 Uzziah'n Jotham ahingin; Jotham'in Ahaz ahingin; Ahaz'in Hezekiah ahingin; 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiah'in Manasseh ahingin; Manasseh'in Amon ahingin; Amon'in Josiah ahingin; 
Matthew1:11 Josiah'in Jechoniah le asopiho Babylon gama atolmang laijun ahingin ahi. 
Matthew1:12 Chuin Babylon'a atolmang nungun, Jekoniah'in Shealtiel ahingin; Shealtiel'in Zerubbabel ahingin;" 
Matthew1:13 Zerubbabel'in Abiud ahingin; Abiud'in Eliakim ahingin; Eliakim'in Azor ahingin; 
Matthew1:14 Azor'in Sadoc ahingin; Sadoc'in Akim ahingin; Akim'in Elihud ahingin; 
Matthew1:15 Elihud'in Eleazer ahingin; Eleazer'in Mathan ahingin; Mathan'in Jacob ahingin; 
Matthew1:16 Chuin, Jacob'in Joseph ahingin, ama chu Christa kiti Jesu penna nu Mariam inneipu ahi." 
Matthew1:17 Hitichun khang agomin Abraham'a pat David geijin khang somle khang li ahin, David'a pat Babylon gama atolmang geijin khang somle khang li, chule Babylon gama atolmanguva pat Christa pen gei khang somle khang li ahi." 
Matthew1:18 Jesu Christa pen umchan chu hiti ahi. Anu Mariam chu Joseph'in aji dinga ahol ahin, akigop masang lhonin amanu chu Lhagao Thenga kona agai akihedohtan ahi." 
Matthew1:19 Ahivangin a-inneipu Joseph chu michonpha tah ahi jeh-in, lhang phonga japi seithangin aumsah nom hih-in, guhthima kikhenpi ding lung angai totan ahi." 
Matthew1:20 Aman lung achuti ngaito laitah-in, veuvin, Pakai vantil khatnin amangin akimusah-in, ajah-a, David chapa Joseph, na-inneipi Mariam gakipuilut ding olmo hih-in; ijeh-inem itile ama Lhagao Thenga kona gaija ahi." 
Matthew1:21 Amanu soh intin chapa khat ahin ding ahi, chule amin Jesu nasah ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile amatah chun amite achonsetnuva kona ahuhhing ding ahi." 
Matthew1:22 Pakaiyin Themgao kama asei thu," 
Matthew1:23 Veuvin, nungah theng chu hung gaijintin, chapa khat ahin ding ahi, Chule amin Immanuel asah ding ahi, ati, (Hichu Pathen'in eiumpiuve tina ahi) tia asei chu guilhuna dinga thu hicheng chu soh-a ahi." 
Matthew1:24 Chuin Joseph a-imut akhangin, akipat in Pakai vantil'in thu apeh bang chun abolin, a-inneipi chu akichenpin ahi;" 
Matthew1:25 Ahivangin amanun chapa peng masapen anei kahsen kitohkhahpi louhelin aumin; chuin acha chu amin Jesu asahtai. 
Matthew2:1 Herod lengpa lal laijin Judah gama Bethlehem khopi-ah Jesu apengtan ahile, veuvin, niso lama konin ahsi lekhathem ho phabep Jerusalem'a ahungun, Judah te lengpa apengin ahi, ama chu hoilamham?" 
Matthew2:2 Keihon niso lamah ahsi kamuvin, chibai bola hung kahiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew2:3 Herod lengpan chuche thu ajah phatnin, amati Jerusalem miteti alungu ajingtan ahi." 
Matthew2:4 Chuphatnin thempu pipuiho leh miho danthu sunho chu akhomin, Christa hoija peng dingham, tin adongin ahi." 
Matthew2:5 Amahon ajah-a, Judah gam Bethlehem'a peng ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile," 
Matthew2:6 Vo Judah gama um Bethlehem, Judah vaipote lah-a nangma iti nama jongle aneopen nahipoi; Ijeh-inem itile nalah-a kona vaipo khat, Kamite Israelte ching ding chu pengdoh ding ahi; tin themgao seija konin akisune, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew2:7 Chuin Herod in ahsi lekhathem ho chu guhthimin akouvin, ahsi so phat chu kichentah-in ahetoh tan ahi." 
Matthew2:8 Chuin amaho chu Bethlehem'a asolin, Cheovinlang naosen chungchang thudol chu chentah-in gadongtoh uvin; chule namudoh tengule keima jong kache-a chibai kagaboh theina dingin thu hinpo kit uvin, ati." 
Matthew2:9 Lengpa thu ajah phatnun amaho akipatdoh taovin ahi; chule, veuvin, niso lama amu-u ahsi chu amasanguva achepeh-in, naosen umna chunga chun akingan ahi." 
Matthew2:10 Ahsi chu amu phat uvin athao anomin, hapan akipah-un ahi." 
Matthew2:11 Chuin amaho in sunga alutnun ahile naosen chu anu Mariam toh amu thaovin, aboh khupmun ama chu ahou taovin ahi; chuin athil lu bom cheh-u asolhaovin, kipamanin, sana, bego, myrrh ama chu apetaovin ahi." 
Matthew2:12 Chujouvin amanguva Herod heng lama akile kit louna dinguva Pathen'in ahilchah jeh uvin, lam chom ahovin agam lamuva achemang taovin ahi." 
Matthew2:13 Chuin amaho chedoh nungin, veuvin, Joseph amangin Pakai vantil khatnin, Thouvin, naosen leh anu puijin lang Egypt gama jam lutpitan, chule thu kapeh kahsen chua chun um jingin; ijeh-inem itile Herod'in naosen chu suhmang dinga ahol ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew2:14 Chuin ama athoudoh-in, jan-in naosen leh anu akipuijin, Egypt gam ajontan ahi." 
Matthew2:15 Chule Herod thi kahsen hia chun aumin ahi: Pakaiyin themgao kama asei, Egypt gama konin ka-Chapa kakouve, ati chu guilhuna dinga chuti ahi." 
Matthew2:16 Chuin ahsi lekhathem hon alhim lhah-u ahi akihetdoh phatnin, Herod alunghang behseh-in, mi asolin, ahsi lekhathem ho-a kona aphat ahetchen dungjui chun, Bethlehem le akimvel sese-a pasal chapang kum ni-a lhah noilamse athattan ahi." 
Matthew2:17 Hichun themgao Jeremiah thusei," 
Matthew2:18 Ramah-a akaple amao aw akijai; Rachel'in achate aka akan, Aum lou jeh uvin lhepbi ding anomtapon ahi; ati chu guilhunga ahitai." 
Matthew2:19 Ahivangin Herod athi phatnin, veuvin, Pakai vantil khatnin Egypt gamah Joseph mangin akimusah-in," 
Matthew2:20 Thouvin lang naosen leh anu kipuijin, Israel gam lama chetan; naosen tha dinga goteho chu athitaove, ati." 
Matthew2:21 Chuin ama kipatdoh-in, naosen leh anu akipuijin, Israel gam lama ahung kit tai." 
Matthew2:22 Ahivangin Judah gamah Archelaus apa Herod khelin vai apoi ti ajah phatnin, chulama ache ngamta hih-in; amanga akihilchah jeh-in, akipatnin Galilee gamah akileheitai." 
Matthew2:23 Chule ama chu Nazareth mi kiti ding ahi, tia themgao hon asei chu guilhun theinan, achen Nazareth khopi-ah achengtan ahi." 
Matthew3:1 Chulai chun John Baptist chu ahungin," 
Matthew3:1 Chulai chun John Baptist chu ahungin," 
Matthew3:2 Nalung heijun; van lenggam anaitai, tin Judah gam gamthipmah thu alhang samlen ahi." 
Matthew3:3 Isaiah themgaovin, Gamthipma khosam aw khatnin, Pakai lamlen semtohsan koijun, Alampi semjangun, tin aseije, tia asei chu ama hi ahi." 
Matthew3:4 John chu apon-ah sangongsang mul ahin, akongah savun konggah akigah-in, chule a-anneh chu khaokho le gam khoiju ahi." 
Matthew3:4 John chu apon-ah sangongsang mul ahin, akongah savun konggah akigah-in, chule a-anneh chu khaokho le gam khoiju ahi." 
Matthew3:5 Chuphatnin Jerusalem le Judah gam jouse-a mi, chule Jordan vel gamkol sung jouse-a mi ahenga ache acheuvin," 
Matthew3:6 Achonsetnao cheh aphongun, Jordan luidunga chun ama khutna baptize achang taovin ahi." 
Matthew3:7 Ahin Pharisaiho le Saddukai ho mi tamtah ama khutna baptize chang dinga ahungu amun phatnin, ajah uva, Vo gulse sonho, Khonunga lunghanna hung lhung dinga kona jamna ding lungthim koiham napeuva?" 
Matthew3:8 Hijeh chun lunghei toh kilomin gadoh-un; 
Matthew3:9 Chule nalah uva, Abraham kapului'u aumnai, tin ngaito hih-un; ijeh-inem itile tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, hiche songho-a kona hi Pathen'in Abraham chate asodohsah thei ahi." 
Matthew3:10 Chule tu jenga jong thing bultina heicha kikoija ahitai. Chutiachu thingphung aga phalou chengse chu kiphuh lhu-a, meija kisep lutji ahi." 
Matthew3:11 Lungheina dinga keiman twija baptize kachansah bou ahi; amavang kanunga hungpa keima sanga chungnungjo ahi; keima akengchot choi dinga jong kilom kahipoi. Amatah chun nangho Lhagao Theng le meija baptize nachansah dingu ahi. 
Matthew3:12 Aman akhutna godal achoije; aman aphol jap ngimsel intin, achang apang sunga akhum ding; asi vang chu mit theilou meija agovam ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew3:13 Hiche pet chun Jesu John khutna baptize chang dingin, Galilee'a konin John hengah Jordan lamah ahungin ahi." 
Matthew3:13 Hiche pet chun Jesu John khutna baptize chang dingin, Galilee'a konin John hengah Jordan lamah ahungin ahi." 
Matthew3:14 Ahivangin John anathuphan, Nangma khutna kachan ding johsih-a, nangma kahenga hung nahim? ati." 
Matthew3:14 Ahivangin John anathuphan, Nangma khutna kachan ding johsih-a, nangma kahenga hung nahim? ati." 
Matthew3:15 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, Tun hisah poupoutan; ijeh-inem itile chonphatna jouse abancha hitia hi ibulhit dingdol ahi, ati." 
Matthew3:16 Chuin Jesu baptize achan jouvin, twilah-a konin apotdoh paitan ahi; chuin, veuvin, ama dingin van kot akihongin, chule Pathen Lhagao vakhu banga ahung lenlhah-a achunga ahungchuh amun;" 
Matthew3:17 chuin, Ama hi ka-Chapa deitah ahi, achunga kalung alhai tangeije, tin van'a konin aw ahung gingin ahi." 
Matthew4:1 Hichun Jesu diabol lhep patepma umdingin gamthipmah Lhagao puitouvin aumtan ahi. 
Matthew4:2 Chuin nisomli le jansomli an ngola aum jouvin, agil keltan ahi." 
Matthew4:3 Chuin alhempa chu ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Nangma Pathen Chapa nahile, hiche songho hi changlhah asona dingin thu pen, ati." 
Matthew4:4 Ahin aman adonbut-in, Mihem changlhah jenga hing lou ding ahi, Pathen kam sunga kona thu pot chengsea bou hing ding ahi, hitichun akisune, ati." 
Matthew4:5 Chuphatnin diabol'in ama chu khopi theng lama apuijin, Pathen houin tingvuma chun adinsah-in, ajah-a," 
Matthew4:6 Pathen Chapa nahile, nangma kichomlha jengin; ijeh-inem itile hitihin akisune, Aman nangma chung changah avantilho thu pentin, Amahon akhutnuva nadop dingu ahi; Achuti louleh songah nakeng sukhan nate, ati." 
Matthew4:7 Jesu'n ajah-a, Hiti jonghin akisune, Nangman Pakai na-Pathen lhem patep hih-in, ati." 
Matthew4:8 Diabol'in ama mol sangtah chunga apuikitnin, vannoi leiset gamle aloupina jouse jong avetsah-in; chuin ajah-a," 
Matthew4:9 Nakhupboh-a nalhuh-a neihouva ahile, hichengse hi penge, ati." 
Matthew4:10 Chutah-in Jesu'n ajah-a, Chemangin, Satan; ijeh-inem itile hitin akisune, Pakai na-Pathen chu houvin lang ama jengbou jenin, ati." 
Matthew4:11 Chuphatnin diabol in ama adalhatai; chuin, veuvin, vantil ho ahungun ama chu ahung jenle taovin ahi." 
Matthew4:12 Chuin Jesu'n John amantaove ti ajah phatnin, Galilee gam lama achen;" 
Matthew4:12 Chuin Jesu'n John amantaove ti ajah phatnin, Galilee gam lama achen;" 
Matthew4:13 Chuin Nazareth adalhan, Zebulun le Naphtali gamkai sunga dillen panga, Capernaum kho-a achen agachengin ahi;" 
Matthew4:14 Isaiah themgaovin asei," 
Matthew4:15 Zebulun gam le Naphtali gam, Jordan gal lang khat gamkol dillen panga cheng, Chidang namdangte Galilee;" 
Matthew4:16 Muthim lah-a touho chun vah loupitah amutaove, Chule thina gamle alima touho chunguva kho avahtai, ati chu guilhuna dinga chuti ahitai." 
Matthew4:17 Hiche laija pat chun Jesu'n thu ahil lhanglen, Nalung heijun; vangam anaitai, ati." 
Matthew4:18 Chujouvin Jesu Galilee dillen panga avale petnin, Peter kiti Simon le anaopa Andrew dillena len ase lhon amun; amani chu nga man mi ahi lhone." 
Matthew4:19 Chuin aman amani jah-a, kanung hinjui lhonin, keiman nangni mi man len sepmin sem lhoninge, ati." 
Matthew4:20 Chuin amanin apet petnin alen adalha lhonin, anung ajui lhontai." 
Matthew4:21 Chuin ama chukoma konchun achepaijin ahile, midang ucha nima, Zebedee chapa Jacob le anaopa John apau Zebedee toh kong sunga alennu anakhui phatnu amun; amanima chu akouvin ahi." 
Matthew4:21 Chuin ama chukoma konchun achepaijin ahile, midang ucha nima, Zebedee chapa Jacob le anaopa John apau Zebedee toh kong sunga alennu anakhui phatnu amun; amanima chu akouvin ahi." 
Matthew4:22 Chuin amanin apet petnin akongle apalhon adalha lhonin, anung ajui lhontai." 
Matthew4:23 Chuin Jesu Galilee gamse se-a avahle avahlen, akikhopnao in tinah thu ahillen, Pathen lenggam Kipana Thupha ahil lhanglen, miho ahivei jouseu chule adamlou jouse adamsahtan ahi." 
Matthew4:24 Hichun Syria gama amin akithangin; thilhavop, abuhthi, langthi, ima hivei chomchom veija anat thohlel jouse ahenga ahinpuijun, aman amaho chu aboldam sohkeijin ahi." 
Matthew4:25 Chuin Galilee, Dicapoli, Jerusalem, chule Judah gama konle Jordan gal lang khat lama konin mihon tamtah-in anung ajuitan ahi." 
Matthew5:1 Aman mipi chengse chu amun, molvum chungah akaltouvin; chuin ama atouvin ahile aseijuite chu ahengah ahungun;" 
Matthew5:2 Chuin ama apaodoh-in, amaho chu hiche thuhi ahil pantan ahi." 
Matthew5:3 Lhagaova vaichaho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile van lenggam chu amaho-a ahi. 
Matthew5:4 Alhaseteho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile lhep lungmonga umding ahiuve. 
Matthew5:5 Mi lungnengteho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile amahon leiset chung alo dingu ahi. 
Matthew5:6 Chonphatna lama gilkel le dangchah ho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile amaho chu vading ahiuve. 
Matthew5:7 Milungset teho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile amaho chu kilungset ding ahiuve. 
Matthew5:8 Milungthengho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile amahon Pathen amu dingu ahi. 
Matthew5:9 Misucham ho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile amaho chu Pathen chate kiti ding ahiuve. 
Matthew5:10 Chonphat jala bolsetna thohho anunnom ahiuve; ijeh inem itile van lenggam chu amaho-a ahi. 
Matthew5:11 Keima jala mihon nahouset uva, nabolset uva, chule nachung uva jouthu-a thugilou asei tengule anunnom nahiuve." 
Matthew5:12 Kipah-un, hapan kipah-un; ijeh inem itile van'a nasan dingu kipaman atame; ijeh inem itile nangho masanga anaum themgaoho jong chu mihon chutobangma chun abolseuvin ahi." 
Matthew5:13 Nangho leiset chi nahiuve: ahin chi khu tam tahenlang hile, ipi-a ki-al sah dingham? Chukalle apanna umtapontin, paidohle mihemte chotpha dingbou ahitai." 
Matthew5:14 Nangho vannoi vah nahiuve. Lhang vuma khopi chu akisel theipoi. 
Matthew5:15 Min meivah avah-in, lo akhukhum ngaipoi, atunna chunga akoijin; chuteng in sunga um chengse chu asalvah bouvin ahi." 
Matthew5:16 Hiche bang chun navah-u chu miho angah kilanghen, chuteng amahon nachon phatnao chu mu theijuntin, chule van'a um na-Pau chu avahchoi dingu ahi." 
Matthew5:17 Keima danthu le themgaoho thu sumang dinga hungin neingaito hih-un; asumanga hung hilouvin, asubulhit dingjoh-a hung kahibouve." 
Matthew5:18 Ijeh-inem itile tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Vanle lei aman kahse-a, danthu chu jemsipah penle ajem halsicha jong aboncha abulhin masangse-a mang lou ding ahi." 
Matthew5:19 Hijeh chun koi hijongle hiche thupeh neopen lah-a khat suse-a, chule chutobanga bol ding hila chu, van lenggama aneopena kisei ding ahi; chule koi hijongle anitna, chule chutobanga hila vang chu, van lenggama alenpena kisei ding ahi." 
Matthew5:20 Ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Nangho danthu sunho le Pharisai ho sanga nachon phatnao achung nunjoh louva ahile, van gama nalut louhel dingu ahi." 
Matthew5:21 Tolthat hih-un; koi hijongle tolthat chu thupi tanna-a dinga kicha jinga umding ahi, tia malai mite jah-a kisei thu chu najataove." 
Matthew5:22 Ahivangin keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Koi hijongle ajeh beija asopi lunghan khuma chu thupi tanna-a dinga kicha jinga umding ahi; chule, koi hijongle asopi, Raca, tia chu houvaipoloi kikhopna-a dinga kicha jinga umding ahi. Chule koi hijongle asopi, Mingol, tia chu damun meidila dinga kicha jinga umding ahi." 
Matthew5:23 Hiche jeh chun maicham mun'a thil to ding nachoija nahunga, nasopi nachunga alung himona nahetdoh-a ahile," 
Matthew5:24 Nathil to ding chu maicham koma chun dalhanlang, chen, nasopi chutoh gakicham masan, chujoule hungin nathil to ding chu toh-in." 
Matthew5:25 Nahehpa chu lampia naum petnin kichampin, achuti loule nahehpan thutan vaihom henga leh lutnin natin, thutan vaihom chun sottolle khutnah pedoh-in natin, chuteng aman songkul'a nakhum ding ahi." 
Matthew5:26 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, Nangman achai nakei paisa keh khat geija nasahsoh masangse-a, iti jongle chua kona napotdoh louhel ding ahi." 
Matthew5:27 Jonthanhoi bol hih-in, tia malaija kisei chu nanghon najataove;" 
Matthew5:28 Ahivangin keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, koi hijongle numei jonlunga vea chu amanu chutoh alunga jonga ahitai." 
Matthew5:29 Chule namit jetlamin nasuhmo le, kaldoh inlang paimangin; ijeh-inem itile natahsa pumpi damuna lelutna aum sangin, natibah khat aman ding nang dingin aphajoi." 
Matthew5:30 Chule nakhut jetlamin nasuhmo le, hi jong chu satlhan lang paimangin; natahsa pumpi-a damuna nachuh sangin, natibah khat aman dinga nang dinga phajo ahi." 
Matthew5:31 Chule, Koi hijongle aji da-a chun, dana lekha pehen, kitisa ahi;" 
Matthew5:32 Ahivangin keiman najah uva kasei ahi, Ajon jeh tailouva thu dang jeh-a aji da-a chun, ajinu chu ajonsah ahi; chule koi hile akidasa numei chu akichenpia jong chu ajonga ahi." 
Matthew5:33 Chukitle, jouvin Kihahsel hih-un, naki hahselna chu Pakai henga molson, tia malai mite jah-a kiseisa chu najataove;" 
Matthew5:34 Ahivangin keiman najah uva kasei ahi; Imachan kihahsel hih-un, van min panin kihah sel hih-un, Pathen touna ahi jeh-in;" 
Matthew5:35 Chule lei min panin kihahsel hih-un, ijeh-inem itile hichu akengto ngapna ahi. Jerusalem min panin kihahsel hih-un; ijeh-inem itile hichu Leng chungnung khopi ahi." 
Matthew5:36 Naluchang panin kihahsel hih-un; ijeh-inem itile nangman nasam jang khat jengcha jong nakansah navomsah theipon ahi. 
Matthew5:37 Ahin nasei chu ahile ahi, ahiloule ahilou hijenghen; hicheng kalval chu agilouva kona bou ahitai." 
Matthew5:38 Mit khela mit, ha khela ha, tia kisei chu najataove;" 
Matthew5:39 Ahivangin keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Migilou thuh hih-un; amavang koi hile nangeiphe jetlam benga chu, lang khat jong dopeh-in." 
Matthew5:40 Koi hile heh dinga nago-a nasangkhol sungnung lah dinga go-a chu, naponlen jong chu pe jengin." 
Matthew5:41 Koi hile apoh po dinga nacham louva bola mile khat napuija chu, mile ni chepin." 
Matthew5:42 Nahenga thuma chu pen, nahenga thilpa thuma chu kihei mangsan hih-in." 
Matthew5:43 Naheng nakom ngailunlang, chule namelma teu hotbolun, tia kisei chu najataove;" 
Matthew5:44 Ahivangin, keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, namelma teu ngailuvin, nagaosap teo chu phatthei boh-un, nahoteu chu phatbolun, chule nadangdat teole nabolseteu dingin taopeh-un;" 
Matthew5:45 Chutilebou van'a na-Pau chate nahithei dingu ahi. Ijeh-inem itile aman migiloule mipha chunga anisa asosah gelin, chule michonpha le michonse chunga go ajuhsah gelin ahi." 
Matthew5:46 Ijeh-inem itile nanghon nangailu teo jeng chu nangailut uva ahile, ipi kipaman nasan dinguham? Kaidonghon jong chutima chu abolu hilouham?" 
Matthew5:47 Chule nasopiu jengmai salam naboh uva ahile, midang ipi-a nakhelnao umam? Kaidonghon jong chutia chu abol louham?" 
Matthew5:48 Hijeh chun van'a um na-Pau aphat chamkimsoh bangin, nangho jong chamkimun." 
Matthew6:1 Nathilphabolu chu mihon amuna dinguva amasanguva nabol louna dinguvin chingtheijun; chutia nabol ule van'a na-Pau koma san ding kipaman nei lou nahiuve. 
Matthew6:2 Hijeh chun mi thil napeh tengule, mi pachat ding ngaitonan miphalhem ho bangin kikhopna in tinleh lam dungah namasang sang uva sumkon mut hih-un; tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Amaho chun kipaman akisanu ahitai." 
Matthew6:3 Nangma vangin mi thil napeh teng, nakhut jetlamin abol chu nakhut veilam hetsah hih-in," 
Matthew6:4 Chutilebou nathilpeh chu guhthim hintin, guhthima mu-a na-Pan phongtah-a nangma nasah ding ahi." 
Matthew6:5 Nangho Pathen henga natao tengule miphalhem hotoh bang hih-un, amahon mi mu dingin kikhopna intina le lamkontina dina tao adeijun ahi. Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Amaho chun kipaman akisanu ahitai." 
Matthew6:6 Nang vang natao tengle, na-insung dana lutnin lang chule kot khah-in, guhthima um na Pa henga taovin; chuteng guhthima mu-a na-Pan nangma phongtah-a nasah ding ahi." 
Matthew6:7 Amavang chidang namdangte bangin naseisa velsei kit hih-un, ijeh-inem itile amahon thu tamtah asei jeh uva chu jahpeh-a umdinga angaitou ahi." 
Matthew6:8 Hijeh chun amahotoh bang hih-un; ijeh-inem itile nathum masangun, nadei nangai chanu chu na-Pau vin ahenai." 
Matthew6:9 Hijeh chun hitihin taovun; Van'a um ka-Pau, namin kijahen." 
Matthew6:10 Nagam hung lhunghen. Van'a nalungchan akim bangin, leija jong nalungchan kimhen." 
Matthew6:11 Tunin kaneh khop dingu anneh neipeuvin. 
Matthew6:12 Kalei bateu kangaidam bangun, keiho bat jong ngaidamin." 
Matthew6:13 Chule lhepna-a neipui hih-un, agilouva konin neihuhdoh jouvin: ajehchu lenggam, thahat, chule loupina atonsotna nanga ahi, Amen." 
Matthew6:14 Ijeh-inem itile nanghon mi suhkhel nangaidam uva ahile, van'a na-Pau vin jong nangho suhkhel angaidam ding ahi." 
Matthew6:15 Amavang nanghon mi suhkhel nangaidam lou vangule, na-Pau vin jong nangho suhkhel angaidam lou ding ahi." 
Matthew6:16 Nanghon an nangol tengule, miphalhem ho bangin kinguisah hih-un; ijeh-inem itile amahon an angolu min ahetna dingin, amaiso achom ahisah jiuvin ahi. Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Amahon kipaman akisanu ahitai." 
Matthew6:17 Nangma vangin an nangol tengle, nalu thao kinunlang, namai jong kiphet in." 
Matthew6:18 Chutile mihem mitmu hilouva, guhthima um na-Pa mitmu-a an ngol nabah ding ahin; chuteng guhthima mu-a na-Pan phongtah-a kipaman napeh ding ahi." 
Matthew6:19 Ngetle twi eh-in asuhmang theina, guchan aphet vanga chule aguhmang theina leiset chungah gou khol hih-un;" 
Matthew6:20 Amavang ngetle twi eh-in asuhmang thei louna, guchan jong aphetvang theilou nale aguhmang thei louna van'ah nagou kholun;" 
Matthew6:21 Ijeh-inem itile nagou umna-a chu nalung jong umding ahi. 
Matthew6:22 Mit hi natahsa meivah ahi; hijeh chun namit achima ahile, nati pumpi vah ding ahi." 
Matthew6:23 Amavang namit phata hihle, nati apumpi thim ding ahitai. Hijeh chun nasunga um vah chu athima ahile, hiche thim chu ichana thimding hitam!" 
Matthew6:24 Koima pakai ni soh ahi theipoi; ijeh-inem itile aman khat hotbolintin, khatjoh angailut ding ahi; ahiloule khatna hakai jintin, khatjoh anahsahmo ding ahi. Nangho Pathen le sum soh nahikop thei lou dingu ahi." 
Matthew6:25 Hijeh-a chu nangho jah-a kasei ahi, i-kaneh ding hitam, i-kadon ding hitam, tin na hinna dingun; ahiloule, i-kasila kachen ding hitam, tin natahsa dingun lungkham hih-un. Anneh sanga hinkho, chule nihchen ponsil sanga tahsa thupijo hilouham?" 
Matthew6:26 Chunga leng vacha khu ngaitouvin, amahon tula atupouvin, atla a-at pouvin, ahinla van'a um na-Pau vin amaho khu avahnai. Nangho khuteho sanga lujo nahi lou uham?" 
Matthew6:27 Nangho lah-a lungkham hatna ahinkho tong khat jopsaobe thei koi nahiuvem? 
Matthew6:28 Chule nihchen ponsil jeh-a ibola nalung kham uham? Jaova molhoipah khu iti khanham ngaitouvin. Hicheho khun tongla atonggim pouvin, patla akhehpouve;" 
Matthew6:29 Ahivanginla keiman najah uva kaseipeh nahiuve, Solomon jeng jong aloupina jouse-a akivon chun, hiche molhoi khattoh kibangin akijem hoipon ahi." 
Matthew6:30 Chule jaova hampa tunia uma, jinga lhum sunga kileh lutta ding jengbon Pathen'in achuti jeple, vo tahsan lhomho, chu sanga chu Aman nangho najepjoh lou dinguham?" 
Matthew6:31 Hijeh chun, I-kaneh dinguham? I kadon dinguham? I kasil dinguham, tin lungkham hih-un;" 
Matthew6:32 Ijeh-inem itile chidang namdang ten hitiho chu aholu ahin; chule nanghon jong hicheng chu nangaichaove ti van'a na-Pau vin ahenai. 
Matthew6:33 Ahivangin amasatah-in Pathen lenggam le chonphatna hol masaovin; chuteng hichengse jong chu naki pehbe dingu ahi. 
Matthew6:34 Hijeh chun jinga dingin lungkham hih-un; jing chun aman hinki ngaito nante. Ni khat hesohna chu ni khatna dingin atohbepmin ahi. 
Matthew7:1 Oimo-a naum louna dinguvin, mi oimo hih-un." 
Matthew7:2 Na-oimo bang cheh-a chu oimo-a naum dingu ahin; chule nanghon nate bang banguva chu nangho kitepeh dinga nahiuve. 
Matthew7:3 Nangma mitna thingtum uma chu ngaito louva, ibola nasopi mitna bohthem chu navet ham?" 
Matthew7:4 Chule ven, nangma mitna thingtum uma, nasopi jah-a, namitna bohthem umchu neilahdoh sah-in nati theiham?" 
Matthew7:5 Vo miphalhem, nangma mitna um thingtum chu kilahdoh masatnin; chutengle nasopi mitna bohthem chu lahdoh dinga namuchen dingbou ahi." 
Matthew7:6 Uichaho khu thiltheng pe hih-un, vohcha anga natwikoh changu seplha hih-un; amahon hitiho chu akengun chonuntin, chule hungkile heijuntin nangho jengjong nalhehtel dingu ahi." 
Matthew7:7 Thumun, kipe ding nahiuve; holun, namu dingu ahi; kiuvun, kihon peh ding nahiuve;" 
Matthew7:8 Ijeh-inem itile athumchan achangin; aholan amun; chule akiuva chu kot kihon peh ding ahi. 
Matthew7:9 Achapan changlhah athumle song pe-a," 
Matthew7:10 Nga athumle gul pe dinga, nalah uva koi naum uvem?" 
Matthew7:11 Hijeh chun nanghobon migiloutah hiuva, nachateo thilpha pehje nahet ule, hiche sanga chu gamchenga van'a na-Pau vin ahenga thumte chu thilpha apeh lou dingham?" 
Matthew7:12 Hijeh chun ima jouse-a min nangho iti nabolle nadeijum, nanghon jong chutobang chun bolun; ijeh-inem itile hichu dan thupeh le themgaoho thu ahi." 
Matthew7:13 Kot jima lutnun; ijeh-inem itile manna lam chu akot jatah ahin, alampi jong lentah ahi, chule chua lut chu tamtah ahi." 
Matthew7:14 Hinna lam chu akot jong ajimin, alampi akichin, chule hichu amua alhome." 
Matthew7:15 Kelngoi von kivona asunglamla ngei hangtah hia themgao lhem, naheng uva hungjiho-a konchun kichih theijun." 
Matthew7:16 Amaho chu agauva nahet jeng dingu ahi. Mihemin lingphunga lengpiga aloa, ahiloule meithai seltho linga theichang alo ngaijem?" 
Matthew7:17 Hiche bang chun thingphung pha jouse aga aphan, thingphung lungvei chun ga phalou asepdoh jin ahi." 
Matthew7:18 Thingphung pha-a aphalou gathei lou; chule thingphung phalouva jong apha gathei lou ahi. 
Matthew7:19 Thingphung aga phalou chengse chu kiphuh lhu-a meija kisep lutji ahi. 
Matthew7:20 Hijeh chun nanghon amaho chu agauva nahet dingu ahi. 
Matthew7:21 Pakai, Pakai, eiti chan chu van lenggama lut ding ahipoi; koi hileh van'a um ka Pa lunglam bolpabou chu lut ding ahi." 
Matthew7:22 Hiche ni chule mi tamtah-in kajah-a, Pakai, Pakai, keihon nangma mina thu kasei lou uham? Chule nangma mina thilha kanodoh lou uham? Chule nangma mina bolmo kidang kabol lou uham, ati dingu ahi." 
Matthew7:23 Hiteng chule keiman amaho chu phongtah-a kaseipeh-a, Keiman nangho imatihchanin kahekhapouve; vo chonset bolteho, kakoma konin chemangun, kati ding ahi." 
Matthew7:24 Hijeh chun koi hijongle kathu hicheng hi ja-a, bola chu, song chunga in sa milungthim phatah toh kitekah ding ahi." 
Matthew7:25 Chuin go ahung jun, twi ahungsoh-in, hui ahung nungin, chuche in'a chun achun; ahin song chunga kibulphu ahi jeh-in alhupon ahi." 
Matthew7:26 Chule koi hijongle kathu hicheng hi ja-a, bol lou chu, nellei chunga in sa milungthim bei toh kitekah ding ahi." 
Matthew7:27 Chuin go ahung jun, twi ahungsoh-in, hui ahung nungin, chuche in chu ahin nuhtan ahile alhutai; chule alhuh chu nasatah ahi, ati." 
Matthew7:28 Chuin Jesu'n thu chucheng asei jouvin, mihonpi chun athuhil chu kidang asa lheh-un ahi," 
Matthew7:29 Ijeh inem itile Aman amaho danthu lekha sunho mihil banga hil louva, thuneitah banga amaho chu thu ahil ahi." 
Matthew8:1 Chujouvin ama molsang chunga konin akumsuh-in ahile, mipi tamtah-in anung ajuijun ahi." 
Matthew8:2 Chuin, veuvin, miphah khat ahenga ahungin, chibai ahung boh-in, Pakai, nangma nalung ahile keima eingimsah thei nahi, ahungtin ahi." 
Matthew8:3 Chuin Jesu'n akhut alhangin, athamin, Kalung ahi: ngimtan, ati. Chupet tah chun aphah chu adamtai." 
Matthew8:4 Chuin Jesu'n amapa jah-a chun, Ven, hiche thuhi koima jah-a sei hih-in, amavang chenlang thempu gakimu sahtan, chule amaho hettohsahna dingin Mosi thupehsa thilto ding chu gatohtan, ati." 
Matthew8:5 Chuin Jesu Capernaum alutnin ahile, sepai jalamkai khat ahenga ahungin, ngehna aneijin," 
Matthew8:6 Pakai, kasohpa alangthin in'a alumin, anat athohlel lheh jenge, atin ahi." 
Matthew8:7 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Hunging ting hung damsah nange ati." 
Matthew8:8 Chuin hiche sepai jalamkai chun adonbutnin, Pakai, nangma ka-in sunga nahung lut ding chu, keima chutia kilom kahipoi; nangman thuchengcha khat seile chun, kasohpa dam jeng ding ahi." 
Matthew8:9 Ijeh-inem itile keima jong mi thuneina noija um kahin, keima noija sepaiho aumun; chule keiman khatpenpen chu, Chen, katile, achen; achomkhat, Hungin, katile, ahungin; chule kasoh jah-a, Hiche bolin, katile, aboljin ahi, ati." 
Matthew8:10 Jesu'n chuche thu ajah phatnin, kidang asan, anunga hungho jah-a chun, Keiman tahbeh-a nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Israel lah jenga jong hitobang tahsan len khatcha jong kamu khapoi." 
Matthew8:11 Chule keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Niso lama konle nilhum lama konin mi tamtah hungintin, Abraham, Isaac, chule Jacob toh van lenggama toukhom ding ahiuve;" 
Matthew8:12 Amavang lenggam chate polam muthim lah-a kipaidoh ding ahiuve; hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi, ati." 
Matthew8:13 Chuin Jesu'n sepai jalamkai jah-a, Nangma chetan, natahsan bangin nachunga lhunghen, ati. Chuphattah chun achapang chu adamtai." 
Matthew8:14 Chujouvin Jesu Peter in'a alutna ahile, anupanu khosih veija na analup amun;" 
Matthew8:15 Chuin aman amanu khut agah thamin ahile, akhosih chu adalhatai. Chuin ahung thouvin, amaho jenlen apangtai." 
Matthew8:16 Chuin nilhah-in mihon thilha vop mi tamtah ahenga ahinpuijun; aman thilhaho chu anodoh-in, chule ana jouse adamsah tai." 
Matthew8:17 Isaiah themgaovin, Amatah-in ihatmonau alan, inat jouseu apomangtai, tia asei chu guilhuna dinga chuti ahi." 
Matthew8:18 Chujouvin Jesu'n akimvela mipi tamtah chu amun, gal lang khat lama che din thu apetai." 
Matthew8:19 Hiche pet chun danthu sunho khat ahenga ahungin, Houhil, nachena chan-ah juijinge, ati." 
Matthew8:20 Jesu'n amapa jah-a, Sial hon ko aneijun, chunga leng vachaten jong buh aneijun, Mihem Chapa vangin alu ngapna ding mun aneipoi, ati." 
Matthew8:21 Chuin aseijui dangho lah-a khatnin ajah-a, Pakai, amasa kache-a kapa kagavuina din thu neipen, ati." 
Matthew8:22 Jesu'n ama jah-a, Nangman kanung hinjuitan: mithihon amithiu kivui naovinte, ati." 
Matthew8:23 Chujouvin ama kong'a atouvin ahile, aseijuite chun anung ajuijun ahi." 
Matthew8:24 Hichun, veuvin, dillen'a chun khopihui hanunin anungin, twi kinongin kong chu ahin khu jengtan ahi; ahivangin ama a-imun ahi." 
Matthew8:25 Chuin aseijuiho ahenga ahungun, asukhangun, Pakai, neihuhhing un: athigam ding kahitaove, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew8:26 Chuin aman ajah uva, Vo tahsan lhomho, ibola kicha-a nahiuvem? ati. Chutah-in ama athouvin, huipi le dillen chu aphoh-in ahile, athip heltai." 
Matthew8:27 Chuin miho chun adatmo lheh jengun, Ama hi iti mi hingana, huipi le dillen sanin athu angaije, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew8:28 Chuin ama agalkaija Gargesenes gam alhunin, thilhavop mi ni lhankhuh-a konin amatoh kitoh dingin ahung lhonin; amani chu khohtah ahi lhonin hilam chu koimachan ahothei louhel ahi." 
Matthew8:29 Hichun, veuvin, amani chu a-ao jah lhonin, nangma Pathen Chapa, Jesu, Nangle keiho ipi ikimatnao umam? Ni kitep lhin masanga eibolgim dinga hunga nahim? ati lhone." 
Matthew8:30 Hipet chun aumnao gallampeh-a chun vohcha hon khat alhan ahi. 
Matthew8:31 Hichun thilhaho chun Jesu henga, Keiho neikaidoh ule, khuche vohcha hon lah-a khun neisol uvin, tin angeh taovin ahi." 
Matthew8:32 Chuin aman ajah uva, Cheovin, ati. Chuin apotdoh-un, vohchaho sunga chun alut taovin ahi; chuin, veuvin, ahonchangpin halhaijin alhaijun, kolah alhai lhauvin, dillenah alha lutnun, twijah athigam taovin ahi." 
Matthew8:33 Chuin achingho chu khopi sung lama ajamlutnun, thu umchan jouse le thilhavop miteni thu chu agaseijun ahi." 
Matthew8:34 Chuin, veuvin, khosunga mi jouse Jesu toh kimuto dingin ahungdoh-un; chuin ama amu phatnun, agam sunguva kona chedoh dingin angeh taovin ahi." 
Matthew9:1 Chujouvin kong'a atouvin, agalkaijin, akhopi ah alut tai." 
Matthew9:2 Chuin, veuvin, mihon alupna khun pumin langthi khat ahenga ahinpu uvin; Jesu'n atahsanjeu chu amun, langthipa jah-a chun, Chapa, lungmong tah-in umin, nachonset kingaidam ahitai, ati." 
Matthew9:3 Hichun, veuvin, danthu sunho kimkhatnin alungthimun, Hipa hin Pathen ataitome, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew9:4 Hichun Jesu'n alung gelu chu ahen, Nanghon nalunguva ibola lungilou navopmu ham?" 
Matthew9:5 Nachonset naho kingaidama ahitai, tileh thouvin lamjotnin, ti, hoijoh seibaijo-am?" 
Matthew9:6 Ahoi hita jongle Mihem Chapan leiset chunga mihemte chonset ngaidam theina thahat aneije ti nahetna dingu ahi atin, hichun alangthipa jah-a, Thouvin, nalupna kilah-inlang na-in'a chetan, ati." 
Matthew9:7 Chuin amapa athouvin, a-in lama achetai." 
Matthew9:8 Ahin mipin hichu amu phatnun, kidang asauvin, hitobang thuneina mihemte pe-a Pathen chu avahchoi taovin ahi." 
Matthew9:9 Chuin Jesu chua konin achen ahile, mi khat amin Matthew kiti, akaidonna mun'a atou amun, ajah-a, Kanung hinjuijin, ati. Chuin ama akipatdoh-in, anung ajuitai." 
Matthew9:10 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jesu chuche in'a an nedingin atouvin ahile, veuvin, kaidongho le michonseho tamtah ahungun, Jesu le aseijuiteho chutoh ankong aum khomun ahi." 
Matthew9:11 Chuin Pharisai hon chuche amu phatnun, aseijuite henga, Nahilpauvin ibola kaidongho le michonsehotoh an aneh khomham? atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew9:12 Ahin Jesu'n chuche ajan, Atidamten louthem angaipouve; adamlouten bou angaijui." 
Matthew9:13 Keiman kithoina kangehpoi, kikhoto nabou kangeh-e, ti hi ipi kiseina ahi gakihilun; ijeh-inem itile keima michonpha te kou-a hung kahipoi, alungheina diuva michonse te kou-a hungjoh kahibouve, ati." 
Matthew9:14 Chupettah chun John seijuite ahenga ahungun, ajah-a, Keiho le Pharisai honla an kangol matchet jiuvin, ibola nangma seijuiten an angolji louvu ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew9:14 Chupettah chun John seijuite ahenga ahungun, ajah-a, Keiho le Pharisai honla an kangol matchet jiuvin, ibola nangma seijuiten an angolji louvu ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew9:15 Chuin Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Moulang chun aloite aumpilai sungse-a aloite chu kingaise thei ngaijuvem? Amavang moulang chu akomuva kona kipuimang ni hung lhung ding ahin, chuteng chule amahon an angol dingu ahi." 
Matthew9:16 Koiman ponthah halin pon lui abeh ngaipoi, ijeh inem itile abehna chun apon chu loisentin, secheh joding ahi." 
Matthew9:17 Chule mihemin lengpitwi thah savun peng luija akhum ngaipoi; achuti loule apeng chu tumkeh intin, atwi longjal ding, apeng jong mahthah ding ahi: amavang lengpitwi thah chu peng thah-a akhum jiuvin, chule anin akihuh bitjin ahi, ati." 
Matthew9:18 Hicheng thu chu asei pettah-in, veuvin, vaipo khat ahungin, ama chibai ahung boh-in, Kachanu tutah chun athin ahi; ahivangin nangma hungin lang achunga nakhut hung ngamle chun amanu hing jeng ding ahi, ahungtin ahi." 
Matthew9:19 Chuin Jesu akipatdoh-in, anung ajuijin, chutichun aseijuiten jong ajuijun ahi." 
Matthew9:20 Chuin veuvin, kum somle kum ni athi longa na-a numei khat anung lama ahungin, apon mongkai chu ahung thamtan ahi." 
Matthew9:21 Ijeh inem itile amanun alungthima, Apon jengcha hi thamkha jongleng kadam ding ahi, ati ahi." 
Matthew9:22 Chuin Jesu akiheijin, amanu chu amun, Chanu, lungmong tah-in umin; natahsanin nadamsah ahitai, ati. Chua pat chun amanu adamheltai." 
Matthew9:23 Chujouvin Jesu vaipopa in ahung lut phatnin, sumkuli mut teho leh mipi poh vengvung chu amun," 
Matthew9:24 Amaho jah-a chun, Potdoh-un; ijeh-inem itile chapangnu chu athi ahipoi, a-ihmu ahibouve, ati. Chuin amahon anuisat taovin ahi." 
Matthew9:25 Ahivangin miho chu akisoldoh phatnin, in sunga alutnin, chapangnu khut atuh-in ahile amanu athoutai." 
Matthew9:26 Hichun hiche gamsesea chun hiche thu chu akithang sohtai. 
Matthew9:27 Chuin Jesu chua konin achedoh-in ahile, mitcho ni anung nunga ache lhonin, Vo David chapa, neilungset in, tin asam lhonin ahi." 
Matthew9:28 Chuin ama in sung alut phatnin, hiche mitcho teni chu ahenga ahung lhonin; Jesu'n ajah lhonah, Kei hin hichu bolthei jinte ti natahsan lhonem? tin adongin ahi. Amanin, Henge, Pakai, ati lhonin ahi." 
Matthew9:29 Chutah-in aman amit lhonchu akhoijin, Nathsan bang lhonin nachung lhonah chutahen, ati." 
Matthew9:30 Hichun amit lhon ahahtai. Chuin Jesu'n amani chu hakhamin akhamin, Chingthei lhonin, koima hetsah lhon hih-in, ati." 
Matthew9:31 Ahivangin amani apot lhonin, chuche gamsese-a chun ama min chu aphongjal lhontai." 
Matthew9:32 Chuin acheuvin ahile, veuvin, lampia thilhavop mi paomo khat ahengah ahinpuijun ahi." 
Matthew9:33 Thilha chu akideldoh phatnin, paomopa chu apaotai. Hichun mipi chun kidang asauvin, Israel lah-a hitobang akimukha hih-e, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew9:34 Pharisaiho vangin, Thilha ho lengpa mina thilhaho adeldoh hichu, atiuve." 
Matthew9:35 Chujouvin Jesu khotinle vengtina avahle avahlen, akikhopnao intin-ah thu ahillen, lenggam Kipana Thupha ahil lhanglen, hivei namkimle nat namkim adamsahtan ahi." 
Matthew9:36 Ahin miho chu achingbei kelngoi banga, lhasamle chehchao tah-a aumu amu phatnin, alung selheh-in ahi" 
Matthew9:37 Chuphatnin aseijuite jah-a, Chang-at ding tam lheh-in, ahivangin natonga alhome." 
Matthew9:38 Hijeh chun achang at dinga natongho ahinsol nadingin, louneipu henga taovun, ati." 
Matthew10:1 Chuin aman aseijui somleni chu akoma akouvin, lhagao boh nomang dingle, hivei namkim le nat namkim damsah dingin, amaho chu thuneina apen ahi." 
Matthew10:2 Hiche solchah somleni ho chu aminu hicheng hi ahi: Amasan Peter kiti Simon le anaopa Andrew, Zebedai chapa Jacob le anaopa John," 
Matthew10:2 Hiche solchah somleni ho chu aminu hicheng hi ahi: Amasan Peter kiti Simon le anaopa Andrew, Zebedai chapa Jacob le anaopa John," 
Matthew10:3 Philip le Bartholomew, Thomas le kaidong Matthew, Alphaeus chapa Jacob le Lebbaeus aminchom Thaddaeus;" 
Matthew10:4 Chule Canaan mi Simon le ama matsah-a pang Judas Iscariot ahi. 
Matthew10:5 Hicheng somleni chu asolin, thu apen, ajah uve, Chidang namdang koima lampi jot hih-un, chule Samaria ho khopi sung khatcha-a jong lut hih-un;" 
Matthew10:6 Amavang chu sangin Israel insung mi amangsa kelngoi henga cheovin. 
Matthew10:7 Chule nache pumun, Vangam anaitai, tin hillhang leuvin." 
Matthew10:8 Anaho damsah-unlang, athi thouvun, aphahho suthengun, chule thilha nodoh-un; manbeija nasanu ahin, manbeijin homun." 
Matthew10:9 Nanghon nadangka dip sunguva sana, dangka, sumsan kiken hih-un;" 
Matthew10:10 chule najinnaova dingin sakhao ahiloule sangkhol thoni, kengchot, tengol kiken hih-un; ijeh-inem itile natongan aneh ding amua lom ahi." 
Matthew10:11 Chule nacheuva khopi sung hile khoneo sung hile nalut tengule, lhunna-a kilom koi umam phatechan ngaitouvin; chule chua kona napotdoh kahseuvin hikoma chun umun." 
Matthew10:12 Chule in khatna nalut tengule, hiche in chu phatthei boh-un." 
Matthew10:13 Chule hiche in chu phatthei changhoi ahile, nalungmonnau chu achungah umhen; achanghoi ahi louvangle hiche lungmonna chu naheng uva hung kile kittahen." 
Matthew10:14 Chule koi hile nalhunsah louvule nathu seiju ngai lou chu, chuche in'a konle chuche kho-a kona napotdoh tengule, nakengphang uva leivui sanin thinglhau vin." 
Matthew10:15 Keiman nangho jah-a tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Thupi kitan nile chuche kho umchan sanga chu Sodom le Gomorrah gam umchan thohbai joding ahi." 
Matthew10:16 Veuvin, keiman nangho ngeihon lah-a kelngoi banga kasol nahiuve; hijeh chun nangho gul bangin lungthim themun, vakhu bangin suhset neilou hiuvin." 
Matthew10:17 Ahivangin mihem lamah kichih theijun; ijeh-inem itile amahon nangho thutan vaihom kikhopna-a pedoh-un natin, chule akikhopnao in'a navoh dingu ahi." 
Matthew10:18 Chule amahole chidang namdangte hetsahna dinga, gamvaipote le leng teho anga keima jala hung kikai ding nahiuve." 
Matthew10:19 Ahivangin min napehdoh tengule, ipi iti nasei dingu lungkham hih-un; sei ding chan chu apettah-le nakipe dingu ahi." 
Matthew10:20 Ijeh-inem itile thuseija chu nangho hilouvin, na-Pau Lhagaovin nalung sunguva asei ahibouve." 
Matthew10:21 Chule asopin asopi, pan acha tha dinga ahinpehdoh ding; anu le apa douna-a chate dingdoh diu, chule athi nadiu ahin boldoh dingu ahi." 
Matthew10:22 Chule keima min jala nangho mi jouse hotna nahung umdingu ahi; ahin akhon ni geija thohlhum keija pangdetpa bou chu huhhing-a umding ahi. 
Matthew10:23 Hiche khopi-a min nabolset tengule, khopi dangah jam lutnun; ijeh-inem itile tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Mihem Chapa ahung masanga, Israelte khopi jouse nachotsoh lou dingu ahi." 
Matthew10:24 Ahilpa sangin aseijui achungnung jopoi, a-pakai sangin jong asoh achungnung jopoi." 
Matthew10:25 Aseijui chu ahilpa toh, chule soh a-pakaipa toh akikotle aphaset ahi. Amahon a-inneipu pen bon Belzabul atiule, a-insung mite chu iti atida dingu ham?" 
Matthew10:26 Hijeh chun nanghon amaho chu kicha hih-un; ijeh-inem itile akiphongdoh lou ding akisela imacha aumpoi, chule hetdoh lou ding imacha aki-ima aumpoi." 
Matthew10:27 Keiman nangho jah-a muthima kasei chu, nanghon khovah-a seijun; nanauva najah-u chu, in chunga saptho uvin." 
Matthew10:28 Chule natahsao thatna, lhagao that theilou ho chu kicha hih-un; lhagaole tahsa akopma damuna sumang theipa bou chu kichaovin." 
Matthew10:29 Vasilih ni paisa khat manna kilhaji louham? Achuti vangin na-Pau thu louvin hitiho chu khatcha jong tolla lha lou ding ahi. 
Matthew10:30 Nalu chunguva nasam jang jouseu jong kisim sohkeija ahi; 
Matthew10:31 Hijeh chun kicha hih-un; vasilih tamtah sanga nangho lujo nahiuve. 
Matthew10:32 Hijeh chun koi hile miho anga kei eiphongdoh chan chu, keiman jong van'a ka Pa anga kaphondoh ding ahi." 
Matthew10:33 Amavang koi hile miho anga keima eiseileppa vang chu, keiman jong van'a ka Pa anga kaseilep ding ahi." 
Matthew10:34 Leichunga chamna hinpo dinga hungin neingaito hih-un; chamna hilouvin chemjam hinpo joh-a hung kahibouve. 
Matthew10:35 Ijeh-inem itile achapa chu apa dousah ding, achanu chu anu dousah ding, amounu chu atehpi dousah dingjoh-a hung kahibouve." 
Matthew10:36 Chule mihem amelma chu ama insung mitetah hi ding ahi. 
Matthew10:37 Koi hile keima sanga anu le apa ngailujo-a chu keija hoi ahipoi; chule koi hile keima sanga achanu le achapa ngailujo-a chu keija hoi ahipoi. 
Matthew10:38 Chule koi hijongle athingpel kiputna kanung hinjui lou jong chu, keija hoi ahipoi." 
Matthew10:39 Koi hile ahinna mu-a chun achan ding; chule keima jala ahinna channa chun amu ding ahi. 
Matthew10:40 Koi hile nangho lhunsah-a chun keima eilhunsah ahin; chule koi hile keima eilhunsah-a chun eisolpa alhunsah ahi. 
Matthew10:41 Themgao mina themgao lhunsah-a chun themgao kipaman asan ding; chule michonpha tia michonpha lhunsah-a chun, michonpha kipaman asan ding ahi." 
Matthew10:42 Koi hile hiche neochaho lah-a hi seijui ahi tia twi dap khon khat jengcha don dinga pechan chun, tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, iti nama jongle kipaman asan ding achan louding ahi." 
Matthew11:1 Hitichun Jesu'n aseijui somleni ho chu thu apeh jouvin, chukom mun'a kon chun akhotin uva thu hille dingle seiphongle dingin achetan ahi." 
Matthew11:2 Chuin John'in songkulah Christa thilbol umchan thu ajan ahileh, aseijui mini asolin," 
Matthew11:2 Chuin John'in songkulah Christa thilbol umchan thu ajan ahileh, aseijui mini asolin," 
Matthew11:3 Chule ajah-a, Ahung dinga chu nangma nahimong hinam, ole achom dang khat kanga dinguham? agatisah-in ahi." 
Matthew11:4 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah lhona, Nangni chelhonin lang nathujah chengse lhon le nathilmu chengse lhon hi John jah-a gasei lhontan:" 
Matthew11:4 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah lhona, Nangni chelhonin lang nathujah chengse lhon le nathilmu chengse lhon hi John jah-a gasei lhontan:" 
Matthew11:5 Mitchon kho amutai, elbaijin lam ajottai, miphah suhthengin aumin, chule na-ngongin kho ajatan, mi thisa kaithouvin aumtai, chule mivaichate Kipana Thupha akiseipeh tai." 
Matthew11:6 Chule koi hijongle keija kipal lhuhna nei lou chu anunnom ahi, ati." 
Matthew11:7 Chuin amani chu ache nungin aman mipi jah-a chun, John thudol asei panin, Ipi ve dinga gamthipma chu nachedoh-uham? Huijin peng amut lingham?" 
Matthew11:7 Chuin amani chu ache nungin aman mipi jah-a chun, John thudol asei panin, Ipi ve dinga gamthipma chu nachedoh-uham? Huijin peng amut lingham?" 
Matthew11:8 Achutile ipi ve dingaba chedoh nahiuvem? Ponnem kisil mi ham? Veuvin, ponnem sil hokhu leng in'a um ahiuve." 
Matthew11:9 Ibola nachedoh uham? Themgao ve dinga ong? Ahi, kaseipeh nahiuve, themgao sanga chungnungjo ahi." 
Matthew11:10 Ven, keiman kasottol namasang sanga kasole; Aman namasang sanga nalampi asem ding ahi, tia kisun chu ama hi ahi." 
Matthew11:11 Najah uva tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Numei sunga peng lah-a John Baptist sanga lenjo koima asohdoh khapoi, ahivangin van lenggama aneojo chu ama sanga lenjo ahi." 
Matthew11:11 Najah uva tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Numei sunga peng lah-a John Baptist sanga lenjo koima asohdoh khapoi, ahivangin van lenggama aneojo chu ama sanga lenjo ahi." 
Matthew11:12 Chule John Baptist nikho-a pat tugeija hi van lenggam hin gimbolna athoh ahin, chule mi gimbol hochun pumhatnin alauvin ahi." 
Matthew11:12 Chule John Baptist nikho-a pat tugeija hi van lenggam hin gimbolna athoh ahin, chule mi gimbol hochun pumhatnin alauvin ahi." 
Matthew11:13 Ijeh-inem itile themgaoho jouse le danthun John phat geija chu gaothu aseiju ahitai. 
Matthew11:13 Ijeh-inem itile themgaoho jouse le danthun John phat geija chu gaothu aseiju ahitai. 
Matthew11:14 Chule nanghon hiche hi sanding nanop uva ahile, amachu ahung dinga kisei Elijah chu ahi." 
Matthew11:15 Angaina ding na neijan ngaihen. 
Matthew11:16 Tu khanga mite hi koitoh katekah tadem? Chapangho kaithel tolla touva, aloiho kou-a," 
Matthew11:17 Ajah uva, kuli kamutpeh-ule nalam hih-un; kakaule na-op nabeng pouve, tia seiho tobang nahiuve." 
Matthew11:18 Ijeh-inem itile John ahungin ne lou don lou ahin, hichun mihon thilhavop ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew11:18 Ijeh-inem itile John ahungin ne lou don lou ahin, hichun mihon thilhavop ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew11:19 Mihem Chapa ahungin anen adonin ahile, Veuvin, nehhat le julop, kaidongho le mi chonseho jolle gol ahi, atiuve. Ahinla chihna chu anatoh hon them achanan ahi, ati." 
Matthew11:20 Chuphatnin thilbol kidang ahabol dehna khoho chun alung ahei lou jeh-u chun, aphohsal pantan ahi." 
Matthew11:21 Ohe Chorazin, nada ahi! Ohe Bethsaida, nada ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nalah uva thilbol thahatna kidang kibol chengse chu, Tyre le Sidon khopi-a kibol hile, sotpia pat chun achenghon khaodip pon kisilpum le vut kinu pumin alungu heitao vinte." 
Matthew11:22 Ahinla keiman kasei peh nahiuve, Thupi tan nikho le nangho thoh ding sanga Tyre le Sidon thoh ding oljo ding ahi." 
Matthew11:23 Chule vangeija choisanga uma nang Capernaum, damuna notlhah-a umding nahi; ijeh-inem itile nalah uva thil kidang kibol chengse hi Sodom kho-a kibol hileh, tugei hin umnalai jinte." 
Matthew11:24 Chujongle tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Thupi tan nile nangho thoh ding sanga Sodam thoh ding oljo ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew11:25 Hiche pet chun Jesu apaovin, Vo ka Pa vanle lei Pakai, nangman michingte le lungthim themho hengah hicheng thuhi na-ima, naocha ho henga naphondoh jeh hin nangma kathangvah-e." 
Matthew11:26 Ahi, Pa, hiti chu nangma lunglhaina lam ahi." 
Matthew11:27 Imajouse ka-Pan keima eipehdohsoh ahitai; chule Pa tailou Chapa chu koimachan ahepoi; chule Chapa tailoule aman aphondoh nomnapa tailou koimachan Pa chu ahepoi. 
Matthew11:28 Tong gimte le pohgih te, kahenga hungun; keiman nangho cholngah sah-unge." 
Matthew11:29 Keima lungneng tah le nunnem tah kahi; hijeh chun kanamkoljon laovin lang keima-a kihilun; chutile nalunguva olna namu dingu ahi. 
Matthew11:30 Ijeh-inem itile kanamkoljon nomtah ahin, kapoh jong jangtah ahi, ati." 
Matthew12:1 Hichelai chun cholngah nin Jesu'n changlei lai ajotnin; aseijuite agil keltaovin ahile, changvui asih-un, anepan taovin ahi." 
Matthew12:2 Ahin Pharisai hon hichu amuvin, ama jah-a, Vetan, naseijui ten cholngah ni-a bol ngai lou abolui, atiuve." 
Matthew12:3 Chuin aman ajah uva, David'in aloitetoh agilkel uva abol chu nasim khah lou uham?" 
Matthew12:4 Pathen houin'a alutna, thempu tailou aman jong, aloiten jong neh ngai lou, vetsahna changlhah to aneh jengu chu!" 
Matthew12:5 Ahiloule houin'a um thempuhon cholngah ni nit louva aum jongun themmo achang pouvin ahi, tia danthubua kisei chu nasimdoh khah lou uham?" 
Matthew12:6 Ahin nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, Hikoma hin houin sanga chungnungjo khat aume." 
Matthew12:7 Chule, Keiman gana lhai kangehpoi, lungsetnabou kangeh-e, tia kisei hi ipi kiseina ahi anaheleu chun, themona nei louho chu nanathemmo sahlou dingu ahi." 
Matthew12:8 Ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa chu cholngah ni Pakai jong ahi, ati." 
Matthew12:9 Chuin chua konin achedoh-in akikhopnao in'ah alut-in ahi. 
Matthew12:10 Chuin, veuvin, hia chun mi akhutngoi khat aumin ahi. Chuin ahehset theina dingun, Cholngah ni-a hi boldam dan ngai hina hilouham, tin Jesu adongun ahi." 
Matthew12:11 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Nalah uva khattouvin kelngoi khat neihenlang, hichu cholngah nin kokhuh-a lhaluttaleh, gamana galoidoh lou ding koi naum uvem?" 
Matthew12:12 Chuti chu ahile kelngoi sanga mihem iti manlutjoh hitam! Hiche jeh chun cholngah ni-a thilpha bol angai ahi, ati." 
Matthew12:13 Chuphatnin mipa jah-a chun, Nakhut lhangin, ati. Mipa chun akhut alhangin ahile, alang khat bangin adamheltai." 
Matthew12:14 Ahin Pharisai ho apotdoh-un ama suhmangna thei ngaiton akihoukhom taovin ahi. 
Matthew12:15 Ahivangin Jesu'n hichu ahet phatnin, chukoma kon chun achemang tai. Chuin mi tamtah-in anung ajuijun, Aman abonchauvin aboldam sohkeijin;" 
Matthew12:16 chule, ama aphondoh louna dinguvin amaho chu akhamin ahi." 
Matthew12:17 Isaiah themgaovin asei: 
Matthew12:18 Veuvin, kalhentum kasottol, kadeitah achunga kalung lhainapa khu, Keiman achunga kalhagao kakoi ding, chule ama chidang namdangte henga dandih-a thutan na aphondoh ding ahi." 
Matthew12:19 Aman mi anel lou ding, aw sanga thu asei lou ding, Khosung lamlena koi man a-aw ajah louhel ding ahi." 
Matthew12:20 Ajosoh keija dandih-a thutan achaisoh masangse-a, pumpeng kihehchip kihehbong pai lou ding, chule thaomei pat khao jong athamit lou ding ahi." 
Matthew12:21 Chule Ama min chu chidang namdang ten Kinepna-a anei dingu ahi, ati chu guilhuna dinga chuti ahi, ati." 
Matthew12:22 Hichepet chun thilhan avop jeh-a paomo le mitcho khat ahenga ahinpuijun; Aman aboldamin ahile, paomopa chu apao theijin, kho jong amutai." 
Matthew12:23 Chuin mipi chengse chun kidang asa lheh-un, Ama hi David Chapa hilouham, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew12:24 Ahin Pharisai ho vang chun hichu aja-un, thilhaho lengpa Beelzabul toh kitho louvin hichepan thilha anodohpoi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew12:25 Chuin Jesu'n alunggelu chu ahen, ajah uva, Gamsung khat amale ama kidoutoa kichom khenchan chu amangthah jin, chule khopi khat hijongle insung khat hijongle kidoutoa kichom khenchan jong chu dingdoh lou ding ahi." 
Matthew12:26 Chule Satan'in Satan anodoh-a ahile, amale ama kidouva kichom khen ahin; achutile agam iti dingdoh dingham?" 
Matthew12:27 Chujongle keiman Beelzabul vanga thilhaho kanodoh ahile, nachateovin koi vanga anodohjiu hintem? Hijeh-a chu amaho cheng chu nangho thutana pang ding ahiuve." 
Matthew12:28 Ahin Keima Pathen Lhagao vanga thilhaho nodohji-a kahivangle, Pathen lenggam chu nahengu hung lhunga ahitai." 
Matthew12:29 Chuti ahi loule kon mihat chu kan masa louva a-in'a lutna, iti achom thei ngaijem? Akan masah-a chutengle achom jibou ahi." 
Matthew12:30 Koi hile keima lama panglou chu eidouva ahi; chule eikhop khompi lou chu athecheh ahi. 
Matthew12:31 Hijeh chun kaseipeh nahiuve, mihemte achonsetnao le Pathen ataitom nao jouse kingaidam ding ahi; Lhagao Theng taitoma vang chu kingaidam lou ding ahi." 
Matthew12:32 Chule koi hijongle Mihem Chapa douna-a thuseija chu kingaidam ding ahi; Lhagao Theng douna-a thuseija vang chu, tu hinlaijin jong, khonunga hinkho hung lhung dinga jong kingaidam louding ahi." 
Matthew12:33 Thingphung chu aphai nati ule, aga jong aphai tingalun, thingphung aphapoi nati ule, aga jong aphapoi tiuvin; ijeh-inem itile thingphung chu agan akihei." 
Matthew12:34 Vo gulse sonho, nanghon nagitlou pumpiuva thupha iti nasei thei dinguham? Ijeh-inem itile lung sunga aletna kona kamin aseidohji ahi." 
Matthew12:35 Miphan thilpha bom lungthima konin thilpha asodoh-in, chule misen thilse boma konin thilse asodohjin ahi." 
Matthew12:36 Ahin kaseipeh nahiuve, Mihemin manlou ding thu asei chengse hi, thupi kitan nile asuhto cheh dingu ahi." 
Matthew12:37 Nangma nathun them nachansah ding ahin, chule nathu maman themmo nachansah ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew12:38 Chuphatnin danthu sunho le Pharisai ho phabep khatnin adonbutnun, Houhil, nanga konin melchihna kamu nomuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew12:39 Ahin Aman adonbutnin, ajah uva, Migilou le mijong khanga miten melchihna aholui, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipe lou ding ahi." 
Matthew12:40 Ijeh-inem itile, Jonah ni thum le jan thum ngapi oisunga aum banga, mihem chapa jonghi ni thum le jan thum leigila umding ahi." 
Matthew12:41 Nineveh khopi-a miho chu thupi tanna-a tulai khang mite toh hung ding khoma, tulai khang hi themmo ahinchan dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Jonah thuhil chun alung aheijun ahi; ahin, veuvin, Jonah sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume." 
Matthew12:42 Lhanglam gam lengnu chu thupi tanna-a tulai khang mite toh hung ding khoma, tulai khang hi themmo ahinchan ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman kolmanga konin Solomon chihna thu ngai dingin ahungin ahi; ahin, veuvin, Solomon sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume." 
Matthew12:43 Lhagao boh chu mi sunga kona apotdoh tengle, twi beina muntin-ah avahle avahlen, cholngahna aholin, mula amujipoi." 
Matthew12:44 Chutengle aman, Kahung potdohna ka-in mama-a chun chekit tange, atin; chuin ahunga ahile, hichu agohkeo, akitheh ngim, chule akijephoi chu amun;" 
Matthew12:45 Chuin achen, ama sanga giloujo lhagao dang sagi agapuijin, chule amaho chua chun alutnun, acheng taove; chuin mipa umchan chu amasa sangin anununga akhohjo chehtan ahi. Tulai khang migiloute chunga jong hi chutobang ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew12:46 Aman mipi lah-a thu aseina laijin, veuvin, anule asopiten ama hou nom-in aholun, inpo-ah adingun ahi." 
Matthew12:47 Chuin mikhatnin ajah-a, Ven, nanu le nasopite nangma hou nom-in naholun, inpo-ah ading jinguve, ati." 
Matthew12:48 Ahin Aman chutia seipa chu adonbutnin, Kanu koiham? chule koiham kasopi? ati." 
Matthew12:49 Chuin aseijuite lama akhut ajah-in, Veuvin, hiteho hi kanule kasopite ahiuve!" 
Matthew12:50 Ijeh-inem itile van'a um ka Pa lung lama chonna chu, amatah chu kasopipa le kasopinu, chule kanu ahi, ati." 
Matthew13:1 Hiche nikho mama chun Jesu in'a konin apotdoh-in, dil pangah atouvin ahi." 
Matthew13:2 Chuin ahengah mipi tamtah ahung khomun, hijeh chun ama kong khatnah alutnin atoutai; chule mipi chengse chu vaokamah adingun ahi." 
Matthew13:3 Chuin amaho chu thulemin thu tamtah ahilin, Ngaijun, muchi thepa khat muchi the dingin achen," 
Matthew13:4 Athe atheleh muchi chu abang lamsih-a achun ahile, vachaten ahung lohgam taove." 
Matthew13:5 Abang songlheo chung leipatna-ah achun, alei asa lou jeh-in akehdohpai jengin;" 
Matthew13:6 Ahivangin nisa ahung soh-in ahile, asanggon; jung anei lou jeh-in agoptan ahi." 
Matthew13:7 Abang ling lah-a achun, aling chu ahung khangin adepmang tai." 
Matthew13:8 Adangho vang lei pha laijah achun, abang ajat jakhat, abang ajat somgup, abang ajat somthumin agan ahi." 
Matthew13:9 Angaina ding na neijan ngaihen, ati." 
Matthew13:10 Chuin aseijuite ahenga ahungun ajah-a, Ibola amaho jah-a chu thulema naseiham, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew13:11 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Nangho vang van lenggam thuguh chu nahet dinguva kipe-a nahitaove; ahin amaho hi kipe lou ahiuve." 
Matthew13:12 Ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle aneija chu kipehbentin anei letset ding ahi, aneilouva chu aneichasun jong chu ama-a kona kilahpeh ding ahi." 
Matthew13:13 Hiche jeh-a hi ajah uva thulema kasei ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon amu vangun amu hih-un, ana-a ajah vangun aja hih-un, angainaje jong ahepouve." 
Matthew13:14 Chule Isaiah themgaovin khonunga thusoh ding asei: Nanghon ja vang janaovin natin, angainaje nahet lou dingu, mu vang munao vin natin, nahetdoh lou dingu ahi." 
Matthew13:15 Ijeh-inem itile hiche nam mite hin Amitnuva amuva, anauva ajah uva, alunga jong ahetdoh uva, chule ahung kihei kit uva, keiman amaho chu kadamsah louna dinga, alungu thaovin atoma, chule akolseh uva, chule amit asinu ahi, tia asei chu achunguva guilhunga ahi." 
Matthew13:16 Nangho mitnin vang amu jeh-in mit nunnom ahin, nanau vin jong ajah jeh-in nakol nunnom ahi." 
Matthew13:17 Ijeh-inem itile tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Themgao tamtah le michonpha tamtah-in nangho thilmu hi mu atup lhehji uvin, ahivangin amupouvin ahi; chule nathu jah chengseu hi jah atupmun, ahinla ajapouvin ahi." 
Matthew13:18 Hiche jeh chun muchi thepa thulem chu ngaijun. 
Matthew13:19 Koi hile gamsung thu ajah tenga angainaje helou chu, hiche pettah chun agilou chu ahungin, alung sunga kithesa chengse chu alah mangpeh jitan ahi. Hichepa chu akithe lamsih-a chua chu ahi." 
Matthew13:20 Akithea songlheo chunga leipatna-a chua chu, thu ajah jah-a thanom tah-a joppai jenga chu ahi;" 
Matthew13:21 Ahivangin alung sunga ajung anei lou jeh-in, ni chomkhat aumjibouve; ijeh inem itile thu jeh-a genthei hesohna le bolsetna aum phat phatle, alhupai jitai." 
Matthew13:22 Chule akithea linglah-a chua chu ahile, thu chu ajan, hinla leiset hinkho lungkhamna le lheplhahna dimset haona lungthim chun thu chu adeplihjin, ga louvin aumjitai." 
Matthew13:23 Chule a kithe-a leipha laija chua vang chu, thu ja-a, angainaje he-a chu ahi; ama chu aga tahbeh-in, chule abang ajat jakhat, abang ajat somgup, abang ajat somthumin aga pungjin ahi." 
Matthew13:24 Aman amaho jah uva chun thulem chomkhat asei kitnin, van lenggam chu mi khat aloulaija muchipha the-a toh kitekah ahi." 
Matthew13:25 Ahin miho imut petnin, amelma chu ahungin, achang lah-a chun changlhem athepeh-in, achemang tan ahi." 
Matthew13:26 Chuin chang kung chu ahung khangtouvin, avui adoh-in ahile, chuphatnin changlhem jong chu akilahdoh-in ahi." 
Matthew13:27 Chuin aneipa sohte ahenga ahungun ajah-a, Hepu, nalouva khu muchi pha nathe louham? Ahile hoilam kona changlhem kehham, atiuve." 
Matthew13:28 Aman ajah uva, Melma khattou bol hija chu, ati. Chuin asohten ajah-a, Achutile cheovinlang changlhem chengse gachom khom leuveng nalungham? atiuve." 
Matthew13:29 Ahin aman adonbutnin, Angaipoi, chutile changlhem nabodoh khomna lamuvin, changtah jong bodohtha getnun nate." 
Matthew13:30 A-at phat kahsen khantha nante, chang at tengle keiman chang at dingho jah-a, Changlhem chu govam dingin khomun lang kankhomun, changtah vang chu kachang pangah koilut taovin, tinange, ati, tin aseije." 
Matthew13:31 Thulem dang khat ajah uva asei kitnin, van lenggam chu mikhatnin alah-a, chule alouva athe, ankam mu tobang ahi." 
Matthew13:32 Hichu muchi dang dang sangin aneopenin, ahivangin akedoh-a akhandoh phatnin, hampa dang sangin aphung lenjon, thing asohtan, chutichun chunga leng vachaho abah lah-a ahung gehjitai, ati." 
Matthew13:33 Amaho jah-a thulem khatma asei kitnin, van lenggam chu numei khatnin alah-a, chule changbong dan thum lah-a avuija, aboncha apomsoh kahse-a abil, chol tobang ahi." 
Matthew13:34 Jesu'n mipi jah-a hichengse chu abonchan thulemin aseijin; chule thulem louvin ajah uva imacha aseipon ahi. 
Matthew13:35 Themgao thu seisa, Keiman thulem seinan kakam kangting leiset kisemtila patna thuguh chengse kaphondoh ding ahi, ati chu guilhuna dinga chuti ahi." 
Matthew13:36 Chujouvin Jesu'n mipi chu asolmangin, chuin insunga alut tan ahi. Chuin aseijuite ahenga ahungun, loulaija changlhem ke thulem chu neiseidoh peh-un ahungtiuve." 
Matthew13:37 Chuin Aman adonbutnin, Muchi pha the-a chu Mihem Chapa ahi;" 
Matthew13:38 Lou chu vannoi leiset ahi; muchi pha chu lenggam chate ahiuvin; changlhem chu migiloupa chate ahiuve; 
Matthew13:39 Melma athea chu diabol ahi; changkhop phat chu vannoi leiset kichai ni ahin, chang atteho chu vantilte ahiuve." 
Matthew13:40 Hijeh-a chu changlhem chengse achop khomuva meija ago banguva chu, vannoi leiset kichai ni jongle chuti ding ahi." 
Matthew13:41 Mihem Chapan avantilte solintin, chule amahon gamsunga konin midoudal te chengse le akhang giloute jouse chomkhom untin," 
Matthew13:42 Lhum sunga aselut dingu ahi; hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi. 
Matthew13:43 Chutengle michonpha te chengse a-Pau lenggama nisa banga vah ding ahiuve. Angaina ding na nei neijan ngaihen. 
Matthew13:44 Chujongle van lenggam chu loulaija kiselgu thillu tobang ahi: hichu mi khattouvin amudoh-in, aselgun; chule kipahtah-in achen anei jouse ajoh-in, hiche louchu achon ahi." 
Matthew13:45 Chule van lenggam chu sumkolvei mi twikokchang phatah hola toh abange. 
Matthew13:46 Ama chun twikokchang man tamtah khat amun, chuin achen anei jouse ajoh-in hichu achon ahi." 
Matthew13:47 Chule van lenggam chu len khat twikhanglen'a kisep ngatin ngatang huikhoma tobang ahi. 
Matthew13:48 Hiche len chu adim phatnin, mihon vaokamah akaidoh-un; hikoma chun atouvun, apha chacha alheng khomun bomah akhumun, aphalou chengse apaitauve." 
Matthew13:49 Hiche banga chu vannoi leiset kichai ni jongle chuti ding ahi: vantilte hunguntin, michonpha lah-a konin michonse lakhenuntin, amaho chu lhum sunga aselut dingu ahi." 
Matthew13:50 Hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi, ati." 
Matthew13:51 Jesu'n ajah uva, hicheng chu angaije nahettah uvem? tin adongin ahi. Chuin amahon ajah-a, Henge, Pakai, atiuve." 
Matthew13:52 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Chuti ahi jeh chun danthusun van lenggam seijui chengse chu, athil manlu lah-a kona thil athahle alui sodoh-ah inneipu khat tobang ahiuve, ati." 
Matthew13:53 Jesu'n thulem hicheng chu asei jouvin, chukoma kon chun akipat dohtai." 
Matthew13:54 Chuin ama gam lamah ahungin, miho chu akikhopnao in'ah ahiltan ahi; chuti chun amahon kidang asa lheh jengun, Hichepa chihna le thil kidang boltheina hi hoija kon hijaham?" 
Matthew13:55 Ama hi thing thembol chapa hilouham? Anu min Mariam, chule anaote min Jacob, Joses, Simon, chule Judas hilouham?" 
Matthew13:56 Chule asopinute jong hi koma ilah uva cheng hilouham? Achutile hichengpi hi hoija akilah ham? atiuvin ahi. 
Matthew13:57 Chutichun achungah alung himo taovin ahi. Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah uva, Themgao chu ama gamsung le ama a-insung tailouvah jabol louvin aum ngaipoi, ati." 
Matthew13:58 Atahsan lou jeh-u chun aman chukoma chun thil kidang atam boltapon ahi. 
Matthew14:1 Hiche laitah chun Herod lengpan Jesu thu kithan chu ajan," 
Matthew14:2 Ajenleho jah-a, Hiche hi John Baptist ahi; ama athia kona thoudoh kit ahitai; chuche jeh-a chu chuti thil kidang boltheina chu ama-a uma abol ahi, ati;" 
Matthew14:2 Ajenleho jah-a, Hiche hi John Baptist ahi; ama athia kona thoudoh kit ahitai; chuche jeh-a chu chuti thil kidang boltheina chu ama-a uma abol ahi, ati;" 
Matthew14:3 Ijeh-inem itile Herod chun anaopa Philip jinu Herodia jala, hiche masanga chu John amatna, akana, songkul'a akhum ahi." 
Matthew14:3 Ijeh-inem itile Herod chun anaopa Philip jinu Herodia jala, hiche masanga chu John amatna, akana, songkul'a akhum ahi." 
Matthew14:4 Ajehchu John'in ajah-a, Amanu chu ji-a naneiding chu dan ngai ahipoi, anati ahi." 
Matthew14:4 Ajehchu John'in ajah-a, Amanu chu ji-a naneiding chu dan ngai ahipoi, anati ahi." 
Matthew14:5 Hiche chun lengpan ama chu tha dinga agot vangin, mihon John chu themgao ahi tia angaito jeh-un, miho chu akichan ahi." 
Matthew14:5 Hiche chun lengpan ama chu tha dinga agot vangin, mihon John chu themgao ahi tia angaito jeh-un, miho chu akichan ahi." 
Matthew14:6 Ahivangin Herod aso nikho alhinin, Herodia chanu chu amasanguva ahung lamin, Herod chu alung lhaisah tan ahi." 
Matthew14:7 Hichun amanu chu ipi hijongle athum chan pe dingin akihahsel leuvin ateptan ahi. 
Matthew14:8 Chuin amanu chun, anun ana thuhilsa ahi jehchun, John Baptist luchang kong khatnin hilaija hin neipen, ati." 
Matthew14:8 Chuin amanu chun, anun ana thuhilsa ahi jehchun, John Baptist luchang kong khatnin hilaija hin neipen, ati." 
Matthew14:9 Chuphatnin lengpa alungdongtan ahi; ahivangin akihahselna le a-ankong umpiho jal-in, peh ding thu apetai." 
Matthew14:10 Chuin mi asolin, songkul sunga John lu agatanden sahtan ahi." 
Matthew14:10 Chuin mi asolin, songkul sunga John lu agatanden sahtan ahi." 
Matthew14:11 Chuin aluchung chu kong khatnin ahin domun, nungahnu chu apeuvin; chuin amanun anu henga ahin choitan ahi." 
Matthew14:12 Chuphatnin aseijuite acheuvin, along chu agapuvin avuitaove. Chuin ahungun thusoh chu Jesu henga ahung seijun ahi." 
Matthew14:13 Jesu'n chuche ajah phat chun, chukoma kon chun apotnin kongin akitolin, gamthipma achoma achetai. Ahin mihon hichu ahet phatnun, khopi chengsea konin acheuvin akengin anung ajuitaove." 
Matthew14:14 Chuin Jesu vaokama ahung potdohle mipi tamtah amun, amaho chu alung asen, adamlouho chu aboldamtai." 
Matthew14:15 Chujouvin nilhah ahi phatnin, aseijuite ahenga ahungun, ajah-a, Hiche komla gamthip ahin, nilhah jongla ahitan, miho hi akho kho-a chea aneh dingu gakichoh dingin sol mangtan, atiuve." 
Matthew14:16 Ahin Jesu'n ajah uva, Che louleu akhohpoi; nanghon nehding peuvin ati." 
Matthew14:17 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Hikoma changlhah pheng nga le nga nisehbou kaneijuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew14:18 Aman, Hikoma kahenga hinchoijun, ati." 
Matthew14:19 Chuin miho chu hampa chunga tou dingin asolin, changlhah pheng nga le nga ni chu alan, vanlam aven, phatthei aboh-in, chuin changlhah chu ahehbal balin, aseijuite khutna apen; aseijuiten mipi chu ahoppeh-un ahi." 
Matthew14:20 Chuin abonchauvin aneuvin, ava sohkeijun; anehmoh-u anong chengse chu paipeh somle paipeh ni aloh dimun ahi." 
Matthew14:21 Anea chu numeile chapang sim louvin, mi sangnga jen ahiuve." 
Matthew14:22 Chuin Jesu'n mipi chengse chu alhahdoh lai sungsen, gallang khat lama anagalkai masa dingin aseijuite kong'a alutsah-in, asolpaitan ahi." 
Matthew14:23 Chuin mipi chu alhahdoh jouvin, tao dingin mola chun achomin akaltai. Chuin jan ahi phatnin, ama hikoma chun achang seh-in aumin ahi." 
Matthew14:24 Hichepet chun kong chu dillen lailung-ah aumin, hui alelama anun jeh-in, twi kinongin kong chu alehle jengin ahi." 
Matthew14:25 Chuin khovah ding konin, Jesu ahenglam uva ahungin, twi chunga lam ahin jotnin ahi." 
Matthew14:26 Aman chutia twi chunga lam ajot chu aseijuiten amuvin, Joumi ahi, tin atijauvin, akichauvin a-aosot taovin ahi." 
Matthew14:27 Ahin Jesu'n ahin houpi paijin, ajah uva, Lungmong tah-in umun, keima kahi, kicha hih-un, ati." 
Matthew14:28 Chuin Peter'in adonbut-in, Pakai, nang nahile twi chunga nahenga kahungna dingin thu neipen, ati." 
Matthew14:29 Chuin aman, Hungin ati. Chuin Peter kong'a konin akumlhan, twi chunga lam ajotnin, Jesu henga achetai." 
Matthew14:30 Ahinla huinun hattah chu amu phatnin akichatan, chuin lhalut ding akigotan ahile, Pakai, neihuhhing in, tin asamtan ahi." 
Matthew14:31 Chuin Jesu'n akhut alhan, amanpaijin, Vo tahsan lhom, ibola natahsan lelham, ati." 
Matthew14:32 Chujouvin kong'a akal phat lhonin, hui chu athip tai." 
Matthew14:33 Chuin kong'a umho chu ahungun, Tahbeh-in nangma Pathen Chapa nahi, atiuvin chibai abohtauvin ahi." 
Matthew14:34 Chuin agalkaijun, Genesaret gamsung alhung taovin ahi." 
Matthew14:35 Chuin chuche gam miho chun ama chu ahetdoh phatnun, agam kimvel uva mi asolun, adamlou jouse ahengah ahinpuijun;" 
Matthew14:36 Apon mongkai beh atham dingu chun ahenga ataovun, athamkha chan chu adamhel helun ahi." 
Matthew15:1 Hiche pettah chun Jerusalem'a konin Pharisaiho le danthu sunho phabep ahungun," 
Matthew15:2 Jesu jah-a, Ibola naseijui ten upate akhang akhanga ahung chonna dan apalkeh-u ham? ijeh inem itile amahon an aneh ding tengule khut asopji pouve, atiuve." 
Matthew15:3 Ahin Aman adonbutnin, ajah uva, Nanghon jong ibola nangho chonna dan jeh-a Pathen thupeh napalkeh uham?" 
Matthew15:4 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen'in, Nanu napa jabolun, chule koi hile anule apa gaosapma chu thihel hen ati." 
Matthew15:5 Ahinla nanghon, Koi hileh anule apa jah-a, Kavanga naphat chomna dingu jouse chu Pathen kipe-a ahitai, tia seija;" 
Matthew15:6 Chule anu le apa jabol lou chu, chamlhat ding ahi, nati uve. Chutichun nangho chonna thu jal-in Pathen thupeh chu imacha hilou nasouvin ahi." 
Matthew15:7 Miphalhem ho, Isaiah'in nangho khanchan ding thu aseija:" 
Matthew15:8 Hiche mite hin akamuvin einaijun, athuseijun eijabolun, Alungula keija kona gamlatah ahi." 
Matthew15:9 Amahon athu hilnaova mihem thupeh jeng thua ahil jeh uvin, eihouvu jong moh ahi, ati chu adihtangeije, ati." 
Matthew15:10 Chuin Jesu'n mihonpi chu ahenga akouvin, ngai phaovin lang hetoh-un:" 
Matthew15:11 Mi kam sunga lut chun ama chu asubohpoi; mi kam sunga kona hung potbou chun asuboh-e, ati." 
Matthew15:12 Chutah-in aseijuite ahengah ahungun, ajah-a, Pharisai hon chuche thu ajah uva, alung phatmo-u khu nahet em? atiuve." 
Matthew15:13 Chuin Aman adonbutnin, Van'a um ka Pa phu hilouva keh thingphung jouse chu kibotdoh ding ahi." 
Matthew15:14 Hiteho khu limsah hih-un, amaho khu mitcho lamhil ahiuve. Mitchon mitcho lamkaile ani lhona kokhuh-a lhalut lhonding ahi, ati." 
Matthew15:15 Chuin Peter'in adonbutnin, ajah-a, Hiche thulem thuhi neihilchet peh-un, ati." 
Matthew15:16 Chuin Jesu'n, Nangho jong tugeija hetna nei louva naum nahlaiju ham?" 
Matthew15:17 Kam sunga lut chu oisunga alhalutnin, posona-ah apotpai jitai, ti heloulai nahiuvem?" 
Matthew15:18 Kam sunga kona hung pot vang chu lung sunga kona hung pot ahin; hichun mi asuhboh ji ahi. 
Matthew15:19 Ijeh-inem itile lung sunga konin lunggilou, tolthana, miji toh jon, jonthanhoi, guchat, thujousei, taitomna, hicheng chu apotjin ahi." 
Matthew15:20 Hichengho chu ahi mi suboh ji-a; khut sop louva an neh vangin mi asubohpoi, ati." 
Matthew15:21 Chuin Jesu chukoma konin apotdoh-in, Tyre le Sidon gamkol lamah achetai." 
Matthew15:22 Chuin, veuvin, chuche gamkaija cheng Canaan numei khat ahengah ahungin, Pakai, David chapa, neilungset in; kachanu thilha phalou tah-in amane, tin ahin samin ahi." 
Matthew15:23 Ahin aman kam khatchan jong adonbutpoi. Chuin aseijuite ahengah ahungun, ajah-a, Amanu hi solmangtan, ijeh inem itile kanungsang chenguvah asam asamin ahi, tin ahung seijun ahi." 
Matthew15:24 Aman adonbutnin, Israel phunga amangsa kelngoi heng tailou adanga dinga kisol kahipoi, ati." 
Matthew15:25 Ahin numeinu chu ahungin, Pakai, neihutan, tin chibai aboh-in ahi." 
Matthew15:26 Chuin Aman adonbutnin, Chate changlhah lahpeh-a uichate koma selhah chu adihpoi, ati." 
Matthew15:27 Chuin amanun, Ahinai, Pakai; ahivangin uichaten jong apu dokhang chunga kona anmal lhajah chu anekhaji, ati." 
Matthew15:28 Chutah-in Jesu'n adonbutnin, Numei natahsan alene; nalunggot bang chu hitahen, ati. Chuin chuche pettah-a pat chun achanu chu adamtai." 
Matthew15:29 Chujouvin Jesu chukoma kon chun achen, Galilee dillen kom ahung lhungin, mol chungah akaltouvin, hikoma chun atoutai." 
Matthew15:30 Hichun mipi tamtah ahenga ahungun, amaho chun elbai, mitcho, paomo, lhemvei le adang tamtah ahinpuijun, Jesu kengphang bulah alehlhauvin; chuin aman amaho chu aboldam sohtai." 
Matthew15:31 Chutichun mipi chun paomon thu aseija, lhemvei adamhela, elbaijin lam ajot, mitchon kho amu chu amuvin, kidang asauvin, Israel Pathen avahchoi taovin ahi." 
Matthew15:32 Chuin Jesu'n aseijuite chu ahenga akouvin, ajah uva, Hiche mihonpi hi kalung asei; ijeh-inem itile keima toh aumkhom naohi ni thum ahitan, chule neh ding imacha aneipouve. Chule amaho an nelouvin kalhadoh nompoi; achuti loule lampia lhasampa getnunte, ati." 
Matthew15:33 Chuin aseijuiten adonbutnun, Mi hijatpi nehva khop ding hikom gamthip laija changlhah hoija kila dingham? atiuve," 
Matthew15:34 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Changlhah pheng ijat naneijum? ati. Amahon, Pheng sagile nga neo themkhat aume, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew15:35 Chuin Aman mipi chu tolla toudin asoltai. 
Matthew15:36 Chuin changlhah sagile nga chu alan, thangvahna aneijin, chuin ahehbal balin, aseijuite apen, aseijuiten mipi chu ahoppeh-un ahi." 
Matthew15:37 Chuin abonchauvin aneuvin, ava sohkeijun, anehmoh-u ahal chu longkai sagi aloh dimun ahi." 
Matthew15:38 Anea chu numeile chapang tailouva mi sangli ahiuve. 
Matthew15:39 Chuin aman miho chu alhahdohsoh jouvin, kong sunga alutnin Magadala gamkai lama ahungtai." 
Matthew16:1 Chuin Pharisaiho le Saddukai ho ahenga ahungun, apatepnan van'a kona melchihna khat avetsahna dinguvin athumun ahi." 
Matthew16:2 Aman adonbutnin, Nanghon nilhahle, Van san asoh-e; kho phading ahi, nati uvin." 
Matthew16:3 Chule jingkahle, van san asoh-in van anime; kho phalou ding ahi, nati uve. Vo nangho miphalhem ho, nanghon van umchan suhtoje vang naheuvin, phat umchan melchihna nasuto theipouve." 
Matthew16:4 Migilou le mijong khanga miten melchihna aholuve, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipelou ding ahi, ati. Chuin amaho chu adalhan achemang tai." 
Matthew16:5 Chuin aseijuite gal lang khat agalkaijun, changlhah ahin pohai taovin ahi." 
Matthew16:6 Hichun Jesu'n ajah uva, Pharisaiho le Saddukai ho chol lah-a chingtheijun lang kihongphauvin, ati." 
Matthew16:7 Amaho chun, Changlhah ikenlou jeh-u ahi, tin akihou lhiuvin ahi." 
Matthew16:8 Jesu'n hichu ahedoh-in, ajah uva, vo tahsan lhomho, changlhah nahinpoh loujeh uva ibola kihouhou nahiuvem?" 
Matthew16:9 Mi sangnga changlhah pheng nga-a chu paipeh ijat nalodoh uvem ti hedoh loulai le geljong geldoh loulai nahiuvem? 
Matthew16:10 Chule mi sangli changlhah pheng sagi-a chu longkai ijat nalodoh-uvem? 
Matthew16:11 Keiman nangho jah-a changlhah thu kasei ahilou chu ibola helou nahiuvem? Pharisaiho le Saddukai ho chol lah-a kihongphauvin, kati ahibouve." 
Matthew16:12 Chutah chun changlhah chol lah-a ati hilouvin, Pharisaiho le Saddukai ho thuhil lah-a chingtheijun, ati ahi chu ahedoh taove." 
Matthew16:13 Chuin Jesu Caesaria Philippi gamkolsung ageijin, aseijuite jah-a, Mihon Mihem Chapa hi koi ahi atiuvem? tin adongin ahi." 
Matthew16:14 Chuin amaho, Kimkhatnin, John Baptist ahi, atiuvin; kimkhatnin Elijah ahi, atiuvin; kimkhatnin Jeremiah ahi, ahiloule themgaoho lah-a khatpen ahi, atiuve; tin aseijun ahi." 
Matthew16:14 Chuin amaho, Kimkhatnin, John Baptist ahi, atiuvin; kimkhatnin Elijah ahi, atiuvin; kimkhatnin Jeremiah ahi, ahiloule themgaoho lah-a khatpen ahi, atiuve; tin aseijun ahi." 
Matthew16:15 Aman amaho jah-a, Nanghonla koi ahi neitiuvem? ati." 
Matthew16:16 Chuin Simon Peter'in adonbutnin, Nangma Pathen hing Chapa Christa chu nahi, ati." 
Matthew16:17 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah-a, Jona chapa Simon, anunnoma nahi; ijeh-inem itile tahsaphe le thisanin aphondoh hilouvin, van'a um ka-Pan aphondoh joh ahibouve." 
Matthew16:18 Chule keiman jong nangma jah-a kasei ahi, Nangma Peter nahi, chule hiche songpi chunga hi kahoubung kasahdoh ding ahi; chule mithi kho kul kotpin aneh jou lou ding ahi." 
Matthew16:19 Keiman nangma van lenggam kot-heh kapeh ding nahi; chule leiset chunga nangman nakha chan chu van'a jong kikhah ding; chule leiset chunga nangman nahon chan chu van'a jong kihong ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew16:20 Chujouvin ama Jesu chu Christa ahi koima jah-a seidoh hih-un, tin aseijuite chu ahilchah-in ahi." 
Matthew16:21 Chuche jou chun Jesu Jerusalem'a achea, upaho le thempu pipuiho chule danthu sunho-a kona thil tamtah athoh-a, chule akitha-a, chule ni thum ni-a kaithouva aum tei ding danje chu aseijuite ahil pantan ahi." 
Matthew16:22 Chuin Peter'in ama chu apuidoh-in, Pakai, hichu nanga konin gamla hen, chutobang chu nachunga chulouhel ding ahi, tin aphoh pantan ahi." 
Matthew16:23 Ahin Ama akiheijin Peter jah-a, Kanung lamah chen, Satan, Nangma keima dingin kipal lhuhna nahi. Nangman Pathen thulam gel louvin mihem thulam jeng nagele, ati." 
Matthew16:24 Chuphatnin Jesu'n aseijuite jah-a, Koi hile kanung eijui noma chu ama kingaitom hen, chule athingpel kiput henlang kanung hinjuihen." 
Matthew16:25 Ijeh-inem itile koi hile ahinna huhhing noma chun achan ding ahi; amavang koi hile keima jala ahinna chana chun akimu ding ahi. 
Matthew16:26 Ijeh-inem itile min vannoi leiset apumpin neihenlang ahinna chantale, a-ipi phachom dingham? Ahiloule min ahinna lhenga ipi apeh dingham?" 
Matthew16:27 Ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa a-Pa loupina-a avantil tetoh hung ding ahin; chule chutengle aman mijouse athilbol dungjui cheh-a tohman asansah ding ahi. 
Matthew16:28 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hikoma dingho kimkhat hi Mihem Chapa aleng gama ahung amu kahseuva thina tepkha lou ding aumuve, ati." 
Matthew17:1 Chuin ni gup jouvin, Jesu'n Peter toh, Jacob toh, chule anaopa John toh apuijin, achomin molsang chung khatna apuitouvin," 
Matthew17:1 Chuin ni gup jouvin, Jesu'n Peter toh, Jacob toh, chule anaopa John toh apuijin, achomin molsang chung khatna apuitouvin," 
Matthew17:2 Chuin Ama amaho ang sungah avou akikhelin; Amai nisa bangin avah-in, aponsil chengse chu khovah bangin avamleng jengin ahi." 
Matthew17:3 Chuin, veuvin, Mosi le Elijah ahenguva ahung kilah lhonin, amatoh akihou lhonin ahi." 
Matthew17:4 Chuin Peter'in Jesu jah-a, Pakai, hikoma i-umu hi eiho dingin anome; naphatsahle nang ding khat, Mosi ding khat, chule Elijah ding khat, lhambuh thum songuving kate, ati." 
Matthew17:5 Asei pettah chun, veuvin, meibang lhang khatnin amaho chu ahinle khutan; chuin meilhang lah-a kon chun aw khatnin, Hiche hi ka-Chapa deitah ahi, achungah kalung alhai tangeije, athu ngaijun, ati." 
Matthew17:6 Chuin aseijuiten chuche ajah phatnun, aboh khupmun amaiju tolla asulutnun, atija lheh jengun ahi." 
Matthew17:7 Chuin Jesu ahenguva ahungin akhoijin, Thouvun, kicha hih-un, ati." 
Matthew17:8 Chuin akhodah-un ahile, Jesu changseh tailou adang koima amuta pouvin ahi." 
Matthew17:9 Chuin molsanga kona akumsuh phatnun, Jesu'n amaho chu ahilchah-in, Mihem Chapa athia kona kaithouva aum masangsen, hiche nathilmu-u hi koima jah-a sei hih-un, tin akhamtan ahi." 
Matthew17:10 Chuin aseijuiten, ibola danthu sunhon, Elijah hung masa tei ding ahi atiuham tin adongun ahi." 
Matthew17:11 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Elijah chu hung masan tin ijakai ahung semphat ding mong ahi." 
Matthew17:12 Ahin kaseipeh nahiuve, Elijah chu ahungsa ahitai; hinla ama chu ahetlou jeh-un, achungah anopnop aboltauvin ahi. Mihem Chapan jong chutobangma chu amaho khutna athoh ding ahi." 
Matthew17:13 Hitah chun aseijuiten John Baptist thu asei ahi ti chu ahetauvin ahi. 
Matthew17:13 Hitah chun aseijuiten John Baptist thu asei ahi ti chu ahetauvin ahi. 
Matthew17:14 Chuin mipi lah ahung lhunun, mi khat ahungin a-angah adilsun, ajah-a," 
Matthew17:15 Pakai, kachapa lungsetnin, ajehchu abuhthi ahin, athohgim behseh jenge; abangle meijah alhalutjin, abangle twija alhalut jin;" 
Matthew17:16 Chule naseijuite henga kahin puilela aboldam joupouvin ahi, ati." 
Matthew17:17 Chuin Jesu'n, Vo tahsanna neiloule khanglamvai mite, itihchan kaumpi dingu nahiuvem? Itihchan kakhongai ding nahiuvem? Ama chu kahenga hinpui tangu, tin adonbutnin ahi." 
Matthew17:18 Chuin Jesu'n thilha chu aphoh-in ahile asunga konin apot tai. Chuche-a pat chun chapang chu adamtai. 
Matthew17:19 Chuphatnin aseijuite Jesu henga ahungun guhthimin, I atile keihon kanodoh jou louvu hintem? atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew17:20 Chuin Jesu'n, Natahsan lhom jeh-u ahi, ijeh-inem itile tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nanghon tahsanna ankam mu tebep nei hileuchun, hiche molsang jah-a hin, Hikoma konin khukoma khun kichonin tileuchun, kichon jeng ding ahi. Nangho dinga imacha bolmo umlou ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew17:21 Ahin hitobang hi an ngol le taona beijin apotdoh jipoi. 
Matthew17:22 Chuin Galilee gamsunga aumlaijin, Jesu'n ajah uva, Mihem Chapa hi mihemte khutna kipedoh dingkon ahi;" 
Matthew17:23 Chule amahon atha dingu ahi, chule ni thum nile kaithouva umding ahi, ati. Hiphat chun alungdong lheh jengtaovin ahi." 
Matthew17:24 Chuin Capernaum ahung geijun, kai dongho ahungun Peter jah-a, Nahilpau khun makhai kai ateji louham, tin adongun ahi." 
Matthew17:25 Peter'in, Atiji nai ati. Chuin Peter insung agalutle, Jesu'n ajah-a, Iti nagelem, Simon? Leiset lengte hin kai hijongle sum lamman hijongle koi lah-a adon jiuvem? Achateu lah-a adon uvem, midang lah-a adon uvem, tin anahou masatai." 
Matthew17:26 Chuin, Midang lah-a, tia adonbut phatnin, Jesu'n, Ahile, acha anaote cheng onga hija chula."
