Matthew17:27 Hitajongle, nangma dil lamah chenlang nga gakoijin; nga nakoidoh masahpen chu lanlang akam keh-le chun dangka cheng khat namu ding ahi. Hichu choi jinlang igom-a dingin gapetan, achutiloule lung himosah get hite, ati." 
Matthew18:1 Hiche pettah chun seijuite Jesu henga ahungun, van lenggama hi koi alenpen ham? tin adongun ahi." 
Matthew18:2 Chuin Jesu'n chapang neocha khat ahengah akouvin, alaijuva adinsah-in," 
Matthew18:3 Ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nangho nakile heijuva chapang neochahotoh nabah kit louvule, iti nama jongle van lenggam nalut lou dingu ahi." 
Matthew18:4 Hiche jeh-a chu hiche chapang neocha banga kineosah chu, van lenggama alenpen ahi." 
Matthew18:5 Chule koi hijongle hitobang chapang khat keima mina sanga chun keima eisan ahi. 
Matthew18:6 Ahin koi hijongle keima eitahsan hiche aneochaho lah-a khat kipal lhuh sah chan chu, angonga sumhei song lentah kikhaihen, twikhanglen thuhtah sunga kileh lutle ama dingin aphajoi." 
Matthew18:7 Ohe kipal lhuh jeh-in vannoi leiset adana-e! Kipal lhuhna chu umtei ding mong vang ahi, ahinla ohe kipal lhuh sah-a chu koi hile adana-e!" 
Matthew18:8 Chule nakhut ahim, nakeng ahim, khatjo sangin nakipal lhuh sah-a ahile tanbongin lang paimangin; khut ni, keng ni neija tonsotna mit theilou meikonga nakilelut sangin, tibukim loule kengbaijin hinna-a lutle chun nang dingin aphajoi." 
Matthew18:9 Chule namitnin nakipal lhuh sah-a ahile, kaldoh-in paimangin; mit ni neija damun meikonga nakilelut sangin, mitlang chon hinna-a lutle chun nang dingin aphajoi." 
Matthew18:10 Kihong phaovin, hiche aneochaho lah-a khatcha jong nahsahmo hih-un; ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Avantil teovin van'a um ka Pa mai chu ave jingun ahi." 
Matthew18:11 Ajehchu amangsaho huhhing dinga mihem Chapa chu hunga ahi. 
Matthew18:12 Chule iti nangai touvem? Mikhatnin kelngoi ja khat aneija, alah-a khat ava mangthah-a ahile, aman somko le ko chu adalhah-a, molsang chung lama chea avah mangthah khat chu agaholji louham?" 
Matthew18:13 Chule ahol chu amua ahile, tahbeh-a kasei ahi, amapa chun avah mangthah lou somko le ko chunga sang chun, hiche khat chunga chun akipahjon ahi." 
Matthew18:14 Chutobang chun hiche aneochaho lah-a khattou amanthah ding hi van'a um na-Pau lunglam ahipoi. 
Matthew18:15 Chule nasopi nachunga achonset tah-a ahile, chenlang nangle ama changseh hetnin asetna chu phoh-in; chua angaija ahile sopi chu nanei ahitai." 
Matthew18:16 Angai lou vangle, ahetoh dingin mi nile thum kama thu jouse akichetna dingin, ni hile thum hile kipuijin." 
Matthew18:17 Chule chucheng sei jong angai loulaija ahile, houbung henga lhutnin; chua houbung thu jong angaisam louva ahile, ama chu nangho dingin chidang namdangle kaidongho banghen." 
Matthew18:18 Tahbeh-a kasei ahi, itobang hijongle leiset chunga nakha-u chu van'a jong kikhah ding, leiset chunga nahonu chu van'a jong kihong ding ahi." 
Matthew18:19 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh kit nahiuve, Leiset chunga nalah uva mi nin kilungthoh tah-a thilthum neija atao lhonle, van'a um ka Pan abulhitpeh lhon ding ahi." 
Matthew18:20 Ijeh-inem itile hoikom hijongle mi ni hile thum hile kamina akikhopnao chana chun, alah uva kei kaumnai, ati." 
Matthew18:21 Chupettah chun Peter ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, Pakai, kasopin kachunga ijatvei achonsetle kangaidam dingham? Sagivei geijinem? ati." 
Matthew18:22 Jesu'n ajah-a, Najah-a sagivei geijin katipoi; amavang sagi munsom sagivei geijin katijo bouve." 
Matthew18:23 Hijeh chun van lenggam thuhi lengpa khat asohtetoh sum sutoh dinga kigo-a toh kitekah thei ahi. 
Matthew18:24 Asuto pantan ahile, alah uva mikhat ama talent sangsom batpa chu ahenga ahinkai taovin ahi." 
Matthew18:25 Apeh ding ima anei lou jeh-in a-pakaipa chun amatoh, aji achate toh, anei chengse joh-a chule dit dingin thu apetan ahi." 
Matthew18:26 Achuti phatnin asohpa chun aboh khupmin, chibai aboh-in, Pakai, neikhongai tadin, abonin sadoh nange, ati." 
Matthew18:27 Hichun a-pakai pan alungsetnin, alhadoh-in, asumbat jong chu abeisah-in angaidam tai." 
Matthew18:28 Ahin chuche sohpa chu apotdoh phatnin, asohchanpi khat dangka somnga bat amun; amanin alol ameh-in, ajah-a, Neipeh ding chengse chu neipen, ati." 
Matthew18:29 Achuti phatnin asohchanpipa kengbula aboh khupmin, ahenga ataovin, Neikhongai tadin, keiman nang abonchan sanange, ati." 
Matthew18:30 Ahivangin ama anom hih-in, apeh ding chengse chu apeh kahsen songkul'a agakhumtan ahi." 
Matthew18:31 Chuin asoh chanpihon achuti umchan chu amuvin, alung phamo lheh-un, a-pakai pau henga ahungun thu umchan jouse chu ahung hiltaovin ahi." 
Matthew18:32 Chuphatnin a-pakai pan akoma akou lutnin ajah-a, Vo soh nunse, kahenga natao jeh-a kangaidam ahitai." 
Matthew18:33 Achutile keiman nang kalungset banga, nangin jong nasohchanpi nalungset ding thu hilouham? ati." 
Matthew18:34 Chuin a-pakaipa alunghangin, abat chengse asah chaisoh kahse-a dingin, mi bol gentheiho khutna apedohtai." 
Matthew18:35 Nanghon nasopiteu suhkhelna chu lunggiltah cheh-a nangaidam louvule, van'a um ka Pan nangho chutobanga chu nabol dingu ahi, ati." 
Matthew19:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jesu'n thu hicheng chu asei jouvin, Galilee'a patnin akipatdoh-in, Jordan gal Juda gamkai lamah ahungin;" 
Matthew19:2 Chule mi tamtah-in ajuijin, hikoma chun amaho chu aboldamin ahi." 
Matthew19:3 Chuin Pharisaiho ahenga ahungun, apatepnan, Ima jouse-a jeh-a min aji ada dan ngai hinam? tin adongun ahi." 
Matthew19:4 Chuin aman adonbutnin, Asempan asemtila amaho numei le pasal'a asemsa ahitai, ti thu chu nanghon nasimkhah lou uham?" 
Matthew19:5 Chule hiche jeh-a chu pasal'in anu apa adalhah-a, ajia beh ding ahi; chule amani chu ti khat hi lhon ding ahi." 
Matthew19:6 Hiti chu ahin amani pumni mi ni hita louva, ti khat hilhona ahitai. Hiche jeh chun Pathen gopsa chu mihemin sukhen hihhen, ati." 
Matthew19:7 Amahon ajah-a, Ahile ibola Mosi'n kidana lekha peh-a da ding tia thu apeh ham? atiuve." 
Matthew19:8 Chuin aman, ajah uva, Nalungtah jeh uva Mosi'n naji da dingu aphal ahibouve; ahivangin atilin chuti chu ahipoi." 
Matthew19:9 Keivangin kasei ahi, Koi hijongle mitoh ajon jeh tailouva aji ada-a ji dang nei chan chu ajonga ahi, chule akidasa kichenpi kitna jong chu ajonga ahi, ati." 
Matthew19:10 Hichun aseijuiten ajah-a, Chutia numei le pasal kiloimat dolthua pasal chunga chutobang thu ahile, jinei hi aphapoi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew19:11 Ahin aman ajah uva, Hiche hi mi jouse jop thei ahipoi, akipete bouvin ajop thei ahi." 
Matthew19:12 Mi anu sunga nukiso sa-a penga aumin, abang mihem semthu-a nukiso aumin, adang van lenggam khosahna jala amaho le amaho nukiso-a jong aume; ajop theipan jophen, ati." 
Matthew19:13 Chujouvin achunguva akhut angap-a ataopeh dingin chapangho ahenga ahinpuijun, hinla aseijuiten anaphoh-un ahi." 
Matthew19:14 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Chapangho chu kahenga hung sah-un, jada hih-un; ijeh-inem itile van lenggam chu hitobang tehoa bou ahi, ati." 
Matthew19:15 Chutichun Aman achunguvah akhut angamin, chukom mun'a kon chun akipatdoh tai." 
Matthew19:16 Chuin veuvin, mi khat ahenga ahungin, ajah-a, houhilpha, tonsot hinkemlou kanei theina dinga thilpha ipi kabol dingham, tin adongin ahi." 
Matthew19:17 Chuin Aman ajah-a, ibolla apha neiti ham? Apha koima aumpoi, khat sehbou aume, ama chu Pathen ahi: ahinla nangma hinna-a chu nalut nomle thupeh chengse nitnin ati." 
Matthew19:18 Mipa chun, Thupeh hoihoi chu-em? ati. Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah-a, Tolthat hih-in, Jon bol hih-in; Gucha hih-in, Thu jouvin mi heh hih-in." 
Matthew19:19 Nanu napa jabolin, Nangma naki ngailut bangin naheng nakom ngailun, ati." 
Matthew19:20 Gollhangpa chun adonbutnin, Hichengse chu kachapan laija patna kanitsa ahitai; ipi kabatnah laijem, ati." 
Matthew19:21 Jesu'n ajah-a, Nangman chamkimsoh ing natile, chenlang nanei chengse gajoh inlang mivaicha gentheiho petan, chutile van'a gou nanei ding ahi: chule hungin lang kanung hinjuijin, ati." 
Matthew19:22 Ahivangin gollhangpa chun chuche thuhil ajah phat chun, gou haotah ahi jeh-in lungnom mo tah-in achemang tan ahi." 
Matthew19:23 Hijeh chun Jesu'n aseijuite jah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Mihao dingin van lenggama lut ahahsai." 
Matthew19:24 Kaseipeh kit nahiuve, Mihao Pathen gama alut sangin, heubil homa sangongsang lut abaijoi, ati." 
Matthew19:25 Chuin chuche ajah phatnun, aseijuiten kidang asabehseh jengun, Chuti ahile, koi huhhing-a um jou dingham? atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew19:26 Hichun Jesu'n amaho chu aven, ajah uva, Mihem dingin vang hitheihoi ahipoi, ahin Pathen dingin ijakai ahitheije, ati." 
Matthew19:27 Chuphatnin Peter'in adonbutnin, Jesu jah-a, Vetemin, keihon ka-ima jouseu kadalhaovin, nanung kahinjui taove; achutile keihon ipi kasan dinguham? ati." 
Matthew19:28 Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Ijakai akisemthah-a Mihem Chapa aloupina laltouna-a atou tengle, nangho eijui chengse jong hi laltouna somlenia natou uva, Israel phung somle phung ni thu natan dingu ahi." 
Matthew19:29 Chule Keima min jala, a-in, asopipate, asopinute, anu, apa, achate chule agam leiset hindalha chan chun, ajatja tamtah amube ding, chule tonsot hinkemlou chang ding ahi." 
Matthew19:30 Amavang amasa cheng tamtah nukhah intin, anukhah cheng masa ding ahi." 
Matthew20:1 Ijeh-inem itile van lenggam chu inneipu khat jingpitah-a alengpi leija goi ding natong ding hola che tobang ahi. 
Matthew20:2 Chuin ama chun natong dingho chutoh ni khatna seki ni lo dinga akihoutoh phatnun, alengpi leija asoltai." 
Matthew20:3 Vai nungin apotdoh-in, kaithela mohseh-a dingho amun," 
Matthew20:4 Ajah uva, Nangho jong lengpi leija konun; adoldolin napenao ving kate, ati. Chuin amaho chu achetauvin ahi." 
Matthew20:5 Chuin sunkimvel le ni kiheijin apotdoh-in chutobangma chu abol kitnin ahi. 
Matthew20:6 Chuin vaiche phattah-in ama apotdoh-in ahile, midang dingleho chu amun, ajah uva, Ibola sun nilhumkeija mohseh-a nadinu ham? ati." 
Matthew20:7 Amahon adonbutnun, Koima eigoijuva aumpoi, atiuve. Aman ajah uva, Kalengpi leija konun, adol dola nakisan diu ahi, ati." 
Matthew20:8 Nilhah ahi phatnin, lengpilei neipa chun asum chingpa jah-a, Natongho kou inlang athamanu pen, goi nukhahpena patnin goi masahpena chaijin, ati." 
Matthew20:9 Chuin vaiche phatna kigoipanho chu ahung phatnun, seki ni cheh asangtaovin ahi." 
Matthew20:10 Chuin goi masahpenho chu ahung phatnun, kisangtam cheh-inte tin angaito uvin; amala amahon jong seki ni bou asang taovin ahi." 
Matthew20:11 Chuin hichu akilah nungun, inneipu chunga chun aphun taovin," 
Matthew20:12 Anununghon nidan kah khatbou na atongun, nangman keiho nisa hahlai thoh-a tonggim chengtoh neikibah sah-un ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew20:13 Ahin aman alah uva khatpa chu adonbutnin, Kajol, nachungah kakhelna aumpoi; seki ni dinga ikihou hilouham?" 
Matthew20:14 Nathaman sum kilah-in chetan, anunung penpa hi nang kapeh jatma chu kapeh nom-in ahi." 
Matthew20:15 Kanei nahnah kanopnopma kabol chu kadih louham? Ole kaphat jeh-a hi neimit thip hitam? 
Matthew20:16 Chutobang chun anukhah masan tin, amasa nukhah ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew20:17 Chuin Jesu Jerusalem lama achetou konin, somleni ho chu atumin gam choma apuijin, lam dungah ajah uva," 
Matthew20:18 Veuvin, Jerusalem jonin ichetouvui; chule Mihem Chapa hi thempu pipuiho le danthu sunho khutna pehdoh-a umding; chule amaho chun athina dinga themmo achansah dingu ahi." 
Matthew20:19 Chule a-el ela aboluva, ajepmuva, thingpel'a khetbeh dinga chidang namdangte khutna apehdoh dingu ahi; chule ni thum nile ama kaithouva umding ahi, ati." 
Matthew20:20 Hiche petah chun Zebedee chapate anuvin achateni chu ahin kipuijin, Jesu henga ahungun, chibai aboh-in, ahenga ikhat thumnan ataovin ahi." 
Matthew20:21 Aman amanu jah-a, ipi nangaichat ham? ati. Chuin amanun, Nagam sunga kachate ni hi khat najetna, khat naveija atou theina lhon ding thu pen, ati." 
Matthew20:22 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Nanghon nathumu chu nahet louvu ahi. Kadon ding khonna hi nadon lhona, chule baptize kachan ding hi nachan ngam lhon ding hinam? ati. Chuin amanin, Kangame, ati lhonin ahi." 
Matthew20:23 Chuin aman, Kadona ding khonna vang chu nadon lhona, chule ka baptize chan banga hi nachan theihon ahinan; kajetle kaveija tousah ding vang chu keima peh dol ahipoi; ka-Pan adinguva agotsaho bou chu kipe ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew20:24 Hichun somho chun hichu ajauvin, uchateni chunga chun alung phamo taovin ahi." 
Matthew20:25 Ahinla Jesu'n amaho chu akouvin, ajah uva, Nanghon naheuve, chidang namdangte chunga vaipoho khu a-pakaiyu vin apangun, chule milen milaltehon achunguva athuneinau apanjiuve." 
Matthew20:26 Nangho lah-a vang chuti chu ahipoi; ahin koi hile nangho lah-a alen hi noma chu, nalhachaova pang ding;" 
Matthew20:27 Chule nalah uva apipuipen hi noma chu, nasoh-u hi ding ahi." 
Matthew20:28 Chutobanga chu Mihem Chapatah jong chu jen dinga hung hilouvin, ajenle dingle mi tamtah lhatdoh na-a ahinna toh dingjoh-a hung ahi, ati." 
Matthew20:29 Chuin Jericho khopi-a kona akipatdoh-in, mipi tamtah-in anung ajuijun ahi." 
Matthew20:30 Chule, veuvin, mitcho ni lampamah atou lhonin, amani chun lampi chu Jesu'n ajotne ti ahet phat lhonin, Pakai, David chapa, neilungset lhonin, tin asam lhonin ahi." 
Matthew20:31 Chuin mipi chun, Thipbeh-in um lhonin, tin aphoh-un ahi; ahivangin amanin ahasapcheh lhonin, Pakai, David chapa, neilungset lhonin, ati lhonin ahi." 
Matthew20:32 Chuin Jesu adingin, amani chu akouvin, I-lolhon leng nalung lhonham? ati." 
Matthew20:33 Amanin, Pakai, kamit lhon hasah-in, ati lhone." 
Matthew20:34 Chuin Jesu'n alung asen, amit lhon akhoipeh-in ahile amanin kho amupai jeng lhonin, chule anung ajui lhontai." 
Matthew21:1 Chuin Jerusalem ahung naijuva, Olive molsanga um Bethphage ageitah-un, Jesu'n aseijuite mi ni asolin," 
Matthew21:2 Ajah lhona, Namasang jon lhona kho sunga khun lut lhonin, chule sangan anoutoh kihen namu paijen lhon ding ahi; hiteni chu sut lhoninlang kahenga hinkai lhonin." 
Matthew21:3 Mi khattou ikhat sei aumle, Pakaiyin hiche teni hi manna nom aneije ti lhonle chun, aman ahinsolpai jeng ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew21:4 Themgaovin anasei guilhuna dinga hiche ho jouse hi soh-a ahi," 
Matthew21:5 Nanghon Zion chanu jah-a, Ven, nalengpa lungnem tah-in sangan chungah, sangan nou chungah atouvin naheng-ah ahunge." 
Matthew21:6 Chuti chun aseijuite ni chu ache lhonin, Jesu'n asei bangbang chun abol lhonin;" 
Matthew21:7 Sangan le sangan nou chu ahinpuijun, achunga aponu aphaovin; achunga chun Jesu atousah-un ahi." 
Matthew21:8 Chuin mipi lah-a atamjon lam dunga aponu aphaovin, adangsen theoboh alhamun, lam dunga aphaovin ahi." 
Matthew21:9 Chule mipi amasang lama che chengsele anungjui chengse chun, David chapa, Hosanna, Pakai mina hungpa chu anunnome; Chungnung pena Hosanna! atiuvin asam asamun ahi." 
Matthew21:10 Chuin Jerusalem alut phatnun, Hiche hi koiham? tin khopi pumpin akilohsoh jengun ahi." 
Matthew21:11 Chuin mipi chun adonbutnun, Hiche hi Galilee gam Nazareth kho-a kon themgao Jesu ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:12 Chuin Jesu Pathen houin'ah alutnin, houin sunga thil johho le thil choho abonchan anodoh-in, chule sumlheng ho dokhangle vakhu johho touna chu alekhup peh-in," 
Matthew21:13 Ajah uva, Ka-in chu taona in kiti ding ahi, tin akisune; ahin nanghon gucha michom kokhuh-in nasem uve, ati." 
Matthew21:14 Chuin houin'a chun mitcho le elbaiho ahungun, aman amaho chu aboldamin ahi." 
Matthew21:15 Ahin thempu pipuiho le danthu sunhon athilbol kidangle houin'a chapanghon Hosanna, David chapa, tia asap chu amuvin, alungphamo lheh jengtaovin," 
Matthew21:16 Amahon ajah-a, Hiteho hin ipi aseiju najah nah-em? atiuvin ahi. Chuin Jesu'n, Kajanai; Naosen leh chapang noi cheplai kamin jong vahchoina nachamkim sahtai, ti chu nasimdoh lou uham? ati." 
Matthew21:17 Chutichun aman amaho chu adalhan, khopi-a konin apotdoh-in Bethany'a achen; chua chun agehtai." 
Matthew21:18 Chuin jingkah-in khopi lam ahinjon kitnin ahile, agil akeltan ahi." 
Matthew21:19 Chuin Aman lamkenga theichang phung khat amun, aphunga achen ahile ana tailou imacha aga mupoi; Chuin Aman, Imatih chanin naga gakit tahih hen, ati. Chuin chupettah chun theichang phung chu agoppai jengtai." 
Matthew21:20 Hichu aseijuiten amu phatnun, alungdong jengun, I-atile theichang phung chu goppai jenga hitante! atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:21 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Keiman tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nanghon gingchalel louhela tahsan naneijule, hiche theichang phung hitia bolseh hilouvin, hiche molsang jong hi, Hikoma konin kichondoh inlang twikhanglen'a kileh luttan, ti jongleu chun hi thei ding ahi." 
Matthew21:22 Chule ipi hijongle tahsan tah-a taona-a nathum chanu chu aboncha namusoh dingu ahi, ati." 
Matthew21:23 Chujouvin Houin'a alutna thu ahil petnin, thempu pipuiho le upaho ahenga ahungun, ajah-a, Ipi thunei na-a hitiho hi nabolham? Kon hiche thuneina hi napeh ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:24 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Kenjong nangho thu khat donging kate; hichu naseijule kenjong ipi thuneija hicheng kabol ahi seipeh naovinge:" 
Matthew21:25 John baptize bol chu hoija konham? van'a konha ahiloule mihem'a konham? ati. Chuin amaho akingai touvin, Van'a kon ahi, tileu henla, chuti ahile, Ibola ama natahsan lou uham? tintin;" 
Matthew21:25 John baptize bol chu hoija konham? van'a konha ahiloule mihem'a konham? ati. Chuin amaho akingai touvin, Van'a kon ahi, tileu henla, chuti ahile, Ibola ama natahsan lou uham? tintin;" 
Matthew21:26 Mihem'a kon ahi ti dingla, mipi jousen John chu themgao ahi tia angaito jeh-un ikichaovin, akitiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:26 Mihem'a kon ahi ti dingla, mipi jousen John chu themgao ahi tia angaito jeh-un ikichaovin, akitiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:27 Chutichun amahon Jesu adonbutnun, Kahepouve, atitaove. Chuin Aman jong amaho jah-a, Achutile ipi thuneija hicheng kabol ham keiman jong naseipeh deh pouvinge, ati." 
Matthew21:28 Ahivangin iti nangai touvem? Mi koiham khatnin chapa ni aneijin, khatpa henga achen ajah-a, Chapa, tunin lengpi leija konin lang na gatongin, ati." 
Matthew21:29 Aman, Kanompoi; chepong-e, tin adonbutnin, ahivangin khonungin alung aheijin, achetan ahi." 
Matthew21:30 Chuin khatjopa henga achen, ajah-a chutobangma chun agaseijin ahi. Aman, Hepa, chenange, tin adonbutnin; chela achetapon ahi." 
Matthew21:31 Hite ni chu koijoh chu apa lunga chonham? ati. Amahon, Amasajoh chu, atiuvin ahi. Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nangho sanga kaidongho le notiho Pathen lenggam sunga lut masajo ding ahiuve." 
Matthew21:32 Ijeh-inem itile John chu chonphatna lampia naheng uva ahungin, nanghonla nanatahsan pouve; kaidongho le notihon bou anatahsan uvin ahi. Nangho vangin chuche namu-u jong chun, ama chu natahsan theina dingun, khonungin nalung naheichom dehpouvin ahi." 
Matthew21:32 Ijeh-inem itile John chu chonphatna lampia naheng uva ahungin, nanghonla nanatahsan pouve; kaidongho le notihon bou anatahsan uvin ahi. Nangho vangin chuche namu-u jong chun, ama chu natahsan theina dingun, khonungin nalung naheichom dehpouvin ahi." 
Matthew21:33 Thulem chom khat jong ngaikitnun: inneipa khat hin lengpilei abolin, palin aum kimvelin, lengpiga chil lhahna pum alaijin, insang asan, chuin alei lhouho khutna apedoh-in, gamdanga achemang tai." 
Matthew21:34 Chuin aga phat anai phatnin, atheiga la dingin aleilhouho henga asohte asoltan ahi." 
Matthew21:35 Ahin aleilhouho chun anamanun, khat avovin, khat athatnun, athum napa songin asepmun ahi." 
Matthew21:36 Asohte dang amasaho sanga tamjo asol kitnin ahile, amahon angaina bepmin anabolun ahi." 
Matthew21:37 Akhonna-in aman, Kachapa hi anaja domunte, atin achapa ahenguva asoltai." 
Matthew21:38 Ahinla lengpi leilhou hon achapa chu amu phatnun, amahole amaho akihouvun, Ama hi agou lo dinga ahi; hungun, thatnu hitin, agou lo ding eiho changuhite, akitiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:39 Chuin ama chu amanun, lengpilei polamah akaidoh-un, athat taovin ahi." 
Matthew21:40 Hijeh chun lengpilei neipa chu ahung teng, chuche aleilhouho chu i-lontem? ati." 
Matthew21:41 Amahon ajah-a, Chuche migilouho chu aman engsanin sugamintin, aga phatseh-a atheiga ape ding leilhou dang khutna alengpi lei chu pedoh tante, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew21:42 Jesu'n ajah uva, In sahon adeimoa apaiju song chu aninga songpi penin apangtai; Hiche hi Pakaiya kon ahin, chule imitmuvin akidange, ti Pathen lekhabua thuhi nasimdoh khah lou uham?" 
Matthew21:43 Hiche jeh-a chu keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Nangho-a kona Pathen lenggam kilamanga, agadohsah namdang mite kipe ding ahi." 
Matthew21:44 Koi hijongle hiche song chunga lhu-a chu ahal hala chip ding; chule koi hile achunga chuche song chua chu leivui banga kithejal ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew21:45 Chuin thempu pipuiho le Pharisai hon hiche athulem sei chu ajah phatnun, amaho chunga thusei ahi chu ahedoh taovin ahi." 
Matthew21:46 Chuin ama chu mat dingin agouvin, ahivangin themgao ahi tia angaito jeh-un, mipi chu akichauvin ahi." 
Matthew22:1 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva thulemin asei kitnin," 
Matthew22:2 Pathen lenggam chu Lengpa khat achapa jineina dinga golvah bol tobang ahi; 
Matthew22:3 Aman agolvahna-a dinga kouna changho chu hungtaovin tia kou dingin asohte asolin; ahinla amaho chu ahung nompouvin ahi. 
Matthew22:4 Chuin aman asohte asol kitnin, Akikouho henga cheovin lang, Veuvin, golvahna an aphasadema kagot ahitai: kabongchal le kagancha thao ho akithat tan, chule abonchan phasademin gotsan aumsohtai; nangho moupui golvahna-a hunguvin, tin gaseijun, ati." 
Matthew22:5 Ahivangin amahon dona neipeh louvin, achemang gamuvin, khat alouva achen, khat sumkol veijin achen;" 
Matthew22:6 Adangsen asohte chu amanun, nahsahmo tah-in abolun, athat taovin ahi." 
Matthew22:7 Ahin lengpan hichu ajah phatnin, alunghang tan; asepaite chengse asolin, chuche tolthat ho chu asumanghelun, akhou jong ahalpeh taovin ahi." 
Matthew22:8 Chutah-in asohte jah-a, Golvahna an gotsa ahitai, ane dinga kakou tehola anehoi ahipouve." 
Matthew22:9 Hijeh chun lamka lamthoma cheovinlang, mi namu chanu golvah an nedingin gakouvun, ati." 
Matthew22:10 Chutichun asohte chu apot-un lampi dunga acheuvin amu chanu mipha mise apui khomun ahile, golvahna indan chu jin adimset tan ahi." 
Matthew22:11 Chuin lengpa chu jinho velen ahungin ahile, moupuina vona kivon lou mi khat amudohtan ahi." 
Matthew22:12 Aman, Kajol, moupuina vona kivon louva hikoma iti nahung lutham? tin adongin ahile, amapa sei ding helouvin aumtan ahi." 
Matthew22:13 Chuphatnin lengpan asottolleho jah-a, Akhut akeng kanun lang, kaidoh-un, chule polam muthim lah-a paidoh taovin; hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi." 
Matthew22:14 Akikou vang tamtah ahin lhendoh vang lhomcha bou ahi, ati." 
Matthew22:15 Chuin Pharisai hon athuseija kona mat theina ding doha abolun akihou taovin ahi. 
Matthew22:16 Chuin aseijuiteu chu Herod miho toh asolun, amaho chun ajah-a, Houhil, nangma mi dihtah nahi, dihtah-a Pathen lampi chu nahil ahin, chule koima gin naneipoi ti kaheuve; nangman mimai navepoi." 
Matthew22:17 Hijeh chun Caesar kai kapeh-u hi, dan ngai ham, hilouham? iti nagelem? neisei peh-un, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew22:18 Jesu'n alunggilou vop-u chu ahen, ajah uva, Vo miphalhem ho, ibola neilunglah uham?" 
Matthew22:19 Kai kidon na-a sum kipeji chu neivet sah-un, ati. Chuin amahon dinarii khat ahinchoi jun ahi." 
Matthew22:20 Chuin Aman, Hiche hi koi lim le koi minham? tin adonge." 
Matthew22:21 Amahon, Caesar'a ahi, tin adonbutnuve. Chuphatnin Aman, Caesar'a chu Caesar peuvinlang, Pathen'a chu Pathen peuvin, ati." 
Matthew22:22 Chuche ajah phatnun, adatmouvin, ama adalhauvin, achemang taovin ahi." 
Matthew22:23 Chuche nimama chun, Mithi thokitna aumpoi ti Saddukai ho ahenga ahungun, thu ahung dongun," 
Matthew22:24 Houhil, mi khatcha nei louva athile, asopipan anumeinu chu akichenpia, asopipa dinga chu chi akhaipeh ding ahi, tin Mosi'n eihilun ahi." 
Matthew22:25 Ahile tun kalah uva ucha pasal sagi aumun; amasapenpa chun ji aneijin athitai; ahin ama chu chikhai lou ahitah jeh chun, a-inneipi chu asopipa adalhah pehtai." 
Matthew22:26 Chuti chun abanapa jong, athumnapa jong, asaginapa geijin chutima chun aumtan ahi." 
Matthew22:27 Akhonna-in anumeinu chu athitai. 
Matthew22:28 Ahile thokitna-a amanu chu sagi lah-a koipen ji hitantem? Amahonla ji-a anei sohkeiju ahin, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew22:29 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Pathen lekhabua thu le Pathen thahatna nahetlou jeh uva nakheljiu ahi." 
Matthew22:30 Thokitna-a chun amaho akicheng tapouvin, chen jong akichensah tapouve; van'a Pathen vantilte tobang ahiuve." 
Matthew22:31 Ahinla mithi thokit dol thu Pathen'in najah uva asei," 
Matthew22:32 Keima Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen kahi, ati chu simkha lou nahiuvem? Ama athiho Pathen hilouvin, ahingho Pathen ahijo bouve, ati." 
Matthew22:33 Mipi chun hichu ajauvin, athuhil chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi." 
Matthew22:34 Aman Saddukai ho anelkhup hel jeng chu ajah phatnun, Pharisai ho akikhomun ahi." 
Matthew22:35 Chule alah uva danthuthem khatnin apatepnan thu adongin," 
Matthew22:36 Houhil, chondan thupeh lah-a apipen hoiche ham? ati." 
Matthew22:37 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, Nangman nalung pumpin, nalhagao pumpin Pakai na-Pathen chu ngailun." 
Matthew22:38 Hichu thupeh pipen le amasapen ahi. 
Matthew22:39 Chule chutobanga chu anina hiche ahi, Nangma naki ngailut bangin naheng nakoma ngailun." 
Matthew22:40 Thupeh hichete ni-a hin thupeh jouse le themgaoho thu kikhai cheh ahi ati. 
Matthew22:41 Chuin Pharisai ho akikhop petnun, Jesu'n amaho thu adongin, ajah uva," 
Matthew22:42 Messiah thudol hi iti nagel uvem? Ama koi chapaham? atin ahile amahon, David chapa, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew22:43 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Chuti ahile," 
Matthew22:44 Pakaiyin ka Pakai jah-a, Keiman namelmate chengse nakeng chotpha kaneisah masangsen, kajetlama tou jingin, ati tia David chun Lhagaova ama chu Pakai iti atiham?" 
Matthew22:45 Chutia David'in ama Pakai asahle, achapa iti hi dingham? ati." 
Matthew22:46 Chuin koimachan cheng khatchan jong adonbut thei tapouvin, chuche ni-a pat chun koimachan thudang khatcha jong adong ngam tapouvin ahi." 
Matthew23:1 Hichun Jesu'n mipi jahle aseijuite jah-a," 
Matthew23:2 Danthu sunho le Pharisai ho Mosi touna mun'a tou ahiuve. 
Matthew23:3 Hiche jeh chun athupeh chengseu abonchan bolunlang nit sohkeijun; ahin athilbol bangun vang bol hih-un; ijeh-inem itile amahon asei chu aseijun abolji pouve. 
Matthew23:4 Amahon doutheilou pohgih akanun miho lengkouvah asep-un, amahonla akhutjung khatchan jong thamloh ding anompouve." 
Matthew23:5 Ahin amahon athilbol jouseu khu mi mu dingabou abolu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon thuchinbom akibu ule akibehho chengu khu apeh aletsah-un; chule aponmongu acholsah-un," 
Matthew23:6 Golvahna-a mun pipen chule kikhopna in'a touna pipen," 
Matthew23:7 Kai lhanga min chibai aboh dingule, min Rabbi, Rabbi, ati dingu adeijun ahi." 
Matthew23:8 Nanghon vang mi Rabbi kitisah hih-un; ijeh-inem itile nangho nahiluva khat, Christa jengtah chu aumnai. Chule nangho nabonchaovin sopikhat cheh nahiuve." 
Matthew23:9 Vannoi leiset chunga koima pa sah hih-un; ijeh-inem itile van'ah na-Pau khat aume. 
Matthew23:10 Chule nanghon mi lamkai kitisah hih-un; ijeh-inem itile nalamkaija khat, Christa jengbou ahi." 
Matthew23:11 Nalah uva alenpen chu najenleuva pang ding ahibouve. 
Matthew23:12 Koi hile ama kichoi sang chu kisunem ding; chule koi hile akineosah-a chu kichoi sang ding ahi. 
Matthew23:13 Ahinla ohe, Danthu sun le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon miho masanga van lenggam nakhah-un; nanghola nalutpouvin, chule lut dinga kigoho jong nalutsah pouvin ahi." 
Matthew23:14 Vo danthu sunho le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon meithaiho in napum valun, kilepnan sot tahtah natao jiuve; hijeh-a chu nangho themmo chungnung nachan dingu ahi." 
Matthew23:15 Ohe, Danthusun le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile mi khat Juda hou housahna dingin twikhanglen le leiset chunga nache kimvel leuvin, chule koi hile najopjop chu nangho sanga ajat ni-a damun mi nahisah jiuvin ahi." 
Matthew23:16 Ohe, lamhil mitcho ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon koi hile houin pana kihahsel imathu aumpoi; koi hile houin'a um sana pana kihahsel bou chu leiba ahi, nati uve." 
Matthew23:17 Vo lungthimbei le mitcho ho, sana suthenga houin le sana chu hoijoh chungnung-jo-a ham?" 
Matthew23:18 Chule nanghon, Koi hile maicham pana kihahsel imathu aumpoi, maicham chunga um thilto pana kihahsel bou chu leiba ahi, nati uve." 
Matthew23:19 Vo mitcho ho, thilto suthenga maicham le thilto chu hoijoh chungnung-jo-a ham?" 
Matthew23:20 Hijeh chun koi hile maicham pana kihahsela chun, maicham le achunga um thilto aboncha apatna kihahsela ahi." 
Matthew23:21 Chule koi hile houin pana kihahsela chun, houin le achengpa chu agoma apatna kihahsela ahi." 
Matthew23:22 Chule koi hile van pana kihahsela chun, Pathen touna le achunga Toupa agoma apatna kihahsel ahi." 
Matthew23:23 Ohe, Danthu sun le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon pudina le pathikhom, chule jira hicheng chu somakhat natohji uvin, danthupeh lah-a alupen, thu adih-a tan, milungset, chule tahsan hicheng chu nalhadah-un ahi. Ahin hicheho hi naman uva, hitiho jong chu nalha lou dingu ahi." 
Matthew23:24 Vo lamhil mitcho ho, nanghon thouvaisi nalhiuvin, sagongsang napumval-ui!" 
Matthew23:25 Ohe, Danthu sun le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon khonle lheng apolam nasil ngimun, asunglam hunama lah le kitimlouna adimsetnin ahi." 
Matthew23:26 Vo Pharisai mitcho, khonle lheng chu asunglam silngim masale chun, apolam jong ngim dingbou ahi." 
Matthew23:27 Ohe, Danthusun le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nangho lhan bangleh-a kiloi tobang nahiuve; hitiho chu apolam hoilheh-in akimun, asunglam mithi gu le imanen aboh jouse adimsetnin ahi." 
Matthew23:28 Chutobang chun nangho jong napolamu mi mu dingin chonphatah nahiuve; ahin nasunglamu vang phatlhemna le khangitlouna adimsetnin ahi. 
Matthew23:29 Ohe, Danthu sun le Pharisai miphalhem ho, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon themgaoho lhan nasemun, chule michonpha ho lhan najemun," 
Matthew23:30 Chule, Kapu kapateu hinlaija chu keiho uma hileuveng, themgaoho thisan sona-a chu pan kalahlou dingu ahi, nati uve." 
Matthew23:31 Chutichun nangho themgaoho that teho son nahiuve ti chu, nangho le nangho ahetoh-a nahiu ahi." 
Matthew23:32 Napu napateu thil tena dan chu bulhit pai ngaltaovin. 
Matthew23:33 Vo gulteho, gulse sonho, nangho hi damun thutan na-a kona iti nahoi thei dinguham?" 
Matthew23:34 Veuvin, keiman naheng uva themgao, miching, chonna danthuhil kahinsole; amaho lah-a chu abang nathauva thingpel'a nakhetbeh uva, abang kikhopna ina najep uva, chule khotina nabolset dingu ahi." 
Matthew23:35 Hichu michonpha Abel thisan kiso-a pat, houin le maicham kikah-a natha-u Barachiah chapa Zekariah thisan kiso geija, leiset chunga michonphateho thisan kiso themona jouse aboncha nangho chunga achuh theina dinga ahi." 
Matthew23:36 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hicheng chu aboncha tulai mite chunga chu ding ahi." 
Matthew23:37 Vo Jerusalem, Jerusalem, themgaoho that le ahenga kisol teho songa seplih, ahpin anoute alha noija a-opkhum banga keiman jong nachate ijatvei opkhum dinga kagot hitam! Ahin nangho nanompouve." 
Matthew23:38 Veuvin, na-in'u chu akamhel dinga nangho kidalhah peh nahitaove." 
Matthew23:39 Ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Pakai mina hungpa chu anunnome, nati masangseuva, tukala keima neimu lou dingu ahi, ati." 
Matthew24:1 Chuin Jesu houin'a kona apotdoh-a achele; houin kisahdan ho chu vetsah dingin aseijuite ahenga ahungun ahi. 
Matthew24:2 Ahin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Nanghon hicheng hi namu lou uham? Keiman tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hikoma hi song suhchim louva khat chunga khat kisethop himhim umlou helding ahi, ati." 
Matthew24:3 Chuin Olive mol chunga atou petnin aseijuite guhthimin ahenga ahungun, Hicheng chu itihle hi dingham? Chule nangma hung kit ding phatle vannoi leiset kichai ni ding melchihna ipi hi dingham? neisei peh-un, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew24:4 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva hitin aseije, Koiman nangho nalheplhah louna dingun kichih theijun," 
Matthew24:5 Ijeh-inem itile mi tamtah keima minin hunguntin, Keima Christa kahi tiuvintin, mi tamtah alheplhah dingu ahi." 
Matthew24:6 Chule nanghon gal kisatle kidou thuthang najah dingu ahi; chingtheijun, lungdong hih-un; ijeh-inem itile hicheng chu hungsoh tei ding ahi; ahivangin achaina hiloulai ding ahi." 
Matthew24:7 Ijeh-inem itile vai khatle vai khat, gam khat le gam khat hung kidouvintin, mun chom choma kel lhantin, nat set lengin tin, ling kihot ding ahi." 
Matthew24:8 Hitiho jouse chu naosonat kipan ahi. 
Matthew24:9 Hiche phat teng chule genthei hesoh thoh dinga mihon nangho nahinpehdoh dingu ahi; chule keima min jala nangho namtin jouse hotna nahung umdingu ahi. 
Matthew24:10 Hiteng chule mi tamtah lunglha ding ahi, chule khatle khat kipedoh tontin, chule khat le khat kihoto ding ahi." 
Matthew24:11 Chule themgao lhem tamtah sohdoh-a, mi tamtah alheplhah dingu ahi." 
Matthew24:12 Chule chonset puncheh cheh jeh-a, mi tamtah ngailutna-a lhadai dingu ahi." 
Matthew24:13 Ahinla akhon ni geija thoh lhumkeija pangdetpa bou chu huhhing-a umding ahi. 
Matthew24:14 Chule namtin jouse hetsahna dinga hiche gamsung thupha hi vannoi leiset pumpi-a kihil lhang ding ahi; chutahle kichai dingbou ahi. 
Matthew24:15 Chuti ahijeh chun mi sumang thet umtah thil thudol Daniel themgao sei chu mun thenga adin namu tengule, (asim siman hehen,)" 
Matthew24:16 Chutengle Juda gama um chengse thinglhang lamah jamuhen; 
Matthew24:17 In chunga uma jong a-in'a athilkeo kilah dingin kumdahen; 
Matthew24:18 Chule louva um jong apon kilah dingin kile kitdahen. 
Matthew24:19 Ahin ohe, hiche lai chule naovop hole nao noichepsah ho ada nadinguve!" 
Matthew24:20 Chule najamnao chu phalbilai ahiloule cholngah ni ahi louna dingin taovun. 
Matthew24:21 Ijeh-inem itile hiche teng chule hesoh genthei khoh chungnung umding ahi; chutobang hesoh gentheina chu leiset umtilla pat tu geijin aumkha hihlaije, um jong umlou ding ahi." 
Matthew24:22 Chule hiche nikho chu kisuchom lou hileh, mihem himhim ahinga sohcha umlou dinga ahi; ahinla lhenchomte jala anikho chu kisuchom ding ahi." 
Matthew24:23 Chutengle, khat touvin najah uva, Ven, Christa hikoma aume, ahiloule, khukomah, tijongle tahsan hih-un." 
Matthew24:24 Ijeh-inem itile Christa lhemho le themgao lhemho hung sohdoh untin, melchihna loupi tahtah le mu kidang ahinvetsah dingu ahi; ahitheile lhenchomte tah jeng jong ahinlheplhah dingu ahi." 
Matthew24:25 Veuvin, Keiman kahil masah dem nahitaove." 
Matthew24:26 Hijeh chun mihon najah uva, Ven, gamthipmah aume atiuva ahile, chedoh hih-un, ahiloule, Ven, indan sungnunga aume, atiu jongle tahsan hih-un." 
Matthew24:27 Ijeh-inem itile kolphe niso lama ahung phetdohle, nilhum lam geijin asalvah-in; Mihem Chapa hung kit jong chutobang ding ahi." 
Matthew24:28 Thilong um umna-a bou muthong kikhom ding ahi. 
Matthew24:29 Ahivangin chutenga hesoh genthei joutah chule nisa thimintin, lha jong vahta lou ding, vanlaijola ahsi ho pullhantin, chule van thahatna ho chengse kihot lingsoh ding ahi." 
Matthew24:30 Chutahle vanlaijola Mihem Chapa melchihna hung kilang ding; chuteng tahle vannoi leiset phungtin-in a-op achupchup dingu ahi, chule vanlaijola Mihem Chapa thuneitah le loupi chungnung tah-a meilom lah-a ahung amu dingu ahi." 
Matthew24:31 Chule aman avantilte sumkon gin nasatahtoh asoldoh ding; chule amahon van mong khatna patna van mong khat geija, kolkimvel li-a kona alhen chomte alon khom dingu ahi." 
Matthew24:32 Theichang phung hin thulem kihilun. Abah adona ana ahungnou tengle, nipi anaitai ti nanghon naheuve." 
Matthew24:33 Chutobang chun nangho jong hichengse chu aboncha namusoh tengule, anai tai, kotbul hungeija ahitai ti heuvin." 
Matthew24:34 Keiman nangho tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hichengse chu aboncha aguilhun masangse-a, hiche khangguija mite hi mang lou ding ahi." 
Matthew24:35 Vanle lei mang ding ahin; keima thu vang mang lou ding ahi. 
Matthew24:36 Ahivangin ka Pa changseh tilou van'a vantilte jong, koimachan anikho le anidan tah chu ahepoi." 
Matthew24:37 Ahinla Noah nikho tobang chu Mihem Chapa hungkit nijong hiding ahi. 
Matthew24:38 Ijeh-inem itile twisanglet masangin, Noah kong'a alut ni geijin, mihon aneuvin adonun, akichengun, akichensah-un," 
Matthew24:39 Chule twisang ahung letna abonchauva alhohmang gam kahse chun ima hepha louvin aumun ahi; Mihem Chapa hung ni jongle chutobang ding ahi. 
Matthew24:40 Chutengle mi ni louva um, khat kila-a khat kidalha ding ahi." 
Matthew24:41 Numei ni sumheija chang goikhoma, khat kila-a khat kidalha ding ahi." 
Matthew24:42 Hijeh chun kiging jingin umum; ijeh-inem itile na-Pakaiyu ipi nikho le nidana ahung ding nanghon nahepouve. 
Matthew24:43 Itih phatna gucha ahung ding inneipun ahet hile, kiging jingintin, a-in aphetvangsah lou ding ahi; hichu nanghon heuvin" 
Matthew24:44 Hijeh chun nangho phasademin umun; ijeh-inem itile nagel lou pettah-ule Mihem Chapa chu hung ding ahi. 
Matthew24:45 Ahile, a-pakaiyin aphat phatcha achan dingu an hoppeh ding a-in sunga jouse chunga apipua apansah, soh tahsan umtah chingtah koiham?" 
Matthew24:46 A-pakai ahung tenga chutia bol ahungto soh chu anunnom ahi. 
Matthew24:47 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, aman ama chu anei jouse chunga apipua apansah ding ahi." 
Matthew24:48 Amavang soh gilou chun alungthimin, Ka pakai ahung geije, tihen," 
Matthew24:49 Asoh chanpiho dengpan tahen, chule ju khamho toh ne khom don khomtale," 
Matthew24:50 Hiche sohpa chun aginchat lou nitahle ahetlou pettah-a a-pakaipa chu hunga; 
Matthew24:51 Ama chu tum ni asoa, achan miphalhem ho lah-a akoi ding ahi; hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi." 
Matthew25:1 Hiteng chule van lenggam chu thaomei kikenna mou in neipu lamto dinga potdoh nungah somtoh kitekah ding ahi. 
Matthew25:2 Alah uva nga chu lungthim bei ahiuvin, nga chu lungthim pha ahiuve." 
Matthew25:3 Ijeh-inem itile lungthim bei chengse chun, thaomei akikenu chun thaotwi akentha pouvin ahi." 
Matthew25:4 Ahin lungthim pha chengse vang chun, thaomei akenu chun atheija thaotwi akentha uvin ahi." 
Matthew25:5 Chuin mou inneipu chu ahung gei jeh-in abonchauvin alulhuvin, a-imulhu gam taovin ahi." 
Matthew25:6 Ahin jan khang kimim, Veuvin, mou inneipu ahunge! Alamto dingin potdoh-un, tin akisamtan ahi." 
Matthew25:7 Chutah-in hiche nungah ho chu athouvun, athaomei cheh-u akigot taovin ahi." 
Matthew25:8 Hichun lungthim beiho chun lungthim phaho jah-a chun, Nathao twi'u themkhat neipeuvin; ijeh-inem itile keiho thaomei mit ding kon ahitai, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew25:9 Ahivangin lungthim phaho chun adonbutnun, Keihole nangho igomuva dingin lhingponte; chusangin ajohho henga cheovinlang nangho ding gakichoh taovin, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew25:10 Ahinla acho dinga ache kah-un mou inneipu chu ahungtan; chule kigosa dema umho chu amatoh mou puina in'ah thakhatnin alut taovin; chule kot akikhah tan ahi. 
Matthew25:11 Chujouvin nungah dangho chu ahungun, Pakai, Pakai, kot neihonun, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew25:12 Ahinla aman adonbutnin, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Keiman nangho kahepouve, atitai." 
Matthew25:13 Hijeh chun kiging jingin umun, ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa hung nading anikhole anidan tah chu nanghon nahepouve." 
Matthew25:14 Ijeh-inem itile van lenggam chu asohte kou khoma anei chengse amaho khutna pedoh-a, khol gama chemang mi khat tobang ahi." 
Matthew25:15 Aman khat chu talent nga apen, khat talent ni apen, khat talent khat apen, athan ajokhop cheh-in sum apen, akipat dohtai." 
Matthew25:16 Chuin talent nga sangpa chun chupettah chun achen hiche chun akiveijin, talent ngama aveikanben ahi." 
Matthew25:17 Chutobangma chun talent ni sangpa chun talent nima aveikanben ahi. 
Matthew25:18 Ahin talent khat sangpa vang chun achen, leiko alaijin, a-pakaipa sum chu agasel mangtan ahi." 
Matthew25:19 Chuin phatsot tah nungin hiche soh ho pakaipa chu ahungin, amaho chutoh sum asutoh taovin ahi." 
Matthew25:20 Chuin talent nga sangpa chun talent nga ahinchoiben, Pakai, nangman talent nga neipeh ahin; ven keiman talent nga kaveikan ben ahi, ati." 
Matthew25:21 Chuin apakai pan ajah-a, Soh pha tahsan umtah, nabol aphatave; nangma themcha khat chunga tahsan umtah nahin, keiman nangma tamtah chunga kapansah ding nahi; nangma na pakai kipana-ah luttan, ati." 
Matthew25:22 Chuin talent ni sangpa jong chu ahungin, Pakai, nangman keima talent ni neipeh ahin; ven keiman talent ni kaveikan ben ahi, ati." 
Matthew25:23 Chuin a-pakaipan ajah-a, Soh pha tahsan umtah, nabol aphatave; nangma themcha khat chunga tahsan umtah nahin, keiman nangma tamtah chunga kapansah ding nahi; nangma napakai kipana-ah luttan, ati." 
Matthew25:24 Chujouvin talent khat sangpa chu ahungin, Pakai, nangma hi mikhel nahin, natuna louvah na-atjin, nathejalna lou pouvah nahuikhomjin ahi; hichu kahen;" 
Matthew25:25 Nangma kakichan, kachen nasum talent chu leiah kaseltan ahi: ven, nangma-a ma chu nakimu ahi, ati." 
Matthew25:26 Ahin a-pakaipan adonbutnin ajah-a, Soh giloule thase, katuna louva ka-atjia, kathe jalna louva kahui khomji nahet ahi." 
Matthew25:27 Chuti an kasum chu sum veipung na-a anakoi tangem, chutile kei kahung phatna asumthoi puma keiman kasum muta dinga." 
Matthew25:28 Hijeh chun hiche talent chu lahpeh-un lang, talent som neipa chu petaovin," 
Matthew25:29 Ijeh-inem itile anei chana chu kipehbe-a, aneiletset ding ahi; anei lou vang chu aneichasun chu ama-a kona kilah mangpeh ding ahi." 
Matthew25:30 Hiche soh pannabei hi polam muthim-ah gapaimang-un; hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi, ati." 
Matthew25:31 Mihem Chapa vantil thengte jousetoh aloupina-a ahung tengtah le, Ama aloupina lal touna-a tou ding ahi;" 
Matthew25:32 Chule namtin vai jouse Ama anga chu kikhom ding; chule kelngoi chingpan keltah-a kona kelngoi achomkhen banga, aman khatna kona khat achomkhena," 
Matthew25:33 Aman kelngoi chengse ajet lama akoija, keltah chengse vei lama akoi ding ahi." 
Matthew25:34 Chutengle lengpa chun ajet lama umteho jah-a chu, Hungun, ka Pa phattheiboh changho, vannoi leiset kiphudoh tila patna nangho dinga gotsa kikoi lenggama hung lotaovin." 
Matthew25:35 Ijeh-inem itile kagil akelin ahile, nanghon neh ding neinapeuvin; kadang achah-in, donding neinapeuvin; kamaljinin ahile neilhun sah-un;" 
Matthew25:36 Kasagoh keova kaumin, pon neinasilpeh-un; kadam mon ahile, eiven nahungun; chule kasoh changin ahile, hikoma jong chun kahenga nahungun ahi, ati ding ahi." 
Matthew25:37 Chutengle michonpha te chun, keihon itih-a nagilkel kamuva, an nehding kapeh khah-um? Ahiloule itih-a nadangchah kamuva, kadon sah-um?" 
Matthew25:38 Keihon itih-a namaljin kamuva, kalhunsah-um? Ahiloule nasagoh keova naum kamuva, pon kasil pehkhah-um?" 
Matthew25:39 Chule keihon itih-a nadamo kamuva kahung vetnuva; nasohchan kamuva nahenga kahung uvem? ati dingu ahi. 
Matthew25:40 Chule lengpan amaho jah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hiche kasopite ho lah-a aneopen khat nabolna chanseu chu, keima neibolnao ahi, tia adonbut ding ahi." 
Matthew25:41 Chutengle aman avei lama umho jah-a chu, Vo gaosap changho, kakoma konin chemangun, diabol le avantilte dinga kikoi meilhum sunga lut taovin;" 
Matthew25:42 Ijeh-inem itile kagil kelin, nanghon neh ding neipe pouvin; kadang chah-in, don ding neipepouvin;" 
Matthew25:43 Kamaljinin, neilhunsah pouvin; sagoh keovin kaumin, pon neinasilpeh pouvin; kadammole kasoh chanin, neihungve pouvin ahi, ati ding ahi." 
Matthew25:44 Chutengle amahon jong, Pakai, keihon nangma itih-a nagilkel, nadangchah, namaljin, sagoh keova naum, nadammo le nasohchan kamu uva kajenle daovem? tia ama adonbut dingu ahi." 
Matthew25:45 Chutengle Aman amaho jah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nanghon hiche aneochaho lah-a khat nabol louvu chu, keima neibol louvu ahi, tia adonbut ding ahi." 
Matthew25:46 Chule amaho chu tonsot kemlou talent man dinga cheova, michonpha ho chu kemlou tonsot hinna-a che ding ahiuve." 
Matthew26:1 Chutichun Jesu'n hichengse chu asei jouvin, aseijuite jah-a," 
Matthew26:2 Nini joule kalchuhkut hi ding ahi; chule Mihem Chapa hi thingpel'a khetbeh dinga melmate khutna kipedoh ding ahi, ti chu nanghon naheuve, ati." 
Matthew26:3 Chutah chun thempu pipuiho le danthusunho, upaho chu thempu chungnung Caiaphas atiu inpia chun akikhomun," 
Matthew26:4 Jesu chu doha bola matna, thana dingin akihou khomtaovin ahi;" 
Matthew26:5 Amavang, Kut sung chun hidahen, ajole mipi lah-a thunoh umgetninte, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew26:6 Chujouvin Jesu Bethany kho-a Simon miphahpa in'a aumpetnin," 
Matthew26:7 Numei khatnin songval bomin thao namtui manlutah ahinchoijin, ahenga ahungin, a-ankong um pettah-in alu chunga asunglhan anun ahi." 
Matthew26:8 Ahin aseijuiten hichu amuvin, alungnom mo uvin, Ibola hitia amoh suhmang jeng hitam?" 
Matthew26:9 Ijeh-inem itile hiche thao hi aman tamtah-a joh-a, mivaicha gentheiho peh thei ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew26:10 Ahin Jesu'n hichu ahetdoh phatnin, Ibola numeinu hi nasuh lunggimu ham? Kachunga hi thil phatah abol ahi." 
Matthew26:11 Ijeh-inem itile mivaicha gentheite chu nakom uva aum jingnauve, keimavang nangho koma um jinga kahipoi." 
Matthew26:12 Hiche thao namtui eisunkhum hi, eikivui nikho-a dinga chu eigot ahi." 
Matthew26:13 Keiman nangho tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Vannoi leiset gam pumpi-a hiche Kipana Thupha kihil lhang nachana, hiche numeinu thilbol jong hi, amanu het jingna-a kiseipeh ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:14 Chuphatnin somleni lah-a khat, Juda Iscariot atiu chu, thempu pipuiho koma achen," 
Matthew26:15 Ajah uva, Ama khu matsah leuveng ipi neipeh diuham? ati. Chuin amahon ama chu dangka somthum ateppeh taovin ahi." 
Matthew26:16 Chupet tah-a pat chun aman ama chu pedoh-a matsahna thei dingje agomkom aholtan ahi. 
Matthew26:17 Chuin cholsolou changlhah kut ni masa nin aseijuite Jesu hengah ahungun, Kalchuhkut nanehna ding hoikoma goleuveng nalungham, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew26:18 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Khopi sunga cheovinlang mi khat jah-a, Houhilin, Kaphat anaitai; kaseijuite toh nangma in'a kalchuhkut an kanehkhom dingu ahi, ati, tin gaseijun, ati." 
Matthew26:19 Chuin Jesu'n ahil bangbangu chun abolun, aseijuiten kalchuhkut chu agago taovin ahi." 
Matthew26:20 Chuin nilhah ahi phatnin, aseijuite somleni chutoh atou taovin;" 
Matthew26:21 Chuin a-anneh laitah-un aman ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kasei ahi, nalah uva khatnin eipehdoh-a eimatsah ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:22 Chuin alungdong lheh jengtaovin, ajah-a, Pakai, kei kahim? aticheh taovin ahi." 
Matthew26:23 Aman adonbutnin, Lhenga kaso khompipa tah chu eimatsah dinga ahi." 
Matthew26:24 Mihem Chapa achonchan ding thu kisun bangtah-a chu cheding mong ahi, ahivangin Mihem Chapa pedoh-a matsah dingpa chu ohe adana-e! Ama chu apena peng lou hile ama dinga phajota ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:25 Hichun apedoh-a pang ding Juda Iscariot chun adonbutnin, Pakai, kei kahim? ati. Chuin aman, Nakisei khai, ati." 
Matthew26:26 Chuin an aneh laitah-un, Jesu'n changlhah alan, phatthei aboh jouvin ahehbal balin, aseijuite apen, Kilah-un, neuvin; hiche hi katahsa ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:27 Chuin khon alan, athangvah jouvin amaho chu apen, ajah uva, Nabonchaovin don sohkeijun;" 
Matthew26:28 Ijeh-inem itile hiche hi chonset suhbeina dinga mi tamtah dinga kisodoh kitepna thah kathisan ahi. 
Matthew26:29 Chule keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Ka Pa lenggam sunga nang hotoh athah-a kadonkhom ni ahunglhun kahse-a, tu kala hiche lengpiga twi hi kadon kit lou ding ahitai, ati." 
Matthew26:30 Chuin amahon la asah jouvun apotdoh-un, Olive molsang lama achetauvin ahi." 
Matthew26:31 Chutah chun Jesu'n ajah uva, Tujana hi nangho nabon chaova kachunga lungthoi sohkei ding nahiuve; ijeh-inem itile, Keiman kelngoi chingpa kavoh lhuh ding, chutengle kelngoihon chu chehgam ding ahi, tin akisune." 
Matthew26:32 Ahin kathodoh nungle, Galilee gam lam namasang sang uva kache ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:33 Ahin Peter'in adonbutnin, ajah-a, Abonchauvin nachungah lungthoi jongleu, keima vang itihchan hijongle lungthoi ponge, ati." 
Matthew26:34 Jesu'n ajah-a, tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, tujan ah khon masanga thumvei neiseilep ding ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:35 Pater'in ajah-a, Nangma toh thitha ding mong hijongleng, keiman nangma seilep hihhel ing kate, ati. Aseijuite jousen jong chuti chun asei sohkeijun ahi." 
Matthew26:36 Hichun Jesu amaho chutoh Gethsemane atiu mun khat alhunun, aman aseijuite jah-a, Keima khukoma khu kache-a kagatao sungsen, nangho hikoma hin anatou jingun, ati." 
Matthew26:37 Chuin Peter le Zebedai chapate ni chu akipuijin; chule alunghem lheh jengin alungkham pantan ahi. 
Matthew26:38 Chutah chun aman amaho jah-a, Thina khophelin kalung hesoh behseh jengtai; hikoma umunlang neikigin piuvin, ati." 
Matthew26:39 Chuin amasang lama phabep khat ache chonin, akhupbon alhun tolah amai asulutnin, ataovin, Ka Pa, ahi theile, hiche khon hi keija konin kitolmang jenghen; ahivangin keima lunggot bang hilouvin, nangma lunggot bang hijohen, ati." 
Matthew26:40 Chuin aseijuite henga ahungin ahile, amaho chu ana-imut lhuh gamu ahungtoh-in, Peter jah-a, Nanghon nidan khat jengjong nei kiginpi jou lou uham?" 
Matthew26:41 Lhepna-a nalhah louna dingun kigingun, taovun; lhagao vangin agonan tahsan ajoupoi, ati." 
Matthew26:42 Chuin aniveina-in ache kitnin, ataovin, Ka Pa, hiche khona kadon louva kitolmang thei lou ahile, nangma thuthu hihen, ati." 
Matthew26:43 Chuin ahung kitnin ahile, amaho chu a-imut lhuh-u ahungtoh-in ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu a-imutsoh lheh jengun ahi." 
Matthew26:44 Chutichun amaho chu adalhan, athumvei na-in ache kitnin, ataovin, aseingai bangma chu asei kitnin ahi." 
Matthew26:45 Chutah-in aseijuite hengah ahungin, ajah uva, Ahile, tun imuvinlang kitha ol taovin; veuvin, phat alhingtai, chule Mihem Chapa hi michonse te khutna kipedoh-a ahitai." 
Matthew26:46 Kipat un, chetao hite; veuvin, eipedohpa ahungnai tai, ati." 
Matthew26:47 Chuin hichu asei nalajin, veuvin, somleni lah-a Juda Iscariot chu thempu pipuiho le upaho koma kona chemjam le moltum hintho-a hungkon mipi nasatah chutoh ahung kilhonin ahungtan ahi." 
Matthew26:48 Ama pedoh-a pangpa chun amaho chu melchihna ahil masan, Keiman kachop penpen chu ama ahi, ama chu man-un, ati ahi." 
Matthew26:49 Chuin aman Jesu heng ajon paijin, Rabbi, chibai, atin achoptan ahi." 
Matthew26:50 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Kajol, Ibola hunga nahim? ati. Chutah-in amaho chun akom ahin naijun, Jesu chungah akhut alhaovin, amantaovin ahi." 
Matthew26:51 Chuin, veuvin, Jesu loiho khatnin akhut alamin, achemjam asatdoh-in, thempu chungnung sohpa asatle abilkol lang khat asatlhan ahi." 
Matthew26:52 Chuphatnin Jesu'n ajah-a, Nachemjam chu akoina-a koi kitnin; ijeh-inem itile chemjam panteho chu chemjam'a lou ding ahi." 
Matthew26:53 Ole tutah jenga jong hi ka Pan avantil janel somleni sanga tamjo eihin solpehna dinga kathum thei louva nangaito ham? 
Matthew26:54 Ahinla chutin kibole hitia hi thu soh tei ding ahi, tia Pathen lekhabua kisun chu iti guilhun thei dingham? ati." 
Matthew26:55 Hichepet chun Jesu'n mipi chengse jah-a chun, Gucha michom man dinga kon banga chemjamle moltum nahinthova, keima man dinga nahung kon uham? Keima houin'ah niseh-in katouvin thu kahil jingin, chulaijinla neiman pouvin ahi." 
Matthew26:56 Amavang themgaoho lekha sut thu guilhuna dinga, hichengse hi aboncha soh-a ahitai, ati. Chutah chun aseijuite jousen ama adalhauvin, ajamgam taovin ahi." 
Matthew26:57 Chuin Jesu manho chun danthu sunho le upaho kikhopna, Caiaphas atiu thempu chungnung henga chun akaijun ahi." 
Matthew26:58 Peter vang chun galkanga ajuipeh-in, thempu chungnung inpi leitol geijin ajuijin, hikoma chun alutnin, Achaina munge, tin sottolho lah-a chun atouvin ahi." 
Matthew26:59 Hichun thempu pipuiho le houvaipoloi chengsen Jesu thana dingin achungah hettohsah jouthu aholun; 
Matthew26:60 Jouthu hettohsah tamtah ahung vangun, amupouvin ahi. Akhonnan mi ni ahungin," 
Matthew26:61 Hichepa hin, Keima Pathen houin suse-a ni thum sunga sadoh kit thei kahi ati, ahung ti lhonin ahi." 
Matthew26:62 Chuin thempu chungnung chu adingdoh-in, ajah-a, Nadonbut lou dingham? Hitehon nahehsetna-a thu aseiju hi ipiham? ati." 
Matthew26:63 Ahivangin Jesu thipbeh-in aumin ahi. Chuin thempu chungnung chun ajah-a, Keiman nangma Pathen hing mina kahahsela kasol nahi, nangma Pathen Chapa Christa chu nahim? Neisei peh-un, ati." 
Matthew26:64 Hichun Jesu'n ajah-a, Naseikhai, chukalvala kaseipeh nahiuve, Tunung kalle nanghon Mihem Chapa thahatna jet lama atoule, meilom chunga ahung namu dingu ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:65 Chutah-in thempu chungnung chun apon abotkeh-in, Hiche hi Pathen ataitom ahi; eihon thu hettohsah dang iding iti tah dinguham? Veuvin, nanghon tun Pathen ataitomna najataovin ahi." 
Matthew26:66 Nanghon iti nagel uvem? ati. Amahon, Thi dinga lom ahi, tin adonbutnun ahi." 
Matthew26:67 Chutah-in amahon amaijah chil asetnun, akhut tumun akhenun; chule kimkhatnin abengun," 
Matthew26:68 Vo Khrista, gaovinlang seijin, koiham nabenga chu, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew26:69 Hichepet chun Peter polamah leitolah atouvin ahi; hichun sohnu khat ahenga ahungin ajah-a, Nangma jong Galilee mi Jesu toh kiloi chu nahi, ati." 
Matthew26:70 Ahivangin aman japi angsungah aseilepmin, Nathusei chu kahepoi, atitan ahi." 
Matthew26:71 Chuin kelkot phung lamah apotnin ahile, sohnu achom khatnin ama chu amun, chukoma umho jah-a chun, Hichepa jong hi Nazareth Jesu koma uma chu ahi, ati." 
Matthew26:72 Chuin aman aseilep kitnin, Hiche mipa chu kahepoi, tin akihahseltan ahi." 
Matthew26:73 Chujou phabepmin chukoma um miho chu ahenga ahungun, Peter jah-a, Tahbeh-in nangma jong amaho lah-a khat mongmong nahi; ijeh-inem itile napao chun nangma naphong doh-e, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew26:74 Hiphat chun aman, Hiche mihempa chu kahe hih hele tin kigaosaple kihahsel athopantan ahi. Chupettah chun ahchal akhongtan ahi." 
Matthew26:75 Hichun, Ahchal khon masanga thumvei neiseilep ding ahi, tia Jesu thusei chu Peter'in ageldoh-in; chuin polamah apotdoh-in, lhasetah-in hakan akaptan ahi." 
Matthew27:1 Chuin jingkah ahi phatnin, thempu pipuiho chengsele upaho jouse Jesu thana dingin akihoutoh taovin ahi;" 
Matthew27:2 Chuin Ama chu akanun, akaijun, gamvaipo Pontius Pilate khutnah apedoh taovin ahi." 
Matthew27:3 Chutah-in apedoh-a panga Juda Iscariot chun athi dinga themmo achansah-u chu amun ahile akisih-in, dangka somthum chu thempu pipuiho le upaho alepeh kitnin," 
Matthew27:4 Themona neilou thisan kapehdoh chu kachon kheltai, ati. Ahinla amahon, Hichu keiho ka ithu-u umam? Nangman nalo nomnom lotan, ati taovin ahi." 
Matthew27:5 Hichun aman dangka chu houin sunga asep lhan, chukoma kon chun achemangin, ama akikhai lihtan ahi." 
Matthew27:6 Chuin thempu pipuihon hiche dangka chu alauvin, Hiche hi thisan man ahi jeh-in, housum kholna-a koi angai ahipoi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:7 Hichun amaho akihoutoh-un, gamdang miho vuina dingin, hichun beldengpa leiset achou vin ahi." 
Matthew27:8 Hiche jeh chun tugeijin hiche leiset chu thisan leiset akitin ahi. 
Matthew27:9 Hichu themgao Jeremiah thusei, Israel chate lah-a kona aman asahsao, aman kisahpa man chu dangka somthum alauvin ahi;" 
Matthew27:10 Chule, Pakaiyin eithupeh dungjuijin, beldengpa leiset manin apetaovin ahi, ati chu guilhunga ahitai." 
Matthew27:11 Chujouvin Jesu chu gamvaipo angah adingtan ahi: chuin gamvaipo chun adongin, Nangma Juda te lengpa nahim? atin ahile, Jesu'n ajah-a, Naseikhai, ati." 
Matthew27:12 Ahin thempu pipuiho le upahon ahehsetna thu ijat asei vangun, aman imachan adonbutpon ahi." 
Matthew27:13 Chutah-in Pilate'in ajah-a, Hitehon nangma douna hettohsahna asei chengseu hi najah louham? ati." 
Matthew27:14 Ahin Aman cheng khatcha jong adonbut lou jeh chun, gamvaipo chun adatmo lheh jengin ahi." 
Matthew27:15 Hiche kut sunga chu sohchang koi hile mihon agotpen penu chu gamvaipo chun alhadohji angai ahi. 
Matthew27:16 Hichepet chun sohchang amin Barabbas atiu, sohchang minthang tah khat aumin ahi." 
Matthew27:17 Hijeh chun amaho akikhop phatnun, Pilate'in amaho chu adongin, Koijoh lhadoh pehleng nalungu ham? Barabbas ha, Christa kiti Jesu joh ham? ati." 
Matthew27:18 Ijeh-inem itile thangset suma apehdoh-u ahi chu aman ahen ahi. 
Matthew27:19 Chuin ama thutanna mun'a atoupetnin, a-inneipin thu ahin thotnin, Hiche michonpha pa chu limsah hih-in; ijeh-inem itile Ama jeh chun tunin kamangin kathohgim lheh jengin ahi, ati." 
Matthew27:20 Ahinla thempu pipuiho le upahon Barabbas chu angeh uva, chule Jesu chu asuhmangsah dingin mipi chu atilse taovin ahi." 
Matthew27:21 Chuin gamvaipo chun adonbutnin, Hichete ni hi koijoh lhadoh pehleng nalungu ham? atin ahile; amahon, Barabbas, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:22 Chuin Pilate'in ajah uva, Achutile Christa kiti Jesu hi i-kalo dingba hitam? ati. Chuin amahon, Thingpel'a kikhenbeh hen, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:23 Chuin aman, Ibolinem, ipi suhset aneiham? ati. Ahivangin amahon hasaptah-in asamun, Thingpelah kikhenbeh hen, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:24 Chuin Pilate'in ananlela abol ima phatsahna ahilou, thunoh baotam asojoh chu amu phatnin, twi alan, mipi angsungah akhut asillhan, Hiche michonpha pa thisan kisona-a themona nei lou kahi; nanghon nalolo lotaovin, ati." 
Matthew27:25 Chuin mihon abonchauvin adonbutnun, Ama thisan phu chu keiho le kachateu chungah chuhen, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:26 Chutah-in aman amaho chu Barabbas alhadohpeh-un; Jesu vang chu ajepmin, thingpel'a khetbeh dingin apedohtan ahi." 
Matthew27:27 Chutah-in gamvaipo sepai ho chun Jesu chu Pretorium sungah apui lutnun, akomah sepaiho jouse akikhom sohkeijun;" 
Matthew27:28 Chule aponsil chu ahoh lha uvin, ponsandup asilpeh taovin ahi." 
Matthew27:29 Chule ling lukhuh aphanun, alu-a akhuhpeh-un, chule akhut jet lamah pengtenggol khat achoisah-un, a-angah adilsuvin, Vo Juda te Lengpa, Chibai, atiuvin, totnopnan ael-elin abolun ahi." 
Matthew27:30 Chuin chil asetkhumun, apumpeng choi chu alauvin, alu avoh naovin ahi." 
Matthew27:31 Chutia chu totnopna-a a-el ela abol jouvun, pon san chu ahoh lha uvin, ama pon asilpeh-un thingpel'a khetbeh dingin apuitaovin ahi." 
Matthew27:32 Chujouvin apotdoh uva acheule, amin Simon atiu, Cyrene gam mi khat amuvin, ama athingpel puding chun acham louvin amanun ahi." 
Matthew27:33 Chuin Golgotha (Hichu lugumun tina ahi) atiu mun chu alhunun," 
Matthew27:34 Amahon Jesu chu gilkhatoh kihal lengpitwi thuh adonsah-un ahile, aman atepmin adon nomtapon ahi." 
Matthew27:35 Chujouvin amachu thingpel'a akhenbeh-un; themgao thusei, kapon akihom taovin, chule kasangkhol chol vang vetnan amang taove, atichu guilhun nan, apon chu akihomun, chule vang avetaove." 
Matthew27:36 Chule hikoma chun atouvun, ama chu angah taovin ahi." 
Matthew27:37 Chule HICHEPA HI JESU JUDA TE LENGPA AHI, tin ahehnau hetsahna asunun, alu chungah atah-un ahi." 
Matthew27:38 Hiche pet chun amatoh thakhatnin gucha michom ni, khat ajet lamah khat avei lamah thingpelah akhen beh-un ahi." 
Matthew27:39 Chuin achele avahle jousen akhasuh khumun, a-el elin ahouvun," 
Matthew27:40 Nang houin suse-a ni thuma sadoh kit, nangma kihuh hing tangem! nangma Pathen Chapa nahile, thingpel'a konin hung kumlhan, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:41 Thempu pipuihon jong, danthu sunho le upaho toh chutima chun totnopnan abolun," 
Matthew27:42 Aman midang ahuhhingjin; ama akihuhhing theipoi. Ama Israelte Lengpa ahileh, tun thingpel'a konin hung kumlha temhen, achutile tahsanunge." 
Matthew27:43 Aman Pathen asongin; Pathen'in adei ahile tun huhhing hen; ijeh-inem itile aman, Pathen Chapa kahi ati, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:44 Chule amatoh thingpel'a kikhetbeh tha gucha michomte ni jong chun, chutobangma chun ahouse lhonin ahi." 
Matthew27:45 Chuin nidan gupma pat Nidan ko geijin, gam jouse chungah mu athim tan ahi." 
Matthew27:46 Chuin nidan ko donin Jesu'n, Eli, Eli, lama sabachthani, tin hapenin apengin ahi. Hichu, Ka Pathen, ka Pathen, ibola neidalhah ham, tina ahi." 
Matthew27:47 Chukoma dingho lah-a abang bangin chutia ati chu ajauvin, Hichepan Elijah akouve, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:48 Chupettah chun alah uva khat alhaijelin, twichop phon khat alan, lengpitwi thuh adelhopmin, pengtenggol leh-a atah-in, agahdonsah-in ahi." 
Matthew27:49 Ahin adangho chun, Limsah hih-in; Elijah ahuhhinga hunga hung hih-am, veohite, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:50 Chuin Jesu hapenin apengin, alhagao alhadohtan ahi." 
Matthew27:51 Chuin, veuvin, houin'a pondal len chu achunga pat anoi geijin a-ehlha paijin keh ni akison; chule ling akihotnin, songpiho akeh-in ahi." 
Matthew27:52 Chule lhankhuh ho akihongin, a-imu mithengho long tamtah kaithouvin aumin ahi;" 
Matthew27:53 Chule ama thokit nung chun amaho chu lhankhuh-a konin apotdoh-un, khopi thenga ache lutnun, mi tamtah akimusah uvin ahi." 
Matthew27:54 Chuin sepai jalamkai le aumpi Jesu ngah-a pangho chun ling kihot le thilsoh umchanje chu amuvin, akicha lheh jengun, Hichepa hi Pathen Chapa tahbeh mong ahi, ati taovin ahi." 
Matthew27:55 Chule Galilee gama kona Jesu nung hinjuija ajenlea pang numei tamtah aumun, amaho chun galkanga pangin ave jingun ahi." 
Matthew27:56 Alah uva chun Magdalene Mariam, Jacob le Joses nu Mariam, chule Zebedee chapate ni nu aumun ahi." 
Matthew27:57 Chuin nilhah ahi phatnin, Jesu seijuija pang Arimathea kho-a amin Joseph atiu mihaotah khat Pilate henga ahungin, Jesu long chu athumin ahi." 
Matthew27:58 Hichun Pilate chun apeh dingin thu apetan ahi. 
Matthew27:59 Chuin Joseph chun along chu alan, tupat ponnem ngimseh chan atomin, song alaihom ama lhan thah sunga chun alupsah-in," 
Matthew27:60 Lhan kotna chun song lentah khat atanglutnin, achemang tan ahi." 
Matthew27:61 Chule Magdalene Mariam le Mariam chom nu chu hikoma chun aumun, lhan maija chun atou jingun ahi." 
Matthew27:62 Ajingin, hichu kigot ni ahin, thempu pipuiho le Pharisai ho Pilate hengah akikhomun," 
Matthew27:63 Ajah-a, Kapu, hiche milhemlhapa chun ahinlaijin, Ni thum joule thoukit ding kahi, ati chu tun kalunguva alange." 
Matthew27:64 Hijeh chun ni thum geija alhan ngah ding thu pen; ajole jannin aseijuite hunguntin, gumang untin, miho jah-a, Athi lah-a konin athoukit tai tiget nunte; chutile suhkhel masah sanga suhkhel nunung chu setchehna hi ding ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew27:65 Pilate'in ajah uva, Nanghon santri hon khat naneiju chu; cheovinlang nanga thei theijun ganga phatsah taovin, ati." 
Matthew27:66 Chuin amaho angah ding santri hon chutoh alhonun, song chunga chun mohor anamun, lhan chu phatah-in angasah taovin ahi." 
Matthew28:1 Chuin cholngah ni kichaija Hapta kipat ni masa ni khovah thenthenin, Magdalene Mariam le Mariam chom nu chu lhan ve ding chun ahung lhonin ahi." 
Matthew28:2 Chule, veuvin, ling hahon akihot tan ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pakai vantil van'a konin ahung kumlhan, song chu akotna konin atangdoh-in, achungah atouvin ahi." 
Matthew28:3 Avouso chu kolphetoh abangin, aponsil chu buhbang bangin abangin;" 
Matthew28:4 Chule ama akichat jeh-un angah ho akihot akihotnun, athi-a toh abang jengun ahi." 
Matthew28:5 Ahin hiche vantil chun numei ho chu ahin houvin, ajah uva, Nangho kicha hih-un, ijeh-inem itile thingpel'a kithat Jesu chu naholu ahi kahenai." 
Matthew28:6 Ama hikoma aumtapoi; ijeh-inem itile aman asei bang chun athoudohtai. Hungun lang Pakai lupna hung vetaovin. 
Matthew28:7 Chule nangho cheloijun lang aseijuiteho jah-a hiche hi gaseijun, Ama athi lah-a konin athoudohtai; chule, veuvin, Galilee gam lamah namasanguvah achei; chukoma chu nanghon ama namu dingu ahi, gatiuvin; veuvin, najah uva kaseitai, ati." 
Matthew28:8 Chuin amaho kichat toh gomin hapan akipah-un, lhan phunga kon chun achedoh loijun, aseijuite henga thulhut ding chun alhaijel taovin ahi." 
Matthew28:9 Chuin amaho aseijuite seipeh dinga acheule, veuvin, Jesu'n amaho chu akimupin, ajah uva, Damselun, ati. Hichun amahon aheng ajonun, akeng atuh-un chibai abohtauvin ahi." 
Matthew28:10 Hichun Jesu'n ajah uva, Kicha hih-un, cheovin, kasopite jah-a gaseijun, amaho Galilee gam lama cheohen, chukoma chu amahon eimu dingu ahi, ati." 
Matthew28:11 Chujouvin amaho acheu chun, santri'a dingho phabep khopi sunga ahungun, thusoh umchan jouse ahung lhutnun ahi." 
Matthew28:12 Chuin amaho upaho toh akikhomun, akihoutoh jouvun, sepaiho chu sum tamtah apeuvin, ajah uva," 
Matthew28:13 Ka-imut kah-un aseijuite ahungun, agumang taove, tiuvin." 
Matthew28:14 Hiche thuhi gamvaipon ajah-a ahile, keihon ama hou lungdam ungting, nangho lung olmosah pouvinge, atiuvin ahi." 
Matthew28:15 Hichun amahon sum chu akilah-un, ahil bangu chun aboltauvin ahi; chule hiche thu chu Juda miho lah-a akiseison sonin tugeijin aumin ahi." 
Matthew28:16 Chujouvin seijui somlekhat chu Galilee gama Jesu'n atepnao mola chun achetauvun ahi. 
Matthew28:17 Chuin Ama amu phatnun, chibai aboh-un; ahivangin abang bangin agingcha pouvin ahi." 
Matthew28:18 Chuin Jesu ahenguva ahungin amaho chu ahoupin, ajah uva, Van'a le leija thuneina jouse keima eikipea ahitai." 
Matthew28:19 Hiche jeh chun nangho cheovin, namtina mi jouse seijuijin gasemun, a-Pa, a-Cha chule Lhagao Theng minin amaho chu baptize gabolun;" 
Matthew28:20 Chule keiman nangho kapeh thu jouse hi aboncha anit dinguvin gahilun; chule, veuvin vannoi leiset kichaini geijin keiman nangho kaumpi jing naove, ati. Amen." 
Mark1:1 Pathen Chapa Jesu Christa Kipana Thupha kipatna; 
Mark1:2 Themgaoho lekhabua kisun bangin, Ven, keiman kasottol namasang sang-ah kasole; Ama chun nalampi anasem ding ahi;" 
Mark1:3 Gamthipma khosam aw khatnin, Pakai lamlen semtohsan koijun, Alampi semjangun, tia kisun bang chun," 
Mark1:4 John Baptist chun gamthipmah twi alutsah-in, chonset suhmangna dinga lungheija baptize chan ding thu lhangsamin ahi." 
Mark1:4 John Baptist chun gamthipmah twi alutsah-in, chonset suhmangna dinga lungheija baptize chan ding thu lhangsamin ahi." 
Mark1:5 Chuin Juda gama mi jouse le Jerusalem'a mi jouse ama henga acheuvin, achonsetnu aphongun, Jordan luija ama khutna abonun baptize achang taove." 
Mark1:6 Chule John chu sangongsang mul ponin akivonin, savun konggah-in akong akigeh-in, chule a-anneh chu khaokho le gam khoiju ahi." 
Mark1:6 Chule John chu sangongsang mul ponin akivonin, savun konggah-in akong akigeh-in, chule a-anneh chu khaokho le gam khoiju ahi." 
Mark1:7 Chule thu ahil lhanglen, Kanungah keima sanga hat chungnungjo ahunge, keima hi kuna akengchot khao sutlham dinga jong kilom kahipoi." 
Mark1:8 Keiman nangho twija baptize kachansah nahiuvin; amavang Ama chun nangho Lhagao Thenga baptize nachansah dingu ahi, ati." 
Mark1:9 Hilai chun ahitin ahi, Galilee gam sunga Nazareth kho-a konin Jesu ahungin, Jordan luija John khutna baptize achangtan ahi." 
Mark1:9 Hilai chun ahitin ahi, Galilee gam sunga Nazareth kho-a konin Jesu ahungin, Jordan luija John khutna baptize achangtan ahi." 
Mark1:10 Chuin twi lah-a kona ahungdoh doh-in, van akikehso-a, Lhagao vakhu bang achunga ahung kumlhah amun:" 
Mark1:11 Van'a konin aw khat ahung gingin, Nangma ka-Chapa deitah nahi, nachungah kalung alhai tangeije, ati." 
Mark1:12 Chuin Lhagao chun gamthipma apui mang paijin," 
Mark1:13 Chua chun nisomli Satan lhep patepmin aumin, gamsa lah-a aumin; chuin vantil hon ahung jenleuvin ahi." 
Mark1:14 Chujouvin John songkul'a akikhum jouvin, Jesu Galilee gama ahungin, Pathen lenggam Kipana Thupha ahil lhanglen," 
Mark1:14 Chujouvin John songkul'a akikhum jouvin, Jesu Galilee gama ahungin, Pathen lenggam Kipana Thupha ahil lhanglen," 
Mark1:15 Phat alhingtai, chule Pathen lenggam jong anaitai; nalung heijun, Kipana Thupha hi tahsanun tin alhangsamin ahi." 
Mark1:16 Chuin Galilee dillen pang ajotpa na-a, Simon le asopipa Andrew dillena lensep amun; amani chu ngaman mi ahi lhone." 
Mark1:17 Chuin Jesu'n amani jah-a chun, Kanung hinjui lhonin; keiman nangni mi man lensep hisah lhoninge, ati." 
Mark1:18 Chuin amanin alen adalha lhonin, anung ajui pai jeng lhontai." 
Mark1:19 Chuin themkhat achechon jeple, Zebedee chapate ni Jacob leh anaopa John amani jong chu kong sunga len anakhui phat pet lhon amun;" 
Mark1:19 Chuin themkhat achechon jeple, Zebedee chapate ni Jacob leh anaopa John amani jong chu kong sunga len anakhui phat pet lhon amun;" 
Mark1:20 Chuin amani chu akou paileuvin ahile, amanin apa lhon Zebedee chu athalah soh ho toh kong sunga chun adalha lhonin, ajui lhontai." 
Mark1:21 Chuin amaho Capernaum'a achelutnun; cholngah nin kikhopna in'ah alutnin, thu ahil paijenin ahi." 
Mark1:22 Aman danthu sunho banga hil louva, thuneitah banga ahil jeh-in miho chun athuhil chu kidang asa lheh-un ahi." 
Mark1:23 Chuin akikhopnao in'a chun lhagao boh vop mi khat anaumin, chule ama chun ahinsam paijenin," 
Mark1:24 Nazareth Jesu, nangle keiho ikimatnao i-um em? Eisumang uva hunga nahim? Nangma koi nahi kahenai, Pathen'a kon Atheng chu nahi, ati." 
Mark1:25 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu aphoh-in, Thipmin, ama-a kon chun hung doh-in, ati." 
Mark1:26 Chuin lhagao boh chun mipa chu aheh-in, hapenin apengin, ahung potdoh tai." 
Mark1:27 Chuin mi jousen kidang asan alungdong lheh jengun; chutichun khatle khat akidongun, Hiche hi iti hintem? Hiche hi thuhil thah ahi! Aman thunei tah-in lhagao bohho thu apen, chule amaho jong athun anung jenguve, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark1:28 Chuin Galilee gam kimvel chengse-a amin akithang pai jengtan ahi. 
Mark1:29 Chule kikhopna in'a kona ahungdoh doh-in, Simon le Andrew insunga chun Jacob le John toh alut paijun ahi." 
Mark1:29 Chule kikhopna in'a kona ahungdoh doh-in, Simon le Andrew insunga chun Jacob le John toh alut paijun ahi." 
Mark1:30 Ahin Simon nupanu chu khosih-in anan analumin; chuin amahon anat thu chu Jesu ahetsah paijun ahi. 
Mark1:31 Chutichun amanu koma chun achen, akhutnin atuh-in, akaithou tai; hichun akhosih chun alha jengin, chuin amanu chu amaho jenlen apangtai." 
Mark1:32 Chuin nilhah ahia, nisa alhum jouvin, mihon ana damlou jouse le thilhavop ho ahin puijun;" 
Mark1:33 Chule khopi sunga mi jouse kotpi phung-ah akikhomun ahi. 
Mark1:34 Chuin Aman hiveichom chom veija damlou mi tamtah adamsah-in, chule thilha tamtahma adeldoh-in; ama Christa ahi chu ahet jeh-un thilhaho chu apao sahpon ahi." 
Mark1:35 Chuin jing khovah lhah masang peh-in athouvin, apotdoh-in gamthip munah achen, chua chun agataovin ahi." 
Mark1:36 Chuin Simon le agoldangho chun anung ajuijun," 
Mark1:37 Amudoh phatnun ajah-a, Mi jouse hinla nang nahol cheh-un, atiuve." 
Mark1:38 Chuin Aman, Naidunga khopi dang danga jong kahil lhangle theina dingin cheohite; hiche dinga chu hung kahi, ati." 
Mark1:39 Chuin ama Galilee gamsese-ah achelen, akikhopnao in tinah thu ahil lhanglen, chule thilha adeldoh peh-in ahi." 
Mark1:40 Chuin miphah khat Jesu henga ahungin, ajah-a, Nalung ahile neidam thengsah thei ahi tin a-angah adilsun ataotan ahi." 
Mark1:41 Chuin Jesu'n alungset behseh-in, akhut alhangin, athamin, Kalung ahi; dam thengtan, ati." 
Mark1:42 Chuin hiche thu chu aseijou jouvin, chupettah chun aphah chun adalha paijin, athengsel tai." 
Mark1:43 Chuin Aman amapa chu akhamchah kheh-in, asolmang paijin;" 
Mark1:44 Ajah-a, Ven, koima jah-a sei hihbeh-in, ahin chenlang thempu gakimusah-in, chule nadam theng thu dol chu amaho hettohsahnan Mosi thupehsa thilpeh ding chu gapetan, ati." 
Mark1:45 Ahivangin amapa apotdoh-in, hiche thu chu asamlen, aha phonjal cheh tan; achuti jehchun chukalin Jesu lhangphong in koima khopi sungah alut theita hih-in, gamthip thipma aumjotai: chule muntina konin ahengah miho ahungjiuve." 
Mark2:1 Ni chomkhat jouvin Capernaum'a alut kitnin ahile, in'a aume ti akithang soh jengtan ahi." 
Mark2:2 Hiche pettah chun mipi tamtah ahung khomun ahile, aumna dingu mun kotphung jeng jong a-ong tapon; aman amaho chu thu ahiltan ahi." 
Mark2:3 Chuin langthi khat mi lin ajongun ahengah ahinpuijui. 
Mark2:4 Chuin mipi jeh-a akom naija ahung lut theilou jeh-un, in chung chu Ama umna dontah aphet vangun, langthipa chu alupna pumin a-ang sungah agah khailha suh-un ahi." 
Mark2:5 Chuin Jesu'n atahsanjeu chu amun, langthipa jah-a chun, Chapa, nachonset naho kingaidam ahitai, ati." 
Mark2:6 Ahinla danthu sunho phabep khat hia chu tou ahiuvin, alungthim uva," 
Mark2:7 Hichepa hin ibola Pathen taitom na-a hitobang thu aseiham? Pathen tailou chonset koiham angaidam thei ding? atiuve. 
Mark2:8 Chuin achuti gelu chu Jesu'n alungin ahepai jenin, ajah uva, Ibola nalunguva hicheng chu nagelu ham?" 
Mark2:9 Langthipa jah-a hi, Nachonset naho kingaidama ahitai, kiti le; Thouvin, nalupna kilah-inlang lam jotnin, ti chu hoijoh seibai jo-em?" 
Mark2:10 Hijongle leiset chunga Mihem Chapan chonset ngaidamna thahat aneije ti nahetna dingun, atin," 
Mark2:11 Langthipa jah-a, Thouvin, nalupna kilah-in lang na-in'a chetan kati ahi, ati." 
Mark2:12 Chuin ama chu athoudoh pai jengin, alupna akilah-in, japi mitmutah chun achedohtan; chuphatnin ajapiuvin kidang asa lheh jengun, Hitobang himhim kamukha pouve, atiuvin Pathen avahchoi taove." 
Mark2:13 Chuin apotnin dillen pangah achekit tai; chuin mihonpi chu ahenga acheuvin ahile aman thu ahile. 
Mark2:14 Chuin achena-a Alphaeus chapa Levi kaidonna mun'a atou amun, ajah-a, Kanung hinjuijin, ati. Chuin ama akipatdoh-in anung ajuitai." 
Mark2:15 Chuti chun Levi in'a ankong aumpet chun, kaidongho le michonseho tamtah-in Jesu le aseijuiteho chengse chutoh ankong aum khomun ahi. Ijeh-inem itile amaho tamtah ahiuvin, ama nungjui cheh ahiuve." 
Mark2:16 Chuin Pharisai ho le danthusun hon michonseho le kaidongho toh an aneh khom chu amu phatnun, aseijuite jah-a, Iti dana kaidongho le michonseho toh an aneh khomham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark2:17 Hichu Jesu'n ajah phatnin, ajah uva, atidamten louthem angaipouve, adamlouten bou angaijui; michonpha te kou-a hung kahipoi; lungheidia michonse te kou-a hungjoh kahibouve, ati." 
Mark2:18 Chule John seijuite le Pharisai hon an angoljiu ahin; amaho ahungun Jesu jah-a, I-atile John seijuite le Pharisai hon an angol jiuva, nangma seijuiten an angolji louham? atiuve." 
Mark2:18 Chule John seijuite le Pharisai hon an angoljiu ahin; amaho ahungun Jesu jah-a, I-atile John seijuite le Pharisai hon an angol jiuva, nangma seijuiten an angolji louham? atiuve." 
Mark2:19 Chuin Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Aloite chu moulang chun aumpi laise-a an angol thei ngaijum? Moulang chun aumpi laiseuva an angol thei louvu ahi." 
Mark2:20 Amavang moulang chu akomuva kona kipuimang ni hung lhung ding ahi, chuche nile an angol dingu ahi." 
Mark2:21 Koiman pon sopnem loulai halin ponlui abeh ngaipoi; chuti bolle athahjoh chun alui chu akaiset ding, akehlai chu kehcheh joding ahi." 
Mark2:22 Chule koiman lengpitwi thah savun peng luija akhum ngaipoi; ichuti bolle alengpitwi chun asavun peng chu tumkeh intin, lengpitwi savun peng akopma mang ding ahi. Lengpitwi thah chu peng thah-a akhumji bouvui, ati." 
Mark2:23 Chuin ahitin ahi, cholngah nin Jesu'n changlei lai ajotnin ahile, aseijuiten ache pumun changvui chu asih pantaovin ahi." 
Mark2:24 Chuin Pharisai hon ajah-a, Vetan, ibola cholngah ni-a bol ngailou aboluham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark2:25 Jesu'n adonbutnin, David le aloiho alhahsamuva, agilkel petnuva chu ipi abolu nasimkhah louvu ham?" 
Mark2:26 Abiathar thempu chungnung ahi laijin Pathen in'a alutnin, thempu tailou adangin aneh ngailou vetsahna changlhah chu anen, aloiho jong apen ahi." 
Mark2:27 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Cholngah ni chu mihem dinga kisem ahi, cholngah ni dinga mihem kisemjoh ahipoi." 
Mark2:28 Chuti chu ahin Mihem Chapa chu cholngah ni Pakai jong ahi, ati." 
Mark3:1 Chuin kikhopna in'a alut kitnin ahile, chuachun mi khutlang ngoi khat aumin ahi." 
Mark3:2 Chuin ama chu ahehset theina dingun, cholngah ni-a aboldame aboldam hih-em, tin achang lhiuvin ahi." 
Mark3:3 Chuin Aman khutlang ngoipa jah-a chun, Alaija hung dingdoh-in, ati." 
Mark3:4 Chuin ajah uva, Cholngah ni-a apha bol angaiha, ase bol angaiham? Lhagao huhhing angaiha, suhmang angaiham? atin ahile, amaho athip chetchut jengun ahi." 
Mark3:5 Chuin Aman alungtah jeh-u chun alungphamon, lungsatenin amaho chu ave kimvelin, chuin mipa jah-a chun, Nakhut lhangin, ati. Chuin alhangin ahile, akhut chu alangkhat bangin adamtan ahi." 
Mark3:6 Chuin Pharisai ho chu apotdoh-un, amachu iti suhmang dingham ngaiton, Herod miho chutoh akihoutoh paitaove." 
Mark3:7 Chuin Jesu aseijuite toh dillen lama chun achetauve. Chule mipi tamtah-in ajuijin, Galilee gama kon, Juda gama kon," 
Mark3:8 Jerusalem khopi-a kon, Idumia gama kon, Jordan gala kon, Tyre le Sidon gam kimvela kon chule mihonpi tamtah ahiuvin, athilbol loupitah ho ajah phatnun, ahengah ahungun ahi." 
Mark3:9 Mipi jeh chun kongneo gotsa koijin aseijuite asolin, achuti loule eineh khauvinte, ati." 
Mark3:10 Mi tamtah adamsah ahitah jeh chun, natna nei jousen ama atohkhah theina dingun Ama aumchah jengun;" 
Mark3:11 Lhagao boh chengse jong chun ama amuchanun a-angah aboh khupmun, Nang Pathen Chapa chu nahi, tin asamjiuvin ahi." 
Mark3:12 Ahin Aman ama chu aphondoh louna dingun amaho chu akhamchah-in ahi. 
Mark3:13 Chuin mol chunga akaltouvin, aman angaichat chengse chu akouvin, amaho ahenga ahungun ahi." 
Mark3:14 Chuin akoma um dingle, thuhil lhangle-a asol dingin, somleni alheng doh-in," 
Mark3:15 Damlou ho damsah theina thahat neidingle, thilhaho nodoh theina thunei dingin:" 
Mark3:16 Simon aman Peter asah-in; 
Mark3:17 Zebedee chapa Jacob, chule anaopa John, amani chu amin Boanerges asah-in; hichu van gin chate, tina ahi;" 
Mark3:17 Zebedee chapa Jacob, chule anaopa John, amani chu amin Boanerges asah-in; hichu van gin chate, tina ahi;" 
Mark3:18 Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, Alphaeus chapa Jacob, Thaddaeus, Canaan mi Simon," 
Mark3:18 Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, Alphaeus chapa Jacob, Thaddaeus, Canaan mi Simon," 
Mark3:19 Chule Ama matsah-a pang Judas Iscariot ahiuve. Chuin amaho insunga alut taovin ahi. 
Mark3:20 Chuin mihonpi ahung kikhom kit taovin ahile, an tahbah jong anethei tapouvin ahi." 
Mark3:21 Hichu a-inkoten ajahdoh phatnun, angola hitakhu atiuvin, ahung konun thahatsana mat dingin ahung gouvin ahi." 
Mark3:22 Chule Jerusalem'a kona hungsuh danthu sunho jong chun, Beelzabul vop ahi, chule thilha anodoh jong hi thilhaho lengpa vanga anodoh hija hi, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark3:23 Chuin Aman amaho chu akouvin, thulemin aseijin ajah uva, Satan'in Satan iti anodoh thei dingham?" 
Mark3:24 Gamsung khat amale ama kidouto hen kikhenle, hiche gam chu dingdoh thei louding ahi." 
Mark3:25 Insung khat amale ama kidouto henlang hileh, hite insung chu dingdoh thei pouvinte." 
Mark3:26 Satan jong amale ama kidouto henlang kisep khenle, dingdoh thei louva mangthahjo ding ahi." 
Mark3:27 Koiman mihat chu kanchom masa louvin, a-in'a alutnin athilkeu achompeh theipoi; akanchom masatna chutengle achom dingbou ahi." 
Mark3:28 Chule tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Mihem chate hi achonsetnao itobang hijongle, Pathen ataitom nao hijongle, taitomna jouseu chu kingaidam ding ahi." 
Mark3:29 Amavang koi hileh Lhagao Theng taitom vang chun imatih chana ngaidam amulou ding; tonsot themo channa-a chua ahitai, ati." 
Mark3:30 Lhagao boh vop ahi, ati jeh uva chutia chu asei ahi." 
Mark3:31 Chuin anu le asopite ahungun, inpoa adingun, ama kouvin mi asolun ahi." 
Mark3:32 Chule avela chu mihonpi touchah khet ahin, amahon ajah-a chun, Ven, inpoa khun nanu le nasopiten nahol uve atiuve." 
Mark3:33 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Kanu le kasopite koi koi hiuvem? tin adonbutne." 
Mark3:34 Chuin akimvela touho chu ave golin, Hiteho hi kanu le kasopite ahiuve." 
Mark3:35 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen lunglama chonpatah chu kasopipa le kasopinu chule kanu ahi, ati." 
Mark4:1 Chuin dillen pangah thu ahilpan kittan ahile mihon tamtah akomah ahung kikhomun, chuin dillen chunga kong-ah alutnin atouvin; chule mipi chengse chu vapamah tolah aumuvin ahi." 
Mark4:2 Chule amaho chu thulemin thu tamtah ahilin, athuhil lah-a chun aseije," 
Mark4:3 Ngaijun, muchi thepa muchi then achen:" 
Mark4:4 chuin ahitin ahi, athe atheleh abang lamsih-a achun, chunga leng vachaten ahung lohgam taove." 
Mark4:5 Chule abang songlheo chunga leipatna-ah achun, alei asalou jeh-in akehdoh pai jengin:" 
Mark4:6 Ahivangin nisa ahung soh-in ahile asanggon, jung anei lou jeh-in, agoptan ahi." 
Mark4:7 Chule abang ling lah-a achun, aling chu ahung khangin adeplihtan, aga himhim aumtapoi." 
Mark4:8 Chuin adangho chu leipha laijah achun, akehdoh-in ahung khangin chule agatan; abang somthum cheng, abang somgup cheng, abang ja khat cheng apungtan ahi, ati." 
Mark4:9 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Angaina ding na neijan ngaihen, ati."
