Mark4:10 Chuin achanga aum petnin, akimvela umho le somleni chun athulem seiho chu adongun ahi." 
Mark4:11 Chuin Aman amaho jah-a, Pathen lenggam thuguh chu nangho kipe-a nahitaove; polama um mite jah dinga vang ijakai thulema kisei ahi." 
Mark4:12 Chutia chu amahon muvang chu amudingu, ahetdoh lou dingu, jah vang chu ajah dingu, ahetkhen lou dingu ahi; achuti loule hung kihei kitnuntin, chule achonsetnao ngaidamin umgetninte, ati." 
Mark4:13 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Nanghon hiche thulem hi nahet lou mongu ham? Achutile thulem dang jouse iti nahet dinguham?" 
Mark4:14 Muchi thepa chun thu athe ahi. 
Mark4:15 Chule hicheho hi thu kithena lamsih-a chuho chu ahi; amahon thu ajah jah-un, Satan ahung paijin, alung sunguva thu kithe chu alah mang peh tan ahi." 
Mark4:16 Chutobangma chun songlheo chung leipatna-a chua chu hicheho hi ahi; amaho chu thu ajah jah-a thanom tah-a joppai jengho hi ahi; 
Mark4:17 Ahivangin amaho chu jung nei lou ahiuvin, chomcha khat aumjiuvin ahi: chujoule thu jeh-a hesohna ahiloule bolsetna ahung umtengle, alhupaiji taove." 
Mark4:18 Chule hicheho hi linglah-a muchi kithe ho chu ahiuve; amaho chun thu ajauvin," 
Mark4:19 Ahivangin leiset hinkho lungkhamna, lheplhahna dimset haosatna, chule ngaichatna dangdang alutnin, hichun thu chu adeplih jin, ga louvin aumjitai." 
Mark4:20 Chule lei pha laija chua chu; athu ja-a, jopteho chu ahiuvin, abang ajat som thumin, abang ajat som gupmin, chule abang ajat ja-in agapungin ahi, ati." 
Mark4:21 Chuin Aman ajah uva, meivah khu lo noi, ahiloule jalkhun noija tun dinga kihinchoi ngaijem? Akhom chunga tunding chu angaina hilouham?" 
Mark4:22 Ijeh-inem itile kiphong lou ding imacha ki-ima aumpoi; kilangdoh lou ding imacha akiselguh aumpoi. 
Mark4:23 Koi hileh angaina ding na neijan ngaihen, ati." 
Mark4:24 Chuin ajah uva, Najah chengseu hi ipiham, kichihtheijun. Nanghon natebang banguva nangho jong kitepeh ding nahiuve; chule nangho aja chengse hi kipehbe dingbon nahiuve." 
Mark4:25 Ijeh-inem itile aneija chu kipehbentin; chule anei louva chu aneichasun jong chu ama-a kona kilahpeh ding ahi, ati." 
Mark4:26 Aman ajah uva, Pathen gam umchan chu, mikhatnin amuchi leija athe-a:" 
Mark4:27 Amachu sunteng imuji, janteng thouji, muchi chu hung kehdoh-a hung khangdoh, amatah-inla ajeh ahetlou tobang chu ahi" 
Mark4:28 Ijeh inem itile leisetnin achamin ama-a konin ahin ga sahjin, amasan akung, abanle ado, chujoule avui, chujou kitle avuija aga achanglhing jitai." 
Mark4:29 Ahin aga chu amin phatle, a-at phat ahitah jeh-in, aman koiten a-atpan jitai, ati." 
Mark4:30 Chuin hitin asei kitne, Pathen gam hi ipitoh kitekah ding hitam? ahiloule ipi thulema kisei ding hitam?" 
Mark4:31 Ankam mu chang khat tobang ahi, hichu leija akithe-a ahile, vannoi leisetna muchi jouse lah-a aneopen ahin;" 
Mark4:32 Ahivangin akithe joule ahung kedoh-a, hung khanga, hampa dang jouse sanga hung lenjo; abah len tahtah hinso-a, chutia chu chunga leng vachate aboh lim noija age theiju tobang ahi, ati." 
Mark4:33 Chuin chutobang thulem tamtah-in amahon ahetthei kham khamun thu ahilin ahi. 
Mark4:34 Chule thulem louvin ajah uva imacha aseikhapoi: ahin aseijuite chengse vang chu achanguva aumtengule ijakai ahilchen jin ahi. 
Mark4:35 Chuin nilhah-in Aman amaho jah-a, Agal lang khatna galkaiju hite, ati." 
Mark4:36 Chutichun mihonpi chu asoldoh jouvun, ama aum bang bang chun kong'a akitolpi taovin, kong dang dangto jong alhonun ahi." 
Mark4:37 Chuin khopihui ahung nungin ahile, twikinong chu kong sunga ahung kinong lut matchet jengtan, chuti ahi jeh chun kong chu dimpai ding ahitan ahi." 
Mark4:38 Amala kong mei lamah lukhap akhapmin a-imun ahi: chuin asukhangun, ajah-a, Rabbi, kathigam dingu hi na ima lou louham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark4:39 Akhah phatnin huipi chu aphoh-in, dillen jah-a, Umthimin, thipbeh chan umin, ati. Chuin hui chu ahaijin, athip heltai." 
Mark4:40 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Ibola chuti kichat nahiuvem? Iti dana tahsanna himhim nanei louvu ham? ati." 
Mark4:41 Chuphatnin Ama chu kichat mainan akichata pouvin, Hichepa hi itobang mi hija, huipi leh dillen kinong sanin athu angaiham? tin akihouchut chut taovin ahi." 
Mark5:1 Chutichun dillen gal langkhat agalkaijun, Garesene miho gama alhung taovin ahi." 
Mark5:2 Chuin kong'a kona apotdoh doh-in, lhan lah-a kona hung lhagaoboh vop mikhatnin atoh paijenin ahi." 
Mark5:3 Ama chu lhan lah jenga chu cheng ahin, koimachan thihkhaova jong akan joulou ahi;" 
Mark5:4 Ajehchu bul atuh jiuva, thihkhao vajong akanjiu ahin; ahivanga thihkhao chu asat tanjin, bul chu atumkehjin, koimachan abol ngoi jou louhel ahitai." 
Mark5:5 Chule sunle jan-in lhan lah le molchunga aumjin, chule a-aole a-ao lejin, songin ama le ama aki-at chenjin ahi." 
Mark5:6 Ahin gamlatah-a kona Jesu ahinmu phatnin, ahung lhaijelin a-anga aboh khupmin chibai aboh-in;" 
Mark5:7 Chuin hatah-in asamin, Pathen chungnung pen Chapa Jesu, nangle kei ipi ikimatna umam? Pathen mina nahenga katao ahi, neibolgim hih-in; ati." 
Mark5:8 Ajehchu Aman ajah-a, Nangma lhagao boh, hiche mipa-a kon chun hung potdoh-in, ati ahi." 
Mark5:9 Chuin Aman, Namin ipiham? tin adonge. Chuin aman, Tamtah kahi jeh-un kamin Janel ahi, ati." 
Mark5:10 Chuin chuche gamkai sunga kona asoldoh louna dingun Jesu hengah hataovin ataotan ahi. 
Mark5:11 Tun akoma molsang panga chu vohcha hon tamtah lha-a ahi. 
Mark5:12 Chuin lhagaoboh jouse chu ahenga ataovun, Vohcha hon lah-a kalut theina dingun neisolun, ati taove." 
Mark5:13 Chuin Jesu'n phalna apetai. Chuin lhagao bohho chu apotdoh-un, vohchaho sunga chun alut taovin ahile, vohcha hon chu halhaijin alhaijun, kola alhai lhauvin, dillena chun alhalutnun, (voh honho chu sangni tobang hiuva ahin,) athigam taovin ahi." 
Mark5:14 Chuin vohcha chingho chu ajamun, khopi sung le loujaovah agaseile taovin ahi. Chuin Ipi iti hitam, tia ve dingin ahungun ahi." 
Mark5:15 Chuin Jesu kom ahung lhunun, thilha janel voppa chun pon akisila chule lung lima anatou chu amuvin, akicha lheh jengun ahi." 
Mark5:16 Chuin thilha voppa le vohchaho umchan achen achaija mu-a hetohhon ajah uva aseijun ahi. 
Mark5:17 Hichun amahon agam sunguva kona potdoh dingin ahenga atao pantaovin ahi. 
Mark5:18 Chuin kong'a alut phatnin, masanga thilha voppa chun amatoh thakhatna umna dingin ataotai." 
Mark5:19 Ahivangin Jesu'n ajahdan, ajah-a, Na-in'a chenlang na-in kote hengah Pakaiyin itobang thil loupi nabolpeh-a, iti nakhoto hitam abonchan gaseitan, atijotai." 
Mark5:20 Chuin akipat doh-in, Decapolis kho jouse-a Jesu'n thil lentah abolpeh chu lhang phongtah-in asamle pantai; chuin mi jousen kidang asa lheh jengun ahi." 
Mark5:21 Chuin Jesu kong'a akitola agal lang khat pang akaidoh-in, mihon tamtah ahung kikhomum; ama dillen pangah aumin ahi." 
Mark5:22 Chuin kikhopna in'a vaipoho lah-a mi khat amin Jairus chu ahungin, Jesu amu phatnin akhomuh-ah aboh khupmin;" 
Mark5:23 Chule ajah-a, Kachanu chapang neocha khat thi dingin alume; katao ahi, adamdoh nadingin hungin lang achunga nakhut hung ngamin tia katao ahi, tin hangeh-in angehtan ahi." 
Mark5:24 Chuin Jesu ama chutoh alhonin achetai, chule mihonpi nasatah-in ajuijun atom lellul jengun ahi." 
Mark5:25 Chuin numei khat kum somle kum ni athi longa damlou ahin," 
Mark5:26 Louthem tamtah-a kona thohgimna tamtah anatoh-a, anei jouse asuhmang ahitan, imala aphachom pon, ahin akhohcheh cheh jon ahi." 
Mark5:27 Amanun Jesu thudol ajah phatnin, anunga mihonpi lah-a chun ahungin, apon chu athamtan ahi." 
Mark5:28 Amanu chun, Apon jeng jong hi thamleng kadam ding ahi, ati ahi." 
Mark5:29 Chuin chupetah chun athiput chu akangin atangtan; chule amanun kanat thoh lela konin kadamtai ti chu ati chunga akihet tan ahi. 
Mark5:30 Chupettah chun Jesu'n ati chunga kona thilboltheina apot chu ahen, mipi lah-a chun akihei kimvelin, Kapon thama chu koiham? atin adong tan ahi." 
Mark5:31 Chuin aseijuite chun ajah-a, Mipi hijatnin naneh chinto mu jinga, iti dana Koiham eithama, natiham? atiuve." 
Mark5:32 Chuin Aman chuche bola chu muleng tin avelelen ahi. 
Mark5:33 Ahin amanu chun achunga thilsoh chu ahen, akichasasan akihot pumpumin ahungin, a-angah aboh khupmin, ajah-a thutah jouse chu aseidoh tan ahi." 
Mark5:34 Chuin Aman ajah-a, Chanu, natahsanin nadamsah ahitai, lung mongin chenlang nanatna-a kon chun damtan, ati." 
Mark5:35 Aman hiche thu chu aseina laijin, kikhopna in vaihompa in'a kon chun mi ahungun, ajah-a, Nachanu athitai; ibola houhil hi nacholsah nahlai dingham? ahung ti." 
Mark5:36 Jesu'n thukisei chu ajah jah-in, kikhopna in vaihompa jah-a chun, kicha hih-in, tahsana bou neijin, ati." 
Mark5:37 Chuin Peter, Jacob, chule Jacob naopa John hicheng tailou chu, midang koiman ajui ding aphalpon ahi." 
Mark5:37 Chuin Peter, Jacob, chule Jacob naopa John hicheng tailou chu, midang koiman ajui ding aphalpon ahi." 
Mark5:38 Chuin kikhopna in vaihompa in'a chun ahungun ahile, anaboi cheichoi jengu le mihonpi aka le maovu chu amun ahi." 
Mark5:39 Chuin Ama insunga alutnin, ajah uva, Ibola poh cheichoi nahiuva chule kapma nahiuvem? Chapangnu chu athi ahipoi, a-imu ahibouve, ati." 
Mark5:40 Chuin amahon anuisat taovin ahi. Ahivangin abonchauvin anodohsoh-in, chapangnu nule pa toh, chule ama hinkilhonpi chengse toh, chapangnu umna-a chun alutnun ahi." 
Mark5:41 Chuin Aman chapangnu khut chu atuh-in, ajah-a, Talitha cumi, ati: hichu, boinu thouvin tina ahi." 
Mark5:42 Chupettah chun chapangnu chu ahung thouvin, adingin lam ajotpai jengin ahi; ajehchu amanu chu kum somle kum ni hia ahitai. Chutah chun amaho chun kidang mainan kidang asapouve." 
Mark5:43 Ahin Aman hiche thuhi koima hetsah hih-un tin thupeh khaotah aneijin; chule amanu chu neh ding an apehna diuvin thu apen ahi. 
Mark6:1 Chuin chua konin achedoh-in, Ama gam lamah ahungin; chule aseijuiten ajuijun ahi." 
Mark6:2 Chuin cholngah ni ahung hi phatnin, kikhopna in'a thu ahil pantan ahi. Chuin athuhil chu mi tamtah ajaho chun kidang asauvin, Hichepa hin hoija kona hichengpi hi akilah hingana? Ama kipe-a chihna hi ipi chihna hija, akhutnin hitobang bolmo kidang dang abol jeng hitam?" 
Mark6:3 Ama hi thingthem bol Jacob, Joses, Juda chule Simon sopi, Mariam chapa chu hilou ham? Asopinute jong hikoma ilah uva um hilou hiuvam? atiuvin, chule achunga alung himo taovin ahi." 
Mark6:4 Ahivangin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Themgao ama gamsungle ama inkote lah, chule ama insung tailouvah jabol louvin aum ngaipoi, ati." 
Mark6:5 Chukoma chun ana adamlou phabep khat chunga akhut angapma adamsah tailou chu, thil kidang imacha abol tapoi." 
Mark6:6 Chule atahsan lou jeh-u chun adatmo lheh jengin ahi. Chuin khonainai dunga ache lelen thu ahil leletai. 
Mark6:7 Chuin somleni ho chu akouvin, mini nin asoldoh-in; chule lhagaoboh chunga thuneina apen;" 
Mark6:8 Chule ajin naova dingin tenggol tailou ima, changlhah jong, sakhao jong, dangka dip sunga jong sumthem aken louhel dingun thu apen;" 
Mark6:9 Kengchot vang kiseuvin; sangkhol thoni ki-ah hih-un, ati." 
Mark6:10 Chuin ajah uva, Hoikom hijongle nalhun lhunnau in'a chun, chua kona napotdoh kahseuvin umun." 
Mark6:11 Chule koi hile nalhunsah louvu le nathu seiju ngailou chu, chuche-a kona napotdoh tengule ahettohsah nan nakeng phanguva leivui sanin thinglhau vin. Keiman nangho jah-a tahbeh-a kasei ahi, thupi kitan nile chuche kho thohding sanga chu Sodom le Gomorrah gam thohding chu baijo ding ahi, ati." 
Mark6:12 Chutichun akipat doh-un, mihem ten lung ahei nadiuvin ahil lhangle uvin;" 
Mark6:13 Thilha tamtah anodoh-un, ana damlou tamtah thao anuvin, aboldamun ahi." 
Mark6:14 Chuin Herod lengpan athu chu ajatan, (Ijeh inem itile athu chu gamtina kithanga ahitai.) Chuin aman, John Baptist athia kona thoudoh kit ahi, chuche jeh-a chu chuti thil kidang boltheina chu ama-a uma abol ahi, ati." 
Mark6:14 Chuin Herod lengpan athu chu ajatan, (Ijeh inem itile athu chu gamtina kithanga ahitai.) Chuin aman, John Baptist athia kona thoudoh kit ahi, chuche jeh-a chu chuti thil kidang boltheina chu ama-a uma abol ahi, ati." 
Mark6:15 Akim khatnin, Elijah ahi, atiuvin; adangin, ama hi themgao khat, ahiloule, Themgaoho lah-a khat ahi, atiuve." 
Mark6:16 Herod vang chun chuche thu chu ajah phatnin, Alol katansa John ngei chu ahi: ama athi lah-a kona thou kit ahi, ati." 
Mark6:16 Herod vang chun chuche thu chu ajah phatnin, Alol katansa John ngei chu ahi: ama athi lah-a kona thou kit ahi, ati." 
Mark6:17 Ijeh-inem itile Herod'in asopipa Philip jinu Herodias chu akichenpi ahin; amanu jala chu amatah-in mi asola John chu amatsah-a, akana songkul'a akhum ahi." 
Mark6:17 Ijeh-inem itile Herod'in asopipa Philip jinu Herodias chu akichenpi ahin; amanu jala chu amatah-in mi asola John chu amatsah-a, akana songkul'a akhum ahi." 
Mark6:18 Ijeh inem itile John'in Herod jah-a, Nasopipa jinu ji-a naneija nakichenpi hi dan ngai ahipoi, ati jeh ahi." 
Mark6:18 Ijeh inem itile John'in Herod jah-a, Nasopipa jinu ji-a naneija nakichenpi hi dan ngai ahipoi, ati jeh ahi." 
Mark6:19 Chuche jeh-a chu Herodias chun ama chu hahot tah-a ahotna, tha ding atup ahin; ahivanginla abol theipon ahi." 
Mark6:20 Ijeh-inem itile Herod chun John chu michondih tah le mithengtah ahi ti chu ahen, akichan, avenbit ahi; chule athuhil ajah teng alung dongjin, hinlah kipahtah-in angaijin ahi." 
Mark6:20 Ijeh-inem itile Herod chun John chu michondih tah le mithengtah ahi ti chu ahen, akichan, avenbit ahi; chule athuhil ajah teng alung dongjin, hinlah kipahtah-in angaijin ahi." 
Mark6:21 Chuin nikho agomkom cha khat ahung umin, Herod'in apen nikho ahung hi phatnin agam vaihomte, sepai lamkaite, chule Galilee gama milen milal chengse vahnan golvah abolin ahi." 
Mark6:22 Chuin Herodias chanutah chu ahung lutnin alamin ahile, Herod le atoukhompi chengse chu alung lhaisah sohtan ahi; chuphatnin lengpan nungahnu jah-a chun, Nagotchan kahengah thumin peng kate, atitai." 
Mark6:23 Chuin akihahselin, Nathum chan kagamsung kehkhat geijin peng kate, ati." 
Mark6:24 Chuin amanu apotdoh-in anu agadongin, Ipipen kathum dingham? ati. Anun ajah-a, John Baptist luchang thumin, ati." 
Mark6:24 Chuin amanu apotdoh-in anu agadongin, Ipipen kathum dingham? ati. Anun ajah-a, John Baptist luchang thumin, ati." 
Mark6:25 Chuphatnin amanu mangang tah-in lengpa hengah ahungloijin, John Baptist luchang tutah-in kong khatnin neipele chun kati, tin athumtai." 
Mark6:25 Chuphatnin amanu mangang tah-in lengpa hengah ahungloijin, John Baptist luchang tutah-in kong khatnin neipele chun kati, tin athumtai." 
Mark6:26 Chuin lengpa alunggimta lheh jengin, ahivanginla athuteple akihahselna, chule a-ankong umpiho jal chun amanu athutepsa chu asukeh nom pon ahi." 
Mark6:27 Chupettah chun lengpa chun ama ngah sepai khat John luchang la dingin asoltai. Chuin ama achen, songkul sunga alol agatan dentan ahi." 
Mark6:27 Chupettah chun lengpa chun ama ngah sepai khat John luchang la dingin asoltai. Chuin ama achen, songkul sunga alol agatan dentan ahi." 
Mark6:28 Chuin aluchang chu kong khatnin ahindomin nungahnu chu apen, amanun anu agapetai." 
Mark6:29 Chuin aseijuiten ajah phatnun, ahungun along chu ahung lauvin, lhana avuitaove." 
Mark6:30 Chuin solchah ho Jesu henga ahung kikhomun, athilbol jouseule ami hilu umchan jouse aseijun ahi." 
Mark6:31 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Nangho chang hungdoh-unlang, munthip mah chomkhat hung kicholngah-un, ati; ijeh-inem itile ahungleh achele mi atambehseh jengin, an nehna ding jeng jong ong man lou ahiuve." 
Mark6:32 Chuin amaho kongin akitolun, gamthipma achomin achedoh taovin ahi." 
Mark6:33 Chule mipichun acheu chu amun, tamtah-in Ama chu aheuvin, khopi ho-a kon chun kengin ahung lhaijun, akhelpauvin, chule ahenga ahung kikhomun ahi." 
Mark6:34 Chuin Jesu ahung potdohle mipi tamtah amun, achingbei kelngoi hontoh abah jeh-u chun alung asen, amaho chu thu tamtah ahil pantan ahi." 
Mark6:35 Hichun nilhangkai lam ahitan ahile, aseijuite chu ahungun ahengah, hikom hi gamthip ahin, khomala agei lhehtan ahi;" 
Mark6:36 Hiteho hi ikimvel uva loujao le kho ho-a acheuva neh ding imathem agakichoh theina dingun soltan, ajehchu amahon nehding imacha aneitapouve, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark6:37 Ahin Aman adonbutnin amaho jah-a, Nanghon neh ding peuvin, ati. Amahon ama jah-a, Kacheuva changlhah dangka jakhat man kagachoh uva kapeh dinguham? atiuve." 
Mark6:38 Aman ajah uva, Changlhah pheng ijat naneijum? gave temun, ati. Chuin anei jatnu ahet phatnun, pheng nga leh nga ni aume, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark6:39 Chuin amaho chu abonchauvin hamhing chungah aloiloijin atousah dingun thu apen; 
Mark6:40 Chule amaho agol agolin ja khat cheng, somnga chengin atoutaovin ahi." 
Mark6:41 Chuin changlhah pheng ngale nga ni chu alan, vanlam aven, phatthei aboh-in, changlhah chu ahehbal balin, mipi anga aluipeh dingun aseijuite apen; nga ni jong chu ahoppeh sohkeijin ahi." 
Mark6:42 Chuin amahon abonchauvin aneuvin, ava sohkeijun ahi." 
Mark6:43 Chuin changlhah-a kon le nga-a kon chun aneh valu paipeh somle paipeh ni aloh dimun ahi. 
Mark6:44 Changlhah ne-a chu mi pasal cheh sangnga tobang ahiuvin ahi. 
Mark6:45 Chuin Aman mihonpi chu alhadoh lai sung chun, aseijuite chu gal lang khat lama Bethsaida anagalkai masa dingin kong'a chun alutsah-in, asolpaitan ahi." 
Mark6:46 Chuin amaho chu alhah dohsoh phatnin, tao dingin mol chunga akaltoutai." 
Mark6:47 Chuin nilhah ahung hi phatnin, kong chu dillen lailunga aumin, Ama achang seh-in tolla aumin ahi." 
Mark6:48 Chuin huijin ale lama anuh jeh uva, amaho dillena alungdonu chu amun; khovah ding kon lamin akengin twi chunga lam ahinjotnin, amaho henglam ahinjonin, amaho chu kheldin agon ahi." 
Mark6:49 Ahin amahon twi chunga kenga lam ajotna aheng lamuva ahung amu phatnun, Joumi hinte, atiuvin, a-aosot jengun ahi." 
Mark6:50 Ijeh-inem itile abonchauva Ama chu amu soh keiju ahin, atija lheh jengun ahi. Ahivangin Aman amaho chu ahinhou paijin, ajah uva, Lungmong tah-in umun; keima kahi, kicha hih-un, ati." 
Mark6:51 Chuin kong sunga amaho henga akalin ahile, hui chu athip jengtan ahi. Hichun amahon seitheilou khophelin kidang asalheh jengun ahi." 
Mark6:52 Ajeh chu changlhah thudol jong chu hephata louva, lungtah chehjoa ahitaove." 
Mark6:53 Chuin agalkaijun Ganesaret gamsung alhungun, kong chu twipam chinah angataovin ahi." 
Mark6:54 Chuin kong'a kona apotdoh doh-un ahile, miho chun anahe paitaovin," 
Mark6:55 Agam sunguva alhai kimvel leuvin, chua aume ti ahetna chanuva ana damlouho chu alupna pumin ahinpuvin ahi." 
Mark6:56 Akho akhoa, khopiho-a, chule loujaovah alutna chan-ah, ana adamlou ho chu lamlena alupsah-un, apon mongkai beh atham dinguvin ahenga ataovun ahi. Chuin athamkha chan chu adam jengun ahi." 
Mark7:1 Chuin Jerusalem'a kona hunga Pharisaiho le danthu sunho lah-a phabep khat akoma ahung kikhomun ahi. 
Mark7:2 Chule hiteho chun aseijuite kimkhatnin khutboh puma, khut sil louva, changlhah aneh-u amutauvin ahile themo achanun ahi." 
Mark7:3 Ijeh inem itile Pharisaiho le Juda te jousen upate khanga ahung chonna dan amangun, khut phatecha silngim louva an ne louhel ahiuve." 
Mark7:4 Kailhang mun'a kona ahung tengu jongle kisil louvin an aneji pouve. Chule khonho, belho, sum-eng belho, chule dokhang ho sopding thudol le adang tamtah jong aneijun, atuhchah kheh-un ahi." 
Mark7:5 Chuin Pharisai ho le danthu sunhon adongun, Ibola naseijuite hi upate akhang akhanga ahung chonna dan manglouva, khutboh puma changlhah anehjiuham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark7:6 Aman amaho chu adonbutnin, ajah uva, Isaiah themgaovin miphalhem nangho thudol aseije, Hiche phung mite hin akam sunguvin eichoi-anun, alungthimula keija konin gamlatah ahi." 
Mark7:7 Ahoi hitaleh amahon athu hilu hi mihem thupeh jeng ahilu ahi jeh-in, eihouvu hi moh ahi, tia kisun chu atahbeh ahi." 
Mark7:8 Ajehchu nanghon Pathen thupeh tahbeh chu nakoi doh-un, mihem akhang akhanga ahung chonnao bel le khonho not theng danjoh naha tuh jouvin, chule hitobang thil adang tamtah nabolun, ahi, ati." 
Mark7:9 Aman ajah uva, Nanghon nangho akhang akhanga nahung chonnao dan namandet theina dingun, Pathen thupeh chu kichentah-in napai uvin ahi." 
Mark7:10 Ijeh-inem itile Mosi'n, Nanu le napa jabolun; chule anu le apa hou se-a chu thihel hen, ati ahi." 
Mark7:11 Ahinla nanghon nahiti seijiuve, Koi hileh anule apa jah-a, Kavanga naphatchomna dingu jouse chu Corban ahitai, (hichu Pathen henga peh ahitai tina ahi,) atile," 
Mark7:12 Anu dinga ahin, apa dinga ahin jong ima atohpeh ding najada jiuve." 
Mark7:13 Nangho chonna thu mi napehsonu chun, Pathen thupeh imalou nasouvin; hitobang thil chu tamtah naboljiuve, ati." 
Mark7:14 Chuin mihonpi chu ahenga akoukitnin, ajah uva, Nabonchaovin kathusei ngai phauvin lang hetoh-un;" 
Mark7:15 Mihem polama kona asunga lutna ama suboh thei imacha aumpoi. Asunga kona hungpotdoh chengse chun asuboh joh ahibouve. 
Mark7:16 Angaina ding nakhang neija aumle ngaihen, ati." 
Mark7:17 Chuin Aman mipi adalhah-a insunga alutjouvin, aseijuite chun thulem chu adongchen taovin ahi." 
Mark7:18 Chuin Aman ajah uva, nangho jong hitobang loma hetna neilou nahinah laiju ham? Itobang hijongle pama kona mihem sunga lut chun ama asuhboh theipoi." 
Mark7:19 Ijeh-inem itile alungsunga lut louva a-oisunga lutna, hitia chu a-anneh jouse asuthengji-a, aposona ah ahungdoh ji ahi nahet louvu ham?" 
Mark7:20 Chuin Aman, Mihem lung sunga kon hungpot chun, hichetah chun mi asuboh ahi." 
Mark7:21 Ijeh inem itile mihem sung, alung sunga kon lung gilou, jonthanhoi, guchat, toltha," 
Mark7:22 Miji toh jon, papsetna, gitlou engsetna, mi dohabol, huhna, kimit thipna, kitaitom, hoitho, ngolna;" 
Mark7:23 hicheng thilphalou hi mi sunga kona hungpot doh-a, mihem asubohji ahi, ati." 
Mark7:24 Chuin akipatdoh-in chukom mun chu adalhan, Tyre le Sidon gamkol sunga achen, hikoma chun in khatna alutnin, koima ahetsah nompon, ahinla akisel theitapon ahi." 
Mark7:25 Chutichun numei khat achanu lhagao boh vop ahin, ama chungchang thu chu ajan, ahenga ahungin, akeng khopimuh-a abohkhup paijenin ahi." 
Mark7:26 Numeinu chu Greek mi ahin, anam lama chun Syro-Phoinicia mi ahi. Amanu chun achanu sunga kona thilha deldoh dingin ataovin ahi." 
Mark7:27 Ahin Jesu'n amanu jah-a, Chate cheng vamasa tadihen; chate changlhah lahpeh-a uichate koma selhah aphapoi, ati." 
Mark7:28 Ahin amanun ajah-a, Ahinai, Pakai, hijongle dokhang noija um uichan jong, chate changlhah neh hal anehkhahji khula-em, tin adonbutnin ahi." 
Mark7:29 Chuin Aman ajah-a, Nathusei jeh chun chetan; thilha chu nachanu sunga konin apotdohtai, ati." 
Mark7:30 Chuin amanu a-in lamah achen ahile, thilha anapot doh-a, achanu jalkhuna analup agatoh-in ahi." 
Mark7:31 Chuin Tyre gamkol sung chu adalhan, Sidon ajotnin, Decapolis gam ajotpeh-in, Galilee dillen alhungtai." 
Mark7:32 Chuin mi na-ngong pao jong paochen thei lou khat hi ahenga ahinpuijun, achunga akhut angap dingin ataovun ahi." 
Mark7:33 Chuin Aman mipi lah-a konin achangin apuidoh-in, akhutchalin anasung akhoijin; chuin achil asetnin, alei athamin;" 
Mark7:34 Chuin vanlam aven akhoisan, ajah-a, Ephphatha, ati. Hichu, Kihongin, tina ahi." 
Mark7:35 Chuphatnin ana avangin, aleigui jong akilhamtan, kichentah-in apao theitai." 
Mark7:36 Chuin Aman amaho chun koima jah-a asei louna dingun akhamin ahi; ahinla Aman ahakham chehle, amahon ahaseiphong cheh-un;" 
Mark7:37 Chule kidang asabeh seh-un, Aman ijakai abolpha sohtai: na-ngongla kho ajahsah-in, paomola apaosah theije, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark8:1 Hichelai chun mihonpi chu atamlheh jengtan, chule nehding ima aneilou jeh-un, Jesu'n aseijuite chu ahenga akouvin, ajah uva;" 
Mark8:2 Mihonpi hi kakoma aumnao ni thum alhingtan, neh dingla anei hih-un, kalung ase lheh-e;" 
Mark8:3 Chule an ne louvin a-inlam cheh uva sollengla lhasampa ding ahiuve; ajehchu akimkhat hi gamlatah-a kona hung ahiuve, ati." 
Mark8:4 Chuin aseijuiten adonbutnun, ajah-a, Hiche kom gamthip laija mi hichengpi ninglhinga vahna ding changlhah kon hoija kona alah dingham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark8:5 Chuin Aman mipi chu adongin, ajah uva, Changlhah pheng ijat naneijum? ati. Chuin amahon, Pheng sagi, atiuve." 
Mark8:6 Chuin Aman mipi chu tolla tou dingin thu ape-in; chuin Aman changlhah pheng sagi chu alan, athangvah in, chujouvin ahehbal balin, a-anguva luipeh dingin aseijuite chu apen, amahon mipi anga chun aluipeh-un ahi." 
Mark8:7 Chule nga neocha cha phabep khat jong aneijun; hi jong chu phatthei aboh-in, a-anguva luipeh dingin asoltan ahi." 
Mark8:8 Chuin amahon aneuvin, ava sohkeijun, aneh moh-u ahal chu longkai sagi alohdoh-un ahi." 
Mark8:9 Chule hiche an neho chu mi sangli tobang ahiuvin ahi. Chuin amaho chu asol tan ahi. 
Mark8:10 Chule Ama aseijuite toh kong'a alutpaijun, Dalmanutha gam alhung taovin ahi." 
Mark8:11 Chuin Pharisai ho chu ahungdoh-un, apatepnan thu adongun, van'a kona melchihna aholtauvin ahi." 
Mark8:12 Chuin Ama alung sunga akhoisan, Tukhang mite hin ibola melchihna aholuham? Tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Hiche tukhang mite hi imacha melchihna kipe lou ding ahi, ati." 
Mark8:13 Chuin amaho chu adalhan, kong'a alut kitnin, lang khat panga dingin akipatdoh tai." 
Mark8:14 Chuin amahon changlhah akeng haijun; kong'a chunla pheng khat tailou adang aumhih helin ahi. 
Mark8:15 Chuin Aman amaho chu ahilchah-in, ajah uva, Chingtheijun; Pharisai ho chol le Herod chol lah-a kihong phaovin, ati." 
Mark8:16 Chuin amahon, Hiche hi changlhah ineilou jeh-u ahi, tin akihou lhiuvin ahi." 
Mark8:17 Hichu Jesu'n ahetdoh phatnin, ajah uva, Changlhah nanei loujeh uva ibola kihouhou nahiuvem? Tugeija nalunguva hedoh loulai nahiuvem? Nalungu tahsah jing nalai nahiuvem?" 
Mark8:18 Mit neijuva mu theilou nahiuva, nakhang neijuva ja thei lou nahiuvem? Gel jong nagel doh lou mongu ham?" 
Mark8:19 Mi sangnga lah-a changlhah pheng nga kahop peh-a chu nehmoh ahal longkai ijat nalo dimum? atile, amahon, Somleni, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark8:20 Mi sangli lah-a pheng sagi kahop peh-a chu nehmoh hal longkai ijat nalo dimum? atile, amahon, Longkai sagi atiuve." 
Mark8:21 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Iti dana tu-a jong hedoh loulai nahiuvem? ati." 
Mark8:22 Chuin Bethsaida'a ahungin; hikoma chun mitcho khat ahenga ahinpuijun, atham dingin Ama henga ataovun ahi." 
Mark8:23 Chuin Aman mitchopa chu akhutnin atuh-in, khosunga kon chun apuidoh-in; chuin amitna achil asetnin, achunga khut angamin, Kho namu-em, tin adongin ahi." 
Mark8:24 Ama adahdoh-in, Mihem chu thing tobangin kamun, avahleuve, ati." 
Mark8:25 Chujouvin amit akhutnin atham kitnin, chuin adadoh sah-in ahile adamhel jengin, chule mi jouse kichentah-in amu theitan ahi." 
Mark8:26 Chuin Aman ajah-a, khopisunga jong lut hih-in, khopi sunga koima cha jong hetsah hih-in, tin a-in lama asolmang tai." 
Mark8:27 Chuin Jesu le aseijuite apotdoh-un, Caesaria Philippi'a khoneo dunga acheuvin; lam dunga aseijuite jah-a, Mihon keima hi koi ahi eitiuvem? tin adongin ahi." 
Mark8:28 Chuin amahon, John Baptist ahi atiuvin; ahin abangin Elijah ahi atiuvin; adangsen Themgaoho lah-a khat ahi atiuve, tin aseijun ahi." 
Mark8:28 Chuin amahon, John Baptist ahi atiuvin; ahin abangin Elijah ahi atiuvin; adangsen Themgaoho lah-a khat ahi atiuve, tin aseijun ahi." 
Mark8:29 Chuin Aman amaho adongin, Nanghonla koi ahi neitiuvem? ati. Chuin Peter'in adonbutnin, Nangma Christa chu nahi, ati." 
Mark8:30 Chuin Aman ama thudol koimacha jah-a asei louna dingun hakhamin akhamin ahi. 
Mark8:31 Chuin Aman amaho chu, Mihem Chapan thil tamtah athoh-a, vaipo upa hole thempu pipuiho chule danthu sunho pampaija umding, kithatna chule ni thum joule thoudoh kit tei ding ahichu ahil pantan ahi." 
Mark8:32 Aman hichu phongtah-a asei ahi. Hiche chun Peter'in ama apuidoh-in ahousetan ahi. 
Mark8:33 Ahin Ama akiheijin, aseijuite aven, Peter chu aphoh-in, Kanung lama chen, Satan; nangman Pathen thulam gel louvin, mihem thulam jeng nagele, ati." 
Mark8:34 Chuin Aman aseijuite le mihonpi chu ahenga akouvin, ajah uva, Koi hile kanung eijui noma chun ama kingaitom henlang athingpel kiput hen chule kanung hinjuihen." 
Mark8:35 Ijeh-inem itile koi hile ahinna huhhing noma chun achan ding; amavang koi hile keima jal leh Kipana Thupha jala ahinna chana chun ahuhhing ding ahi. 
Mark8:36 Ijeh-inem itile mihemin vannoi leiset apumpin neihenlang ahinna chantale, ipi phatchomna anei dingham?" 
Mark8:37 Min ahinna khela ipi apeh dingham? 
Mark8:38 Koi hijongle tulai khang jonthanhoina le chonsetpan lah-a keima le kathu jachat chan chu, Mihem Chapan jong a-Pa loupina-a avantil thengtetoh ahung nile ama chu ajachatpi ding ahi, ati." 
Mark9:1 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hikoma dingho kimkhat hi Pathen lenggam thanei tah-a ahung lhun amu kahseuva thina tepkha lou ding aumuve, ati." 
Mark9:2 Chuin ni gup jouvin Jesu'n Peter toh, Jacob toh, chule John atumin apuijin, molsang chung khatna apuitouvin, chuin Ama amaho ang sungah avou akikhelin ahi." 
Mark9:2 Chuin ni gup jouvin Jesu'n Peter toh, Jacob toh, chule John atumin apuijin, molsang chung khatna apuitouvin, chuin Ama amaho ang sungah avou akikhelin ahi." 
Mark9:3 Chule aponsil chu koimachan chutobang tah-a asopbang joulou ding khopmin abanglah lah jengin, buhbang sangin jong abangjon ahi." 
Mark9:4 Chuin Elijah leh Mosi ahengah ahung kilah lhonin, Jesu toh akihouvun ahi." 
Mark9:5 Chuin Peter'in Jesu jah-a, Rabbi, hikoma i-umu hi eiho dingin anome; lhambuh thum songung kate, khat nangma ding, khat Mosi ding, chule khat Elijah ding, ati." 
Mark9:6 Ajehchu akichat behseh jeh-a seiding hetmoa asei ahi. 
Mark9:7 Chuin meilhang khatnin amaho chu ahinlekhun; mei lah-a kon chun aw ahung gingin, Hiche hi Ka-Chapa deitah ahi; athu ngaijun, ati." 
Mark9:8 Chuin phulou helouvin akimvelu avetnuva ahile, koimacha amuta hih-un, Jesu changsehle amaho changbou aumtaovin ahi." 
Mark9:9 Chuin molsanga kona ahung kumsuh phatnun, amaho chu hakhamin akhamin, Mihem Chapa athia kona athodoh kit kahsen koima jah-a seidoh hih-un, ati." 
Mark9:10 Athusei chu alunguvah aching jingun, athia kona athodoh kit chu ipi aseina ahidem, tin akidongto jiuvin ahi." 
Mark9:11 Chuin amahon adongun, Ibola danthu sunhon Elijah hung masa ding ahi atiuham? atiuve." 
Mark9:12 Aman adonbutnin, Elijah chu tahbeh-a hung masa-a, ijakai ahung semphat dingmong ahi; chule itidana Mihem Chapa thudol, Aman hesoh genthei tintang athoh-a chule mi nahsahmo-a aumding ahi, tia kisuna ham." 
Mark9:13 Hijongle keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, Elijah chu ahungsa ahitai, chule akhanchan dingthu asut bangtah-u chun achunga anopnop aboltauvin ahi, ati." 
Mark9:14 Chuin aseijuite henga ahungin ahile akimveluva mi tamtah auma, chule danthu sunho chun thu adoh uva anakinelpiu amun ahi." 
Mark9:15 Chuin mipi chun Ama amu mu-un kidang asa lheh-un, aheng lamah ahung lhaipaijun Ama chu alamtouvin ahi." 
Mark9:16 Chuin Aman danthu sunho jah-a, Amaho khutoh ipi kinela nahiuvem? tin adonge." 
Mark9:17 Chuin mipi lah-a khatnin ahindonbut nin, Pakai, kachapa nahenga kahinpui ahi, ama lhagao paomon avopmin;" 
Mark9:18 Chule hoikom hijongle aman amat matna-a aheh lhujin; chule achilphon alhan, aha ageljin, chule apumin akangjin; chule einodohpeh nadiuvin naseijuite henga kaseijin; amahon ajou pouvin ahi, ati." 
Mark9:19 Chuin Aman adonbutnin, ajah uva, Vo tahsanna neilou khang mite, nakom uva itihchan kaumpi ding nahiuvem? Itihchan kakhongai ding nahiuvem? kahenga hinpuijun, ati." 
Mark9:20 Chuin amahon ahenga ahinpuijun ahi. Chuin Aman ama chu amu phatnin, lhagaoboh chun amapa chu nasatah-in aveingoi paijenin ahile tolla alhun, achilphon alhalet lutnin akilihlelen ahi." 
Mark9:21 Chuin Jesu'n apa jah-a, Ahiti nahi itihchan hitam? ati. Hichun aman, Achapan laija pat ahitai." 
Mark9:22 Chule suhmang dingin abangle meijah, abangle twijah aleh lut lhoijin ahi: hijongle nangman alonaje nahetle, neilungset in neihutan, ati." 
Mark9:23 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Natahsan photle! Atahsan ding chun ijakai ahi thei sohkeije, ati." 
Mark9:24 Chutah chun chapangpa pa chun, amitlhi pumin, Pakai, katahsane; katahsan lelna-a neihun, tin asamtai." 
Mark9:25 Chuin Jesu'n mihonpi hung lhaikhom chu amun, lhagao boh chu aphoh-in, ajah-a, Nang lhagao paomole na-ngong, thu kapeh nahi, asunga kon chun hung potdoh-in, chule lutkit tahih-in, ati." 
Mark9:26 Hichun lhagao chu apengin, hatah-in avei ngoijin, ama-a konchun ahung pottan ahi. Hichun chapangpa chu athi bangin aumtan, chuphatnin mi atamjopi chun, Athi hita khu, atiuve." 
Mark9:27 Ahin Jesu'n akhutnin amanin, akaithouvin ahile, ahung thoudoh jengtan ahi." 
Mark9:28 Chuin Jesu insung agalut phatnin, aseijuiten guhthimin, I-atile keihon kanodohjou louvu ham? tin adongun ahi." 
Mark9:29 Aman adonbut-in, Hitobang hi an ngola taona tailouvin akinodoh theipoi, ati." 
Mark9:30 Chuin chua kon chun achedoh-un, Galilee gam ajotnun, hichu min ahet ding Ama anompon ahi." 
Mark9:31 Ijeh-inem itile Aman aseijuite ahilpeh jin, ajah uva, Mihem Chapa chu mihemte khutna kipedoh ahitan, amahon atha dingu; chule akitha jouteng, ni thum nile Ama hingdoh kit ding ahi, ati." 
Mark9:32 Ahivangin athusei chu ahethei pouvin, Ama doh dingla akichauvin ahi." 
Mark9:33 Chutichun Ama Capernaum ahung lhungtan ahi. Chuin in sunga aumpetnin amaho chu adongin, Lampi'a chu ipi nakinel piu ham? ati." 
Mark9:34 Ahivangin amaho lampi'a chu, Ilah uva hin koi hi alenpen ahidem? tia akinel jeh-u chun athipchet jengun ahi." 
Mark9:35 Hichun atouvin, somleni ho chu akouvin ajah uva, Koi hijongle amasapen hinom chu nukhah pen ding ahi, chule mi jouse jenlea pang hi ding ahi, ati." 
Mark9:36 Chuin chapang neocha khat akouvin, alaijuva adinsah-in; chuin apomin, ajah uva," 
Mark9:37 Koi hijongle keima mina hitobang chapangcha khat sanga chun keima eisan ahi; chule koi hileh keima eisang chan chun keima eisan hilouvin, eihinsolpa asanjoh ahi, ati." 
Mark9:38 John'in adonbutnin ajah-a, houhil namina thilha nodoh mikhat kamuvin, eijui pouvin ahi: chule eijuilou jeh uvin kakham taove, ati." 
Mark9:38 John'in adonbutnin ajah-a, houhil namina thilha nodoh mikhat kamuvin, eijui pouvin ahi: chule eijuilou jeh uvin kakham taove, ati." 
Mark9:39 Ahin Jesu'n, Kham hih-un; kamina thil kidang bola, keima eiseiseloi theija koima aumpoi." 
Mark9:40 Ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle eiho eidou lou tapou chu eiho lama pang ahi. 
Mark9:41 Koi hijongle Christa mi ahi tia ama mina twi khon khat don ding napechanu chu, tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, iti nama jongle kipaman asan ding chu achanlou ding ahi." 
Mark9:42 Chule koi hijongle keima eitahsanna hiche aneochaho lah-a khat kipal lhuhsah chan chu, angonga sumhei song lentah kikhai henlang, twikhanglen'a kileh lutle ama dingin aphajoi." 
Mark9:43 Chule nakhutnin nakipal lhuhsah-a ahile tanbong jengin, khut ni neija damun meikong mitthei louva nache sangin, tibukim louva hinna-a lut nangma dingin aphajoi." 
Mark9:44 Damun chu Alungla thimo ameikongla mitmo ahi. 
Mark9:45 Chule nakengin nakipal lhuhsah-a ahile, tanbong jengin; keng ni neija imatih-a mittheilou damun meikonga nakilelut sangin, kengbaija hinna-a lut nangma dingin aphajoi." 
Mark9:46 Damun chu alungla thimo ameikongla mitmo ahi. 
Mark9:47 Chule namitnin nakipal lhuhsah-a ahile kaldoh jengin; mit ni neija damuna nakilelut sangin, mitlang cho-a Pathen lenggama lut nangma dingin aphajoi." 
Mark9:48 Damun chu alungla thimo ameikongla mitmo ahi. 
Mark9:49 Ijeh-inem itile mijouse meija chisoa kiso ding, chule ganlhaina jouse chi kiso-al ding ahi." 
Mark9:50 Chi hi aphai: ahivangin chi jong hi a-al hi tamtahen lang hileh ipi-a na-alsah kit dinguham? Nasunguva chi neicheh-un, khat le khat kichamdel cheh-in umuvin, ati." 
Mark10:1 Chuin Ama chua konin akipatdoh-in, Jordan gal lama konin Juda gamkol sung ahungtan ahi. Chuin mihonpi chu ahenga ahung kikhom kit taovin, chutichun Aman angaijin amaho chu ahil kittan ahi." 
Mark10:2 Chuin Pharisai ho ahenga ahungun, apatepnan thu adongun, ajah-a, Min aji ada hi dan ngai hinam? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark10:3 Jesu'n amaho adonbutnin, Mosi'n nangho thu iti napeh-um? ati." 
Mark10:4 Chuin amahon, Mosi'n kidana lekha sutna, chule da ding aphasah ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark10:5 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah uva, Nangho lungtah jeh-a aman hiche thupeh chu nangho dinga asut ahibouve." 
Mark10:6 Ahivangin leiset kisemtila patna Pathen'in amani chu numei le pasal'a asemsa ahitai. 
Mark10:7 Hiche jeh-a chu pasal'in anu apa adalhah-a ajia beh ding ahi; 
Mark10:8 Chule amani chu ti khat hilhon ding ahi. Hiti chu ahin amani pumni mi ni hita louvin ti khat ahi lhontai. 
Mark10:9 Hijeh chun Pathen gopsa chu mihemin sukhen hihen, ati." 
Mark10:10 Chuin in sungah aseijuiten hiche thudol chu adong kitnun ahi. 
Mark10:11 Aman ajah uva, Koi hileh aji da-a ji dang neichan chun ajinu chu ajonsan ahi." 
Mark10:12 Numei jin jong apasal ada-a mi dangtoh akichenle, ama jong chu ajonga ahi ati." 
Mark10:13 Chuin atham dingin chapang neochaho ahenga ahinpuijun ahile aseijuiten anaphoh-un ahi. 
Mark10:14 Ahin hichu Jesu'n amun, alung phamon, ajah uva, Chapang neochaho chu kahenga hung sah-un, jada hih-un; ijeh-inem itile Pathen lenggam chu hitobang tehoa bou ahi." 
Mark10:15 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Koi hile chapang neo tobanga Pathen lenggam sang lou chu, iti nama jongle chua lut louhel ding ahi, ati." 
Mark10:16 Chuin amaho chu apomin, achunguva akhut angamin, phatthei aboh tan ahi." 
Mark10:17 Chuin Ama lampi dunga che dinga apotdoh pettah-in, mi khat ahung lhaijelin, a-angah adilsun, Houhil pha, itileng tonsot hin kemlou kachan thei dingham? tin adongin ahi." 
Mark10:18 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Ibola apha neitiham? Pathen khatseh tailou koimacha apha aumpoi." 
Mark10:19 Thupeh chengse, Tolthat hih-in, Jon bol hih-in, Gucha hih-in, Dohan mi bol hih-in, Nanu napa jabolin, ti chu nahenai, ati." 
Mark10:20 Ahin amapan adonbutnin, ajah-a, Houhil, hichengse chu kachapan laija patna kahin nitpeh ahitai, ati." 
Mark10:21 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu aven ahile angailun, ajah-a, Khat nabat nalaije; chenlang nanei chengse gajoh inlang mivaicha gentheiho petan, chutile van'a gou nanei ding ahi; chule cross kiput inlang kanung hinjuijin, ati." 
Mark10:22 Chucheng asei ajah phat chun amai athimkot jengtan, chuin gou haotah ahi jeh-in lungnom mo tah-in achemang tan ahi." 
Mark10:23 Chuphatnin Jesu'n aseijuite ave kimvelin, Mihaoho hi Pathen gama alut dingu iti hahsat hitam! ati." 
Mark10:24 Chutia ati chu aseijuiten adatmo lheh-un, ahivangin Jesu'n aseikitnin, Chapangho, haona-a kingai miho Pathen lenggama alut dingu iti hahsat hitam!" 
Mark10:25 Mihao Pathen gama alut sangin heubil homa sangongsang lut abaijoi, ati." 
Mark10:26 Chuin amahon kidang asabehseh jengun, ajah-a, Chuti ahile, koi huhhing-a um jou dingham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark10:27 Chuin Jesu'n amaho chu aven, Mihem dingin hitheihoi ahipon, Pathen dingin vang ahimopoi; ijeh-inem itile Pathen dingin ijakai ahitheije, ati." 
Mark10:28 Peter'in ajah-a, Vetemin, keihon ka-ima jouseu kadalhaovin, nanung kahinjui taove, ati." 
Mark10:29 Jesu'n, tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Keima jal leh Kipana Thupha jala, a-in, asopipate, asopinute, anu, apa, aji, achate, chule agam leiset hindalha-a chu," 
Mark10:30 Tu ahinlai sungahi bolsetna thoh pumpuma ajat ja-a in, sopipate, sopinute, nu, pa, ji, chate, gam leiset changlou ding aumpon; chule ahung lhung ding khonung hinkho-a chu tonsot hin kemlou chang lou ding koima aumpoi." 
Mark10:31 Amavang amasa cheng tamtah nukhah intin, anukhah cheng masa ding ahi, ati." 
Mark10:32 Chuin Jerusalem chetou dingin acheuvin, lamdung ageijun Jesu amasan ahile adatmo lheh jengun; chule anunga cheho chu akicha taovin ahi. Chuin Aman somleni ho chu ahenga akou kitnin, ajah uva achunga ipi ahung lhun ding hichu aseipanin," 
Mark10:33 Veuvin, Jerusalem jonin ichetouvui; chukoma chu Mihem Chapa hi thempu pipui le danthu sunho khutna pehdoh-a umding, amahon themmo achansah uva chidang namdangte khutna apehdoh dingu;" 
Mark10:34 Chule amaho chun a-el ela aboldiu, avoh diu, achil asetkhum dingu, chule atha dingu ahi: chule nithum ni le ama thoudoh kit ding ahi, ati." 
Mark10:35 Chuin Zebedee chapate ni Jacob le John ahenga ahung lhonin, ajah-a, Houhil, nahenga kathum chan lhonhi neibolpeh lhonle chun kalung lhon ahi ati lhone." 
Mark10:35 Chuin Zebedee chapate ni Jacob le John ahenga ahung lhonin, ajah-a, Houhil, nahenga kathum chan lhonhi neibolpeh lhonle chun kalung lhon ahi ati lhone." 
Mark10:36 Hichun Aman, Ipi bolpeh lhonleng nagot lhonem? tin adongin ahi." 
Mark10:37 Amanin adonbut lhonin, ajah-a, Naloupi na-a chun khat najetnah, khat naveijah neitousah lhonin, ati lhonin ahi." 
Mark10:38 Ahin Jesu'n ajah lhonah, Nathum lhon chu nahe lhonpoi: kadona ding khonna hi nadon ngam lhona chule kachan ding baptize hi nachan ngam lhon ding hinam? ati." 
Mark10:39 Hichun amanin ajah-a, Kangame, ati lhonin ahi. Chuin Jesu'n, Kadon ding khonna vang nadon lhon ding ahin, chule ka baptize channa-a jong baptize nachan lhon ding ahinai." 
Mark10:40 Ahivangin kajetle kaveija tousah ding vang chu keima peh dol ahipoi, gotsa kikoipehho kipe ding ahibouve, ati." 
Mark10:41 Hichun somho chun hichu ajauvin, Jacob le John chunga alung phamo pantaovin ahi." 
Mark10:41 Hichun somho chun hichu ajauvin, Jacob le John chunga alung phamo pantaovin ahi." 
Mark10:42 Ahinla Jesu'n amaho chu akouvin, ajah uva, Chidang namdangte chunga vaipo tia kiseiho khu a-pakaiyun laltah-in aumun, chule amilen milaltehon achunguva athu neinao apanjiuve ti nanghon naheuve." 
Mark10:43 Nangho lah-a vang chu tichu ahipoi: ahin koi hile nangho lah-a alen hi noma chu nalhachaova pang ding; 
Mark10:44 Chule nalah uva apipuipen hi noma chu mi jouse soh hi ding ahi. 
Mark10:45 Ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa tah jongchu jen dinga hung hilouvin, ajenle dingle mi tamtah lhatdoh nadinga ahinna toh dingjoh-a hung ahibouve, ati." 
Mark10:46 Chuin Jericho khopi ahung lhung taovin ahi. Chuin aseijuitele mihonpi toh Jericho khopi-a kona akipat doh-un ahile, Timaeus chapa Bartimaeus kiti mitchopa chu lamkenga khutdon anatouvin ahi." 
Mark10:47 Nazareth Jesu ahi ti ahet phatnin, Vo David Chapa Jesu, neilungset in, tin asampantan ahi." 
Mark10:48 Mitam tah-in ama chu thipbeh-a umdingin aphoh-un; ahivangin ama chun, David Chapa, neilungset in, tin ahasap chehtan ahi." 
Mark10:49 Chuin Jesu adingin, agahkou dingun thu apen ahi. Amahon mitchopa akouvun, ajah-a, Lung mongin umin, kipatdoh-in, nakouve, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark10:50 Chuin ama chun apon aleh lhan, akipatdoh-in, Jesu henga achetai." 
Mark10:51 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu ahouvin, Keiman nangma iloleng nalungham? ati. Chuin mitchopa chun ajah-a, Rabbi, kho muleng kati, ati." 
Mark10:52 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Chetan, natahsanin nadamsah ahitai, ati. Chupettah chun kho amupai jengin, lamdung lhung chun Jesu ajuitan ahi." 
Mark11:1 Jerusalem kho koma Olivet mola Bethphage le Bethany ageijun, aseijuite lah-a mi ni asolin," 
Mark11:2 Ajah lhona, Namasang jon lhona kho sunga khun lut lhonin: kho sung nalut lut lhonle, sangan nou kihen koima touna khah loulai namu paijen lhon ding ahi, hichu sut lhoninlang hinkai lhonin." 
Mark11:3 Chule mi khattouvin, Ibola nasut lhonham? tia donga aumle, Pakaiyin manna nom aneije, ajole hinthah vah kit paitante ti lhonin, ati." 
Mark11:4 Amani ache lhonin ahile, khopi sung lam lena inpoa kotphunga sangan nou kihen khat amu lhonin, hichu asut lhonin ahi." 
Mark11:5 Chukoma dingho kimkhatnin, Ibola sangan nou chu nasut lhon ham? ati." 
Mark11:6 Chuin amanin Jesu'n ahilna lhon bangin amaho jah-a asei lhonin ahile, ahinlha taovin ahi." 
Mark11:7 Amanin sangan nou chu Jesu henga ahinkai lhonin, chuin aponu achunga aphaovin, achunga Ama atouvin;" 
Mark11:8 Chuin mi tamtah-in lampia aponu aphaovin, abangin loulaija theoboh asatnun aphaovin ahi." 
Mark11:9 Chuin amasa chengsele anungjui chengsen, Hosanna; Pakai mina hungpa chu anunnome;" 
Mark11:10 I-pau David lenggam hung lhung ding chu anunnome; Chungnung pena Hosanna, tin asam asamun ahi." 
Mark11:11 Chuin Jesu Jerusalem khopi-a houin'a chun agalutnin; chuin ijakai avetle soh phatnin, nilhah lam jong ahitan apotnin somleni ho chutoh Bethany'a achetan ahi." 
Mark11:12 Chuin ajingin, Bethany'a kona ahung potdohle agil akeltan;" 
Mark11:13 Chuin gamlatah-a hin theichang donei amun, aga kamu khatle tin achele ado tailou ima agamu tapoi; ijeh-inem itile theichang chu aga phat mong jong hilou ahi." 
Mark11:14 Chuin Jesu'n thingphung jah-a chun, Tukallin a-imatih chanin koiman naga ne hihhen, ati. Chutia ati chu aseijuiten ajauvin ahi." 
Mark11:15 Chuin Jerusalem ahung lhunun, Jesu houin'a alutnin, houin sunga thil johho le thil choho anodoh panin, chule sum lhengho dokhangle vakhu johho touna chu alekhup peh-in;" 
Mark11:16 Chule houin sunga chun koiman thilkeo apohle ding aja nomtapoi. 
Mark11:17 Chuin ajah uva, Ka-in chu namtin dinga taona in kiti ding ahi, tia kisun hilouham? Ahin nanghon gucha michom kokhuh-in nasemtaove, tin aseitan ahi." 
Mark11:18 Chuin thempu pipuiho le danthu sunhon hichu ajauvin ahile Ama suhmangna dingje chu aholtauve; ijeh-inem itile mipin athuhil chu kidang asah cheh jeh-u chun, Ama chu akichauvin ahi." 
Mark11:19 Chuin nilhah ahi phatnin, khopi sunga konin apotdohtan ahi." 
Mark11:20 Chuin jingkah-in ahopauvin ahile, theichang phung chu ajung geija ana goptah chu amuvin ahi." 
Mark11:21 Chuin Peter'in ageldoh-in, ajah-a, Vetan, Rabbi, theichang phung nagaosap chu agopjoutai, ati." 
Mark11:22 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah-a, Pathen tahsanun." 
Mark11:23 Tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Koi hile hiche molsang jah-a, Kichondoh inlang twikhanglen'a kilehluttan tia; chule alunga tahsan lelna beihela, atiti hijeng ding ahi tia tahsan chu, atiti hi thei ding ahi." 
Mark11:24 Hiche jeh-a chu kati ahi, nataova thil nathum chanu chu namusan ngaitoleu chun namu dingu ahi." 
Mark11:25 Chule atao dinga nadin petle, van'a na-Pau jongin nasuhkhelnao angaidam theinan, koi itobang hijongle nalungdou chu ngaidamun." 
Mark11:26 Nanghon mi suhkhel nangaidam lou vangule, van'a na-Pau vin nangho suhkhel jong angaidam lou ding ahi, ati." 
Mark11:27 Chuin Jerusalem'a ahung kitnun; chuin Houin sunga avahlelen ahile thempu pipuiho le danthu sunho chule upaho ahenga ahungun; 
Mark11:28 Chule amaho chun, Ipi thunei na-a hitiho hi nabolham? Hiti bol dinga hiche thuneina nape-a koiham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark11:29 Ahin Jesu'n ajah uva, Keiman nangho thu khat donging kate, neidonbut un; chule keiman ipi thuneija hicheng kabol ahi seipehnao vinge." 
Mark11:30 John baptize bol chu van'a konha, ole mihem'a konham? Neidonbut un, ati." 
Mark11:30 John baptize bol chu van'a konha, ole mihem'a konham? Neidonbut un, ati." 
Mark11:31 Chuin amaho akingai touvin, Van'a kon ahi tileuhenla chuti ahile, Ibola ama natahsan lou uham? tintin;" 
Mark11:32 Mihem'a kon ahi tileu henla; mi jousen John chu themgao tahbeh-a angaito cheh ahi jeh chun, mipi chu akichauvin ahi." 
Mark11:32 Mihem'a kon ahi tileu henla; mi jousen John chu themgao tahbeh-a angaito cheh ahi jeh chun, mipi chu akichauvin ahi." 
Mark11:33 Chuti chun amahon Jesu chu adonbutnun, Kaseithei pouve, atiuvin ahi. Hichun Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Achutile ipi thuneija hicheng kabol ahi, keiman jong seipeh deh pouvinge, ati." 
Mark12:1 Chuin Aman ajah uva thulemin thu aseipanin, Mikhatnin lengpilei abolin, palin aumkimvelin, lengpiga chil lhahna pum alaijin, insang asan, chuin aleilhouho khutna apedoh-in, migam danga achemang tai." 
Mark12:2 Chuin aga lhun phatnin, ama chanding aga chu la dingin aleilhouho henga asoh khat asolin ahi." 
Mark12:3 Hichun alei lhouhon amapa chu amanun, avovin, agoh-in akilesah taovin ahi." 
Mark12:4 Chuin aman asoh chomkhat asol kitnin ahile, ama chu songin asepmun, alu anamavo uvin, chule jachat umtah-in abolun asolmang taove." 
Mark12:5 Chuin achomkhat asol kitleuvin ahile, ama chu anathatnun, chule adang tamtah jong abang avovin, abang athatnun ahi." 
Mark12:6 Aman chapa deitah khat anei nalaijin, anunung penin, Kachapa hi anajabolunte, tin ama chu asoltai." 
Mark12:7 Ahinla chuche leilhouho chu akihoutoh-un, Ama hi agou lo ding chu ahi, khaije that uhite, chutile agou lo ding eiho ichan dingu ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark12:8 Chuin amanun athatnun, chuin lengpilei polama alehdoh taovin ahi." 
Mark12:9 Lengpilei neipa chun i-alo tadem? Ama hungintin aleilhouho chu sugamintin, lengpilei chu midang apeh ding ahi." 
Mark12:10 Hiche Pathen lekhabua thuhi nasimkhah hih-um; In sahon adeimoa apaiju song chu Aninga songpipenin apangtai; 
Mark12:11 Hiche hi Pakai thilbol ahin, Chule imitmuvin akidang lheh jenge, ati." 
Mark12:12 Chuin chuche thulem asei chu amaho gotna-a asei ahi ti aheuvin, ahinla mipi chu akichauvin ahi; chuin Ama adalhauvin achemang taove." 
Mark12:13 Hichun athuseija kon man dingin, Pharisai ho phabep le Herod loi phabep ahenga asolun ahi." 
Mark12:14 Chuin amaho chu ahengah ahungun, ajah-a, Houhil, nangma mi dihtah nahin, koima gin naneipoi; nangman mimai navepon, dihtah-a Pathen lampi chu nahile ti kaheuve: Caesar kai kapeh-u hi dan ngai hina, hilouham?" 
Mark12:15 Kapeh dinguha, kapehlou dinguham? atiuve. Amanla aphatlhem bolu chu ahen, adonbutnin, Ibola neilung lah-uham? Denarius khat hinchoijun, neivet sah-un, ati." 
Mark12:16 Chuin ahinchoijun ahile Aman ajah uva, Hiche hi koilim le koimin ham? ati. Amahon, Caesar'a ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark12:17 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Caesar'a chu Caesar peuvinlang, Pathen'a chu Pathen petangu, ati. Hiphat chun amahon adatmo lheh jengun ahi." 
Mark12:18 Chuin Saddukai ho, Mithi thokitna aumpoi tiho chu ahenga ahungun, ajah-a thudoh aneijun," 
Mark12:19 Houhil, koi hile sopinei khattouvin cha nei louva aji athisana ahile, asopipa chun ajinu chu jin neihenlang, asopipa ding chun chi khaipehhen, tia Mosi'n lekha eisutpeh-u ahi." 
Mark12:20 Ucha pasal sagite khat aumun: amasapenpa chun ji aneijin chikhai louvin athitan ahi. 
Mark12:21 Abanapan amanu chu jin aneijin, chikhai louman athin, athumnapa jong chutima chu ahi." 
Mark12:22 Chutichun pasal sagi chun jin aneijun, chikhai lou ahitaovin; akhonna-in anumeinu chu athitai." 
Mark12:23 Ahile thokitna-a amanu chu alah uva koipen ji hitantem? Ijeh-inem itile asagiuva amanu chu ji-a anei sohkeiju ahi, atiuve." 
Mark12:24 Jesu'n amaho adonbutnin, ajah uva, Pathen lekhabu thu le Pathen thahatna nahetjoh sangu aum lou jeh-a nakheljiu hilouham?" 
Mark12:25 Ajehchu mithiho athia kona athodoh tengule akicheng tapouvin, chen jong akichensah tapouve; ahin van'a vantilte tobang ahiuve." 
Mark12:26 Mithiho kaithouvin aumui ti thudola, Pathen'in, Keima Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, Jacob Pathen kahi tia hamboh lah-a kona Mosi akihoupi chu Mosi lekhabua simkha lou nahiuvem?" 
Mark12:27 Ama athiho Pathen hilouvin, ahingho Pathen ahijo bouve; hakhela nakhelu ahi, ati." 
Mark12:28 Chuin danthu sunho khatnin akinelnao chu ahung jan, chule Jesu'n amaho kichehtah-a adonbut chu ahen, Thupeh jouse lah-a hoipen hi thupipen ham? tin adongin ahi." 
Mark12:29 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Apipen chu hiche ahi, Vo Israel chateho, ngaijun, Pakai i-Pathen'u chu Pakai khatsehbou ahi." 
Mark12:30 Nangman nalung pumpin, nalhagao pumpin, nalungthim pumpin, chule nathaneina apumpin, Pakai na-Pathen chu ngailun. Hichehi thupeh masapen ahi." 
Mark12:31 Anina hiche hi ahi, Nangma naki ngailut bangin naheng nakom ngailun. Hiteni sanga thupeh lenjo aumpoi, ati." 
Mark12:32 Chuin danthu sunpa chun, Houhil, nasei dih tangeije, nangman thutah nasei ahi: Ajehchu ama khatsehbou ahi, ama ti lou adang aumpoi." 
Mark12:33 Chule, Ama chu lung pumpi-a, hetna pumpi-a, hinna pumpi-a, thanei pumpi-a ngailut ding, chule eima ikingailut banga iheng ikom te ngailut chu pumgo thilto le ganlhaina jouse sanga gamchenga phajo ahi, ati." 
Mark12:34 Danthu sunpan hechentah-a adonbut ajah phatnin Jesu'n, Nangma Pathen lenggam toh nakilatpoi, ati. Chukal chun koiman thu adong ngamtapoi." 
Mark12:35 Chuin Houin sunga athuhil petnin, Jesu'n adonbut-in, Danthu sunhon Christa chu David chapa ahi atiu hi itidana aseiju ham?" 
Mark12:36 Ajeh chu Lhagao Thengin ahila konin David ama tah-in, Pakaiyin ka Pakai jah-a, Keiman namelmate chengse nakeng chotpha-a kaneisah masangsen, Kajet lamah tou jingin, tin aseije." 
Mark12:37 David amatah-in Pakai asah-in, achutile achapa iti hi thei dingham? ati. Milhamho chun Jesu thusei chu thanom tah-in angaijun ahi." 
Mark12:38 Chuin Aman athuhilna-a chun ajah uva, Sangkhol choltah kiah-a kholai len noma, chule kailhanga min chibai aboh ding deiho," 
Mark12:39 Kikhopna in le golvahna-a touna pipen deiho," 
Mark12:40 Chule meithaiho in bahgama, chule alhema sot tahtah taojia danthu sunho-a konin kihongphauvin; amaho chu themmo chungnung changding ahiuve, ati." 
Mark12:41 Chuin Jesu'n sumdolna bom jona atouvin, mipin sumdolna boma sum alelut chu aven ahile, mihao tamtah-in tamtah aleh lutnun ahi." 
Mark12:42 Chuin meithai vaichatah khat ahungin, sumsan nongsi pehni aleh lutnin ahi, hichu paisa khattoh kikot ahi." 
Mark12:43 Chuin seijuite akouvin ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Hiche meithai vaichanu hin adang jouse sangin sumdolna-a atam lelutpen'e." 
Mark12:44 Ijeh-inem itile adangho jouse chun aneival atou ahin, amanu vang hin aneichasun ahinpi chengse alelut jeng ahi, ati." 
Mark13:1 Chuin Houin'a kona apotdoh-in aseijuite khatnin ajah-a, Houhil, vetan, asongho itobang song hija chule in kisah ho hi itobanga kisalul hitam, ati." 
Mark13:2 Jesu'n ajah-a, Nangman hiche in loupitah hi namu-em? Hikoma hi song suhchim louva khat chunga khat kisethop himhim umlou helding ahi, ati." 
Mark13:3 Chuin Pathen Houin jontah Olivet molsanga chun atouvin ahile Peter, Jacob, John, Andrew teho chun atumbeh-in ajah-a," 
Mark13:3 Chuin Pathen Houin jontah Olivet molsanga chun atouvin ahile Peter, Jacob, John, Andrew teho chun atumbeh-in ajah-a," 
Mark13:4 Hicheng chu itihle hi dingham? Chule hitiho chu ahung guilhun phat ding chu amelchihna ipi hintem? Neisei peh-un tin adong lhiuvin ahi. 
Mark13:5 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin hitin aseije, Koiman nangho nalheplhah louna dingun kichih theijun." 
Mark13:6 Mi tamtah keima minin hunguntin, Keima Christa kahi tiuvintin, mi tamtah alheplhah dingu ahi." 
Mark13:7 Chule nanghon gal kisatle kidou thuthang najah tengule, lungdong hih-un; hicheng chu hung soh tei ding ahi; ahivangin achaina hiloulai ding ahi." 
Mark13:8 Ijeh-inem itile vai khatle vai khat, gam khatle gam khat hung kidouvintin, mun chom mun choma ling hung kihot intin, kel hunglha-a gentheina hung lhung ding ahi; hicheng chu hahsatna kipatna ahi." 
Mark13:9 Amavang kichih theijun; ajehchu vaihom upate khutna pehdoh-a nahung umdingu, kikhopna in'a nakivo dingu, chule keima mina vaipoho le lengho anga amaho douna-a hettohsah dinga nahung din dingu ahinalaije." 
Mark13:10 Kipana Thupha hi namtin vaipi lah-a hillhanga um masa tei ding ahi. 
Mark13:11 Chule nakaijuva napehdoh tengule, ipi iti kasei dingham tin amasangin lungkham hih-un; ahin aphattahle nakipeh chanu chu seibouvun; ijeh inem itile aseija chu nangho hilouvin, Lhagao Theng joh ahi." 
Mark13:12 Chule asopin asopi, pan acha tha dinga ahinpehdoh ding; chate kipatdoh uva anule apa adoudiu, amaho chu ahin thasah dingu ahi." 
Mark13:13 Chule keima min jala nangho mi jouse hotna nahung umdingu ahi; ahinla akhon ni geija thoh lhumkeija pangdetpabou chu huhhing-a umding ahi. 
Mark13:14 Amavang themgao Daniel seibangin, misumang thet umtah chu adinna dol louva adin namu tengule (asim siman hehen), chutengle Judah gama um chengse thinglhang lamah jamuhen:" 
Mark13:15 In chunga uma jong hung kumlha hihhen, athilkeo kilah dingin in sunga lut hihhen:" 
Mark13:16 Loujaova uma jong apon kilah dingin kilekit dahen. 
Mark13:17 Ahin ohe, hiche lai chule agaija le naonoi chepsahho ada nadinguve!" 
Mark13:18 Chule najam nadingu phat chu phalbi ahi louna dingin taovun. 
Mark13:19 Chuche nikho chu hesoh gentheina nikho hi ding ahi, chutobanga hesohna nasatah chu Pathen'in lei asema patnin tu geijin aumkha hihlaije, chule um jong umlou ding ahi." 
Mark13:20 Chule Pakaiyin chuche nikho chu asuhchom lou hileh, mihem himhim asohcha umlou ding ahi; ahivangin alhendohsa alhen chomte jala anikho chu asuhchom ahitai." 
Mark13:21 Chutengle najah uva khattouvin, Ven, hikomah Christa aume, atia; ahiloule, Ven, khukoma aume, atile tahsan hih-un." 
Mark13:22 Ijeh-inem itile Christa lhemho le themgao lhemho hung sohdoh untin, melchihna le mu kidang dang ahin vetsah dingu; ahitheile lhenchomte jeng jong ahinlheplhah dingu ahi." 
Mark13:23 Nangho vang kichihtheijun; veuvin, ijakai kahil masah dem nahitaove." 
Mark13:24 Ahivangin chucheng nikholai, hesoh genthei joule, nisa thimintin, chule lha jong vahta lou ding," 
Mark13:25 vanlaijola konin ahsi ho hung pullhantin, chule van'a hatnaho chengse kihot lingsoh ding ahi." 
Mark13:26 Chutahle vanlaijola Mihem Chapa thunei Chungnung tah le loupitah-a meibola ahung amu dingu ahi. 
Mark13:27 Chutah chule aman vantil ho asola, leiset monga pat van mong geija kolkimvel li-a kona alhen chomte alon khom ding ahi." 
Mark13:28 Theichang phung hin thulem kihilun; abah adona ajih akilhap tengle nipi anaitai ti naheuve. 
Mark13:29 Chutobang chun nangho jong hicheng chu aguilhun namu tengule, anaitai, kotbul hung geija ahitai, ti heuvin." 
Mark13:30 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hichengse chu aboncha aguilhun masangse-a, hiche tulai khanga mite hi mang lou ding ahi." 
Mark13:31 Vanle lei mang ding ahin, keima thu vang mang lou ding ahi." 
Mark13:32 Ahivangin Pa tailou van'a vantilte jong, Chapa jong, koimachan anikhole ani dantah chu ahepoi." 
Mark13:33 Chingtheijun, kiging jingin umunlang tao jingun: ijeh inem itile aphat chu itih ahi ding nahepouve." 
Mark13:34 Ajehchu mihem Chapa hi mi khat asohte thuneina pedoh, abonchauva atoh ding cheh-u pe-a, chule kotngah kiging jinga umdinga thu apeh nunga, a-in dalha-a migam danga chemanga tobang ahi." 
Mark13:35 Hiche jeh chun kiging jingin umun, ijeh-inem itile inneipu chu itih-a ahung ding nahepouve, nilhah lam ahim, jan khangkim ahim, ahkhonphat ahim, jingkah ahim, ahung ding phat nahepouve." 
Mark13:36 Hetman louvin hungjeng tale na-imut petnu hungtoh khante. 
Mark13:37 Nangho jah-a kasei hi mi jouse jah-a kasei ahi, Kiging jingin umun, ati." 
Mark14:1 Chuin nini jou chun kalchuh kut le cholsolou changlhah kut hiding ahin; thempu pipuiho le danthu sunhon iti doha-a bola matna, chule tha dingham tin ahol aholun ahi." 
Mark14:2 Ahin amahon, Kut kiman sung hidahen, achutiloule mipi lah-a thunoh umget inte, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark14:3 Chuin Bethany'a Simon miphahpa in'a aman ankong aumpetnin, numei khatnin songval bomin nard thao namtui theng mantam tah ahinchoijin, abom chu asukeh-in alua abunglhan ahi." 
Mark14:4 Ahin alah uva akimkhat chu alungphamo uvin, Ibola thao hitia amoh suhmang jeng hitam?" 
Mark14:5 Ijeh-inem itile hiche thao hi kijoh henlang hile dangka jale somnga kikhong dinga, chutile asum chu mivaicha gentheiho peh thei ahi, atiuvin; chule numeinu chu aphoh taovin ahi." 
Mark14:6 Ahin Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Amanu chu limsah hih-un; amanu chu ibola nasuh lunggim uham? Amanu hin keima dinga thil phatah abol ahi." 
Mark14:7 Ijeh-inem itile mivaicha gentheite nakom uva aum jingnauve, nagotlai chanua nanghon nahu thei dingu ahi; keima vang nangho koma umjing ding kahipoi." 
Mark14:8 Amanu hin aboltheichan abol ahi; kalong hi vuidinga chu eihung nu masah ahi. 
Mark14:9 Ahin keiman nangho tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Vannoi leiset gam pumpi-a Kipana Thupha kihil lhangna chana, hiche numeinu thilbol jong hi amanu het jingna-a kiseipeh dinga ahi, ati." 
Mark14:10 Chuin Judas Iscariot, somleni lah-a mi khat chun, Jesu chu amaho amatsah theinan thempu pipuiho henga agachen ahi." 
Mark14:11 Chuin amahon hichu ajah phatnun akipah-un, ama chu sumpeh dingin ateptaovin ahi. Chuin aman Ama chu pehdoh-a matsah theina agomkom aholtan ahi." 
Mark14:12 Chule cholsolou changlhah kut kipatni, kalchuh kut kelngoi atha niuvin, aseijuiten ajah-a, Kalchuh kut naneh theina dinga hoikoma gagoleu veng nalungham? atiuvin ahi." 
Mark14:13 Chuin Aman aseijuite mi ni asolin, ajah lhona, Khopi sunga khun che lut lhonin, chule twibel pu-a mi khat nato lhon ding ahin; ama chu jui lhonin." 
Mark14:14 Chule alutna in'a inneipa jah-a chun, Houhilin, kaseijuite toh kalchuh kut kanehna ding kajin indan chu hoilaiham? ati, gati lhonin." 
Mark14:15 Chule amatah-in indan chungnung lentah gotsademle phasadem khat navetsah lhon ding ahi; hikoma chun ineh dingun anago lhontan, ati." 
Mark14:16 Chuin seijui teni chu akipatdoh lhonin, khopi sunga alut lhonin, ajahlhona aseibang bang chun agatoh lhonin: kalchuh kut chu agago lhontan ahi." 
Mark14:17 Chuin nilhah ahi phatnin somleni ho chutoh ahungtai. 
Mark14:18 Chuin atou uva an aneh laitah-un, Jesu'n ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kasei ahi, Nalah uva kaneh khompi mikhat hin eipehdoh-a eimatsah ding ahi, ati." 
Mark14:19 Chuin alungkham pantaovin, khat khatnin, Kei kahim? tin aban banin adong taovin ahi." 
Mark14:20 Chuin Aman amaho chu adonbutnin, Lhenga kasokhompi, Somleni lah-a mi khat ahi." 
Mark14:21 Mihem Chapa achonchan ding thu kisun bangtah-a chu cheding mong ahi; ahivangin Mihem Chapa pedoh-a matsah dingpa chu ohe, adana-e! Ama chu apena peng lou hile ama dinga phajo ding ahi, ati." 
Mark14:22 Chuin an aneh laitah-un, Jesu'n changlhah alan, phatthei aboh jouvin ahehbal balin amaho chu apen, ajah uva, Kilah-un, neuvin; hiche hi katahsa ahi, ati." 
Mark14:23 Chuin khon alan athangvah jouvin amaho chu apen, chutichun abonchauvin adon sohkei taovin ahi." 
Mark14:24 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Hiche hi mi tamtah dinga kisodoh kitepna thah kathisan ahi." 
Mark14:25 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Keiman Pathen lenggam sunga athah kadon ni ahung lhun kahse-a, lengpiga twi hi kadon lou ding ahitai, ati." 
Mark14:26 Chuin amahon la asah jouvun, apotdoh-un Olivet molsang lama ache taovin ahi." 
Mark14:27 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Nangho nabon chaova tujana keima jeh-a lungthoi sohkei ding nahiuve: ijeh-inem itile, Keiman kelngoi chingpa kavoh lhuh ding ahi, chutengle akelngoite chu jamcheh gamding ahi, tin akisune." 
Mark14:28 Ahivangin kathodoh nungle Galilee gam lama namasang sang uva kache ding ahi, ati." 
Mark14:29 Ahin Peter'in ajah-a, Abonchauvin lungthoi jongleu, keivang lungthoi pong kate, ati." 
Mark14:30 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, Nangman tuni, tujan mama-a hi ahchal nivei akhon kah-a thumvei neiseilep ding ahi, ati." 
Mark14:31 Peter vang chun, Nangma toh thitha tei ding mong hijongleng, keiman nangma seilep hihhel ing kate, atichang melin ahi. Chule adangho jouse jongchun achuti sei cheh-un ahi." 
Mark14:32 Chuin Getsemane atiu mun'a chun ahungun, chuin Aman aseijuite jah-a, Keima katao sungsen nangho hikoma hin anatou jingun, ati." 
Mark14:33 Chuin Peter le Jacob, chule John hicheng chu apuijin, chuin alung hesoh behseh jengin, halung hemin alunghem pantan ahi." 
Mark14:33 Chuin Peter le Jacob, chule John hicheng chu apuijin, chuin alung hesoh behseh jengin, halung hemin alunghem pantan ahi." 
Mark14:34 Chuin amaho jah-a, Thina khophelin kalung ahesoh behseh jengtai: hikoma hin umunlang kiging jingun, ati." 
Mark14:35 Chuin amasang lama phabep khat achechonin, tolah akhupbon alhun, ahitheile hiche phat chu ama-a kona akitolmang theina dingin ataovin," 
Mark14:36 Abba, ka Pa, nangma dinga ijakai hithei sohkei ahi; hiche khon hi kakoma konin chon mangin: ahivangin keima thu hilouvin, nangma thu thu hijohen, ati." 
Mark14:37 Chuin ahungleh khatteho chu a-imut lhuh-u ahungtoh-in, Peter jah-a, Simon, na-imut hitam? Nidan khat jeng jong kiginga um jou lou nahim?" 
Mark14:38 Lhepna-a nalhah louna dingun kigingun, taovun. Lhagao vangin ago tahbeh nan, ahin tahsa hi alhasamin ahi, ati." 
Mark14:39 Chuin achemang kitnin, ataovin, aseingai bangman aseijin ahi." 
Mark14:40 Chuin ahung kitnin ahile, amaho chu ana-imutlhuh-u ahungtoh kitnin, a-imutso behseh jeh-un, adonbutje ahe tapouve." 
Mark14:41 Chuin thumvei channa-a ahungin, ajah uva, Tun imuvinlang kitha ol taovin: aphasettai, phat alhingtai; Veuvin, Mihem Chapa hi michonse te khutna kipedoh ahitai." 
Mark14:42 Kipat un, chetao hite; veuvin, eipedohpa ahung naitai, ati." 
Mark14:43 Chuin hichu aseina laijin, somleni lah-a Judas chu thempu pipuiho, danthu sunho, chule upate koma kona chemjamle moltum toh hintho-a hungkonho mihonpi chutoh ahung kilhonin ahung paitan ahi." 
Mark14:44 Ama pedoh-a pangpa chun melchihna ahilmasan, Kachop penpen chu ama ahi; man unlang kitup keichan puimang taovin, ati ahi." 
Mark14:45 Chuin ahung lhun lhunin, ama ajonpai jenin, Rabbi, Rabbi, atin, achop tan ahi." 
Mark14:46 Chuin amahon akhut alhaovin amantaovin ahi. 
Mark14:47 Hichun akoma dingho khatnin achemjam asatdoh-in, thempu chungnung sohpa asatjengle, abilkol langkhat asatlhan ahi." 
Mark14:48 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah uva, Gucha michom man dinga kon banga chemjamle moltum tho-a keima man dinga nahung kon uham?" 
Mark14:49 Niseh-in houin'ah i-um khomun thu kahiljin, chulaijinla neimanpouvin ahi: amavang Pathen lekhabua thu guilhun na-a hiti ahi, ati." 
Mark14:50 Chutah chun aloi chengsen ama adalhauvin, ajamgam taovin ahi." 
Mark14:51 Gollhang khat vangin asagoh keo chunga chu tupatpon akisila ama chu ajui ahin; khangdongho chun amanun ahile; 
Mark14:52 Aman aponsil chu adalhan, asagoh keovin amaho-a konin ajam mangtai." 
Mark14:53 Chuin Jesu chu thempu chungnung hengah akaijun; chule ama chutoh thempu pipui chengsele, vaipo upaho, chule danthu sunho ahung kikhomun ahi." 
Mark14:54 Peter'in galkanga ajuipeh-in, thempu chungnung inpi leitol sungnung geijin ajui lutpeh-in, chuachun sottolho lah-a atouvin mei a-oijin ahi." 
Mark14:55 Chuin thempu pipuiho leh houvaipoloi chengsen Jesu chu tha theina ding achungah ahehsetnan hettohsah aholun; amu joupouvin ahi. 
Mark14:56 Ajehchu mi tamtah-in jouthun ahehseuvin, ahivangin aseiju akitoh pon ahi." 
Mark14:57 Chuin mi phabep khat akipat doh-un, jouthun ahehseuvin," 
Mark14:58 Ama hin hiche khutna kisa houin theng hi suseng ting, nithum sungin khutna sahlou achomkhat kasahdoh kitding ahi, ati kajaove, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark14:59 Ahivangin hiche ahehset naova jongchun akitoh kit pouvin ahi. 
Mark14:60 Chuphatnin thempu chungnung chu alah uva adingdoh-in, Jesu chu adongin, Nadonbut lou dingham? Hitehon nahehsetna-a thu aseiju hi ipiham? ati." 
Mark14:61 Ahivangin Aman donbut louhelin thipbeh-in aumin ahi. Thempu chungnung chun adong kitnin, ajah-a, Nangma Nunnom Chapa, Christa chu nahim? ati." 
Mark14:62 Chuin Jesu'n, Kahi: chule nanghon Mihem Chapa hi Thilbolthei jet lama atou le van meilah-a ahung namu dingu ahinalaije, ati." 
Mark14:63 Chuphatnin thempu chungnung chun apon abot eh-in, Thu hettohsah dang iding iti tah dinguham?" 
Mark14:64 Pathen ataitomna chu najataovin ahi; nanghon iti nagel uvem? ati. Chuphatnin abonchauvin athina theijin athemosah taovin ahi. 
Mark14:65 Chuin abangin achil aset khumun, chule amai atomun, achumun, ajah-a, Gaovinlang seijin, atiuvin; chule sottolleho chun akhut phanguva angeiphe abengun ahi." 
Mark14:66 Chuin Peter noilama leitola aum petnin, thempu chungnung sohnuho khat ahungin;" 
Mark14:67 Peter'in mei ana-oi chu amuphatnin, amanu chun aven, ajah-a, Nang jong Nazareth Jesu toh kiloi nahi, ati." 
Mark14:68 Ahinla aman aseilepmin, Kahepoi, chule ipi nasei ahijong kahepoi, atitai. Chuin tol maijah apotdoh-in ahile ahchal akhongtai." 
Mark14:69 Chuin soh numei khatnin amun, akoma dingho jah-a chun, Hichepa hi amaho lah-a khat ahi, ati kittan ahi." 
Mark14:70 Aniveina in aseilep kittan ahi. Chujou phabepin akoma dingho chun Peter jah-a, Amaho lah-a khat mong mong nahi; ijeh-inem itile nangma Galilee mi nahi hi nathuseijin aphongdoh-e, atiuve." 
Mark14:71 Ahivangin aman kigaosap le kihahsel athon, Keiman naseipao chu kahephapoi, atitai." 
Mark14:72 Chupettah chun aniveina-in ahchal akhongpaitan ahi. Chuphatnin, Jesu'n ahchal nivei akhon kah-a thumvei neiseilep ding ahi, atia ajah-a asei chu Peter'in ageldoh-in ahi. Chuin hichu ageldoh phatnin, akaptai." 
Mark15:1 Jingkah ahiphatnin thempu pipuiho, vaipo upaho, danthu sunho, chule houvaipoloi chengse akihoutoh paijun, Jesu chu akanun, akaijun Pilate khutna apedoh taovin ahi." 
Mark15:2 Chuin Pilate'in, Nangma Juda te Lengpa nahim? tin adongin ahi. Chuin Aman adonbutnin ajah-a, Naseikhai, ati." 
Mark15:3 Chuin thempu pipuihon thu tamtah-in ahehseuvin; ahin aman imachan adonbutpoi. 
Mark15:4 Pilate'in adong kitnin, Nadonbut lou dingham? Ve tang, hijatna naheh-u hi, ati." 
Mark15:5 Ahin Jesu'n adonbut hihhelin ahile Pilate'in adatmo lheh jengin ahi. 
Mark15:6 Tun Kut sunga chu amahon athum penpen chu sohchang khat alhadohji angai ahi. 
Mark15:7 Chuin mi khat amin Barabbas atiu, khosung chohnoh hotoh kihen khom, khosung achonohna lamuva tol atha khah ahi." 
Mark15:8 Chutichun achonna ngaibang uva abolpehna dingun mipi chun hatah-in asamun angeh pantaovin ahi. 
Mark15:9 Chuin Pilate'in adonbutnin, ajah uva, Juda te lengpa hi lhadohpehleng nalungu ham? ati." 
Mark15:10 Ama chun thempu pipuihon thangset suma apehdoh-u ahi ti chu ahet ahi. 
Mark15:11 Ahivangin thempu pipuihon Barabbas chu alhadoh pehna dingu joh-in mipi chu atilseuvin ahi. 
Mark15:12 Chuin Pilate'in ajah uva, Achutile Juda te Lengpa ahi natipao hi i-kalo dingba hitam? tin adong kittan ahi." 
Mark15:13 Chuin amahon, Thingpel'a khenbeh-in, tin asam kit taovin ahi." 
Mark15:14 Chuin Pilate'in ajah uva, Ibolinem? Ipi suhset aneijam? ati. Ahin amahon, Thingpel'a khenbeh tan, tin hasaptah-in asamuvin ahi." 
Mark15:15 Chuphatnin Pilate'in mipi lunglhaina ding chu angaiton, Barabbas alhadohpeh-in, Jesu chu ajep jouvin thingpel'a khetbeh dingin apedohtan ahi." 
Mark15:16 Chuin sepaihon ama chu Pretorium atiu inpi sunga chun apuilutnun, sepaiho jouse akoukhom sohkeijun ahi." 
Mark15:17 Chuin Jesu chu ponsandup asilpeh-un, ling lukhuh aphanun, alu-a chun akhuhpeh-un ahi." 
Mark15:18 Chuin, Vo Juda te Lengpa, tin chibai aboh pantaovin ahi." 
Mark15:19 Chuin amaho chun peng tenggolin alu avo avovin, chule chil asetkhumun, chule adilsuvin chibai aboh-un ahi." 
Mark15:20 Chutia chu totnopna-a a-el ela abol jouvun, ponsandup chu ahoh lha uvin ama pon asilpeh-un, thingpel'a khetbeh dingin apuimang taovin ahi." 
Mark15:21 Chuin amahon kholjin hiche mun hinjotpa Cyrene gam mi Alexander le Rufus pa Simon chu acham louvin athingpel puding chun amanun ahi. 
Mark15:22 Chutichun Golgotha atiu mun'a chun apuitaove, hichu lugu mun tina ahi." 
Mark15:23 Chuin myrrh toh kihal lengpi theitwi apeuvin, ahinla Ama anom pon ahi." 
Mark15:24 Chuin thingpel'a akhenbeh jouvun, aponsil hochu abonchauva achan cheh nadingun vang aveovin, akihomtaove." 
Mark15:25 Jesu akhetbehnao chu nidan thum don ahi. 
Mark15:26 Achunga chun ahehnau hetsahna, JUDA TE LENGPA tia kisun aumin ahi." 
Mark15:27 Chuin amatoh thakhatnin gucha michom mi ni, khat ajetlamah, khat aveilamah, thingpelah akhenbeh-un ahi." 
Mark15:28 Hichun, Ama michonsehoto akisim thatai, tia Pathen lekhabun asei chu aguilhung tan ahi." 
Mark15:29 Chuin achele, avahle jousen akhasuh khumun, ajah-a, Aha! Nang houin suse-a ni thuma sadohkit," 
Mark15:30 Nangma kihuh hingin lang thingpel'a kon chun hung kumlha tangem, atiuvin a-el elin ahouvun ahi." 
Mark15:31 Chutobangma chun thempu pipuiho jong chun totnopnan abolun, danthu sunho chutoh, Aman midang ahuhhingjin Ama akihuhhing theipoi." 
Mark15:32 Kamuva katahsan theina dingun, Israelte Lengpa Christa chu tutah hin thingpel chunga konin hung kumlha temhen, atiuvin ahi. Chule amatoh thingpel'a kikhetbeh tha teni jong chun ama ahouse lhonin ahi." 
Mark15:33 Chuin nidan gup tah-in gam jouse chunga thim ajingin, nidan ko geijin mu athimtan ahi." 
Mark15:34 Chuin nidan koh lhintah-in Jesu hapenin apengin, Eloi, Eloi lama sabachthani? ati. Hichu, ka Pathen, ka Pathen, ibola neidalhah hitam? tina ahi." 
Mark15:35 Chule avela dingho lah-a abang bangin chutia ati chu ajauvin, Ngaijun, Elijah akouve, atiuvin ahi." 
Mark15:36 Chuphatnin mi khat alhaijelin lengpitwi thuh-a twichop phon adelhopmin pengtenggol leh-a atah-in, agah donsah-in, Limsah hih-un; adomlha dinga Elijah hunga hung hih-am veohite, ati." 
Mark15:37 Chuin Jesu chu hapenin apengin, alhagao alhatai." 
Mark15:38 Chuin houin'a pondal len chu achunga pat anoi geijin a-ehlha paijin keh ni akisotan ahi. 
Mark15:39 Chuin Ama jona ding sepai jalamkai chun chutia apenna alhagao alha chu amutah-in, Hichepa hi Pathen Chapa tahbeh mong ahi, atitai." 
Mark15:40 Chukoma chun galkanga pangin numei hon khatnin jong ave jingun ahi; alah uva chun Magdalene Mariam, Jacob neojo le Joses nu Mariam, chule Salome; hiteho cheng chu aumun ahi." 
Mark15:41 Amaho cheng chu Galilee gama aumlaija ajuija ama jenlea pangho chu ahiuve. Chule numei tamtah Jerusalem'a ahinlhon toupiho jong chu ahiuve. 
Mark15:42 Nilhah ahi phatnin, kigot ni ahi jeh-in, hichu cholngahni masang ni ahin," 
Mark15:43 Arimathea kho-a mi Pathen lenggam ngah jinga um, vaipo ginle ja umtah Joseph chu ahungin, ngampelin Pilate henga achelutnin, Jesu long chu agathumtan ahi." 
Mark15:44 Pilate'in chutia athivah jeng chu adatmo lheh jengin; chuin aman sepai jalamkai chu akouvin, Athina sottam, tin adongin ahi." 
Mark15:45 Chuin sepai jalamkaija kona ahetchen phatnin, along chu Joseph apetai." 
Mark15:46 Chuin tupat ponnem ahin choijin, along chu alalhan, tupat ponnema chun atomin, song kilai lhan sunga chun alupsah-in, chujouvin lhan kotna chun song len khat atanglutnin ahi." 
Mark15:47 Chule Magdalene Mariam le Joses nu Mariam chun akoinau chu avejing lhonin ahi. 
Mark16:1 Chuin cholngah ni kichai phatnin Magdalene Mariam, Jacob nu Mariam, chule Salome hicheng chun ahunguva thao anu theina dingun, thao namtui ahin choijun ahi." 
Mark16:2 Chuin hapta ni masa ni jingpitah-in niso jou jouvin lhan lama chun ahunguvin ahi. 
Mark16:3 Chuin amahole amaho akihouvun, Lhankotna song chu kon eitahdoh peh taovinte? akitiuvin ahi." 
Mark16:4 Ahinla agah vetnule song chu tahdohsa anaum amutaove; asong chu lentah hija ahi. 
Mark16:5 Chuin lhan sunga alutnun ahile gollhang khat ponbangleh choltah kisila jetlam sanga tou amuvin; chuin amaho chu atija lheh jengun ahi. 
Mark16:6 Ahivangin ama chun amaho jah-a, Tija hih-un; thingpel'a kithat Nazareth Jesu chu naholu ahi: ama athoudohtai; hikoma aumtapoi: alupna hi hung vetaovin." 
Mark16:7 Amavang cheovinlang aseijuite le Peter jah-a gaseijun, Aman najah uva aseibangin Galilee gam lamah namasanguva achei; chukom chu nanghon Ama namu dingu ahi, ati." 
Mark16:8 Chutichun kidang satah-in akihot hot jengun; gangtah-in ahung potdoh-un, lhanphunga kon chun ajamtaove. Akichat jeh-un, koima jah-a aseipouvin ahi." 
Mark16:9 Chuin hapta ni masapen ni jingpi-a athodoh jou chun, Magdalene Mariam, asunga kona thilha sagi anodohnu henga chun akilah masapenin ahi." 
Mark16:10 Chuin amanu chun Jesu umpiji teho, ama thi jeh-a kapkaple kingaisese teho henga chun achen agaseijin ahi." 
Mark16:11 Ahin athoudoh-in, amanu chun amui ti ajah vanguvin atahsan pouvin ahi." 
Mark16:12 Chujouvin Aman alah uva mi ni gamlam jona achena lhona limchom beh-in akimusah-in ahi. 
Mark16:13 Chuin amani ache lhonin seijui dangho agahil lhonle, amahonla amani sei jong chu anatahsan dehpouvin ahi." 
Mark16:14 Chuin chujou kitman ankong aum laitah-un, somlekhat ho hengtah-a akilah-in; athodoh kit nunga amuho thusei atahsan lou jeh-u chun, atahsan louvule alungtah-u chu asosalin ahi." 
Mark16:15 Chuin Aman ajah uva, Nangho vannoi leiset gam jouse-a cheovinlang, thilsem namkim jah-a hiche Kipana Thupha hi gahil lhang leuvin." 
Mark16:16 Atahsana baptize chang chu sohcha ding ahi; atahsan lou vang chu themmo changa umding ahi. 
Mark16:17 Chule atahsante chu melchihna hicheng hin ajuipeh dingu ahi; keima mina thilha anodoh dingu, paothah paothah-a pao dingu," 
Mark16:18 Gul akhutna adop dingu; thina thei ima donjong leu ima ti lou dingu; chule ana damlou chunga akhut angap diu, ana chu dam ding ahi, ati." 
Mark16:19 Chuin Pakai Jesu'n ajah uva chucheng asei jouvin, van'ah lahtouvin aumin, Pathen jet lamah atoutai." 
Mark16:20 Chuin amaho achedoh-un, muntin-ah ahillhang leuvin, anatohna chanuvah Pakaiyin akitho piuvin, chule melchihna-in ajuisah-in athu chu aphut detpeh-in ahi. Amen." 
Luke1:1 I-lah uva tahsan umtah-a guilhung hiche thilho chu adungjui tah-a sun dinga mi tahtah-in akhut apat tah banguvin," 
Luke1:2 Atil abula patna amit tah-a muho le athu seiphonga panghon eihil bangun," 
Luke1:3 Michung nung Theophilus, ijakai abula patna chamkim keija hetna kaneito lhonin, nangma henga adungjui tah-a hin sutding pha kasan ahi;" 
Luke1:4 Nangma nakihilsa thilho chengse chu adihtah ahi ti nahetna dingin. 
Luke1:5 Judah gam lengpa Herod lal laijin, Abia loi lah-a thempu khat amin Zachariah kiti aumin; chule a-inneipi chu Aaron chilhah ahin, amin Elizabeth ahi." 
Luke1:6 Ani lhona Pathen mitmu-a chonphatah, themona neilou Pakai thupeh jousele chonna danthu jouse jui kimkeija ahi lhone." 
Luke1:7 Hinlah Elizabeth chu achiin jeh-in cha aneilhon pon, chule ani lhonin hateh-in ateh gel lhontan ahi." 
Luke1:8 Chuin ahitin ahi, aloite aban bana akilhah dungjuija Pathen anga thempu na atoh petnin," 
Luke1:9 Thempu chonna ngaija Pakai houin'a alutchun thil namtui halding chu achang khatan ahi. 
Luke1:10 Chule thil namtui ahal pet chun mipi chu polama ataovun ahi. 
Luke1:11 Hiche pettah chun Pakai vantil khat ahengah ahung kilah in, thil namtui kihalna maicham jet lama chun ahung dingin ahi." 
Luke1:12 Zachariah'in ama chu amu phatnin, alungkhamin, chule ki jong akichan ahi." 
Luke1:13 Amavang vantil chun ama jah-a, Zachariah, kicha hih-in, nataona akisangtai; chule na-inneipi Elizabeth chun chapa khat ahin ding, chule nangman amin John nasah ding ahi." 
Luke1:13 Amavang vantil chun ama jah-a, Zachariah, kicha hih-in, nataona akisangtai; chule na-inneipi Elizabeth chun chapa khat ahin ding, chule nangman amin John nasah ding ahi." 
Luke1:14 Chule nangma dingin thanopna le hapa kipana hintin, ama pena chu mi tamtah kipah ding ahi." 
Luke1:15 Ijeh-inem itile ama chu Pakai mitmu-a lentah hiding ahin, chule ama chun lengpiga twile ju adon louhel ding ahi; chule anu oisunga auma patna Lhagao Theng dimset ding ahi." 
Luke1:16 Chule aman Israel chate tamtah a-Pakai Pathen'u henga alehei ding ahi. 
Luke1:17 Chule kigosa dema umho chu Pakaiya dinga kigotsah dinga, apate lung achate lama heija, michonpha ho chihna thua nungloute chonsah dinga, aman Elijah lhagao le thahat akena ama masang sanga che ding ahi, ati." 
Luke1:18 Chuin Zachariah'in vantil jah achun, Keila katehtan, kaji jongla atehtan, hiche thuhi iti kahet them thei dingham? tin adongin ahi." 
Luke1:19 Chuin vantil chun adonbutnin, Keima Pathen anga ding jing Gabriel chu kahi, nangma jah-a thusei dingle hiche thupha hi seipeh dinga hungkisol kahi." 
Luke1:20 Chule ven, aphatcha guilhung ding kasei thu natahsan lou jeh-a, athu guilhun ni kahse-a thusei thei louva paomo-a naum ding ahi, ati." 
Luke1:21 Chule miho chun Zachariah chu angah-un, Pathen houin sunga aum sotden chu adatmo lheh jengun ahi." 
Luke1:22 Chuin ahungdoh phatnin ajah uva thu asei theitapon ahi; hichun amahon intheng sunga mu khat anei ahi ti ahetauve; ijeh inem itile amaho chu akhutnin ahoupi thon, paolouvin aumin ahi." 
Luke1:23 Chuin athempu kin natohna nikho achai phatnin, a-in lama achetan ahi." 
Luke1:24 Hiche jou chun a-inneipi Elizabeth agaitan, chule amanu lha nga akiselin," 
Luke1:25 Aman mi lah-a mi i-sah lou kachan hi suhmangna dinga, Pakaiyin keima eivetna hitia hi eibol ahi, ati." 
Luke1:26 Chuin alha gupna-in Pathen'a konin Gabriel vantil chu Galilee gama khopi khat Nazareth atiuva chun," 
Luke1:27 David son amin Joseph kitipa jihol nungah theng khat henga akisolin; nungah theng min chu Mariam ahi. 
Luke1:28 Chuin vantil chu amanu hengah alut-in, Chibai, sah chungnungnu, Pakaiyin naumpi; numei lah-a anunnoma nahi, ati." 
Luke1:29 Chuin amanun ama amuphatnin, alunggim lheh jengin, alungthimin, Itobang phatthei bohna ahitadem, atin ahi." 
Luke1:30 Chuin vantil chun amanu jah-a, Kicha hih-in, Mariam, ijeh-inem itile Pathen lungdeilam nahi." 
Luke1:31 Chule ven, gaijin natin, chapa khat nahin ding, chule amin JESU nasah ding ahi." 
Luke1:32 Ama chu hung len ding, chule Chungnung pen Chapa kiti ding ahi: chule Pakai Pathen'in ama chu apu David laltouna apeh ding ahi." 
Luke1:33 Ama Jacob sonho chunga leng changa, atonsot atonsot geija vai apoh ding, agamin itihchan hijongle kichaitih anei lou ding ahi, ati." 
Luke1:34 Chuin Mariam'in vantil jah-a chun, Hichu iti hi dingham, Pasal la kaneipon? ati." 
Luke1:35 Chuin vantil chun adonbutnin, ajah-a, Lhagao Theng nachungah hung chuntin, chule Chungnung pen thilbol theinan nahin lekhu ding ahi: chule hiche jeh-a chu ahung peng ding athenga chu Pathen Chapa kiti ding ahi."
