Luke1:36 Chule, ven, nasopinu Elizabeth'in jong ateh nungin chapa khat avoptai; achinga aseinu-u chu agaijin, tun lha gup ahitai." 
Luke1:37 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen na dinga ahitheilou imacha umlou ding ahi, ati." 
Luke1:38 Hichun Mariam'in, Ven, keima Pakai sohnu kahi, kachungah nasei bangbang chun lhunghen, ati. Chuphatnin vantil chu amanu koma konin achemang tan ahi." 
Luke1:39 Hiche jou chun Mariam akipatnin, thinglhang gama Juda khopi khatnah acheloitan ahi." 
Luke1:40 Chuin Zachariah in'a alutnin, Elizabeth chibai aboh tan ahi." 
Luke1:41 Chuin ahitin ahi, Elizabet'in Mariam'in achibai boh ajah phatnin, a-oi sunga naocha chu ahung kichomin, chule Elizabeth amatah Lhagao Theng adimin;" 
Luke1:42 Chule aw sangtah-in asamin, Numei lah-a nunnoma nahin, nalai gil ga jong nunnoma ahi." 
Luke1:43 Chule ka pakai nu kahenga ahung hi, hoilam ipi thu hitam?" 
Luke1:44 Ijeh-inem itile ven, nei chibai boh aw gin kanakhangin ajahjah-in, ka-oi sunga naocha athanomin ahung kichomin ahi." 
Luke1:45 Chule atahsan nu chu anunnom ahi; ijeh inem itile Pakaiyin ajah-a thu asei chengse chu hung guilhun ding ahi, ati." 
Luke1:46 Chuin Mariam'in, Kalungin Pakai achoi-anin," 
Luke1:47 Chule kalhagao jong eihuh hinga Pathen'ah akipah-in ahi. 
Luke1:48 Ijeh-inem itile aman asohnu dinmun nemcha hi akhohsah-in; Hijeh chun vetan, tu-a lhah-a akhang akhanga mi jousen anunnom eiti dingu ahi." 
Luke1:49 Ijeh-inem itile Hatchung nungin keima thil loupitah eibol pehtan; Amin jong athenge. 
Luke1:50 Chule Ama gingte chunga akhang akhangin Alungset aumpeh jinge. 
Luke1:51 Aman abanin athahatje avetsahtan; Aman ama lungela kiletsah hoithoteho asuchehtai. 
Luke1:52 Aman ahat apaoho atouna mun uva kon in asonlhan, namchom chagate atungdohtai." 
Luke1:53 Agilkelteho thil phaphan avahvan, mihaote ho khut gohkeovin asolmangtai." 
Luke1:54 Alungsetje chu ahetdoh jingnan, asoh Israel akithopin," 
Luke1:55 Tonsotna dingin Ipu ipateu Abraham, chule achilhahte henga athutep bang chun, ati." 
Luke1:56 Chuin Mariam amanu koma chun lha thum jen aumin, a-in lamah akiletan ahi." 
Luke1:57 Chuin Elizabeth aso phat ahung lhingtan ahile, chapa khat ahingin ahi." 
Luke1:58 Chuin a-inhengho le a-inkoho chengsen Pakaiyin aha lungset behseh jeng chu ajah phatnun, amanu chu akipa athanop piuvin ahi." 
Luke1:59 Chuin ani get nin naosen cheptan ding chun ahungun; amaho chun apa min bangin Zachariah sah dingin agouvin ahi. 
Luke1:60 Ahin naosen nu chun, Ahipoi, naosen min hi John sah ding ahi, tin amaho jah-a aseijin ahi." 
Luke1:60 Ahin naosen nu chun, Ahipoi, naosen min hi John sah ding ahi, tin amaho jah-a aseijin ahi." 
Luke1:61 Chuin amahon, Naphung lah uva koima min chutobang um louva, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke1:62 Chuphatnin amahon, Amin ipi nasah nom em tin mit heijin apa adongun ahi." 
Luke1:63 Chuin aman lekhasutna pheng athumin, Amin John ahi, tin asuntan ahi. Hichun ami jouse chun adatmo lheh jengun ahi." 
Luke1:63 Chuin aman lekhasutna pheng athumin, Amin John ahi, tin asuntan ahi. Hichun ami jouse chun adatmo lheh jengun ahi." 
Luke1:64 Chuin chupettah chun akam akihongin, alei akilhamin, Pathen avahchoi tan ahi." 
Luke1:65 Hichun akimvela cheng chengse chungah kichat achutan, chule Juda gam thinglhang jouse-ah hicheng thusoh thu chu akiseithang tan ahi." 
Luke1:66 Chule aja jousen hichu alungin aching cheh-un, Hiche chapang hi ipi ahungsoh tadem! atiuvin ahi. Chule Pakai khutnin ama aumpin ahi." 
Luke1:67 Chule apa Zachariah chu Lhagao Theng adimsetnin, gaothu aseijin, hitin ahi;" 
Luke1:68 Pakai Israel Pathen chu vahchoijin umhen; Ijeh-inem itile Aman amite avilin, alhatdoh tan," 
Luke1:69 Chule asoh David insung mite lah-a, Eiho dingin huhhingna ki khat eitun dohpeh taove;" 
Luke1:70 Leiset kisemtila pat Aman athemgao thengho kama anasei bangin; 
Luke1:71 Imelma teova konle, eihoteu khutna kona huhdoh-a i-um theina diuvin;" 
Luke1:72 Iputeu ipateu henga anatep akhotona chu tohdohna dingle, akitepna theng chu geldoh nadingin;" 
Luke1:73 Ipuluiju Abraham jah-a akihahselna bangtah-in," 
Luke1:74 Igalteu khutna kona huhdoh-a i-umuto lhona, kichalou hela ama kin iboluva," 
Luke1:75 Thengtah le chonphatah-a, Ihinlai sungseuva a-angsunga akin ibolna diuvin." 
Luke1:76 Chule nangma, naosen, chungnung pen themgao kiti ding nahi; ajeh chu alampi sem dinga nangma Pakai masang sanga che ding nahin;" 
Luke1:77 achonsetnao suhbeija auma kona, amite chu huhhingna hetna pedingin," 
Luke1:78 I-Pathen'u nemheuva mikhotona vangin, chungnunga kona nisa soh chun ihungvil taovin;" 
Luke1:79 Muthim le thina lima touho salvah dingle, Ikengu lungmonna lampia chesah dingin, ati." 
Luke1:80 Chuin chapang chu ahung seilenin, lhagaova hattah ahitan; chule Israelte henga akiphondoh ni gei chun gamthipmah aumin ahi." 
Luke2:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche nikholai chun Caesar Augustus'in leiset chunga cheng jouse min sut ding thu apen ahi." 
Luke2:2 Hichu Syria gama Cyrenius gamvaipo ahilaija min kisutna amasapen ahi. 
Luke2:3 Hichun mi jouse chu amin sun dingin ama ama khopi cheh-a acheuvin ahi. 
Luke2:4 Chule Joseph jong chu David inko le aphung ahi jeh chun, Galilee gama Nazareth kho-a konin, Juda gama David khopi Bethlehem atiuva chun," 
Luke2:5 Ajihol Mariam gaihamset chutoh amin sun dingin achetan ahi. 
Luke2:6 Chuin amani chukoma aumpet lhonin, Mariam aso phat alhingtan ahi." 
Luke2:7 Hichun achapa masapen ahingin; chuin ponin ajelin, jinlhun ina mun a-on lou jeh chun, gan ankong sunga alupsahtan ahi." 
Luke2:8 Chule hiche gama chun lou jaova tol lhanga geh kelngoi chingho aumun, jan-in akelngoi honu angah-un ahi." 
Luke2:9 Chuin, veuvin, Pakai vantil khat akomuvah ahung dingin, chule Pakai loupi chun akimvelu asalvah jengtan ahi: hichun amaho akichatangei jengun ahi." 
Luke2:10 Chuin vantil chun ajah uva, Kicha hih-un, ijeh-inem itile, veuvin, keiman mijouse-a dinga hachangpa kipana thupha chu nangho kahin pohpeh nahiuve." 
Luke2:11 Ajeh chu tunin nangho dingin David khopi-ah Huhhing-a khat apengtai, ama chu Pakai Christa ahi." 
Luke2:12 Chule hiche hi nangho dinga amelchihna ding ahi: Nanghon naosen pona kijela gan ankong sunga lum nagamu dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke2:13 Chuin phulou helouvin vantil chutoh vanmi janel honpi ahung umun, Pathen avahchoijun," 
Luke2:14 Chungnung pena Pathen loupi hen, chule leichunga miholah-a chamna le alunglhaina umhen, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke2:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, vantil ho chu amaho koma kona van'a achemang phatnun, kelngoi chingho chun, Cheovin, Bethlehem'a cheohitin, tu-a Pakaiyin eihetsah-u thusoh hi gaveo hite, akitiuvin ahi." 
Luke2:16 Chuin amaho acheloijun ahile, Mariam le Joseph toh gan ankong sunga lum naosen chu agamudoh taovin ahi." 
Luke2:17 Chuin hichu amu phatnun, hiche naosen thudol ajah uva kisei chu ahetsah sonle taovin ahi." 
Luke2:18 Chuin ajah uva kelngoi chingho thusei chu ajapha jousen kidang asauvin ahi. 
Luke2:19 Mariam vang chun thu kisei jouse chu alungin angaiton, aching jingin ahi." 
Luke2:20 Chuin kelngoi chingho chun ajah uva kisei bang banga thil amu chengseu le athil jah chengseu jal chun, Pathen choi-at le vahchoi tothon akiletaove." 
Luke2:21 Chuin ani get nin cheptan ding nikho alhingtan, amin Jesu asahtaove, hichu naobu-a aum masanga vantil chun asahsa ahi." 
Luke2:22 Chuin Mosi thupeh dungjuija akisuhtheng nikho alhin phatnin, ama chu Pakai henga peh dingin Jerusalem'a ahin puijun," 
Luke2:23 (Pakai danthu bu-a, Naobu phukeh-a hung pengdoh pasal jouse chu, Pakaiya dinga atheng kiti ding ahi; ati banga chu;)" 
Luke2:24 Chule Pakai danthua, vakhu kop khat hijongle vapal nou ni hijongle tia kisei bangin, ganlhaina toh dingin ahungun ahi." 
Luke2:25 Chuin, veuvin, Jerusalem'a chun amin Simeon kiti mi khat aumin; amapa chu chonpha tahle Pathen ngaisahtah, Israelte lungmon nading chu ngah jinga ahin; achunga Lhagao Theng uma ahi." 
Luke2:26 Chule Pakai thaonu Christa chu amu masanga ama athi lou ding chu, Lhagao Thengin ahetsah-a aphondoh ahi." 
Luke2:27 Chuin ama chun Lhagao puijin houin sunga chun ahung lutnin; chuin achung changa chonna dan ngaija bol dinga anule apan naosen Jesu chu apui phatnun," 
Luke2:28 Amapan naosen chu akhutnin alan, chule Pathen avahchoijin," 
Luke2:29 Pakai, tun nangma thu dungjuija Nasoh hi lungmonga neilhahdoh ahi." 
Luke2:30 Ijeh-inem itile nami huhhingna kamit nin amutai," 
Luke2:31 Miho jouse mitmu-a Nangman nagot 
Luke2:32 Chidang namdangte henga vah kilangdoh dingle, Nami Israelte loupina ding chu, ati." 
Luke2:33 Chuin naosen umchan ding thudol kisei chu anu le Joseph'in kidang asa lheh lhonin ahi. 
Luke2:34 Chuin Simeon chun phatthei achunguva aboh-in, anu Mariam jah-a, Ven, hiche chapang hi Israelte lah-a mi tamtah lhuhna le dindohna hung hiding, chule seiset kihetna melchih na-a kitung ahi." 
Luke2:35 Henge, mi tamtah lunggel kiphon dohna dinga, nangma lung jong chemjamin asutpai ding ahi, ati." 
Luke2:36 Chule Asher phung mi Phanuel chanu Hanna kiti themgao numei khat aumin, amanu chu hatah-a teh ahitan, anungah jineija patna ajitoh kum sagi chengkhom ahin," 
Luke2:37 Chule amanu chu kum somget le kumli geija meithaija uma ahin, amanu chu houin'a kona potdoh louhela, an ngol le taona puma Pathen houva asun ajana um ahi." 
Luke2:38 Chuin hiche nidan tah chun ahungin Pathen athangvah-in, Jerusalem lhatdoh ding kat jinga umteho jouse jah-a chun Jesu umchan thu aseijin ahi." 
Luke2:39 Chuin Pakai danthu dungjuija thil abol chaisoh phatnun, Galilee gama akhopiu Nazareth kho-a akilekit taovin ahi." 
Luke2:40 Chuin chapang chu akhangin, chule lhagaovin ahatdoh-in, chihna adimset tan; chule Pathen lungsetna achunga aumtan ahi." 
Luke2:41 Chuin anule apa chu kumseh-in kalchuh kut tengle Jerusalem'a acheji lhonin ahi. 
Luke2:42 Chuin ama kum somle kum ni ahi-in, kalchuh kut chonna ngaijin Jerusalem'a achetouvun;" 
Luke2:43 Chuin kut achaijuva akile kit phatnun chapang Jesu anunguvah Jerusalem'ah aumdentan; chule hichu anule Joseph'in ahelhon hih-in; 
Luke2:44 Mihon lah-a chu uma ahi tin angaito lhonin, ni khat lam achetauvin; chuin amanin a-inkoteho le akihetpiho lah ahol lhonin ahi." 
Luke2:45 Chuin amudoh lhonlou phatnin, Jerusalem lamah akile kit lhonin, aholpeh lhontan ahi." 
Luke2:46 Chuin ahitin ahi, ni thum jouvin ama chu houin sungah agamudoh lhonin, houhil ho lah-a anatouvin, thu anangaijin dong jong ana dongin;" 
Luke2:47 Chule athu jachan chun ahetjele athu donbut chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi. 
Luke2:48 Chuin amu phat lhonin alungdongleu lhonin; chuin anun ajah-a, Chapa, ibola neihiti bol lhonham? Vetan napale keiman lungdong tah-in kahol lhone, ati." 
Luke2:49 Chuin aman amani jah-a, Ibola neihol lhonham? Keima ka-Pa in'a akin bola umding mong kahi helhon lou nahim? ati." 
Luke2:50 Ahin ajah uva athusei chu amahon ipi kiseina ham ahepouvin ahi. 
Luke2:51 Chuin amanitoh alhonin, Nazareth kho-ah achesuh-un; athu thu lhonin anungin; chule anun hicheng thu kisei jouse chu alungin achingtan ahi." 
Luke2:52 Chuin Jesu chihna le tahsa-a akhangtou touvin; chule Pathen le mihem deisah-in aumtan ahi. 
Luke3:1 Chuin Tiberius Caesar lengchan kal kum somle ngana-in, Pontius Pilate Juda gamvaipo ahia, chule Herod Galilee gam vaipo ahia, asopipa Philip Ituria le Trachonitis gamkai vaipo ahia, chule Lysanias Abilene gam vaipo ahi lai," 
Luke3:2 Anna le Caiaphas thempulen ahilhon laijin, Pathen thu chu gamthipma Zachariah chapa John hengah ahung lhungtan ahi." 
Luke3:2 Anna le Caiaphas thempulen ahilhon laijin, Pathen thu chu gamthipma Zachariah chapa John hengah ahung lhungtan ahi." 
Luke3:3 Chuin ama chu Jordan luipang jui kimvela gam jouse-a ahungin, chonset suhbeina dinga lungheija baptize chan thu alhangsam len;" 
Luke3:4 Isaiah themgao lekhabua kisunbang chun, Gamthipma khosam aw khatnin, Pakai lamlen semtohsan koijun, alampi semjangun." 
Luke3:5 Damkom chengse kidip chama, molsang jousele lhang jouse kisunem ding; chule lamkon chu kisujanga, aphon nachu kisunam ding;" 
Luke3:6 Chule mi jousen Pathen mi huhhingna amu ding ahi. 
Luke3:7 Hiti chun aman, ama khutna baptize chang dinga ahenga hunga mihonpi jah-a chun, Vo gulse sonho, khonunga lunghan hung lhung dinga kona jam ding lungthim koiham napeuvah?" 
Luke3:8 Hiche jeh chun lungheitoh kilomin gadoh-un; chule nalah uva, Abraham kapu luiju aumnai titahih-un; ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Pathen'in hiche songho-a kona hi Abraham son asodoh sah thei ahi." 
Luke3:9 Chule tu jeng jongin thing bultinah heicha kikoija ahitai; chutiachu thingphung aga phalou chengse chu kiphuh lhu-a, meija kisep lutji ahi, ati." 
Luke3:10 Chuin mihonpi chun, Achutile keihon ipi kabol dinguham? tin ama adongui." 
Luke3:11 Chuin aman adonbutnin, amaho jah-a, Sangkhol ni neijan anei louva chu kihoppi hen; chule anneh neijan jong chutima chun bolhen, ati." 
Luke3:12 Chuin kaidongho jong chu baptize chang dingin ahenga ahungun ajah-a, Mihil, keihonla ipi kabol dinguham? atiuve." 
Luke3:13 Aman amaho jah-a, Nanghon nakiteppeh kalvalun mi-a lahbe hih-un, ati." 
Luke3:14 Sepaiho injong adongun, Keihon jong ipi kabol dinguham? atiuvin. Aman amaho jah-a, Alam louvin koimacha acham louvin lahpeh hih-un; jouvin jong mi heh hih-un; chule nalo jat jat uvah lung lhaijun." 
Luke3:15 Chuin mihon agaldot jingu ahito lhona, Hiche John hi Christa ahi khat tadem, tia lungthima angaito laitah-un," 
Luke3:15 Chuin mihon agaldot jingu ahito lhona, Hiche John hi Christa ahi khat tadem, tia lungthima angaito laitah-un," 
Luke3:16 John'in adonbutnin, abonchauva jah-a, Keima vangin twija baptize kachansah nahiuve; ahivangin keima sanga hat chungnungjo ahunge, keima akeng chot khao sutlham dinga jong kilom kahipoi; amatah chun nangho Lhagao Thenga le meija baptize nachansah dingu ahi." 
Luke3:16 John'in adonbutnin, abonchauva jah-a, Keima vangin twija baptize kachansah nahiuve; ahivangin keima sanga hat chungnungjo ahunge, keima akeng chot khao sutlham dinga jong kilom kahipoi; amatah chun nangho Lhagao Thenga le meija baptize nachansah dingu ahi." 
Luke3:17 Aman akhutna godal akichoijin, aphol ajapngim sela, chule achang pang sunga akhum ding; asi vang chu mit theilou meija agovam ding ahi, ati." 
Luke3:18 Hiti chun aman tilkhouna thudang tamtah aseijin, amaho jah-a chun Kipana Thupha ahil lhanglen ahi." 
Luke3:19 Ahin John'in Herod lengpa chu asopipa Philip inneipi Herodia jal leh athilbol phalouho jala apho jeh-in," 
Luke3:19 Ahin John'in Herod lengpa chu asopipa Philip inneipi Herodia jal leh athilbol phalouho jala apho jeh-in," 
Luke3:20 John chu songkul'a akhumin, chonset chunga chonset abolbetai." 
Luke3:20 John chu songkul'a akhumin, chonset chunga chonset abolbetai." 
Luke3:21 Chuin ahitin ahi, miho jouse baptize achanuva, Jesu jong baptize achan jouvin, ataovin ahile van akihongin," 
Luke3:22 Chule Lhagao Theng tahsa vouvin vakhu bangin ahung kumlhan achunga achun, chule van'a konin aw ahung gingin, Nangma ka-Chapa deitah nahi; nachungah kalung alhai tangeije, ati." 
Luke3:23 Jesu amihil kipat chun ama kum somthum vel alhingin, mi ngaiton ama chu Joseph chapa ahin, Joseph chu Heli chapa ahin," 
Luke3:24 Heli chu Matthat chapa ahin, Matthat chu Levi chapa ahin, Levi chu Melchi chapa ahin, Melchi chu Janna chapa ahin, Janna chu Joseph chapa ahin," 
Luke3:25 Joseph chu Mattathias chapa ahin, Mattathias chu Amos chapa ahin, Amos chu Nahum chapa ahin, Nahum chu Esli chapa ahin, Esli chu Nagge chapa ahin," 
Luke3:26 Nagge chu Maath chapa ahin, Maath chu Mattathias chapa ahin, Mattathia chu Semei chapa ahin, Semei chu Joseph chapa ahin, Joseph chu Juda chapa ahin," 
Luke3:27 Juda chu Joanna chapa ahin, Joanna chu Rhesa chapa ahin, Rhesa chu Zerubbabel chapa ahin, Zerubbabel chu Shealtiel chapa ahin, Shealtiel chu Neri chapa ahin," 
Luke3:28 Neri chu Melchi chapa ahin, Melchi chu Addi chapa ahin, Addi chu Cosam chapa ahin, Cosam chu Elmodam chapa ahin, Elmodam chu Er chapa ahin," 
Luke3:29 Er chu Jose chapa ahin, Jose chu Eleazer chapa ahin, Eleazer chu Jorim chapa ahin, Jorim chu Matthat chapa ahin, Matthat chu Levi chapa ahin," 
Luke3:30 Levi chu Simeon chapa ahin, Simeon chu Juda chapa ahin, Juda chu Joseph chapa ahin, Joseph chu Jonam chapa ahin, Jonam chu Eliakim chapa ahin," 
Luke3:31 Eliakim chu Melea chapa ahin, Melea chu Mennan chapa ahin, Mennan chu Mattatha chapa ahin, Mattatha chu Nathan chapa ahin, Nathan chu David chapa ahin," 
Luke3:32 David chu Jesse chapa ahin, Jesse chu Obed chapa ahin, Obed chu Boaz chapa ahin, Boaz chun Salmon chapa ahin, Salmon chu Nahson chapa ahin," 
Luke3:33 Nahson chu Aminadab chapa ahin, Aminadab chu Aram chapa ahin, Aram chu Hezron chapa ahin, Hezron chu Peres chapa ahin, Peres chu Judah chapa ahin," 
Luke3:34 Judah chu Jacob chapa ahin, Jacob chu Isaac chapa ahin, Isaac chu Abraham chapa ahin, Abraham chu Terah chapa ahin, Terah chun Nahor chapa ahin," 
Luke3:35 Nahor chun Seruch chapa ahin, Seruch chu Reu chapa ahin, Reu chu Peleg chapa ahin, Peleg chun Eber chapa ahin, Eber chu Shelah chapa ahin," 
Luke3:36 Shela chu Cainan chapa ahin, Cainan chu Arphaxad chapa ahin, Arphaxad chu Shem chapa ahin, Shem chu Noah chapa ahin, Noah chu Lamech chapa ahin," 
Luke3:37 Lamech chu Mathusala chapa ahin, Mathusala chu Enoch chapa ahin, Enoch chu Jared chapa ahin, Jared chu Mahalalel chapa ahin, Mahalalel chu Cainan chapa ahin," 
Luke3:38 Cainan chu Enos chapa ahin, Enos chu Seth chapa ahin, Seth chu Adam chapa ahin, Adam chu Pathen chapa ahi." 
Luke4:1 Chuin Jesu Lhagao Theng dimsetnin Jordan'a konin akilen, chule Lhagaovin gamthipmah apuijin," 
Luke4:2 Nisomli diabol lhep patepmin aumin ahi. Chule hiche phat sunga chu imacha ne lou ahin; chule chuche alhin phatnin agil akeltan ahi. 
Luke4:3 Hichun diabol'in ajah-a, Nangma Pathen Chapa nahile, hiche song hi changlhah asona dingin thu pen, ati." 
Luke4:4 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah-a, hitin akisune, mihem changlhah jenga hing louding ahi, Pathen thu chengsea joh hingding ahi, ati." 
Luke4:5 Chuin diabol'in molsang tah chunga apuitouvin, mitphet kah louvin vannoi leiset gam jouse avetsahtan ahi." 
Luke4:6 Chuin diabol chun ajah-a, hicheng jouse chunga thuneina le aloupina nangma penge; ijeh-inem itile keima eikipedoh-a ahitan; kapeh nomnom kapeh ahi." 
Luke4:7 Hijeh chun neihouva ahile aboncha nanga hi ding ahi, ati." 
Luke4:8 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah-a, kanunglama chen, Satan: ijeh-inem itile, hitin akisune, nangman napakai, na-Pathen chu houvinlang ama jengbou jennin, ati." 
Luke4:9 Chuin Jerusalem'a apuijin chule houin tingvuma adinsah-in; chuin ajah-a, Pathen Chapa nahile, hichea konhin nangma kichomlha jengin." 
Luke4:10 Ijeh-inem itile, Aman nangma chungchanga avantilho nachang dingin thu pentin," 
Luke4:11 Chule amahon akhutnuva nadop dingu ahi, achutiloule songah nakeng kisuh khah-in nate, tin akisune ati." 
Luke4:12 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah-a, Nangman Pakai na-Pathen chu lhem patep hih-in, tin akiseije, ati." 
Luke4:13 Chuin diabol'in alhep patepna chengse achaisoh phatnin, chomkhat dingin ama chu adalhatan ahi." 
Luke4:14 Chuin Jesu Lhagao thahatnin Galilee'a akilekit tan; hichun akimvel gamtina chun athu akithangtan ahi. 
Luke4:15 Chuin akikhopnao in tinah ahillen, mi jouse pachat-in aumtan ahi." 
Luke4:16 Chuin aseilet dohna Nazareth kho-a ahungin; chuin achon ngaibangin cholngah nin kikhopna in'ah alutnin, sim dingin adingtan ahi." 
Luke4:17 Chuin Isaiah themgao lekhabu apeuvin ahi. Chuin aman lekhabu chu aphongin ahile, hitia kisun laitah amudoh-in ahi:" 
Luke4:18 Pakai Lhagao chu kachunga aume, ajehchu aman keima mivaichaho jah-a kipana Thupha hillhang ding, alung naho damsah ding, sohchangho jah-a lhadohna thu phongdoh ding, mitcho ho khomusah dinga, suhnemna umho lhadoh dinga," 
Luke4:19 Pakai lahthei kum seiphong dinga, thao einu ahi." 
Luke4:20 Chuin aman lekhabu chu akhupmin, lhachale khutna ape kitnin, atoutan ahi. Hichun kikhopna in'a mi jousen ama jeng amit lhuh chehtauvin ahi." 
Luke4:21 Chuin ajah uva, Hiche Pathen lekhabu thuhi tuni hin nanakhang sunguvah aguilhung tai, tin asei pantan ahi." 
Luke4:22 Hichun abonchauvin ama chu aseiphaovin, chule akam sunga soh lungsetna thu chu kidang asa lheh jengun; Hiche hi Joseph chapa hilouham? atiuvin ahi." 
Luke4:23 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Nanghon, Louthem nangma kiboldamin: Capernaum'a nathilbol kajah chengseu chu hikomah nangma gama jong hin bolin, ti thuchih hi kajah-a nasei tei dingu hina hi, ati." 
Luke4:24 Chuin aman aseikitnin, Tahbeh-a najah uva kasei ahi, Themgao koima ama gam sungah min ajop ngaipoi." 
Luke4:25 Ahivangin tahbeh-a najah uva kasei ahi, Elijah nikho laija van akikha-a, kum thumle lha gup gam jouse-a kel alhah chun, Israel lah-a meithai tamtah aumin ahi;" 
Luke4:26 Ahin adang koima henga Elijah kisol louvin, Sidon gama Zerapath kho-a meithainu henga akisol bouvin ahi." 
Luke4:27 Chule Elisha'n themgao phatlai chun, Israel lah-a aphah tamtah aum nan; ahinla Syria mi Naaman tilou, adang koima kiboldamtheng aumpoi, ati." 
Luke4:28 Chuin amahon thu chucheng ajah phatnun, kikhopna in sunga mi jouse chu alunghang behseh jengun," 
Luke4:29 Akipat doh-un, khosunga kon chun asondoh-un, abungbua sotlhah dingin akho chennao koldeh lama chun apuitaovin ahi." 
Luke4:30 Ahivangin akah uva akihehdoh-in achemang tan ahi. 
Luke4:31 Chuin ama Galilee gama khopi khat Capernaum'a achesuh-in, chule cholngah nin miho ahiltan ahi." 
Luke4:32 Chule thunei tah-a thu asei jeh chun, athuhil chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi." 
Luke4:33 Chuin kikhopna in'a chun lhagao boh vop mikhat aumin; chuin ama chun aw sangtah-in asamin," 
Luke4:34 Neidalhao vin! Vo Nazareth Jesu, nangle keiho ikimatnao i-um em? Eisumang uva hunga nahim? Nangma koi nahi kahenai; Pathen Mitheng chu nahi, ati." 
Luke4:35 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu aphoh-in, Thipmin, ama-a kon chun hung doh-in, ati. Chuin thilha chun ama chu alaijuvah ahehlhun, suna louvin asunga konin ahung potdoh tan ahi." 
Luke4:36 Hichun abonchauvin kidang asa lheh jengun, amahole amaho akihouvun, hiche hi ipi thuham? Ijeh-inem itile thuneitah le thahat tah-a lhagao bohho thu apehle, amaho ahung potdoh jenguve, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke4:37 Chuin chuche vel gama khotinah athu athangtan ahi. 
Luke4:38 Chuin akipatnin, kikhopna ina kon chun apotnin, Simon in'a aluttai. Chuin Simon nupanu chu hatah-a khosih-a na ahin; amanu ding chun athumpeh taovin ahi." 
Luke4:39 Chuin ama akomah adingin, akhosih chu aphoh-in ahile, alhatan ahi. Chuin amanu athoudoh paijenin, amaho jenlen apangtan ahi." 
Luke4:40 Chuin nisalhum konin, hivei chomchom veija ana damlou neiho chun amaho chu akoma ahin puijun; chule aman achung cheh uva akhut angamin, aboldam gamtan ahi." 
Luke4:41 Chule thilhaho jong chu mi tamtah-a konin apotdoh-un, Nangma Pathen Chapa Christa nahi, tin asamun ahi. Chuin aman amaho chu aphoh thipmin, amahon ama Christa ahi chu ahet jeh-un, thu aseisah tapon ahi." 
Luke4:42 Chuin kho avah, phatnin apotdoh-in gamthip munah achetan; chule mipi chun aholun, ahenga chun ahungun, amaho adalhah louna dingin alho taovin ahi." 
Luke4:43 Ahivangin aman amaho jah-a, Keiman kho dang danga jong Pathen lenggam Kipana Thupha kahil lhangle ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche dinga chu hinkisol kahi, ati." 
Luke4:44 Hichun Galilee gama kikhopna in tinah thu ahilhanglen ahi. 
Luke5:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, mipin Pathen thu ngaidinga aneh chinto jeh-un, ama Genesaret dillen panga adingin ahi." 
Luke5:2 Hichun aman dillen vaokama chun kong ni amun; ahivangin nga manho chu anapotdoh uva, alennu anasopmu ahi." 
Luke5:3 Chuin ama Simon kong joh-a chun alutnin, kong chu vaokama kona themkhat atollut din asolin, chuin atouvin, kong'a chun apangin mipi chu thu ahiltan ahi." 
Luke5:4 Chuin athusei angah phatnin Simon jah-a, lithuhlam jonin, nga man dingin nalen seplhan, ati." 
Luke5:5 Chuin Simon'in adonbutnin, Pipu, jan khovah keijin kabolun, imacha man louhel kahiuve; ahivangin nangma thusah-in len gahsep lhange, ati." 
Luke5:6 Chuin chutia abol phat chun, nga atama tam akhukha taovin; alennu chu akeh jengin ahi." 
Luke5:7 Chuin amahon kong choma um akikoppiho chu hunga ahung hu dingun agahjap taovin ahi. Chuin ahungun akong nin asung dimun ahile alhalut dehdeh jengin ahi. 
Luke5:8 Ahin Simon Peter'in hichu amun, Jesu khophang bula aboh khupmin, Vo Pakai, kakoma konin chedoh-in; ijeh-inem itile keima mi chonse kahi, ati." 
Luke5:9 Hiche anga matnu chu amale aloiten kidang asah behseh jeh-u ahi; 
Luke5:10 Chule Simon kikoppi Zebedai chapate ni Jacob le John jong chun kidang asa lhonin ahi. Chuin Jesu'n Simon jah-a, Kicha hih-in; tua pat mihem mana napan ding ahitai, ati." 
Luke5:10 Chule Simon kikoppi Zebedai chapate ni Jacob le John jong chun kidang asa lhonin ahi. Chuin Jesu'n Simon jah-a, Kicha hih-in; tua pat mihem mana napan ding ahitai, ati." 
Luke5:11 Chuin amahon akongu vaokama ahintoldoh phatnun, abonchan adalhauvin anung ajuitaovin ahi." 
Luke5:12 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama khopi khatna aumpetnin, veuvin, mi khat apumchanga phah aumin; chuin Jesu amu phatnin tolla aboh khupmin, Pakai, nalung ahile neidam thengsah thei ahi, tin ataotan ahi." 
Luke5:13 Chuin aman akhut alhangin, athamin, Kalung ahi, damthengtan, ati. Chupettah chun aphah chu apha paihel jengtan ahi." 
Luke5:14 Chuin aman koima jah-a asei louna dingin akhamchah-in, Chenlang thempu gakimusah-in, chule nakibol damtheng thu dol chu amaho hettohsahnan, Mosi thupeh dungjuijin thilpeh ding dol chu gapetan, ati." 
Luke5:15 Achuti jeng vangin ama thu dol akithang chehjengin; mipi atama tam athu ngai dingle anat kiboldam dingin ahung kikhomun ahi. 
Luke5:16 Ahin ama chang gamthip muntin-ah achomin achedoh-in, agataovin ahi." 
Luke5:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, hichelai chun nikhat thu ahil petnin, Galilee gama khoho le Juda gama khoho-a kon, chule Jerusalem'a kona hung Pharisai ho le danthu hilteho chu akoma atouvun ahi; chule mi boldam dingin Pakai thilboltheina chun ama aumpi ahi." 
Luke5:18 Chuin veuvin, mihon mi langthi khat ajalkhun pumin ahinpuvin; amahon ama chu put lutna, a-anga koi dingin agouvin ahi." 
Luke5:19 Chuin mipi jeh-a aput lutna ding kom amu lou phatnun, in chunga akaldoh-un, in chungkhu chehpheng vangkah-a chun alupna pumin alailunguva Jesu ang sungah agah khailhauvin ahi." 
Luke5:20 Chuin atahsanjeu chu amun, aman, Mipa nachonset naho kingaidam nahitai, ati." 
Luke5:21 Chuin danthu sunhole Pharisai hon, Taitomna thuseipa hi hoi koiham? Pathen tailou chonset ngaidam thei koiham? tin agel pantaovin ahi." 
Luke5:22 Ahin agelu chu Jesu'n ahen, adonbutnin, ajah uva, Nalunguva ipi nagelu ham?" 
Luke5:23 Nachonset naho kingaidama ahitai kitile, Thouvin lamjotnin ti hoijoh seibai jo-am?" 
Luke5:24 Ahoi hita jongle leiset chungah Mihem Chapan chonset ngaidamna thahat aneije ti nahetna dingun,(langthipa jah-a chun,) Thou vin; nalupna kilah inlang, na-in'a chetan kati nahi, ati." 
Luke5:25 Chuin hiche pettah chun ama a-angsung uva athoudoh paijin, alupna chu akilah-in, Pathen vahchoi pumin a-in lama achetan ahi." 
Luke5:26 Hichun kidang asa lheh jengun, Pathen avahchoijun, Tunin thil kidangtah imuve, atiuvin akicha behseh jengtaovin ahi." 
Luke5:27 Chuin hiche jou chun ama apotdoh-in ahile, amin Levi atiu kaidong khat, kaidonna mun'a atou amun, ajah-a, Kanung hinjuijin, ati." 
Luke5:28 Chuin aman ijakai adalhan akipatdoh-in ajuitan ahi. 
Luke5:29 Chuin Levi chun ama vahnan a-in'ah golvah loupitah abolin; chule hia chun kaidongho le midang tamtah-in amaho chu ankong aumpiuvin ahi. 
Luke5:30 Chuin Pharisai ho le alekha sunteu aseijuiteho chunga aphunun, Ibola kaidongho le chonse hotoh nanehkhom nadon khomuham? atitaove." 
Luke5:31 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, Ati damten louthem angaipouve; a damlouten bou angaijui." 
Luke5:32 Michonpha te kou-a hung kahipoi; alung heina dinguva michonse te kou-a hungjoh kahibouve, ati." 
Luke5:33 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Ipidinga John seijuiten an angol matchet jiuva, tao jong taojiuva chule Pharisai hon jong chuti boljiuva, nangma nungjui hon aneh uva adonjiu ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Luke5:33 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Ipidinga John seijuiten an angol matchet jiuva, tao jong taojiuva chule Pharisai hon jong chuti boljiuva, nangma nungjui hon aneh uva adonjiu ham? atiuvin ahi." 
Luke5:34 Chuin Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Moulang chun aumpi laiseuva, aloite chu an na ngolsah thei ngaijum?" 
Luke5:35 Amavang moulang chu akomuva kona akipuimang ni hung lhung ding ahi, chuche nile an angol dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke5:36 Chuin aman ajah uva thulem khatma aseijin, Koiman ponthah halchu ponluija abeh ngaipoi; chuti bolle athah chun asuhset ding; chule athah-a kona alah ahal jong chu alui chutoh kitoh lou ding ahi." 
Luke5:37 Chule koiman lengpitwi thah savun peng luija akhum ngaipoi; ichuti bolle, atwi thah chun apeng chu tumkeh intin, atwi jong long jalintin, peng jong mang ding ahi." 
Luke5:38 Lengpitwi thah chu peng thah-a khum ding ahibouve; chutile ania kikhehtup jia ahi. 
Luke5:39 Lengpitwi lui dona chun koiman athah don ding agopoi; ijeh-inem itile, Aluibou atuije, ati." 
Luke6:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, amasa kichaijou anichanna cholngah nin changlei lai ajotnin ahile, aseijuiten changvui asih-un, akhutnun anoijun aneuvin ahi." 
Luke6:2 Chuin Pharisai ho kimkhatnin, Cholngah ni-a bol ngailou ibola nabol uham? ati." 
Luke6:3 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Nanghon David le aloihon agil akel phat uva abolu chu nasim khah louvu ham?" 
Luke6:4 Ama Pathen in'a alutnin, thempu tailou adangin aneh ngailou vetsahna changlhah chu alan, anen, chule aloiho jong apen ahi, ati." 
Luke6:5 Chuin aman ajah uva, Mihem Chapa chu cholngah ni Pakai ahi, ati." 
Luke6:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, cholngah ni chom khatnin ama kikhopna in'ah alutnin thu ahilin; chule hia chun akhut jet lang ngoi mi khat aumin ahi." 
Luke6:7 Chuin danthu sunho le Pharisai ho chun ahehsetna ding amu theina dingun, cholngah ni-a aboldam em, aboldam hih em tin achang lhiuvin ahi." 
Luke6:8 Ahivangin aman alungthimu chu ahen, akhut langngoipa jah-a chun, Kipatdoh-in alaija hung dingdoh-in, ati." 
Luke6:9 Chuin Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Keiman thudoh khat neijung kate; cholngah ni-a apha bol angaiha, ase bol angaiham? Lhagao huhhing angaiha, suhmang angaiham? ati." 
Luke6:10 Chuin aman amaho chu abonchauvin ave kimvelin, akhut lang ngoipa jah-a chun, Nakhut lhangin, ati. Chuin aman alhangin ahile akhut chu alangkhat bangin adamtan ahi." 
Luke6:11 Ahin amaho athangtom tuntun jengun, Jesu chunga ipi bolding ham akihoutoh pantaovin ahi." 
Luke6:12 Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche lai chun ama taona mang dingin molchunga akaldoh-in; jan khovah-in Pathen henga tang louvin ataovin ahi." 
Luke6:13 Chuin khovah phatnin aseijuite akouvin; chuin alah uva somleni alhengdoh-in, amaho chu aminu jong solchah asahtan ahi." 
Luke6:14 Peter asah Simon, chule asopipa Andrew, Jacob le John, Philip le Bartholomew," 
Luke6:14 Peter asah Simon, chule asopipa Andrew, Jacob le John, Philip le Bartholomew," 
Luke6:15 Mathew le Thomas, Alphaeus chapa Jacob, Zealot atiu Simon," 
Luke6:16 Jacob naopa Juda, chule ama matsah-a pang Judas Iscariot, hicheng chu ahiuve." 
Luke6:17 Chuin amaho chutoh ahung kumlhan, jangcham-ah adingun, aseijui honkhat toh, Juda gam jousele Jerusalem'a kon, Tyre le Sidon gama twikhanglen panga kon mipi atama tam, athu ngai dingle ahiveiju kiboldam dinga hungho;" 
Luke6:18 Chuin lhagao boh suhgentheina aumnaova kona boldama umho toh ahin ahi. 
Luke6:19 Chuin ama-a kona thilboltheina ahung potna abonchauva aboldam jeh chun, mipi chun abonchauvin ama chu tohkhah agouvin ahi." 
Luke6:20 Chuin ama akhodah-in aseijuite aven, Mivaichateho anunnom nahiuve; ijeh-inem itile Pathen lenggam chu nangho-a ahi." 
Luke6:21 Tu-a gilkelteho anunnom nahiuve; ijeh-inem itile nangho nava dingu ahi. Tu-a kapteho anunnom nahiuve; ijeh-inem itile nanui dingu ahi. 
Luke6:22 Mihem Chapa jala min nahotbol uva, chule nachom khenuva, nahou setnuva, chule michonse tia naminu apaidoh tengule anunnom nahiuve." 
Luke6:23 Hiche ni chule thanomun, kipah-in kichomum; ijeh-inem itile veuvin, van'a nasan dingu kipaman atame; ijeh-inem itile apu apateuvin jong themgaoho chutobang ma-a chu anabolu ahi." 
Luke6:24 Amavang mihaosa ho, ada nahiuve! Ijeh inem itile nanghon lungmonna alhinga naneiju ahitai." 
Luke6:25 Nangho tu-a oivaho ada nahiuve! ijeh-inem nangho nagil keldiu ahi. Nangho tu-a nuiho ada nahiuve! ijeh inem itile nangho nalunghem dingu chule naka dingu ahi. 
Luke6:26 Mi jousen na-ochat uva naseiphat tengule ada nahiuve! ijeh-inem itile apu apateuvin chutima-a chu themgao lhemho anabolu ahi. 
Luke6:27 Amavang keiman kathu ngaiho jah-a kasei ahi, Nanghon namelma teu chu ngailuvin; nahoteu chu phatbolun;" 
Luke6:28 Nagaosapteu chu phatthei boh-un; nataitom teo dingin taovun. 
Luke6:29 Nabengphe langkhat benga chu langkhat jong dopeh-in; chule naponlen min nalahpehle nasangkhol jong alah ding it hih-in. 
Luke6:30 Nahenga thumchan chu pen; chule nanei nalah peh-a chu thum kit ta hih-in. 
Luke6:31 Min nangho iti nabol leu nadeijum, nanghon jong chuti chun bolun." 
Luke6:32 Nanghon nangailu teo jeng nangailut uva ahile, ipi pachat nachan dinguham? Ijeh-inem itile michonseho jengin jong angailuva chu amahon angailuvin ahi." 
Luke6:33 Chule nanghon nadinguva phaho jengseh phatna ding bolleu chun, ipi pachat nachan dinguham? Ijeh-inem itile michonse hon jong achuti bolun ahi." 
Luke6:34 Chule lemu kit dinga nakinepna hou jengseh henga peleuchun ipi pachatna nachan dinguham? Ijeh-inem itile michonse hon jong michonseho hengah ajatma mu kit dingin apejiuvin ahi. 
Luke6:35 Nangho vangin namelma teu chu ngailuvin, aphatna dingu bolun, chule mu kit ding kinemlel louvin peuvin; chutile tohphat man nasan dingu len ding, chule Chungnung pen chate nahi dingu ahi. Ijeh inem itile ama kipaje helou le miphalouho ahepin ahi." 
Luke6:36 Hijeh chun na-Pau mikhoto bangin, nanghon jong mi khotouvin." 
Luke6:37 Chule mi oimo hih-un, chutile nangho oimo-a naum lou dingu ahi; mi themmo chansah hih-un, chutile nangho jong themmo nakichan lou dingu ahi; mi ngaidamun, chutile nangho jong naki ngaidam dingu ahi." 
Luke6:38 Nanghon peuvin, chutile nangho jong nakipe dingu ahi; phatah-in tentin, sonchahkheh intin, lohchah kheh-in tin, letsetna na-op uva nasunpeh dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile nanghon nate bang banguva chu nangho kitepeh ding nahiuve, ati." 
Luke6:39 Chuin aman amaho jah-a thulem khat aseijin, Mitchon mitcho apui thei ngaijem? Ani lhona kokhuh-a lhalut lhonta lou dingham?" 
Luke6:40 Ahilpa sangin aseijui achungnung jopoi. Athep chamkim teng vangle ahilpa toh akibang bouve. 
Luke6:41 Chule ibola nasopi mitna bohthem um chu navetna, nangma mitna thingtum umchu hedoh louva nahim?" 
Luke6:42 Chule nangman nangma mitna um thingtum chu mu louva, nasopi jah-a, Sopi, namitna bohthem um chu neilahdoh sah-in, iti nati theiham? Vo miphalhem, nangma mitna um thingtum chu kilahdoh masah-in, chutengle nasopi mitna um bohthem lahdoh ding chu namuchen ding ahi." 
Luke6:43 Ijeh-inem itile thingphung pha-a aga phalou agajipoi, thingphung phalouva jong aga pha agajipoi." 
Luke6:44 Thingphung jouse aga-a kihe-a ahi. Ijeh-inem itile min ling phung-ah theichang aloujipoi, lingboh-a jong lengpiga aloujipoi." 
Luke6:45 Miphan alung sung thilkholna pha-a konin thilpha asodoh-in; chule miphalouvin alung sung thil kholna phalouva konin aphalou asodohjin ahi; ijeh-inem itile alung sunga aletset teng akamin aphondohji ahi. 
Luke6:46 Chule nangho kasei thua la chon louva ibola Pakai, Pakai, neitiu ham?" 
Luke6:47 Koi hijongle kahenga hunga, kathusei ngaija, chule bola chu, ama chu koi tobang ham keiman nangho vetsah-unge." 
Luke6:48 Ama chu in sa-a, thuhtah-a lei laija, chule abul songpi chunga phut tobang ahi: chuin twisang ahung lenin, chule luidung asoh-in, in chu hasuh-in asun ahile, guntah-a kisa ahi jeh chun asulhu joutapon ahi." 
Luke6:49 Ahin ja chu jana-a ahia bol louva vang chu, abul beija lei chunga in sa tobang ahi; luidung asoh-in, hasuh-in asun ahile hiche in chu alhupai jengtan ahi; hiche in chu aset anasa lheh jengin ahi." 
Luke7:1 Chujouvin aman miho jah-a asei ding thu jouse aseisoh phatnin, Capernaum'a aluttan ahi." 
Luke7:2 Chuin sepai jalamkai khat asohpa deitah hatah-in anan, athikon ahitai." 
Luke7:3 Chuin aman Jesu thu umchan ajah phatnin, ahengah Juda mi upaho asolin, ahunga asohpa chu ahung damsah dingin angehtan ahi." 
Luke7:4 Chuin amaho chu Jesu heng alhunun, pontho tah-in ataovun, Ama hi hiche hi nabolpeh-a lomtah ahi;" 
Luke7:5 Ijeh-inem itile aman ivaipiu hi angailu lheh jengin, amatah-in kaki khopnao in jong hi eisahpeh-u ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke7:6 Chuin Jesu amaho chutoh alhontai. Chuin inkom ageijin jalamkai javaipo chun agolho asolin, Jesu jah-a, Pakai, nangma hung kisugim hih-in: ijeh-inem itile nangma ka-in sunga nahung lut ding chu keima chutia kilom kahipoi." 
Luke7:7 Chutichu ahin keima jong nangma henga hung dinga kilomim kakingaito poi; thu chengkhat jengcha seijin, chutile kasohpa dam jeng ding ahi." 
Luke7:8 Ijeh-inem itile keima jong mi thuneina noija um kahin, keima noija sepaiho aumin; chule keiman khatpenpen chu, Chen, katile, achen; achom khat, Hungin, katile ahungin: chule kasoh jah-a, Hiche bolin, katile, aboljin ahi, ati." 
Luke7:9 Chuin Jesu'n thu chucheng ajah phatnin, ama chu kidang asan adatmon, anungjui mipi jah-a chun, Keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Israel lah jenga jong hitobang tahsan len kamukhapoi, ati." 
Luke7:10 Chuin asolteho chu a-in'a akile kitnun ahile, adammoa um sohpa chu damin amutauvin ahi." 
Luke7:11 Chujou jou chun Nain atiu kho khatna achen, aseijuite le mipi nasatah khattoh alhonin ahi." 
Luke7:12 Chuche kho kotpi phung ageijun, veuvin, mithi khat ahung kipun, ama chu anu chapa changkhatseh ahin, amanula meithai ahin; akhoho mi tamtah-in alhonpiuvin ahi." 
Luke7:13 Chuin Pakaiyin amanu chu amu phatnin, alung ase behseh jengin, Kap hih-in, ati." 
Luke7:14 Chuin aman anaijin thilong kong chu athamin ahile, apuho chu adingtauvin ahi. Chuin aman, Gollhang, thouvin kati nahi, ati." 
Luke7:15 Chuin athipa chu atou doh-in, thu asei pantan ahi. Chuin aman amapa chu anu apetan ahi." 
Luke7:16 Chuin abonchau chunga kichatna alhung tan; Ilah uva themgao chungnung khat asohdoh-e; chule Pathen'in amite aviltai, atiuvin Pathen avahchoi taovin ahi." 
Luke7:17 Chuin Judah gam jouse-a le akimvel gam jouse-ah achungchang thu chu athangdoh sohtan ahi. 
Luke7:18 Chuin John seijuiten chuti thu jouse chu ajah-a aseijiuvin ahi. 
Luke7:18 Chuin John seijuiten chuti thu jouse chu ajah-a aseijiuvin ahi. 
Luke7:19 Chuin John'in aseijuite mi ni akouvin, Jesu hengah asolin, Ahung dinga chu nang nahi mong hinam? Ole achom dang khat kanga dinguham? agati sah-e." 
Luke7:19 Chuin John'in aseijuite mi ni akouvin, Jesu hengah asolin, Ahung dinga chu nang nahi mong hinam? Ole achom dang khat kanga dinguham? agati sah-e." 
Luke7:20 Chuin mite ni akom alhun lhonin, John Baptist-in, Ahung dinga chu nangma nahi mong hinam? Ole achom dang khat kanga dinguham? tia nahenga eihinsol lhon ahi, ati lhone." 
Luke7:20 Chuin mite ni akom alhun lhonin, John Baptist-in, Ahung dinga chu nangma nahi mong hinam? Ole achom dang khat kanga dinguham? tia nahenga eihinsol lhon ahi, ati lhone." 
Luke7:21 Hiche pettah-a chu Jesu'n anaho, hiseveiho, chule lhagao gilou vop tamtah aboldama, chule mitcho tamtah lungset tah-a kho amusah ahi." 
Luke7:22 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah lhonah, Che lhoninlang nathilmu chengse lhon le nathujah chengse; Iti dana mitchon kho amu-a, elbaijin lam ajotna, miphah damtheng sah-a auma, chule na-ngongin kho ajah-a, mithisa kaithouva auma, chule mivaichate Kipana Thupha kiseipeh-a hitam John jah-a gasei lhonin." 
Luke7:22 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah lhonah, Che lhoninlang nathilmu chengse lhon le nathujah chengse; Iti dana mitchon kho amu-a, elbaijin lam ajotna, miphah damtheng sah-a auma, chule na-ngongin kho ajah-a, mithisa kaithouva auma, chule mivaichate Kipana Thupha kiseipeh-a hitam John jah-a gasei lhonin." 
Luke7:23 Chule koi hijongle keija kipal lhuhna kom nei lou chu anunnom ahi, ati." 
Luke7:24 Chuin John thupo ho chu apotdoh phatnun, aman mipi jah-a chun John thudol asei panin, Ipi ve dinga gamthipma chu nachedoh-uham? Huijin peng amut lingham?" 
Luke7:24 Chuin John thupo ho chu apotdoh phatnun, aman mipi jah-a chun John thudol asei panin, Ipi ve dinga gamthipma chu nachedoh-uham? Huijin peng amut lingham?" 
Luke7:25 Achutile, ipi ve dinga ba chedoh nahiuvem? Ponnem kisil miham? Veuvin, lultah-a kivonhole nomsa tah-a umho khu lengho inpi-a um ahiuve." 
Luke7:26 Ahile, ipi ve dingaba nachedoh-uham? Themgao ham? Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, themgao sanga chungnungjo ahi." 
Luke7:27 Keiman kasottol nama sang-ah kasole, aman namasanga sang nalampi asem ding ahi, tia kisun chu ama hi ahi." 
Luke7:28 Nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Numei sunga peng lah-a John Baptist sanga lenjo aumpoi; ahinla Pathen lenggama aneojo chu ama sangin alenjoi, ati." 
Luke7:28 Nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Numei sunga peng lah-a John Baptist sanga lenjo aumpoi; ahinla Pathen lenggama aneojo chu ama sangin alenjoi, ati." 
Luke7:29 Chuin athusei ja-a mi jouse le kaidongho, John baptize chansah-a baptize changho chun, Pathen chu them achanun adihsahtauve." 
Luke7:29 Chuin athusei ja-a mi jouse le kaidongho, John baptize chansah-a baptize changho chun, Pathen chu them achanun adihsahtauve." 
Luke7:30 Ahin Pharisai ho le danthu themho vang chun, ama chansah-a baptize chang louvin, Pathen'in amaho chunga alunggot chu apaidoh taovin ahi." 
Luke7:31 Chule Pakaiyin, Tukhanga miho hi ipitoh katekah tadem? chule ipi toh kilou uvam? ati." 
Luke7:32 Amaho chu chapang kaithel tolla touva, khatnin khat kou-a, ajah-a, Kuli kamutpeh ule nalam hih-un; kakau lela nakap pouve, tiho tobang ahiuve." 
Luke7:33 Ijeh-inem itile John Baptist ahungin, changlhah ne lou lengpitwi donlou ahin; nanghon, Ama chu thilhavop ahi, nati uve." 
Luke7:33 Ijeh-inem itile John Baptist ahungin, changlhah ne lou lengpitwi donlou ahin; nanghon, Ama chu thilhavop ahi, nati uve." 
Luke7:34 Mihem Chapa ahungin, anen chule adonin ahile, nanghon, Veuvin, nehhat le ju lop, kaidongho le mi chonseho jol le gol, nati uve." 
Luke7:35 Ahinla chihna chu achate jousen athem chansah uvin ahi, ati." 
Luke7:36 Chuin Pharisai ho khatnin ama chu an nehpi dingin akouvin; chuin ama Pharisai pa in'a chun alutnin, an nedingin atoutan ahi." 
Luke7:37 Chuin veuvin, hiche khopi sunga um numei chonse khatnin Pharisai pa in'ah annen atouve ti ahet phatnin, songval bom khat thao namtui ahin choijin;" 
Luke7:38 Anungah akengphang bulah adingin akapmin, akengphang chu amitlhin akotsah-in, aluchanga asam chun atheh ngim pantan, chuin akengphang chu achopmin thao chu anutan ahi." 
Luke7:39 Chuin an ne-a kou-a Pharisai pa chun hichu amun, alungthima, Hiche mipa hi themgao ahin, hiche atongkha nu hi koi ahi le itobang numei ahi hetahta, amanula chonse ahin, ati." 
Luke7:40 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu adonbutnin, ajah-a, Simon najah-a sei ding thukhat kaneije ati." 
Luke7:41 Aman, Houhil seijin, ati. Sumpahom mikhatnin sumba mi ni aneijin; khatpan dangka ja nile somnga abatnin, khatjopan somni le nga abat ahi." 
Luke7:42 Chuin amanin asahna ding anei lhon lou phatnin, ani lhonin angaidam tai. Chuti ahileh koijoh chun ama ha ngailutjoh lhonintem? ati." 
Luke7:43 Simon'in adonbutnin, Kei ngaiton atam ngaidamjoh chun, ati. Chuin aman, natan dih-e, ati." 
Luke7:44 Chuin numeinu lama chun akiheijin, Simon jah-a, Numeinu hi namu-em? Na-in'ah kahung lutnin nangman kakeng silna ding twi neipepoi, amanu vang hin amitlhin ka kengphang asukotnin, asamin atheh ngime." 
Luke7:45 Nangman chopjong neichop poi, amanu vang hin kahung lut tila pat ka kengphang chop atangpoi." 
Luke7:46 Nangman kalu thao neinu pehpoi, amanu vang hin ka kengphang thao namtui anui." 
Luke7:47 Hiche jeh-a chu kasei ahi, Amanu chonsetna tamtah akingaidam jeh-a hatah-a angailut ahi; amavang ngaidam lhom chun angailu lhomjin ahi, ati." 
Luke7:48 Chuin numeinu jah-a chun, Nachonset ngaidam ahitai, ati." 
Luke7:49 Hichun a-ankong um piho chun, Chonset ngaidam ama hi koi hingana? akitiuvin ahi." 
Luke7:50 Chuin aman numeinu jah-a chun, Natahsanin nahuhhing ahitai; lungmong tah-in chetan, ati." 
Luke8:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche joujou chun, ama khopile khoneo tinah avahlen, Pathen gam Kipana Thupha apolen ahillhanglen; somleni ho chu akomah aumun;" 
Luke8:2 chule numei phabep, lhagao gilou vop kiboldam le anat kiboldamho toh ahiuve. Amaho chu Magdalene atiu Mariam thilha sagi potdohnanu toh," 
Luke8:3 chule Herod neiching Chuza inneipi Joanna toh, Susanna toh, chule numei dang tamtah toh ahiuvin; amaho chun amaho neija konin ama ajenun ahi." 
Luke8:4 Chuin mipi tamtah ahung kikhom khomun, khotina konin miho ahenga ahung ahungun, aman thulemin thu aseijin;" 
Luke8:5 Muchi thepa muchi then achen, athe atheleh abang lamsih-a achun ahile min kengin achotphan, chule chunga leng vachaten alohgamtan ahi." 
Luke8:6 Abang songlheo chungah achun; chuin akedoh doh-in, jung akholou jeh-in agop paitan ahi." 
Luke8:7 Chule abang ling lah-a achun; chuin lingho chutoh akhanthan adeplih taovin ahi. 
Luke8:8 Chule adang leipha laijah achun, akhangin, ajat jakhat agatan ahi ati. Chuin thu chucheng aseijin, Angaina ding nakhang neijan ngaihen tin asamin ahi." 
Luke8:9 Chuin aseijuiten, Hiche thulem chu i-kiseina ham? tin adongun ahi." 
Luke8:10 Chuin aman, Pathen lenggam thuguh chu nahet dinguva kipe-a nahitaove; midangho dinga vang, vet chu avetnuva amuloudiu, jah chu ajah uva ahet louna dinguva thulema kisei ahi." 
Luke8:11 Thulem chu athu hiche ahi: Muchi chu Pathen thu ahi. 
Luke8:12 Chule lamsih-a ho chu, athu jaho ahiuve, chutengle amahon atahsan daova chule asochat louna dingun diabol ahungin, alung sunguva thu chu alahmang pehjin ahi." 
Luke8:13 Chule songlheo chungaho chu athu ajah-a, thanom tah-a joppaiho ahiuve; amahon jung aneipouvin, chomkhat atahsanun, chule lhepna aum tengle apul lhagamji taove." 
Luke8:14 Chule ling lah-a chuho chu hiche ahi, athu ajah nungle acheuvin, hinlai khankho lungkhamna, haona, nopsahna chun adeplihjin, aga bulhingji tapouve." 
Luke8:15 Chule leipha laija chua chu, thu chu ja-a, lung kituptah le phatah-a tuh detna, thohhat na-a ga sohdoh jiho chu ahi." 
Luke8:16 Chule koiman meivah avah-in belin akhukhum jipoi; jalkhun noija jong akikoi jipoi; alut chanin vah amu theina dingun atunna chungah atungji bouve. 
Luke8:17 Ijeh-inem itile kiphong lou dinga imacha ki-ima aumpoi, chule hetdoh lou ding le kilangdoh lou ding akiselguh imacha aumpoi." 
Luke8:18 Hijeh chun iti nangaijum chingtheijun; ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle aneija chu kipehbe ding; chule koi hijongle anei louva chu aneija angaito chasun jong chu ama-a kona kilahpeh ding ahi, ati." 
Luke8:19 Chuin anu le asopite ahungun, ahinla mipi jeh chun akom alhung theipouvin." 
Luke8:20 Chuin ajah-a, Nanule nasopite inpoa adingun, nangma namu nomui, tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
Luke8:21 Ahin aman adonbutnin, amaho jah-a, Kanule kasopite hicheho, Pathen thu ngaija bolteho hi ahiuve, ati." 
Luke8:22 Chuin ahitin ahi, chulai chun ni khat aseijuite toh kong-ah atouvin; chuin aman amaho jah-a, dil gallang khatna galkaiju hite, ati. Chuin kong alhaovin akitol taovin ahi." 
Luke8:23 Ahin akitol petnun ama a-imutan; chuin dila chun khopihui ahung nungin ahile akongu chu twi adim dehdeh jengtan, amaho setto kichatah-in aumtaovin ahi." 
Luke8:24 Chuin amaho ahenga acheuvin, asukhangun, Pipu, Pipu, athigam kahitaove, atiuve. Chuin ama ahung khangin huipi le twikinong chu aphoh-in; hichun hiteni chu atanghel gelin, athiphel tan ahi." 
Luke8:25 Chuin aman ajah uvah, hoibaham natahsanu? ati. Chuin amaho akichauvin, kidang asauvin, khatnin khat jah-a, Hichepa hi itobang mi ham! Huile twi thu apen ahile, athun anung jeng lhone, akitiuvin ahi." 
Luke8:26 Chuin Galilee gal ajontah-a um, Gerasene gam alhungun ahi." 
Luke8:27 Chuin ama kong'a kona leichung agah chot chotnin, khopi-a kon mikhatnin atoh-in; ama chu sottah thilha vop, apon apona sil lou, in'a jong umlou, lhankhuh lah jenga um ahi." 
Luke8:28 Ama chun Jesu amu mun, a-ao san, a-angah aboh khupmin, aw sangtah-in, Vo Jesu, Chungnung pen Pathen Chapa, nangle kei ipi ikimatna umam? Nahenga katao ahi, keima neibolgim hih-in, ati." 
Luke8:29 (Ajehchu aman mipa-a kon chun hung doh-in tia lhagao boh chu thu apeh ahi. Ijeh-inem itile ama chu tamtah vei amat matchetji ahi: chule ama chu thihkhao le bula ahenjiu ahin, ahivangin aman akihennaho chu aphutanjia, thilhan gamthipmah apuimangji ahi)." 
Luke8:30 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu adongin, Namin ipiham? ati. Chuin aman, Janel kahi, ati; ijeh-inem itile asunga chu thilha tamtah lut ahi." 
Luke8:31 Chule Aman amaho chu leinoi lama asol lounadin thilhaho chun Jesu henga angeh taovin ahi. 
Luke8:32 Chule chukom molsang dunga chu vohcha hon atama tam lha-a ahin; thilhaho chun chucheho lah-a alut theina dingun angeh-un ahile; aman alutdiu aphalpeh tan ahi. 
Luke8:33 Chuin thilhaho mipa-a kon chun ahung potdoh-un, vohchaho sunga chun alut taovin ahile, vohhon chu halhaijin alhaijun, kolah alhai lhauvin, dil'a alha lutnun athigam taovin ahi." 
Luke8:34 Chuin vohcha vah hon hiche thusoh umchan chu amu phatnun ajamun, khopi sunga le loujaovah agaseijun ahi." 
Luke8:35 Chuin ipi thusoh hitam tia ve dingin ahung potdoh-un; chuin Jesu kom ahung lhungun, thilha potdohna mipa chun pon akisila, chule lunglima Jesu kengphang koma atou amuvin, akicha lheh jengun ahi." 
Luke8:36 Chuin amuho chun thilha voppa chu iti kihuhdoh ahi chu amaho jah-a aseijun ahi. 
Luke8:37 Chuin Gerasene gam vela miho jousen, akomuva kona achedohna dingin ahenga ataotauvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu kicha behseh jenguva ahi." 
Luke8:38 Chuin ama kong'a alutnin, akile kittan ahi. Ahin thilhaho potdohnapa vang chun ama koma umding athumin;" 
Luke8:39 Ahivangin Jesu'n, Na-in lama chenlang Pathen'in nangma itobang thil loupi nabol peh-em, hichu gaseilen, tin asolin ahi. Chuin akipatdoh-in, Jesu'n thil lentah abolpeh chu khopumpi jah-a lhang phongtah-in asamletai." 
Luke8:40 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jesu akile kit chun, mipin kipah tah-in ana lamtouvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho abonchauva ama ngah jinga anaum ahiuve." 
Luke8:41 Chuin veuvin, amin Jairus kiti mi khat ahungin, chule ama chu kikhopna in vaihom ahi; chuin ama chu Jesu kengphang bulah alhun, a-in'a hung dingin ataotan ahi;" 
Luke8:42 Ijeh inem itile ama chun chanu changkhatseh aneijin, kum somle kum nibep ahin, amanu chu athi koncha ahi. Ahin achen ahile mipi chun atom lellul jengun ahi." 
Luke8:43 Chuin numei khat kum somle kum ni athi long, louthem ho kijensah na-a anei jouse sumang, khatchan jong aboldam jou lounu chu," 
Luke8:44 anung lama ahungin, apon mongkai athamin ahi: chuin chupettah chun athi lon chu atangpai jengtan ahi." 
Luke8:45 Chuin Jesu'n, koiham eithama? ati. Chuin koimachan kei kahi atilou phatnin, Peter le akoma umhon, Pipu, mipin natoma chule naneh chintouva, iti dana koiham eithama? natiham, atiuve." 
Luke8:46 Ahivangin Jesu'n, Koiham khatnin eithame; ijeh-inem itile keija kona thilboltheina thahat potdoh-a chu keiman kahei, ati." 
Luke8:47 Chuin numeinu chun, Ki-imthei kahipoi ti ahen, kihot pumpumin ahungin, a-angah aboh khupmin, ijeh-a ama atham ahi chule chupet tah-a adampaihel chu mi jouse ang sungah aseitan ahi." 
Luke8:48 Chuin aman amanu jah-a, Chanu, lhamong tah-in umin, natahsanin nadamsah ahitai; lung mongin chetan, ati." 
Luke8:49 Aman hiche thu chu aseina laijin, kikhopna in vaihompa in'a kon chun mi khat ahungin, ajah-a, nachanu athitai; houhil chu cholsah hih-in, ati." 
Luke8:50 Ahivangin Jesu'n hichu ajan, adonbutnin olmo hih-in, tahsanpou poutan; chutile amanu hingdoh ding ahi, ati." 
Luke8:51 Chuin in alhun phatnun aman Peter, John, Jacob chule chapangnu nule pa tailou adang koima alutsahpon ahi." 
Luke8:51 Chuin in alhun phatnun aman Peter, John, Jacob chule chapangnu nule pa tailou adang koima alutsahpon ahi." 
Luke8:52 Chule miho jouse chun amanu chu akauvin, a-op abeng bengun ahi; ahin aman, nangho kap hih-un; ama athia ahipoi, a-imu ahibouve, ati." 
Luke8:53 Chuin athitai ti ahet jeh-u chun, ama chu anuisat taovin ahi." 
Luke8:54 Ahinla aman amaho chu apotdoh sah-in, amanu chu akhutnin atuh-in akouvin, Boinu, thouvin ati." 
Luke8:55 Chuin alhagao ahung kile kitnin, chupettah chun athoudohpai jengtan ahi; chuin aman amanu chu neh ding peuvin, tin thu apetai." 
Luke8:56 Hichun anu le apa chun kidang asa lheh lhonin; ahivangin aman hiche thil kibol chu koima jah-a aseilhon louna dingin akham chahtan ahi. 
Luke9:1 Chuin aman somleni ho chu akou khomin, thilhaho jouse chunga thuneina le nat boldamna thahat apen," 
Luke9:2 Pathen lenggam thu hil lhangle dingle adamlouho boldam dingin asolin," 
Luke9:3 Ajah uva, Nakhol jinnauva dingin imacha keng hih-un, tenggol hihen, sakhao hihen, changlhah hihen, chule sum hijongle kiken hih-un; sangkhol thoni jong nei hih-un;" 
Luke9:4 Nalut lutnau in'a chun umun, chule chua kon chun potdoh-un." 
Luke9:5 Chule nalhunsah lounao chanuva chu, chuche kho-a kona napotdoh tengule, amaho douna hettohsahnan nakengphang uva leivui thinglhau vin, ati." 
Luke9:6 Chuin amaho acheuvin, akho kho-a Kipana Thupha ahillhangun, adamlou aboldampeh taovin ahi." 
Luke9:7 Hichun Herod gamvaipopan thil kibol jouse chu ajan, alunggim lhehtan ahi. Ajeh chu mi abangin, John athia kona thoudoh kit ahi, atiuvin;" 
Luke9:7 Hichun Herod gamvaipopan thil kibol jouse chu ajan, alunggim lhehtan ahi. Ajeh chu mi abangin, John athia kona thoudoh kit ahi, atiuvin;" 
Luke9:8 Abangin, Elijah hung kilah ahi, atiuvin; adangse vang chun, Malaija themgaoho lah-a khat thoudoh kit ahi, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke9:9 Herod'in, Keiman John lu katantan, ahinla hiche athu kajah hi hoi koiham? ati. Hichun ama mu atuptan ahi." 
Luke9:9 Herod'in, Keiman John lu katantan, ahinla hiche athu kajah hi hoi koiham? ati. Hichun ama mu atuptan ahi." 
Luke9:10 Chuin solchah ho chu ahung kile kitnun, athilbol chengseu chu ama jah-a aseijun ahi. Chuin aman amaho chu apuijin, Bethsaida atiu khopi mun thip khatna amaho changseh apotdoh taovin ahi." 
Luke9:11 Ahivangin mipin hichu ahet phat uvin, anung ajuijun; chuin aman amaho chu anasangin, chuin ajah uva Pathen gam thu aseijin, chule boldam ngaiho chu aboldamtan ahi." 
Luke9:12 Chuin nilhum kon ahitan; hichun somleni ho chu ahungun ajah-a, Mipi hi acheuva khoho le loujao dunga genale anneh agakihol theina dingun soltan; ijeh-inem itile hikoma eiho gamthipma um ihiuve, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke9:13 Ahin aman amaho ajah-a, Nanghon nehding peuvin ati. Chuin amahon jah-a, Kacheuva hiche miho jouse dinga hi neh kagachoh ngal louvule, keihon changlhah pheng nga le nga ni kalval kaneipouve, atiuvin ahi" 
Luke9:14 Ijeh-inem itile amaho chu mi sangnga jen hiuva ahi. Chuin aman aseijuite jah-a, Amaho chu somnga cheng chengin aloi loijin tousah-un, ati." 
Luke9:15 Chuin amahon achuti bolun, abonchauvin atousah-un ahi." 
Luke9:16 Chuin changlhah pheng nga chule nga chu alan, van lam aven, hiteho chu phatthei aboh-in, ahehbal balin; chuin mipi anga chu luipeh dingin aseijuite thu apen ahi." 
Luke9:17 Chuin amahon aneuvin, abonchauvin avasoh keijun, chuin anehmoh-u anong chengse paipeh somle paipeh ni alohdoh-un ahi." 
Luke9:18 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama achanga atao petnin, aseijuiho akomah aumun; hichun aman amaho chu adongin, Mipi ho hin keima hi koi ahi eitiuvem? ati." 
Luke9:19 Chuin amahon adonbutnun, John Baptist ahi atiuve; abang vangin Elijah ahi atiuvin; chule adangsen, Malaija themgaoho lah-a khat thoudoh ahi tin aseijuve atiuvin ahi." 
Luke9:19 Chuin amahon adonbutnun, John Baptist ahi atiuve; abang vangin Elijah ahi atiuvin; chule adangsen, Malaija themgaoho lah-a khat thoudoh ahi tin aseijuve atiuvin ahi." 
Luke9:20 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Nanghonla koi ahi neitiuvem? ati. Chuin Peter'in adonbutnin, Pathen Khrista chu, ati." 
Luke9:21 Ahivangin aman amaho chu hichu koima jah-a asei louna dingun hakhamin akhamchah-in; 
Luke9:22 Ajah uva, Mihem Chapa chun thil tamtah athoh-a, chule vaipo upaho le thempu pipuiho, chule danthu sunho pampaija uma, chule kithat tei ding, chule ni thum nile kaithouva umtei ding ahi, ati." 
Luke9:23 Chuin aman abonchau jah-a, Koi hile kanung eijui noma chu ama kingaitom hen, niseh-in athingpel kiput hen lang kanung hinjuihen." 
Luke9:24 Ijeh-inem itile koi hile ahinna huhhing noma chun achan ding; amavang koi hile keima jala ahinna chana chun ahuhhing ding ahi. 
Luke9:25 Ijeh-inem itile min vannoi leiset apumpin neihenlang, ama kisumanghen ahiloule paidoh-in umtale, ama dinga ipi phachom dingham?" 
Luke9:26 Ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle keima le kathu jachat chanchu, Mihem Chapan ama loupinale, Pa loupina, chule vantil thengteho loupina-a ahung tengle, amapa chu ajachatpi ding ahi." 
Luke9:27 Amavang tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hikoma dingho kimkhat hi, Pathen lenggam amu kahseuva, thina tepkha lou ding aumuve, ati." 
Luke9:28 Chuin ahitin ahi, chucheng aseikal ni get jen jouvin Peter toh, John toh, chule Jacob toh apuijin, atao dingin mol chunga akaltouvun ahi." 
Luke9:28 Chuin ahitin ahi, chucheng aseikal ni get jen jouvin Peter toh, John toh, chule Jacob toh apuijin, atao dingin mol chunga akaltouvun ahi." 
Luke9:29 Chuin ama ataopetnin, amaiso akikhelin, chule aponsil abanin abangin, aval lahlah jengin ahi." 
Luke9:30 Chuin veuvin, mi nin akihoupin; amani chu Mosi le Elijah ahi lhonin," 
Luke9:31 Loupia hung kilah lhona, Jerusalem'a thina athoh chai ding thu chu asei lhonin ahi." 
Luke9:32 Hichun Peter le aumpiho chu a-imutsoh ngui ngui jengun, ahivangin hah jengin aumun, aloupije le akoma ding miteni chu amuvin ahi." 
Luke9:33 Chuin akikhenpi lhona akoma kona achedoh pet lhonin, Peter'in Jesu jah-a, Pipu, hikoma i-umu hi eiho dingin anome; chule lhambuh thum songung kate, khat nangma ding, khat Mosi ding, chule khat Elijah ding, atin; ipi asei ahijong ahepon ahi." 
Luke9:34 Chuin aman chucheng asei pet chun, mei lhang khatnin amaho chu ahinlekhun; chuin amaho mei lah-a alutnu chun akichauvin ahi." 
Luke9:35 Chuin mei lah-a kon chun aw ahung gingdoh-in, Hiche hi ka-Chapa deitah ahi; athu ngaijun, ati." 
Luke9:36 Chuin awgin akichai phat chun, Jesu achangin akimutan ahi. Chuin athipbeh-un, chulai chun athilmu-u chu koima jah-a asei pouvin ahi." 
Luke9:37 Chuin ahitin ahi, akit ni-a mol chunga kona akumsuh phatnun, mipi atama tamin analam touvin ahi." 
Luke9:38 Chuin veuvin, mipi lah-a kon chun mikhatnin ahin samin, Houhil, nahenga katao ahi, kachapa hi ven; ama hi kachapa changkhatseh ahi;" 
Luke9:39 Chule vetan, lhagaovin amanjin, phulou helouvin apengjahjin, chule aheh lhujin ahile achilphon akaijin, asuheh jin, lhakang manlouvin amavo jingin ahi." 
Luke9:40 Chule anodoh dinga naseijuite henga kataole, amahonla anodoh joupouvin ahi, ati." 
Luke9:41 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, Vo tahsanna nei lou khanglamvai mite, nakom uva itihchan kauma, chule kakhongai ding nahiuvem? Nachapa chu hilama hinpuijin, ati." 
Luke9:42 Chuin ahung petnin thilha chun ahehlhun, nasatah-in aveingoi jengin ahi. Ahivangin Jesu'n lhagao boh chu aphoh-in, chuin chapang chu aboldamin apa apetan ahi." 
Luke9:43 Chuin miho jouse chun Pathen thilboltheina loupije chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi. Chutia chu athilbol jouse chu kidang asah pettah-un Jesu'n aseijuite jah-a chun," 
Luke9:44 Hicheng thuhi nana sunguvah lutsah-un, ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa chu mihemte khutna kipedoh dingkon ahi, ati." 
Luke9:45 Ahivangin hiche athusei chu ahedoh pouve; ijeh-inem itile amahon ahetdoh louna dinguva, amaho-a kona ki-ima ahin; chule hiche athusei chu ipi aseina ham doh dingla akichauvin ahi." 
Luke9:46 Chuin alah uva koipen chu alenpen ahidem tin kinelna aumtan ahi. 
Luke9:47 Ahivangin Jesu'n alunguva chuche angaitou chu ahen, chapang neocha khat alan, akoma adinsah-in," 
Luke9:48 Ajah uva, Koi hijongle hiche chapang neocha hi keima mina sanga chun keima eisan ahi; chule koi hijongle keima eisanga chun eihinsolpa asan ahi. Ijeh-inem itile nalah uva aneopen chu alen ahi, ati." 
Luke9:49 Chuin John'in adonbutnin, Pipu, mi khat namina thilha nodoh kamuvin, chuin nangma kajuiju eijuipi lou jeh-un kakham taove, ati." 
Luke9:49 Chuin John'in adonbutnin, Pipu, mi khat namina thilha nodoh kamuvin, chuin nangma kajuiju eijuipi lou jeh-un kakham taove, ati." 
Luke9:50 Ahin Jesu'n amaho jah-a, kham hih-un, ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle eidoulou tapouvu chu eiho lamma pang ahi." 
Luke9:51 Chuin ahitin ahi; ama lahtouva aum ding phat alhin konin, Jerusalem'a che dingin amai angat changmelin," 
Luke9:52 Amasangah thangkou asol masan; chule amaho acheuvin ama dinga gotsa anakoipeh dingin, Samaria miho kho khatnah aluttaovin ahi." 
Luke9:53 Ahivangin ama Jerusalem'a che dinga amai angat jeh chun, amahon anasang tapouvin ahi." 
Luke9:54 Chule asolchah teni, Jacob le John nin hichu amulhon phatnin, Pakai, Elijah'in anabol banga, van'a kona meikong ahung lhah-a amaho hi akahvamna dingu thu peleuveng nalung ham, ati lhone." 
Luke9:54 Chule asolchah teni, Jacob le John nin hichu amulhon phatnin, Pakai, Elijah'in anabol banga, van'a kona meikong ahung lhah-a amaho hi akahvamna dingu thu peleuveng nalung ham, ati lhone." 
Luke9:55 Ahivangin ama akiheijin amani chu aphoh-in, ajah lhonna, Itobang lhagao neija nahi nakihet lhonpoi;" 
Luke9:56 Ajeh chu Mihem Chapa hi mihemho hinkho sumang dia hung ahipon, ahuhhing diuva hunga joh ahibouve, ati. Chuin kho choma ache taovin ahi." 
Luke9:57 Chuin lampia ache petnun mikhatnin ajah-a, Pakai, Nachena chan-ah juijinge, ati." 
Luke9:58 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Sial hon ko aneijun, chunga leng vachaten jong buh aneijun, Mihem Chapa vangin alu ngapna mun aneipoi, ati." 
Luke9:59 Chuin aman achom khat jah-a, neijuijin, ati. Ahin aman, Pakai, amasan kache-a kapa kagavuina ding thu neipen, ati." 
Luke9:60 Hichun Jesu'n ajah-a, mithihon amithiu kivuinao vinte; nangma chenlang Pathen gam thupha gahil lhang letan ati." 
Luke9:61 Achom khatman jong, Pakai, keiman nanung juijinge, amavang amasan ka-inkote kaga lhahna dingin neilhan, ati." 
Luke9:62 Jesu'n ajah-a, Mi koi hile langkon tuhta-a, kiheija anunglam vea chu Pathen lenggama hoi ahipoi, ati." 
Luke10:1 Chucheng jou chun Pakaiyin midang somsagi alhendoh ben, ama chena ding khopi chengsele muntina chun amasang sang-ah mi ninin asolin ahi." 
Luke10:2 Chuin ajah uva, Chang at ding atam lheh-in, ahivangin natonga alhome; hiche jeh chun achang atna-a dinga natongho ahinsoldohna dingin, chang neipu henga taovun." 
Luke10:3 Cheovin; veuvin, ngeihon lah-a kelngoi nou banga nangho kasol nahiuve." 
Luke10:4 Nanghon sumbom ahin, sakhao ahin, kengchot ahin, keng hih-un; chule lampia koima chibai boh hih-un." 
Luke10:5 Chule in nalutna ding chanuva, amasatah-in, hiche in'a hin lungmon lhunghen, tiuvin." 
Luke10:6 Chukoma chu lungmon umtah mi auma ahile, nalungmon chu achunga umding ahi; aum lou vangle nangho henga hung kile kit ding ahi." 
Luke10:7 Chule ipi hijongle amahon napeh peh-u chu neuvin donun, hiche in'a chun umun; ijeh-inem itile natongan athaman asana lom ahi. In khatna konin in khatna kichon hih-un." 
Luke10:8 Chule ipi kho hijongle nalutnaova chu min nanasan uva ahile, na-ang uva akoi chanu chu neuvin." 
Luke10:9 Chukoma um anaho chu boldamun; chule amaho jah-a chun, Pathen gam chu nakomu alhungtai, tiuvin." 
Luke10:10 Amavang ipi kho hijongle nalutna uva chu min nana lhunsah louvangule, chedoh-unlang akho sung lamlenuvah," 
Luke10:11 Kakeng phanguva beh nakho sunguva leivui sana katheh lhah khum nahiuve; hijongle Pathen gam ahung naitai ti hi heuvin, tin seijun." 
Luke10:12 Najah uva kasei ahi, chunileh chuche khopi thoh sanga chu Sodom thoh oljo ding ahi." 
Luke10:13 Ohe Chorazin! nada ahi, ohe Bethsaida! nada ahi; ijeh-inem itile nalah uva thilbol thahatna kidang kibol chengse chu, Tyre le Sidon khopi-a kibol hile, sotna pat chun achenghon khaodip pon kisilin vut lah-a touvuntin, alungu heitauvinte." 
Luke10:14 Ahinla thupi tan nile nangni thoh sanga Tyre le Sidon thoh oljo ding ahi. 
Luke10:15 Chule vangeija choisanga uma nang Capernaum, damuna sotlhah-a umding nahi jobouve." 
Luke10:16 Koi hile nangho thu ngai chan chun keima thu jong angai ahi; koi hile nangho pampaija chun keima jong eipampai ahi; chule keima eipampaija chun eisolpa jong apampai ahi, ati." 
Luke10:17 Chuin chuche somsagi ho chu kipahtah-in ahung kileuvin, Pakai, nangma minin thilhaho jong kathu-uvin anunge, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke10:18 Aman amaho jah-a, Van'a kona kolphe banga Satan ahunglhah kamui." 
Luke10:19 Veuvin, gulle aipi chonpeh dingle, melmapa thilboltheina jouse chunga chu thuneina kapeh nahiuve; hitia chu imachan nangho nasuhset lou dingu ahi." 
Luke10:20 Ahivangin lhagaoho nathuva anun jeh chun kipah hih-un, amavang naminu van'a akisut jeh chun kipah jouvin ati." 
Luke10:21 Chuin hiche pettah chun Jesu Lhagao Thengah hapan akipah-in, hitin ati, Ka Pa, vanle lei Pakai, nangman mi chingtele lungthim themho henga hicheng thuhi na-ima, naocha ho henga naphon doh jeh hin nangma kathangvah-e; Pa, hiti chu nangma lunglhaina lam ahi." 
Luke10:22 Imajouse ka Pan keima eipehdohsoh ahitai, chule Chapa chu koi ahi Pa tailouvin ahepoi; chule Pa chu koi ahi Chapa le Chapan Ama aphondoh aphondohna miho tailou koiman ahepoi, ati." 
Luke10:23 Chuin seijuiteho lama chun akiheijin atumbeh-in ahenguva, Nathilmu chengseu namunao mit chu avangphai:" 
Luke10:24 ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, nangho thil mu hi themgaoho tamtah le lenghon mu atup lheh-u ahin, ahivangin amupouvin ahi; chule nathu jah chengseu hi jah atupmun, ahinla ajapouvin ahi, ati." 
Luke10:25 Chuin veuvin, danthu them khat adingdoh-in, apatep-in, Houhil, tonsot hin kemlou kanei theina dinga ipi kabol dingham, ati." 
Luke10:26 Chuin aman ajah-a, danthua ipi kisunem? Nangman iti nasimem? ati." 
Luke10:27 Chuin aman adonbutnin, Nangman nalung pumpin, nalhagao pumpin, nathanei apumpin, chule nalungthim pumpin Pakai na-Pathen chu ngailun; chule nangma naki ngailut bangin naheng nakoma ngailun, ati." 
Luke10:28 Chuin aman ajah-a, Nadonbut dih tangeije; hiti chun bolin, chutile nahin ding ahi, ati." 
Luke10:29 Ahivangin ama them kichan agon, Jesu jah-a, Ahile kaheng kakom chu koiham? ati." 
Luke10:30 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Mi koiham khat Jerusalem'a konin Jericho'a achesuh-in, gucha michomho lah atohkhatan, amaho chun apon alahpeh-un, avovin, athi konin adalha taovin ahi." 
Luke10:31 Chuin thempu khat chuche lampia chun achesuh-in; chuin amachu amu phatnin, lamsih lang khatna apeltan ahi." 
Luke10:32 Chuin chutima chun Levi mi khatma chukom mun chu aphah phatnin, ahungin ama chu aven, lamsih lang khatna apeltai." 
Luke10:33 Ahin Samaria mi khat vang chu akholchena lamah aumna mun chu ahinphan; chuin ama chu amun ahile alung asen," 
Luke10:34 Akoma achen, avohnao mahaho chu thaole lengpitwi asunkhumin, amahaho chu atomin, chuin amatah gancha chungah atousah-in, jinlhun in'ah apuilutnin, ajentan ahi." 
Luke10:35 Chuin ajingin apotdoh ding konin, sumnong ni aladoh-in, inneipu chu apen, Ama hi phatechan anajenin, hiche kalval ijat hijongle nasuhmang jat chu keima kahung kile kit teng nangma sanange, ati." 
Luke10:36 Hicheng thum lah-a koipen chu gucha michom lah tohkhapa hengle kom nahisah-em? ati. 
Luke10:37 Chuin aman, ama akhotopa chu, ati. Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Chenlang nangman jong chutobang chun gabolin, ati." 
Luke10:38 Chuin acheuva ahile ama kho khatna alutnin; chuin amin Martha atiu numei khatnin a-in'a alhunsah-in ahi. 
Luke10:39 Chule amanu chun Mariam kiti sopi khat aneijin, amanu jong chu Pakai keng khophang bulah atouvin, athu angaijin ahi." 
Luke10:40 Martha vang chu lhachalen apangin akisalel lheh jengin, chuin ama henga ahungin, Pakai, kasopi nun keima jeng lhachale-a eichanglha hi ima nagel louham? Hijeh chun eikithopi dingin solin, ati." 
Luke10:41 Ahin Jesu'n adonbutnin, amanu jah-a, Martha, Martha, nangma thil tamtah ngaito-a lungkhama lunggim nahi;" 
Luke10:42 Ahinla ngaichat akhoh chu khatsehbou ahin, chule Mariam'in chuche aphalai chu akilhen ahitai; hichu ama-a kona kilahpeh lou ding ahi, ati." 
Luke11:1 Chuin ama mun khatnah ataovin, ajo phatnin aseijuiteho khatnin ajah-a, Pakai, John'in aseijuite taoje ahil bang chun nangman jong keiho neihilun, ati." 
Luke11:1 Chuin ama mun khatnah ataovin, ajo phatnin aseijuiteho khatnin ajah-a, Pakai, John'in aseijuite taoje ahil bang chun nangman jong keiho neihilun, ati." 
Luke11:2 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, nangho natao tengule, Van'a um ka Pau, namin kijahen, nagam hunglhung hen, van'a nalung chan akim bangin, leija jong nalungchan kimhen," 
Luke11:3 Tunin kaneh khop dingu anneh neipeuvin. 
Luke11:4 Kalei bateu kangaidam bangun, keiho batjong ngaidamin. Chule lhepna-a neipuilut hih-un, agilouva konin neihuh doh jouvin; tiuvin ati." 
Luke11:5 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Nalah uva, koipen nahiuvem khatnin jol neihen, chule jankhang kimin ahenga chehen ajah-a, Jol, changlhah pheng thum apan neipen;" 
Luke11:6 Ijeh-inem itile kajol khat kholjin kahenga ahung lhunge; ahin keiman a-anga luipeh ding imacha kaneipoi, gatile:" 
Luke11:7 Insunga pangin, Neisugim hih-in; tun kot akikhahtai, chule kachatetoh jalkhuna kalum khomui; nangma pe dingin kathou theipoi, tia donbut dinga?" 
Luke11:8 Keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, ajol ahi jeh chun thouhen gape hih jongle, athum lunlun jeh chun thouvintin adei jat chu gapente." 
Luke11:9 Chule keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, Thumun, kipe ding nahiuve; holun, namu dingu ahi; kiuvun, kihonpeh ding nahiuve." 
Luke11:10 Ijeh-inem itile athumchan achangin; chule aholan amun; chule akiuva chu kihonpeh ding ahi. 
Luke11:11 Chule nalah uva koipen nahiuvem, mipa hija achapan changlhah athumle song pe dinga? Ahiloule nga athumle nga khela gul pe dinga?" 
Luke11:12 Ahiloule ahtui athumle aipi pe dinga? 
Luke11:13 Hijeh chun nanghobon migiloutah hiuva, nachateo thilpha pehje nahet ule; hiche sanga chu gam chenga van'a Pa chun ahenga thumte chu Lhagao Theng apeh lou ding ham? ati." 
Luke11:14 Chuin aman thilha paomo khat anodoh-in, chuin thilha chu apotdoh phatnin, mipaomopa chun thu aseitan ahi; hichun mipi ho chun kidang asa lheh jengun ahi." 
Luke11:15 Ahivangin alah uva mi kimkhat chun, thilhaho lengpa Beelzabul vanga thilhaho anodoh ahi, atiuve." 
Luke11:16 Adang kimkhatsen ama patepnan van'a kona melchihna athumun ahi. 
Luke11:17 Ahivangin aman amaho lung ngaito chu ahen, amaho jah-a, Gamsung khat amale ama kidoutoa kichom khen chan chu amang thahjin, insung khat kidou chu alhujin ahi." 
Luke11:18 Satan jong amale ama akidoule agam iti dindoh ding ham? Beelzabul vanga thilhaho anodoh ahi neitiula ahin," 
Luke11:19 Keima Beelzabul vanga thilhaho nodoh kahile, nachateovin koi vanga anodohjiu hintem? Hijeh-a chu amaho cheng chu nangho thutana pang ding ahiuve." 
Luke11:20 Ahin keima Pathen khutjunga thilhaho nodohji-a kahi vangle, Pathen gam chu nahengu hung lhunga ahitai." 
Luke11:21 Mihat in manchah kimkeija akipatna a-in angalai chansen, anei bitkeijin aumji;" 
Luke11:22 Amavang ama sang hatjon abulu-a, ajo tengle, akigina agalvon chu asutlhah pehjin, anei alahpeh chu ahomcheh jitan ati." 
Luke11:23 Koi hile keima lama pang lou chu eidouva ahi; chule eikhop khompi lou chu athecheh ahi. 
Luke11:24 Lhagao boh chu mi sunga kona apotdoh tengle, twi beina muntin-ah avahle avahlen, cholngahna aholin; chule amu jou hih-in, Kahung potdohna ka-in mama-a chun chekit tange, ati." 
Luke11:25 Chuin ahungleh akitheh ngim le akijephoi amun," 
Luke11:26 Chutengle achen ama sanga giloujo lhagao dang sagi agapuijin; chule amaho chua chun alutnun achengji taove; chule mipa umchan chu amasa sangin anununga akhohjoji tan ahi, ati." 
Luke11:27 Chuin ahitin ahi, aman thu chucheng asei chun, numei khat mipi lah-a kon chun aw sangtah-in ajah-a, Navopma naobu le nangman nachep noi chu anunnoma ahiuve, ati." 
Luke11:28 Ahinla aman, Ahinai, ahivangin Pathen thu ja-a jopteho chu anunnomjo ahiuve, ati." 
Luke11:29 Chuin mipi ho ahenga ahung kikhopkhop phatnun, aman, Tulai hiche khang hi khanggilou ahin; melchihna aholun, ahinla Jonah themgao melchihna tailou adang kipe lou ding ahi." 
Luke11:30 Ijeh-inem itile Jonah Nineveh mite dinga melchihna ahi banga chu, Mihem Chapa jong tulai khanga ding ahi." 
Luke11:31 Lhanglam gam lengnun thupi tanna-a hiche tulai khang mite toh hung thoudoh khoma, amaho hi themmo ahinchan ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman kolmonga konin Solomon chih thu ngai dingin ahungin ahi; ahin, veuvin, Solomon sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume." 
Luke11:32 Nineveh khopi-a miho chun thupi tanna-a tulai khang mite toh hung ding khoma, tulai khang hi themmo ahinchansah dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Jonah thuhil chun alung aheijun ahi; ahin, veuvin, Jonah sanga chungnungjo hikoma aume." 
Luke11:33 Mi koiman meivah avah-in ningchonga guhthimin akoi ngaipoi, lo jong akhukhum ngaipoi, mi aluttehon avah amu theina dingun atunna chunga atungji bouvui." 
Luke11:34 Namit chu natahsa vah ahi; namit achima ahile, nati apumpia vah ahi; aphat lou vangle nati pumpi-a thima ahi." 
Luke11:35 Hijeh chun nasunga vah um chu athim louna dingin kivet phatnin. 
Luke11:36 Hiche jeh chun natahsa apumpia avah sohkeija, athimkom aum louva ahile, meivah vahtah-in nasalvah banga vah sohkei ding ahi, ati." 
Luke11:37 Chuin thu aseipet chun Pharisai khatnin an nehpi dingin akouvin; chuin ama alutnin, an nedingin atoutan ahi." 
Luke11:38 Chuin Pharisai pa chun an aneh masanga akisil lou chu amun adatmo lheh jengin ahi. 
Luke11:39 Chuin Pakai chun ajah-a, Tun Pharisai ho, nanghon khonle lheng apolam nasil ngim naovin; ahin nasung lamu vang hunama lahle kiloset adimsetne." 
Luke11:40 Vo lungthim beiho, apolam sema chun asung lam jong asem hilou ham?" 
Luke11:41 Hijongle thil nanei kham khamu chu vaicha gentheite tona dingin peuvin: chutile, veuvin; nangho dinga imajouse athenga ahi." 
Luke11:42 Ahinla, ohe Pharisai ho nadau ahi! ijeh-inem itile nanghon pudina le lounakha chule anche louhing jouse somakhat natoh jiuvin; ahinla vaihom dihle Pathen ngailut nadonpouve; ahinla chutiho jong chu donda deh louva hicheng hi nabol dingu ahi." 
Luke11:43 Ohe Pharisai ho nangho nadau ahi! ijeh-inem itile nanghon kikhopna in'a touna pipenle, kailhanga min chibai naboh dingu nadeijun ahi." 
Luke11:44 Ohe, danthusun ho, Pharisai ho le miphalhem ho nadau ahi! ijeh-inem itile nangho buikhuh kimu lou, mihon he louva achung ajotlejiu tobang nahiuve ati." 
Luke11:45 Chuin danthu them ho khatnin adonbutnin ajah-a, Houhil, nangman chutia nasei chu keiho jong neihoutomu ahi, ati." 
Luke11:46 Chuin aman, Ohe, danthu themho nangho jong nadau ahi! ijeh-inem itile nanghon poh-a kilom lou pohgih mi napohsah-un, nanghonla pohgih chu nakhut jung khatchan jong nakhoiji pouve." 
Luke11:47 Nangho nadau ahi! ijeh-inem itile naputeu napateu vin themgaoho athatnun, nanghon alhanu nasempeh jiuvin ahi." 
Luke11:48 Chutichu ahi jeh-in hichu ahetoh nangho nahiuvin, napu napateu thilbol chu naphasah uve; ijeh-inem itile amahon amaho chu athatnun, nanghon alhan natungun ahi." 
Luke11:49 Hijeh chun Pathen chihna-in jong ahiti seije, Keiman ahenguva themgaoho le solchah ho soling ting; chule amahon abang athaova abang abolset dingu ahi;" 
Luke11:50 Chutia chu Abel thisan kiso-a pat, maicham le Pathen houin kikah-a Zachariah athaova athisan kisogei, vannoi leiset bul kiphu tila patna themgaoho jouse thisan kiso chu, hiche tulai khang mite chunga aphu kila ding ahi." 
Luke11:51 Ahi, nangho jah-a kasei ahi, tulai mite chungabou kila ding ahi." 
Luke11:52 Ohe, danthu themho nadau ahi! ijeh-inem itile nanghon hetna kot-heh nalamangun, nanghola nalutpouvin, mi alut dingla nakhamun ahi, ati." 
Luke11:53 Chuin ajah uva thu chucheng asei phat chun, danthu sunho le Pharisai hon lunghan sah-a thu tamtah seisah din, hachang phinin aphin pan taovin ahi." 
Luke11:54 Amoso theina diuvin akama kona phabep khat jahdingin aholun, chule achangun ahi." 
Luke12:1 Hiche pet chun mipi atama tam, khat chunga khat kal leuva ahung kikhop phat chun, aman amasa penin aseijuite jah-a, Pharisai ho chola chun kihong phaovin; hichu phatlhem ahi." 
Luke12:2 Ahinla akiphongdoh lou ding akisela imacha aumpoi, chule hetdoh lou ding imacha aki-ima jong aumpoi." 
Luke12:3 Hiche jeh-a chu muthima naseichanu chu khovah-a kija ding ahi; chule indan sungnunga nabenga guhthima naseiju chu, in chunga kisam ding ahi." 
Luke12:4 Chule kajol kagol nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, tahsa thattheija akal ima lo thei lou chu kicha hih-un." 
Luke12:5 Keiman nakichat dingu hilunge; atha nunga damuna lelutna ding thaneina neija ama chu kichauvin, najah uva kasei ahi; ama chu kichauvin." 
Luke12:6 Vasilih nga khu paisa ni manna kilhaji louham? Ahin, alah uva khat jengcha jong Pathen angah suhmilin aumkhapon ahi." 
Luke12:7 Ahin nalu chunguva nasamjang jouseu sana kisim sohkeija ahi. Kicha hih-un; vasilih tamtah sanga nangho lujo nahiuve. 
Luke12:8 Chule najah uva kasei ahi, Koi hile miho anga keima eiseidoh chan chu, Mihem Chapan jong ama chu Pathen vantil teho anga aseidoh ding ahi:" 
Luke12:9 Amavang miho anga keima eiseileppa vang chu, Pathen vantil teho anga ama jong kiseilep ding ahi." 
Luke12:10 Chule Mihem Chapa chunga thuse sei jouse chu kingaidam ding ahi; Lhagao Theng taitoma vang chu kingaidam lou ding ahi. 
Luke12:11 Chule amahon nangho kikhopna-a vaipoho hengle thunei ho henga nakai tengule, Ipi-a iti kadonbut dingham, ipi kasei dingham tin lungkham hih-un;" 
Luke12:12 Ijeh-inem itile apettah chule Lhagao Thengin nasei dingu nahil dingu ahinai, ati." 
Luke12:13 Chuin mipi lah-a kon chun mikhatnin, Mihil, nei le gou eikihoppi dingin ka-u jah-a seijin, ati." 
Luke12:14 Ahivangin aman ajah-a, Mihem, kon nangho chunga vaihomle neile gou hoppeh-a eisemem? ati." 
Luke12:15 Chuin ajah uvah, Ching theijun, neipap kiloset jouse-a konin kikangseuvin; ijeh-inem itile mihem khat hinkho hi anei le gou haona-a chu uma ahipoi, ati." 
Luke12:16 Chuin aman ajah uva thulem khat aseijin, Mihao khat gam sungah neh aput behseh jengin;" 
Luke12:17 Hichun aman alungthimin, Kalousoh chengse kakoikhomna ding munla aumpon; i-kalo ding hitam? ati." 
Luke12:18 Chuin aman, hitin bolinge: kachangsal chengse phelhang ting, asanga lenjo cheh-in sangkate; chule kalousoh jousele kathil jouse chua chun koikhom inge." 
Luke12:19 Chutengle kalhagao jah-a, Lhagao, nangman kum sottah-a dinga thil tamtah nakikhol khom ahitai; kicholdon, nenlang donin, nomsa tah-in umin tinge, ati." 
Luke12:20 Ahinla Pathen'in ama jah-a, Vo lungthimbei, tujana hi nahinna nanga kona kiladoh ding ahitai; chule nathil kholkhom chengse chu koija hitantem? ati." 
Luke12:21 Pathen'a dinga haolouva ama dinga sum kikhola chu chutobang chu ahi, ati." 
Luke12:22 Chuin aman aseijuite jah-a, Hijeh-a chu nangho jah-a kasei ahi, I-kaneh ding hitam tin nahinna dingule, i-kasila kachen ding hitam tin natahsa dingun lungkham hih-un." 
Luke12:23 Ijeh-inem itile anneh sanga hinkho, nihchen ponsil sanga tahsa thupijo ahi." 
Luke12:24 Va-ah hokhu ngaitouvin; amahon tula atupouvin, atla a-at pouvin; pang le changsal la aneipouvin; ahivangin Pathen'in amaho khu avahnai. Nangho vacha sanga iti nalutjoh-u hitam?" 
Luke12:25 Chule nangho lah-a lungkham hatna ahinkho tongkhat jopsaobe thei koi nahiuvem? 
Luke12:26 Hijeh chun nanghon aneopenbon nabol thei louvule, adangdang dinga ibola lungkhama nahiuvem?" 
Luke12:27 Molhoipah khu iti khanham ngaitouvin: hiche ho khun tongla atonggim pouvin, patla akheh pouvin; ahivanginla keiman kaseipeh nahiuve, Solomon jeng jong aloupina jouse-a akivon chun, hiche molhoipah khattoh kibangin akijem hoi pon ahi." 
Luke12:28 Chule jaova hampa tunia uma jinga lhum sunga kileh lutta ding jengbon Pathen'in achuti jeple, Vo tahsan lhomho, chusanga chu aman nangho najepjoh lou dinguham?" 
Luke12:29 Chule ipi naneh dingu, ipi nadon dingu, hichu hol hih-un, chule lung dongin jong um hih-un." 
Luke12:30 Ijeh-inem itile vannoi namtinin hitiho jouse chu aholjiuve: ahin hitiho chu nanghon nangai chaove ti na-Pau vin ahenai. 
Luke12:31 Ahivangin nanghon Pathen lenggam joh chu holun, chutengle hicheng jouse hi naki pehbe dingu ahi." 
Luke12:32 Hon lhomho, kicha hih-un; ijeh-inem itile nangho lenggam pehding hi na-Pau lungdei ahi lheh jenge." 
Luke12:33 Naneichan-u joh-unlang mivaicha gentheiho peuvin; chule guchan amaiphah louna, nget nin jong anehset louna, van'ah sumbom lui thei lou kisemun, kemlou sum kikholun." 
Luke12:34 Ijeh-inem itile nagou umna-a chu nalungu jong umding ahi. 
Luke12:35 Natai kigeh-un, chule nathaomei vahsah jingun;" 
Luke12:36 Chule moupui na-a kona ahunga, kot ahin kiu phat phatle hongpai jeng dinga a-pakai lam kat jinga um mitoh bangun."
