Luke12:37 Pakai ahunga soh kiging jinga um ahungtoho chu anunnom ahiuve; keiman nangho tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Aman atai akigeh-a, amaho chu ankong aumsah-a, ahenguva hunga amatah ajenleuva pang ding ahi." 
Luke12:38 Chule ama jan dan nina ahim, jan dan thumna ahima ahunga, chuto banga chu ahung to-a ahile, hitobang soh ho chu anunnom ahiuve." 
Luke12:39 Chule itih phatna gucha ahung ding inneipun ahet hile, kiging jingintin, phetvang dinga a-in chu adalhah louhel ding ahi, hichu nanghon heuvin." 
Luke12:40 Nangho phasademin umum; ijeh-inem itile nagel lou pettah-ule Mihem Chapa chu hung ding ahi, ati." 
Luke12:41 Chuin Peter'in, Pakai, hiche thulem chu keiho chang dinga naseiha, mi jouse dinga naseiham? ati." 
Luke12:42 Chuin Pakaiyin, Neiching tahsan umtah le chingtah, aphatcha achan cheh-u an hoppeh dinga a-pakaipan a-insunga jouse chunga apipua apansah ding chu koiham?" 
Luke12:43 Apakai ahung tenga chutia bol ahungto soh chu anunnom ahi. 
Luke12:44 Nangho tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Ama chu anei jouse chunga apipua apansah ding ahi." 
Luke12:45 Amavang sohpa chun, Ka pakai ahung geije tihen, soh numei ho le soh pasal ho deng pan tahen, chule nehen, donhen khamtale," 
Luke12:46 Hiche sohpa chun aginchat lou nitahle, ahetlou pettah-a a-pakaipa chu hunga; ama chu tum ni asoa, achan chu tahsan louho lah-a akoi ding ahi." 
Luke12:47 Chule soh a-pakai lung lam he-a, phasadema umlou, chule alunggot banga bol lou chu tamtah vei kivo ding ahi:" 
Luke12:48 Ahin hetlouva voh ding dola thilbola vang chu kivo lhom ding ahi. Ijeh inem itile tamtah kipe henga chu tamtah kibeng ding; chule koi hile atamjocheh kivopsah henga chu atamjo cheh kingeh ding ahi. 
Luke12:49 Keima vannoi leiset chunga mei lehlha dinga hunga kahi; tutah jeng jong hin kadohtale katinave! 
Luke12:50 Ahivangin baptize chan ding kaneijin, chuche kamolso masangse-a iti kaningnoh hitam!" 
Luke12:51 Lei chunga chamna lensah dinga hunga neingai touvem? Ahipoi, kaseipeh nahiuve, asukhen dingjoh-a hung kahibouve:" 
Luke12:52 Ijeh-inem itile tukal insung khatna mi nga umchu ni-a kikhen diu, nin thum adouva, thumin ni adou ding ahi." 
Luke12:53 Pan achapa adou ding, chapan apa adou ding, nun achanu adou ding; chanun anu adouding, teh-in amounu adou ding, mouvin atehpi adouva kikhento diu ahi, ati." 
Luke12:54 Chuin aman mipi ho jah-a jong chun, Nanghon lhum lama mei soh namu tengule, go ju ding ahi nati paijen jiuvin; chule ahitahbeh jin ahi." 
Luke12:55 Chule lhang lama kona hui anunle, sa lheh ding ahi natiji uvin; hi jong chu achutijin ahi." 
Luke12:56 Nangho miphalhem ho, nanghon leiset chungle van umjela nasuto thei naovin, tulai hiti thil umchan iti nasuhto thei lou uham?" 
Luke12:57 Chule ibola nanghon adihlam chu nakingaito lou uham? 
Luke12:58 Ijeh-inem itile naheh patoh thutan vaipo henga nache tengule, lampia ama-a kona kiteldohna dingin kihabolin, achuti loule aman nang thutan vaipo henga nacham louva nakai ding ahi; chule thutan vaihom chun sottol miman khutna pen natin, sottol miman chun songkul'a nakhum ding ahi." 
Luke12:59 Kaseipeh nahi, nangman paisa san khat geija nasahsoh masangse-a, iti jongle chua kona napotdoh louhel ding ahi." 
Luke13:1 Hiche pettah chun akoma um phabepmin, Pilate'in Galilee miho atha-a, athisanu a-Pathen hou nahou toh achopel thu chu ajah-a aseijun ahi." 
Luke13:2 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin, ajah uva, Chutobang athoh jeh uva chu amaho chu Galilee miho jouse sanga chonse deh ahiuve, tia nangaitou vem?" 
Luke13:3 Kaseipeh nahiuve, ahipoi: nangho jong lung nahei louvule chutobangma chu namanthah dingu ahi." 
Luke13:4 Chule Siloam insang achima mi somleget adel lihho jong chu Jerusalem'a cheng jouse sanga suhkhel neideh-a nangaitou vem? 
Luke13:5 Kaseipeh nahiuve, ahipoi: nangho jong lung nahei louvule chutobangma chu namanthah dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke13:6 Chuin aman thulem hiche hi aseijin ahi: Mikhat hin alengpi leijah theichang phung khat kiphut aneijin; chuin aga ahung holin ahile, khatcha jong amupon ahi." 
Luke13:7 Chuin aman lengpilei lhoupa jah-a, Ven, hiche kum thum sung hin kahungin, theichang phunga aga kahung holjin khatchala kamupoi; phuh lhutan; hiche hin idinga alei manmo aso dingham? ati." 
Luke13:8 Chuin aman adonbutnin ajah-a, Pakai, tu kum-in jong hoitadin; keiman akimvel lai jingting, bong-eh sunginge;" 
Luke13:9 Chukala agale apha; aga lou vangle phuhtan, ati." 
Luke13:10 Chuin cholngah nin kikhopna in khatnah thu ahilin ahi. 
Luke13:11 Hia chun veuvin, kum somle kum get chamona lhagao vop numei khat aumin; amanu chu atingbonga, achama dingjang thei louhel ahi." 
Luke13:12 Chuin Jesu'n amanu chu amu phatnin, akouvin, ajah-a, Numei, nachamona-a kona kilhadoh nahitai, ati." 
Luke13:13 Chuin amanu chungah akhut angamin ahile chupettah chun ajangpaihel jengin, Pathen avahchoitan ahi." 
Luke13:14 Chuin cholngah ni-a Jesu'n adamsah jeh chun, kikhopna in vaipopa chun lunghang tah-in adonbutnin, miho jah-a, Mihemin na atohna ding ni gup uma ahin; hiche sung chun hungun lang kibol damuvin; cholngah ni vangle hungji hih-un, ati." 
Luke13:15 Ahinla Pakaiyin ama chu adonbutnin, Nangho mi miphalhem ho, nanghon nabongchalu hijongle, nasangan'u hi jongle cholngah ni-a a-ankonga kona nasutlhah uva twi dona napui chehji hih-um?" 
Luke13:16 Achutile Abraham son hiche numeinu hi, veuvin, kum somle kum get Satan'in ahen na-a kona cholngah ni-a sutlhah angai hilouham? ati." 
Luke13:17 Thu chucheng asei phatnin adouho chu ajahcha taovin; mipi chengse vang chu athilbol loupi jouse jeh chun akipah sohkeijun ahi. 
Luke13:18 Hijeh chun aman hitin seije, Pathen lenggam chu itobang ham? Ipitoh katekah ding ham?" 
Luke13:19 Ankam mu chang khat mikhatnin alah-a ahona athea, akhandoh-a thingphung asoa, abah lah-a chunga leng vachaho age tobang ahi, ati." 
Luke13:20 Chuin aman aseiben, Pathen lenggam chu ipitoh katekah ding ham?" 
Luke13:21 Numei khatnin chol alah-a, changbong dan thum lah-a aboncha apomsoh kahse-a avui tobang ahi, ati." 
Luke13:22 Chutichun aman khopihole khoneoho ajotnin, thu ahilpeh-in, Jerusalem ajonin ahi." 
Luke13:23 Chuin mikhatnin ajah-a, Pakai, huhhing-a umding hohi lhom uvam? ati." 
Luke13:24 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Kot jima lut ding kichu-uvin: ijeh-inem itile keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, mi tamtah lut kigo ding, ahivanga lut thei lou ding ahi." 
Luke13:25 Ahivangin a-inneipu akipatdoh-a kot akha nungle nangho polama nadin uva, Pakai, Pakai, kot neihonun, tia kot nakiu tengule; aman, Hoilam kon mi nahiu kahepoi ati ding;" 
Luke13:26 Chutengle nanghon, Na-ang sungtah-a jong kaneuvin kadonun, chule kakhosung lamlenuva jong neihilui nati dingu;" 
Luke13:27 Chule aman, Keiman nangho hoilam kon nahiu kahepoi; kakoma konin chemangun, nangho chonset bolteho, ati ding ahi." 
Luke13:28 Abraham, Isaac, Jacob chule themgaoho jouse Pathen lenggama a-umu namuva, nangho pama nakiledoh-u namu tengule, hikoma chu kale hagel umding ahi." 
Luke13:29 Chule amaho solamle lhum lama kon, sahlam le lhanglama kona hunguva, Pathen lenggama tou ding ahiuve." 
Luke13:30 Chule, veuvin, anukhahho chu masa ding, chule amasaho chu nukhah ding ahi, ati." 
Luke13:31 Hiche pettah chun Pharisai ho phabep ahungun, ajah-a, Hikoma konin potdoh-in; chemangtan, ijeh-inem itile Herod'in tha dingin natupme, atiuve." 
Luke13:32 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Cheovinlang chuche Sial jah-a chun gaseijun, Ven, keiman tunile jinga thilhaho kanodoh-a, anaho kadamsah ahin, athum ni leh kachaisoh ding ahi." 
Luke13:33 Ahoi hijongle tunile jinga, chule akitni leh kachena dinga kachepeh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem louva themgao thi thei ahipoi." 
Luke13:34 Vo Jerusalem, Jerusalem, themgaoho that le ahenga kisol teho songa seplih; ahpin anoute alha noija a-opkhum banga, keiman jong nachate ijatvei opkhum dinga kagot hitam! Ahin nangho nanompouve." 
Luke13:35 Veuvin, na-in chu akamhel dinga nangho kidalhah peh nahiuve; chule tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Pakai mina hungpa chu anunnome nati masang seuva, keima neimu lou dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke14:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, cholngah nin Pharisai ho pipu khat in'a an nedingin achen, amahon avelhi jingun ahi." 
Luke14:2 Chuin veuvin, amasanga chun akhut akeng pom khat aumin." 
Luke14:3 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin danthu themho le Pharisai ho jah-a thu aseijin, Cholngah ni-a boldam danngai ham? ati." 
Luke14:4 Amahola athipbeh-un ahi. Chuin aman ama chu alan aboldamin, chuin achesahtan ahi." 
Luke14:5 Chuin aman ajah uva, Nalah uva koi nahiuvem, asangan ahim abongchal ahim twikul'a lhalut tale, cholngah ni-a agaloidoh paijeng lou dinga? ati." 
Luke14:6 Chuin amahon hicheng chu adonbut thei kit tapouve. 
Luke14:7 Chuin akikouhon touna phapha alhenu amu phatnin, thulem khat aseijin ajah uva," 
Luke14:8 Nangho mi khattouvin moupui golvahna-a nakou tengule touna pipen-ah tou hih-un; ajole nangho sanga ja umjo akou umkhantin; 
Luke14:9 Akoupa le ahungpa chu anilhonin hungintin najah-a, Hichepa hi mun otnin ati ding; chutengle nangma jahcha puma anoinung pena natou ding ahi." 
Luke14:10 Amavang nangma nakikou tengle, chenlang anempena touvin; hitichu hile nakoupa ahung tengle najah-a, Jol, sangjep-ah toutango tikhat nintin; hiteng chule ankonga natoupi jouse maija chu choi-atna naum ding ahi." 
Luke14:11 Ijeh-inem itile ama kichoisang jouse chu kisunem ding; chule ama kineosah-a chu choisanga umding ahi, ati." 
Luke14:12 Chuin aman akoupa jah-a, Nangman sun hijongle jan hijongle golvah nabol tengle, najol, nagol jong, nasopi ho jong kou hih-in, nainkote le naheng nakom mihaoho jong kou hih-in; ajole amahon jong nangma kouvin natin sadoh getnun nate." 
Luke14:13 Ahin golvah nabol tengle, mivaicha, mi tikimlou, elbai, mitcho koujo bouvin;" 
Luke14:14 Chule nangma nanun nom ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho chun lesahna ding ima aneipouve: ajeh chu mi chondihho tho kit tengle nangma nakisa ding ahi, ati." 
Luke14:15 Chuin ankonga atoupiho khatnin hitiho chu ajan, ajah uva, Pathen lenggama changlhah ne dingpa chu anunnoma ahi, ati." 
Luke14:16 Ahin aman ajah-a, Mi koiham khatnin jan golvah loupitah abolin; chule mi tamtah akouvin;" 
Luke14:17 Chuin anneh phatnin aman akouho chu, Hungun, tun ijakai aphasadem cheh ahitai ti dingin asohpa asolin ahi." 
Luke14:18 Chuin amaho chu thakhat tah-in ana thuphaove. Amasapenpan ajah-a, Keiman lou kachon, kache-a kagavet lou akhoh-e; katao ahi, neilha ongin, ati." 
Luke14:19 Chuin khatpan, Keiman bongchal to nga kachon, aphat aset patep dinga che ding kahi; katao ahi, neilha ongin, ati." 
Luke14:20 Chuin khatpan, Keiman ji kaneijin, hijeh chun hung theiponge, ati." 
Luke14:21 Hijeh chun sohpa chu ahungin hitiho chu a-pakaipa henga alhutnin ahi. Chutah-in inneipu chu alunghangin asohpa jah-a chun, Chedoh loijin khosung lamlen le khopi sung thokah juija gachen, chule mi vaicha, mi tibukimlou, chule mitcho, elbai hikoma gapuilutnin ati." 
Luke14:22 Chuin sohpa chun, Pakai, neithupeh bangin kabolin, ahivangin mun a-ong nalaije, ati." 
Luke14:23 Chuin pakai chun sohpa jah-a chun, Nangma lamlhongle daipamah chen, chule ka-in adimna dingin, miho gajollut teiteijin." 
Luke14:24 Kaseipeh nahi, Kami kouho chu khatchan jong kagolvah an atepkhahlou dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke14:25 Hichun mipi hon tamtah amatoh alhonun; chuin ama akiheijin ajah uva," 
Luke14:26 Koi hijongle kahenga hunga apa, anu, aji, achate, asopipaho, asopinuho chule ama hinkho jeng jong itcha louhela bollou chu kaseijui hi thei lou ding ahi." 
Luke14:27 Koi hile athingpel kiputle-a kanung hin jui lou chu kaseijui hi thei lou ding ahi. 
Luke14:28 Ijeh-inem itile insang sah ding go-an touva ijat lut dingham, chule ajojou ding hina ajo joulou dingham, tia sutoh masa lou nalah uva koi nahiuvem?" 
Luke14:29 Ama chun abul phutdoh hen jouta hihle, ija kihe-am, amuho jousen ama chu nuisat untin," 
Luke14:30 Hichepan asapanin, ajou joutapoi, ti getnunte." 
Luke14:31 Ahiloule leng khat leng chom khattoh kisatto dingan, asat dinga hung mi sangsomni chu mi sang soma ajo ding hina ajolou dingham, ti touva geltoh masa lou dinga koiham?" 
Luke14:32 Ajo lou dinga ahile, khat chu gamla tah-a aum petna kichamna thutep thum dinga palai asol ding ahi." 
Luke14:33 Hitobanga chu nangho lah-a jong anei chengse dalha louva chu kaseijui hi thei lou ding ahi. 
Luke14:34 Chi hi aphai, ahivangin chi jeng jong tamta henlang hile ipi-a ki-alsah dingham?" 
Luke14:35 Leining dinla aphapon, bong-eh din jongla aphatna umlou ahitan; min hichu pam lama apaidohjin ahi. Angaina ding na neijan ngaihen, ati." 
Luke15:1 Hichun kaidongho jousele michonseho jouse athu ngai dingin ahengah ahung naijun ahi. 
Luke15:2 Chuin Pharisaiho le danthu sunhon, Hichepan michonseho aloijin, amahotoh an ane khome atiuvin aphun gel taovin ahi." 
Luke15:3 Chuin aman amaho jah-a thulem hiche hi aseije," 
Luke15:4 Nangho lah-a koi nahiuvem, kelngoi jakhat neija, alah-a khat amanle amanglou somko le ko chu gama dalha-a, avahmang khat chu amudoh kahse-a hol louva?" 
Luke15:5 Chule amudoh tengle kipahtah-in alengkouva apujin; 
Luke15:6 Chule in ahung lhun tengle agolho le a-inhengho akou khomin, ajah uva, Neikipa piuvin; ijeh-inem itile kakelngoi manga chu kamutai, ati." 
Luke15:7 Kaseipeh nahiuve, chutobang chun alung hei ding khoh lou michonpha somko le ko chunga sanga, michonse khat lungheija van'a kipana umding ahi." 
Luke15:8 Ahiloule numei koiham dangka som neija, khat amansahle meivah dea, chule in theh-a amudoh kahse-a gunchu tah-a hol lou dinga?" 
Luke15:9 Chule amanun amudoh tengle agolhole a-inhengho akou khomin, Neikipa piuvin; ijeh-inem itile kadangka mansah chu kamutai, atijin ahi." 
Luke15:10 Kaseipeh nahiuve, chutobang chun Pathen vantilte angah michonse khat lunghei chungah kipana aumjin ahi, ati." 
Luke15:11 Chuin aman, Mikhatnin chapa ni aneijin:" 
Luke15:12 Chule aneojopa chun apa jah-a, Hepa, kagou chan ding chu neipen, ati. Chuin aman anei chu ahop pehtan ahi." 
Luke15:13 Chuin ni chomkhat jouvin aneojopa chun abonchan achom khomin, khol gamlatah khatnah achen; chuin aman chukoma chun anei chengse chu kinomsahnan asumang sohtan ahi." 
Luke15:14 Chuin aboncha asuhmang phatnin, chuche gama chun kel nasatah alhatan ahile, hichun ama chu alhasam pantan ahi." 
Luke15:15 Chuin ama achen, chuche gam miho khat agabelin; chuin amapa chun avoh vah dingin alou lama asolin ahi." 
Luke15:16 Chuin voh neh imahoh hochu neh-a oiva ding ago lheh jengin, koimanla apepon ahi." 
Luke15:17 Chuin akhahdoh phatnin, Kapa in'a asoh thalah ho khujatpi nehkhop le nehval changlhah neija, keimala gilkela thiding kahi!" 
Luke15:18 Keima kipat ingting kapa henga chengting, ajah-a, Pa, van douna le nangma mitmun kachonse tai;" 
Luke15:19 Kei nachapa tihoi kahitapoi; nasoh thalah ho khat bangin neisemin gatitange, ati." 
Luke15:20 Chuin ama akipatnin, apa henga ahungtai. Ahin ama gamlatah agei nalaijin, apan amun, alung asen, alhaijelin, angonga achun, achopchuh chuh jengin ahi." 
Luke15:21 Chuin achapa chun ajah-a, Hepa, keima van douna le nangma mitmun kachonse tai: nachapa tihoi kahitapoi; nasoh thalah ho khat bangin neisemin, ati." 
Luke15:22 Ahivangin apan asohho jah-a, Pon phapentah galadoh loijunlang silpeh-un, chule khutjem akhutna bupeh-un, chule kengchot sepeh-un." 
Luke15:23 Chule bongnou kivah thao chu hinlaovin lang thatnun, chule neuhitin, nomsa tah-in umu hite:" 
Luke15:24 Ijeh-inem itile hiche kachapa hi athisa hing kit ahin; chule amangsa kimu kit ahi, ati. Hitichun nop abol pantaove." 
Luke15:25 Hiche petna chun achapa lenjo chu louva um ahin; chuin ahunga in kom ahung naijin, ima kitum ginle lam gin ajan;" 
Luke15:26 Chuin aman asohho khat akouvin, Hikhu ipi bola hiuvam? tin adongin ahi." 
Luke15:27 Chuin aman ajah-a, Nanaopa hunga ahile napan damsela amu kit jeh-a bongnou kivah thao chu atha ahi, ati." 
Luke15:28 Hichun ama alunghangin, in'a che ding anomtapon ahi. Hijeh chun apa apotdoh-in, agajolin ahi." 
Luke15:29 Ahivangin aman apa adonbutnin, Ven, keiman kum hijat hi nangma kajenin, khatveicha jong nathu kapal lhahna aumpoi; ahivanginla kagol hotoh golnop kabolna dingin kelnou khatcha jong imatih-in neipekhapoi." 
Luke15:30 Ahin hiche nachapa notiho koma nanei chengse nemanga sumanghela hi ahung hungin bongnou kivah thao nathapeh-e, ati." 
Luke15:31 Chuin apan ajah-a, Chapa, nangma kakoma umjing nahin, chule kanei jouse nanga ahi." 
Luke15:32 Hiche nanaopa vanghi athisa hing kit ahin; amangsa kimu kit ahi; hijeh-a chu nom satah leh kipahtah-a i-um dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke16:1 Chuin aman aseijuite jah-a jong hiche hi aseije, Mihaotah khatnin neiching aneijin; ama chun anei asumange tin ahenga aheh taovin ahi." 
Luke16:2 Chuin aman ama chu akouvin, ajah-a, Hiche nachunga thu kajah hi iti thuham? Naneichin sutoh sohkeijin lang neipen; ijeh-inem itile tukala neichinga napanthei louding ahitai, ati." 
Luke16:3 Chuin neichingpa chun ama changin, Ka pakaipan neichinga kapan eihaisah ahitan; ipi i-kati ding hitam? Lei lai dingla katha ahatpon; thum dingla kajah achan." 
Luke16:4 Neichinga kapan eihaisah tengle mihon a-in'a eilhunsahna dingun, kabol ding tun kahetai, ati." 
Luke16:5 Chuin aman a-pakaipa sumbaho chengse chu akouvin, amasapenpa jah-a, Nangman ka pakaipa ijat nabat em? ati." 
Luke16:6 Chuin amapan, Thao tena jakhat thao, ati. Hichun neiching chun ajah-a, Nalekha sut hin lanlang tou loijin, somnga sunin, ati." 
Luke16:7 Chuin adang khat jah-a, Nangin ijat nabat em? ati. Chuin aman, suhlouchang tena jakhat, ati. Chuin aman ajah-a, Nalekha sut hin lanlang somget sunin, ati." 
Luke16:8 Chuche chondihlou neiching chun chingtheitah-a abol jeh chun a-pakaipan apahchatan ahi: ijeh-inem itile hiche vannoi leiset chate hi amaho khang mite dingin khovah chate sangin aching jouve. 
Luke16:9 Chule kaseipeh nahiuve, Chonphat louna sumin jolle gol kisemun; na lhinlel tengle amahon tonsotna chenna in'a chu nachensah na dingu ahi." 
Luke16:10 Koi hijongle themcha chunga tahsan umchu, tamtah chunga jong tahsan aumjin; themcha chunga chondihlou chu, tamtah chunga jong chondihji lou ahi." 
Luke16:11 Chonphat louna sum chunga bon tahsan naum louvule, sumtah kon nanganseuva nachinsah dinguham?" 
Luke16:12 Mi dang chunga bon tahsan naum louvule, nangho-a chu kon napeh dingu ham?" 
Luke16:13 Soh khatnin pakai ni na atongkop theipoi. Ijeh-inem itile khat hotbolintin, khat angailut ding ahi; ahiloule khatna hakai jintin, khatjoh anahsahmo ding ahi. Nangho Pathen le sum soh nahikop thei lou dingu ahi." 
Luke16:14 Chuin sum ngailu-a Pharisai hon hicheng chu ajauvin, ama chu anelpeh-un ahi." 
Luke16:15 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Nangho mi mitmu-a kichonphat sahbou nahiuve; ahivangin Pathen'in nalungu ahenai; ijeh inem itile milah-a choi-atna um chu, Pathen mitmu-a thet umtah ahi." 
Luke16:16 Danthu le themgaoho thu chu John phat geija ding ahi. Chuche kala chu Pathen lenggam thuhi kihil lhanga ahin, mitin chua chun thahatsanin alut cheh-ui." 
Luke16:16 Danthu le themgaoho thu chu John phat geija ding ahi. Chuche kala chu Pathen lenggam thuhi kihil lhanga ahin, mitin chua chun thahatsanin alut cheh-ui." 
Luke16:17 Ahivangin danthu halsicha khat manthah sangin, vanle lei kitolmang abaijoi." 
Luke16:18 Aji da-a achom dang kichenpi chan chu ajonga ahi; chule a-inneipun ada numei kichenpia jong chu ajonga ahi. 
Luke16:19 Tun mihaotah khat aumin, ama chun ponsandup le tupat ponnem akisilin, loupitah-in niseh-in nomsa tah-in aumjin." 
Luke16:20 Chule ati pumpi-a tina veija amin Lazarus atiu khat akotbulah alupsah-un," 
Luke16:21 Chuche mihaopa dokhanga kona lhajah anmal chu neh-a oiva anomlheh jengin ahi. Achung chonin uicha hon atinaho chu ahung leh jiuvin ahi. 
Luke16:22 Chuin ahitin ahi, khutdopa chu athitan ahile vantil hon Abraham anga din ahung potaove: chuin mihaopa jong chu athitan ahile avuitaove." 
Luke16:23 Chuin damuna ama genthei theija akibol athohlelin, akhodale gamlatah-a Abraham le a-anga tou Lazarus chu amutan ahi." 
Luke16:24 Chuin aman agahsamin, Kapa Abraham, neilungset in, Lazarus chu akhutjung muh twija dekot henlang kalei dedap dingin hinsolin; ijeh-inem itile keima hiche meikongah gimthoh-in kaume, ati." 
Luke16:25 Ahivangin Abraham'in, Kachapa, nangin nahinkho lhumkeija thil pha namu-a, hiche banga chu Lazarus'in thilphalou amu chu geldoh temin: tu vanga ama lungmong tah-a uma, chule nangma gimthoh-a um nahitai." 
Luke16:26 Chucheng kalvalin jong keiho le nangho umna kah-a hi onghom lentah kikoidet ahin, chenom jongle hikoma kona nangho umna lama koima che thei lou; chule chua kona jong keiho lama koima hung galkai thei lou ahi, ati." 
Luke16:27 Hichun aman, Hijeh-a chu katao ahi, hepa, ama chu kapa in'a solin," 
Luke16:28 Ijeh inem itile sopi pasal nga kaneijin, amaho khu gahet tohsah hen, achuti loule amaho jong hikom nat thohgimna mun'a hi hung dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke16:29 Ahinla Abraham'in, Amahon Mosi le themgaoho anei naove; amaho thu chu ngaijuhen, ati." 
Luke16:30 Chuin aman, Ahipoi, kapa Abraham; mithi lah-a mi khatmong ahenguva gachele bou alung ahei dingu ahi, ati." 
Luke16:31 Chuin aman ajah-a, Amahon Mosi le themgaoho thu angai louvule, mithi lah-a mi khat thoudoh jongle tahsandeh pouvinte, ati." 
Luke17:1 Chuin aman aseijuite jah-a, kipal lhuh umlou thei ahipoi, ahinla kipal lhuh sahpa chu ada ahi!" 
Luke17:2 Hichepa chun hiche aneochaho lah-a khat akipal lhuhsah sangin, angonga sumhei song kikhaihen, twikhanglen'ah kileh lutle ama dinga phajo ahi." 
Luke17:3 Nangho kichih theijun, nasopi nangdouna-a achonsetle phoh-un; chua alung aheija ahile ngaidamun." 
Luke17:4 Chule ama nachunga ni khat sunga sagivei achonsetna, chule sagivei nahenga ahung kiheija, Kakisih-e, atile, ngaidamin ati." 
Luke17:5 Chuin solchah hon Pakai jah-a chun, Pakai, katahsanu khansahben atiuve." 
Luke17:6 Chuin Pakaiyin, Nanghon tahsan na ankam-mu te beh nanei uva ahile, hiche thingtheimi phung jah-a hin, Kibotdoh inlang twikhanglen'a kiphut in tileu chun, nathuva nung ding ahi." 
Luke17:7 Ahinla nangho lah-a koi nahiuvem, asohpan lou kaija, ahiloule gan chinga louva kona ahungleh henga, tule tuhin hungin, an nedingin touvin tia sei dinga?" 
Luke17:8 Chutia titah sanga, Kaneh ding an neigot peh-in, keiman kaneh jou kadon jou kahsen natai kigeh-inlang neijenin; chujoule nangin naneh-a nadon dingbou ahi, atijoh lou dingham?" 
Luke17:9 Chuche sohpa chun thupeh dungjuija abol jeh-a chu a-pakaipan apachat ngaijem? Katahsanpoi. 
Luke17:10 Chutobanga chu nanghon jong nakithupeh chengseu nabol jousoh tengule, Soh phachom lou kahiuve, kabol dingdol bep kabolu ahi, tiuvin, ati." 
Luke17:11 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jerusalem jonin achen ahile, Samaria le Galilee gam ajotpan ahi." 
Luke17:12 Chuin ama kho khatna alutnin ahile, miphah somin anakimutopin, amaho chu gamlata-a adingun," 
Luke17:13 Pipu Jesu, neilungsetnun, tin hasaptah-in asamun ahi." 
Luke17:14 Chuin aman amaho chu amu phatnin, ajah uvah, Cheovinlang thempuho gakivetsah uvin, ati. Chuin ahitin ahi, acheuva ahile adam thengpa taove." 
Luke17:15 Chuin alah uva khat chun adamthengtah chu ahet phatnin, akinunglen, aw sangtah-in Pathen avahchoijin;" 
Luke17:16 Chuin akengphang bulah aboh khupmin, athangvah tai; ama chu Samaria mi ahi." 
Luke17:17 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Som kisutheng hi louham? Mi ko hoibaham?" 
Luke17:18 Hiche chidang namdangpa tailou adangho Pathen vahchoi dinga hung kinungle-a akimupoi, ati." 
Luke17:19 Chuin aman ajah-a, Thouvin, chetan; natahsanin nadamsah ahitai, ati." 
Luke17:20 Chuin, Pathen lenggam itih-a ahung lhun ding Pharisai hon adongun ahile, aman adonbutnin, Pathen lenggam chu mu theijin ahungpoi." 
Luke17:21 Veuvin, hikomah, ahiloule khukomah kiti lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile veuvin, Pathen lenggam nalah uva aume, ati." 
Luke17:22 Chuin aman aseijuite jah-a, Nanghon Mihem Chapa hinlai nikhoho khat beh namu nom dingu, ahivanga namu lou dingu nikho chu hung lhung ding ahi." 
Luke17:23 Chutengle, veuvin, khukomah; veuvin, hikomah tia najah uva asei dingu ahi; ahivangin nangho che hih-un, amaho nung jong jui hih-un;" 
Luke17:24 Ijeh-inem itile kolphe vannoi kolmong lang khat lama aphetna, kolmong lang khat geija asalvahji banga, Mihem Chapa hung ni jong chutobang ding ahi." 
Luke17:25 Ahivangin hiche masanga chu thil tamtah athoh ding, chule hiche khang mite paija umtei ding ahi." 
Luke17:26 Chule Noah hinlai thilsoh umchan bang chu, Mihem Chapa nikho jongle hi ding ahi." 
Luke17:27 Noah kong'a alut ni gei chun amahon aneuvin, adonun, akichengun, chule akichensah-un; chuin twisang ahung lenin, abonchauvin asumang heltan ahi." 
Luke17:28 Chutobangma chun Lot hin laijin jong asoh-in: mihon aneuvin, adonun, thil ajoh-un, thil achouvin, aphutnun, chule in asauvin;" 
Luke17:29 Ahivangin Sodom kho-a kona Lot apotdoh nitah-in van'a konin mei le kath ahung lhan, abonchauvin asumanghel tan ahi." 
Luke17:30 Hiche tobanga chu Mihem Chapa hung kiphondoh ni jongle hi ding ahi. 
Luke17:31 Hiche ni chule in chunga uma chu insunga athil um kilah dingin hungkum hihhen; chutima chun loujaova uma jong hung kinungle kit dahen. 
Luke17:32 Lot inneipi chu geldoh-un. 
Luke17:33 Koihile ahinna huhdoh nading hola chun achan ding ahi; chule ahinna chana chun akihuhbit ding ahi. 
Luke17:34 Kaseipeh nahiuve, chuche jan chule mi ni jalkhun khatna lumding; khat chu kila-a, khat chu kidalha ding ahi." 
Luke17:35 Numei nin sumhei khatna agoi khom ding; khat kila-a, khat kidalha ding ahi." 
Luke17:36 Mi ni louva umding; khat kila-a, khat kidalha ding ahi, ati." 
Luke17:37 Chuin amahon adonbutnun, ajah-a, Hoija-em, Pakai? atiuve. Chuin aman, Thilong umna-a chu muthong kikhom ding ahi, ati." 
Luke18:1 Chuin mihem chu lhadah louhela tao jing jeng ding ahi ti hetsahnan, ajah uva thulem khat aseijin:" 
Luke18:2 Khopi khatna Pathen ging lou, mihem jong ja lou thutan vaihom khat aumin;" 
Luke18:3 Chuche khopi-a chun meithainu khat jong aumin; chuin amanu chu thutan vaihompa henga chun ahungjin, kakilung doupi chunga phu neilah peh-in tin ahung seijin ahi." 
Luke18:4 Chuin amapa chom khat chu anom hih-in; ahivangin ajo phasah-in ama changin akihouvin, keiman Pathen kagin louva, mihem jong kaja lou vangin;" 
Luke18:5 Hiche meithai nun eisuh lunggim jing jeh hin, aphu lahpeh maitange, achuti loule ahung jingjeng hin eisu lungvai jinte, ati." 
Luke18:6 Chuin Pakaiyin, thutan vaihom chondih loupa chun ipi aseijem, ngaijun." 
Luke18:7 Chule achunguva lungdesot jeng jongle, sunle jana ama akou koujeng ami lhendoh ho phu chu Pathen'in alah lou dingham?" 
Luke18:8 Kaseipeh nahiuve, aman gangtah-a phu alah ding ahi. Ahivanginla Mihem Chapa ahung tengle, vannoi'a hin tahsan ahung mun'a dingem? ati." 
Luke18:9 Chuin michonpha kingaito-a ama kitahsana midang imacha sah louho jah-a jong, thulem hiche hi aseije." 
Luke18:10 Mi ni houin'a Pathen lhai dingin ache lhonin; khat chu Pharisai ahin, chule khat chu kaidong ahi." 
Luke18:11 Pharisai pa chu adingin achangin hitin ataovin ahi, Vo Pathen, keiman nangma kathangvah-e, keima midangho banga hunama la-a, chondihlou, jonga, chule hiche kaidongpa tobang jong hi kahipoi." 
Luke18:12 Keiman hapta khat sungin nivei an kangoljin; kamu jouse hop soma hop khat kapejin ahi, ati." 
Luke18:13 Kaidongpa vang chu gamlatah-a adingin, amit jong vandah nom louvin, Vo Pathen, michonse keima hi neilungset in tin a-op achum achumin ahi." 
Luke18:14 Kaseipeh nahiuve, khatjopa sang chun hichepa chu themchangin aumin a-in'a achesuhtai; ijeh-inem itile koi hile ama kichoisang chan chu kisunem ding; ama kineosah bou chu choisanga umding ahi, ati." 
Luke18:15 Chuin mi phabepmin aman atham dingin anaosenho jong ahengah ahinpuijun; ahin seijuiten amu phatnun, amaho chu ana phoh-un ahi." 
Luke18:16 Ahivangin Jesu'n amaho chu ahenga akouvin, Chapangho chu kahenga hung sah-un; jada hih-un: ijeh-inem itile Pathen gam chu hitobang teho-a bou ahi." 
Luke18:17 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Koi hile chapangneo tobanga Pathen gam sang lou chu, iti nama jongle chua lut louhel ding ahi, ati." 
Luke18:18 Chuin vaipo khatnin adongin, Houhilpha, tonsot hin kemlou channa dinga ipi kabol dingham? ati." 
Luke18:19 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Ibola apha neitiham? Pathen khatseh tailou koimacha apha aumpoi." 
Luke18:20 Thupeh chengse, jon bol hih-in, tolthat hih-in, gucha hih-in, thujouvin mi heh hih-in, nanu napa jabolin, ti chu nahenai, ati." 
Luke18:21 Chuin aman, hichengse chu kachapan laija patna kahin nitpeh ahitai, ati." 
Luke18:22 Chuin Jesu'n hichu ajah phatnin ajah-a, Nalhin lelna khat aum nalaije; nanei chengse joh-inlang mivaicha gentheiho hoppeh-in, chutile van'a gou nanei ding ahi; chule hungin lang kanung hinjuijin, ati." 
Luke18:23 Ahin aman chucheng ajah phat chun, mihaotah ahi jeh chun alungnommo lheh jengtan ahi." 
Luke18:24 Chuin Jesu'n ama chu amun, Mihaoho hi Pathen gama alut-u iti hahsat hitam!" 
Luke18:25 Ijeh-inem itile mihao Pathen gama alut sangin, heubil homa sangongsang lut abaijoi, ati." 
Luke18:26 Chuin chuche asei jaho chun, Chuti ahile koi huhhing-a um jou dingham? atiuvin ahi." 
Luke18:27 Ahivangin aman, Mihem dinga hithei lou chu Pathen dinga hithei ahi, ati." 
Luke18:28 Chuin Peter'in, Vetemin, keihon kaneiju kadalhaovin nanung kahinjui taove, ati." 
Luke18:29 Chuin aman ajah uva, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Pathen lenggam jala a-in, anu, apate, asopite, aji le achate hin dalha-a chu," 
Luke18:30 Tu hinlai sunga ajat tamtah mube loule, khonung hinkho-a tonsot hin kemlou chang lou dinga koima aumpoi, ati." 
Luke18:31 Chuin aman somleni ho chu apuijin, ajah uva, Veuvin, Jerusalem jonin iche touvui, chule themgaoho-a kona thu kisun jouse chu Mihem Chapa chunga kichai soh ding ahi." 
Luke18:32 Ijeh-inem itile ama chidang namdangho khutna pehdoh-a umding, chule totnopna aneijuva, jachat umtah-a aboldingu, chule chil aset khum dingu;" 
Luke18:33 Chule avoh uva, atha dingu ahi. Chule ani thum nile thoudoh kit ding ahi, ati." 
Luke18:34 Ahivangin amaho dinga ki-ima ahi jeh-in, hitiho chu khatcha jong angainaje ahepouvin, ipi kiseija ahi jong ahepouve." 
Luke18:35 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jericho anaijin mitcho khat lam pama touva khutdo aumin ahi." 
Luke18:36 Chuin lampia mipi ache chu ajan, Hichu ipiham, tin adongin ahi." 
Luke18:37 Chuin, Nazareth Jesu chulama chu chea ahi, tin aseipeh-un ahi." 
Luke18:38 Chuin aman, Jesu, David chapa, keima neilungset in tin asamtan ahi." 
Luke18:39 Chuin amasanga cheho chun thipbeh-a umdingin aphoh-un; ahivangin ama chun, David chapa, neilungset in, tin ahasapcheh tan ahi." 
Luke18:40 Chuin Jesu adingin, ama chu ahenga pui dingin thu apen ahi: chuin ama akom ahung gei phatnin, adongin," 
Luke18:41 Keiman nangma iloleng nalungham? ati. Chuin aman, Pakai, kho muleng kati, ati." 
Luke18:42 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, kho mutan; natahsanin nadamsah ahitai, ati." 
Luke18:43 Chuin chupettah chun kho amupai jengin, anung ajuijin, Pathen avahchoi avahchoijin: chuin miho jouse chun amu phatnun Pathen avahchoi taovin ahi." 
Luke19:1 Chuin Jesu alutnin Jericho lailung ajotnin ahi. 
Luke19:2 Hichun veuvin, amin Zacchaeus atiu mi khat aumin; chule ama chu kaidong pipu ahin, mihao ahi." 
Luke19:3 Ama chun hoipen khu Jesu ahidem tin mu tei agon, ahivangin ama minem ahi jeh-in mipi jeh chun amu theipon ahi." 
Luke19:4 Chuin ama masang lama analhai jel-in, ama anave dingin theiba chungah anakale; ijeh-inem itile aman hilam chu aho ding ahi." 
Luke19:5 Chuin Jesu chukom mun chu ageijin, chunglam agahven ahile ama chu amun, ajah-a, Zacchaeus, hung kum loijin; ijeh inem itile tunia na-in'a kalhun ding ahi, ati." 
Luke19:6 Chuin ama ahung kum loijin, kipahtah-in a-in'a alhunsah tan ahi." 
Luke19:7 Chuin hichu amu phatnun, Michonse in'a lhungin acheta getne atiuvin, abonchauvin aphuntaove." 
Luke19:8 Chuin Zacchaeus adingdoh-in, Pakai jah-a chun, Ven, Pakai, kanei jouse akeh khat mivaicha genthei pengkate; mi koija hile lepthol-a kalah aumle ajat li-in lenge, ati." 
Luke19:9 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Tunin hiche in'a hin huhhingna alhungtai, ijeh-inem itile ama jong hi Abraham son ahi." 
Luke19:10 Ijeh-inem itile amangsa chu holdoh-a huhhing dinga Mihem Chapa hung ahi, ati." 
Luke19:11 Chuin mihon hicheng thu chu angai pettah-u chun, Jerusalem anaitah jeh-ule Pathen lenggam chu chupet tah-a chu kilangdoh paijeng dinga angaito jeh-u chun, aman aseibeben thulem khat aseijin." 
Luke19:12 Hijeh chun aman ahiti seije, Miluntah khat lenggam gakilah-a chule hung kile kit dingin khol gamlatah-a achen ahi." 
Luke19:13 Chule ache kon chun asohte mi som akou khomin, talent som apen ajah uva, Kahung kahsen hiche-a hin ana kiveijun, ati." 
Luke19:14 Ahivangin agam miten ama ahotbolun, anunga palai asolun, kachunguva leng changa vaipo dingin hichepa hi kanompouve, agah ti sahtaove." 
Luke19:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, ama alengchana ahung kit phatnin, sum apeh asohteho chun ipipi ijat aveikan um ti hetna dingin, amaho kouna ding thu apetan ahi." 
Luke19:16 Chuin amasapa chu ahungin a-angah, Pakai, na sana sum chun talent som kaveikane, ati." 
Luke19:17 Chuin aman ajah-a, Nabol aphai, sohpha; nangma themcha khat chunga tahsan naum jeh chun, kho som chungah vaipon pangin, ati." 
Luke19:18 Chuin abanapa chu ahungin ajah-a, Pakai, na sana sum chun talent nga kaveikane, ati." 
Luke19:19 Ama jah-a jong chun, Nang jong kho nga chunga vaipon pangin, ati." 
Luke19:20 Chuin khatpa ahungin, Pakai, ven, na sana sumchu hiche hi ahi, ultheh pona kachuna, kakoihe ahi:" 
Luke19:21 Ajeh chu nangma mikhel nahin, nakoina lou pouvah naladoh jin, natuna lou pouvah na-atjin ahile nang kakichan ahi, ati." 
Luke19:22 Aman, Vo nang soh gilou, nakama thupot dungjuija nathu katan ding ahi: kakoina louva kalahjia, katuna louva ka-atji nahet ahi." 
Luke19:23 Chuti an kasum chu ibola sumkhol pungna-a nanakoida ham? Chutile keiman kasum athoitoh kilahtha tadinga, ati." 
Luke19:24 Chuin aman akoma dingho jah-a chun, Talent chu lahpeh unlang talent som neipa chu petaovin." 
Luke19:25 (Chuin amahon ajah-a, Pakai, aman talent som aneinai, atiuve.)" 
Luke19:26 Najah uva kasei ahi, aneichana chu kipe ding ahi; anei lou vang chu aneichasun jong chu ama-a kona kilahmang pehding ahi." 
Luke19:27 Hiche achunguva kavaipoh ding nomlou ho eimelmaho vanghi hikoma hinpuijun, ka-ang sunga thatnun, ati." 
Luke19:28 Chuin chucheng asei jou chun, Jerusalem lam jonin ama alamkaijin achetou taove." 
Luke19:29 Chuin ahitin ahi, Olivet atiu molsang Bethphage le Bethany ahungnai phatnin, aseijuiho mi ni asolin," 
Luke19:30 Namasang jon lhona khosunga khun lut lhonin; nalut lut lhonle sangan nou kihen koima touna khahlou laihel namu paijen lhon ding ahi; hichu sut lhonin lang hinkai lhonin. 
Luke19:31 Chule, Ibola nasut lhonham tia khattou nadong lhona aumle, Pakaiyin manna nom aneije, ti lhonin, ati." 
Luke19:32 Chuin akisolte ni chu ache lhonin ahile, ajah lhona aseibang bang chun agamu lhonin." 
Luke19:33 Chuin asut lhonle aneiten ajah lhona, Sangan nou chu ibola nasut lhonham? ati." 
Luke19:34 Chuin amanin, Pakaiyin manna nom aneije, ati lhone." 
Luke19:35 Hichun Jesu henga ahinkai lhonin; chuin amahon aponu sangan nou chunga chun aphaovin, achunga Jesu atousah-un ahi." 
Luke19:36 Chuin achen ahile, amahon aponu lam dunga aphaovin ahi." 
Luke19:37 Chuin ama ahung naija, Olive molsang kumlhahna ageijin, aseijuite mipi chu hapan akipah athanom un, thilbol kidang dang abol amu chengseu jal chun aw sangtah-in Pathen avahchoijun," 
Luke19:38 Pakai mina hunga lengpa anun nome, van'ah cham lenghen, chungnung penah loupina hihen, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke19:39 Chuin mipi lah-a kon chun Pharisai ho kimkhatnin ajah-a, Houhil, naseijuite phoh-in, ati." 
Luke19:40 Chuin aman adonbutnin; Najah uvah kasei ahi, Hiteho thipleu, songho ao doh ding ahi, ati." 
Luke19:41 Chuin ahung naija khopi chu amu phatnin, akachamin," 
Luke19:42 Ohe, nangma tah-in tuni hin lungmonna thuhi kihet tave le chun! Tunla nahet louna dinga ki-ima ahitai." 
Luke19:43 Ijeh inem itile nagalteuvin nakimvela kul aset sanga, naum kimvela, naum chah dingu nikho hunglhung ding ahi," 
Luke19:44 Nasunga nachatetoh nangma leiset toh kibanga abola, nalah-a song khat chunga khat um louhela alha dingu ahi; hichu nakivil laiju nahet lou jeh ahi, ati." 
Luke19:45 Chuin ama houin'ah alutnin, chuche sunga thil johho le thilchoho chu anodoh panin," 
Luke19:46 Ajah uva, Ka-in chu taona in hi ding ahi, tin akisune; ahin nanghon gucha michom kokhuh-in nasemtaove, ati." 
Luke19:47 Chuin nisehle houin'a chun ahiljin ahi. Ahin thempu pipuiho le danthu sunho, chule miho pipuho chun ama suhmangna ding aholun;" 
Luke19:48 Ahivangin mipi chengse chun aboncha ama thu angaijuva, ama jenga akai jing jeh-u chun alonaje ding aholmovin ahi." 
Luke20:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, chulai chun ni khat aman houin'a thupha ahil lhanga, miho thu ahil petnin, thempu pipuiho le danthu sunho toh upaho ahenga ahungun," 
Luke20:2 Ajah-a, Ipi thunei na-a hitiho hi nabolham? Koiham hiche thuneina nape-a hi? neisei peh-un, atiuve." 
Luke20:3 Chuin aman adonbutnin, ajah uva, Keiman jong nangho thu khat donging kate; neisei peh-un;" 
Luke20:4 John baptize chansah chu van'a konham, mihem'a konham? ati." 
Luke20:4 John baptize chansah chu van'a konham, mihem'a konham? ati." 
Luke20:5 Chuin amaho akingai touvin, Van'a kon ahi tileuhenla, ibola ama natahsan lou uham tintin;" 
Luke20:6 Mihem'a kon ahi tileuhenla, miho jousen songa eise dingu ahin; ijeh-inem itile amahon John chu themgao ahi tia ajopsoh-u ahi, akitiuvin ahi." 
Luke20:6 Mihem'a kon ahi tileuhenla, miho jousen songa eise dingu ahin; ijeh-inem itile amahon John chu themgao ahi tia ajopsoh-u ahi, akitiuvin ahi." 
Luke20:7 Chuin amahon, Hoija konham kahepouve, tin adonbut taove." 
Luke20:8 Chuin Jesu'n amaho jah-a achutile ipi thuneija hicheng kabol ahi, keiman jong seipehdeh pouvinge, ati." 
Luke20:9 Chuin aman miho jah-a hiche thulem hi asei pantan ahi. Mikhatnin lengpilei abolin, leilhouho khutna apedoh-in, sottah gatham dingin mi gam danga achetan ahi." 
Luke20:10 Chuin aga lhun phatnin aman asoh khat aleilhouho henga, amahon lengpi leija ga chu ama ahinpeh dingun asolin; ahinla leilhouho chun ama chu avovin, khutgoh keuvin akilesah taovin ahi." 
Luke20:11 Chuin aman soh khat asol nalaijin, ama jong chu avovin jachat umtah-in abolun, agoh keuvin asolmang taove." 
Luke20:12 Chuin athumna asol kittan ahile, ama jong chu ana vovin, po lama apaidoh taovin ahi." 
Luke20:13 Chuin lengpilei neipa chun, I kalo ding hitam? Kachapa deitah hi solinge: ama hi anajabol khatnunte, ati." 
Luke20:14 Ahivangin leilhou hon amu phatnun, amahole amaho akihouvun, Ama hi agou lo dinga chu ahi; hungun agou lo ding chu eihoa ahina dingin, ama hi thatnu hite, akitiuvin." 
Luke20:15 Chuin lengpilei po lama akaidoh-un, athat taovin ahi. Hijeh chun lengpilei neipa chun amaho chu ilontem?" 
Luke20:16 Ama hungintin aleilhouho chu sugamintin, lengpilei chu mi dang petante, ati. Chuin amahon hichu ajah phatnun, Chuti hihhen, atiuve." 
Luke20:17 Ahin aman amaho chu aven, Achutile, Insahon adeimoa apaiju song chu Aninga songpipenin apangtai, tia kisun hi ibaham?" 
Luke20:18 Koi hijongle chuche song chunga lhu chan chu ahal hala chip ding ahi; chule koi hile achunga chuche song chua chu leivui banga kithejal ding ahi, ati." 
Luke20:19 Chuin danthu sunho le thempu pipuihon, hiche thulem asei chu amaho gotna-a asei ahi chu aheuvin, chupet tah-a chu achunga khut lhah ding agouvin; ahinla miho chu akichauvin ahi." 
Luke20:20 Chuin amahon achanglhi jingun, athuseija themmo chana gam vaipo thuneina le thunoija pehdoh theina dingin, chonpha limlhemin changlhi phabep khat asolun ahi." 
Luke20:21 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Houhil, nangman dihtah-a naseija mi nahil ahi, chule koima mai ve louhela dihtah-a Pathen lampi chu nahil ahi, hichu kaheuve." 
Luke20:22 Caesar kai kapeh-u hi dan ngai hina, hilouham? tin adongun ahi." 
Luke20:23 Ahivangin aman alungthim bolu chu ahen, amaho jah-a, Ibola neipatepmu ham?" 
Luke20:24 Denarius khat neivet sah-un. Koi lim le koi min chongam? ati. Amahon adonbutnun, Ceasar'a, atiuve." 
Luke20:25 Chuin aman ajah uva, achutile Caesar'a chu Caesar peuvinlang, Pathen'a chu Pathen petangu, ati." 
Luke20:26 Chuin amahon miho ang sunga athu seijin aman theita pouvin, athu donbut chu adatmo lheh jengun, athipbeh taovin ahi." 
Luke20:27 Chuin, mithi thokitna aumpoi tia Saddukai ho phabep ahenga ahungun ajah-a," 
Luke20:28 Houhil, koi hile sopi nei khattouvin ji aneija cha nei louva athile, asopipa chun ajinu chu kichenpi henlang asopipa ding chun chi khaipehhen tin Mosi'n lekha eisutpeh-un ahi." 
Luke20:29 Aphai, ucha pasal sagite khat aumun, amasa penpa chun ji aneijin chabeijin athitai." 
Luke20:30 Chuin ani channapan amanu chu jin aneijin, amapa chabeijin athitai. Chuin athumnapan numeinu chu jin aneijin; chuti chun asagi uvin aneijun, chabeijin athi taovin ahi." 
Luke20:31 Akhonna-in numeinu jong chu athitan ahi. 
Luke20:32 Ahile thokitna-a amanu chu alah uva koipen ji hitantem? 
Luke20:33 Ijeh-inem itile asagiuva amanu chu ji-a anei sohkeiju ahi, atiuve." 
Luke20:34 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Hiche vannoi leiset chate hi akichengun, chule chen jong akichensah-un;" 
Luke20:35 Ahin chuche gam lodinga kilomho le athia kona thoudoh ho vang chu akicheng tapouve, chen jong akichensah tapouve." 
Luke20:36 Chule amaho thi kit thei talou ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu vantilte tobang ahiuvin; chule thoukit chate ahi jeh-u chun Pathen chate ahiuve. 
Luke20:37 Mosi'n jong hamboh thua chun, Pakai chu Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen, ati chun mithiho kaithouvin aumui ti aphongdoh-e." 
Luke20:38 Ama athiho Pathen hilouvin, ahingho Pathen ahijo bouve; ijeh-inem itile mi jouse ama mitmu-a ahing ahicheh-e, ati." 
Luke20:39 Hichun danthu sunho abang bangin adonbutnun, Houhil, nasei apha lheh jenge, atiuve." 
Luke20:40 Ijeh-inem itile amahon ama hiche kal chu ima adong ngam tapouvin ahi. 
Luke20:41 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Christa chu David chapa ahi iti kitiham?" 
Luke20:42 Ijeh-inem itile David amatah-in a-Labua, Pakaiyin ka Pakai jah-a, Nangma kajet lamah touvin," 
Luke20:43 Keiman namelmate chengse nakeng chotpha-a kaneisah masangsen, ati." 
Luke20:44 Hitichun David'in ama chu Pakai ati; achutile achapa iti hi thei dingham? ati. 
Luke20:45 Chuin mi jouse jah dingin aseijuite jah-a," 
Luke20:46 Sangkhol choltah kiah-a vale noma, chule kailhanga min chibai aboh ding deija, chule kikhopna in le golvahna-a touna pipen deija danthu sunho-a konin kihong phaovin;" 
Luke20:47 Amahon Meithaiho in abahgamun, chule alhema sot tahtah taojia ahiuve; amaho chu themmo chang chungnung ding ahiuve, ati." 
Luke21:1 Chuin ama akhodah-in ahile, mihao hon sumdolna boma athilto alelutnu amun." 
Luke21:2 Chule hia chun meithai vaicha khatman jong sumsan nongsi peh ni alelut amun ahi. 
Luke21:3 Chuin aman, Nangho jah-a tahbeh-a kasei ahi, amaho dang jouse sangin hiche meithai vaichanun atam lelut pene;" 
Luke21:4 Ijeh-inem itile amahon aneivalu Pathen'a atouva alelutnu ahin, amanu vang hin ahinpi aneisun alelut jeng ahi, ati." 
Luke21:5 Chuin mi phabep khatnin houin chu song phatahtah le thilto khomho-a akijephoi chu aseijun ahile, aman," 
Luke21:6 Nanghon namu-u hicheng hi kisusuchim louva song khat chunga khat kisethop himhim aum louhel ding nikhoho chu hunglhung ding ahi, ati." 
Luke21:7 Chuin amahon adongun, Ahile, houhil, hicheng chu itihle hi dingham? Chule hiho chu ahung sodoh ding phat amelchihna ipi hintem? atiuve." 
Luke21:8 Chuin aman hitin aseije, Lheplhah-a puimanga naum louna dingun kichih theijun; ijeh-inem itile mi tamtah keima minin hunguntin, keima Christa kahi; chule phat anaije, ahung ti dingu ahi; hijongle amaho nung chu jui hih-un." 
Luke21:9 Chule nanghon gal kisatle thunoh najah tengule tija hih-un; ijeh-inem itile hicheng chu hungsoh masa tei ding ahi; hijongle akichaina chu hunglhung pai louding ahi, ati." 
Luke21:10 Chuin aman ajah uva, Vai khatle vai khat, gam khatle gam khat hung kidou vintin;" 
Luke21:11 Chule mun chom mun choma ling nasatahtah hung kihot intin, kel lhantin, gamna hise leng ding, chule van'a kona kichat tijat umtahle melchihna nasatah hung umding ahi." 
Luke21:12 Amavang thil hicheng chu ahung sodoh masanga amahon nachung uva akhut alhah uva, nabolset dingu, akikhopnao le songkul'a dinga napehdoh dingu, chule keima min jala lengho le gamvaipoho anga nahin kailut dingu ahi." 
Luke21:13 Hettohsahna naneina dinguva hicheng chu hung sohdoh ding ahi. 
Luke21:14 Hiche jeh chun iti donbut ding nagel masah louna dingun nalunguvah kisetnun. 
Luke21:15 Ijeh-inem itile namelmaho jouseuvin nadoudal thei lounaole, nanel lhah thei louna dingu kamle lungthim themna kapeh dingu nahiuve." 
Luke21:16 Ahivangin nanu napau, nasopiu, na-inko, chule najol nagolu chu napedoh uva hung pang ding ahi; chule nalah uva abang bang ahin thasah dingu ahi." 
Luke21:17 Chule keima min jala nangho mi jouse hotna nahung umdingu ahi. 
Luke21:18 Ahivangin nalu chunguva nasamjang khatchao jong mangthah lou ding ahi. 
Luke21:19 Nanghon thohhatna nahinnao nakihuh doh dingu ahi. 
Luke21:20 Amavang Jerusalem galmin aum kimvel teng vangle, amanthah nading anaitai ti heuvin." 
Luke21:21 Chutengle Juda gama um chengse thinglhang lamah jamuhen; chule khopi sunga uma chu potdoh hen; chule gama umho chu asunga lutdauhen. 
Luke21:22 Ijeh-inem itile thu kisun jouse guilhun sohna dinga, hichu phulah nikho hija ahi." 
Luke21:23 Ahin, ohe, hichelai chule agaija le naonoi chepsahho ada nadinguve! Ijeh-inem itile gam leiset chunga hesoh genthei khohtah le hiche mite chunga hi lunghanna chu ding ahi." 
Luke21:24 Chule amaho chemhema lou ding, chule chitin namtin lah-a gal hinga kikaimang gam dingu; chule chidang namdangte nikho lhin kahse-a Jerusalem hi chidang namdangte chotpha-a umding ahi." 
Luke21:25 Chule nisa, lhathah, chule ahsihoa melchihna hung umding; chule twikhanglen kitum le kinon jeh-a lei chunga namtin lungdonga umteho chunga hesohna hung umding;" 
Luke21:26 Mihemte chu kichatna jehle vannoi leiset chunga thil soh dingho ngaitona jeh-a haisam dingu ahi: ijeh-inem itile van thahatna ho chengse kihotling soh ding ahi. 
Luke21:27 Chutahle Mihem Chapa chu thuneitah le loupi chungnung tah-a meibola ahung amu dingu ahi. 
Luke21:28 Ahivangin thil chucheng ahung so kipat tengle, khodah unlang chunglam veuvin; ijeh-inem itile nakilhatdoh nadingu anaije, ati." 
Luke21:29 Chuin aman amaho jah-a thulem khat aseijin: Theichang le thing dang jouse khu veuvin; 
Luke21:30 Ajih adotdoh namu tengule, nipi anaitai ti naheuve." 
Luke21:31 Chutobang chun nanghon jong hicheng chu aguilhun namu tengule, Pathen lenggam anaitai ti heuvin." 
Luke21:32 Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, aboncha aguilhun masangse-a, hiche khangguija mite hi mang lou dingu ahi." 
Luke21:33 Vanle lei mang ding ahin; keima thu vang mang lou ding ahi. 
Luke21:34 Amavang kihong phaovin, achuti loule an mohneh nehle jukham, chule hinlai khankho ding thu ngaitonan nalungu lontin, chuche ni chu thang bangin phulou helouvin nachung uva hung chu phung getninte." 
Luke21:35 Chuche ni chu thang banga vannoi leiset gam jouse-a cheng mi jouse chunga chu ding ahi. 
Luke21:36 Hijongle thil hung soh ding jouse-a kona sohcha dinga lom le Mihem Chapa anga ding dinga lom nahina dingun, imatih chanin kiging jingin umun, chule tao jingun, ati." 
Luke21:37 Hichelai chun aman sun tengle houin'a thu ahiljin; chule janle apotdoh jin Olivet atiu molsanga agageh jin ahi. 
Luke21:38 Chule miho jouse chu athu ngai dingin jingkah matah le houin'a ahung hungjiuvin ahi. 
Luke22:1 Chuin kalchuh kut atiu cholsolou changlhah kut chu anaitan ahi. 
Luke22:2 Chuin thempu pipuiho le danthu sunhon ama chu atha theina dingje aholtauvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile miho chu akichauvin ahi. 
Luke22:3 Chuin somleni lah-a Iscariot atiu Judas sunga chun Satan aluttan ahi. 
Luke22:4 Ama chu achen thempu pipuiho le houvaipoho toh ama chu amaho amatsah theina dingje chu akihou taovin ahi. 
Luke22:5 Chuin amaho akipah-un, ama chu sum peh dingin atep taove." 
Luke22:6 Hichea chun ama anomin, chule mipi umlou petcha aman ama chu amaho henga pehdoh-a matsahna thei ding agomkom aholtan ahi." 
Luke22:7 Chuin kalchuh kutna kelngoi thana ding, cholsolou changlhah nikho chu ahung lhungtan." 
Luke22:8 Chuin aman Peter le John asolin, Chelhonin lang kalchuh kut ineh dingu gago lhonin, ati." 
Luke22:8 Chuin aman Peter le John asolin, Chelhonin lang kalchuh kut ineh dingu gago lhonin, ati." 
Luke22:9 Chuin amanin, Hoikoma gago lhonleng nalungham? ati lhone." 
Luke22:10 Aman ajah lhona, Ve lhonin, nangni khopi sung nalut lut lhonle twibel pu-a mi khattoh nakisuhto lhon ding ahi; ama nung chu jui lhonin, alutna in'ah lut lhonin." 
Luke22:11 Chule hiche in neipa jah-a chun, Houhilin nangma henga hitin aseije, Kaseijuite toh kalchuh kut an kanehna ding indan chu hoilaiham? ati, gati lhonin." 
Luke22:12 Chule amapa chun in dan chungnung lentah gotsadem khat navetsah lhon ding ahi; hikoma chun anago lhontan, ati." 
Luke22:13 Chuin amani ache lhonin, aman ajah lhona aseibang bang chun agatoh lhonin, kalchuh kut agagong lhontan ahi." 
Luke22:14 Chuin aphat alhinin, ankong aumtan, chule solchah somleni ho chun aum piuvin ahi." 
Luke22:15 Chuin aman ajah uva, Kathohgim masanga nang hotoh kalchuh kut an nehkhom ding hi katup lheh jenge." 
Luke22:16 Ijeh-inem itile nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Pathen lenggama hiche hi aguilhun masangse-a kaneh lou ding ahitai, ati." 
Luke22:17 Chuin aman khon chu alan, athangvah-in, Hiche hi kilah unlang kihom-un;" 
Luke22:18 Ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Pathen lenggam hung lhun kahse-a, keiman tukala lengpiga twi kadon lou ding ahitai, ati." 
Luke22:19 Chuin changlhah alan, athangvah-in, ahehbal balin, amaho chu apen, Hiche hi nangho dinga kipe-a katahsa ahi; keima neihet jingna dingun hiche hi bolun, ati." 
Luke22:20 Chuin chutima chun khon chu alan a-anneh jouvun, Hiche khon hi kathisana kitepna thah, nangho dinga kisodoh chu ahi." 
Luke22:21 Ahivanginla, veuvin, eipedoh-a pang dingpa khut chu dokhanga hin keitoh kaum khome." 
Luke22:22 Mihem Chapa chu akigon banga chonpeh ding ahi; ahivangin apedoh-a pang mipa chu adana-e! ati. 
Luke22:23 Chuin amahon alah uva chutobang thilbol ding chu koipen ahi dingu akidongto taovin ahi. 
Luke22:24 Chuin alah uva koipen chu achungnung penin akiseidem tia kinelna asohdoh tan ahi. 
Luke22:25 Chuin aman ajah uva, Chidang namdangho lengho khu achunguva alal lheh-un; chule achunguva thunei ho khu phatna bol akitiuve." 
Luke22:26 Nangho vang nachuti lou dingu ahi; ahin nalah uva alenjo chu aneojo bangin umhen, chule apipen chu lhachale bangin umhen." 
Luke22:27 Ijeh-inem itile ankonga toule alhachale koijoh lenjo-em? Ankonga toujoh chu hilouham? Ahinla keima nangho lah-a lhachale bangin kaume. 
Luke22:28 Ahivangin eiki patepna-a eiumpi jingpeh nangho nahiuve. 
Luke22:29 Chule ka Pan keima eigotpeh banga, keiman nangho lenggam khat kagotpeh nahiuve;" 
Luke22:30 Chutia chu kagam sunga kadokhang chunga naneh-a nadon uva, chule nangho lal touna-a natou uva Israel phung somle phung ni thu natan dingu ahi." 
Luke22:31 Chuin Pakaiyin aseijin, Simon, Simon, ven, chang kilhichil banga lhitchil dingin Satan'in nathume;" 
Luke22:32 Ahivangin natahsan alosam louna dingin kataopeh-e: chule nangman nalung nahei kit nungle nasopiteho jong naphudet ding ahi, ati." 
Luke22:33 Chuin aman ajah-a, Pakai, nangma toh songkul le thina-a chetha dinga kigosa dema umjing kahi, ati." 
Luke22:34 Chuin aman ajah-a, Peter, kaseipeh nahi, nangman keima neihet hi thumvei naseilep masangse-a tunia ahchal khong lou ding ahi, ati." 
Luke22:35 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Keiman nangho kengchot selou, sumbom keng lou, chule sakhao keng louva kasoluva chu ima nalhahsam nao umji-am? ati. Chuin amahon, Aumjipoi, atiuve." 
Luke22:36 Chuin aman ajah uva, Tu vangin sumbom nei neijan kiken hen; chutima chun sakhao jong kiken hen; chule chemjam nei lou louvan asangkhol johhen, chemjam khat kichoh hen." 
Luke22:37 Ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Ama michonseho toh kisimtha ahitai, tia thu kisun chu kachunga guilhung sohkei ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile keima chungchang thudol chengse kichaisoh ding ahitai, ati." 
Luke22:38 Chuin amahon, Pakai, hikoma chemjam ni aume, atiuve. Aman, Hichu aphasetne, ati." 
Luke22:39 Chuin ama achonna ngai bangin apotdoh-in, Olivet molsanga achetan; aseijuiten jong anungnung ajuijun ahi." 
Luke22:40 Chukom mun chu alhun phatnun, ajah uva, Lhepma nalhah louna dingun taovun, ati." 
Luke22:41 Chuin ama songse phahna chan khat ache chonin, adilsun ataovin," 
Luke22:42 Hepa, naphatsahle hiche khon hi kakoma konin chon mangin; ahivangin keima lunggot bang hi louvin nangma lunggot bangjoh hihen, ati." 
Luke22:43 Chuin van'a konin vantil khat ahung kilah-in, thahat ahungpen ahi." 
Luke22:44 Chuin aman na asa behseh jengin, guntah-in atao kittan; chule thisan aloma tolla valha bangin, a-ul thisanin along jengtan ahi." 
Luke22:45 Chuin atao jouvin athoudoh-in aseijuite henga ahungin ahile, amaho lungkhama ana-imutlhuh-u ahungtoh-in," 
Luke22:46 Ajah uva, Nangho ibola ihmua nahiuvem? Lhepna-a nalhah louna dingun thouvun lang taovun, ati." 
Luke22:47 Aman chutia asei pettah chun, veuvin, mipi hon khat ahungin, solchah somleni lah-a Judas atiu chu ahung lamkaijin; chuin ama chun Jesu chop dingin akom ahin naijin ahi." 
Luke22:48 Ahin Jesu'n ajah-a, Vo Judas, Mihem Chapa hi chopma matsah nagot ham? ati." 
Luke22:49 Chuin akimvela umho chun ipi aso ding chu amuvin, ajah-a, Pakai, chemjam'a kasat dingu hitam? atiuve." 
Luke22:50 Chuin alah uva khatnin thempu chungnung sohpa asatle, abilkol jetlam asatlhatan ahi." 
Luke22:51 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Hichan beh hi phalun, ati. Chuin abilkol chu athamin aboldamtan ahi." 
Luke22:52 Chuin aman dinga hung thempu pipuiho, houin ngah vaipoho, chule upaho jah-a chun, Gucha michom man dinga kon banga chemjamle moltum tho-a nahung konu ham?" 
Luke22:53 Nang hotoh niseh-a houin'a kaum lai chunla keima matnan nakhut nalha pouvin; amavang tu hi nangho phat le muthim thahat ahi, ati." 
Luke22:54 Chuin amahon ama amanun, thempu chungnung in lama akaitaove; chuin Peter'in galkanga ajuipeh-in ahi." 
Luke22:55 Chuin amahon inpi leitol lailunga mei akitiuva atoukhom petnun, Peter jong amaho lah-a chun atouvin ahi." 
Luke22:56 Ama meikoma atou pet chun soh nungah khatnin amun, hoitah-in aven, Hichepa jong hi akiloipi ahi, ati." 
Luke22:57 Ahivangin aman ama chu aseilepmin, Numei ama chu kahepoi, ati." 
Luke22:58 Ajo chomkhat jouvin, mi adang khatnin amun, ajah-a, Nang jong alah uva khat nahi, ati. Ahivangin, Peter'in, Mipa, keima kahipoi, ati." 
Luke22:59 Chuin nidan khat jouvin michom dang khatnin atahti tenin, Tahbeh-in ama jong hi aloiho khat mong mong ahi; ijeh-inem itile ama hi Galilee mi ahi, ati." 
Luke22:60 Ahivangin Peter'in, Mipa, nasei chu keiman kahehih hele, ati. Hichu asei nalaijin, hiche pettah chun ahchal akhongtan ahi." 
Luke22:61 Chuin Pakai chu akiheijin, Peter lam aven ahi. Chuin Peter'in, Tunia ahchal khon masanga thumvei neiseilep ding ahi, tia Pakaiyin asei chu ageldoh-in," 
Luke22:62 Chuin Peter polama apotnin lhasetah-in hakan akaptan ahi. 
Luke22:63 Chuin Jesu manna tuhho chun ama chu totnopnan abolun, chule avovin ahi." 
Luke22:64 Chuin ponin amit atomun, amai abehpeh-un, koiham nadenga chu gaovinlang seijin? atiuve." 
Luke22:65 Chule ataitom ataitomun ama gotnan thu tamtah aseijun ahi. 
Luke22:66 Chuin jing khovah vah-in, miho upaho chengse, thempu pipuiho, chule danthu sunho chu ahung khomun, houvaipoloi kikhopna-a chun akaijun;" 
Luke22:67 Nangma Christa chu nahim? neisei peh-un, atiuve. Ahivangin aman amaho jah-a, Keiman nangho seipeh jongleu veng, natahsan lou dingu;" 
Luke22:68 Chule nadong jongleu veng, neidonbut lou dingu, lha jong neilhalou diu ahi." 
Luke22:69 Ahivangin tua pat Mihem Chapa hi Pathen thilbolthei khut jet lama tou ding ahitai, ati." 
Luke22:70 Chuin amahon abonchauvin adongun, Achutile nangma Pathen Chapa nahim? atiuve. Chuin aman ajah uva, Naseiju chu kahi, ati." 
Luke22:71 Chuin amahon, Thu hettohsah dang iding iti tah dinguham? Ijeh inem itile eihotah-in aman akamcheng tah-a asei ijataove, atiuve." 
Luke23:1 Chuin mipi kikhom chengse chu akipat doh-un, ama chu Pilate henga akaitaovin ahi." 
Luke23:2 Chuin ahehse panun, Hichepa hin, Keima Christa leng kahi atia, Caesar kai peh ding akhama, kanampiu apuiset kamu uve, atiuve." 
Luke23:3 Chuin Pilate'in adongin, Nangma Judah te Lengpa nahim? ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Naseikhai, ati." 
Luke23:4 Chuin Pilate'in thempu pipuiho le mipi jah-a, Hichepa chunga khansetna imacha kamupoi, ati." 
Luke23:5 Chuin amaho ahapan cheh-un, Hichepa hin Galilee gama kipanin hiche kom geijin Juda gam khotinah ahille ahillen, mi jouse achohnoh jin ahi, atitaovin ahi." 
Luke23:6 Chuin Pilate'in Galilee thu ajah phah chun, Ama hi Galilee mi ham? tin adonge." 
Luke23:7 Chuin ama chu Herod thuneina gam mi ahi ahet phatnin, Herod hengah asoltan ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche laija chu ama Jerusalem'a uma ahi." 
Luke23:8 Chuin Jesu amu phat chun Herod akipah lheh jengin ahi. Ijeh-inem itile aman athu ajah jeh-a sotna pat ama chu mu atup ahitan; chule thil kidang abol khattou mu ding kinem lheh ahi. 
Luke23:9 Chuin Herod chun thu tamtah adongin, ahivangin aman imachan adonbutpoi." 
Luke23:10 Chuin thempu pipuiho le danthu sunho adingun, ama chu ahehheh jengun ahi." 
Luke23:11 Chuin Herod le asepaiten nahsahmon abolun, totnopnan aneijun, pon loupi asilpeh-un, chuin Pilate heng lama ahin solkit taove." 
Luke23:12 Hiche nitah chun Herod le Pilate akihou thei lhontan ahi; ijeh-inem itile chuche masanga chu kidou jing ahi lhone. 
Luke23:13 Chuin Pilate'in thempu pipuiho le vaipoho chule miho chu akou khomin," 
Luke23:14 Ajah uva, Miho apuisei tia hichepa hi kahenga nahinkaiju ahin; veuvin, keiman amo amolou phatechan na-ang sunguvah kapatepmin, nanghon nahehnao thudola chun achungah themona kamupon;" 
Luke23:15 Chule Herod jengin jong amupoi: ijeh-inem itile aman ihenguva ahinsol kit tai; chule veuvin, aman athina theilom imacha abolpoi." 
Luke23:16 Hijeh chun keiman bolgim ingting, lhadohtange, ati." 
Luke23:17 (Hiche kut sunga chu amaho chu mi khat alhadohpeh tei ngai ahi). 
Luke23:18 Ahivangin amahon thakhat tah-in asamun, Hichepa hi sumangin, Barabbas neilhadoh peh-un, atiuve." 
Luke23:19 Ama chu khopi sung chonoh jehle atoltha jeh-a songkul'a kikhuma ahi. 
Luke23:20 Chuin Jesu chu alhadoh nom jeh-in, Pilate'in ajah uva thu asei kitnin;" 
Luke23:21 Ahivangin amahon, Ama chu thingpel'a khenbeh-in, thingpel'a khenbeh-in, tin asamtauve." 
Luke23:22 Chuin aman athumvei na-in, Ibolin-em? Hichepan ipi suhset aneijem? Keiman thina theilom ama chunga ima kamupoi; hijeh chun bolgim ingting lhadoh tange, ati." 
Luke23:23 Ahivangin amahon aw sangtah-in ahasapcheh-un, thingpel'a akhetbeh teina dingin athumun ahi. Chuin amahole thempu pipui aw chun anehjou jotai." 
Luke23:24 Chuin athum banguva bol dingin Pilate'in thu alhuh sahtan ahi. 
Luke23:25 Chuin aman khosung chonoh le tolthat songkul'a kikhum athumpau chu alhadohpeh-in; Jesu vang chu amaho lunggot banga dingin apedohtan ahi. 
Luke23:26 Chuin akaimang phatnun, gama kona hung Cyrene gam mi Simon chu amanun, Jesu nung lama pu dingin achungah thingpel chu angamun ahi." 
Luke23:27 Chule mihonpi atamatam le a-op chum chuma kap numei mipi nasatah-in anung ajuijun ahi. 
Luke23:28 Ahin Jesu akiheijin ajah uva, Jerusalem chanute, keima neika hih-un, nangho le nachateo dingjoh-in kapmun." 
Luke23:29 Ijeh-inem itile, veuvin, Achingho le chavop khalou naobu, chule naonoi chepsah khalouho anun nomui ati nadingu hitobang nikho chu hung lhung ding ahi." 
Luke23:30 Chutengle amahon molsang jah-a, Neilhuh khumun, atiuva lhang jah-a, Neikhu khumun neiselun, ati dingu ahi." 
Luke23:31 Ijeh-inem itile amahon thing hing bon hitia abolule, thing go i-aloda dinguham? ati." 
Luke23:32 Hichea chun amatoh thatha ding akhang gilou adang mi ni jong apuijun ahi. 
Luke23:33 Chuin Calvary atiu mun chu alhun phatnun, ama chu thingpelah akhenbeh-un, chule akhang giloute ni jong chu khat ajet lamah, khat avei lamah akhenbeh-un ahi." 
Luke23:34 Chuin Jesu'n, Pa, amaho hi ngaidamin; ijeh-inem itile amahon abolu hi ahepouve, ati. Chuin avangphapha changhen tin vang akiveuvin aponsil chu akihom taove." 
Luke23:35 Chule miho chu adingun ave jingun ahi. Chuin alah uva um vaipohon chun anelpeh-un, Midang bon huhhing-a chu; Pathen lhen Christa chu ahile, ama kihuh hinghen, atiuve." 
Luke23:36 Chuin sepaiho jong chun totnop nan aneijun, akoma ahungun, lengpiga twi thuh apeuvin;" 
Luke23:37 Juda te lengpa nahile kihuh hingin, atiuvin ahi." 
Luke23:38 Chule ama hi JUDA TE LENGPA AHI, tia Greek, Latin, chule Hebrew paova kisun hetsahna achung vumah aumin ahi." 
Luke23:39 Chuin akikhaija khang gilou teni khat chun ajonhouvin, Nangma Christa chu nahile nangma kihuh hingin lang keini jong neihuhhing lhontang, ati." 
Luke23:40 Ahivangin khatpa chun ama chu adonbutnin aphoh-in, Talent thakhat namat khom jenga jong, nangman Pathen jeng jong nagin louham?" 
Luke23:41 Eini hi talent man ding dol mong ihi; ajehchu ithilbol manbou ikisan ahi: hichepa vanghi ima suhset neilou ahi, ati." 
Luke23:42 Chuin aman Jesu henga, Pakai nalenggam ma nalhun teng neihe jingin, ati." 
Luke23:43 Chuin Jesu'n amapa jah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, Tunia gam loupi-a keimatoh i-um khom ding ahi, ati." 
Luke23:44 Hichu nidan gup don ahin, chua pat chun nidan ko geijin gam jouse chunga thim ahung jingin;" 
Luke23:45 Nisa athimtan, chule houin'a pondal len chu alailunga akeh lhan ahi." 
Luke23:46 Chuin Jesu'n aw gingtah-in asamin, Pa, nakhutna kalhagao kapedoh-e, atin atantai." 
Luke23:47 Chuin sepai jalamkai chun thil soh umchan chu amun phatnin, Pathen avahchoijin, Hichepa hi michonpha tahbeh mong ahi, ati." 
Luke23:48 Chuin vetchah chu ve dinga hung khom mipi ho chun thilsoh umchan chengse chu amuvin, a-op beng bengin akinungle taovin ahi." 
Luke23:49 Chule akihetpiho le Galilee gama kona ahin kilhonpi numei ho jong chu galkanga adingun, chuti thilsoh hochu amu jingun ahi." 
Luke23:50 Chuin, veuvin, houvai poloi lah-a chun amin Joseph atiu mikhat aumin; amachu miphatah le chonphatah ahi." 
Luke23:51 Aman amaho kihousomna le thilbol chu ajop pon ahi. Amahi Judah ho khopi Arimathea kho-a kon ahin, chule Pathen gam ngah jinga um ahi." 
Luke23:52 Hiche mipa hi Pilate henga ahungin, Jesu long chu athumtai." 
Luke23:53 Chuin along chu alalhan, tupat pon nemin atomin, amasanga koimacha koikhahna lou song kilai lhan sunga chun alupsahtan ahi." 
Luke23:54 Hiche ni chu kigot ni ahin, chule cholngah nikho jong anaitan ahi." 
Luke23:55 Chuin Galilee'a kona ahinlhonpi numei ho chun anung ajuijun, lhanle along chu iti akoiju agaveuvin ahi." 
Luke23:56 Chuin amaho kinungle uvin, lounam le thao namtui akigot uvin; chule danthupeh dungjuijin cholngah nin akicholngah-un, ahi." 
Luke24:1 Tun hapta nikho masapen jingpi matah-in agotsao thil namtui chu akichoijun, lhan lama chun midang phabep khat to lhonin ahungun, ahi." 
Luke24:2 Ahin lhankotna kona song chu tahdohsa anaum agamuve. 
Luke24:3 Chuin asunga alutnun ahile, Pakai Jesu long chu agamu tapouve." 
Luke24:4 Chuin ahitin ahi, chuche jeh-a alungdon pettah-un, veuvin, pon avala val lahlah kisil mi ni akomuvah ahung ding lhonin;" 
Luke24:5 Hichun amaho tijatah a akunchah pettah-un, chuche mite ni chun ajah uvah, Athiho lah-a ibola ahinga nahol uham?" 
Luke24:6 Ama hikoma aumtapoi, athoudohtai. Aman Galilee gama aum laija najah uva asei," 
Luke24:7 Mihem Chapa hi michonseho khutna pehdoh-a umtei ding, chule thingpel'a kikhenbeh ding, chule nithum nileh thoudoh kit tei ding ahi, ati chu geldoh-un, ati lhone." 
Luke24:8 Hichun amahon athuseiho chu ageldoh-un," 
Luke24:9 Chuin lhana kon chun akileuvin, thu chucheng chu somlekhat le adangho jah-a agaseijun ahi." 
Luke24:10 Hicheng thu chu solchah ho jah-a gaseija chu Magdalene Mariam, Joanna, Jacob nu Mariam, chule numei danghotoh ahiuvin ahi." 
Luke24:11 Ahivangin athuseiju chu amahon moh thu maimaijin anangaitou vin, ana tahsan pouve." 
Luke24:12 Ahivangin Peter akipatdoh-in, lhan lama chun alhai jel-in; chuin akunsuh-in, agahven ahile tupat ponho sehseh aum chu amun, thilsoh umchan chu kidang sapumin akile tan ahi." 
Luke24:13 Chuin, veuvin hiche nitah chun alah uva mi ni Emmaus kho-a ache lhonin; hichu Jerusalem'a kona ching somgup ahi." 
Luke24:14 Amani chu chuche thilsoh umchan jouse thudol akihoulim lhonin ahi. 
Luke24:15 Chuin ahitin ahi, amani akihoulim lhona akidohto pet lhonin, Jesu tah-in ahinnai lhonin, amani chutoh alhonin ahi." 
Luke24:16 Amavang amanin ahet lhon louna dinga amit lhon kiphel-a ahi. 
Luke24:17 Chuin aman ajah lhona, Nalamjot pum lhona khat le khat ipi thu kihoulim nahi lhona, nguichet nahi lhonham? ati." 
Luke24:18 Chuin khatjoh amin Cleopas atiu chun adonbutnin, Jerusalem'a kholjin tulai thusoh umchan helou nangma changsehbou nahim? ati." 
Luke24:19 Chuin aman amani jah-a, Ipi thu ham? ati. Chuin amanin, Pathen le miho jouse mitmu-a athu-a le athilbola themgao thahat neitah Nazareth Jesu chungchang," 
Luke24:20 Thempu pipuiho le kavaipo houvin tha dinga thu alhuhsah dinga apehdoh uva, thingpel'a athau thudol ahi." 
Luke24:21 Keihonla ama chu Israelte lhatdoh dinga kakineppiu ahi: ahin hicheng tailou chun, chuti thilso-a pat tuni hi anithum ni ahitai." 
Luke24:22 Chujongle kaloi lah uva jingpi matah-a alhan lama gache-a numei phabep khatnin eilungdon sah-ui; 
Luke24:23 Amahon along agoholmo phatnun, ahung kileuvin, Keihon vantil kamuvin, ama chun, Ama ahing kit tai atie, ahung tiuve." 
Luke24:24 Chuin kaloi lah uva phabep khat lhan lama agacheule, numei ho sei bangbang chun agamuvin; ama agamu pouvin ahi, ati lhone." 
Luke24:25 Chuin aman ajah lhonah, Vo lungthimbei, themgaoho thusei jouse tahsan ding lung ngongkai ho:" 
Luke24:26 Christa chun hicheng gim genthei chu athoh sohkeija, chule aloupina-a lut ding mong hilouham? ati." 
Luke24:27 Chuin Mosi'a patle themgaoho jouse-a patnin Pathen lekhabu pumpi-a ama thudol kisun jouse chu amani ahilchentan ahi. 
Luke24:28 Chuin achena dingu khokom ageijun, ama akala chepai ding bang akisai." 
Luke24:29 Chuin amanin alho lhonin, Keinitoh umnao hite; ni asaujo achetan; nilhahkon jong ahitai, ati lhone. Chuin ama amanitoh umdingin aluttan ahi." 
Luke24:30 Chuin amanitoh an nedingin atouvin, aman changlhah alan phatthei aboh-in, chuin aheh balbalin amani chu apei." 
Luke24:31 Hitah chun amit lhon avah-in, ama chu ahedoh lhontan; chuin ama amitmu lhona konin amangtan ahi." 
Luke24:32 Chuin amani chun khatnin khat jah-a, Lampi dunga eiki houlimpi lhona Pathen lekhabu thu eihilchen lhona chu ilung soulahlah jeng hih-am? akitito lhone." 
Luke24:33 Hiche pettah chun akipat lhonin, Jerusalem lama akile lhonin, chule chukoma somlekhat le aumpiho mun khatna anaum khomu agatoh lhonin;" 
Luke24:34 Amahon, Pakai athoudoh tahbeh mongtai; chule Simon akimusah-e, anatiuve." 
Luke24:35 Chuin lam dunga thu umchan le changlhah ahebala amanin ahetdoh lhon, imajouse chu amanin jong asei lhonin ahi." 
Luke24:36 Thu chucheng asei pettah-un, Jesu alailung uvah ahung dingin, Nachung uvah lungmon umhen, ati." 
Luke24:37 Ahivangin amahon thilha kamu ahi tin angaitouvin, akichauvin atija lheh jengui." 
Luke24:38 Chuin aman ajah uva, Ibola lung olmoa nahiuvem? Chule ibola nalunguva ginchatlel sohham?" 
Luke24:39 Kakhut kakeng veuvin lang heuvin, keima kahibouve; neithamun lang veuvin; ijeh-inem itile keima neimu bangu hin lhagaovin gu le phe aneipoi, ati." 
Luke24:40 Hitichun aseijin, akhut akeng avetsahtan ahi." 
Luke24:41 Ahivangin akipa jeh uva chuche-a jong atahsan lou laijuva alungdon pettah-un, aman ajah uva, Hikoma hi nehding ima them naneijum? ati." 
Luke24:42 Chuin amahon nga kikang halkhat le khoibal khat apeuvin ahi. 
Luke24:43 Chuin aman alan a-ang sunguvah anetai. 
Luke24:44 Chuin aman ajah uva, Keima nang hotoh iumkhom laijuva Mosi danthua, themgaoho lekhabua, chule Labu-a, keima thudol kisun jouse guilhung sohkei ding ahi tia najah uva kasei chu hiche ahi, ati." 
Luke24:45 Chutah chun Pathen lekhabua chu ahetdoh theina dingun alungu ahonpeh-in," 
Luke24:46 Chule ajah uva, Hitin akisune, Christa chun gimle genthei athoh-a, anithum nileh athi lah-a kona athodoh kit ngai ahi:" 
Luke24:47 Chule Jerusalem'a kipan chitin namtin jah jouse-a ama mina lungheija chonset suhbeina kihil lhang ding ahi. 
Luke24:48 Hichengse chu aboncha ahetoh nangho nahiuve. 
Luke24:49 Chule, veuvin, ka Pa thutep chu keiman nangho chunga kahinsol lhah ding ahi; amavang chunga kona thahat na-a nakivon masangseuvin, Jerusalem khopi-a hin um jengun, ati." 
Luke24:50 Chuin aman amaho chu Bethany khokeng geijin apuidoh-in, akhut ajahdoh-in, amaho chu phatthei aboh-in ahi." 
Luke24:51 Chuin ahitin ahi, chutia phatthei aboh pettah chun, amaho chu akikhenpin, chuin van'a lahtouvin aumtai." 
Luke24:52 Chuin amahon ama chu ahouvun, kipah thanom tah-in Jerusalem'a ahung kile taovin;" 
Luke24:53 Chule houin'a Pathen vahchoi le vangboh-in aum jomjing taovin ahi. Amen. 
John1:1 Atila chu Thu uma ahin, Thu chu Pathen toh uma ahi, chule Thu chu Pathen ahi." 
John1:2 Hichu atila Pathen toh uma ahi. 
John1:3 Thil jouse Ama vanga um ahi; aum jouse hi ama louva um khatcha jong aumpoi. 
John1:4 Ama-a chun hinna aumin, chule hinna chu mihem vah ahi." 
John1:5 Chuin vah chun muthim lah ahinsalin, ahin muthimin anahepoi." 
John1:6 Pathen'a kona hinkisol mi khat ahungin, ama chu amin John ahi." 
John1:7 Ama vanga mi jousen atahsan theina dinga vah thudol chu hettohsah dinga, ama chu hunga ahi." 
John1:8 Ama chu vah chu ahipon, vah thudol chu hettohsah dinga hung kisol joh ahibouve." 
John1:9 Vannoi'a hungah mitin salvah chu vah tahbeh ahi. 
John1:10 Ama chu vannoi'a ahung umin, chule vannoi hi ama sem ahi, ahin vannoi'in ama anahepoi." 
John1:11 Ama ama-ate henga hunga ahin, ama-aten anasang pouve." 
John1:12 Ahivangin aman anasanga, ama mina tahsan chan chu, Pathen chate ahi theina dingu thaneina apetai," 
John1:13 chuteho chu thisana kona peng hilou, tahsaphe lunglama kona peng jong hilou, mihem lunglama kona peng jong hilouvin, Pathen'a kona peng ahibouvui." 
John1:14 Chuin Thu chu tahsaphe ahung soh-in, ilah uva ahung chengin, keihon aloupina, Pa-a kona chapa changkhatseh loupi chu, lungset le thutah dimsetnin kamutaove." 
John1:15 John'in ama thudol chu ahettohsah len, Kanunga hunga chu keima sangin amasa jotai; ama keima masang peh-a um jingsa ahi jeh-in, tia kasei chu ama hi ahi, tin asame." 
John1:16 Ajeh chu ama aletsetna kon chun, eiho lungset chunga lungset ichang taove." 
John1:17 Ajeh iham itile danthu chu Mosi peh ahin; lungset le thutah chu Christa vanga hung umdoh ahi. 
John1:18 Koiman imatih chanin Pathen amukhapoi; Pa oma beh jing Chapa changkhat chun aphondoh ahitai. 
John1:19 Jerusalem'a kona Juda hon thempuho le danthu sunho John henga, Koi nahim? tia dong dinga asoluva, John thu hettohsah chu hiche ahi." 
John1:20 Aman aseidoh jenge, aseileppoi; Keima Christa kahipoi, tin aseidoh jenge." 
John1:21 Chuin amahon adongun, Koiba nahim? Elijah nahim? atiule aman, Kahipoi, ati. Themgao chu nahim, atiule, Kahipoi, ati." 
John1:22 Hijeh chun amahon ajah-a, Koi nahim? Eihinsol teho kadonbut theina dinguva, koi kahi nakitim? atiuve." 
John1:23 Aman, Keima Isaiah themgao sei, Pakai lampi sem jangun tia, gamthipma khosam-a mi khat aw gin chu kahi, ati." 
John1:24 Ahung kisol miho chu Pharisai ho hinsol ahiuve. 
John1:25 Chuin amahon adongun ajah-a, Christa nahi louva, chule Elijah la nahi louva, themgao chula nahi loule, ibola baptize nachansah jiham, atiuve." 
John1:26 John'in adonbutnin ajah uva, Keiman twija baptize kachansah ji ahin, nalah uva nanghon nahet louvu mi khat adinge." 
John1:27 Ama chu ahi kanunga hunga, keisanga chungnungjo katichu, keima akengchot khao sutlham hoi jong kahipoi, ati." 
John1:28 Hicheng chu John'in baptize abolna, Jordan galla Bethabara mun'a kibola ahi." 
John1:29 Ajingin ahenga Jesu ahung amun, hichun, Veuvin, vannoi chonset pomang, Pathen Kelngoinou khu!" 
John1:30 Ama hi ahi, kanunga hunga keima sanga chungnungjo tia kasei chu, ijeh-inem itile ama keima masang peh-a anaumsa ahitai." 
John1:31 Keiman ama kanahepoi; ahivangin Israel lah-a ama phondohna dinga, twija baptize chansah-a kahung ahi, ati." 
John1:32 Chuin John'in ahettohsah-in, Keiman vakhu banga Lhagao chu van'a kona ahung kumlhah-a achunga achuh kamun, achungah aumdentai." 
John1:33 Chule keiman ama kanahepoi, ahivangin twi'a baptize chansah-a eisola chun kajah-a, Nangman Lhagao ahung kum-a achunga aum namu chu, ama chu Lhagao Thenga baptize chansah ding chu ahi, eiti." 
John1:34 Chule keiman kamua, Ama hi Pathen Chapa ahi tia kahettohsah ahitai, ati." 
John1:35 Ajing nikhon John aseijui mini toh ana dingin; 
John1:36 Jesu avale chu agahven, Veuvin, Pathen Kelngoi nou khu! ati." 
John1:37 Chuin aseijuite ni chun athusei chu aja lhonin, Jesu nung ajui lhontai." 
John1:38 Chuin Jesu akiheijin, amanin anung ajui lhon chu amun, Ipi nahol lhonham, ati. Hichun amanin Rabbi (hichu houhil tina ahi) hoija na-umjim? ati lhone." 
John1:39 Chuin Aman, hung lhonin hung ve lhontan ati. Chuin ache lhonin aumna chu agamu lhonin, chuin hiche ni chun amatoh aum lhontai, hichu nidan som don ahi." 
John1:40 John thusei ja-a anung juite ni khatjoh chu Simon Peter sopipa Andrew ahi. 
John1:41 Ama chun amasa penin asopipa Simon chu amun ajah-a, Messiah kamutaove, ati; hichu Christa tina ahi." 
John1:42 Hitichun Jesu hengah ahinpuijin ahi. Jesu'n ama chu aven, Jona chapa Simon nahi; Kepha nakisah ding ahi, ati (Hichu Peter tina ahi)." 
John1:43 Chuin ajingin Jesu'n Galilee gam lama che agon ahile, Philip amun ajah-a, neijuijin ati." 
John1:44 Philip chu Bethsaida khomi ahin, Andrew le Peter chenna khomama chu ahi." 
John1:45 Philip chun Nathanael amun ajah-a, Athudol Mosi'n danthu bu-a asut le themgaoho asutnu, Nazareth Jesu, Joseph chapa chu kamutaove, ati." 
John1:46 Chuin Nathanael chun ajah-a, Nazareth kho-a kona thil pha soh thei ngaijem, ati. Philip'in ajah-a, hungin lang hung vetan, ati." 
John1:47 Jesu'n Nathanael ahenga ahung amun, athudol aseijin; veuvin, Israel mitahbeh, phatlhemna nei louhel khu ati." 
John1:48 Nathanael'in ajah-a, Hoija kona iti neihet ham? ati. Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Philip'in nakou masanga theichang phung noija na-uma chu kamu ahitai, ati." 
John1:49 Chuin Nathanael'in adonbutnin, Rabbi, nangma Pathen Chapa nahi; nangma Israelte lengpa nahi, ati." 
John1:50 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keiman najah-a, Theichang phung noija na-uma kamu ahitai, tia kasei jeh-a chu natahsan ham? Hiche sanga chu chungnungjo namu ding ahi, ati." 
John1:51 Chuin aman ajah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, tunungle van akihona, Mihem Chapa chunga Pathen vantil ho akumsuh akaltou namu ding ahi, ati." 
John2:1 Chuin ani thum nin Galilee gama Cana kho-ah moupui golvah aumin; chua chun Jesu nu aumin ahi. 
John2:2 Chule moupui golvahna-a chu Jesu le aseijuiho jong akouvu ahi. 
John2:3 Chuin lengpitwi alhahsam phatnin, anun Jesu jah-a, Lengpitwi aneitapouve, ati." 
John2:4 Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, Numei, eini i-ikin umam? Keima kaphat lhung loulai hi, ati." 
John2:5 Anun lhachaho jah-a, Najah uva asei chan bolun, ati." 
John2:6 Chukoma chu Juda te dana kisuhthengna, mon ni mon thum ket cheh songbel gup uma ahin," 
John2:7 Jesu'n ajah uva, twibel hochu twi sung dimun, ati. Chuin amahon hicheng chu twi asung dimset taove." 
John2:8 Chuin aman ajah uva, Tun thalunlang golvah vaihompa henga choijun, ati. Chuin amahon achoitauve." 
John2:9 Chuin golvah vaihompa chun twisih lengpitwi kisosah chu atepkhah phat chun, Hoija kon ahi ahepoi (lhachaho athala pangho vang chun ahenauve), chuin golvah vaihompa chun moulang chu akouvin, ajah-a," 
John2:10 Mitinin lengpitwi achih atungdoh masa ngaijin; chule min adon khop tengle adaojep apejin; nangman tu geijin lengpitwi chih nakoi nalaije, ati." 
John2:11 Jesu'n hiche melchihna kidang chu Galilee gama Cana kho-a abolpat ahin, aloupina aphongdoh tan; chule aseijuihon atahsan taove." 
John2:12 Chuin chuche jou chun Capernaum'a agachesuh-in, amatoh anutoh chule asopiho le aseijuiho toh ahiuvin, chukoma chun ni sotpi aumpouve." 
John2:13 Chuin Juda ho kalchuh kut anaitan ahile, Jesu Jerusalem'a ache toutai." 
John2:14 Chuin aman houin sungah bongle kelngoi chule vapal johho, chule sum lhengho atouvu agamu-in;" 
John2:15 Chuin aman khao kiholin jepna asemin, abonchauvin, kelngoi pum le bongchal pumin houin'a konin anodoh-in, sumlheng ho sum aboh lhahpeh-in, adokhangu chu alekhup peh-in;" 
John2:16 Chuin vapal johho jah-a chun, Hitehohi hia konin podoh un; ka Pa-in hi sumkolveina in'in bol hih-un, ati." 
John2:17 Hichun, na-in'a katom pana-in eine chaije, tia kisun chu aseijuihon ageldoh taove." 
John2:18 Hijeh chun Juda hon adonbutnun ajah-a, Thil hicheng nabol hi amelchihna ipi neimusah-um, atiuve." 
John2:19 Chuin Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah uva, Hiche houin hi suchimun, keiman ni thumin tungdoh inge, ati." 
John2:20 Hijeh chun Juda hon, Hiche houin sahna-a kum somli le kum gup jen lut chu nangman ni thuma natundoh ding ong, atiuve." 
John2:21 Amanla ama tahsa houin aseina ahibouve. 
John2:22 Hijeh chun ama athi lah-a kona kaithouva aum phat chun, aseijuiten ajah uva hiche asei chu ageldoh-un, Pathen lekhabua thule Jesu thusei chu atahsan taove." 
John2:23 Kalchuh kut laija ama Jerusalem'a aum pet chun, athilbol melchihna ho chu amuvin mi tamtah-in ama minah atahsan taove." 
John2:24 Ahivangin Jesu'n amaho chu angampipoi; ajeh chu aman mi jouse ahetsoh ahin; 
John2:25 Chule mi thudol min ahetsah ding chu angaipoi; ijeh-inem itile mi lung sunga ipi aum aman ahet sohkei ahi. 
John3:1 Pharisai ho lah-a mi amin Nicodemus atiu Juda ho vaipo khat aumin," 
John3:2 Ama chu jan-in Jesu hengah ahungin ajah-a, Rabbi, Pathen'a kona hung houhil khat nahi ti, keihon kaheuve. Ajeh chu Pathen toh kivop louvan melchihna kidang nabol chengse hi koiman abol theipoi, ati." 
John3:3 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, Koi hijongle chunga kona thahpen kit lou chu koiman Pathen lenggam amu theipoi, ati." 
John3:4 Nicodemus'in ajah-a, Mi ateh tengle iti pen thah thei dingham? Aniveina-a anu oisunga lutna peng kit theijam, ati." 
John3:5 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, Mi koi hijongle twi leh Lhagaova apen loule Pathen lenggam alut theipoi." 
John3:6 Tahsaphe-a kona penga chu tahsephe ahin, Lhagaova kona penga chu lhagao ahi." 
John3:7 Chunga kona nathahpen kit dingu ahi tia najah-a kasei chu datmo hih-in. 
John3:8 Hui khu anun nomna lam lamah anungjin, nangman agin najanan hoija hung kona hoi lama acheji nahepoi: Lhagaova pengho chengse jong chuti chu ahiuve, ati." 
John3:9 Nicodemus'in adonbutnin ajah-a, Hicheng chu iti hi thei dingham, ati." 
John3:10 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Nangla Juda te houhil nahin, hitiho chu nahet louham?" 
John3:11 Keiman tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahi, Keihon kahet kaseijuva, kamu kahetsah-u ahi, ahivangin kahet tohsah-u hi nanghon nasang pouve." 
John3:12 Keiman nangho jah-a leiset thu kaseija nanghon natahsan louvule, van thuho seileng iti natahsan dingu ham?" 
John3:13 Van'a uma, van'a kona hung kumlha Mihem Chapa tailou, koima van'a akal khapoi." 
John3:14 Chule gamthipma Mosi'n gul adop sang bang banga chu Mihem Chapa hi kidomsang ding ahi. 
John3:15 Koi hile Ama tahsan chan chu mangthah louva, tonsot hinkemlou anei ahitai." 
John3:16 Ajeh chu Pathen'in hibanga hi vannoi angailut jeh-in, Achapa changkhat chu apetan ahi; koi hijongle Ama tahsan chan chun mangthah louva tonsot hinkemlou anei ahitai." 
John3:17 Ajeh chu Pathen'in Chapa chu vannoi themmo chansah dinga hilouvin, vannoi mite ama vanga huhhinga aum theina dinguva vannoi'a ahinsol joh ahibouve." 
John3:18 Ama tahsan chu themmo chang louva ahitai; atahsan lou vang chu themmo changsa um ahitai, aman Pathen Chapa changkhat mina atahsan lou jeh chun." 
John3:19 Chule themmo achanau chu hiche ahi, vannoi'ah vah ahungin ahivangin achonnau phatlou jeh-in, mihon vah sangin muthim adeijouvin ahi." 
John3:20 Ijeh-inem itile achon phalou jousen vah ahotbole, achon phatlou chu kisosal khante tin, vah-a chun hung jong ahungjipoi." 
John3:21 Thutah bola vang chu, athilpha bol chu Pathen vanga ahi ti phondohnan vah-a ahungjin ahi, ati." 
John3:22 Chucheng nung chun Jesu aseijuite toh Judea gamah ahungun, chuin chukoma chun amahotoh aumin, baptize achansah jin ahi." 
John3:22 Chucheng nung chun Jesu aseijuite toh Judea gamah ahungun, chuin chukoma chun amahotoh aumin, baptize achansah jin ahi." 
John3:23 Chule John'in jong Salim kenga Ainon kho-a chun twi atam jeh chun baptize achansah-in; miho chu ahungun baptize ahung changjiuvin ahi. 
John3:24 Ijeh-inem itile John songkulla kikhum loilai ahi.
