John3:25 Hia chun John seijui ho le Juda miho kisuhtheng thudollin akineltauvin ahi. 
John3:26 Chuin amaho John henga ahungun ajah-a, Rabbi, ven, Jordan gala naumpi athu nahettohsah, ama chun baptize achansah jin, mi jouse ahenga ahungjiuve, atiuve." 
John3:27 John'in adonbutnin, Mi van'a kona kipe lou chu ima achang theipoi." 
John3:28 Nanghotah keima thu hettohsah nahiuve, Keiman, Keima Christa kahipoi, ama masanga hinkisol kahibouve, kati chu." 
John3:29 Mou kichenpia chu moulang ahi; moulang jol akoma dinga athusei ja-a chu, moulang aw gina chu hapa kipahji ahi; hijeh-a chu keima kipana chu kibulhit ahitai." 
John3:30 Ama chu khangtou tou ding ahin, keima kemsuh suh ding kahi." 
John3:31 Chunga kona hung chu mi jouse chunga chungnung pen ahi. Leija kona chu leija mi ahin, leiset thubou asei ahi; van'a kona hunga chu chungnung pen ahi." 
John3:32 Aman amu chanle ajahchan ahettohsah ahin; ahettohsah chu koiman asangpoi. 
John3:33 Athu hettohsah sanga chun, Pathen chu dihtah ahi tia mohor anamdet ahi" 
John3:34 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen sol chun Pathen thubou aseijin; Pathen'in tepten Lhagao apepoi. 
John3:35 Pa chun Chapa chu angailun, thil jouse akhutna apetai." 
John3:36 Chapa tahsana chun tonsot hinna anei ahitai; Chapa tahsanlou vang chun hinna mulou ding; amavang Pathen lunghan achunga umjo ahitai, ati." 
John4:1 Chuin Pakai chun John sangin Jesu'n seijui tamjo asemin baptize achan tamsahjoi ti Pharisai hon ajataove ti ahet phatnin," 
John4:2 (Jesu'n aman baptize chansah louva aseijuiho abolsah ahi jeng vangin) 
John4:3 Judea gam adalhan Galilee gam lama akiletan ahi. 
John4:3 Judea gam adalhan Galilee gam lama akiletan ahi. 
John4:4 Chule Samaria gam ajot tei ding ahi. 
John4:5 Chuti chun Samaria kho khat Sychar atiuva chun ahung lhungtan, hichu Jacob'in achapa Joseph apeh mun kom chu ahi." 
John4:6 Chukoma chu Jacob twikul uma ahi. Jesu alamjot thacholin twikul panga chun atouvin; hichu nidan gup don ahi. 
John4:7 Chukoma chun Samaria numei khat twi thalin ahungin, Jesu'n amanu jah-a chun: Twi don ding neipen, ati." 
John4:8 (Ijeh-inem itile aseijuite chu neh ding cho-a khopi sunga chu lut anahitaove). 
John4:9 Hitichu ahi jeh chun, Samaria numeinu chun ajah-a, Nangmala Juda mi nahin, Samaria numei keima henga twi don ding nathum chu iti danham? ati. Ajehchu Juda miten Samaria mite thilkeu amanji louvu ahi." 
John4:10 Jesu'n adonbutnin amanu jah-a, Pathen thilpeh henlang chule, twi don ding neipen tia nahenga thuma chu koi ahi helechun; nangman ama henga nathumjoh ding ahin, chutile aman nangma hinna twi peta dinga, ati." 
John4:11 Numeinu chun ajah-a, Pu, nangman athalna ding imala naneipon, twikul'a athuh-in, hintwi chu hoija nalah ham?" 
John4:12 Twikul hi eipeuva, aman jong dona, achateu le aganchaho donsah-a kapau Jacob sanga chungnungjo nahim? ati." 
John4:13 Jesu'n adonbutnin amanu jah-a, Koi hijongle hiche twi don chengse chu dangchah kit ding ahi." 
John4:14 Ahin koi hijongle keiman kapeh ding twi vang chu adon jouse dangchah kit talou ding ahi; chule keiman kapeh ding twi chun asunga tonsot kemlou hintwi putna twinah sohdoh ding ahi, ati." 
John4:15 Numeinu chun ajah-a, Pu, hiche twi chu neipen, kadangchah kit louna dingle hikoma gam hichana hi twi thala kahungji louna dingin, ati." 
John4:16 Jesu'n ajah-a, Chen na-inneipu gakouvin, hikoma hung lhonin, ati." 
John4:17 Numeinu chun adonbutnin ajah-a, Keiman inneipu kaneipoi, ati. Jesu'n amanu jah-a, Inneipu kaneipoi, nati chu nasei dih lheh-e;" 
John4:18 ijeh-inem itile nangman ji nga nanei ahitai, tu-a nanei khu nangma ji ahipoi; hiche nasei chu adih lheh-e, ati." 
John4:19 Numeinu chun ajah-a, Pu, nangma hi themgao nahi, ti kahedoh tai." 
John4:20 Kapute kapateuvin hiche mola hi Pathen ahoujiu ahi; ahin nanghon, Min Pathen ahouna ding mun chu Jerusalem ahi, nati uve, ati." 
John4:21 Jesu'n amanu jah-a, Numei, neitahsanin, nanghon Pa chu nahouna dingu hiche mola jong hilou, Jerusalem'a jong hilou, hitobang phat chu ahung lhunge." 
John4:22 Nanghon nahet louhelu nahouvu ahin, keihon kahouvu hi kaheuve; ijeh-inem itile huhhingna chu Juda te lah-a konbou ahi." 
John4:23 Ahivangin phat ahung lhunge, tu hi ahi, chutengle ahou tahbeh hon Pa chu lhagaole thutah-a ahou dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pa chun chutobangho bou chu ahou dinga ahol ahi." 
John4:24 Pathen chu Lhagao ahi, chule ahouten lhagaole thutah-a hou ding mong ahi, ati." 
John4:25 Numeinu chun ajah-a, Keiman Messiah, Christa atiu chu, hung ding ahi, ti kahei; Ama chu ahung tengle aman ijakai eihil sohkei dingu ahinai, ati." 
John4:26 Jesu'n amanu jah-a, Nakihoupi keima hi ama chu kahi, ati." 
John4:27 Chuin hiche pettah chun aseijuite ahungun, numeinu toh anakihou chu, adatmo lheh jengui; ahivanginla, Ipi thuma nahim? ahiloule, amanu chutoh ibola kihou nahim, tia khatcha jong aumpouve." 
John4:28 Chutichun numeinu chun atwi bel adalhan, khopi sunga chun achen, miho jah-a chun," 
John4:29 Hungun, mi khat, hung veuvin, kathilbol kachonna jouse eiseidohpeh sohkeije; hiche hi Christa hikhat ding ham? ati." 
John4:30 Amaho khopi-a kon chun apotdoh-un, ama henga ahungui," 
John4:31 Hiche pet chun aseijuite ahenga ataovun, Rabbi, an nen, atiuve." 
John4:32 Ahivangin aman ajah uva, Nangho het lou an neh ding kaneije, ati." 
John4:33 Hijeh chun aseijuite khatle khat akihouvun, Khattouvin neh ding an ahinchoipeh ham? akitiuve." 
John4:34 Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Eisolpa lung gotlam bol, chule akin suhbulhit chu keima an ahi." 
John4:35 Nanghon, Chang atna ding lha li aumnalaije, natiji hih-um? Veuvin, keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Khodah uvin, loujao khu gahveovin, tun a-at phat ahi, aminin agusohtai." 
John4:36 A-at chun athaman asangjin, chule aga chu tonsot hin kemlouvah akholjin ahi; chuti chun atupale a-atpa thakhat tah-in akipah thanom khomji lhone." 
John4:37 Chuti chu ahin hichea hin, Khatnin atun achom khatnin a-atji, ti thuhi tahbeh ahi." 
John4:38 Natohgim lounao atna kasol nahiuve; michom dangin atohgim ahin, nangho amaho tohsa-a lut nahiuve, ati." 
John4:39 Chuin, Kathilbol kachonna chengse eisei dohpeh-e, tia hettohsah numeinu thusei jal chun, chuche khopi-a Samaria mi tamtah-in atahsan taove." 
John4:40 Hijeh chun Samaria miho chu ama henga ahungun, amaho chu aumpina dingun angeh taovin ahile; ama chukoma nini anichongin ahi." 
John4:41 Ama thusei jal-in mi tamtah-in atahsanbe taovin; 
John4:42 Hichun amahon numeinu jah-a, Tun nangma thusei jala katahsanu ahipoi; ijeh-inem itile keihotah-in kajauvin, ama hi vannoi huhhingpa Christa tahchu ahi, ti kahetauve, atiuve." 
John4:43 Chuche nini jou chun, ama chukoma kon chun Galilee lama achetai." 
John4:44 Ijeh-inem itile ama gam sunga themgao ja achang poi, ti Jesu amatah-in ahettoh sahsa ahi." 
John4:45 Hijeh chun Galilee alhun phatnin, Galilee mihon anasangui; ajeh chu Jerusalem'a kut laija athilbol imaho chu amahon aboncha amu sohkeiju ahi; ajehchu amaho jong kut na chu chea ahiuve." 
John4:46 Hitichun Galilee gama twisih lengpitwi asosahna Cana kho-a chun Jesu ahungkit tan ahi. Chuin hikoma chun milal khat aumin, achapa chu damlouva Capernaum'a um ahi." 
John4:47 Chuin ama chun Jesu Judah gama konin Galilee gamah ahungtai, ti ajah phatnin, ahenga achen, achesuh-a achapa chu agabol dam dingin angehtan ahi; ajehchu ama chu athikoncha ahitai." 
John4:48 Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah-a, Melchihna le thil kidang namu lousen tahsanpon nate, ati." 
John4:49 Milalpa chun ajah-a, Pu, kachapa chu athi kah-in hungsuh-in, ati." 
John4:50 Jesu'n ajah-a, Nachena dinga kichetan; nachapa ahinge, ati. Mipa chun ajah-a Jesu thusei ho chu atahsanin achetai." 
John4:51 Chuin achesuh-in ahile, asohhon ahung lamtouvin, achapa chu adamtai, ahung tiuve." 
John4:52 Chuti chun aman, Itih-a dam pan hitam, tin adongin ahile amahon, Janhi nidan sagi dontah chun akhosih-in alhatai, atiuve." 
John4:53 Hichun Jesu'n ajah-a, Nachapa ahinge tia asei nidan tah ahi chu apan ahedoh tan; chuin amatah le a-insung mi chengsen atahsan taovin ahi." 
John4:54 Hiche hi Jesu'n Juda gam adalhah-a Galilee gama ahunga melchihna abolkit anina ahi. 
John5:1 Hicheng nung chun Juda miho kut khat aumin, chule Jesu Jerusalem'a agache touvin ahi." 
John5:2 Hia chun kelngoi kot phunga twikul khat uma ahin, amin chu Hebrew paova Bethesda kisah ahin, aleibuh nga ahi." 
John5:3 Hichenga chun ana, mitcho, elbai, nakong chatmo, mihon tamtah twi chaloh ngahjinga luma ahiuve." 
John5:4 Ajehchu itih phat ham kom komle Pakai vantil khat hung kumlhaji-a twi chu ahung cholohji ahin, atwi kicholoh nunga twikul'a kumlha masa penpen chu ipi veija, itobanga na-a hijongle anat chu damhel jeng ahi." 
John5:5 Hia chun mi khat kum somthum le kum get jen chatmoa ahin; 
John5:6 Jesu'n ama chu analup amun kum sottah na-a ahi chu ahen ajah-a, Nadam nom em, ati." 
John5:7 Anapa chun adonbutnin, Pu, twi ahung kicholoh tengle twikul'a eikoi lha ding mi koimala kaneipon; kachele kalhun kahle mi dangin eikhelin achejitai, ati." 
John5:8 Jesu'n ajah-a, Kipatdoh-in, nalupna kichoijin lam jottan, ati." 
John5:9 Chuin mipa chu adam paihel jengtan, alupna akichoijin, lam ajottan ahi. Hiche ni chu Cholngah ni ahi." 
John5:10 Hiche jeh chun Juda hon mi akiboldampa jah-a chun, Cholngah ni ahi, nangman nalupna nakichoi chu dan ngai ahipoi, atiuve." 
John5:11 Ahin aman amaho chu adonbutnin, Eiboldampa tah-in kajah-a, Nalupna kichoijin, lam jottan eiti chu, ati." 
John5:12 Amahon adongun, Najah-a, Nalupna kichoijin, lam jottan tia chu koiham? atiuve." 
John5:13 Akiboldampa chunla chukoma mipi tam jeh chun, Jesu la guhthima anavah manga ahitan, aboldama chu koi ahi ahepon ahi." 
John5:14 Khonungin Jesu'n ama chu houin'ah amun, ajah-a, Ven, akiboldama nahitai; chonse kit tahih-in, ajole akhohjo cheh nachunga chugetninte, ati." 
John5:15 Mipa chu achemangin, Juda ho jah-a, Aboldama chu Jesu ahi tin agaseitan ahi." 
John5:16 Chuin hiche jeh chun Juda hon Jesu abolse taovin, chule cholngah ni-a chucheng aboljeh chun, thadin aholtauve." 
John5:17 Ahivangin Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, Ka Pan tu gei hin na atongin, keiman jong katonge, ati." 
John5:18 Hiche jeh chun Juda hon ama thadin ahabol cheh taove; ajeh chu aman cholngah ni apal lhahkeo hilouvin, Pathen apa ahisah-a, Pathen toh kibanga akisei jeh jong chu ahi." 
John5:19 Hijeh chun Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah uva, Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Chapa chun ama chamin ima abol theipoi, a-Pan abol amu chachabou chu ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman abolchan chu, atobang banga chu Chapan jong abol ahi." 
John5:20 Ijeh-inem itile Pa chun Chapa chu angailun, athil bol jouse chu avetsahji ahi; kidang nasahna dinguva, aman hicheho sanga hi chungnungjo thil avetsah ding ahi." 
John5:21 Ijeh-inem itile Pan mithiho akaithouva ahinsah banga, Chapan jong ahinsah nomnom ahinsah ahi." 
John5:22 Pa chun mi koima thu atanpoi, thutan ding jouse Chapa apehdoh ahitai;" 
John5:23 Chutia chu mi jousen Pa ajabol banga, Chapa chu ajabol theina dingu ahi. Chapa jabol lou chun ahinsola Pa chu ajabol lou ahi." 
John5:24 Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Kathusei ngaija chule eisolpa tahsan chun tonsot hinna anei ahitai, chule thupi tanna geita louva, thina-a kona hinna-a galkaija ahitai." 
John5:25 Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, phat ahung lhunge, tu hi ahi, mithihon Pathen Chapa aw ajah dingu; chule ajaho chengse chu hing ding ahiuve." 
John5:26 Ijeh-inem itile Pan amatah-in hinna anei bang chun, Chapan jong amatah-in hinna aneina dingin apen;" 
John5:27 Chule Mihem Chapa ahi jehchun, thutan chaina thuneina chu apen ahi." 
John5:28 Hiche hi datmo hih-un; ijeh-inem itile phat ahung lhunge, hichea chu lhan khuh-a umho jousen a-aw ajah dingu," 
John5:29 Chule hungdoh ding ahiuve; thilpha bolteho chengse hinna-a thoudoh dingu, chule thilphalou bolteho chengse themmo changa thoudoh ding ahiuve." 
John5:30 Ajehchu keiman kachamin ima kabol theipoi, kajah bang banga thu katan ahin; kathutan chu dihtah ahi; keiman lunggot lam hol louva, eisola Pa lung got lam chu kaholjoh jeh-in." 
John5:31 Keiman keima le keima chungchang kaki hettohsah hile, ka hettohsah chu dih lou ding ahi." 
John5:32 Ka chungchang hettohsah-a michom khat aumin; chule aman ka chungchang ahettohsah chu hettohsahna dihtah ahi ti kahei. 
John5:33 Nanghon John henga mi nasolun ahile, aman thutah chu ahettohsah-e." 
John5:34 Ahin Keiman hettohsah nahi mihem'a kona kalah ahipoi; hijongle nangho huhhing-a naumna dinguva, hiche hohi kasei ahi." 
John5:35 Ama chu thaomei kong'a le salvah-a tobang ahin; chule nanghon ama vah-a chu chomcha khat nomsah nanom un ahi. 
John5:36 Ahinla hettohsahna keiman kanei hi John'a sanga chu chungnungjo ahi; ijeh-inem itile toh molso dinga eipeh natoh, ka natoh chengsetah hin, Pa sol kahi chu ahettohsah ahi." 
John5:37 Chule Pa eisolpa tah chun, keima thudol ahettohsah tai. Nanghon imatih-in ama aw najakhapouve, amel jong namukha pouve;" 
John5:38 Chule athu jong nasunguva achengpoi; ijeh-inem itile nanghon asolpa chu natahsan pouve. 
John5:39 Nanghon Pathen lekhabua thu naholtoh jiuve, ajehchu asunga chu tonsot hinna nanei uva nangaito jeh-un; ahin hicheho chu keima thudol hettohsah ahiuve." 
John5:40 Ahin hinna nanei theina dingun, kahenga nahung nompouve." 
John5:41 Keiman mihem choiat kasangpoi. 
John5:42 Ahivangin keiman nangho kahenaove, nangho sungah Pathen ngailutna nanei pouve." 
John5:43 Keima ka Pa mina hunga kahin, nanghon neisang pouve; achom dang khat ama minin hungle, ama chu anasang naovin nate." 
John5:44 Pathen na hungkon choi-atna bou chu hol louva, nangho khatin khat choiat kisang touva chu iti natahsan thei dinguham?" 
John5:45 Keiman nangho Pa henga kaheh dingin ngaito hih-un; naheh jiuva mi khat aumin, nanghon natahsanu Mosi ngei chu ahi." 
John5:46 Nanghon Mosi chu tahsanleu chun keima neitahsan dingu ahi; ajeh chu aman keima thudol asut ahi. 
John5:47 Ama sut natahsan lou vangule, keima thu iti natahsan dinguham?" 
John6:1 Hicheng jou chun Galilee dillen, Tiberia dillen kiti, gal lang khat lama chun ache tai." 
John6:2 Chuin natna neiho chunga melchihna kidang abol ho amu jeh-u chun, mipi atama tamin anung ajuijui." 
John6:3 Chuin Jesu mol chunga akaltouvin, aseijuiho toh atou taovin ahi." 
John6:4 Chule kalchuh kut, Juda te golvah chu naija ahitai." 
John6:5 Chuin Jesu adahdoh-in ahile, mipi atama tam ahenga ahung amun, Philip jah-a, Hiteho neh ding hi changlhah hoija ichoh dinguham? ati." 
John6:6 Hichu aman apatepna ati ahibouve, ijeh-inem itile abolding chu aman akihetnan ahi." 
John6:7 Philip'in adon butnin, Themcha khat chenga chang ding hi jeng jongleu, changlhah makhai jani manin tohponte, ati." 
John6:8 Aseijuite lah-a khat Simon Peter, sopipa Andrew'in, ajah-a," 
John6:9 Hikoma chapang khat aumin, ama hin sap changa kisem changlhah pheng ngale nga ni aneije; ahinla mi hijatpi lah-a hichu ikham hi dingham, ati." 
John6:10 Jesu'n, Miho chu tousah-un, ati. Hikoma chu hamhing tamtah um ahin, chuin mi sangnga jen chu atou taove." 
John6:11 Chuin Jesu'n changlhah alan; thangvahna aneijouvin aseijuiho ahoppeh-in, chule seijui hon atouho chu ahoppeh-un; chutobang chun nga jong chu, agot chanun apeuvin ahi." 
John6:12 Chuin amaho avasoh phatnun, aman aseijuite jah-a, Hitiho chu amangthah um louhelin, amoh anong chengse chu lohkhomun, ati." 
John6:13 Chuin amahon alohkhomun ahile, sap changa kisem changlhah pheng nga-a kon chun, anehmoh nongu paipeh somle paipeh ni aloh dimui." 
John6:14 Hijeh chun Jesu'n chuche melchihna kidang avetsah chu amuvin, miho chu akihouvun, Themgao vannoi'a hung dinga chu ama mongmong hi ahi, atiuve." 
John6:15 Chuin leng achansah dinga, acham louva ahung mat dingu ahi, ti Jesu'n ahet phatnin, achangin mol chunga akaltou kittan ahi." 
John6:16 Chuin nilhah ahi phatnin, aseijuite dila chun achesuh-un," 
John6:17 Chule kong'a alutnun, Capernahum lam panga galkai dingin akitol taove. Hichun khola athimtan, ahivangin Jesu ahenguvah ahung hih laijin ahi." 
John6:18 Chuin huipi nasatah anun jeh-in twi akinong sang tultul jengin ahi. 
John6:19 Hitichun ching somni le ching nga ahim ching somthum ahim ajap lhungun, Jesu'n twi chunga lam ajotna kong lam ahinjot amuvin ahile, akichataove." 
John6:20 Ahin aman amaho jah-a, Keima kahibouve, kicha hih-un, ati." 
John6:21 Hichun amahon kipah tah-in ama chu kong'a alalut nun: chule hiche pettah chun kong chu ajotnau mun alhungpai tan ahi. 
John6:22 Ajingin dillen gallang khat lama mipi dingho chun, chukoma chu aseijuite lutna tailou chu kong dang aumlou amuva, chule Jesu chula aseijuite toh chuche kong'a lutlouva, aseijuite amaho changbou ahiu chu aheuvin;" 
John6:23 (Ahivangin Pakaiyin thangvahna aneija mihon changlhah anehnau komcha, Tiberia'a kon kong dang dang ahungin ahi)." 
John6:24 Chuti chun mipi ho chun Jesu ahin, aseijuite ahiuvin aumtapouve ti ahet phatnun, amaho chu kong'a akalun, Jesu holin Capernahum'a ahung taove." 
John6:25 Chuin amahon dillen gal lang khat panga ama amuvin, Rabbi, itih-a hilam nalhun ham? atiuvin ahile," 
John6:26 Jesu'n amaho chu adon butnin, Keiman nangho tahbeh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Melchihna kidang namu jeh-u hilouvin changlhah nanehva jeh uva bou keima neiholu ahi." 
John6:27 Amang thahji an holnan thohgim hih-un, tonsot hinkemlouva umjing ding an holnan thohgim jouvin, hiche an chu Mihem Chapan napeh dingu ahi; ajeh chu Pa Pathen'in ama chu mohor anamdet ahitai, ati." 
John6:28 Hichun amahon ajah-a, Pathen na katoh theina dinguva ipi kabol dingu ham? atiuve." 
John6:29 Jesu'n adon butnin ajah uvah, Ahinsol hi tahsan leuchun hichu Pathen natoh ahi, ati." 
John6:30 Hijeh chun amahon ajah-a, Kamuva katahsan theina dinguva melchihna ipi nabol em? Itobang na natoh nganem?" 
John6:31 Aman van'a konin aneh dingu changlhah apei, tia kisun bang chun; Kapute kapateuvin gamthipmah manna aneuvin ahi, atiuve." 
John6:32 Hichun Jesu'n ajah uva, Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Van'a kona changlhah napeuva chu Mosi ahipoi; van'a kona changlhah tahbeh chu ka-Pan bou napeuve." 
John6:33 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen changlhah chu, van'a kona hung kumlha vannoi hinna pepa chu ahi, ati." 
John6:34 Hiche chun amahon ajah-a, Pakai, hiche changlhah chu a-imatih chanin neipeuvin atiuve." 
John6:35 Jesu'n ajah uva, Keima hi hinna changlhah kahi; kahenga hunga chu gilkel talou ding, chule keima eitahsana chu dangchah talouhel ding ahi." 
John6:36 Ahin kaseipeh nahiuve, Nanghon keima neimu vangun, neitahsan pouve." 
John6:37 Ka Pan keima eipeh chengse chu kahenga hung ding; chule kahenga hunga chu iti jongle kaledoh lou ding ahi. 
John6:38 Ijeh-inem itile keima van'a kona kahung kumlhah hi, keima lunggot bol dinga hilouvin eisolpa lunggot bol dingjoh-a hung kahi bouve." 
John6:39 Eisolpa Pa lunggot chu hiche ahi, Aman eipeh chengse hi mansah neilou hela, ni nunung nileh aboncha kakai thou ding ahi." 
John6:40 Chule eisolpa lunggot chu hiche ahi, koi hile Chapa mu-a, Ama tahsan chan chun, tonsot hinna anei ding ahi; chule keiman ninunung nileh ama kakaithou ding ahi, ati." 
John6:41 Aman van'a kona hung kumlha changlhah chu keima kahi ati jeh chun, Juda ho achungah aphunun," 
John6:42 Amahi Joseph chapa Jesu, anu apa eihon ihetnu chu hilouham? achutile, iti dana van'a kona hung kumlha kahi atiham? atiuve." 
John6:43 Hijeh chun Jesu'n amaho adonbutnin, ajah uva, Nangho khatle khat kihouvin phun hih-un." 
John6:44 Eisola ka Pan aloilut loule koima kahenga ahung theipoi; chule ni nunung nileh keiman ama chu kakaithou ding ahi. 
John6:45 Amaho chu Pathen'in ahil hicheh dingu ahi, tin themgaoho lekhabua akisune. Chuti ahijeh chun Pa-a kona ja-a, kihilna neichacha chu, kahenga hungji ahiuve." 
John6:46 Pathen koma kona hung potdohpa tailou chu, koiman Pa chu amukhapoi; amabou chun Pa chu amu ahi." 
John6:47 Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Koi hijongle keima eitahsana chun tonsot hinna anei ahitai." 
John6:48 Keima hinna changlhah chu kahi. 
John6:49 Naputeu napateu vin gamthipmah manna aneuvin, chule athi gamtaove." 
John6:50 Hiche hi min aneh-a athi louna ding, van'a hung kon changlhah ahi." 
John6:51 Keima hi van'a hungkon changlhah hing chu kahi; koi hijongle hiche changlhah ne-a chu, tonsot geija hing jing ding ahi; chule kapeh ding changlhah chu kaphe hi ahi; hichu vannoi mite hinna dinga kapeh ding ahi." 
John6:52 Hichun Juda ho amaho le amaho akinelun, Hichepa hin ineh dinguva asa iti eipeh thei dinguham? atiuve." 
John6:53 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nanghon Mihem Chapa sa naneh lou uva, athi nadon louvule, nangmaho sunga hinna nei lou nahiuve." 
John6:54 Kasa ne-a kathi dona chun tonsot hinna anei ahitai, chule ni nunung nileh keiman ama chu kakaithou ding ahi." 
John6:55 Ijeh-inem itile kasa hi an neh tahbeh ahin, kathi hi don ding tahbeh ahi." 
John6:56 Kasa ne-a, kathi dona chu, keijah aum jingjin, keima ama-ah kaum jingjie." 
John6:57 Pa hing chun eisola, Pa vanga kahin banga hi, koi hijongle keima eine-a chu, ama jong chu keima vanga hing ding ahi." 
John6:58 Van'a kona hung kumlha changlhah chu hiche hi ahi; napu napa teovin aneh uva athipiu manna tobang ahipoi; hiche changlhah ne-a vang chu a-imatih chana hing jing ding ahi, ati." 
John6:59 Hiche hi Capernahum'a thu ahil petna, kikhopna in'a asei ahi." 
John6:60 Hiche chun aseijuiho lah-a tamtah-in hiche thu chu ajauvin, Ahahsa behseh jenge; kon angai thei dingham? atiuve." 
John6:61 Hichun chuche thua aseijuite phun chu Jesu'n alung sungin ahen, ajah uvah, Hiche chun nakipal lhuhsah-u hitam?" 
John6:62 Achutile Mihem Chapa hi masanga aumna mun'a akaltou muleu chun i-nati dinguham? 
John6:63 Hinna pe-a lhagaobou ahi, tahsaphen imacha aphatchom sahpoi; najah uva kathusei chengse hi, lhagao ahin chule hinna ahi." 
John6:64 Ahivangin nalah uva abang bang atahsan lou na-umui, ati. Ajeh chu Jesu'n atila pat atahsan lou koikoi ahi, chule ama matsah dinga chu koi ahi anahet jingsa ahi." 
John6:65 Chuin aman, Hiche jeh-a chu najah uva, Pa peh louvin koima kahenga ahung theipoi, kati ahi, ati." 
John6:66 Hichea pat chun aseijuiho tamtah akinung leuvin, amatoh achele ahungleh tapouve." 
John6:67 Chuin Jesu'n Somleni ho jah-a, Nangho jong nache nomum? ati." 
John6:68 Chuin Simon Peter'in adonbutnin, Pakai, keiho koi henga kache dinguham? Nangman Tonsot hinna thuho nanei ahi." 
John6:69 Chule nangma Pathen hing chapa Christa nahi chu keihon katahsanun, chule kaheuve, ati." 
John6:70 Jesu'n amaho adonbutnin, Keiman nangho somleni kalhendoh-u hilouham? Ahinla nangho lah-a diabol khat aume, ati." 
John6:71 Simon chapa Juda Iscariot chungchang thudola hichu asei ahi; ijeh-inem itile somleni lah-a ajao vang, melmaho khutna pehdoh dinga chu amachu ahi." 
John7:1 Hicheng jou chun Juda hon tha ding agot jeh-un, Jesu Judah gama vale anomta hih-in, Galilee gama avahle tai." 
John7:2 Hiche pet chun Juda ho lhambuh kut anaitan ahi. 
John7:3 Hijeh chun asopihon ajah-a, Nathil bol chengse hi naseijui hon jong amuna dingun, hikom mun dalhanlang, Juda gama chen." 
John7:4 Ijeh-inem itile, minthan go-an koiman guhthimin thil abol ngaipoi. Thil hicheng hi nabol ahi ngalleh, vannoi kimusah-in, atiuve." 
John7:5 Ijeh ham itile asopiho jengin jong ama atahsan louvu ahi. 
John7:6 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Keima tun kaphat alhing hih laije, nangho phat vang alhing jinge." 
John7:7 Vannoi'in nangho naho theipouve; keibou eihouve; ijeh ham itile athilbolu aphapoi tia keiman amaho thudol ka hettohsah ji ahi. 
John7:8 Hiche kut nachun nangho cheovin; keima vang tun hiche kutna chehih laijinge, kaphat alhing hihlaije, ati." 
John7:9 Amaho jah-a chun thu hicheng chu aseijin ama Galilee'a aumden tan ahi. 
John7:10 Ahivangin asopite hi kutna dinga ache nungun, ama jong lhang phonga hilouvin, guhthimin achen ahi." 
John7:11 Hiche chun Judah hon kut nachun ama chu aholun, Hoija umham? atiuve." 
John7:12 Chule mipi lah-a miho chu ama thudola aphun melmul jengui; ajehchu abangin, Ama chu mipha ahi, atiuvin abangin, Ahipoi, mipi lam hilouva apuimang bouve, atiuve." 
John7:13 Ahivangin Juda ho ginan ama thudol chu lhang phonga seija koima aumpouve. 
John7:14 Chuin kut kim dontah ahi-in, Jesu houin'a achetouvin, thu agahil tan ahi." 
John7:15 Chuin Juda hon adatmo lheh jengun, Hichepan kihilna neikha louva, lekha iti ahet ham? atiuve." 
John7:16 Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, Kathuhil hi kei thu ahipoi, eisolpa-a ahibouve." 
John7:17 Koi hijongle ama lunggot lam bol nom-an, kathuhil hi Pathen'a kon ahi, keima chama kasei ahi, ahet ding ahi." 
John7:18 Ama chama thuseija chun ama kichoi-at ding agot ahin, asolpa choiat ding go-a vang chu, ama chu dihtah ahin, ama-a chu chonphat louna aumpoi." 
John7:19 Mosi'n nangho chonna dan napeh lou uham? Nangho khatchan jong chonna dan bang chun nachonpouve. Ibola tha dinga eigo-a nahiuvem, ati." 
John7:20 Chuin mipi chun adonbutnun, Nangma thilha vop nahi; koiham tha dinga nago-a, atiuve." 
John7:21 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah uva, Keiman na khat katongin ahile nabonchaovin hichu kidang nasauve." 
John7:22 Hiche jeh-a chu, Mosi'n cheptan thu napeh-u ahin; (Mosi'a kon ahijeh hilouvin, puluiho-a kon joh ahin) chule nanghon cholngah nin mi chep natan jiuve." 
John7:23 Mosi thupeh suhkeh louna dinga cholngah ni-a mi khat chep akitanle, cholngah ni-a mi khat kadamsah hel jeh-a kachunga nalunghanu ham?" 
John7:24 Alimsoa thu tan louvin, dihtah-in thu tan jouvin, ati." 
John7:25 Hichun Jerusalem'a kon mi kimkhatnin, Tha dinga agotpau chu ama hi hilouham?" 
John7:26 Ahivangin, veuvin, phongtah-in thu aseijin, amahonla ajah-a ima aseipouve. Vaipohon ama hi Christa tah chu ahi ti ahet tahbeh mongu hita ham?" 
John7:27 Ahinla ama hi hoija hung kon ahi keihon kaheuve; Christa vang chu akonna koima ahea umlou ding ahi, atiuve." 
John7:28 Hijeh chun Jesu'n houin'a thu ahil tolhonin, hatah-in asamin, nanghon keima jong neiheovin, chule hoija kon kahi jong naheuve; ahin keima kachama hunga kahipoi, ahinla eisolpa chu dihtah ahi, ama chu nanghon nahepouve." 
John7:29 Amavang keiman ama chu kahei; ijeh-inem itile keima ama-a kon kahi, chule ama sol kahi, ati." 
John7:30 Hiche chun amahon mat dingin agouvin, ahin aphat alhin loulai jeh chun, koiman achungah khut alhapon ahi." 
John7:31 Chule mipi lah-a mi tamtah-in ama chu atahsan taovin, chule Christa chu ahung tengle, hichepan abol melchihna ho sanga tamjo abolnah dingham? atiuve." 
John7:32 Mipin chutia ama thudola chuche aseijuva aphun melmulu chu Pharisai hon ajauvin; chuin thempu pipuiho le Pharisai hon ama man ding chu sottolho asolui. 
John7:33 Chuin Jesu'n, ajah uva aseijin, Chomcha khat nalah uva umtadi nalai ding kahi, chujou tengle eihin solpa henga kache ding ahi." 
John7:34 Nanghon neiholun natin, neimu lou dingu; chule kaumna-a chu nahung thei lou dingu ahi, ati." 
John7:35 Hichun Juda ho khatle khat akidongun, Eihon ama iholuva imu lou dingu chu, ama hoijabep che ding hintem? Ole Greek mi lah-a cheng chehho henga chea Greek miho agahil ding khattou ham?" 
John7:36 Nanghon neiholun natin neimu lou dingu, kaumna dinga jong nahung thei lou dingu ahi, ati hi ipi aseina ahidem? atiuve." 
John7:37 Chuin kut kichai nin, hichu nipi ni ahin, Jesu adingin hatah-in asamin, Koi hijongle adangchah-a chu kahenga hunghen, hung donhen." 
John7:38 Keima eitahsana chu, Pathen lekhabun asei bang banga, asunga kon twihing putdoh-a luija long ding ahi, ati." 
John7:39 Hichu ama tahsan hon anei dingu, Lhagao Theng chu aseina ahi; ijeh-inem itile Jesu choi-atna aum loulai jeh-a, Lhagao theng chu kipe loulai ahi." 
John7:40 Thu hicheng chu ajauvin mipi lah-a abang bangin, Tahbeh-a ama hi themgao mongmong chu ahi, atiuvin;" 
John7:41 Akimkhatnin, Ama hi Christa ahi, atiuve. Akimkhat vang chun Christa Galilee'a kona sohdoh ngaijem?" 
John7:42 Christa chu David son hi ding, David chenna khopi Bethlehem'a kon hungdoh ding ahi, tia Pathen lekhabun asei hilouham? atiuve." 
John7:43 Chuti chun ama thudola chun mipi chu abung bungin akikhentaove. 
John7:44 Chule abangho chun ama chu mat ding agouvin; ahivangin koiman achungah khut alhapouve. 
John7:45 Chuin sottol mimanho chu thempu pipuiho le Pharisai ho henga ahungun ahile, amahon anadongun, Ibola nahinpui daoham? atiuve." 
John7:46 Chuin sottol mimanho chun adonbutnun, Khuchepa thusei tobang khun mi koiman thu aseikhapoi, atiuve." 
John7:47 Chuin Pharisai hon adonbutnun, ajah uva, Nangho jong doha lha-a nahiu hitam?" 
John7:48 Vaipoho le Pharisai ho lah-a khatbeh-in ama chu atahsanem? 
John7:49 Ahin danthu helou mipi ho hi sapset changjia ahi, atiuve." 
John7:50 Nicodemus (Amaho lah-a khat, janna Jesu henga gachepa) chun ajah uva," 
John7:51 Idan uvin mi chu athu ajah masang le athilbol ahet masanga themmo achansah ngaijem? ati. 
John7:52 Chuin amahon adonbutnun, ajah-a, Nang jong Galilee mi nahim? Holin lang, ven; ajehchu Galilee'a konin themgao asohdoh ngaipoi, atiuve." 
John7:53 Hichun amaho a-in cheh-a ache taovin ahi. 
John8:1 Jesu vang chu Olivet lhang lama achetan ahi. 
John8:2 Chuin jingpitah-in houin'a ahung kittan ahile miho jouse ahenga ahungun, chuin ama atouvin, amaho chu thu ahilin ahi." 
John8:3 Hichun danthu sunho le Pharisai hon ajon pettah-a kiman numei khat ahinkaijun, alai lungah adinsah-un," 
John8:4 Jesu jah-a, Houhil, hiche numeinu hi ajon jeh-a kiman ahin, ajon pettah-a kimandoh ahi." 
John8:5 Hitobang hi songa selih ding Mosi'n danthua eipeh-u ahin, hijongle nangman iti nagelem? atiuve." 
John8:6 Ama hehset theina amu nadinguva, apatepna-a hitia chu atiu ahi. Ahin athuseiju chu jalou bangin, Jesu akunin, akhut jungin tol ajihtai." 
John8:7 Ahivangin amahon adong tei adong teijun ahile, ama adahdoh-in, ajah uva, Nalah uva chonsetna neilou penin amanu chu songin sep masapen hen, ati." 
John8:8 Chuin akun kitnin, tol ajih kit tai." 
John8:9 Chule chuche jahose chu, ase apha ahetnao vin mo achanun, alenpena pat alhumpen geijin, khat khatnin apotdoh gamtaovin; Jesu changseh le alailunga um numei bou chu aumtan ahi." 
John8:10 Chuin Jesu adatdoh phatnin, numeinu tailou adang amutapon, amanu jah-a, numei themo nachanho hoilam hitaovam? Koiman themmo nachan lou hitam? ati." 
John8:11 Amanun, Pakai, koiman themmo eichantapoi, ati. Chuin Jesu'n ajah-a, keiman jong themmo kachanpoi; chetan, tukallin chonsekit tahih-in, ati." 
John8:12 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva thu asei kitnin, Keima vannoi vah kahi; kanung eijuija chu muthima chu vahle louva, hinna vah chu anei ding ahi, ati." 
John8:13 Hichun Pharisai hon, Nangman nangma thudol nahettohsah ahin, nathu hettohsah adihpoi, atiuve." 
John8:14 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah uva, Keiman keima thudol kahettohsah hijongle, kathu hettohsah adih ahi; ajeh chu keiman hoija hung kon kahile, hoi lama che ding kahi kahenai; nangho vangin hoija kona hung kahi, chule hoi lama che ding kahi nahepouve." 
John8:15 Nanghon tahsa dungjuija thu natanjiu ahi, keiman koima thu katanpoi." 
John8:16 Ahin keiman thu tan jeng jongleng, kathutan dihtah ahi; ajeh chu keima kachang kahipoi, keima kahin chule eihinsolpa ka Pa chu ahi." 
John8:17 Nadan lekha uva, mi ni thu hettohsah chu adih ahi, tin akisune." 
John8:18 Keima thudol hettohsah kahin, chule ka Pa eihinsolpa chu keima thudol hettohsah ahi, ati." 
John8:19 Hijeh chun amahon ajah-a, Napa hoija umham? atiuve. Jesu'n adonbutnin, Nanghon keima jong neihepouvin, ka Pa jong nahepouve; nanghon keima neiheleu chun, ka Pa jong nahet dingu ahi, ati." 
John8:20 Hicheng hi Jesu'n houin'a athuhil petna, sum kholna mun'a asei ahi; aphat alhin loulai jeh chun, koiman amanpouve." 
John8:21 Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah uva asei kitnin, Kache mang ding, chule nanghon neihol dingu, chule nachonset naova nathi dingu ahi. Kachena lama nangho hung thei pouvin nate, ati." 
John8:22 Hijeh chun Juda ho chun, Kachena lama nangho hung thei pouvin nate atin, ole ama kithat ding hikhat ham? atiuve." 
John8:23 Chuin aman amaho jah-a, Nangho noija kon nahiuvin, keima chunga kon kahi; nangho hiche vannoi'a mi nahiuve, keima hiche vannoi'a mi kahipoi." 
John8:24 Hiche jeh-a chu najah uva, Nachonset naova nathi dingu, kati ahi: kei hi ama chu kahi hi, natahsan louseuva nachonset naova nathi dingu ahi, ati." 
John8:25 Hijeh chun amahon ama jah-a, Nangma koi nahim? atiuve. Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, Atila patna najah uva kaseiji chu ahi." 
John8:26 Thu nangho chungchang thudola seiding tamtah le thutan ding tamtah kaneije; ahinla eihinsolpa chu dihtah ahi; chule ama-a kona kajah chengse chu keiman vannoi jah-a kasei ahi, ati." 
John8:27 Aman Pa thudola asei ahi chu amahon ahedoh pouvin ahi. 
John8:28 Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah uva, Nanghon Mihem Chapa hi nadop sang tengule, keima hi ama chu kahi, chule kachama ima kabol lou; ahivanga Pa'n eihil bang banga, hicheng kasei ahi hi nahet dingu ahi." 
John8:29 Chule keima eisolpa chun eiumpi nai; Pa chun ka changin eilhapoi; ajeh chu keiman alunglhaina lam jengbou kabol jingin ahi, ati." 
John8:30 Hiche thu chu asei phat chun mi tamtah-in atahsantai. 
John8:31 Chuin Jesu'n Juda mi atahsanho jah-a chun, Nangho kathua hi naum jom jinguva ahile, kaseijui tahbeh nahiuve;" 
John8:32 chule thutah chu heuvin natin, thutah chun nalhadoh dingu ahi, ati." 
John8:33 Amahon adonbutnun ajah-a, Keiho Abraham son kahiuvin, chule imatih chanin koima soh-in kalut khapouve; ahin nakilhadoh dingu ahi, nati chu iti natiham? atiuve." 
John8:34 Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Koi hijongle achonse chan chu chonset soh ahi." 
John8:35 Chule soh chu a-imatih chanin ina achengjipoi; chapa vang chu a-imatih chanin in'ah achengji. 
John8:36 Hijeh-a chu Chapa chun nalhadoh vangule, chamlhat tahbeh ding nahiuve." 
John8:37 Abraham son nahiu chu kahenai; ahinla keima tha dingin neigouve, ajeh chu nalung sunguva kathun mun amupoi." 
John8:38 Keima ka Pa koma kamu chengse kasei ahi; nanghon na-pauva kona namu-u chengseu nabolu ahi, ati." 
John8:39 Amahon adonbutnun, ajah-a, Abraham kapau ahi, atiuve. Jesu'n amaho jah uva, Nangho Abraham chate hileu chun, Abraham thilbol nabol dingu ahi." 
John8:40 Ahinla tun keima, Pathen'a kona kajah thutah naheng uva seipa hi, tha ding nangai touve. Abraham hitihin achonpoi." 
John8:41 Nanghon napau thilbol nabolu ahi, ati. Amahon ajah-a, Keiho jaocha kahipouve; Pa khat sehbou kaneijui, hichu Pathen ahi, atiuve." 
John8:42 Jesu'n amaho jah-a, Pathen napau hile keima neingailut dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile keima Pathen'a kon hungdoh-a hunga kahi; keima kachama hung kahipoi; aman eisol ahibouve." 
John8:43 Nanghon ibola kathu nahet lou uham? Kathu hi nangai thei lou jeh-u ahi. 
John8:44 Nangho napau diabol'a kon nahibouvun, chule chuche napau lunggot chu suhbulhit dingbou nanomui. Ama chu atila patna tolthat ahin, chule thutah-a ding lou ahi; ajeh iham itile ama-a chu thutah umlou ahi. Aman thujou asei komle, ama chama aseiji ahi; ajeh chu ama mijou ahin, chule jou pa ahi." 
John8:45 Keima vangin thutah kasei jeh-a, neitahsan louvu ahi." 
John8:46 Keima hi michonse ahi tia photchetna pethei dinga nalah uva koi nahiuvem? Chule thutah kasei ahile ibola neitahsan lou uham? 
John8:47 Pathen'a kon chun Pathen thu angaije; hijeh-a chu nanghon nangai louvu ahi, ajehchu nangho Pathen'a kon nahi pouve, ati." 
John8:48 Chuin Juda hon adonbutnun, ajah-a, Nangma Samaria mi nahin, chule thilha vop nahi, katiu hi dih louham? atiuve." 
John8:49 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keima thilha vop kahipoi; hinlah ka Pa kajabol ahin, nanghon keima neijabol pouve." 
John8:50 Chule keiman keima loupina ding kaholpoi; ahola leh thutan khat aumnai. 
John8:51 Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Kathu nit chun itihchan hijongle thina amu lou ding ahi, ati." 
John8:52 Chuin Juda hon ajah-a, Thilha vop nahi tun kahe taove. Abraham athitan, chule themgaoho jongla athigam taovin; nangman, Kathu nit chun itihchan hijongle thina atepkhah lou ding ahi, nati." 
John8:53 Nangma athi tasa kapului'u Abraham sanga chungnungjo nahim? Chule themgaoho jongla athigam taovin; nangman koi kahi nakiti ham? atiuve. 
John8:54 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keima chang kichoi-an kahile, kaki choi-atna chu imacha hilou ahi; ahinla nanghon ka Pathen ahi natiu, hiche ka Pa chun keima eichoi-at ahibouve." 
John8:55 Ahin nanghon ama nahepouve; hinlah Keiman vang ama kahei; keiman ama chu kahepoi tileng nangho banga mijou kahi ding ahi. Ahinla keiman ama kahei, chule athu jong kangaije." 
John8:56 Napuluiju Abraham chu keima nikho mu ding athanomin; chuin amun, akipah lheh jengin ahi, ati." 
John8:57 Chuin Judah hon ajah-a, Nakum kum somnga bon lhing lou laija, Abraham namu khah ham? atiuve." 
John8:58 Jesu'n ajah uva, Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Keima Abraham masang peh-a, Keima ana umsa kahi, ati." 
John8:59 Chuin Judah hon asena dingin song akilo taove; ahivangin Jesu akiselin, houin'a kon chun apot doh-in, alah tah-u ajotnin, chule achemang tai." 
John9:1 Chuin ache achele apena patna mi mitcho khat amun; 
John9:2 Chuin aseijuihon adongun, Rabbi, hichepa apena mitcho-a apen hi, ama chonse-a ham, ole anu apa chonse-a ham? atiuve." 
John9:3 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Ama chonse-a ahipoi, anule apa chonse-a jong ahipoi, hichea hi Pathen natoh kiphonna dinga ahibouve." 
John9:4 Sun ahi petcha hi eisolpa na katoh ding hivehta. Koiman na atoh thei louna jan hung lhung ding hitahi. 
John9:5 Vannoi'a kaum laise-a hi vannoi vah kahi, ati." 
John9:6 Hiche chu asei jouvin, tolah achil asetlhan, achil chun bonlhoh asemin, bonlhoh chu mitchopa mitna chun aloijin," 
John9:7 Ajah-a, Chen, Siloam (sol tina ahin) twi kul-a gakiphet lhahtan, ati. Chuin ama achen, agaphet lhan ahile kho amun ahungtai." 
John9:8 Chuin aheng akoma chengsele masanga amitchot musaho chun, Touva khutdojia chu ama hi hilouham? akiti taove;" 
John9:9 Abangin, Ama hi ahi, atiuvin; adang kimkhatsen, Ahipoi, ama chutoh abange, atiuvin; chuin aman, Ama chu kahinai, ati." 
John9:10 Hijeh chun amahon ama chu adongun, Achutile i-atile namit hah hitam? atiuve." 
John9:11 Amapan adonbutnin, Jesu atipau khun bonlhoh asema kamitna aloija, Chenlang Siloam twikul'a gaphet lhan, eitia; chua kache-a kagaphet lhahle kho kamu ahitai, ati." 
John9:12 Chuin amahon ama chu adongun, Ama chu hoija umtam? atiule, aman, Kahepoi, ati." 
John9:13 Chuin amahon masanga mitchopa chu Pharisai ho henga apuitaovin ahi. 
John9:14 Jesu'n bonlhoh asema amit ahasah ni chu cholngah ni ahi. 
John9:15 Hijeh chun Pharisai hon jong, Kho iti namu kit-ham, tin adongun ahile, aman ajah uva, aman bonlhoh kamitna anun, hichu kaphet lhahle kho kamu jenge, ati." 
John9:16 Hichun Pharisai ho kimkhatnin, Hichepa chu Pathen'a kon ahipoi, ijeh-inem itile cholngah ni anitpoi, atiuvin; kimkhat vang chun, Michonsen hitobang thil kidang abol thei ngaijem? atiuvin; hiti chun amaho lah-a chun akibung khentauve." 
John9:17 Chuin amahon mitchopa chu adong kit leuvin, Aman namit hasahpa chu nangman ama chu koi ahi natim? atiule, aman, Themgao, ati." 
John9:18 Ama mitcho ahia, kho amu kit thudol chu Juda hon, khomupa nule pa agakou masangseuvin, atahsan pouvin ahi." 
John9:19 Chuin amahon amani chu adongun, Apena pat mitcho-a penga natiu nachapa lhon chu ama hi hinam? Ahile tu-a kho iti amuham? atiuve." 
John9:20 Anule apan adonbut lhonin, Ama hi kachapa lhon ahinai, apena mitcho-a penga ahi chu kahe lhone;" 
John9:21 Tu-a iti kho amuham vang kahe lhonpoi; chule kon amit ahasah ham jong kahe lhonpoi; ama dongun, upatah ahi, aman achungchang thu kisei nante, ati lhone." 
John9:22 Juda ho gina anule apan achuti sei lhon ahi; ajeh chu, Koi koi hijongle, Ama Christa ahi, tia seidoh chu kikhopna in'a kona nodoh ding, tia Juda ho amasanga dettah-a kihoulhua ahiuve." 
John9:23 Hiche jeh-a chu anule apan, Ama upatah ahi, ama dongun, ati lhon ahi." 
John9:24 Chuin amahon masanga mitchopa chu aniveina-in akouvun, Pathen bou vahchoijin, hichepa chu michonse ahi, ti keihon kaheuve, atiuvin ahi." 
John9:25 Chuin aman adonbutnin, Michonse ahi ahilou kahepoi; masang chun kamit achon tun kho kamui, hiche bou hi kahei, ati." 
John9:26 Amahon adong kitleuvin, Ama chun inalom? I aloa namit aboldam ham? atiuvin ahi." 
John9:27 Aman amaho chu adonbutnin, Ajouvin kaseitame, nangai hih-un; ibola najah nom kitleuvu ham? Nangho jong ama seijui nahi nom uham? ati." 
John9:28 Chuin amahon amapa chu ahouseuvin, Nangbou ama seijui nahi; keiho vang Mosi seijui kahibovui." 
John9:29 Pathen'in Mosi jah-a thu asei chu kaheuvin; hichepa vanghi hoilam kon ahi kahepouve, atiuvin ahi." 
John9:30 Amapa chun adonbutnin ajah uva, Hichu datmo aume, kamit hasahta-a ahivanga hoilam kon ahi nahet louvu chu." 
John9:31 Pathen'in michonseho thu angaijipoi; Pathen houva le alunggot lama chonpa thubou angaije, ti iheuve." 
John9:32 Koiham khatnin apena mitcho-a penga amit ahasah-e, ti vannoi leiset um tila pat akijakha hihhele." 
John9:33 Ama Pathen'a kon hilou hile imacha abol thei louhel ding ahi, ati." 
John9:34 Amahon adonbutnun ajah-a, Nang napum changa chonsetna penga keiho neihilum? atiuvin anodoh taove." 
John9:35 Amahon ama chu anodoh taove ti thu Jesu'n ajan, chuin ama chu amun ajah-a, Nangman Pathen Chapa chu natahsan em? ati." 
John9:36 Aman adonbutnin Pakai, ama chu koiham, katahsan ding chu, ati." 
John9:37 Jesu'n ajah-a, Nangman ama namutai, chule najah-a thu seija hi, ama chu ahi, ati." 
John9:38 Chutah-in, Pakai, katahsane, atin ama chu chibai aboh tan ahi." 
John9:39 Chuin Jesu'n khomu louhon kho amuva, chule khomuho amitchohna dinguva, thutan dinga vannoi'a hi hunga kahi, ati." 
John9:40 Avela um Pharisai phabep hon chechu ajaovin, ajah-a, Keiho jong mitcho kahiuvem? atiuve." 
John9:41 Jesu'n ajah uva, Mitcho hileu chun nachonset nao umlou ding ahin; tu vangin, kho kamui, nati jeh-u chun nachonset nao uma ahitai, ati." 
John10:1 Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Koihile kotna lut louva, mun choma kala kelngoi hong sunga lutna chu guchale michom ahi." 
John10:2 Kotna lut vang chu kelngoiho chinga ahi. 
John10:3 Ama chu kotngahpan kot ahonjin, chule kelngoite chun a-aw aheuvin; chule aman akelngoiho chu amin cheh-in akouvin, apuidohjin ahi." 
John10:4 Chule akelngoiho chu ahoidoh soh tengle, amasanguva achejin, kelngoiho chun anung ajuijiuve; ajeh chu amahon ama aw chu aheuve." 
John10:5 Midang nung vang jui louhel ding ahiuve, akoma kona jammangjo ding ahibouvui; ajeh chu amahon midangho aw ahepouve, ati." 
John10:6 Hiche thulem chu Jesu'n ajah uva aseijin; ahivangin athusei chu ipi aseina ahi ahepouve. 
John10:7 Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah uva asei kitleuvin, Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Keima hi kelngoi hong kot kahi." 
John10:8 Keima masanga hungho jouse chu guchale michom ahi sohkeijui; ahinla kelngoihon athu-u anangai pouve. 
John10:9 Keima hi kot chu kahi; mi keija lut chu huhhing-a umding ahi, chule lutle potle-a, chule hamhing amu ding ahi." 
John10:10 Gucha chu agu dingle athat ding chule asumang dingabou hung ahi. Keima vang amahon hinna anei theina dinguva, chule aneibe chehna dinguva hunga kahi." 
John10:11 Keima kelngoi chingpha kahi. Kelngoi chingpha chun kelngoiho dingin ahinna apejie. 
John10:12 Kelngoi chingtah tah hilou, kelngoiho ama-a hilou, thalah vang chun, ngei hung amu tengle kelngoiho chu adalhan ajamjitai; chutengle ngei chun amanin, kelngoiho chu asuchehji tai." 
John10:13 Ijeh-inem itile ama thalah ahibouvin, kelngoiho ding chu imacha agelpoi." 
John10:14 Keima kelngoi chingpha kahi, chule ka kelngoiho kahen, amahon jong keima eiheuve." 
John10:15 Pan keima eihet bangin keiman Pa chu kahei; chule kelngoiho dingin kahinna kapei. 
John10:16 Hiche honga hilou jong kakelngoi kanei nalaije; keiman hiche ho jong chu kagahoilut ding, chule amahon ka aw ahetdingu ahi; chule hong khat, aching khat hung hidoh ding ahi." 
John10:17 Keiman kahinna chu kakilah kit dinga kapeh ding ahin; hiche jeh-a chu Pan keima eingailut ahi. 
John10:18 Khat touvin eilahpeh ding thu ahipoi, keiman kachama kapeh ding ahibouve. Keiman pehna ding thaneina kaneijin, chule kilah kit theina thaneina jong kaneije. Hiche thupeh hi ka Pa-a kona kamu ahi, ati." 
John10:19 Thu chucheng jeh chun Judah ho abung bungin akikhen kit taove. 
John10:20 Alah uva tamtah-in, Hichepa hi thilha vop le mingol ahi; ibola athu nangaiju ham? atiuvin;" 
John10:21 Adangsen, Thu hitobang hi thilha vop thusei ahipoi. Thilhan mi mitcho ho amit ahasah thei ngaijem? atiuve." 
John10:22 Chuin Jerusalem'a houin thensona kut aumin, hichu phalbilai ahi." 
John10:23 Chuin Jesu houin'a Solomon hongcha-a chun avahlelen ahi. 
John10:24 Hichun Judah hon aum kimvelun, Itihchan nei lunggim sah dinguham? Christa nahile kichentah-in neisei peh-un, atiuve." 
John10:25 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keiman najah uva kaseitan, ahivangin nanghon natahsan pouve. Ka Pa mina thil kabol chengse hi kathudol hettohsah ahi." 
John10:26 Ahivangin, najah uva kasei bangin, nangho kakelngoi lah-a nahilou jeh-un, natahsan pouve." 
John10:27 Keima kelngoiho vangin ka-aw aheuvin, keiman jong amaho kahei, chule amahon kanung eijui jiuve;" 
John10:28 Chule keiman amaho chu tonsot hinna kapeji; chutia chu amaho itih chana mangthah lou ding ahiuvin, chujongle koiman kakhutna kona amaho chu eilahpeh lou ding ahi." 
John10:29 Ka Pa amaho keima eipe-a chu, ima jouse chunga chungnung pen ahin; chule ka Pa-a kona chu koiman alahpeh thei lou ding ahi." 
John10:30 Keimale Pa chu pum khat kahi lhone, ati." 
John10:31 Chuin Judah hon asena ding song akilo kit taove. 
John10:32 Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, ka Pa-a kona chu natohpha tamtah kavetsah nahitaove; chuche na kitongho hoipen jeh-a chu keima songa neiseu ham? ati." 
John10:33 Judah hon adonbutnun, Naphatoh jeh-a songa kaseu ahipoi, Pathen nataitom jeh ahibouve; chujongle mihem nahinasa-a Pathen nakihisah jeh ahi, atiuve." 
John10:34 Jesu'n amaho adonbutnin, Nangho hi pathenho nahiuve, kati ahi, tia nadan lekhabu uva kisun hih-am?" 
John10:35 Pathen thu lhunnaho bon pathenho atia ahile, Pathen lekhabu thu chu keh thei ahipoi," 
John10:36 Pan asuhthenga vannoi'a asol chun, Pathen Chapa kahi, kati jeh-a ibola Pathen nataitome, neitiu ham?" 
John10:37 Ka Pa na tonglou kahia ahile, neitahsan daovin." 
John10:38 Katoh ahivangle, Pa chu keija uma, chule keima Pa-a kaum hi nahet theijuva, natahsan theina dingun; keima neitahsan hih jongleu chun, na kitongho chengse behhi tahsan nun, ati." 
John10:39 Chuin amahon ama chu mat dingin ago kit taovin, ahinla ama akhutnuva konin apotdoh-in achemang tan ahi." 
John10:40 Chuin Jordan gala, John'in amasa baptize achansahna lama chun achen; chukoma chun aga umtai." 
John10:41 Chuin mi tamtah ahenga ahungun, amaho chun, John'in melchihna kidang ima avetsahpoi; ahin hichepa thudol John'in asei jouse tahbeh ahi sohkeije, atiuve." 
John10:42 Hiche koma chun mi tamtah-in atahsan taovin ahi. 
John11:1 Chuin Mariam le asopinu Martha chenna Bethany kho-a chun, mi khat amin Lazarus atiu chu ati anan ahi." 
John11:2 Chule ana-a chu Pakai thao nua, asama akeng theh ngima Mariam sopi pa Lazarus chu ahi." 
John11:3 Hijeh chun asopi numei tenin Jesu henga mi asol lhonin, ajah-a, Pakai, ven, nangman nangailut pa chu anai, agati sah lhone." 
John11:4 Jesu'n hichu ajah phatnin, Hiche nat hi thina ding ahipoi; hichea chu Pathen Chapa choi-atna aumna dinga Pathen loupina dingbou ahi, ati." 
John11:5 Jesu'n Martha le asopinu chule Lazarus chu angailut ahi. 
John11:6 Hiti chun anai ti ajah chun, aumna-a chun nini aumna laijin ahi." 
John11:7 Chuin hiche nung chun aseijuiho jah-a, Judah gama che kit taohite, ati." 
John11:8 Aseijuihon ajah-a, Rabbi, Judah ho chunla songa seding nagouvin; khu lama nache kit dingham? atiuve." 
John11:9 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Ni khat sunga hi nidan somleni um louham? Mi khat sunlaija vahlea chu, vannoi vah amu jeh-in aki pal ngaipoi." 
John11:10 Ahin jana vahlea vang chu, ama sunga vah aum lou jeh-in akipal jin ahi, ati." 
John11:11 Hicheng chu aseijin; chujouvin ajah uva, Igolpao Lazarus a-imutai; ahin a-imut sukhang dinga kache ding ahi, ati." 
John11:12 Chuin aseijuihon ajah-a, Pakai, a-imut tah-a ahile damta vehta, atiuve." 
John11:13 Jesu'n hichu athi aseina ahin, ahivangin amahon kicholdo dinga a-imut aseijin angaitouve." 
John11:14 Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah uva asei chenin, Lazarus athia ahitai;" 
John11:15 Nanghon natahsan theina dingun, chukoma kaum lou chu nangho dingin kakipah-e; hijongle tun hungun ahenga cheohite, ati." 
John11:16 Hichun Didymus atiu, Thomas chun aseijui chankhompi ho jah-a, Cheovin, eiho jong amatoh thitha dingin cheohite, ati." 
John11:17 Chuin Jesu ahung lhunin, lhana akoiju ni li ahitai ti ahetai." 
John11:18 Bethany chu Jerusalem kom ahin, ching somle ching nga vela gamlha ahi." 
John11:19 Chule asopipa lhon chungchanga lungmonsah dingin, Judah ho tamtah Martha le Mariam henga chun ahungun ahi." 
John11:20 Chuin Martha'n, Jesu ahunge ti ajah jah-in, apotdoh-in aga kimutopin; Mariam vang chu in'a chun atouna laije." 
John11:21 Chuin Martha'n Jesu jah-a, Pakai, nangma hikoma um hile chun, kasopipa thi lou dinga." 
John11:22 Tu jengin jong, nangman Pathen henga nathum chan chu, Pathen'in napeh ding kahei, ati." 
John11:23 Jesu'n amanu ajah-a, Nasopipa thoudoh kit ding ahi, ati." 
John11:24 Martha'n ajah-a, Ni nunung ni-a thokit ni-a athodoh ding chu kahenai, ati." 
John11:25 Jesu'n amanu jah-a, Keima hi thokitna le hinna kahi; keima eitahsana chu, thi jongle, hing ding;" 
John11:26 Chule koi hijongle ahinga keima eitahsana chu, itih hijongle thi lou ding ahi. Hiche hi natahsan em? ati." 
John11:27 Amanun ajah-a, Henge, Pakai, Nangma vannoi'a hung ding, Pathen Chapa, Christa chu nahi katahsane, ati." 
John11:28 Chuin amanun hiche chu asei jouvin, achen, asopinu Mariam guhthimin akouvin, Houhil chu hikoma aumin, nakouve, ati." 
John11:29 Chuin amanun hichu ajah jah-in, akipatdoh loijin, ahenga achetai." 
John11:30 Jesu chu khosung hung lut lou laija, Martha'n akimutopina mun'a chu umnalai ahi." 
John11:31 Hichun Judah ho a-in'a aumpia alhembi ho chun, Mariam akipatdoh loija apotdoh chu amuvin, lhana kap dinga che ahi atiuvin, ajuijun ahi." 
John11:32 Chuin Mariam Jesu umna alhun phatnin, ama chu amun, akengphang bulah abohkhup jengin, ajah-a, Pakai, nangma hikoma um hile chun kasopipa thi lou dinga, ati." 
John11:33 Jesu'n hitia chu amanu aka amu-a, Judah ho ahin lhonpiho jong chu aka-u amu phatnin, alung sunga ahimsan, atinaje akimah jengin," 
John11:34 Hoija nakoijum, atin ahile; amahon, Pakai, hungin, hung vetan, atiuvin ahi." 
John11:35 Jesu akaptai. 
John11:36 Hijeh chun Judah hon, Veuvin, iti angailut hitam! atiuve." 
John11:37 Ahivangin alah uva abang bang chun, Mi mitcho mit hasah thei hiche mipa hin, hichepa jonghi athi sahda thei hilouham? atiuve." 
John11:38 Chuin Jesu asung gila ahimsa kitleuvin, lhan lama chun achetai. Alhan chu kohom khat ahin, akot chu song khatna kising ahi." 
John11:39 Jesu'n, Song chu tangdoh-un, ati. Athipa sopinu Martha chun, ajah-a, Pakai, tun a-uitai; ijeh-inem itile athina ni li ahitai, ati." 
John11:40 Jesu'n ajah-a, Natahsan le Pathen loupina namu ding ahi, tia kasei louham? ati." 
John11:41 Hichun amahon mithi lupna-a konchun songchu aladoh un ahi. Chuin Jesu avandah-in, Pa, nangman kataona nangai jeh-in, kathangvah-e;" 
John11:42 Chule nangman kataona nangai jinge ti keiman kahei; ahivangin hiche mipi kakimvela dingho hin nangma sol kahi hi atahsan theina dinguva, kati ahibouve, ati." 
John11:43 Chuin hichu asei jouvin, hasaptah-in asamin, Lazarus, hung doh-in, ati." 
John11:44 Hichun athipa chu akhut le akeng lhanpona kitom pumin; amai ultheh pona kitom pumin ahungdoh tan ahi. Jesu'n ajah uva, Lhamun lang che sah-un, ati." 
John11:45 Chuin Mariam henga hung Judah ho tamtah-in Jesu thibol hochu amuvin, atahsan taove." 
John11:46 Ahivangin abang kimkhat Pharisai ho henga acheuvin, Jesu thilbol chengse chu aga sei taove." 
John11:47 Hijeh chun thempu pipuiho le Pharisai ho chu akikhomun, Eihon ipi iboluham? Hichepa khunla melchihna tamtah abol jing jengin ahi." 
John11:48 Hiti mohlha leuhen, mi jousen ama tahsanun tin, chule Rome mite hunguva, imunu le ivaiju eilah mangpeh dingu ahi, atiuve." 
John11:49 Chuin alah uva khat, Caiaphas, chuche kum-a chu thempu chungnunga pang ahin, amachun ajah uva, Nanghon imacha nahehih heluve," 
John11:50 Chujongle vaipi aboncha amanthah louna dinga, miho dinga mi khat athi nangho dinga phajo ahi, ti jong nagelpouve, ati." 
John11:51 Hiche chu aman ama chama asei ahipoi; chuche kum-a chu thempu chungnunga panga ahito lhona, vaipi dinga Jesu athi ding chu, gaova asei masah ahibouve." 
John11:52 Chule avaipiu chang ding hilouva, vannoi'a chehsa Pathen chate akhop khoma, pum khat ahidohna ding jong ahi." 
John11:53 Chuin chuche ni-a pat chun atha theina dingu lung angaitouvin akihousom taove. 
John11:54 Hijeh chun Jesu Judah ho lah-a lhang phongin avahle tapoi; ahin chua kon chun gamthip dep lama Ephraim atiu kho-a chun achen, aseijuite toh chua chun aum jing taove." 
John11:55 Chuin Judah ho kalchuh kut anaitan; agam agama konin mi tamtah kut masanga ana kisutheng dingin Jerusalem'a acheuvin ahi. 
John11:56 Chuin amaho chun Jesu aholun, houin'a chun adingun, khatle khat akihouvun, Ipi nangai touvem? Ama chu kut na hi hung lou dingham? akitiuve." 
John11:57 Thempu pipuiho le Pharisai hochun, Koi hijongle aumna he-a chun, amat theina dinguva avetsah dinguva, thupeh aneisao ahitai." 
John12:1 Chuin kalchuh kut masang ni gup in, anathisa athodoh kit Lazarus umna Bethany'a chun Jesu ahungin ahi." 
John12:2 Chukoma chun ama dingin jan an asemun; chule Martha'n ajenlen, Lazarus vang chu ankonga amatoh touho lah-a chu panga ahi." 
John12:3 Chuin Mariam'in halpibei spikenard kiti thao namtui, man tamtah ser keh ahin choijin, Jesu keng anun, asamin atheh ngimin ahile, agimnam chun insung chu alosoh jengin ahi." 
John12:4 Chuin aseijuiho lah-a khat, Simon chapa Juda Iscariot, amatsah-a pang dingpa chun," 
John12:5 Ibola hiche thao hi dangka jakhat le somnga mana kijoh-a, mivaicha gentheite kipe louham? ati." 
John12:6 Aman hiche ati chu, vaicha genthei akhohsah-a asei ahipoi; ama chu gucha ahin, chule sumdip avop ahin, asunga kikoi chu akilahji jeh-a asei ahi." 
John12:7 Chuin Jesu'n, amanu limsah hih-un; amanun kakivui ni-a dinga hiche hi akoi ahi." 
John12:8 Ijeh-inem itile vaichaho chu nang hotoh naum khom jing naove; ahin keima vang nang hotoh umjing ding kahipoi, ati." 
John12:9 Chuin Jesu chukoma chun aume, ti aheuvin, Judah ho mi tamtah ama chungchang jeng hilouvin, athi lah-a kona athodoh Lazarus jong chu vet nom-in ahenga ahungtaove." 
John12:10 Ahin thempu pipuihon Lazarus sana chu tha dingin akihousom taove. 
John12:11 Ajehchu ama jala Judah ho tamtah chemanguva, Jesu atahsanu ahi." 
John12:12 Ajingin kutna dinga hung mipi atama tamin, Jesu Jerusalem'a dingin ahunge ti ajah phatnun," 
John12:13 Lusu na akidopmun, aga lamtouvin, Hosanna: Pakai mina hunga Israelte Lengpa chu anun nome; tin asam asamun ahi." 
John12:14 Chuin Jesu'n sangan chalgol khat amun, achunga atouvin;" 
John12:15 Vo, Sion chanu, kicha hih-in; ven, na Lengpa sangan nou chunga achongin, ahunge, tia kisun bang chu ahi." 
John12:16 Hicheng thu chu amasan aseijuiten ahedoh pouve; ahin Jesu choi-atna aumdoh phat chun, hiche thu chu ama thudola kisunsa ahin, amahon hitia chu ama chunga abolu ahi, ti chu ageldoh taove." 
John12:17 Aman Lazarus lhana kon akouva, athi lah-a kona athodoh pettah-a aumpi mipi chengse chu, athu hettohsah-a pang ahiuve." 
John12:18 Hiche melchihna kidang abol ajah jehtah uva jong chu mipi chun alamtou ahi. 
John12:19 Hijeh chun Pharisai ho amahole amaho akihouvun, Ima nalo thei louvu namuve; veuvin, vannoi'in anung ajuitai, atiuve." 
John12:20 Hiche kut na Pathen hou dinga hungho lah-a chun Greek mi phabep ajaovin; 
John12:21 Amaho chu Galilee gama Bethsaida kho-a mi Philip henga ahungun, ajah-a, Pu, Jesu chu kamu nomui, ahung tiuve." 
John12:22 Philip ahungin Andrew jah-a ahung seijin, chuin Andrew Philip toh ahungin, Jesu jah-a asei lhone." 
John12:23 Chuin Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, Mihem Chapa choi-at na aum ding phat ahung lhunge." 
John12:24 Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Chang chang khat tolla alhah-a athi loule achangin aum jingji bouve; athi vangle tamtah aga jin ahi." 
John12:25 Ahinna ngailu-a chun achan ding; chule hiche vannoi leiset chunga ahinna ho-a chun tonsot hinna-a dinga akikoi ahi. 
John12:26 Koi hijongle kalhacha panga chun kanung eijuihen; keima umna-a chu, kalhacha jong umding ahi; mi koi hile kalhacha panga chu, Pa chun ajabol ding ahi." 
John12:27 Tun kalung adongtai; ipi kasei dingham? Pa, hiche nidana kon hin neihuh doh-in. Ahivangin hiche dinga hi tu nidan geija hi hung kahi." 
John12:28 Pa, namin choi-anin, ati. Chuin van'a konin aw ahung gingin, Kachoi-antai, chule choi-an kit nalai ding kahi, ati." 
John12:29 Hichun akimvela dinga mipi chun hichu ajauvin, Van aginge, atiuvin; adangsen, Vantil'in ajah-a thu asei ahi, atiuve." 
John12:30 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Hiche aw hi keima jeh-a hung ahipoi; nangho dingjoh ahibouve." 
John12:31 Tu-a hi hiche vannoi hi athu kitan ahi; vannoi'a vaihompa chu kipaidoh ding ahitai. 
John12:32 Chule keima leija kona dop sanga kauma ahile, mi jouse kahenga kaloi khom ding ahi, ati." 
John12:33 Hichu iti thia athi ding seina-a hitia chu asei ahi. 
John12:34 Hichun mipi chun adonbutnun, Keihonla Christa chu a-imatih chana umjing ahi, ti danthua kajauvin; Mihem Chapa dop sanga umding iti natiham? Hiche Mihem Chapa chu koiham? atiuvin ahi." 
John12:35 Chuin Jesu'n ajah uva, Vah hi nalah uva chomcha khat umnalai ding ahi; muthimin nahinphah ma-un vah aumpet hin vahleu vin; ijeh inem itile muthima vahlea chun achena ding ahepoi." 
John12:36 Vah chate nahi theina dingun, Vah chu nanei petchao hin, vah chu tahsanun, ati. Thu hicheng hi Jesu'n aseijin, apotdoh-in amaho-a kon chun akiseltai." 
John12:37 Ahin alah uva melchihna kidang tamtah abol vangin, amahon atahsan pouve." 
John12:38 Hiche hi Isaiah themgaovin, Pakai, kathuseiju kon atahsanem? Chule Pakai ban thahat koi henga kilangam? tia asei chu guilhun theina ding ahi." 
John12:39 Hiche thua hin Isaiah'in asei kitleuvin," 
John12:40 Aman amitnu asuchon, alungu asutah tai; Achuti loule amitnun muvintin, chule alungun heuvintin, chule hung kihei kitnun tin, Keiman boldam get inge, ati; hiche jeh-a hi amahon atahsan thei louvu ahi." 
John12:41 Hiche hi Isaiah'in ama loupina chu ana mu-a, ama thudol aseina-a kona, asei ahi." 
John12:42 Achuti vangin vaipoho jeng jong tamtah-in atahsan taove; ahinla Pharisai ho jeh chun, kikhopna-a konin eikikaidoh khante tin aphongdoh aumpouve;" 
John12:43 Ajeh chu amahon Pathen choiat sanga mihem choiat adeijoh-u ahi. 
John12:44 Jesu'n aw sangtah-in asamin, Koi hijongle keima eitahsan chun, keima hilouva, eisolpajoh atahsan ahibouve." 
John12:45 Chule keima eimu-a chun eisolpa amu ahi. 
John12:46 Koi hijongle keima eitahsana chu muthima aum louna dinga, keima vah kahia vannoi'a kahung ahi." 
John12:47 Mi khattouvin kathu jahen, tahsan hih jongle athu katanpoi; ijeh-inem itile keima vannoi thutana hung kahipoi, vannoi huhhing ding joh-a hung kahibouve." 
John12:48 Koi hijongle keima eidei louva, kathu jong jop lou chu, athutanna khat aumnai; kathusei hochun ni nunung nile athu atan ding ahi;" 
John12:49 ijeh-inem itile keiman kathuneina-a kasei ahipoi; ahin eisola Pa chun kasei dingle kahil dinga thupeh eipeh ahibouve. 
John12:50 Ama thupeh chu tonsot hinna ahi, ti kahei; hiche jeh-a chu kathusei hi Pan eihil bang banga kasei ahi, ati." 
John13:1 Kalchuh kut masangin, Jesu'n hiche vannoi'a kona a-Pa henga ache ding phat ahung lhungtai, ti ahen, Vannoi'a um ama-a ho chu angailun akhon ni geijin angailu lhumkeije." 
John13:2 Chuin jan anneh kichaijin, diabol chun Simon chapa Judas Iscariot lung sunga ama matsahna ding lungthim akhumpeh tai." 
John13:3 Jesu'n, Pan thil jouse ama khutna apeh, chule ama Pathen'a kona hungdoh ahia, Pathen henga chea ahi chu ahen;" 
John13:4 Ajan anneh ankonga konin akipatdoh-in, chuin aposil akoijin, tinotpon alan, akong akigah-in ahi." 
John13:5 Chuin aman kisilna kong-ah twi alheijin, aseijuiho keng asilin, akong gahna tinotpon chun atheh pantan ahi." 
John13:6 Chuin ama Simon Peter koma ahungin ahile aman ajah-a, Pakai, nangman kakeng neisilpeh dingham? atin ahile," 
John13:7 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Kabol hi nangman tun nahepoi; ajole henan nate, ati." 
John13:8 Chuin Peter'in ajah-a, Nangman itih hijongle kakeng nasil louhel ding ahi, ati. Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Keiman nangma kasil loule keija nangman chan nanei lou ahi, ati." 
John13:9 Simon Peter'in ajah-a, Pakai, kakeng keojeng hilouvin kakhut le kalu jonge, ati." 
John13:10 Jesu'n ajah-a, Akisil jousa chu akeng tailou adang sil lou akhohpoi, apumpin angimsoh nai; chule nangho nangim naove, ahivangin nabonchao nahipouve, ati." 
John13:11 Ijeh ham itile ama matsah-a pang dingpa chu aman ahetsa ahin; hiche jeh-a chu, aman, Nabonchaovin nangimpouve, ati ahi." 
John13:12 Aman akengu asil jouvin, apon akilah-in atou kitnin, amaho jah-a chun, Nachung uva ipi bola kahi chu nahetnah-um?" 
John13:13 Nanghon keima Houhil le Pakai neitiuve; hiche natiu chu aphai, ijeh-inem itile keima hichu kahi." 
John13:14 Hijeh chun keima Pakai le Houhil bonin nangho keng kasil leh, nanghon jong khatnin khat keng naki silpeh to dingu thu ahi." 
John13:15 Ajeh chu keiman nangho kabol banga chu nanghon jong nabolna dinguva, vetsahna-a kabol ahi." 
John13:16 Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Pakai sangin soh achungnung jopoi, asola sangin solchah jong achungnung jopoi." 
John13:17 Hitiho hi nahetdoh uva nabol ule nangho anun noma nahiuve. 
John13:18 Nangho nabon chaova thudola kasei ahipoi; keiman kalhendohho chengse chu kahenai; Ahivangin changlhah eineh khompi pan kachunga akengto alamtai, ti Pathen lekhabua thu guilhun theina dinga ahi." 
John13:19 Tu-a kala ahung guilhun tengle, keima hi ama chu kahi nahetna dinguva, ahung guilhun masanga kaseipeh nahiuve." 
John13:20 Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Koi hijongle kamisol sang chan chun keima eisan ahi; chule keima eisang chan chun eisolpa asan ahi, ati." 
John13:21 Chuin Jesu'n hiche chu aseijin, alungdong lheh jengin, ajah uva, Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, nalah uva khat eipedoh-a pang ding ahi, tin aphongdoh tan ahi." 
John13:22 Seijui ho chu khatle khat akive touvin, koipen asei ahi agelmove." 
John13:23 Hichea chu aseijuiho lah-a khat, Jesu'n angailut chu a-anga kingai ahin;" 
John13:24 Simon Peter'in Koi pen aseina ham dongin tin amitnin agah houpin ahi. 
John13:25 Hichun ama akingai bang chun akingaijin, Pakai, hiche chu koiham? tin adongin ahi." 
John13:26 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Hiche changlhah hal hi kade-a kapeh dingpentah chu ama chu ahi, ati. Chuin aman changlhah hal chu adekot jouvin alan, Simon chapa Judas Iscariot chu apetai." 
John13:27 Chuche changlhah hal akisan joutah chun Satan asungah alut tan; chuphat chun Jesu'n ajah-a, Nabol ding chu bol loijin, ati." 
John13:28 Ahivangin aman ipi dola achuti sei ahi ankonga touho khatchan jong ahedoh pouve. 
John13:29 Ijeh-inem itile kimkhatnin, Judas khutna sumbom aum jeh-a chu, kutna dinga imanchah dingu gacho-in atiham; ahiloule, vaichaho ikhattou pe dinga Jesu'n asolin angaitouvin ahi." 
John13:30 Chuin aman changlhah hal chu akisan jouvin hiche pettah chun apotdoh paijeng tai. Chule hichu jan ahi. 
John13:31 Chutichun amapa apotdoh jouvin Jesu'n, Tun Mihem Chapa choi-atnin aumtai, ama-ah Pathen jong choi-atnin aumtai." 
John13:32 Ama-a Pathen choi-atna aumle, Pathen'in jong amatah-a ama chu achoi-at ding ahi, chule achoi-at pai jeng ding ahi." 
John13:33 Chapang neochaho, nang hotoh chomcha khat kaum nahlai ding ahi. Nanghon neihol dingu; ahivanga Judah ho jah-a kasei banga, tu-a nangho jah-a jong kasei ahi, Keima chena-a chu nangho nahung thei lou dingu ahi." 
John13:34 Keiman nangho thupeh thah kapeh nahiuve, Nangho khatle khat kingailuto cheh-un; keiman nangho kangailut bangu hin nangho jong khat le khat kingailuvin." 
John13:35 Nangho nangho lah-a naki ngailut tocheh uva nahiule, nangho chu keima seijui nahiu hichea chu mi jousen ahet ding ahi, ati." 
John13:36 Simon Peter'in adongin, Pakai, nangma hoilama nache dingham? ati. Jesu'n adonbutnin, Tun nangma kachena-a kanung nunga hungthei pon nate, ajo vangle kanung nunga nahung ding ahi, ati." 
John13:37 Peter'in ajah-a, Pakai, ibola tu-a nanung nunga kahung thei lou dingham? Nangma jala kahinna jong kapeh ding ahi, ati." 
John13:38 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keima jala nahinna napeh dingham? Keiman nangma tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahi, thumvei nei seilep masangse-a ahchal khong lou ding ahi, ati." 
John14:1 Nangho lungkham hih-un; Pathen tahsanun, keima jong neitahsanun." 
John14:2 Ka Pa in'ah chenna in nom tamtah aume; umlou hile najah uva kaseitah hih dingham; ajeh chu keima nangho ding mun sema che ding kahi. 
John14:3 Chule nangho ding mun sema kache-a ahile, keima umna-a chu nangho jong naum theina dinguvin, keima hung kitning ting, kahenga dinga kahung puiding nahiuve." 
John14:4 Kachena ding nanghon naheuvin, chule alampi nahenaove, ati." 
John14:5 Thomas'in ajah-a, Pakai, nachena dingbon kihe lou uva, alampi iti kahet dingu ham? ati." 
John14:6 Jesu'n ajah-a, Keima hi lampi, thutah, chule hinna chu kahi; keija che lou chu koima Pa kom alhungpoi." 
John14:7 Nanghon keima neiheleu chun, ka Pa jong chu nahet dingu ahitai; tu-a kal vang he jong naheuvin, mu jong namutaove, ati." 
John14:8 Philip'in ajah-a, Pakai, Pa chu neimusah-un, hichu keiho dinga phaset ahi, ati." 
John14:9 Jesu'n ajah-a, Vo Philip, keima hitihchan nang hotoh kauma jong neihet loulaiham? Keima eimu-a chun ka Pa amu ahitai; achutile Pa chu neimusah-un, iti natiham?" 
John14:10 Keima Pa-a kaum chule Pa jong keija aum hi natahsan louham? Keiman nangho jah-a thu kasei chengse hi keima chama kasei ahipoi; Pa chu keija uma na atoh ahibouve. 
John14:11 Keima Pa-a kaumin chule Pa jong keija aume kati hi tahsanun; ahilou jongle na kitong chengse jehtah hin tahsanun. 
John14:12 Keiman tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, keima eitahsana chun, kathilbol chengse hi aman jong abolding ahi; chule asanga lenjojo abolding ahi, ajehchu keima ka Pa henga kache ding ahitai." 
John14:13 Chule Pa chu Chapa-a choi-atna aumna dinga, ipi hijongle keima mina nathum chanu chu kabolpeh ding nahiuve." 
John14:14 Keima mina ipi hijongle nathum chanu chu, kabolpeh ding nahiuve." 
John14:15 Keima neingailut ule, kathupeh ho nitnun." 
John14:16 Keima Pa henga taoving ting, chule Aman nangho a-imatih chana naumpi jing dingu, Lhamonsah achom dang khat napeh dingu;" 
John14:17 Thutah Lhagao ngeichu napeh dingu ahi; amachu vannoi'in asang thei pouve, ajehchu mu jong amupouvin, he jong ahepouve; nanghon vang naheuve; ajeh chu ama nangho sunga chenga ahi, um jong hung umding ahi." 
John14:18 Keiman nangho kaihoi beijin dalha pouvinge; naheng uva kahung kit ding ahi. 
John14:19 Chomkhat joule vannoi min eimu lou ding ahitai, nanghon vang neimu dingu ahinai; ajehchu keima kahin jeh-a, nangho jong nahin dingu ahi." 
John14:20 Hiche ni chule keima Pa-a kaum, nangho keija na-umu, chule keima nangho-a kaum hi nahet dingu ahi." 
John14:21 Kathupeh ho neija chule nitna chu, eingailua ahi; chule keima eingailua chu ka Pan angailut ding, chule keiman ama chu kangailut na, ahenga kakiphon ding ahi, ati." 
John14:22 Judas (Iscariot hilou) in ajah-a, Pakai, nangma keiho henga nakiphona vannoi mi henga nakiphon lou ding chu itidan ham? ati." 
John14:23 Jesu'n adonbutnin ajah-a, Mi eingailua chun kathu anit ding, chule ka Pan ama chu angailut ding, chule ahenga chu kahunguva, ama chu kachenpi dingu ahi." 
John14:24 Keima eingailu lou chun kathu jong anitpoi; chule nathu jah-u keija ahipoi, eisola Pa-a chu ahibouve." 
John14:25 Keiman nangho kaumpi petna thu hicheng hi kaseipeh nahiuve. 
John14:26 Ahinla Pan kamina ahinsol ding Lhamonsah, Lhagao Theng chun, imajouse nahil sohkei dingu, chule najah uva kathusei chengse hi nageldohsah dingu ahi." 
John14:27 Lungmon kadalhahpeh nahiuve; kalungmon kapeh nahiuve; kapeh hi vannoi mi peh bang ahipoi; nalungu donsah hih-un, kicha jong kicha hih-un." 
John14:28 Keima kachemanga, chule naheng uva kahung kit ding ahi kati chu najataove. Neingailut ule Pa henga kache ding ahi tia najah uva kasei jeh-a hi nakipa nathanop dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pa chu kei sanga chungnungjo ahi." 
John14:29 Ahung guilhun tengle natahsan theina dinguva, tu-a aguilhun masanga najah uva kasei masah dem ahi." 
John14:30 Najah uva thu tamsei taponge; ijeh-inem itile vannoi lengpa hung ding ahitai; chule aman keijah imacha aneipoi; 
John14:31 Ahinla keiman Pa chu kangailut na, chule Pa chun eithupeh bang banga na katoh ahi hi, vannoi miten ahetna ding ahi. Kipatdoh-un, hikoma konin chetao hite." 
John15:1 Keima lengpigui tahtah kahi; chule ka Pa aleilhou ahi. 
John15:2 Keija um abah aga lou lou chu aman apaidohjin; aga chengse chu aha ga chehna dingin amal ngimjin ahi. 
John15:3 Nangho jah-a kathusei vanga chu nangho angimsa nahitaove. 
John15:4 Keijah um jingun, kei jong nangho-a uminge. Abah lengpiguija aum loule achanga aga thei lou banga chu, nangho jong keija naum louvule naga thei lou dingu ahi." 
John15:5 Keima lengpigui kahi, nangho abah nahiuve. Ama keija uma, Keima ama-a kaum mi chu hagan agaji; ajeh chu kei louvin nanghon ima nabol theipouve." 
John15:6 Mi keija umlou chu, abah bangin paidoh-in aumjin, chule agopjin; chule min hicheho chu achom khomun mei sungah asep lutjiuvin ahile akavamjitai." 
John15:7 Nangho keija naum uva, chule ka thu nangho-a aum jinga ahileh, nagotchan thumun, kibolpeh ding nahiuve." 
John15:8 Hichea hin nangho haga nagau hin ka Pa choi-at nin aumji; chule hitia chu nangho kaseijui nahi dingu ahi. 
John15:9 Pan keima eingailut bang banga, keiman jong nangho kangailut nahiuve; kangailutna-a hin um jingun." 
John15:10 Keiman ka Pa thupeh ho kanit sohkeija, angailutna kaum bang hin; nanghon kathupeh ho nitleu chun, kangailutna-a naum jing dingu ahi." 
John15:11 Kakipana nangho-a aum jingna dingle, nakipanao akimna dinga, hicheng thuhi najah uva kasei ahi." 
John15:12 Kathupeh hiche hi ahi, keiman kangailut bangu hin, nangho khatle khat kingailuto cheh-un." 
John15:13 Min ajol agol dinga ahinna apeh sanga ngailut chungnungjo koiman aneipoi. 
John15:14 Kathupeh nabol uva ahile, nangho hi kajol kagol nahiuve." 
John15:15 Tukal keiman nangho soh kati lou ding nahitaove; ijeh-inem itile soh chun apakai thilbol ahepoi. Golte kati nahitaove; ijeh-inem itile ka Pa-a kona kajahho jouse aboncha nangho kahetsah soh nahitaove. 
John15:16 Nanghon keima neilhenu ahipoi, keima joh-in nangho kalhen doh-a, nacheuva haga nagauva chule nagau aumna dinga kapansah nahiuve; chutia chu ipi hijongle Pa henga kamina nathum chanu chu, aman napeh dingu ahi." 
John15:17 Nangho khatle khat naki ngailut to chehna dinguva, thupeh hicheng hi kapeh nahiuve." 
John15:18 Vannoi'in nahot ule, nangho nahot masang uva keima eihot chu naheuve." 
John15:19 Nangho vannoi'a hileu chun vannoi'in ama-a chu angailut ding ahi; hinlah tun nangho vannoi'a nahi louvu, vannoi'a kona keiman kalhendoh nahiuvin, hiche jeh-a chu vannoi'in nahotnu ahi." 
John15:20 Najah uva, Soh apakai sangin achungnung jopoi, tia kathusei chu geldoh-un. Amahon keima eibolset nule, nangho jong nabolset dingu ahi; kathu nitleu, nangho thu jong anit dingu ahi." 
John15:21 Ahin amahon eisolpa ahetlou jeh uva chu, thil hicheng hi keima min jala nachung uva ahinbol dingu ahi," 
John15:22 Keima kahunga ajah uva thu kahung sei lou hile, chonset anei lou dingu ahin; tuvangin achonset apaomea akilepna dingu aumtapoi." 
John15:23 Keima eihoa chun ka Pa jong ahot ahi. 
John15:24 Keiman alah uva mi koima dangin abol khah lou thil kabol lou hile, chonset anei lou dingu ahin; tuvangin amahon keima le ka Pa kakop lhonin eimutaovin, ho jong eiho taove." 
John15:25 Ahoi hijongle adanthubu uva, Ajeh beijin eihove, tia kisun chu guilhuna dinga abolu ahi." 
John15:26 Ahin keiman Pa koma kona kahinsol ding Lhamonsah, Pa-a kona hungpotdoh Lhagao Theng chu ahungteng, Ama chun keima thudol ahettohsah ding;" 
John15:27 Chule nangho jong atila pat kaumpi jing nahi jeh uva chu, kathu hettohsah-a napan dingu ahi." 
John16:1 Nakipal lhuh louna dinguva, thu hicheng hi kaseipeh nahiuve." 
John16:2 Amahon kikhopna-a kona nahin kaidoh dingu; koihile nathat chanu chu Pathen dinga napha tonga kingaito ding phat chu hung lhung ding ahi. 
John16:3 Amahon Pa le keima eihet loujeh uva, thil hicheng chu nangho chunga aboldingu ahi." 
John16:4 Ahivangin hitiho phat chu ahung lhun tengle, keimatah-in kaseipehsa chengseu hi nageldohna dinguva, thu hicheng hi kaseipeh nahiuve. Keiman nangho kaumpi jeh uva, atila chu kanasei lou ahi." 
John16:5 Tuvanga eihinsolpa henga kache ding ahitai; ahivangin, Hoija nache dingham? tin koiman neidong pouve." 
John16:6 Ahin thu hicheng chu kasei jeh-in, nalungu lunghem adimjotai." 
John16:7 Hijongle keiman nangho thutahbeh kaseipeh nahiuve; kache dinghi nangho dinga phajo ahi; ijeh-inem itile keima kache loule Lhamonsah chu naheng uva hung lou ding ahi; kache vangle, keiman ama chu naheng uva kahinsol ding ahi." 
John16:8 Chule Ama chu ahung teng, vannoi mitehi chonset thudol, chonphat thudol, chule thutan thudola themmo achan aphotchet ding ahi:" 
John16:9 Chonset thudola athemo naochu, ajehchu amahon keima eitahsan pouve;" 
John16:10 Chonphat thudola athemo naochu, ajehchu keima ka Pa henga che ding kahin, chule nanghon keima neimulou dingu ahitai;" 
John16:11 Chule thutan thudola athemo naochu, ajehchu hiche vannoi pipupa thu kitana ahitai." 
John16:12 Nangho jah-a sei ding thu tamtah kaneije, hijongle tun nadol joupouve." 
John16:13 Thutah Lhagao chu ahung teng vangle, ama chun thutah lam jouse-a nangho napuihoi dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman achama asei lou ding, ajah chan asei dingbou ahi; chule aman khonung thil hunglhung dingho namusah dingu ahi." 
John16:14 Ama chun keima eichoi-at ding ahi; ijeh inem itile aman keima-a um chengse chu alah-a, chule nangho nahetsah dingu ahi." 
John16:15 Pa nei chengse chu aboncha keija ahin; hiche jeh-a chu, Aman keima-a um chengse chu alah-a, nangho nahetsah dingu ahi, tia kasei ahi." 
John16:16 Chomkhat joule nanghon keima neimulou dingu ahitai; chule chomcha khat joule neimukit dingu ahi, ajeh chu Pa koma cheding kahi, ati." 
John16:17 Hichea chun aseijuiho khatle khat akihouvun, Chomkhat joule neimu lou dingu; chule chomcha khat joule neimu kit dingu; chule, ijeh-inem itile keima Pa henga che ding kahi ati hi ipi eiseipeh-u hintem? akitiuve." 
John16:18 Hijeh chun amahon, Chomcha khat jou, ati hiche hi ipi ati naham? ipi asei ahi ihepouve, atiuve." 
John16:19 Adoh nomu chu Jesu'n ahen, ajah uva, Chomcha khat joule neimu lou dingu, chomcha khat joule neimu kit dingu, kati chu itidol ahi khatle khat kidongtoa nahiuvem?" 
John16:20 Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Nangho nakauva chule namao dingu, vannoi mite vang kipah ding ahiuve; nangho nalunghem dingu, ahivanga nalunghemnau chu kipana hung sohdoh ding ahi." 
John16:21 Numei naoso natnin aphah tengle alunghem lhehji-e, ajeh chu aphat hunglhunga ahitai: ahin acha chu asolhah teng vangle, vannoi'a mihem khat apen jeh chun akipahjin, alungdon hesoh chu aheji tapoi." 
John16:22 Hiche banga chu nangho jong tu-a nalunghemu ahi; ahivangin keiman nangho kamukit ding nahiuve, chutengle nalungu kipah ding, chule hiche nakipanao chu koiman nalahpeh lou dingu ahi." 
John16:23 Hiche nikho chule keima imacha neidoh lou dingu ahi. Keiman nangho tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Pa henga ipihile keima mina nathum channu chu, aman napeh dingu ahi." 
John16:24 Tu geihin nanghon kaminin ima nathum hihlai juve; nakipanao suhchamkima aumna dingin, thumun chutile namu dingu ahi." 
John16:25 Thu hicheng hi keiman nangho jah-a alema kasei ahi; alema sei louva, phongtah-a nangho Pa thu kahetsahna dingu phat hung lhung ding ahi." 
John16:26 Hiche ni chule kamina nathum dingu ahi; chule nangho dingin keima Pa henga taovinge, kati ahipoi;" 
John16:27 Ijeh-inem itile Pa amatah-in nangho nangailu uve, ajehchu nanghon keima neingailuvin, chule keima Pathen na kona hung kahi natahsan taovin ahi." 
John16:28 Keima Pa koma kona vannoi'a hunga kahin; avela, vannoi kadalhah-a Pa henga che kit ding kahi, ati." 
John16:29 Chutah-in aseijuiten, Ven, nangman tun thu alema seita louvin, phongtah-in naseije." 
John16:30 Nangman ijakai nahesoh-in, chule mi koimachan nangma nadoh ding chu nangaipoi, ti tun kahe taove. Hichea kon hin nangma Pathen koma kona hung nahi ti katahsanui, atiuve." 
John16:31 Jesu'n amaho chu adonbutnin, Tuabou natahsan um?" 
John16:32 Veuvin, nangho nangma nangma-a cheh-a navacheh sohkeijuva, keima kachanga neidalhah dingu phat ahung lhunge, henge, ahung lhungtai; ahivangin keima kachang kahipoi, ijeh-inem itile Pan keima eiumpinai." 
John16:33 Nanghon keija lungmonna namu theina dinguva, thu hicheng hi najah uva kasei ahi. Vannoi'a hesoh gentheina nanei dingu ahi; ahivangin kipah-un; keiman vannoi kajoutai, ati." 
John17:1 Jesu'n thu hiche chu aseijin, van lam ave, Pa, phat chu ahung lhungtai; Na Chapan jong nangma nachoi-at theina dingin, na chapa choi-anin;" 
John17:2 Nangman ama napeh ho jouse chu, aboncha aman tonsot hinna apeh dinga, nangman ama chu mi jouse chunga thuneina napeh ahi." 
John17:3 Pathen tahbeh khatseh nangma, chule nangman nasol Jesu Khrista ahetdoh dingu hi, tonsot hinna ahi." 
John17:4 Nangman bol dinga thil neipeh chu kajouvin, leiset chungah nangma kachoi-an tai." 
John17:5 Chule tun, Pa, vannoi um masanga nangma toh kaneikhom loupina-a chun, nangma tahtoh kigomin neichoi-anin." 
John17:6 Nangman vannoi'a kona neipeh miho jah-a namin kaphon ahitai; amaho nanga ahiuvin, nangin amaho chu keima neipeh ahi; chule amahon nathu anit taove." 
John17:7 Tun amahon nangman keima neipeh thil chengse hi nanga kon ahi ahetauve. 
John17:8 Ijeh-inem itile nangman keima neipeh thuho chu keiman amaho kapen; chule amahon hitiho chu asangun, chule keima nanga kona hung kahi kichenin aheuvin, chule nangma sol kahi atahsan taove." 
John17:9 Amaho dinga katao ahi. Vannoi dinga katao ahipoi, ahin nangman keima neipeh ho dinga bou katao ahi, ijeh-inem itile amaho nanga ahiuve." 
John17:10 Chule keija jouse chu nanga ahin, nanga chu keija ahi; chule amaho-a hin choi-atnin kaume." 
John17:11 Chule tu-a hi keima vannoi'a hi umlouva kahitai, amaho vanghi vannoi'a aumna laijuve, chule keima nahenga hung kahitai. Ka Pa Theng, eini pumkhat ihi banga, amaho jong pumkhat ahi theina dingun, nangman neipeh chengse hi, naminin hongin." 
John17:12 Keima amahotoh vannoi'a kaum lai chun, namina amaho chu kanahon ahi; nangman neipeh chengse chu kahong bitnin, khatcha jong amangthah aumpoi; Pathen lekhabua thu guilhunan, mangthah chapa bouchu amangthah tai." 
John17:13 Tu vangin nahenga hung kahitai; chule kakipana amahon aneikim nadinguva, vannoi'a hiche thuhi kasei ahi." 
John17:14 Keiman nathu amaho kapetai; chule keima vannoi'a kahilou banga amaho jong vannoi'a ahilou jeh-un, vannoi miten ahotauve." 
John17:15 Nangman amaho hi vannoi'a konin ladoh-in tia katao ahipoi, agilouva kona nahuhdoh nadinga katao joh ahibouve." 
John17:16 Keima vannoi'a kahilou bangin, amaho jong vannoi'a ahipouve." 
John17:17 Na Thutah chun amaho hi suthengin; nangma thu chu thutah ahi. 
John17:18 Nangman keima vannoi'a neisol banga, keiman jong amaho hi vannoi'a kasol ahi." 
John17:19 Chule amaho hi thutah-a suhthenga aum theina dinguva, amaho jala keima kakisuhtheng ahi." 
John17:20 Hitiho chang jeng dinga tao kahipoi, amaho thua kona keima eihin tahsan ding ho jouse dinga jong katao ahi;" 
John17:21 Pa, keima nangma sol kahi hi vannoi miten atahsan theina dinguva; nangma keija na-uma, keima nanga kaum banga hi, amaho jong eini-a aum theina dinga katao ahi." 
John17:22 Chule eini pumkhat ihi banga, amaho jong pumkhat ahi nadingun; nangman keima neipeh loupina chu, keiman amaho kapetai." 
John17:23 Amaho chamkimtah-a pumkhat ahina dinguva, Keima amaho-a kauma, chule nangma keima-a na-uma; chule keima hi nangman neisola, keima nei nangailut banga amaho jong nangailut ahi ti vannoi'in ahetna dinga katao ahi." 
John17:24 Pa, nangman neipeh loupina chu, nangin neipehho hin amu theina dingun, keima umna-a chun kakoma amaho jong umleu kati ahi; ijeh inem itile vannoi bul kiphudoh masanga nangman neingailut ahitai." 
John17:25 Vo ka Pa chondihtah, vannoi miten nangma nahepouvin, kei vangin nangma kahen; chule nangman keima neisol hi, hiteho hin ahetauve." 
John17:26 Nangman kei neingailutna ngailut chu amaho-a auma, chule keima jong amaho-a kaumna dinga; namin amaho hi kahetsah ahitan, chule kahetsah kit jing ding ahi, ati."
