John18:1 Jesu'n thu hicheng chu asei jouvin, aseijuiho toh apotdoh-in, Kidron vadung gal lama hon umna-a chun agalkaijun, chuin hon sunga chun amale aseijuiho alut taove." 
John18:2 Ama matsah-a pang Judas jong chun hiche kom mun chu ahet ahi; ijeh-inem itile Jesu'n aseijuite apuijia hikoma chu tamtah vei chejiuva ahi. 
John18:3 Chutah-in Judas'in sepaihon chule thempu pipuiho leh Pharisai ho-a kona sottolleho aloijin, meivah, meisel, chule hem manchah athouvin, hiche kom mun chu alhung taove." 
John18:4 Hichun achunga ipi ahung so ding Jesu'n abonchan ahen, apotdoh-in, amaho jah-a chun, Koi naholu ham? tin agadongin ahi." 
John18:5 Amahon adonbutnun, Nazareth Jesu atiuve. Jesu'n ajah uva, Keima hi kahi, ati. Ama matsah-a pang Judas jong chu amaho lah-a chu dinga ahi." 
John18:6 Hitia chu aman ajah uva, Keima hi kahi, ati chun, amaho anung chonun tolah alhu jengun ahi." 
John18:7 Chuin aman adong kitleuvin, Nanghon koi naholu ham? ati. Amahon, Nazareth Jesu, atiuve." 
John18:8 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keima hi kahi, tia najah uva kaseitah chula em; hijeh chun keima neiholu ahile hiteho hi chesah-un, ati." 
John18:9 Nangman keima neipeh chengse khatcha jong kamansahpoi, tia asei chu guilhuna dinga chutia ahi." 
John18:10 Hichun Simon Peter'in chemjam khat anei ahin, asatdoh-in, thempu chungnung sohpa asatnin ahile, ajetlam bilkol asatlhan ahi. Sohpa min chu Malchus ahi." 
John18:11 Chuin Jesu'n Peter jah-a, Chemjam chu apaija khumin. Pan eipeh khona chu kadon lou dingham? ati." 
John18:12 Chuin sepaihon le apipuipau toh chule Judah ho sottollehon Jesu amanun akanun," 
John18:13 Anna henga apui masaove; ijeh-inem itile chuche kum-a thempu chungnunga pang Caiaphas nupapa ahi. 
John18:14 Miho jouse dinga mi khat athi aphajoi, tia Judah ho thumop chu hiche Caiaphas hi ahi." 
John18:15 Chuin Simon Peter'in Jesu nung ajuijin, chutobang chun aseijui dang khatnin jong ajuije. Chuche seijui chu thempu chungnung chutoh kihe-a ahin, Jesu toh thakhatnin thempu chungnung inpi tolah alut lhontan ahi." 
John18:16 Peter vang chu kotpo lama adingin ahi. Chuin thempu chungnung toh kihe-a seijui chu ahung potnin, kot ngahnu jah-a chun aseijin, Peter chu asungah apuilut tai." 
John18:17 Hichun hiche kot ngah nungahnu chun Peter jah-a, Nang jong hichepa seijui ho lah-a khat nahi hilouham? atile aman, Kahipoi, atitai." 
John18:18 Chule hiche koma chu soh ho le sottolleho chu dinguva, adap jeh-a meihol akitiuva, kisang lumu ahi; Chuin Peter jong amaho to adingin, mei chu a-oijin ahi." 
John18:19 Hichun thempu chungnung chun Jesu chu aseijuiho le athuhil thudol adongtan ahi. 
John18:20 Jesu'n ama adonbutnin, Keiman vannoi mite anga phongtah-a kasei anahitan; keiman Judah ho kikhop khomji namun kikhopna inho le houin'a jenga jong kanahil jingpeh ahi; guhthima kasei aumpoi." 
John18:21 Ibola keima neidoh ham? Ajah uva ipi kasei aja-a amaho chu dongtan; ven, ipi thu kasei amahon ahenauve, ati." 
John18:22 Aman thu hicheng chu aseijouvin, akoma ding sottolleho lah-a khatnin Jesu chu akhutphanga angeiphe abengin, Thempu chungnung hitia chu kidonbut ngaijem? ati." 
John18:23 Jesu'n ama chu adonbutnin, Thu gilou kasei ahile, kathusei gilou aphotchenna neihetsah-in; thupha kasei ahile, ibola neiden ham? ati." 
John18:24 Chuin Annan ama chu akikan pumin Caiaphas thempu chungnung hengah asoltai. 
John18:25 Hichea chu Simon Peter'in dinmuna mei a-oi ahin; chuin amahon, Nangma jong aseijuiho lah-a khat nahim? tin adongun ahile, ama akilepmin, Kahipoi, ati." 
John18:26 Thempu chungnung soh ho lah-a mikhat, Peter'in abilkol asatlhah pehpa inko khatnin ajah-a, Keiman hona chu nangma amatoh kamu hilou nahim? ati." 
John18:27 Peter akilep kit tai. Chuin chupet tah chun ahchal akhongtan ahi. 
John18:28 Chuin amahon Jesu chu Caiaphas in'a konin thutanna in lama akaitaove; hichu jingkah matah ahin; ahivangin kalchuh kut an aneh theina dinguva, akisuhboh louna dingun, thutanna in'a chun amaho alutpouve." 
John18:29 Hijeh chun Pilate apotdoh-in, amaho chu adongin, Hichepa hehna-a achunga ipi thu naneijum? ati." 
John18:30 Amahon adonbutnun, ajah-a, Ama hi khangse lou hile nangma khutna pedoh pouvinge, atiuve." 
John18:31 Chuin Pilate'in ajah uva, Nanghon ama hi puijun lang, nangho dan ngaijin athu tantaovin, ati. Judah hon adonbutnun, Keiho dinga mi thading chu dan ngai ahipoi, atiuve." 
John18:32 Ama iti thia athi ding thudol Jesu'n asei chu guilhuna dinga chutia ahi. 
John18:33 Hiche chun Pilate thutanna in sungah alut kitnin, Jesu akouvin ajah-a, Nangma Judah te lengpa nahim? ati." 
John18:34 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Hichu nangman nachama naseiha, ole mi khattouvin keima thudol naseipeh ham? ati." 
John18:35 Pilate'in adonbutnin, Keima Judah mi kahim? Nanam mite le thempu pipuihon kakhutna eipehdoh nahi chu; ipi nabolset baham? ati." 
John18:36 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Keima kagam hiche vannoi hi ahipoi; ka lenggam hiche vannoi hi hile, Judah ho khutna eikipehdoh louna dinga kasohten asat dingu ahi; ahinla tun kalenggam hi hichea kon ahipoi, ati." 
John18:37 Chuin Pilate'in, Ahile nangma leng nahim? ati. Jesu'n adonbutnin, Leng kahi chu naseikhai. Thutah thu hettohsah dinga hiche dinga hi hung penga, hiche dinga hi vannoi'a hunga kahi. Thutah he chan chun ka-aw angaije, ati." 
John18:38 Pilate'in ajah-a, Ipiham thutah chu, ati. Chuin hiche chu aseijin, Judah ho henga chun agapotdoh kitnin, ajah uva, Achungah themona kamudoh hihhele." 
John18:39 Ahivangin nanghon kalchuh kut tengle mikhat kalhadohpeh dingu chonna ngai khat naneijui; hijeh chun Judah Lengpa hi lhadohpeh leuveng nalungu ham? ati. 
John18:40 Chutah chun amahon, Hichepa hihih hen, Barabbas joh hihen, tin asamtauve. Barabbas chu gucha michom ahi." 
John19:1 Chutah-in Pilate'in Jesu alan, ajeptai." 
John19:2 Chuin sepaihon ling lukhuh aphanun, alua akhuhpeh-un, chule ponsandup asilpeh-un," 
John19:3 Chuin akoma ahungun, Chibai, Judah te Lengpa! atiuvin akhutnuva adengpan taovin ahi." 
John19:4 Chuin Pilate agapot kitleuvin, ajah uva, Veuvin, akhan gitlouna ima kamu lou nahetna dinguva, ama naheng uva kahin puidoh ahi, ati." 
John19:5 Hiche chun Jesu ling lukhuh khuhle, ponsandup sil pum chun ahung potdoh-in ahi. Chuin Pilate'in ajah uvah, Veuvin mihem hi! ati." 
John19:6 Chuin thempu pipuiho le sottolle hon ama chu amutah-un, Thingpel'a khenbeh-in, thingpel'a khenbeh-in! tin asamtauve. Pilate'in, Nanghon kaijun lang thingpel'a khenbeh taovin; ajeh chu keiman akhan gitlouna kamupoi, ati." 
John19:7 Judah hon adonbutnun, Keihon dan khat kaneijun, hiche dan dungjuija chu thi dingdol ahi, ajehchu ama Pathen Chapa akihisah-e, atiuve." 
John19:8 Pilate'in hiche aseiju chu ajah phat chun, akicha cheh jengtan;" 
John19:9 Thutanna in sungah alut kitnin, Jesu jah-a, Nangma hoija kon nahim? ati. Ahivangin Jesu'n iman adonbutpoi." 
John19:10 Hijeh chun Pilate'in ajah-a, Neihou lou dingham? Nangma lhadohna ding jong chule thingpel'a khetbehna ding jong thu kanei hi nahet louham? ati." 
John19:11 Jesu'n adonbutnin, Chunga kona kipe lou hile chun, nangman kachunga thuneina himhim nanei lou ahi; hijeh chun nakhutna eipedohpa chonsetna achung nunge, ati." 
John19:12 Hichea pat chun Pilate'in ama chu lhadoh ding agotan ahi. Ahinla Judah hon asamun, Nangman mipa hi nalhadohle Caesar jol nahilou ahi; amale ama lenga kisem chan chu Caesar douna thusei ahi, atiuve." 
John19:13 Pilate'in thu chucheng ajah phat chun, Jesu chu ahin puidoh-in, chuin Songlhongnal atiu Hebrai paova Gabatha, atiu thutanna mun'a chun atoutan ahi." 
John19:14 Hichu kalchuh kut dinga kigot ni, nidan gup dontah ahi. Chuin Judah ho jah-a, Veuvin, Nalengpau hi! ati." 
John19:15 Ahivangin amahon asamuvin, Sumangin, sumangin thingpelah khenbeh-in! atiuvin ahi. Pilate'in ajah uva, Nalengpau thingpel'a kakhetbeh dingham? ati. Hichun thempu pipuihon adonbutnun, Keihon, Caesar tailou leng kaneipouve, atiuvin ahi." 
John19:16 Chutah-in aman ama chu thingpel'a khetbeh dingin akhutnuvah apedohtai. Chule amahon Jesu chu akaijun apuimang taovin ahi. 
John19:17 Chuin athingpel akiputnin Lugu mun atiu, Hebrai paova Golgotha atiu, mun chu jonin achedoh tan ahi." 
John19:18 Hikoma chun ama thingpelah akhenbeh-un, chule mi ni asih langto gelah amatoh akhetbeh thaovin, Jesu chu alailhai." 
John19:19 Chuin Pilate'in aminchan lekhan asunin, thingpel leh-a chun atah-in ahi. Chule akisun chu, NAZARETH JESU, JUDAH TE LENGPA ti ahi." 
John19:20 Jesu thingpel'a kikhetbeh na mun chu khopi nai ahi jeh chun, hiche min kisun chu Judah ho tamtah-in asimun; hichu Hebrew paotoh, Latin paotoh, chule Greek paova kisun ahi." 
John19:21 Hijeh chun Judah thempu pipuihon Pilate jah-a, Judah te Lengpa tin sun hih-in, Aman, Keima Judah te lengpa kahi ati, tin sunbovin atiuve." 
John19:22 Pilate'in adonbutnin, Kasutsa chu kasutsa ahitai, ati." 
John19:23 Chuin sepaihon Jesu chu thingpel'a akhetbeh jouvun, aponsil alauvin, hal li asouvin, sepai khat chu khat hal khat cheh achangui; chule asangkhol jong chu alauvin ahi. Asangkhol chu khui lou ahin, alua pat ato geija kikhong lhungkei ahi." 
John19:24 Hijeh chun khatle khat akihouvun, Hiche hi botsepou hite, koipen changam vang kiveuhite, akitiuve. Pathen lekha bu thua kisei, Kaponsil akihomun, Kasangkhol avangpha pha changhen tin vang asantauve, ti chu guilhuna dinga, sepaihon hitia chu abolu ahi." 
John19:25 Tun Jesu thingpel koma chun anutoh anu sopinu, Cleopas inneipi Mariam, chule Mariam Magdalene adingun ahi." 
John19:26 Chuin Jesu'n anu le aman angailut aseijui chu akoma adin amu phat chun, anu jah-a, Numei, ven, nachapa chu, ati." 
John19:27 Chuin aseijui jah-a ma chun, Ven, nanu chu, ati. Chuin hiche-a pat chun seijui chun anu chu ama in'ah apuitai." 
John19:28 Hiche jou chun Jesu'n thil ijakai akichai soh chu ahen, Pathen lekhabua thu chu guilhunsoh theinan, Kadang achah-e, ati." 
John19:29 Chukoma chu bel khatna theitwi thuh kitung ahin, chuin twichop pon theitwi thuh dimsetnin, hyssop mol leh-a atah-un, akamtoh agah sutouvin ahi." 
John19:30 Chuin Jesu'n theitwi thuh chu adonin, Akichaitai, ati. Chuin akaikun alhagao alhadohtan ahi." 
John19:31 Chuin kigin ni ahi jeh chun, cholngah ni-a thilongho chu thingpel'a aumden louna dingin, (ijeh inem itile hiche cholngah ni chu niloupi ni ahi,) Judah hon Pilate henga akeng gaheboh dingle, along galah mangna dingin athumun ahi." 
John19:32 Hichun sepaiho chu ahungun, akikhet behpi amasapa kengle khatpa keng chu aheh bongui." 
John19:33 Ahin Jesu kom ahung geijun, athisa anahitah chu amuvin, akeng ahehbong tapouve." 
John19:34 Ahi vangin sepaiho lah-a tengcha choi khat chun atengin anah agahsunin ahile, chua chun thisan le twisih ahung longlha paijen jengin ahi." 
John19:35 Chule amupa tah chun ahettohsah ahin, chule ama thu hettohsah chu tahbeh ahi: chule aman atahbeh asei ahi chu ahei; nanghon jong natahsan theina dinguva, ahi." 
John19:36 Pathen lekhabua, Agu khatcha jong kihehbong lou ding, ati chu guilhuna dinga, thil hicheng chu soh-a ahitai." 
John19:37 Pathen lekhabu thu dangman, Amahon asutpao chu avet dingu ahi, ati." 
John19:38 Chuin hicheng jou chun Arimathea khomi Joseph, Judah ho gina guhthima Jesu seijui hia chun, Jesu long chu pohdoh dingin Pilate henga agathumin ahile, Pilate'in anaphal pehtai. Hijeh chun ama ahungin, Jesu long chu ahung ladohtai." 
John19:39 Chuin Nicodemus, atila jana Jesu henga hunga chun, myrrh le aloes kihal ser somnga tobang ahinchoijin ahungin ahi." 
John19:40 Chuti chun amahon Jesu long chu alauvin, Judah ho kivui ngai bangin, lounamtui toh tupat ponnemin atomtaovin ahi." 
John19:41 Chule thingpel'a akhetbehnao mun'a chu hon khat uma ahin; hona chu koima lupsahna khah louhel lhan thah khat uma ahi. 
John19:42 Hijeh chun Judah ho kigin ni ahi jeh chun, chukoma chun Jesu chu alupsah taove; ijeh inem itile lhan chu akomcha-a uma ahi." 
John20:1 Chuin hapta nikho masa ni jingpin, kho athimna laijin, Mariam Magdalene chu lhana chun agachen ahile, song chu lhana kona tahdohsa aum agamui." 
John20:2 Hiche chun amanu Simon Peter le seijui dang, Jesu'n angailut henga chun, alhaijelin, ajah lhona, Pakai chu lhana konin apomang taove, chule hoija alupsah-u kahepouve, ati." 
John20:3 Hiche jeh chun Peter achedoh-in, seijui dangpa jong chu ahi lhonin, lhan lama chun ache lhone." 
John20:4 Hitichun thakhatnin alhai lhonin ahile seijui dang chun Peter akhelin, lhan phung chu alhung masatai." 
John20:5 Chuin akunin asung agahvetle, tupat ponnem ho um chu amun, ahivangin asungah alutpoi." 
John20:6 Simon Peter jong hiche chun anung nungah ahungin, chuin lhan sunga chun alutnin, chule tupat ponnem ho aum chu amun," 
John20:7 Alu chunga um ultheh pon chu tupat ponnem ho chutoh umtha louva, akijela atuma anaum agamun ahi." 
John20:8 Chutah chun seijui dang lhan phung lhung masajopa jong chu alutnin, amun, atahsan tai." 
John20:9 Ajeh iham itile athia kona thoudoh kit ding tia asei, Pathen lekhabu thu chu ahet loulaiju ahi." 
John20:10 Chutichun seijuite ni chu a-in lam gela achemang lhontan ahi. 
John20:11 Mariam vang chu lhan pama chun adingin akap kapmin; aka pum chun akunin lhan sung chu agahven ahile," 
John20:12 Abana bang vantil ni Jesu long alupsah naova chu khat alulhuna atouva, khat akeng todopma atou amui." 
John20:13 Chuin amani chun ajah-a, Numei, ibola nakaham? ati lhonin ahile, amanun ajah lhonah, Ajeh chu ka Pakai apomangun, hoija akoiju kahepoi, ati." 
John20:14 Chutia ati jou chun, akinung heijin ahile Jesu adin amun, Jesu ahi chu ahepoi." 
John20:15 Jesu'n ajah-a, Numei, ibola nakaham? koiham nahol? ati. Amanun honbol chun angaiton ajah-a, Pu, hikoma kona napohdoh ahile hoija nakoijem seijin, pomanging kate, ati." 
John20:16 Jesu'n ajah-a, Mariam ati. Amanu akiheijin, ajah-a, Rabboni ati; hichu houhil tina ahi." 
John20:17 Jesu'n ajah-a, Neitongkha hih-in; ijeh-inem itile keima Pa henga chun kakaltou hih laije; ahin chenlang kasopiho jah-a gaseijin, ka Pa, nangho Pa, ka Pathen, nangho Pathen henga kakaltouve, ati." 
John20:18 Mariam Magdalene chu achen, aseijuiho jah-a chun, Pakai chu kamutai, atin, chule ajah-a hiche thu asei jong chu agaseije." 
John20:19 Chuin hiche nikho mama nilhah lamin, hapta kipat ni ahito lhonin, aseijuite chu Judah ho gina kot akikha khum petnuvin, Jesu ahungin alah uva ahung dingin, ajah uva, Nachung uvah lungmon umhen, ati." 
John20:20 Aman hiche chu asei jouvin, amaho chu akhut le anah avetsahtan ahi. Chuin Pakai amu-u chu seijuite chu akipah lheh jengun ahi." 
John20:21 Hijeh chun Jesu'n ajah uva, Nachung uvah lungmon umhen, Pan keima eisol banga keiman nangho kasol nahiuve, ati." 
John20:22 Chuin aman hiche chu asei jouvin, amaho chu ahu alha khumin, Lhagao Theng changun;" 
John20:23 Koi hile achonset nasuhbeiju chu, kisubeija ahi; achonset na-umsah-u chu, akiumsah ahi, ati." 
John20:24 Somleni lah-a khat, Thomas Didymus atiu, vang chu Jesu hunga chu amaho lah-a chu umlou ahi." 
John20:25 Hiche chun seijui dangho chun ajah-a, Keihon Pakai chu kamutaove, atiuvin ahi. Ahivangin aman ajah uva, akhutphang thingkil maha kamua, kakhut junga kakhoija, anah kakhutna katham lousen tahsan ponge, ati." 
John20:26 Chuin ni get jouman seijuite in sunga aum pettah-un, chule Thomas jong amaho toh uma ahin; kot kikhah sohkeija ahin, Jesu ahung kitnin alah uva ahung dingin, Nachung uva lungmon umhen, ati." 
John20:27 Chuin Thomas jah-a, Nakhut jungin hinkhoijin, kakhut teni hi ven; nakhut hin lhangin lang kanah thamin; chule gingchalel louvin tahsanin, ati." 
John20:28 Thomas'in adonbutnin ajah-a, ka Pakai le ka Pathen, ati." 
John20:29 Jesu'n ajah-a, Thomas, Neimu jeh-a natahsan ahi, mu louva tahsan ho anun nomui, ati." 
John20:30 Tahbeh-a Jesu'n aseijuite angsunga melchihna kidang tamtah abol ahin, hitiho chu hiche lekhabu sunga hin akisunpoi." 
John20:31 Jesu chu Pathen Chapa Christa ahi chu natahsan uva, natahsan vanguva ama mina hinna nanei thei nadinguva, hichengse hi kisuna ahibouve." 
John21:1 Hiche jou chun Tiberia dillen pangah Jesu aseijuite henga akilah kitleuvin; chule akilah chu hiti hi ahi. 
John21:2 Simon Peter le Didymus atiu Thomas chutoh, Galilee gam Canna kho-a mi Nathanael toh, Zebedai chapa teni toh, chule seijui dang ni toh um khoma ahiuve." 
John21:3 Simon Peter'in amaho henga, keima nga manin chenge ati. Amahon ajah-a, Keiho jong kahungdiu ahi, atiuvin ahi. Chuin acheuvin kong khatna gangtah-in alutpai taove. Chule hiche jan chun imacha amanpouvin ahi." 
John21:4 Ahin jingkah ahunghi phatnin, Jesu vaokamah adingin; ahivangin seijui ho chun Jesu ahi chu ahepouve." 
John21:5 Hichun Jesu'n ajah uva, Chate, neh ding ima naneijum? ati. Amahon, Kanei pouve, atiuve." 
John21:6 Chuin aman ajah uva, Kong sih jet lama chun len sepleu chun namat dingu ahi, ati. Hijeh chun amahon asepmuvin ahile, nga atama atam jeh chun akaijou tapouve." 
John21:7 Hichun Jesu'n angailut seijui chun Peter jah-a, Pakai ahi, ati. Peter'in, Pakai ahi, ti chu ajah phat chun, sangkhol aki-ah loijin (ijeh inem itile asagoh keova um ahin) dillena chun achomlhan ahi." 
John21:8 Ahin seijui dangse vang chu nga dimset len akaijun, kongneo khatna ahung kitolun ahi; (ijeh-inem itile amaho chu tolla kona gamla lou ahiuvin, tong ja ni tobang bou kikah ahiuve)." 
John21:9 Chutichun tolgo agei phatnun, chukoma chu songmeihol meija kitihle, achunga nga kikoi, chule changlhah amuvin ahi." 
John21:10 Jesu'n ajah uva, Tu tahtah-a namatnu nga chu phabep galaovin, ati." 
John21:11 Hiche chun Simon Peter kong'a akaldoh-in, nga len ja khatle somnga le thum dimset len chu agakaijin; nga achuti tam vang chun alen chu a-ehpon ahi." 
John21:12 Jesu'n ajah uva, Hungun jing an hung neuvin, ati. Chule Pakai ahi chu aheuvin, seijui ho khatcha jong, Koi nahim? tia dong ngama aumpouve." 
John21:13 Chuin Jesu ahungin, changlhah chu alan, amaho chu apen, chutobang machun nga jongchu apei." 
John21:14 Hiche chu athia kona athodoh nunga aseijuite henga akilah athumveina ahi. 
John21:15 Chuin ajing anneh-u achaijun, Jesu'n Simon Peter jah-a, Jonah chapa, Simon, nangman hicheho sanga hi neingailut joh-em? ati. Aman ajah-a, Henge Pakai; kangailut nangin nahenai, ati. Aman ajah-a, Ka kelngoi nouho vah-in, ati." 
John21:16 Ani veinan ajah-a, Jonah chapa, Simon, nangman neingailut em? ati. Aman ajah-a, Henge Pakai; kangailut nangman nahenai, ati. Aman ajah-a, Ka kelngoiho chingin ati." 
John21:17 Chuin athum veinan ajah-a, Jonah chapa, Simon, nangin neingailut em? ati. Aman thum veijen, Neingailut em? ati jeh chun Peter alungnom motan, ajah-a, Pakai, nangman ijakai nahenai; keiman nangma kangailut nangman nahenai ati. Jesu'n ajah-a, Ka kelngoi ho vah-in." 
John21:18 Tahbeh beh-a kaseipeh nahi, nachapan laija chu nangman natai nakigah-a, nachena nom noma nacheji ahi; na-upat teng vangle, nakhut najah-a midangin natai nagahpeh ding, chule nache nom louna lam lama napui ding ahi, ati." 
John21:19 Hichu ama iti thia athi-a, Pathen achoi-at ding chu hetsahna-a, asei ahi. Chuin hiche chu asei jouvin ajah-a, Neijuijin, ati." 
John21:20 Chuin Peter akiheijin ahile, ajan anneh uva a-anga kingaija, Napedoh-a pang dinga chu koiham? tia donga, Jesu'n angailut seijui chun ajui amui." 
John21:21 Peter'in amachu amuphatnin, Jesu jah-a, Pakai, hichepa hi iti dingham? ati." 
John21:22 Jesu'n ajah-a, Kahung kahse-a ama hi aumden ding deileng, nang dinga hichu ipidi hiding ham? Nangman kanung juijin, ati." 
John21:23 Chuin hiche seijui chu thi lou ding ahi tin sopite lah-a athangtan ahi; ahinla Jesu'n ama jah-a chu, Ama chu thi lou ding ahi, ati ahipon, Kahung kahse-a ama hi aumden ding deileng, nang dinga hichu ipidi hiding ham? ati ahibouve." 
John21:24 Hicheng thu hettohsah-a, chule hicheng thu suna hi hiche seijui chu ahin; chule ama thu hettohsah chu tahbeh ahi ti kaheuve." 
John21:25 Chule hicheng tailouvin jong Jesu thilbol tamtah aumin, hitiho chu abonchan kisun sohkeile, kei ngaiton, lekhabu kisun chengse chu vannoi leiset hin dolponte. Amen." 
Acts1:1 Vo Theophilus, lekha masa-a chun Jesu thilbol le athuhil kipattil thudol jouse," 
Acts1:2 Asolchah lhenho Lhagao Thenga thu apeh jouva lahtouva aum ni geija thu chu kanasunin ahi: 
Acts1:3 Gim genthei athoh jouvin, chuche solchah ho chu thontheilou hetphotna tamtah toh thon ahingin akimusah in, nisomli geijin ahenguva akilah jin, Pathen lenggam thudol aseijin:" 
Acts1:4 Chule amahotoh aum khomin, amaho chu hiche thuhi apen, Nanghon Jerusalem dalha hih-un; Pa thutep keija kona najah-u chu ngah jingun." 
Acts1:5 Ijeh-inem itile John chun twija baptize achansah ahin, nangho vang tukal ni phabep joule Lhagao Thenga baptize nachan dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts1:5 Ijeh-inem itile John chun twija baptize achansah ahin, nangho vang tukal ni phabep joule Lhagao Thenga baptize nachan dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts1:6 Hichun amaho ahung kikhomun ajah-a, Pakai tu-a hi Israelte gam nakiledoh sah kit dingham? tin adongui." 
Acts1:7 Chuin aman ajah uva, Pan athuneina-a angaitoa agot phat le nikho chu nangho het dingdol ahipoi." 
Acts1:8 Amavang Lhagao Theng nachung uva ahung lhun tengle nanghon thahat nanei dingu ahi; chule nangho Jerusalem'a jong, Juda gamsung le, Samaria gamsung, chule leiset chung gam jouse-a, kolmong geija kathu hettohsah-a napan dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts1:9 Chuin thu hicheng chu asei jouvin, amahon avet vet pettah-un ama lahtouvin aumin; amitmuva konin meilhang khatnin atolmangtan ahi." 
Acts1:10 Chuin akaltouva van lam avet vet pettah-un, veuvin, ponbang sil mi ni akenguvah ahung dingin;" 
Acts1:11 Miteni chun, Nangho Galilee gam miho, ibola nadin uva van lam navet jinguham? Hiche Jesu nangho koma kona van'a kilatou hi, van'a akaltou namu bang banguva hi hung ding ahi, ati lhone." 
Acts1:12 Chutah-in Olivet molsanga kon chun Jerusalem'a akiletaove; hichu Jerusalem komcha ahin cholngah ni lampi bou ahi. 
Acts1:13 Chuin alhunun, aumnao indan chungnunga chun aluttou taove. Peter, le Jacob, John le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus chapa Jacob le Zealot Simon, chule Jacob chapa Judas; hicheng chu ahiuve." 
Acts1:13 Chuin alhunun, aumnao indan chungnunga chun aluttou taove. Peter, le Jacob, John le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus chapa Jacob le Zealot Simon, chule Jacob chapa Judas; hicheng chu ahiuve." 
Acts1:13 Chuin alhunun, aumnao indan chungnunga chun aluttou taove. Peter, le Jacob, John le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus chapa Jacob le Zealot Simon, chule Jacob chapa Judas; hicheng chu ahiuve." 
Acts1:14 Hiteho chengse chu numei phabep toh, Jesu nu Mariam toh, asopiteho toh, lungkhat tah-in taona le ngehna ajomjing taove." 
Acts1:15 Hiche nikho lai chun Peter seijui ho lah-a adingdoh-in (mipi akikhoma chu mi jale somni jen ahiuve,)" 
Acts1:16 Sopiteho, Jesu manho lamkaija pang Judas chungchang thudol, Lhagao Thengin David kama aseisah Pathen lekhabua thu chu guilhung ding mong ahi;" 
Acts1:17 Ijeh-inem itile ama chu eiho lah-a kisimtha ahin, chule hiche lhacha natohna mun jonghi changa ahi." 
Acts1:18 Tun heche mipa hin khan gitlou man sumin leimun khat alamin, akhupbon achun, atumpi apohkeh-in, chule agil jouse ahungdoh tan ahi." 
Acts1:19 Hiche thuhi Jerusalem'a cheng jousen ahesoh keije; hiti chun amaho paovin chuche leimun min chu Aceldama asahtaove; hichu thisan lei tina ahi. 
Acts1:20 Ijeh-inem itile Labu-a, Ama chenna mun chu agoh keuvin umhen, chua chun koima cheng hihhen; chule apanmun chu midang changhen, tin akisune." 
Acts1:21 Hijeh chun, Pakai Jesu eiho lah-a achele ahungleh phatlai sungse," 
Acts1:22 John'in baptize achansah-a pat, Pakai Jesu eihoa kona lahtouva aum ni geija ikiloi khompiu hiche miho lah-a khat hi, ama thodoh kit hettohsah-a eipanhu diuva lhentei ngaiding ahi, ati." 
Acts1:22 John'in baptize achansah-a pat, Pakai Jesu eihoa kona lahtouva aum ni geija ikiloi khompiu hiche miho lah-a khat hi, ama thodoh kit hettohsah-a eipanhu diuva lhentei ngaiding ahi, ati." 
Acts1:23 Chuin mi ni, Barsabas atiu Joseph (amin chom Justus), le Matthias chu alheng doh-un ahi." 
Acts1:24 Chuin amaho ataovun, Vo mijouse lung hesoh Pakai, hiteni koijoh hi" 
Acts1:25 Chonset jala Judas'in ama mun'a achena dinga alha hiche lhacha na le solchah panmun chu lo dinga nalhenem neivet sah-un, atiuve." 
Acts1:26 Chuin amahon vang asanun ahile, avang sanu chu Mathias chunga achutan; hitichun ama chu solchah somlekhat chutoh akisimtha tai." 
Acts2:1 Chule Pentecost ni lhingkeija ahunglhun phatnin, abonchauvin lungkhat tah-in munkhatna ana umkhomun ahi;" 
Acts2:2 Chuin phulou helouvin van'a konin hui hattah nung gin tobang ahung gingin, atounau in chu adimsoh jengin ahi." 
Acts2:3 Chuin meikong bangin lei ahung kilah-in, akikhen jal-in, alu chung cheh uva achongin ahi." 
Acts2:4 Chuin amaho abonun Lhagao Theng adimset taovin, Lhagaovin aseidohsah bangun paochom paochomin thu asei pantaovin ahi." 
Acts2:5 Hichea chu vannoi leiset gamtina chitin namtin lah-a kona hou gut Juda miho Jerusalem'a umuva ahi. 
Acts2:6 Chuin chuche thu akiseithang phat chun mipi ahung kikhomun, amitakipmin ama ama pao cheh-a thukisei ajah jeh-u chun, alung kichih lah jengun ahi." 
Acts2:7 Chuin amaho chun adatmouvin kidang asauvin, khatle khat akihouvun, Veuvin, thu seiho hi abonchauva Galilee gam mi hilou hiuvem?" 
Acts2:8 Chule i-atile eihon amikipmin ipenna gam cheh paova thu kisei ijah-uham? 
Acts2:9 Eihola abang Parthia mi, Media mi, Elam mi ihiuvin, abang Mesopotamia gama cheng, Juda gamale Cappadocia gama cheng, Pontus gamale Asia gama cheng," 
Acts2:10 Phrygia le Pamphylia gama cheng, Egypt gama cheng, chule Cyrene gam vela Libya gama cheng ihiuvin; abang Rome'a kona hung kholjin, Juda ho le Juda chona chonho," 
Acts2:11 Crete mile Arabia gam mi ihiuvin: ahivangin eima pao cheh-a Pathen thilbol loupi thu aseiju thakhat jah-in ijauvin, atiuvin ahi." 
Acts2:12 Chuin abonchau chun kidang asauvin adatmo lheh jengun, Itina ahidem, tin khatle khat akidongto taovin ahi." 
Acts2:13 Ahivangin adangho chun ajontaijun, Hiteho lengpiga twithah khama hiuva hi, atiuve." 
Acts2:14 Ahin Peter somlekhat chutoh adingin, aw sangtah-in asamin, ajah uva, Juda gam mite le Jerusalem'a chengho, nanghon nabon chaovin hiche hi heuvin, chule kathusei lungna changin ngaijun." 
Acts2:15 Ijeh-inem itile hiteho hi nangho ngaito banga lengpitwi khama ahipouve; tu hi vai ahinalai bouve; 
Acts2:16 Ahin hiche hi Joel themgaovin anasei; 
Acts2:17 Ni nunungle hiti ding ahi, tin Pathen'in aseije Mi jouse chunga kalhagao kabuh lhah ding; nachapa teo le nachanu teo vin gaothu aseidoh dingu, nakhangdong houvin mu aneijuva, na-upa houvin mang amat dingu ahi." 
Acts2:18 Ahi, hiche niteng chule kasoh pasal hole kasoh numei ho chunga jong Kalhagao kabuh lhah ding, chule amahon lhagao thu aseidoh dingu ahi." 
Acts2:19 Chule van'a thil kidang dang, noi leisetna melchihna ho; thisan, mei, meikhu kamusah ding;" 
Acts2:20 Pakai nikho loupitah le min thangtah chu ahunglhun masanga; Nisa chu muthim soh-a, Lha thisan soh ding ahi." 
Acts2:21 Chule hiti ding ahi, Koi hijongle Pakai mina tao chan chu huhhing-a umding ahi, tia aseichu guilhunga ahibouve." 
Acts2:22 Nangho Israel mite, hiche thuhi ngaijun: Nazareth Jesu, Pathen'in amanchah-a nalah uva, bolmo kidang, datmo umho, chule melchihna ho abola kona chu Pathen'in nangho henga aphotchet ahin, hichu nanghon naheuve." 
Acts2:23 Ama chu Pathen'in ageltohsa le ahet masahsa bangin pehdoh-in aumtan ahile, nanghon namanun, lungsetna beihel khutho chun thingpellah nakhen beh-un, nathat taove." 
Acts2:24 Ahin thina-in ama chu atuhden hoi ahilou jeh chun, Pathen'in thina-in akan chu asutlhap peh-in, akai thoutai." 
Acts2:25 Ijeh-inem itile David'in ama thudola chun, Keiman Pakai chu kamaikoh-a kamu jinge, Ajeh chu keima kalon louna dingin, kakhut jet lamah aume." 
Acts2:26 Hijeh chun kalung akipah-in, chule kalei athanome; chuche kalval chun katahsa jong kinema cholnga ding ahi;" 
Acts2:27 Ajeh chu nangman kalhagao damuna nadalhah lou ding, namitheng jong mon mangna namusah louding ahi." 
Acts2:28 Nangman keima hinna lampi neihetsah ahitan, namaiso-a kipana neidip ding ahi, tin anaseijin ahi." 
Acts2:29 Sopiteho, iphung bulpiu David thuhi olmo louhelin najah uva kasei theije, ama chu athin, akivuijin abuikhuh tu geijin ilah uva aum jinge." 
Acts2:30 Ama chu themgao ahijeh-in, tahsalam dola ataiguija kona alaltouna-a toudinga Christa chu ahin tundoh ding ahi tia, Pathen kihahsela athutep chu ahen;" 
Acts2:31 Chutia chu khonung thu ahet masah jeh chun Christa thokit ding thu aseijin, thikhol khul'a dalhah denin aumpoi, alongin jong mon mangna amupoi, tia asei ahi." 
Acts2:32 Hiche Jesu chu Pathen'in akaithou kittan, ahetoh-a keiho kabonchao kahiuve." 
Acts2:33 Hijeh chun Pathen khut jet lamah choisangin aumin, athutepsa Lhagao Theng chu a-Pa-a konin amun, hichu ahin buhlhah-a, tu-a namu-u najah-uhi ahi." 
Acts2:34 David chu van'ah akalpoi, ahivangin amatah-in hiti hin aseije, Pakai chun ka Pakai jah-a, Kakhut jet lamah tou jingin," 
Acts2:35 Keiman namelmaho nakeng chotpha kaneisah masangsen, ati." 
Acts2:36 Hijeh chun Israel insung mi jousen kichentah-in heuhen, hiche Jesu nanghon thingpel'a nakhetbeh-u chu, Pathen'in Pakai le Christa-a atun ahitai, ati." 
Acts2:37 Amahon thu hicheng chu ajah phatnun, alungu hema kisun abangin, Peter le solchah dangho jah-a, Miho chule sopite, keihon ipi kabol dingu ham? atiuve." 
Acts2:38 Chuin Peter'in ajah uvah, Nalung heijun, chule chonset suhbeinan Jesu Christa minin nabonchaovin baptize changcheh-un, chule Lhagao Theng kipe-a hi nachan dingu ahi." 
Acts2:39 Ijeh-inem itile thutep chu nangho dingle nachateo ding, chule gamlatah-a umho, Pakai i-Pathen'un ama henga akou dingho jouse dinga ahi, ati." 
Acts2:40 Chule thu dang dang tamtah ahettohsah-in, chule amaho chu atilkhouvin, Tulai khang lung gilou ho-a konhin kihuh doh-un, ati." 
Acts2:41 Chutah chun kipahtah-a athu jop chanchu baptize achang taove; chule hiche nilele chun amaho chu mi sangthum jenin abetauve. 
Acts2:42 Chuin amaho chu solchah ho thuhila jong, kithokhomin jong, changlhah semkeh-in jong, chule taovin jong gunchu tah-in apang det jingtaove." 
Acts2:43 Hichun mitin chunga kichatna ahungchun; chule solchah ho chun thil kidang tamtah le, melchihna aboltauve." 
Acts2:44 Chule atahsan jouse chu aum khomun, thil jouse neilhangin aneijun:" 
Acts2:45 Chule anei agouhou le athilkeovu ajoh-un, abonchauvin angaichat akin tohkhambep cheh-in akihom jiuvin ahi." 
Acts2:46 Chule niseh-in lung khattah-in houin'ah gunchu tah-in aumdet jingun, in tina changlhah asemkeh-un, kipahle lung khatseh pun an anejiuvin," 
Acts2:47 Pathen avahchoijun, chule mi jouse lungdeijin aumun ahi. Chuin Pakaiyin huhhing-a umho chu niseh-in houbung'a chun abe jingtan ahi." 
Acts3:1 Ni khat Peter le John tao phatnin, hichu ni kihei ahin, houin'a achetou lhonin ahi." 
Acts3:1 Ni khat Peter le John tao phatnin, hichu ni kihei ahin, houin'a achetou lhonin ahi." 
Acts3:2 Chuin mi khat anu sunga apena elbaija peng ahinpouvin, houin alut jouse henga khut adoa thil akithum dinga, houin'a kotkhah hoi atiuva chu nisehle akoijiu ahi;" 
Acts3:3 Ama chun Peter le John houin'a alut ding lhon amu phatnin, thil eikipele tin anathumin ahi." 
Acts3:3 Ama chun Peter le John houin'a alut ding lhon amu phatnin, thil eikipele tin anathumin ahi." 
Acts3:4 Chuin Peter'in ama chu ave changmelin John toh ahin, Keini neive lhonin, ati." 
Acts3:4 Chuin Peter'in ama chu ave changmelin John toh ahin, Keini neive lhonin, ati." 
Acts3:5 Hichun aman ikhat mu akinemin lung lut tah-in avetan ahi. 
Acts3:6 Ahin, Peter'in, Dangka sana kaneipoi; ahivangin kaneisun penge: Nazareth Jesu Christa minin thoudoh-in lang lam jottan, ati." 
Acts3:7 Chuin aman akhut jetnin amanin, akai dingin ahile, chupettah chun akengphang le a-ah khomit guho ahatdohtai." 
Acts3:8 Hichun amapa chu akichomin adingin, lam ajotnin, amani chutoh houin'ah alutnin; avahlen, akichom akichomin, Pathen avahchoijin ahi." 
Acts3:9 Chuin mi jousen avalea Pathen avahchoi chu amuvin; 
Acts3:10 Chule houin Kotkhah hoi phunga touva khut dopa chu ahi aheuvin; chule achunga thil soh chu kidangle datmo um asa lheh jengun ahi. 
Acts3:11 Chuin elbai akidamsah pan Peter le John atuhpet chun, miho jouse chun kidang asa behseh-un, Solomon kempum atiuva chun ahenguva ahung lhai khomun ahi." 
Acts3:11 Chuin elbai akidamsah pan Peter le John atuhpet chun, miho jouse chun kidang asa behseh-un, Solomon kempum atiuva chun ahenguva ahung lhai khomun ahi." 
Acts3:12 Chuin hichu Peter'in amu phatnin miho chu adonbutnin, Vo nangho Israel mite, ibola hichepa chunga hi kidang sa-a nahiuvem? Ole keihon keiho thahat le houdih vanga ama hi lam kajotsah theijuva nangaitouva, neivet vet jenguham?" 
Acts3:13 Abraham, Isaac, Jacob Pathen, ipu ipateu Pathen'in achapa Jesu chu achoi-at ahi; ama chu nanghon napedoh-un, Pilate angsung tah-a aman lhadoh dinga agotsan jongin napedoh jengui." 
Acts3:14 Ahi, nanghon Athengpa le Chondihpa chu naleh doh-un, tolthat joh chu nalhadoh pehna dingun nathumun," 
Acts3:15 Hinna Bulpi chu nathat taove; ahinla ama chu Pathen'in athiho lah-a konin akaithou kittan; ahetoh keiho hi kahiuve. 
Acts3:16 Chule ama min tahsan vanga amin chun nanghon nahet jingule namu jingu hichepa hi ahatsah ahitai: ahi, Ama-a kona tahsan chun hichepa hi nangho jouse mitmu-a adamsah hel ahitai." 
Acts3:17 Chule tun, sopite, hichu nahetlou jeh uva nangho le navaipo pipuhovin nabolu ahi kahei." 
Acts3:18 Ahivangin Pathen'in athemgaoho jouse kama aseisah, Christa chun gim genthei athoh ding ahi, ati chu hitia hi aguilhunsah ahibouve." 
Acts3:19 Hijeh chun nachonset nao chulmanga aum theina dingin nalung heijun, hung kilehei kitnun, chutile Pakai anga konin haldohna kiledohna phat chu hung lhung theijin tin;" 
Acts3:20 Chule naheng uva aphondohsa Christa Jesu chu naheng uva ahinsol thei ding ahi. 
Acts3:21 Amavang imajouse akiledohsah kit phat kahse-a chu, van'in ama chu alahlut tahdi ding mong thu ahi; hiche thuhi Pathen'in atil abula patna athemgao thengho kama ahin seisahpeh ahi." 
Acts3:22 Mosi'n apu apateu jah-a, Pakai Pathen'in keima eitundoh banga hi, nangho dinga nasopiteu lah-a khat themgaova atundoh ding ahi; ama chun najah uva thu asei jouse chu nangai dingu ahi." 
Acts3:23 Chule hiti ding ahi, koi hijongle chuche themgao thusei ngailou lou chu miho lah-a kona kisumanghel ding ahi, ati." 
Acts3:24 Ahi, themgaoho jousen, Samuel'a pat anunga abanjom chengsen jong, thusei jousen tulai thusoh umchan ding hi anasei masatnu ahi." 
Acts3:25 Nangho themgaoho le Pathen'in napu napateu atepna thutep chate chu nahiuve, Pathen'in Abraham jah-a, Nangma chilhah-a kona vannoi leiset phung jouse phatthei chang ding ahi, tia atep chu." 
Acts3:26 Pathen'in achapa Jesu chu akaithouvin, nagitlou nao chengseova kona lehei dingle, phatthei chansah dingin, nangho henga ahinsol masapenin ahi, ati." 
Acts4:1 Chuin miho jah-a athusei pet lhonin, thempuho, houin vaipopa, chule Saddukai ho chu achung lhonah achuvin," 
Acts4:2 Mi thu ahilhon le, Jesu vanga athi lah-a kona thokit thu ahil lhon jeh chun, alungphamo lheh jengui." 
Acts4:3 Chuin amani chu amanun, nilhah ahitah jeh chun, ajinga dingin mihenna in'ah akhumtaove." 
Acts4:4 Ahivangin athu jaho mi tamtah-in atahsanun; chule amijat chu sangnga jen ahiuve. 
Acts4:5 Chuin ahitin ahi, ajingin avaipoho chengseutoh, a-upaho chengseu, chule danthu sunho," 
Acts4:6 Anna thempu chungnung toh, Caiaphas, John, Alexander, chule thempu chungnung inkote chengse toh Jerusalem'a akikhom khomun ahi." 
Acts4:6 Anna thempu chungnung toh, Caiaphas, John, Alexander, chule thempu chungnung inkote chengse toh Jerusalem'a akikhom khomun ahi." 
Acts4:7 Chuin alailung uvah amani chu atungun, Ipi thuneina le koi mina hiche hi nabol lhonham, tin adongui." 
Acts4:8 Chutah-in Peter Lhagao Thengin adimsetnin ajah uva, Nangho, miho chunga vaipoho le Israel upaho," 
Acts4:9 Tunia hiche michatmo pa phatna dinga thilpa kibol thua, hichepa ipi-a iti kiboldam hela hitam, tia eikidonga ahitah-a ahile," 
Acts4:10 Nabonchaovin kihet cheh-un, chule Israel mi jousen hecheh hen, nanghon thingpel'a nakhetbeh-u Nazareth Jesu Christa, Pathen'in athiho lah-a kona akaithou, ama mina chu ama hi na-ang uva dama dinga ahitai." 
Acts4:11 Nangho insahon nadei mouva napaiju song, aninga apipena panga chu, ama hi ahi." 
Acts4:12 Chule koima dangah huhhingna aumpoi; ijeh-inem itile vannoi'a mihemte lah-a huhhing-a iumna dinguva kipe-a min dang aumpoi, ati." 
Acts4:13 Chuin Peter le John hakatje chu amu phatnun, lekha themlou ahi lhonle mimol ahi lhon chu aheuvin, adatmo lheh jengui; chule amani chu Jesu toh kivopsa ahi lhon chu ahedoh taove." 
Acts4:13 Chuin Peter le John hakatje chu amu phatnun, lekha themlou ahi lhonle mimol ahi lhon chu aheuvin, adatmo lheh jengui; chule amani chu Jesu toh kivopsa ahi lhon chu ahedoh taove." 
Acts4:14 Chule mi akiboldampa chu amahotoh adin khom jing chu amuvin, adounan imacha aseithei tapouve." 
Acts4:15 Ahivangin amaho chu akikhop naova kona chu achoma gaumdoh dingin asoldoh-un, amahole amaho akihouvun," 
Acts4:16 Hiche miho hi iba ilo dinguham? Amahon thil bolmo kidang datmotah abolu hila Jerusalem'a cheng mi jouse hetnin akiphong dohtan; eihon jongla ahipoi tin inel theipouve. 
Acts4:17 Hijongle hiche hi miho lah-a achal cheh cheh louna dingin, tukala Jesu mina hi thu asei kit louhelna dingun hagih-in gihsal uhite, akitiuve." 
Acts4:18 Chuin amani chu akouvun, Jesu mina thu aseija asei louhelna dingule, mi ahil louhelna dingun akhamchah taove." 
Acts4:19 Ahivangin Peter le Johan in adonbut lhonin ajah uva, Pathen thu sanga nangho thu ngaijoh chu Pathen mitmu-a dihnam, nanghon geltoh-un." 
Acts4:20 Keiho vang thil kamu chengseu le kajah chengseu sei louvin kaum theipouve, ati lhone." 
Acts4:21 Chuin amahon agihsal kitleuvun alhadoh taove, mipi jeh chun talent pehnaje ahepouve; ijeh-inem itile thil kibol jeh chun mi jousen Pathen avahchoijun ahi." 
Acts4:22 Ajeh iham itile bolmo kidangtah kibolna-a kiboldam mipa chu kum somli chunga mi ahi. 
Acts4:23 Chuin akilhadoh phat lhonin, aloiho henga ahung lhonin, ajah uva thempu pipuiho le upaho thusei chu alhut lhonin ahi." 
Acts4:24 Chuin amahon hichu ajahtah-un, aw sangtah-in, lungkhat tah-in Pathen asamun, Vo Pakai, nangma vanle lei chule twikhanglen, chule asunga um jouse sema Pathen nahi;" 
Acts4:25 Nangman nalhacha David kamsunga, Namtin vaipi ibola lunghanga hiuvam? chule ibola mihon mohthil angaitou ham?" 
Acts4:26 Pakai le a-Christa chunga chun, Leiset chunga lengho apang golun, Chule avaipoteu akikhomui; tia nasei dohsah ahi." 
Acts4:27 Atahbeh-in, nangma thaonu nalhacha Theng Jesu dounan, Herod le Pontius Pilate, chidang namdangte toh Israel miho toh," 
Acts4:28 Hung guilhung dinga nakhutle nalung thimin agonmasah chengse chu boldingin akikhomun ahi. 
Acts4:29 Tun, Pakai, ami gihsalnao hi vetan; chule nasohte hin hakat tah-a nathu aseina dingun;" 
Acts4:30 Nalhacha Theng Jesu mina melchihna le bolmo kidang dang abolna dingun, mi damsahna dingin nakhut lhangin atiuve." 
Acts4:31 Chuin amaho atao jouvun, akikhopnao chu ahung kilingin, abonchauvin Lhagao Thengin adimun, hakattah-in Pathen thu aseitaove." 
Acts4:32 Chuin mipi atahsan chengse chu lungkhatle thakhat ahiuvin; khatchan jong anei chu keija tum ahi tilouvin; thil jouse abonchan neilhangin aneitauve. 
Acts4:33 Chuin solchah ho chun thahat chungnung tah-in Pakai Jesu thokit thu ahettohsah jiuvin; abonchauva chungah lungsetna nasatah aumtan ahi. 
Acts4:34 Alah uva jong koima alhasama aumpouve; ajeh chu gam ahiloule in nei jouse chun ajoh-un, chule athil joh manhou chu achoijun," 
Acts4:35 Solchah ho keng bulah ahung koijiuvin, akin toh khambep cheh-in akihom jiuvin ahi." 
Acts4:36 Chuin Levi phung mi, Cyprus twikol gam mi Joseph, solchah hon Barnabas asah-u (hichu lungmonna chapa tina ahi) chun," 
Acts4:37 Lou ching khat anei chu ajoh-in, sum chu achoijin solchah ho keng bulah ahung koijin ahi." 
Acts5:1 Ahin mi khat amin Anania kitipa chun a-inneipi Sapphira toh anei khat ajoh lhonin," 
Acts5:2 Aman alang akikoijin, hichu a-inneipin jong ahet ahin, alang chu ahin choijin solchah ho keng bulah ahung koijin ahi." 
Acts5:3 Ahinla Peter'in, Anania, ibola gam man chu alang kikoija, Lhagao Theng najoulhep dinga Satan'in nalung sung alodim hitam?" 
Acts5:4 Aum laija chu nanga tum hilouham? Chule najoh nunga jong chu nangma thu neina-a um hilouham? Ibola hitobang hi lunga vop nahim? Nangman mi najoulhep ahipon, Pathen najoulhep ahibouve, ati." 
Acts5:5 Chuin thu chucheng chu ajah jah chun Anania chu alhun athitai. Chuin aja jouse chunga chun kichatna nasatah achutan ahi. 
Acts5:6 Chuin gollhangho akipat doh-un atomun, apudoh-un, agavui taove." 
Acts5:7 Chuin chuche jou nidan thum tobang nungin a-inneipi chu thilsoh umchan hepha louvin, ahung lutjelin ahi." 
Acts5:8 Chuin Peter'in adonbutnin, ajah-a, Hijat manseh bouva hi gam chu najoh lhonham? atile amanun, Ahi, hijatbou chu ahi, ati." 
Acts5:9 Ahinla Peter'in amanu jah-a, I-atile Pakai Lhagao patep dinga naki thukop lhon hitam? Ven, na-inneipu vuiho kot bul ahung geitaove; amahon nang jong naputdoh dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts5:10 Chuin amanu chu chupettah chun akeng bulah alhun athipaitai. Chuin gollhangho chu ahung lut ule amanu athi chu ahung mu uvin, apudoh kitnun, a-inneipu komah agavui taove." 
Acts5:11 Chuin houbung pumpi chungle chucheng thu jaho jouse chungah kichatna nasatah achutan ahi. 
Acts5:12 Chule mipi ho lah-a melchihna le thil kidang tamtah solchah ho khutna konin akibol jengtan ahi. Amaho chu lungkhat tah-in Solomon kempum'a chun aumun ahi. 
Acts5:13 Ahin midang koimachan amaho lah-a lhah ding chu angapchapon ahi: ahinla mipin amaho chu avesang lheh-ui. 
Acts5:14 Chule atahsana numei le pasal Pakai henga akibelap jengun; 
Acts5:15 Chutitah chun Peter avale komle ale beh mi phabep chunga achuhna dingin, damlouho khosung lamlenah ahinpouvin jalkhun le talaijah alupsah jiuvin ahi." 
Acts5:16 Chule Jerusalem kimvela khopiho-a konin mipi chu ahung khomun, adamlouho le lhagaoboh bolgimho ahinpuijun ahile, abonchau chun boldamin aumjitaove." 
Acts5:17 Ahin thempu chungnungle aloiho jouse (amaho chu Saddukai loi ahiuvin), lunghan nan adimun," 
Acts5:18 Akipat doh-un, solchah ho chu amanun, jalhang henna-a ahentauve." 
Acts5:19 Ahinla jan-in Pakai vantil'in kot ahongin, amaho pamah apuidoh-in, ajah uva," 
Acts5:20 Cheovinlang houin'ah gadingun, hiche hinna thu jouse hi miho gahilun, ati." 
Acts5:21 Chuin hichu ajah phatnun, ajing khovah matah-in houin'a alut paijun athu ahiltaove. Ahin thempu chungnung chu aumpi aloihotoh ahungin, houvaipoloile Israel chate a-upaho chengseu akou khomin, khatteho chu gapui dingin songkul in'a chun mi asoltan ahi." 
Acts5:22 Ahinla sottol hochu ahunguva songkul sunga ahung mulou phatnun, amaho akileuvin ahenguva," 
Acts5:23 Songkul inla bitkeijin akikhahchahnan, angahho jong kotphunga adin jingu kagatoh-un, kot kahonule asungah koima kamutapouve, agatiuve." 
Acts5:24 Chuin thempu chungnungle houin vaipo, chule thempu pipuihon thu hicheng chu ajah phatnun, hichea kon chun ipi ahung sohdoh tadem, tin achung changuvah alung dong lheh jeng taovin ahi." 
Acts5:25 Chuin mi khat ahungin ajah uva, Veuvin songkul'a nahenhou chu houin'ah adingun miho thu ahilui, ahung ti." 
Acts5:26 Chutah-in vaipo chu sottol hotoh akonun kangchan agapuijui; ajehchu miho chun songin eisep getnunte ti akichatnu ahi. 
Acts5:27 Chuin apuilut phatnun, amaho chu houvaipoloi ang sungah adinsah-un: chule thempu chungnung chun amaho chu adongin," 
Acts5:28 Hiche min hin mi hildaovin, tia hachang khama kakhamu nahiu hilouham? ahin veuvin, nathuhilu Jerusalem nadipsoh taove; chule hichepa thisan phu hi keiho chunga chuhsah dingin nagouve, ati." 
Acts5:29 Ahivangin Peter le solchah ho chun adonbutnun, Mihem thu sanga Pathen thua kanunjoh dingu ahi." 
Acts5:30 Ipu ipateu Pathen'in nanghon thinga nakhai uva natha-u Jesu chu akaithou tan ahi. 
Acts5:31 Ama chu Pathen'in Israelte lungheina dingle chonset ngaidamna dinga, Pipui le Huhhingpu hidinga akhut jetna achoisang ahitai." 
Acts5:32 Chule hitiho-a hi Ama dinga ahetoh-a keiho kahiuve; chule athua nungho dinga Pathen'in apeh Lhagao Theng jong chu ahi, atiuve." 
Acts5:33 Ahivangin amahon hichu ajahtah-u chun alungchang kikaldoh abang jengun, tha dingin agotauvin ahi." 
Acts5:34 Ahivangin houvaipoloi lah-a mi khat, Pharisai mi, amin Gamaliel, danthuhil, mijousen ajalheh ahin, adingdoh in, solchah ho chu chom chakhat soldoh dingin thu apetan ahi." 
Acts5:35 Chuin aman ajah uva, Nangho Israel mite, hiteho chunga nathil bol gotnu hi chingthei jun." 
Acts5:36 Ijeh-inem itile tumasang lai chun Theudas kiti mi khat asohdoh-in, ama chun milen kahi atin; ama henga chun mi ja li jen akaijin; chuin ama chu athat taovin ahile, athua nungho jouse chu acheh gamun, ima hilou asohtaove." 
Acts5:37 Hichepa jouma chun, min kisut laijin, Galilee gama Judas aumdoh kitleuvin, ahenga mi kimkhat aloimangin; ama jong chu amangthah-in, athua nungho jouse jong acheh gamtaovin ahi." 
Acts5:38 Chule tu-a kaseipeh nahiuve, Hiche miho-a kon khun kikhin dalun, limsah daovin; ijeh-inem itile hiche thil kingaito le thil kibola hi mihem phudoh ahile, suhmangin hung umnante." 
Acts5:39 Ahivangin Pathen'a kon ahile, sumangjou pouvin nate; ajole Pathen kidoupi hikha getnun nate, ati." 
Acts5:40 Chuin ama sei chu aphatsah-un, solchah ho chu akouvun, avovin, Jesu minin thu sei kit hihhelun tin akhamun, alhataove." 
Acts5:41 Hitichun houvaipoloi anga kon chun achedoh-un, Amin jala jachatna thoh dinga kiloma sim ahi jeh-un, akipah lheh-un ahi." 
Acts5:42 Chuin niseh-in houin le in tinah Jesu Christa thuhil le seiphong atangdeh pouve. 
Acts6:1 Hiche lai chun seijui ho amijat apunbe cheh cheh phatnun, niseh thil kihoma ameithaiteu adon lou jeh-un, Hebrew ho chunga Greek gam Juda ho aphun taovin ahi." 
Acts6:2 Chuin somleni ho chun seijui mipi chu akou khomun, Keihon Pathen thu pailhah-a anneh thulam jeng kangaito dingu chu adol ahipoi." 
Acts6:3 Hijeh chun, sopite, hiche kina hi kapansah thei dingu, nalah uva konin seiphat chang, Lhagao Theng le chihna dimset mi sagi lhengdoh-un;" 
Acts6:4 Ahin keiho vang taona le thu lhacha-a kapandet jing jeng dingu ahi, atiuve." 
Acts6:5 Hiche thua chun mi jouse chu alunglhaijun, tahsan le Lhagao Thenga dimset Stephen toh, Philip toh, Prochorus toh, Nicanor toh, Timon toh, Parmenas, chule Juda chona chon Antioch kho-a Nicolas, hicheng chu alheng doh-un," 
Acts6:6 Solchah ho angah adinsah-un; chuin atao jouvun, achunguvah akhut angam taove." 
Acts6:7 Chuin Pathen thu chu ahung chaljal tan, chule Jerusalem'a seijui ho amijat hapunin apung lhehjeng taovin; thempuho jong tamtah tahsan thun anung taovin ahi." 
Acts6:8 Chuin Stephen chu tahsanna le thilboltheina dimin, mi lah-a thil kidang le melchihna loupitah aboljin ahi." 
Acts6:9 Ahivangin Libertine kikhopna atiu kikhopna-a miho phabep, (Cyrene mi, Alexandria mi, chule Cilicia mihole Asia gam miho) akipat doh-un, Stephen chu akinelpi taove." 
Acts6:10 Ahivangin aman Lhagao le chihna-a athusei chu anelthei tapouvin ahi. 
Acts6:11 Chuin amahon mi atilgu uvin, Hichepa hin Mosi le Pathen ataitom kajauve ati sah-un ahi." 
Acts6:12 Chuin amahon mipi ho, upaho, chule danthu sunho chu atilseuvin, Stephen chunga achuvin, amanun, houvaipoloi henga akaijun ahi." 
Acts6:13 Amahon hettohsah lhem asemun, hicheho chun, Hichepa hin hiche Intheng hile dan hi tanglouva ataitomjia;" 
Acts6:14 Hiche Nazareth Jesu hin hiche Intheng hi aphet lhah-a, Mosi danthu peh hi abol lamdang ding ahitai, tia asei kajauve, atiuvin ahi." 
Acts6:15 Chuin vaihom na-a touho jouse chun, amachu ave veuvin ahile, amaiso vantil maiso bangin amuvin ahi." 
Acts7:1 Chuin Thempu chungnung chun, Hiche thuho hi atahbeh ham? ati." 
Acts7:2 Chuin Stephen'in, Sopite le pate, ngaijun: Ipuluiju Abraham Haran kho-a achen masanga Mesopotamia gama aum laijin, loupi Pathen ahenga akilah-in ajah-a," 
Acts7:3 Nagam sunga kon le na-insung mite lah-a konin kipatdoh-in, chule keiman kavetsah ding gama hungin, ati." 
Acts7:4 Chutah-in ama Chaldia gama konin ahungdoh-in, Haran'ah achengtan ahi; chuin hia kon chun apa thi nungin, Pathen'in, tu-a nachennao, hiche gama hin achenlut sahtai." 
Acts7:5 Ahin chua chun Pathen'in akengto ngapna kham jong mun alo ding apepoi. Ahivang chun amale anunga asonho geijin alo dinguva kapeh ding ahi tin, chapa anei loulai peh chun athutep tan ahi." 
Acts7:6 Chuin Pathen'in, asonho chu hetlou gama pem ding, chule amahon soh-a aloilut dingu, chule kum jali jen kinomsahna anei dingu ahi, tin anaseijin ahi." 
Acts7:7 Chule asohchan nateu vaipi chu keiman athu-u katan ding; chuche joule hung potdoh uva, hiche kom mun'a hi keima eijen dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts7:8 Chuin kitepna cheptan thu apen; chutichun Abraham'in Isaac ahingin, aniget nin achep atanin; chuin Isaac chun Jacob ahingin, Jacob'in pului somleni chu ahingin ahi." 
Acts7:9 Chuin puluiho chun Joseph chunga thangset abolun, Egypt gama ajoh mangun; ahinla Pathen'in ama chu aumpin," 
Acts7:10 Agim agentheina jouse-a konin ahuhdoh-in, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh ang sungah khotonale chihna apen, chuin aman Egypt gam chungale, ama insung jouse chunga gamvaipon apansahtai." 
Acts7:11 Chuin Egypt gam sung jousele Canaan gama kel alhan, gentheina chungnung tah alhungin ahile; ipului teovin neh ding amu tapouvin ahi." 
Acts7:12 Ahivangin Jacob chun, Egypt gama anneh aume ti ajah jah-in, ipu ipateu chu amasa penin agah soldoh-e." 
Acts7:13 Chuin aniveina-in Joseph chun asopite chu akihetdoh sahtan ahile, Joseph insungmi chu Pharaoh hetchenin aumtai." 
Acts7:14 Chuin Joseph'in mi asolin, apale a-inkote abonchan mi somsagi le nga chu ama heng lamah agakou sahtai." 
Acts7:15 Chuin Jacob Egypt lama achesuh-in; chuin athitan, ipu ipateu jong athi taove;" 
Acts7:16 Chuin alongu chu Shechem'a apo galkaijun, Abraham'in Shechem'a Hamor chapatehoa kona dangka-a achoh lhana chun alupsah taove." 
Acts7:17 Chuin Pathen'in Abraham athutep chu aguilhun aphat alhin konin, miho chu Egypt gama apungun atamcheh atamcheh jengun," 
Acts7:18 Joseph hephalou leng chom khat Egypt gam chunga avaipoh gei chun. 
Acts7:19 Hichepa chun ivaiju dohathemin abolin, ipu ipateu chu abol gentheijin, achasen hou chu ahin louna dingin apaidoh sah jin ahi." 
Acts7:20 Hiche lai chun Mosi apengin ahile, Pathen'a dingin ahoi lheh jengin; apa in'ah lha thum avah-un;" 
Acts7:21 Chuin ama akoidoh phatnun, Pharao chanun akilahdoh-in, achapa dingin akivahtan ahi." 
Acts7:22 Chuin Mosi chu Egypt miho chihna le themna jouse ahilun; chuin ama chu thu le thilbolin thahat tah ahitai. 
Acts7:23 Chuin ama chu kum somli alhin phatnin, asopiho Israelte chu gavil ding alunga aumtan ahi." 
Acts7:24 Chuin alah uva khat alam louhela bolgenthei thoh amun ahile ahuh-in, bolgenthei thohpa phu chu alan Egypt mipa chu avolih tai;" 
Acts7:25 Aman, Pathen'in ama khutna amaho chu ahuhdoh ding ahi chu asopiho chun henaovinte ati ahin; hinla amahon ahepouve." 
Acts7:26 Chuin ajingin alah uva mi ni akidelin ahile ama ahenguva agachen, suhcham ding agon; Vo miteni, nangni sopicha nahiuve; ibola nanghole nangho ahilouva nakiboltou ham? ati." 
Acts7:27 Ahivangin aheng akom ahilouva bolpa chun ama chu asondoh-in, Keiho chunga vaipole thutana koiham natunga?" 
Acts7:28 Jani-a Egypt mipa natha banga chu tha dinga neigot ham? ati. 
Acts7:29 Hiche aseija chun Mosi ajamin, Media gama apemin, chukoma chun chapa ni ahinge." 
Acts7:30 Chuin kum somli alhin phatnin, Sinai mol gamthipmah, Pakai vantil'in hamboh-a meikongin akimusah-in;" 
Acts7:31 Chuin Mosi'n hichu amu phatnin, athilmu chu kidang asan; chuin agavechen dingin agache naijin ahile, chua chun Pakai aw ahung gingin," 
Acts7:32 Keima napu napate Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, Jacob Pathen kahi, ati. Hichun Mosi akihot hot jengin ave ngam tapoi." 
Acts7:33 Chuin Pakai chun ajah-a, Nakenga konin nakengchot chu sutlhan; ijeh-inem itile nadinna mun chu mun theng ahi." 
Acts7:34 Egypt gama um kamite hesoh genthei chentah-in kamun, apenu kajan, ahuhdoh dinguva hung kumlha kahi; tun hungin nangma Egypt gamah solinge, ati." 
Acts7:35 Hiche Mosi, Keiho chunga vaipole thutana koiham natunga, tia aledohpa tah-u chu, Pathen'in hamboh-a akimusah vantil chu akithopin asemin, vaipo le huhdoh hikop dingin asoltan ahi." 
Acts7:36 Ama chun Egypt gamah, chule twikhanglen san le gamthipmah kum somli sungin thil kidang dangle melchihna abolin, amaho chu apuidohtai." 
Acts7:37 Pakai na Pathen'un nangho dinga, nasopiteu lah-a kona keima tobang themgao khat asodoh sah ding, athu nangaidiu ahi, tia Israel chate jah-a seija hiche Mosi chu ahi." 
Acts7:38 Sinai molsanga ajah-a thuseija vantil le ipu ipateu toh gamthip gama houbung'a umkhoma, chule eiho pehson ding hinna thu mu-a ama chu ahi." 
Acts7:39 Ipu ipateovin ama thua nun ding chu anom hih-un, ama asondoh-un, Egypt lama alungu aheijun," 
Acts7:40 Aaron jah-a, eilamkai dingu pathenho neisem peh-un; ijeh-inem itile Egypt gama kona eipuidoh uva Mosi la hoija itia ahi kahepouve, atiuve." 
Acts7:41 Chuin amahon hiche pet chun bongnou lim asemun, milim houna ding chun gan athatnun, amaho khut sema chun athanomun ahi." 
Acts7:42 Hijeh chun Pathen'in akiheimang sanin, van janelpi hou dingin amaho chu alhatai. Themgaoho lekhabua, Vo Israelte, gamthip gama chu kum somli sunga sa kithat le ganlha-a keima neihou jiuvem?" 
Acts7:43 Nanghon Molok Ponbuh le pathen Rephan ahsi hou dinga alim nasemu napoleji bouvui. Hijeh-a chu keiman nangho Babylon kal lampeh-a Katol mang ding nahiuve, tia kisei bang chu ahi." 
Acts7:44 Alim kigon namu bang bang chun houbuh san, tia Mosi hilpa thupeh dungjuija kisa hettohsahna houbuh chu, gamthip gama chu ipu ipateovin ananeiju ahi." 
Acts7:45 Chujouvin ipu ipateu le Joshua'in hichu aneisonpeh-un, ipu ipateu masang sanga Pathen'in anodohho vaipiho gam alo laiju chun apo lutpeh-un, David nikho lai geijin aumin;" 
Acts7:46 Ama chun Pathen mitmu-a deisahna amun, Jacob Pathen umna ding athumin;" 
Acts7:47 Ahinla in chu Solomon'in asahpeh jobove. 
Acts7:48 Ahi jeng vangin, Chungnung pen chu khutna kisa houin'a chun achengpoi; themgaovin," 
Acts7:49 Pakaiyin, Van katouna ahin, lei ka kengphang ngapna ahi; itobang in neisahpeh dingham? Kacholngahna mun hoikom ham?" 
Acts7:50 Thil jouse hi aboncha kakhut sem hilouham? ati, tia asei banga chu." 
Acts7:51 Nangho milouchal teho, lungsung le nakhanga chep tanlou teho, nanghon a-imatih chanin Lhagao Theng nadoudal jingui; napu napateu bol bang chu nanghon nabolui." 
Acts7:52 Themgao koipen chu napu napateu vin abolset lou umam? Chondihtah hung ding thu sei masaho athatgamun; tun amatah chu amatsah le athatnin nangho napangui; 
Acts7:53 chule vantil thupeh ahi tia nalah sonu danthu chu nanitpouve, ati." 
Acts7:54 Chuin thu chucheng ajahtah-un, alungchang kikaldoh abang jengun, aha agoi khumun ahi." 
Acts7:55 Ahivangin ama Lhagao Theng adimsetnin, van lam ave aven ahile, Pathen loupile, Pathen khut jet lama Jesu adin chu amun," 
Acts7:56 Veuvin, vanho akihona Pathen khut jet lama Mihem Chapa adin kamui, ati." 
Acts7:57 Ahivangin amaho hatah-in a-aosot jengun, akol asimun, thakhat tah-in anovin;" 
Acts7:58 Chuin khopam lama anodoh-un, songin asep aseptaove. Ahetohho chun Saul atiu gollhang khat keng khophang koma apon chengseu akoijun ahi." 
Acts7:59 Chutia chu amahon Stephen songa ase pettah-u chun ama ataovin, Pakai Jesu, kalhagao lan, ati." 
Acts7:60 Chuin adilsun hatah-in asamin, Pakai, hiche chonsetna hi amaho minin sun hih-in, ati. Chuin hiche chu aseijin a-imu damdel tai." 
Acts8:1 Saul jong chun athao chu aphatsah ahi. Chuche ni-a pat chun Jerusalem'a um houbung suhmangna dinga bolsetna khohtah aum pantan ahile, solchah ho chengse tailou adang chengse, Juda gamle Samaria gamah avahcheh taovin ahi." 
Acts8:2 Pathen'a kipetum ho chun Stephen chu avuijun hakan akauve. 
Acts8:3 Saul vang chun houbung suhmangna habolin abolin, intin-ah alutnin anumei apasal'in ajandoh-in, songkul'a akhum akhumin ahi." 
Acts8:4 Hijeh chun avahchehho chu gamtinah avahleuvin, thu chu ahille taove." 
Acts8:5 Chuin Philip Samaria khopi-a achesuh-in, ajah uva Christa chu aphongjal letai." 
Acts8:6 Chuin melchihna abol ho chu amuva athuseiho ajah phatnun, mipi chengse chun Philip thusei ho chu lungkhat tahle lunglut tah-in angaitaove." 
Acts8:7 Ajehchu lhagao boh vop mi tamtah-a konin lhagao bohho chu hapen nin apengun, ahung potdoh-un; chule langthi le elbai jong tamtah boldama um ahi." 
Acts8:8 Chuin chuche khopi sunga chun kipa thanop nasatah aumtan ahi. 
Acts8:9 Ahivangin hiche khopi-a chun amin Simon kiti mitpheldoi choi khat anaumin, ama chun milen khat kahi tia Samaria miho chu kidang satah-a anaumsah ahi:" 
Acts8:10 Amahon ama thu chu anangai lheh jengun, aneopena pat alenpen geijin, Hichepa hi Pathen thahat chungnung chu ahi, atiu ahi." 
Acts8:11 Sotpeh-a pat aman amitpheldoija amaho chu kidang satah-a aumsahsa ahi jeh-a, athu angai lheh jengu ahi." 
Acts8:12 Ahivangin Philip'in Pathen lenggam thu le Jesu Christa min ahillhang atahsan phatnun, anumei apasal'in baptize achang taove." 
Acts8:13 Chule Simon, amatah jongin atahsantan, baptize achan jouvin Philip toh aum khomjom lhonin, melchihna le bolmo thil kidang kibolho chu amun, kidang asa lheh jengin ahi." 
Acts8:14 Chuin Jerusalem'a um solchah hon Samaria mihon Pathen thu ajoptaove ti ajah phatnun, Peter le John agahsol taove." 
Acts8:14 Chuin Jerusalem'a um solchah hon Samaria mihon Pathen thu ajoptaove ti ajah phatnun, Peter le John agahsol taove." 
Acts8:15 Amani chu alhunsuh phat lhonin, Lhagao Theng achan theina dingun amaho ding chun ataopeh lhone;" 
Acts8:16 Ajehchu hiche geija chu alah uva khatchabeh chunga chu loulai ahin; Pakai Jesu mina baptize changmai maibou anahiuve. 
Acts8:17 Chutah chun alu chunguva akhut angam lhonin ahile, Lhagao Theng achang taove." 
Acts8:18 Chuin Simon'in solchah ho khut ngap vanga Lhagao Theng kipeh chu amun, amani chu sum peh agon," 
Acts8:19 Koi chung koi chung hijongle kakhut kangaple ama chu Lhagao Theng achan jeng jengna dingin, keima jong hiche thilboltheina hi neipeuvin, ati." 
Acts8:20 Ahivangin Peter'in ajah-a, Nangman Pathen thilpeh suma choh dinga nangaito jeh chun, nasum chu nangtoh manthan!" 
Acts8:21 Pathen mitmu-a nalungput adih lou jeh chun, hiche thua hin lhahna naneipoi, chan jong naneipoi." 
Acts8:22 Hijeh chun hiche nagitlouna-a konhin nalung heijin, nalung sunga gitlou natup chu angaidam theikhat le Pathen henga taovin." 
Acts8:23 Ajehchu Chonsetna khatveng vungna thinkha-a lhalutna, chule gitlouna-a kikan nahi chu kahedohtai, ati." 
Acts8:24 Chuin Simon'in adonbutnin ajah-a, Nathuseiho chu khatcha jong kachunga alhun louna dingin, Pakai henga neitao peh-un, ati." 
Acts8:25 Hiche chun amanin Pakai thu ahettohsah lhona asei jou lhonin, Jerusalem lama akile kit lhonin, Samaria kho tamtah-ah Kipana Thupha chu ahil lhangpeh lhontai." 
Acts8:26 Chuin Pakai vantil khatnin Philip jah-a thu aseijin, Kipatdoh inlang lhang lama Jerusalem'a kona Gaza jotna lampi-a khun chesuh-in; chumun chu gamthip ahi, ati." 
Acts8:27 Chuin ama akipatdoh-in achetai; chule veuvin, Ethiopia gama mi khat nukiso, Ethiopia lengnu Candace noija thunei chungnung tah, agou jouse chunga vaihom, Jerusalem'a Pathen hou dinga chea ahin;" 
Acts8:28 Akile kit lama kangtalai ja akitol puma themgao Isaiah lekhabu chu asim ahi. 
Acts8:29 Chuin Lhagaovin Philip jah-a, Khuche kangtalai khu naijin lang kiloipin, ati." 
Acts8:30 Chuin Philip ahenga alhaijin ahile, Isaiah themgao lekha chu asim ajan, ahengah, Nasim chu nahet nah-em? ati." 
Acts8:31 Chuin aman, Mi khattouvin eihilchet loule iti kahet thei dingham? ati. Chuin Philip chu kangtalai chunga kaldoh-a akoma tou dingin akoutai." 
Acts8:32 Amapan Pathen lekhabu anasim asimmun lai chu hiche hi ahi: Ama chu tha dinga kikai kelngoi bangin akaijun; kelngoi nou amul vouho anga hampoh louhela aum bangin, Ama jong akam kapoi." 
Acts8:33 Akineosah nalamin achunga thutan dih aki subeijin; akhang thu koiham aseiphong dinga? ijeh-inem itile leisetna kona ahinna asuhmangu ahi. 
Acts8:34 Chuin nukiso chun Philip adonbutnin, Themgao chun hiche hi koi thudola aseiham? Ama thudola aseiha, midang thudola aseiham? ati." 
Acts8:35 Chuin Philip akamkan, chuche Pathen lekhabua thua chun apanin, Jesu thu aseitan ahi." 
Acts8:36 Chuti chun lampi-a chu ache che lhonle, twi umna mun khat agei lhonin; chuin nukiso chun, Ven, hikoma twi aume; baptize kachanmona ding ipi umam ati." 
Acts8:37 Chuin Philip'in, nangman nalung pumpi-a natahsan le chang thei jin nate, ati. Chuin aman adonbutnin, Jesu Christa chu Pathen Chapa ahi ti katahsane, ati." 
Acts8:38 Chuin akangtalai chu angahsah-in, Philip le nukiso chu ani lhonin twijah akumlha lhonin, chuin Philip'in ama chu baptize achansah tai." 
Acts8:39 Chuin twija kona ahungdoh lhon phatnin, Pakai Lhagaovin Philip chu alhohmang tan ahile nukiso chun amukit tapon, kipah thanom tah-a achena dinga achepaitan ahi." 
Acts8:40 Philip vang chu Azotus khopi-a amudoh-ui. Chuin aman ajotpaijin, Caesaria alhun kahsen khopitinah Kipana Thupha chu ahillhang pehtan ahi." 
Acts9:1 Saul vang chu Pakai seijui ho gihsal le that dingin ahai haina laijin, thempu chungnung henga achen," 
Acts9:2 Chuche lampi tahsan chan chu koi hijongle amu mu numei jong pasal jong akana Jerusalem'a ahinkai theina dingin, Damascus-a kikhopnaho-a dingin lekha agathume." 
Acts9:3 Hichun achele Damascus kho alhun ding konin, phulou helouvin van'a kon vah khatnin avel asalvah soh jenge." 
Acts9:4 Chuin ama tolah alhun, chule ajah-a, Saul, Saul, nangin ibola suhmang dinga neibolset jingham? tia kisei aw ajan ahi." 
Acts9:5 Chuin aman, Pakai, nang koi nahim? ati. Chuin Pakai chun, Suhmang dinga nabolset Jesu chu kahi, nang dingin thihtul monghem lho ahahsai;" 
Acts9:6 Chule aman kithing pumle lungdong tah-in, Pakai ipi neibolsah nom em? atin ahi. Chuin Pakai chun ajah-a, Thouvin lang khopi sunga luttan; chule nabol ding nakiseipeh ding ahi, ati." 
Acts9:7 Chule alhonpiho chu pao louvin adingun, aw vang chu ajauvin mi koima amupouve." 
Acts9:8 Chuin Saul tolla kon chun athouvin, chuin amit ahasahle ima amutapoi. Hichun akhutnin akaijun Damascus'a chun apuilut taove." 
Acts9:9 Chuin khomu lou leh an ne lou twi don louvin ni thum aumin ahi. 
Acts9:10 Tun Damascus-a chu amin Ananias atiu seijui khat uma ahin; Pakai chun gaovin akimusah-in ajah-a, Vo Ananias, atin ahile, aman, Ven, Pakai, hikoma kaumnai, ati." 
Acts9:11 Chuin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Kipatdoh-in, Lamjang atiu khosung lamlena khun gachenlang, Judas in'ah Tarsus kho-a mi amin Saul atiu chu gaholin; ijeh-inem itile ven, ama atao pettah ahi;" 
Acts9:12 Chule aman mi khat amin Ananias ahunga, kho amu theina dinga alu chunga akhut angap amui, ati." 
Acts9:13 Ahivangin Ananias'in adonbutnin, Pakai, keiman chuche mipa umchan, Jerusalem'a nangma mithengho itobanga khoh-a abolsetje thu chu mi tamtah-a kona kajah ahitai;" 
Acts9:14 Chule hikoma jong nangma min pan jouse kan dinga thempu pipuiho-a kona thu anei ahi, ati." 
Acts9:15 Ahivangin Pakaiyin ajah-a, Chen: amakhu chidang namdangho henga, lengho henga, chule Israel chate henga kamin polutle dinga kamanchah lhen hija ahi." 
Acts9:16 Ijeh-inem itile aman keima min jala ichana genthei hesoh athoh ding ham kavetsah ding ahi, ati." 
Acts9:17 Chuin Ananias chu agachen, in'a chun alutnin, chuin alu chungah akhut angamin; Sopi Saul, nahunga lampia nakimusah Pakai Jesu chun kho namu theina dingle Lhagao Thenga nadimna dinga eihinsol ahi, ati." 
Acts9:18 Chuin chupettah chun amitna konin lip tobang ahung pullhan ahile kho amutai; chuin ama akipatdoh-in baptize achangtai. 
Acts9:19 Chuin an anen, atha ahattai. Chujouvin ni ijat-ham Damascus-a seijui ho toh aum khomtaove." 
Acts9:20 Chuin kikhopna intin-ah Christa chu Pathen Chapa ahi thudol ahillhang paitan ahi. 
Acts9:21 Chuin athusei ja jouse chun kidang asa lheh jengun, Jerusalem'a hiche min panho jouse sucheh-a chu ama hi hilou hija, Chule amaho chu kanchoma thempu pipuiho henga kailut dinga hikoma hunga hilou ham? atiuve." 
Acts9:22 Saul chula athahat akhang cheh cheh-in, hiche Jesu hi Christa ahi mong monge ti photchena aseijin, Damascus-a um Juda ho chu anel khupjin akisuh dongsah jitan ahi." 
Acts9:23 Chuin ni tamtah jouvin, Juda ho chu Saul that dingin akihousom taove." 
Acts9:24 Ahivangin agutuhnau chu Saul'in ahedohtai. Chuin amahon ama chu atha theina dingun sunle jan-in kotpiho jong chu angahjiuvin ahi; 
Acts9:25 Ahinla aseijuihon jan-in apuijun, bomin kul pangah akhailha taovin ahi." 
Acts9:26 Chuin ama Jerusalem alhunin, seijuiho toh kiloi ding agon ahile, amahon ama chu seijui khat ahi ti atahsan lou jeh-un, akichao vin ahi." 
Acts9:27 Ahin Barnabas'in apuijin solchah ho henga apui lutnin, ajah uva, Lampia Pakai amua, ajah-a thu asei, chule Damascus-a hakat tah-a Jesu min ahillhangle chu aseitan ahi." 
Acts9:28 Chuin ama amaho chutoh Jerusalem'a alutle apotleuvin," 
Acts9:29 Pakai Jesu minin hakattah-in ahillhanglen, chule Greek gam Juda ho chu anelkalin; ahinla amahon ama tha dingin agotauvin ahi." 
Acts9:30 Chuin sopiten hichu ahet phatnun, Caesaria-a apuilhasuh-un, Tarsus kho-a asolmang taove." 
Acts9:31 Chutichun Judah gam sungse-a, Galilee gam sungse-a, chule Samaria gam sungse-a houbung chu adet chehcheh-un, mongtah-in aumtaove; chule Pakai gingpuma hinkho mangin, Lhagao Theng lungmonsahna achangun, amaho apung tultul taovin ahi." 
Acts9:32 Chuin ahitin ahi, Peter gamtina avahle avahlen, Lydda'a um mitheng ho heng geijin agalhung suh tai." 
Acts9:33 Chukoma chun, mi khat amin Aeneas atiu, alangthi jeh-a kum get ajalkhuna lum agamudoh-in ahi." 
Acts9:34 Chuin Peter'in ajah-a, Aeneas, Jesu Christan nadamsah ahitai: thouvin lang nalupna kisemin, ati. Chuin chupettah chun ama athoudoh paijenge." 
Acts9:35 Chuin Lydda'a cheng jousele Sharon'a cheng jousen ama chu amuvin, Pakai lamah akihei taove." 
Acts9:36 Joppa-a chu seijui khat amin Tabitha atiu aumin, hichu Dorcas tina ahin, amanu chu thilphabol le mi thilpeh-a bulhingtah ahi." 
Acts9:37 Chule ahitin ahi, hiche laichun ama chu anan ahile athitai; chuin amahon asilun, indan chungnunga alupsah taove." 
Acts9:38 Chuin Lydda chu Joppa kom nai ahi jeh chun, seijui hon chua chun Peter aume ti ajauvin, geisang louva ahenguva ahung nadingin, ahenga mi ni asolun ahi." 
Acts9:39 Chuin Peter akipatdoh-in amani chutoh alhontai. Chuin alhunin amahon indan chungnunga chun apuijun; meithaiho jouse chu akimvela adingun kap pumin, Dorcas'in ahin laija abolpeh-u sangkhol le ponsil hochu avetsah-un ahi." 
Acts9:40 Ahivangin Peter'in amaho chu abonchauvin apotdoh sah-in, adilsun ataotai. Chuin along lama chun akiheijin, Tabitha, thouvin, ati. Chuin aman un amit ahinha sah-in; chuin Peter amu phat chun atoudoh tai." 
Acts9:41 Chuin aman akhut apen akaithou tai; chuin mithengho le meithaiho akouvin, amanu chu ahingin apetai." 
Acts9:42 Chuin hichu Joppa kho-a jouse chun ahesoh taovin, mi tamtah-in Pakai chu atahsan taove." 
Acts9:43 Chuin ahitin ahi, Peter chu Joppa kho-a savun sem Simon in'ah ni tamtah aumin ahi." 
Acts10:1 Caesaria-ah mi khat amin Cornelius atiu aumin, Italy loi atiu sepai jalamkai ahin;" 
Acts10:2 Pathen ngaisahtah le a-insung mi jousetoh Pathen gingtah, miho ngailut thilpeh tamtah peji-a, chule Pathen henga tao jingjia ahi." 
Acts10:3 Ni khat kolbunoi hon phat donin, Pathen vantil khat ahenga kichen tah-a gaova ahunga, Cornelius, ahung ti amun ahi." 
Acts10:4 Chuin aman ama chu ave aven, akichan, Ipiham, Pakai, ati. Chuin ama chun ajah-a, Nataonaho le nami thilpehho chu geldoh jing dingin Pathen angah alhung toutai." 
Acts10:5 Chule tun nangman Joppa-a mi solinlang, Simon amin chom Peter asah-u chu gakousah-in;" 
Acts10:6 Ama twikhanglen panga Simon atiu savun sem mi khat in'ah alhunge; aman ipi nabol ding nahil nan nate, ati." 
Acts10:7 Chuin Cornelius jah-a thusei vantil chu achedoh phatnin, a-insung lhachaho lah-a mi nile ajenlea pang jingho lah-a Pathen ngaisahtah sepai khat akouvin," 
Acts10:8 Thu jouse chu abonchan ajah uva aseisoh phatnin, Joppa-a asoltan ahi." 
Acts10:9 Ajingin amaho ache acheuva khopi chu alhun ding konun, Peter chu tao dingin sunkim donin in chungah akaltouve." 
Acts10:10 Chuin hatah-in agilkeltan an aneh nom-in ahi; ahinla aneh ding agotpeh laitah-un agaochangin; 
Acts10:11 Van akihona bom khat ponlhe lentah banga aning li-a kikhit, tolla ahung kikhai lhah amun;" 
Acts10:12 Asunga chun leiset chunga akengli sa namkim, tolla vah ganhing namkim, chule chunga leng vacha namkim aumin ahi." 
Acts10:13 Chuin ahenga aw khat ahungin, Thouvin, Peter; kithanlang nen, ati." 
Acts10:14 Ahivangin Peter'in, Chutiponte Pakai! ajeh chu keiman imatih chanin thilboh le athenglou kanekhapoi, ati." 
Acts10:15 Chuin aniveina-in aw khat ahung kitnin, Pathen'in asuhthengsa chu nangman aboh ti hih-in, ati." 
Acts10:16 Chuin hitichun thumvei ahung umin, bom chu van'ah akikhaitou kittan ahi." 
Acts10:17 Chuin Peter'in agaochana amu chu ipi tina ahidem tia alunggim pettah chun, veuvin, Cornelius mi sol hochun Simon in ahin holun, kelkot phunga adingun;" 
Acts10:18 Chule akouvun, Simon amin chom Peter chu hikoma chu lhungam tin adongui." 
Acts10:19 Chuin Peter'in agaochanna amu chu angaito pettah-in Lhagaovin ajah-a, Ven, mi thumin nahole." 
Acts10:20 Hijeh chun thouvin lang kumlha suh-in, lung sa-ih louhelin amaho khutoh lhonin; ijeh-inem itile amaho khu keima sol ahiuve, ati." 
Acts10:21 Chuin Peter Cornelius-a kona ama henga hungkisol miho henga chun akumlha suh-in, Veuvin, naholu chu keima hi kahi; ibola hunga nahiuvem? ati." 
Acts10:22 Chuin amahon, Mi chondihtah, Pathen ging, Juda vaipin aseiphat, Cornelius sepai jalamkai chu nangma hung kousah-a a-in'a nathusei ngai dingin, Pathen'a konin vantil theng khatnin ahilin ahi, atiuve." 
Acts10:23 Chuin aman amaho chu akou lutnin alhunsahtai. Ajingin Peter amaho chutoh alhondoh-in, chule Joppa-a konin sopiho koi koihamin alhonpiuvin ahi." 
Acts10:24 Chuin ajingin Caesaria aluttaovin, chule Cornelius chun a-inkote le ajol agol chengse anakou khomin, amaho chu anangah jingun ahi." 
Acts10:25 Chuin Peter agalutnin ahile Cornelius'in agalamton, akengphang bulah aboh khupmin, ahoutan ahi." 
Acts10:26 Ahivangin Peter'in akaithouvin, Dingdoh-in, keima jong mihem kahibouve ati." 
Acts10:27 Chuin ama chutoh ahoulim lim pumin agalutnin ahile mi tamtah kikhom agamun ahi. 
Acts10:28 Chuin aman ajah uva, Juda min jat dang mi khat akiloipia, chule namdang henga ache chu dan ngai ahilou chu nanghon naheuve; ahinla Pathen'in keiman mi koima aboh le athenglou kati louna dinga eimusah ahitai:" 
Acts10:29 Hijeh-a chu keima jong thupha louhela eikou nahinsolle kahung jeng ahi. Hijeh chun ipi dinga neihung kousah ham? tia kadoh nahi, ati." 
Acts10:30 Chuin Cornelius'in, Ni li masangin tuphat gei hin an kangol-in, chule kolbunoi honphat donin ka-insunga kataovin ahile, ven, ka-anga pon bang kisil mi khat ahung dingin;" 
Acts10:31 Chuin kajah-a, Cornelius, nataonaho kisanga ahitai, chule nami thilpehho jong Pathen mitmu-a geldoh jinga kineija ahitai." 
Acts10:32 Hijeh chun Joppa-a mi solinlang Simon amin chom Peter chu gakousah-in; ama twikhanglen panga savun sem Simon in'ah alhunge, ama chu ahungtengle nahil tante, eiti." 
Acts10:33 Hiche jeh-a chu nakou kahinsol pai jeng ahin, tun nangma nahungin aphalheh jenge. Hijeh chun tun Pathen nin nangma thu napeh ho chengse chu ngai dinga, Pathen mitmu-a kabon chaova hikoma kikhoma kahiuve, ati." 
Acts10:34 Chuin Peter akamkan Tahbeh mongin, Pathen'in mi dat aneipoi, ti kahei;" 
Acts10:35 Ahin namtin lah jouse-a mi koi hijongle ama ginga, chule chonphat bola chu ama dinga lah thei ahi." 
Acts10:36 Pathen'in Israel chate henga thu athot, Jesu Christa'a chamna thu alhangsap, (ama chu mi jouse Pakai ahi);" 
Acts10:37 John'in alhangsap baptize chan nunga, Galilee'a kipanin Juda gam pumpi-a chalsoh thuhi nanghon naheuve." 
Acts10:37 John'in alhangsap baptize chan nunga, Galilee'a kipanin Juda gam pumpi-a chalsoh thuhi nanghon naheuve." 
Acts10:38 Hichu hiti hi ahi, Pathen'in Nazareth Jesu chu Lhagao Theng le loupina-a thao anu ahin, ama muntin-ah avahlen, thilpha abollen, Satan bolgenthei hesohho abonchan aboldamin ahi; hichu Pathen'in aumpi jeh ahi." 
Acts10:39 Chule Juda ho khotin le Jerusalem'a athilbol jouse hetoh keiho kahiuve; ama chu thinga akhaijun athat taove. 
Acts10:40 Ama chu Pathen'in anithum nin akaithouvin, lhangphong tah-in akimusah tai;" 
Acts10:41 Mi jouse heng hilouvin, amasanga Pathen'in alhendoh ahetohho, athodoh nunga amatoh nekhoma donkhom keiho heng ahibouve." 
Acts10:42 Chuin, Ama chu ahingle athi thutan dinga Pathen'in atun ahi ti thu miho hille-a hetsah dingin eithupeh uve." 
Acts10:43 Ama min vanga, ama tahsan chan chu achonset suhbeija umding ahi, tia ama thudol chu themgaoho jousen ahettoh sah sohkeiju ahi, ati." 
Acts10:44 Chuin Peter'in thu chucheng asei pettah chun, athu jaho jouse chunga chun Lhagao Theng ahung chutan ahi." 
Acts10:45 Chuin cheptanho lah-a atahsanho Peter hinlhonpi chengse chun, Lhagao Theng kipe chu chidang namdangho chunga jong akibuh lhah jeh chun adatmo lheh jengui." 
Acts10:46 Ajehchu amahon paochom choma thu aseijuva, Pathen avahchoiju chu ajah-u ahi. Hichun Peter'in adonbutnin," 
Acts10:47 Eiho banga Lhagao Theng changa hiteho baptize chan louna dinga twi kham theija koi umam, ati." 
Acts10:48 Chuin aman Pakai mina baptize chang dingin amaho chu thu apetai. Chuin ni ijat-ham nichong dingin alhotauve. 
Acts11:1 Chuin solchah ho le Juda gama um sopihon chidang namdang hon jong Pathen thu ajoptaove, ti ajataove." 
Acts11:2 Chuin Peter Jerusalem agalhun touvin, cheptanhon ana-oimovin," 
Acts11:3 Cheptan louho in'a nalutnin amahotoh nane khome, atiuve." 
Acts11:4 Ahinla Peter'in abula panin abanchan ajah uva ahilchenin, hitin ati:" 
Acts11:5 Joppa kaumin kataovin, chuin gaochanin mu kaneijin, ponlhe lentah tobang bom aning li-a kikhit van'a konin ahung kikhailhan, keima komlele ahung geijin;" 
Acts11:6 Chuin keiman hichu hoitah-a kavetna kangaitoa ahile, leiset chunga akengli saho, gamsaho, tolla vah akhupbo-a kithol, chule vanlaijola lengle vachaho kamui." 
Acts11:7 Chuin kajah-a thusei aw khat kajan, Thouvin, Peter; kithanlang nen, eiti." 
Acts11:8 Ahivangin keiman, Ahipoi, chutiponte Pakai; keiman imatih chanin thilbohle athenglou kanekhapoi, kati." 
Acts11:9 Ahin aniveina-in aw chun van'a konin eidonbutnin, Pathen'in asuhthengsa chu nangman athenglou ti hih-in, ati." 
Acts11:10 Chuin hitichun thumvei akibolin, abonchan van'ah akikhaitou kit tai." 
Acts11:11 Chuin veuvin, Caesaria kona kahenga hinkisol mi thum chu, kaumnao in kot maija anading jinga ahitaove." 
Acts11:12 Chuin Lhagaovin koima dat bih nei louva amaho chutoh lhon dingin eisole. Hiche sopiho gup jong hin eilhonpiuvin, chuin mipa ina chun kalutnun ahi." 
Acts11:13 Chuin amachun a-in'a vantil adin amua ajah-a, Joppa-a mi solinlang, Simon amin chom Peter chu gapuisah-in;" 
Acts11:14 Ama chun nangmale na-insung mi jouse huhhing-a naumna dingu thu naseipeh ding ahi, tia asei umchan chu kajah uva, aseije." 
Acts11:15 Chuin thu kagah sei patna ahile, atila eiho chunga achuh bang chun Lhagao Theng achunguvah ahung chutai." 
Acts11:16 Chuin keiman Pakai thusei, John'in twija baptize achansahji ahin, nangho vang Lhagao Thenga baptize nachan dingu ahi, ati chu kagel doh-e." 
Acts11:16 Chuin keiman Pakai thusei, John'in twija baptize achansahji ahin, nangho vang Lhagao Thenga baptize nachan dingu ahi, ati chu kagel doh-e." 
Acts11:17 Chutichu ahin, Pakai Jesu Christa itahsan uva eiho eithilpeh banguva chu amaho Pathen'in apehtah-a ahile, kei koi kahia Pathen kakham thei dingham, ati." 
Acts11:18 Chuin amahon thu chucheng ajah phatnun athip taovin, Pathen avahchoijun, chuti ahile Pathen'in chidang namdangho jong hinna dinga lungheina aphalpeh ahitai, atiuve." 
Acts11:19 Hijeh chun Stephen chunga hesoh genthei ana sohdoh jeh-a vahcheh hochu Phoenicia, Cyprus chule Antioch geijin acheuvin, koima dang henga sei louhelin Juda ho heng jenga thu chu aseiletaovin ahi." 
Acts11:20 Ahivangin alah uva mi abang chu Cyprus le Cyrene gam mi ahiuvin, Antioch alhunun Greek miho henga jong thu aseijun, Pakai Jesu asei phongle taove." 
Acts11:21 Chule Pakai khut chun akithopiuvin; chuin atahsana mi atama tam Pakai henglama akihei taove. 
Acts11:22 Chuin amaho umchan thu chu Jerusalem'a um houbung mihon ajataovin; chuin amahon Barnabas chu Antioch geija che dingin asolun ahi. 
Acts11:23 Chuin ama chu alhunin, Pathen milungset chu amun ahile akipah-in; chuin amaho chu Pakaiya abechah jingna dingu lung ngaiton, abonchauvin atilkhouvin ahi;" 
Acts11:24 Ijeh-inem itile ama chu mipha ahin, Lhagao Theng le tahsanna-a dimset ahi; chuin miho atama tam Pakaiyah alutbe taove." 
Acts11:25 Chuin ama Saul hol dingin Tarsus kho-a achen; 
Acts11:26 Chuin amudoh phatnin, Antioch-a chun ahinpuitai. Chuin ahitin ahi, kum khatjen houbung ho chutoh akikhomji lhonin, mi tamtah ahilji lhonin ahi. Chule Antioch-a chu seijui ho Christian tia kikou masapen ahi." 
Acts11:27 Chuin hiche lai chun themgao koi koiham Jerusalem'a konin Antioch-a ahungun ahi. 
Acts11:28 Chuin alah uva khat amin Agabus chu adingdoh-in, Lhagaovin aphondoh-a konin vannoi gam jouse chunga kel lha ding ahi, ati; hichu Claudius Ceasar nikho laijin aguilhungin ahi." 
Acts11:29 Chuin seijui ho chun ajokham cheh-a Judea gama cheng sopiho chu huna thot dingin akilol taovin; 
Acts11:29 Chuin seijui ho chun ajokham cheh-a Judea gama cheng sopiho chu huna thot dingin akilol taovin; 
Acts11:30 Hichun boljong abolun, Barnabas le Saul khutna upaho agahthot taove." 
Acts12:1 Chuin hiche lai vel chun Herod lengpan houbung ho lah-a phabep bolset dingin agon, akhut alamtan ahi." 
Acts12:2 Chuin John upa Jacob chu chemjamin athat tai. 
Acts12:2 Chuin John upa Jacob chu chemjamin athat tai. 
Acts12:3 Hiche abolchun Judah ho alunglhaisah chu amun, Peter jong chu amatbetan ahi. (Hiche lai chu cholsolou changlhah kut lai ahi)." 
Acts12:4 Chuin ama chu amanin, songkul'a akhumin, angah dingin sepai loi li hochu apedoh-in; kalchuh kut joule miho henga puidoh ding alung got ahi." 
Acts12:5 Hiti chun Peter chu songkul'a akhumun angahtauve: ahin houbung min ama ding chun Pathen henga lunglut tah-in ataopeh-un ahi. 
Acts12:6 Chuin Herod chun kaidoh dinga agot jantah chun, Peter sepai ni kah-a thihkhao ni-a kihena imua ahin; angahho jong chu kotbula dinga songkul chu ngah jinga ahiuve." 
Acts12:7 Chuin veuvin, Pakai vantil khat akoma ahung dingin, chule vah khatnin aumna mun chu asalvah-in; chuin ama chun Peter chu apang abengin, asukhangin, Thoudoh loijin, ati. Chuin akhutna konin akihena thihkhaoho chu akhelha tan ahi." 
Acts12:8 Chuin vantil chun ajah-a, Nakong kigeh-inlang, nakengchot kisen, ati. Chuin aman hitichun aboltai. Chuin ama chun ajah-a, Napon kisilin kanung hinjuijin, ati." 
Acts12:9 Chuin ama apotdoh-in ajuitai; hichu vantil'in abol tahbeh ahi chu he louvin, gaochana mu nei jin akingaiton ahi." 
Acts12:10 Chuin amanin kot ngah masale anina akhel lhona, khopi sunglam jotna-a thih kot phung chu agei lhon phatnin, kot chu amani ding chun achamin akihong jenge: chuin achedoh lhonin khosung lamlen khat ajot lhung lhonin; chule chua konchun vantil chun ama adalha tan ahi." 
Acts12:11 Chuin Peter akhahdoh phat chun, Pakaiyin avantil ahinsola, Herod khutna konle Juda mite kinepna jouse-a kona eihuhdoh ahi ti tun chentah-in kahetai, ati." 
Acts12:12 Chuin akingaito jouvin mi tamtah akikhop uva ataonao Mark atiu John nu Mariam in'a chun agachen ahi. 
Acts12:12 Chuin akingaito jouvin mi tamtah akikhop uva ataonao Mark atiu John nu Mariam in'a chun agachen ahi. 
Acts12:12 Chuin akingaito jouvin mi tamtah akikhop uva ataonao Mark atiu John nu Mariam in'a chun agachen ahi. 
Acts12:13 Chuin Peter'in hongcha kot akiuvin ahile, nungah khat amin Rhoda atiu chu adonbut dingin ahunge." 
Acts12:14 Chuin aman Peter aw ahi ahet phatnin, akipa manin kot hongta louvin alhai lutjelin, Peter kot phunga adin chu aga seije." 
Acts12:15 Chuin amahon amanu jah-a, angola nahi, atiuve. Ahivangin, Aman ahimonge, ati changsalin ahi. Chuin amahon, a-vantil hichu, atiuve." 
Acts12:16 Ahivangin Peter'in akiu akiuvin; amahon kot chu ahonule ama amuvin, adatmo lheh jengui." 
Acts12:17 Ahivangin aman athipbehna dingun akhutnin ajapmin, Pakaiyin songkul'a kona ahin puidohje umchan chu aseitan ahi. Chuin, hiche thuho hi jacob le sopiho seipeh-un, ati. Chuin ama apotdoh-in mun danga achetai." 
Acts12:18 Chuin khovah vah-in, sepaiho chu, Peter hoija um hitam, atiuvin lungjin mainah-in alung jing pouve."
