Acts12:19 Chuin Herod chun aholin amutapon ahile, angahho chu achunguva thu atanin, amaho chu tha dingin thu apetai. Chuin ama Juda gama konin Caesaria ache suh-in, chukoma chun aumdentai." 
Acts12:20 Hiche laija chu Herod Tyre le Sidon miho chunga ha lunghana lunghanga ahin; ahivangin amaho thu khat akisauvin, ahenga acheuvin, lengpa insung vaihom amin Blastus chu akihouthei piuvin, kichamna ding athumui; ajeh chu lengpa gama kona amaho gama anneh hungji-a ahi." 
Acts12:21 Chuin akinitep niuvin, Herod chu leng vonin akivonin, alal touna-a atouvin ajah uva chun thu aseijin ahi." 
Acts12:22 Chuin miho chun, Mihem awso ahipoi, pathen awso ahi, tin asamui." 
Acts12:23 Chuin aman loupina chu Pathen apeh lou jeh chun, Pakai vantil'in chupettah chun adengin ahile, lungin anen athi tai." 
Acts12:24 Pathen thu vang chu achal jal-in, akhangtou chehchehtai." 
Acts12:25 Chuin Barnabas le Saul akin lhon achai phat lhonin, Jerusalem'a konin akile lhonin, John amin chom Mark chu apui lhone." 
Acts12:25 Chuin Barnabas le Saul akin lhon achai phat lhonin, Jerusalem'a konin akile lhonin, John amin chom Mark chu apui lhone." 
Acts12:25 Chuin Barnabas le Saul akin lhon achai phat lhonin, Jerusalem'a konin akile lhonin, John amin chom Mark chu apui lhone." 
Acts13:1 Chuin Antioch houbung'a chun themgaole mihil phabep aumun, amahochu: Barnabas, Niger atiu Simeon, Cyrene mi Lucius, Herod lengpa toh kivahdoh tha Manahen, chule Saul ahiuve." 
Acts13:2 Chuin amaho chu Pakai lhachale-a apanuva an angol laijun Lhagao Thengin, Kakouna natong dingin Barnabas le Saul neise khenpeh-un, ati." 
Acts13:3 Chuin an ngola atao jouvun, achung lhona akhut angamun asoldoh taove." 
Acts13:4 Chutichun Lhagao Theng soldoh-in amani Seleucia achesuh lhonin; chuin chua kon chun Cyprus lama akitol lhontai. 
Acts13:5 Chuin Salamis kho alhun phat lhonin, Juda ho kikhopna inho-a chun Pathen thu ahillhangle lhontai. Amanin akithopi lhon dingin John jong akipui lhone." 
Acts13:5 Chuin Salamis kho alhun phat lhonin, Juda ho kikhopna inho-a chun Pathen thu ahillhangle lhontai. Amanin akithopi lhon dingin John jong akipui lhone." 
Acts13:6 Chutichun twikol gam sung chu Paphos geijin achonsoh lhonin, Bar-Jesu atiu Juda mi, mitpheldoi choile, themgao lhem khat amudoh lhone." 
Acts13:7 Ama chu milung ching, twikol gamvaipo Sergius Paulus chutoh uma ahi. Gamvaipo chun Saul le Barnabas akouvin Pathen thu chu ngai ding agotan ahi." 
Acts13:8 Ahivangin mitpheldoi choipa Elymas chun (hichu amin kiledohna ahi) gamvaipo chun atahsan louna dingin, amani chu adoudalin ahi." 
Acts13:9 Chuin Saul'in, (Paul jong akitin,) Lhagao Thenga dim pumin ama chu ave aven," 
Acts13:10 Vo nangma jouva lheplhah le minambol dimset diabol chapa, chonphatna jouse melmahpa, nangin Pakai lampi dihho akaleh-a hei natat lou ding ham?" 
Acts13:11 Chule tun, ven, Pakai khut nachunga achui; chule phat chomkhat sung nisa mu louva mitcho-a naum ding ahi, ati. Chupettah chun meijinle muthim achunga ahung chupai jengin; chuin aman akhutna kai ding mi ahol letai." 
Acts13:12 Chutah-in gamvaipo chun thil kibol umchan chu amu phat chun, Pakai thuhil chu kidang asa lheh jengin atahsantai." 
Acts13:13 Chuin Paul aloihotoh Paphos'a konin akitolun, Pamphylia gama Perga alhung taove; chuin John'in amani adalhan Jerusalem lama akile kit tai." 
Acts13:13 Chuin Paul aloihotoh Paphos'a konin akitolun, Pamphylia gama Perga alhung taove; chuin John'in amani adalhan Jerusalem lama akile kit tai." 
Acts13:14 Amani vang chu Perga'a konin achepeh lhonin, Pisidia gama um Antioch alhung lhonin; chuin cholngah nin kikhopna in'ah alut lhonin atou lhontai." 
Acts13:15 Chuin danthu le themgaoho thu asim jouvin, kikhopna in vaihomhon akom lhona mi asolun, agahseijun, Sopiteni, miho-a dinga tilkhouna thu ima nanei lhonle sei lhonin, atiuve." 
Acts13:16 Chuin Paul adingin akhut ajah-in thu aseijin, Vo Israel miho, chule vo Pathen gingho, ngaijun:" 
Acts13:17 Hiche Israelte Pathen hin ipu ipateu alhengin, amaho Egypt gama apem laiju chun amite chu achoisangin, chuin aban thahat chungnungin amaho chu ahin puidohtan ahi." 
Acts13:18 Chuin kum somli jen gamthipma achonnau chu ana thoh hamhamin; 
Acts13:19 Chuin Canaan gama vaipi sagi asumangin, amaho gam chu alo dingun ahop pehtan ahi." 
Acts13:20 Chuin hiche jou chun kum ja lile kum somnga sungin, Samuel themgao nikho lai gei chun thutan vaihomho apejin ahi." 
Acts13:21 Chuin amahon leng athumun ahile Pathen'in amaho chu Benjamin phunga Kish chapa Saul apen, kum somli geijin akoije." 
Acts13:22 Chuin aman ama chu achon mangin, aleng dingun David atungdohtai; ama thudol chu ahettohsah-in, Keiman keima lungdoltah mi khat, Jesse chapa David kamudohtai; ama khun kalunggot jouse abol bulhit ding ahi, ati." 
Acts13:23 Chuchepa sonho lah-a chun Pathen'in thutep dungjuijin Israelte hengah Huhhing-a khat, Jesu chu ahinlhut tai." 
Acts13:24 Ama hung masangin John'in Israel miho jah-a lungheija baptize chan ding thu ahillhang tan ahi. 
Acts13:24 Ama hung masangin John'in Israel miho jah-a lungheija baptize chan ding thu ahillhang tan ahi. 
Acts13:25 John'in anatoh achaiding konin, Nanghon keima koi kahia neingai touvem? Keima ama chu kahipoi. Ahin, kanunga mi khat ahunge; keima akengchot sutlham dinga jong kilom kahipoi, ati." 
Acts13:25 John'in anatoh achaiding konin, Nanghon keima koi kahia neingai touvem? Keima ama chu kahipoi. Ahin, kanunga mi khat ahunge; keima akengchot sutlham dinga jong kilom kahipoi, ati." 
Acts13:26 Vo miho chule sopiteho, Abraham chateho, chule nalah uva Pathen gingho, hiche huhhingna thuhi nangho henga hinkithot ahi." 
Acts13:27 Ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem'a chengho le avaipoteuvin ama chu ahetlou jeh-ule, cholngah niseh-a kisimji themgaoho thu ahettoh lou jeh-un, hiche thu chu bulhitnan ama chu themmo achansah taove." 
Acts13:28 Chule athina thei ajeh aholmosan jongun, Pilate henga athana ding athumui." 
Acts13:29 Chuin aumchan ding thudol kisun masa jouse chu asuh bulhit sohkei phatnun, thing chunga konin alalhauvin, lhanah alupsah taove." 
Acts13:30 Ahivangin Pathen'in ama chu athi lah-a konin akaithou tai. 
Acts13:31 Chuin Galilee'a kona Jerusalem geija alhonpiho chun ni tamtah geijin amu jingjiuvin, amaho tulaija miho henga athu hettohsah-a pangho hi ahiuve." 
Acts13:32 Chule ipu ipateu henga thutep thudola Kipana Thupha chu keihon nangho kahung hetsah nahiuve; 
Acts13:33 Pathen'in Jesu akaithouva kona achateu eiho dinga thutep chu amolso ahitai. Chujongle hiche thudol hi Labu bung nina-a jong, Nangma ka-Chapa nahi, tunia hi kahin nahi, tin akisune." 
Acts13:34 Aman monmang na-a kilekit talou dinga athi lah-a kona akaithou ding thudol chu, hitin aseije, David phattheina thon loule athenga chu keiman nangho kapeh dingu nahiuve, ati." 
Acts13:35 Hijeh chun aman Labu mun danga, Namitheng chu mon mangna namusah lou ding ahi, ati kitleuve." 
Acts13:36 Ijeh-inem itile David chun Pathen lungdei bangin ama khanga miho ding na atoh jouvin, a-imu miltan; chuin apu apate koma alupsah-un ahile mon mangna chu amutai." 
Acts13:37 Ahin Pathen'in akaithoupa vang chun mon mangna amupoi. 
Acts13:38 Hijeh chun hiche hi heuvin, miho chule sopiteho, Ama vanga chu chonset ngaidamna thu najah uva kiseija ahi." 
Acts13:39 Koi hijongle atahsan chan chu Mosi danthua them nachan jou lounao imajousea kona, ama vanga chu them changa ahi." 
Acts13:40 Hijeh chun chingtheijun, achuti loule ajole themgao thusei ho chu nachung uva lhungkha getninte;" 
Acts13:41 Vo nahsahmoho, nanghon veuvin. Kidang saovinlang mangthah-un; nanikho laijun thilkhat kabole, hiche thil chu min seipeh jongleu chun natahsan louhel dingu ahi, ti hi, ati." 
Acts13:42 Chuin Juda ho chu kikhopna in'a kona apotdoh phatnun, chidang namdangho chun cholngah nikit jongle chuche thuchu aseipeh kit diuvin ajolun ahi." 
Acts13:43 Chuin akikhomho chu akikhen phatnun, Juda mi tamtah le Juda houva lut Pathen ngaisahho lah-a mi tamtah-in Paul le Barnaba nung ajuitaove; chuin amanin amaho chu ahoulimpi lhonin, Pathen lungsetna-a umdet jing dingin atilkhou lhontai." 
Acts13:44 Cholngah ni kitnin akhopi pumpiuvin Pathen thu ngai dingin akikhom taove. 
Acts13:45 Ahivangin Juda hon mipi chu amu phatnun athangseuvin, Paul thusei chu adoudalun, ataitomun, chule anelkal taove." 
Acts13:46 Chuin Paul le Barnaban hakattah-in, Pathen thuhi nangho henga sei masah ding dol mong ahin; ahivangin nanghon napam paijuva, tonsot hin kemlou changa kilom louva nakigot jeh-u chun, veuvin, chidang namdangho henga kakiheiju ahitai." 
Acts13:47 Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin hiti hin keiho thu eipeuve, Vannoi leiset kolmong geija sochatna hi dinga, Keiman nangma chidang namdangho salvah-a kapansah nahi, ati tin asei lhontai." 
Acts13:48 Chidang namdang hon hichu ajah phat uvin akipah athanomun, Pakai thu chu achoi-an taove, chule tonsot hinkemlou chang dinga gotsa um chengse chun atahsan taove." 
Acts13:49 Chuin Pakai thu chu chuche gamkol sungse-a chun achalsohtai. 
Acts13:50 Ahivangin Juda hon Pathen ngaisah numei lal hole, khopi sunga pipuiho atilseuvin, Paul le Barnaba chu abolsetsah-un, agamgi sunguva konin adelmang taove." 
Acts13:51 Chuin amanin amaho douna-in akengphang lhona leivui athinglha lhonin, Iconium kho lama ache lhontai." 
Acts13:52 Chuin seijui ho chu kipana le Lhagao Thengin adimset taove. 
Acts14:1 Chuin Iconium kho-a chun ahitin ahi, amani Juda ho kikhopna in'a alut lhonin, thu asei lhonin ahile, Juda miho le Greek mi atama tamin atahsan jengtan ahi." 
Acts14:2 Ahivangin thua nunglou Juda hochun chidang namdangho atilseuvin, sopiho chu amuda sah taove." 
Acts14:3 Hijeh chun sottah aum lhonin, alungsetna hettohsah-a akhut lhona thil kidangle melchihna bolsah Pakaiya chun hakattah-in thu aseiji lhonin ahi." 
Acts14:4 Hichun khopi-a mipi chu akikeh khenun, akimkhat Juda ho lama, akimkhat solchah ho lama apangtauve." 
Acts14:5 Chuin chidang namdangho le Juda hon avaipohou to kitho-a amani chu nahsahmo-a bola songa seding agouvin ahile," 
Acts14:6 Hichu amanin ahedoh lhonin, Lycaonia gama Lystra le Derbe kho, chule akimvelah-a ajam lut lhonin," 
Acts14:7 Chua chun Kipana Thupha agahil lhangle lhontai. 
Acts14:8 Lystra kho-a chun imatih chana lamjot lou, akenga tha himhim umlou, apena elbaija peng khat atouvin, Paul thusei angai jingin ahi." 
Acts14:9 Chuin aman ama chu ave aven, boldama aum ding atahsan chu ahen," 
Acts14:10 Hatah-in asamin, Nakengin pansan ding jangin, ati. Chuin ama akichomin adingin lam ajottai." 
Acts14:11 Chutah chun mipi chun Paul thilbol chu amu phatnun, Lycaonia paovin, pathenho mihem lima ihenguva hung kumlha ahiuve, atitaove." 
Acts14:12 Chuin amahon Barnaba chu Jupiter asah-un, chule Paul chu thuseija apipui ahi jeh chun Mercury asah taove." 
Acts14:13 Chuin khopi kotmaija a-houin uma Jupiter hou thempupa chun bongchal le pahchavui kotpi phunga ahin choijin, mipi chutoh amani houna-a chu tha dingin agotauvin ahi." 
Acts14:14 Ahivangin solchah teni, Barnabas le Paul chun hichu ajah lhon phatnin, apon asat-eh lhonin, mipi heng lama chun alhaijel lhonin, asam lhonin," 
Acts14:15 Vo miho, ibola hitobang hi nabol uham? Keini jong nang hotoh kithakhat mihem kahilhon bouve; chule hiti mohthil ho-a kona hi vanle lei twikhanglen chule asunga thil um jouse sema Pathen hing henga nakiheina dinguva, Kipana Thupha kahung lhutpeh nahiuve." 
Acts14:16 Hiche Pathen chun malaija chu namtin vaipi jouse hi aningnop cheh-a analhatsah ahi. 
Acts14:17 Ahivangin ama hettohsahna beijin anaumpoi, Hitichun phatna abol jingin, van'a kon gotwi le ima ga phatle anneh eipeuvin, ilungthimu kipa thanop na-in adimsahjin ahi, ati lhone." 
Acts14:18 Thu hicheng chu asei lhona konchun, nah nah-in amani houna-a gan tha ding go-a mipi chu akham jou lhonin ahi." 
Acts14:19 Chuin Antioch le Iconium'a konin Juda mi phabep hilama chun ahungun, mipi ho chu atilseuvin, Paul chu songin asesah-un, athi ahitai tin, khopi pam lama akaidoh taove." 
Acts14:20 Ahivangin seijui ho akimvela adin pettah-un, ama athoudoh-in, khopi sungah aluttai. Chuin ajing nikhon Barnabas toh Derbe jondin akipatdoh lhontai." 
Acts14:21 Chuin amanin chuche khopi-a chu Kipana Thupha ahillhangle lhona, mi tamtah ahil lhon jouvin, Lystra, Iconium, chule Antioch lama akile kit lhonin," 
Acts14:22 Genthei hesoh tamtah thoh-a Pathen lenggama ilut dingu ahi tin seijui ho chu tahsana aumdet jing dingun thu ahil lhonin, alungu aphut detpeh lhontai." 
Acts14:23 Chule amanin houbung tina upaho apansah lhona, an angola atao jouvun, atahsanpao Pakai henga chun amahochu apedoh lhontai." 
Acts14:24 Chuin Pisidia gam achonsoh lhon phatnin, Pamphylia'a ache lhonin," 
Acts14:25 Perga-a thu ahil lhon jouvin, Attalia lama ache lhontai." 
Acts14:26 Chuin chua kon chun kongin akitol lhonin, ahin tohchai lhon chu tong dinga Pathen lungsetna-a akipehdohna lhon Antioch kho-a chun ache lhontan ahi." 
Acts14:27 Chukom alhun lhon phatnin, houbung miho akhom lhonin, Pathen'in amani mangcha-a athilbol jouse le chidang namdangho dinga tahsan kot ahonpeh umchanje chu ahetsah lhontan ahi." 
Acts14:28 Chuin amani chu seijui ho toh sottah aumkhom lhontai. 
Acts15:1 Chuin Juda gama konin mi phabep ahungsuh-un, Mosi chonna danthu peh dungjuija chep natan louvule huhhing-a naumthei lou dingu ahi, atin sopiho ahung hilun ahi." 
Acts15:2 Hijeh chun Paul le Barnabas chu amahotoh hatah-in akinel baotam jingtaovin ahile, hiche thudola chun Paul le Barnabas chu alah uva mi phabep toh Jerusalem'a solchah ho le upaho henga gacheuhen tin thu alhuhsah taove." 
Acts15:3 Chuin houbung mihon amaho chu agathah-un ahile, amahon Phoenicia le Samaria gam ajotpeh-un, chidang namdangho lunghei thu chu aseijun, sopite jouse abonchauvin hapan akipasah taove." 
Acts15:4 Chuin Jerusalem alhunun, houbung le solchah ho, chule upaho chengsen amaho chu anasangui; chuin Pathen'in amani mangcha-a thil abol umchan chu asei lhontan ahi." 
Acts15:5 Ahivangin atahsana Pharisai loi koi koiham akipat doh-un, hiche miho chu thonmo-a cheptana, chule Mosi danthu peh nitsah ding ahi, atiuve." 
Acts15:6 Chuin solchah ho le upaho hiche thu ngaito ding chun akikhom taove. 
Acts15:7 Chuin tamtah-in akinelun ahile, Peter akipatdoh-in ajah uvah, Miho chule sopiteho, chidang namdang hon keima kama kona kipana thupha ajah uva atahsanna dingun, masangpeh chun Pathen'in eiho lah-a keima eilhengdoh chu nanghon naheuve." 
Acts15:8 Chule milungsung he-a Pathen'in eiho eipeh bangun, amaho jong chu Lhagao Theng apen, amaho chu ahettoh sahtan;" 
Acts15:9 Chule eihole amaho kah-a dat nei louvin, tahsan vangin alungsungu asuthengin ahi." 
Acts15:10 Chutichu ahile ipi dinga ipu ipateovin jong, eiho jengin jong nipoh jou louvu namkoljon chu seijui ho lenga naseuva Pathen napatepmu ham?" 
Acts15:11 Ahin amaho bang chun eihon jong Pakai Jesu Christa lungset vanga huhhing-a umding itahsan ui, ati." 
Acts15:12 Chuphat chun mipi chu athipbeh-un, Barnabas le Paul'in Pathen'in amani amanchah-a, chidang namdangho lah-a melchihna le thil kidang dang abol thu asei lhon chu angaijun ahi." 
Acts15:13 Chuin athusei athiplhon phatnin Jacob'in adonbutnin, Miho chule sopiteho, kathusei ngaijun;" 
Acts15:14 Pathen'in amasa-a chidang namdangho avila, alah uva kona ama min pudin mi alhendoh thu Simon'in aseitai." 
Acts15:15 Chule hiche hi themgaoho thuhotoh akitoh-e," 
Acts15:16 Hicheng nung chule keima kakinungle kitna, David houbuh alhusa chu kasahphat ding, Asekom jouse kasah phat kitna, Chule katundoh ding ahi." 
Acts15:17 Mi amoh chengse, chule chidang namdang kamina kikouho jousen Pakai chu ahol ding ahi, tin, hicheho jouse bolla Pakai chun aseije." 
Acts15:18 Leiset kisem tilla patna anatohho jouse Pathen hetnin aumme. 
Acts15:19 Hijeh chun hitin kangaitoi, chidang namdangho lah-a Pathen henga kiheiho chu bol genthei pouhite;" 
Acts15:20 Ahin milim houna thilboh neh, jonthanhoi, chule alol kimeh-a kithat saneh, chule thisan neh, hichenga kona chu akikangsena dingun sunjo leuhen kati." 
Acts15:21 Ajehchu masang laija patnin Mosi'n khotinah athu hillhangle aneijin, cholngah niseh-in houin'a asimji naove, ati." 
Acts15:22 Chuin solchah ho le upahon houbung pumpi chutoh, alah uva mi lhendoh-a Paul le Barnabas toh Antioch-a sol ding pha asauvin, sopite lah-a apipu Barsabas atiu Juda le silas alheng doh-un;" 
Acts15:23 Chuin hiti hin lekha asunun, amaho khutna chun athot taove: Solchah ho, upaho, chule sopite jousen, Antioch, Syria, chule Cilicia gama um chidang namdang sopiho kasalamui." 
Acts15:24 Kalah uva konin koi koiham ahungun, chep natandiu chule dan ho nanit teidiu ahi, ahungtiuvin; thun nahung sulung jingun, nalungu asuchavaijui ti kanajaove; amaho chu keihon thu kapepouve;" 
Acts15:25 Hijeh chun lungkhat pu-a kaki khopmu tolhonin, mi lhendoh-a, ideitah-u Barnabas le Paul," 
Acts15:26 Pakai Jesu Christa min jala ahinkho settoh jinga um teni toh naheng uva hinsol ding pha kasaovin ahi. 
Acts15:27 Hijeh chun Judas le Silas kahinsol uvin; amanin jong hiche thu mama hi kamcheng tah-a nahil dingu ahi. 
Acts15:28 Ijeh-inem itile Lhagao Thengin pha asan, keihon jong pha kasauve, hicheng akhohlai chengse tailou hi pohgihsa dang pohsah lou ding katiuve;" 
Acts15:29 Nangho milim houna sa neh, thisan neh, alol kimeh-a kithat sa neh, chule jonthanhoi, hichenga kon hin kikangseleu chun katiuve; hichenga kon chun kikangseleu chun nangho dinga phading ahi. Anadamselun." 
Acts15:30 Chuin amaho chu asoldoh phatnun, Antioch'a ahungsuh-un ahi: chuin mipi chu akhopkhom phatnun, lekhathot chu apedoh taovin ahi." 
Acts15:31 Chuin amahon hichu asim jouvun, lungmonsahna thu jeh chun akipah taove." 
Acts15:32 Chuin Judas le silas chun, (amani jong themgao ahi lhonin,) amanin jong thu tamtah-in sopiho chu alungmonsah lhonin, aphutdet lhonin ahi." 
Acts15:33 Chuin chua chu chom khatset aum jou lhonin, solchah ho henga ding chun sopihon lung mongin alhadoh taove." 
Acts15:34 Ahin silas vang chu chukoma umden ding anomin ahi. 
Acts15:35 Paul le Barnaba jong chu Antioch kho-a chun aumden lhonin, mi tamtah toh, Pakai thu chu ahil lhonin aseiphong lhontai." 
Acts15:36 Chuin ni phabep jouvin Paul'in Barnabas jah-a, Chen, Pakai thu ihilna khopiho chenga chun chehitin sopite gakimutopi hitin, iti um naovam gavehite, ati." 
Acts15:37 Chuin Barnabas'in Mark atiu John jong chu puiding lung angaiton ahi. 
Acts15:37 Chuin Barnabas'in Mark atiu John jong chu puiding lung angaiton ahi. 
Acts15:37 Chuin Barnabas'in Mark atiu John jong chu puiding lung angaiton ahi. 
Acts15:38 Ahivangin Paul'in Pamphylia'a amani dalha-a, chule amanitoh lhona natonga cheta lou chu puiding pha asapon ahi." 
Acts15:39 Chuin akihanel ten taovin ahile, khat le khat akikhenlo taovin ahi; chuin Barnabas'in Mark chu akipuijin kongin kitolin Cyprus lama achetai." 
Acts15:39 Chuin akihanel ten taovin ahile, khat le khat akikhenlo taovin ahi; chuin Barnabas'in Mark chu akipuijin kongin kitolin Cyprus lama achetai." 
Acts15:40 Chule Paul'in silas akilhen doh-in, Pathen lungsetna-a sopite phatseina to thon akipatdoh tai." 
Acts15:41 Chuin Syria gam le Cilicia gam ajotpeh-in, houbung ho aphutdet pehtai." 
Acts16:1 Chuin ama Derbe le Lystra alhungin; chuin veuvin, chu koma chun seijui khat amin Timothy kiti khat aumin, amachu atahsana Juda numei khat chapa ahin, apa vang chu Greek ahi." 
Acts16:2 Ama chu Lystra le Iconium'a um sopihon aseiphat lhehjengu ahi. 
Acts16:3 Paul'in ama chutoh lhondoh ding lung angaito jehchun, apuijin chuche dunga um Juda ho jeh chun achep atanin ahi; ijeh-inem itile apa Greek ahi chu abonchauva ahetsoh keiju ahi." 
Acts16:4 Chuin amaho akho akhoa avahle avahleuvin, Jerusalem'a um solchah ho le upaho phudoh thupeh chu anit dingun asei phongle taove." 
Acts16:5 Chutichun houbung ho chu tahsana-a akiphut detnun, niseh-in amijat apung chehcheh tan ahi." 
Acts16:6 Chuin Phrygia le Galatia gam achotsoh phatnun, Lhagao Thengin Asia gama thu agalhangsap dingu akhamin," 
Acts16:7 Chuin Mysia kom ageijun Bithynia lut akigouvin, ahinla lhagaovin ajahnom pouvin ahi." 
Acts16:8 Chuin chutichun Mysia ajotpaijun, Troas kho ajonsuh taove." 
Acts16:9 Chuin jan-in Paul'in mu aneijin, Macedonia mi khat adingin ahenga ataovin, Macedonia hung galkaijin lang neihung panpiuvin, ati." 
Acts16:10 Chutichun aman mu anei phat chun, Pakaiyin amaho chu Kipana Thupha hil dinga eikouvu ahi ti kaheuvin, chupettah chun Macedonia gama che ding kasompai taove." 
Acts16:11 Hijeh chun Troas'a konin kongin kakitolun, jangkeijin Samothrace kajon-un, chuin ajingin Neapolis kalhungun," 
Acts16:12 Chuin chua kon chun Philippi kalhungui; hichu Macedonia gamkol sunga khopi lenpen ahin, Rome miten alo-u khopi ahi. Chuche khopi-a chun ni ijat-jen ham kaumui." 
Acts16:13 Chuin cholngah nin kulpi kot polama lui pangah, angaija taona kiman jina mun'a chun kacheuve; chuin kataovun, numei hung kikhomho jah-a chun thu kaseitaove." 
Acts16:14 Chuin amin Lydia atiu, ponsandup joh numei khat, Thyatira khopi-a kon, mi Pathen hou ahin, amanu chun kathuseiju ajatan; chuin Paul thusei ho chu lunglut tah-a angaina dingin Pakaiyin alung kot ahonpehtan ahi." 
Acts16:15 Chuin amale a-insung mite baptize achan jouvun, Pakai tahsan tahbeh-a neingaitou ahile, ka-in'ah hung lhungun, tin eijolun, kacham louhelun eilhunsah taove." 
Acts16:16 Chuin ahitin ahi, taona mun'a chu kacheuva ahile lhagao vop soh nungah khatnin eikito piuvin; ama chun khonung thusoh ding aseija, a-pakaite chu aphatchom sah lheh jeng ahi." 
Acts16:17 Ama chun Paul le keiho eijuile eijuileuvin, Hiteho hi chungnung pen Pathen sohte ahiuvin, sochatna lampi nahung hilu ahi, atin asam asamjin ahi." 
Acts16:18 Amanu chun chutia chu ni tamtah abol ahi. Ahin Paul alung phamon, akiheijin lhagao jah-a chun, Jesu Khrista mina amanu sunga kona chu hungdoh dinga kathupeh nahi, ati. Chuin chupettah chun apotdohpai jengtan ahi." 
Acts16:19 Chuin apakaite chun phatchom ding akinepnao abeitai ti ahetdoh doh-un, Paul le Silas chu amanun, kailhang-ah vaipoho hengah akaijun," 
Acts16:20 Chuin thutan vaihomho henga ahin puijun, Hiteni hi Juda mi ahi lhonin, ikho sungu achohnoh lheh jeng lhonin," 
Acts16:21 Eiho Rome miten isandiu le ijop dinguva dan ngai hilou chonna dan sodoh ago lhone, atiuve." 
Acts16:22 Chuin mipi chu thakhat tah-in amani dounan akipatdoh taove: chuin thutan vaihomho chun apon lhon ahoh lha uvin, chule mola jep dingin thu apetaove." 
Acts16:23 Chuin tamtah vei ajep jouvun songkul'a akhumun, songkul ngahpa chun bitkeija angana dingin thupeh anei taove." 
Acts16:24 Chutitah-a thupeh amu jehchun, aman kihenna sungnunga akhumin, akenguva bul atuhtai." 
Acts16:25 Ahin jan khangkimin Paul le Silas Pathen henga atao lhonin, la asa lhonin ahile, sohchangho chun angai ngaijun ahi." 
Acts16:26 Chuin phulou helouvin ling hatah-in ahung kihot in, chutichun songkul chu abul ahot longgamin; kotkhah jouse akihong paijin, chule akihennao bul akilhamlha gamtan ahi." 
Acts16:27 Chuin songkul ngahpa chu a-imut ahung khangin, songkul kotkhah ho akihon amuphatnin, sohchangho ajama ahitai atin, chemjam alan ama kithat akigotai." 
Acts16:28 Ahivangin Paul'in, hasapmin asamin, Nangma kisuse hih-in, keiho kabon chaovin hikoma kaum naove, ati." 
Acts16:29 Chuin aman meivah athumin, songkul sungah alhailut jel-in, kithing thing pumin, Paul le Silas angah alhu jengin," 
Acts16:30 Chuin amani chu apuidoh-in, Puteni, huhhing-a umna dinga ipi kabol dingham, ati." 
Acts16:31 Chuin amanin, Pakai Jesu Christa tahsanin, chutile huhhing-a naum ding ahi, nangma le na-insunga chengsetoh, ati lhone." 
Acts16:32 Chuin amanin amale a-insunga umho chengse jah-a Pakai thu asei lhontai. 
Acts16:33 Chuin aman hiche pettah chun jan laijin amani chu apuijin, ajepnau maha chu asoppeh-in; chule a-insunga chengsetoh hiche pettah chun baptize achangpai taove." 
Acts16:34 Chuin amani chu a-in'a apuitouvin, a-ang lhonah nehding aluipeh-in; Pathen atahsan jeh chun ama chu a-insunga chengsetoh akipah lheh jengun ahi." 
Acts16:35 Chuin ni aso phatnin thutan vaihomhon sottol mimanho chu asolun; Miho chu lhatauvin, agatisah-ui." 
Acts16:36 Chuin songkul ngahpa chun hiche thu chu Paul jah-a aseijin, Thutan vaihomhon nangni lhadohna ding thu ahin petaove; hijeh chun lung mongin che lhontan, ati." 
Acts16:37 Ahivangin Paul'in amaho jah-a chun, Keini Rome mi kihia, themna themona photoh louva japi ang sunga eivoh uva, songkul'a eikhumu ahin; tu-a guhthima lhadoh ding eigotnu ham? Chuti theiponte; amaho mong hunguhen, amahotah-in eihung lhauhen, ati." 
Acts16:38 Chuin sottol mimanho chun thutan vaihomho hengah hiche thu chu agalhut taove; hichun amani Rome mi ahi lhon chu ahetdoh phatnun akicha taove. 
Acts16:39 Chuin amaho ahungun amani chu ahung jolun, khopi-a kona chedoh dingin ajoltauve." 
Acts16:40 Hitichun songkul'a konin apotdoh-un, Lydia in'a chun alut taove; chuin sopiho chu amulhon phatnin, amaho chu alungmonsah lhonin, akipatdoh lhontai." 
Acts17:1 Chuin Amphipolis le Apollonia ajotpaijun, Juda ho kikhopna in umna Thessalonica alhungun;" 
Acts17:2 Chuin Paul achon ngai bangin ahenguva achen, cholngah ni thum Pathen lekhabua konin akihoulimpin," 
Acts17:3 Christa chun gim genthei athoh-a athi lah-a kona thoudoh kit ding mong ahi tin aphongdoh-in, avetsah-in chule ahilchenin; chuin, Najah uva kasei Jesu hi hiche Christa chu ahi, ati." 
Acts17:4 Chuin alah uva mi kimkhat le, Pathen ngaisah Greek miho, chule numei pipuiho tamtah-in ajoptaovin, Paul le Silas lama akaitaove." 
Acts17:5 Ahivangin Juda atahsanlou hon thangset lungin kailhanga migilou thasehon koi koiham akipuijun, mipi hon khat akhomun, khopi sung chu achohnoh-un, Jason in abuluvin, amani chu miho henga hinkaidoh dingin aholtauve." 
Acts17:6 Ahivangin amani chu amulou phatnun, Jason le sopite koi koiham chu khopi sung vaipoho henga akaijun, kho asamun, Vannoi chohseho chu hikoma jong ahung lhungtaove;" 
Acts17:7 Chule hiche Jason hin a-in'a alhunsah-in, chule Jesu atiu leng chom khat aume atiuvin, Ceasar thupeh nelkal lenan achon sohkeijui, atiuve." 
Acts17:8 Hicheng thu chu ajah phatnun, mipi chengsele khopi sung vaipoho jong chu aboi lheh jengtaove." 
Acts17:9 Chuin Jason le adang danghoa kon chun amaho khelin jamin alauvin alhadoh taove. 
Acts17:10 Chuin sopihon geisang louvin ajan jan-in Paul le Silas chu Beria khopi lama asoltaove. Amani chukom alhun lhonin Juda ho kikhopna-a ache lhonin ahi. 
Acts17:11 Amaho chu Thessalonica miho sang chun aphajovin, lung kipahtah-in thu chu asangun, hichu hinam hilouham ti hetna dingin, niseh-in Pathen lekhabu-ah aholjiuve." 
Acts17:12 Hijeh chun alah uva tamtah-in atahsan taovin, Greek miho lah-a ja-um numei le pasal tamtah-in jong atahsan taovin ahi." 
Acts17:13 Ahin Beria-a jong Paul'in Pathen thu ahiltai ti Thessalonica Juda hon ajauvin, chukom gei chun ahungun, mipi chu ahung tilseuvin achohnoh kit taove." 
Acts17:14 Hiche pettah chun sopihon geisang louvin Paul twikhanglen lama che dingin asolpai taove; Silas le Timothy vang chu chukoma chun aumden lhone. 
Acts17:15 Chuin Paul gathahho chun Athen geijin apuijun; chuin Silas le Timothy chu agan nathei pena kahenga ahungloi lhon nading thupeh apouvin, akile kit taove." 
Acts17:16 Chuin Paul'in Athen kho-a amani chu anga sungin, khopi-a chu semthu milim adimset amun, alung asoujahtai." 
Acts17:17 Hijeh chun kikhopna in'ah Juda hole Pathen ngaisahho akinelpijin, kailhang mun'a jong amuchan chu aneljin ahi." 
Acts17:18 Chuin Epicurean mile Stoic mi lah-a mithem miching koi koihamin jong ama chu akinelpi jiuvin; chule abangin, hiche kamtam belbul hin ipi sei ding agot hinganai, atiuvin; adang kimkhat chun, Jesu thule thokit thu aseile jeh chun, gamdang houho thuhil hile akilome, atiuve;" 
Acts17:19 Chuin ama chu apuijun, Areopagus'ah ahin puilutnun, ajah-a, Hiche thuhil thah thu nasei hi, kahet thei dinguham?" 
Acts17:20 Ijeh-inem itile nangman datmo thil kidang dang kana uvah neijah sah-ui; hiche thil hi ipi tina ahi aumje chu kahet nomui, atiuve." 
Acts17:21 (Ajehchu chuche Athen miho chule chua cheng gamdang miho jouse chu akiman chanuva imadang bol louva, thu thah seina ahiloule ngaina-a aphat amanjiu ahi)." 
Acts17:22 Chuin Paul Areopagus lailunga adingin, hiche thuhi aseije, Nangho Athen miho, imalam jouse-ah nangho hi hou ngaisahtah nahiuve ti kahedoh-e." 
Acts17:23 Ijeh-inem itile nahouho chengseu kavetle-a ahile, HETPHAHLOU PATHEN DING tia kisun maicham khat kamui. Hijeh-a chu nanghon het louva nahoujiu chu keiman nangho kaseidohpeh nahiuve." 
Acts17:24 Vannoi leiset le asunga thil um jouse sema Pathen chu van le lei Pakai ahin, khutna kisa houin'ah achengpoi;" 
Acts17:25 Chule ngaichat neija banga, mihem khutna jenle ding jong ahipoi; ajehchu amatah imajouse hinna, haina, chule ijakai pe-a joh ahibouve;" 
Acts17:26 Chule leiset chung jouse losoh-a cheng dingin, thisan khatna konin vannoi mi chitin namtin asemin, amaho chu phat ateppeh-in, achennao jong gamgi asepeh-e," 
Acts17:27 Amahon Pakai chu aholuva, amai amaijuva ijem tia amudoh theina dinguva chutia chu abol ahin; ama chu eiho koimacha-a kona gamlat umlou ahi:" 
Acts17:28 Ijeh-inem itile eiho ama-a hinga, chatloh-a, chule uma ihiuve; nangho lah-a thuchih chom sun themho lah-a koi koiham jengin jong, Eiho jong ama son ihiuve, tin aseijuve." 
Acts17:29 Hijeh chun eiho Pathen son ihi jeh-u chun, Pathen chu mihem lung suhto-a sana, dangka, song kikheng milim tobanga ingaito ding dolu ahipoi." 
Acts17:30 Ihet lou laiju chu Pathen'in einavet thimu ahin; tu vangin gam jouse-a mi jousen alung aheina dinga thu apeh ahitai: 
Acts17:31 Aman nikho khat atep ahin, hiche ni chule ami tun chun chonphatna-a vannoi hi athu atan ding ahi; Ama chu athia kona akaithouva kona mi jouse ahet kichensah ahitai, ati." 
Acts17:32 Athi thokit thudol ajah phatnun, abangin anuisat taovin, chule adangho vang chun, hiche thudol hi nanga konin ngai kitnaovinge, atiuvin ahi." 
Acts17:33 Hitichun Paul amaho lah-a kon chun apotdohtai. 
Acts17:34 Ahinla mi kimkhat ama henga akaijun atahsan taove. Amaho lah-a chun Areopagus mi Dionysius le numei khat amin Damaris atiutoh, chule adang dangho jong ahiuve." 
Acts18:1 Chuche nung chun Paul Athen'a konin apotdoh-in, Corinth-a achetai." 
Acts18:2 Hiche lai chun Aquila kiti Pontus gama peng Juda mi khat, a-inneipi Priscilla to Italy gama kona hunglut til chu amun, (ajehchu Claudius'in Juda ho jouse aboncha Rome'a kona potdoh dinga thu apeh ahi): chuin amani henga chun achen ahi." 
Acts18:3 Amani chutoh akhut them natoh-u thakhat ahi jeh chun, amani koma chun alhungin, na atong khomjiuve; anatoh-u chu pon in sem ahi." 
Acts18:4 Chule cholngah nisehle kikhop na-ah thu asuhtopin, Juda ho le Greek miho chu atahsan dingin ajoljin ahi." 
Acts18:5 Chuin Silas le Timothy Macedonia gama kona ahung lhunsuh lhon phat chun, Paul chu lhagaovin apanpin, Jesu chu Christa ahi ti Juda ho henga chun ahettohsah tan ahi." 
Acts18:6 Ahivangin amahon adoudaluva, ataitom phatnun, Paul'in apon athingin ajah uva, Nangho thisan nangho lu chungah chuhen; kei kangime; tu kalin chidang namdangho henga chetange, ati." 
Acts18:7 Chuin chua kon chun achen, Pathen ngaisahtah amin Titius Justus atiu in'a chun alut tai; ama in chu kikhopna in kom cha ahi." 
Acts18:8 Chuin kikhopna in vaipo pipu Crispus chun a-insung mi jousetoh Pakai atahsantai; chuin Corinth miho lah-a mi atama tamin ajauvin, atahsanun, baptize achang taove." 
Acts18:9 Chuin jan-in Pakaiyin Paul gaovin akimusah-in, Kicha hih-in; thu sei jing jengin; umthim hih-in;" 
Acts18:10 Ajehchu keiman nangma kaumpi jingnai, chule suhset dinga koiman nabulu lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche khopi sunga hin mi tamtah kaneije, ati." 
Acts18:11 Chuin ama hikoma chun kum khatle lhagup aumin, amaho lah-a chun Pathen thu ahilin ahi." 
Acts18:12 Ahin Gallio Achaia gam vaipo ahi laijin, Juda ho lungkhat akisauvin Paul dounan akipat doh-un, thutanna munah akaijun," 
Acts18:13 Hichepa hin chonna dan ngailouva Pathen hou dingin miho ajol lhai, atiuve." 
Acts18:14 Chuin Paul pao ding akigotle Gallio chun Juda ho jah-a, Vo Juda ho, hiche hi suhkhel ahiloule khan gitlou thu hile, keiman namihehnau kangaipeh ding nahiuvin;" 
Acts18:15 Ahin thu mai mai, min mai mai ahiloule, nangho chonna dan thu kibaona mai mai ahivangle nanghon kitan un, ajehchu keiman chutobang thu chu katan nompoi, ati." 
Acts18:16 Chuin amaho chu thutanna mun'a kon chun anodohtai. 
Acts18:17 Hichun Greek ho chun kikhopna in vaipo pipui Sosthenes chu amanun, thutanna maitah-a avotaove. Ahivangin hitiho chu Gallio chun donin aneipoi." 
Acts18:18 Chuin Paul chukoma chun sottah aum jouvin, sopitetoh akilhan, Priscilla le Aquila toh kilhonin Syria gam lama kongin akitoltai. Paul'in kitepna anei jeh-in Cenchria'a asam avouvin ahi." 
Acts18:19 Chuin Ephesia khopi alhunun, amani chu chukoma chun adalhatai: ahivangin ama chang kikhopna in'a alutnin Juda ho chu thu asuhtopin ahi." 
Acts18:20 Chuin chukoma chu um sot jep dingin alhovin ahile ama anom hih-in," 
Acts18:21 Amaho chu alhan, Iti jongle kut ahunglhung dingpa hi Jerusalem'a kaman tei ding ahi; Pathen lunggot lam ahile naheng uva hung kitnange atin, Ephesia kho adalhan, kongin akitoltai." 
Acts18:22 Chuin Ceasarea-a akumin, achetouvin houbung chu salam agapen, Antioch-a ahung kilesuh kit tai." 
Acts18:23 Chukoma chun chom khat aumin, chua kon chun Galatia le Phrygia gam ajotpeh-in, seijui ho jouse aphutdetle tai." 
Acts18:24 Hiche lai chun amin Apollos atiu Juda mi, Alexandria-a peng ahin, thuseija themtah le Pathen lekhabua thua hattah, Ephesia'a ahungin;" 
Acts18:25 Ama chu Pakai lampi thu kihila ahin, alungin agunchu lheh jengin, Pakai umchan thudol kichehtah-in aseijin, ahivangin aman John baptize chan thu bouchu ahen ahi." 
Acts18:25 Ama chu Pakai lampi thu kihila ahin, alungin agunchu lheh jengin, Pakai umchan thudol kichehtah-in aseijin, ahivangin aman John baptize chan thu bouchu ahen ahi." 
Acts18:26 Chuin kikhopna in'ah hakattah-in thu asei pantan ahi; chuin Priscilla le Aquila'n athuhil chu aja lhonin, a-in'a apui lhonin, Pathen lampi thu chu dihtah-in ahilchen lhontai." 
Acts18:27 Chuin ama chu Achaia gama ache nomtan ahile sopihon atilkhouvun, chuin ama chu anasanna dingun seijui ho hengah lekha asuntaove. Chukom alhunin lungsetna vanga atahsanho chu nasatah-in akitopin ahi." 
Acts18:28 Ijeh-inem itile Jesu chu Christa ahi, ti chu aman Pathen lekhabua konin aphot tohna avetsah-in, hakattah-in japi ang sungah Juda ho anel khup jengtan ahi." 
Acts19:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, Apollos Corinth khopi-a aum pet chun Paul'in sahgam lam achonlen, Ephesia ahung lhungin ahile seijui phabep amun ajah uva," 
Acts19:2 Natahsan uva chu Lhagao Theng nachannah-uvem? tin adongin ahi. Hichun amahon ajah-a, Lhagao Theng aume ti jong kajapouve, atiuve." 
Acts19:3 Chuin aman, Ahile ipiaba baptize changa nahiuvem, atile, amahon, John baptize chanin, atiuve." 
Acts19:3 Chuin aman, Ahile ipiaba baptize changa nahiuvem, atile, amahon, John baptize chanin, atiuve." 
Acts19:4 Chuin Paul'in John chun miho jah-a chu, kanunga hunga Christa Jesu chu tahsanun atia lung heina dinga baptize achansah ahibouve, ati." 
Acts19:4 Chuin Paul'in John chun miho jah-a chu, kanunga hunga Christa Jesu chu tahsanun atia lung heina dinga baptize achansah ahibouve, ati." 
Acts19:5 Chuin thu hiche chu ajah phatnun, Pakai Jesu minah baptize achang taove." 
Acts19:6 Chuin Paul'in achunguvah akhut angamin ahile Lhagao Theng achunguva achutai; chutichun paotin pao tangin thu aseijun, lhagao thu jong aseidoh taovin ahi." 
Acts19:7 Amaho chu abonchauvin mi somleni ahiuve. 
Acts19:8 Chutah chun Paul kikhopna in'ah alutnin, hangsan tah-in lha thum sungin thu ahilin, amaho chu Pathen gam thudol asuhtopin ajol lutnin ahi." 
Acts19:9 Ahivangin mi kimkhat alouchala, tahsan louva, mipi angsunga chuche lam chu aseiset joh phatnun, amaho chu adalhan, seijui ho atum huijin, tyrannus school-ah niseh-in akihoulim pitai." 
Acts19:10 Hitichun kum ni aumin ahile Asia gama chengho Juda hole Greek hon jong Pakai Jesu thu chu aja sohkei taove. 
Acts19:11 Pathen'in Paul khutnin thil kidang mainah abolsahpoi: 
Acts19:12 Chutichun ati chunga konin ultheh hijongle pon hijongle alauvin adamlou henga achoi jiuvin ahile, ahiveijun adalha jengun, lhagao bohho jong chu apotdoh jengji taove." 
Acts19:13 Chuin Juda vahvei doithema kivei koi koihamin lhagao boh vopteho chunga Jesu min apanun, Paul'in athu ahil Jesu mina thu kapeh nahi, atiuve." 
Acts19:14 Chule Juda thempu pipui Sceva chate pasal sagi ho jongchun chutobang chun aboluve. 
Acts19:15 Ahivangin lhagao boh chun adonbutnin, Keiman Jesu kahenai chule Paul jong kahenai, nangho koi nahiuvem? ati." 
Acts19:16 Chuin lhagao boh voppa chu achomin, amaho chunga achun, ajouvin, achunguva athanei jotan ahile, amaho chu chuche in'a kon chun asagoh keole mahapun ajamdoh taove." 
Acts19:17 Chuin hichu Ephesia cheng mi jouse Juda min jong, Greek min jong ahesohkei taove; chule abonchauva chungah kichat achutan, Pakai Jesu min choisangin aumtan ahi." 
Acts19:18 Atahsanho jong tamtah ahungun, athilbolu aseidoh-un aphongdoh taove." 
Acts19:19 Chule doichoiho tamtah-in jong alekhabu chengseu ahinchoi khomun, mi jouse mitmun agouvam taove. Chuche agolhah hou chu asuhtoule dangka sangsomnga man ahi." 
Acts19:20 Chutichun Pathen thu chu thahat tah-in akhangtouvin, athanei jotai." 
Acts19:21 Chuin chucheng thu kichai jou chun, Macedonia le Achaia gam chu chotsoh-a Jerusalem'a che ding lung angaiton, Chua kache jou chule Rome jong kagaphah teiding ahi, ati." 
Acts19:22 Chutichun alhachateni Timothy le Erastus chu Macedonia gama asolin, ama Asia gamah chomkhat aumdene." 
Acts19:23 Hiche lai vel chun chuche lampi thudola chun thunoh mainah asohpoi. 
Acts19:24 Ajeh chu amin Demetrius atiu dangka kheng mi khat aumin, ama chun dangka'in Diana lim akhengin, khutthemho ding chun kiveina phabepcha aumdoh sahpoi." 
Acts19:25 Chuin hiche mipa chun amaho chu amaho tobang natongho chengsetoh akou khomin, ajah uva: Miho, hiche ikiveiju hi ihao dohnao ahi, nanghon naheuve." 
Acts19:26 Chule Ephesia goh hilouva, Asia gam pumpi-a hiche mihempa Paul hin, miho khutna kisemho chu Pathen ahihih hele tia ajola, miho tamtah aheimang gamhi mu jong namuvin, he jong naheuve." 
Acts19:27 Hichea hin ikhut themu manlou ahung so ding kichat um jenggoh ahipoi; pathen lennu Diana houin jong hi nahsahmo-a hung kibola, chule Asia gam pumpile vannoi'in ahou amanu jeng jong hi, alet aloupina-a kona hung kiloilha khong ding ahi, ati." 
Acts19:28 Chuin chuche thu ajahtah-un, alunghang behseh jengun, Ephesia mite Diana alene! tin asam asam jengun ahi." 
Acts19:29 Chutichun akho thingin akilohsoh jengun, Macedonia gam mi Gaius le Aristarchus, Paul'in akholjin na-a alhonpi teni chu amanun, thakhat tah-in tot bolna in'ah alhailutpi jengui." 
Acts19:30 Chuin Paul miho lah-a chu lut ding akigon ahile seijui hon achesah pouve. 
Acts19:31 Chuin Asia gamma hou lamkai Paul kiloipi khenkhatnin mi ahinsolun, tot bolna ina chu gakilulah louhel dingin akham chah kheh jengun ahi." 
Acts19:32 Chuin akikhomho chu aboilahlah jengun, mi atamjon akikhopmu chu ajeh ahepouve; hijeh chun kimkhatnin thu khat asamun, kimkhatnin thu chom asamun ahi." 
Acts19:33 Chuin mipi lah-a kon chun Alexander ahinkai doh-un ahile Juda hon malama asonui. Chuin Alexander'in mipi lama chun akhut ajah-in, akihona thu sei akigon ahi." 
Acts19:34 Ahivangin ama chu Juda mi ahi aheuvin, Ephesia te Diana alene! atiuvin; hichu nidan ni geijenin asam asam jengun ahi." 
Acts19:35 Chuin khosung thusunpa chun mipi chu aphoh thipmin, Vo Ephesia mite, Ephesia mite khopi hi Jupiter-a kona hunglha pathen nu Diana le alim hou ahihi ahelou koi ummam?" 
Acts19:36 Chuti chu ahin hichenghi seilep thei ahilou jeh hin, thipbeh-a naum uva, chule thu doptoh louva ima nabol dingu ahipoi." 
Acts19:37 Ijeh-inem itile nanghon nahinkaiju miho hi houin chomma jong ahipouvin, eiho pathen nu seise-a taitoma jong ahipouve." 
Acts19:38 Hijeh chun Demetrius le atohpi khut themhon mi koiham chunga thu aneijule, kihehna in honsan aume, chule gamvaipoho jong aumnaove; hikoma khun gakiheh taohen." 
Acts19:39 Thu dang ima naholu ahivangle, angaija kikhopna-a seitoh ding ahi." 
Acts19:40 Tunia thunoh so thua hi ichunguva thu ahung umding kichat aume; hiche ikikhop lona penu chu hiche hi ahi tia idonbut thei nadiu aumlou jeh-in, ati." 
Acts19:41 Chuin hichu aseijin, mipi ho chu alhadohtai." 
Acts20:1 Chuin thunoh chu akichai jouvin Paul'in seijui ho chu agakou sah-in, amaho chu akoijin, Macedonia gama chedin akipat doh tai." 
Acts20:2 Chuin chuche gamkai sungse chu achonsoh-in, amaho chu thu tamtah-in atilkhouvin, Greek gam alhungtai." 
Acts20:3 Chuin chukoma chu lha thum acham jouvin, Syria gam lama kong'a kitola che ding agotle Juda hon achanlhih jeh-un, Macedonia jotpai ago kittan ahi." 
Acts20:4 Chuin Asia gam geijin Beria kho-a Sopater, Thessalonica'a Aristarchus le Secundus, Derbe kho-a Gaius le Timothy, Asia gama Tychicus le Trophimus, hicheng chun alhonpiuve." 
Acts20:5 Hiteho chu keiho masang-ah anacheuvin, Troas kho'ah eina ngah jingui." 
Acts20:6 Keiho vang chu cholsolou changlhah kut jouvin Philippi'a konin kongin kakitolun, ni nga nin Troas kho'ah ahengu kalhungui. Chua chun ni sagi kanichongui." 
Acts20:7 Chuin hapta kipat nikho masa ni changlhah hehbal dinga solchah ho ahung kikhop phatnun, Paul ajinga cheding akigot jehchun amaho chu akihoulimpin, khangkim geijin sottah thu aseije." 
Acts20:8 Akikhopnao indan chungnunga chu meivah tamtah uma ahi. 
Acts20:9 Chuin bangkotna tou gollhang khat amin Eutychus kitipa chu ana-imu lhutai; Paul'in athusei aseisot jeh chun ana-imulhun, chung dan thum na-a konin noi lamah alhatan ahile athisan agaphongdoh-ui." 
Acts20:10 Ahivangin Paul akumlhan achungah aboh-in, apomin, Lungdong hih-un, anuhkai nalainai, ati." 
Acts20:11 Chuin Paul akaltou kitnin, changlhah ahehbalin, anen, sottah ahoulimin, khovah geijin ajah uva thu aseijin, chutichun akipat dohtai." 
Acts20:12 Chuin amahon gollhangpa chu ahingin ahinpuijun, lungmon mainah-in alungmong tapouve." 
Acts20:13 Chuin keiho kong lama chun kanache masaovin, Paul lalutpa dingin Assos jonin kongin kakitol taove; aman akenga che agot jeh-a aman chutia chu agontohsa ahi." 
Acts20:14 Chuin Assos kho-a eikisuhtopi phatnun, kong'a kalalutnun, Mitylene kahunglhung taove." 
Acts20:15 Chuin chua kon chun kakitolun, akit nin Chios jon kalhungun, anikit nin Samos kalhungun, Tragyllium'a kakichol paovin, akit nin Miletus kalhungtaove." 
Acts20:16 Ajeh chu Paul'in Asia gama umsot ding anop lou jeh-a, kong'a kitola Ephesia khopi chu jotpai ding lunga agot jingsa mong ahin, ahitheile Jerusalem'a Pentecost mang dinga, kin loija che kigo-a ahi." 
Acts20:17 Chuin Miletus-a kon chun Ephesia'a mi asolin, houbung upaho agakousah-e." 
Acts20:18 Chuin aheng ahung lhun phatnun ajah uva: Keima Asia gama kahungtila pat, nangho koma kaum lai sungse-a kaumchan chu naheuve." 
Acts20:19 Lungnem tah le mitlhi pumin, chule Juda hon eichanlhih jinguva kona kachunga chua thohhesoh pumin, Pakai lhacha na katongin;" 
Acts20:20 Chule phatchomna ding thil imacha nangho dinga ka-im beihelin kavetsah sohkeijun, jalhang le a-in tinah kahiljiuvin," 
Acts20:21 Juda ho hengle Greek miho henga jong, Pathen lama lunghei thule, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa lam tahsan dingdol kahetsahjin ahi." 
Acts20:22 Chule tun, veuvin, lhagaova kisoma Jerusalem'a che ding kahi, chua chu kachunga ipi alhun ding kahepoi;" 
Acts20:23 Kikan le hesoh gentheijin eingah jinge ti Lhagao Thengin khotina eihetsah jingbou hi kahei. 
Acts20:24 Ahivangin Pakai Jesu'a kona kanamu lhacha natoh, Pathen lungset kipana thupha hettohsah ding, chule ka tohding hi kipah tah-a kachai molso thei ding poule hiche hohin eisulinglao pouvin, chule kahinkho jonghi ka-itchapoi." 
Acts20:25 Chule Pathen lenggam thu kaseilea kavale kavalena nangho hin, kamai namu kit lou dingu ahi, ti hi kahei." 
Acts20:26 Hiche jeh-a chu mi jouse thisana kona ngima kahi, ti tunia kahetsah nahiuve;" 
Acts20:27 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen thil ngaito jouse najah uva im kanei aumpoi. 
Acts20:28 Hijeh chun Pathen'in athisana achohsa houbung vesui dingle ching dinga Lhagao Thengin napan sah-u, kelngoi hon chengse chungle nangmaho chung changah chingtheijun." 
Acts20:29 Kache nungle ngei gilou nalah uva alutna, ahon hi ahoi lou ding kahei." 
Acts20:30 Chule nangho lah-a kona jong abang bang hung kipatdoh-a, amaho nung jui dinga seijui ho chu thu akaleh-a hila hung umding ahi." 
Acts20:31 Hijeh chun nangho kigingpha jingun; chule keiman kum thum sunga mitlhi puma asun ajan nangho nabon chaova tilkhou kahai louhel chu geldoh jingun," 
Acts20:32 Chule tun, sopiteho, nangho sadoh-a khantousah theija, chule mi akisuthengho lah-a nangho gou chansah theija, Pathen le alungsetna thu henga kakhumu nahiuve." 
Acts20:33 Koimacha dangka, sana, nihchen ponsil kadei chapoi." 
Acts20:34 Ahi, kakhutteni hin keimale kaloiho ngaichat chan kaboldoh ji-e ti nanghon naheuve." 
Acts20:35 Keiman ijakaija navettoh uva natho dingu kavetsah sohkeije; nanghon chutobanga chu natohgim uva ahatmoho phatna nabol dingu thu ahi. Lah sangin peh ochat aumjoi, tia Pakai tah-in asei jong chu geldoh jingun, ati." 
Acts20:36 Thu hicheng chu aseijin adilsun, abonchauvin atao khomun ahi." 
Acts20:37 Chuin abonchauvin hakan akapmun, Paul angong koijun, achopmun," 
Acts20:38 Kamai namu kit lou dingu ahi, atijeh tahchun alungse deh-un; kong mun geijin agathah taove." 
Acts21:1 Chuin ahitin ahi, keiho amahotoh kakikhen jouvun kongin kakitolun, jangkeijin Coos twikol kalhungun, akit nin Rhodes twikol kalhungun, chua konin kache paijun Patara kho kalhungui." 
Acts21:2 Chuin Phoenicia gama jonding kong khat kamuvin, achunga katouvun, kakitol taove." 
Acts21:3 Chuin Cyprus twikol akimu phatnin, veilam ngan kapelun, Syria gama kache paijun, kong'a thil solhah ding aum jeh-in Tyre kho-a kaki ngaove." 
Acts21:4 Chukom mun'a um seijui ho kaholdoh-un, chukomah ni sagi kanichongui. Lhagaovin ahetsah dungjuijun, amahon Paul chu Jerusalem'a che hihhen, atiuve." 
Acts21:5 Chuin ni hijat chu kaum jouvun, kakipatdoh-un kachena dingu kamasot taove; chuin amaho abonchauvin ajiteu le achateu pumin khopi kulpam geijin eihung thah-ui; chuin twikhanglen kama kadilsuvin kataovun ahi." 
Acts21:6 Chuin khat le khat kakilhah jouvun keiho kong'a kakal taovin, amaho vang a-in lamuva akilekit taove," 
Acts21:7 Chuin keiho Tyre'a kona twija kakholjinu kachai phatnun, Ptolemais kalhungun, twija kacheu kachaijui; chuin sopiho salam kaboh-un, amaho komah ni khat kaumui." 
Acts21:8 Ajingin keiho Paul to kiloise chua kon chun kakipatdoh-un, Ceasaria kahung lhungun; sagiho lah-a kipana thupha seile-a khat, Philip in'a kalhungun, amato kaum taove." 
Acts21:9 Ama chun chanu li aneijin, nungah theng ahiuvin, Pathen thu seiphonga pang ahiuve." 
Acts21:10 Chukoma chu ni ijat-ham kaum petnun, Juda gama konin amin Agabus atiu themgao khat ahungin ahi." 
Acts21:11 Ama chu kahenguva ahung lhun phatnin, Paul konggah chu alan akhut akeng akikanin, Lhagao Thengin hiti hin aseije, Hiche konggah neipa hi Jerusalem'a Juda hon hitia hi akanuva, chidang namdangho khutna apehdoh dingu ahi, ahung ti." 
Acts21:12 Chuin hiche thu chu kajah phat uvin, chukoma umhole keihon Paul Jerusalem'a che lou dingin kajol taove." 
Acts21:13 Chuin aman eidon butnun, nanghon ibola neika ka-uva kalung nasuhset nuham? Ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem'a kikan ding keogoh hilouva, Pakai Jesu min jala thi dinga jong kigosa dema um kahi, ati." 
Acts21:14 Aman keiho thu alah lou jeh-in Pakai lunggot got hihen katiuvin, kathip taovin ahi." 
Acts21:15 Chujouvin kathilkeovu kakigot un, Jerusalem'a kachetou taove." 
Acts21:16 Chule Ceasaria'a konin seijui koi koihamin eijuijun; amaho chun amin Mnason atiu Cyprus twikol'a seijui lui, lhunna-a kanei dingpao chu ahinpuijui." 
Acts21:17 Chuin Jerusalem kagalhunun, sopihon kipahtah-in einasangui." 
Acts21:18 Akit nin Paul keihotoh Jacob henga kalutnui; chua chun houbung upaho jouse jong abonchauvin aumui. 
Acts21:19 Chuin Paul'in amaho chu salam aboh jouvin, alhacha natoh-a kona Pathen'in chidang namdangho lah-a thil abolsah jouse chu abanchan aseitai." 
Acts21:20 Chuin amahon thu hicheng chu ajah phatnun Pakai avahchoi jun; chuin ajah-a, Sopi, Juda ho lah-a atahsan sang tamtah ahihi namui; chule amaho khu danthu lama gunchutah ahiuve." 
Acts21:21 Ahin amahon nangma thudol, nangma hin chidang namdangho lah-a Juda ho chu Mosi dan thu pailhah ding thu nahilin, chapang chep atan lou dingu, chule chonna dan ngaija chon lou ding tin, nahil lei ti ajaove." 
Acts21:22 Hijeh-a chu iti ding hitam? Nangma hung ajah-ule mipi hung kikhom teidiu ahi. 
Acts21:23 Hijeh chun thu khat seipeh-unge, hichu bolin; kitepna neija mi li hikoma hin kaneijui;" 
Acts21:24 Amaho chu puijin lang nangma toh kisuthengun, chule asam vona dingu nangman sum toh-in; chutile nangma thudola athu jah-u chu ima hilou ahi, nangmatah chonna dan ngaija nachon chu amahon ahetsoh dingu ahi." 
Acts21:25 Chidang namdang atahsanho thudol vang, chutobang thil chu nitlouva, milim houna thil neh, thineh, akimeh lihtho sa neh chule jonthanhoi ja kona akikangse nadiuva kasut nuva kathotsao ahitai." 
Acts21:26 Chutah-in Paul'in miho chu apuijin, akit nin amaho chutoh akisuthengun, amaho khat cheh-a dinga thilto akito kahse-a akisuh thengna dingu nikho kichaina ding chu thempu gahetsah dingin houin'a alutnin ahi." 
Acts21:27 Chuin ni sagi alhin ding konchan Asia gama Juda ho chun houin sunga Paul amu phatnun, mipi chu abonchan atilseuvin ama chu amanun," 
Acts21:28 Israel miho, neihuvin; hichepa hi ahi gamtina mi jouse henga, Juda mite le danthu, chule hiche mun seisele-a chu: chule chuche jeng hilouvin, houin'a Greek mi alutpin, hiche intheng hi asuboh-e, tin asamtauve." 
Acts21:29 (Hichu masanga khopi sunga Ephesia mi Trophimus toh amuva ahile, Paul'in ama chu houin'a alutpia angaitou ahi)." 
Acts21:30 Chuin akhothingin akiloh jengun, miho chu alhai khomun; Paul chu amanun, houin'a konin akaidoh-un; kotkhah ho chu akhahpai jengui." 
Acts21:31 Chuin ama chu tha dinga agot laijun, Jerusalem khopi-a mi jouse aboije ti thu sepai vaipipo heng alhungtai." 
Acts21:32 Chuin ama chun sepaiho le sepai ja lamkaiho apuijin, ahenguva alhaisuh taove. Chuin amahon sepai vaipipo le sepaiho chu amu phatnun, Paul avoh-u chu atangui." 
Acts21:33 Chuin sepai vaipipo chun ahin naijin, Paul chu atuh-in, thihkhao ni-a kan dingin thu apen; amahi koi hija chule ipi asuhset ham, tin adongtai." 
Acts21:34 Chuin mipi lah-a chun akimkhatnin thuchom asamin, adang kimkhatnin thuchom asamun ahi. Chuin husan jeh-a thutah chu ahetdoh theilou phatnin, kulpi sunga pui lut ding thu apetai." 
Acts21:35 Chuin Paul leikalbi ageijin, mipi asousang behseh jeh chun sepaihon ama chu adoptho taove." 
Acts21:36 Ajeh chu mihonpi chun, sumangin, sumangin, tia asapmuva ajui lellul jengu ahi." 
Acts21:37 Chuin Paul kulpi sunga apui lut ding konun aman sepai vaipipo jah-a chun, najah-a thu kaseithei dingham? ati. Chuin vaipo chun, Greek pao nahet em?" 
Acts21:38 Masang laija miho tilsea, mithat mi sangli gamthipma puidoh-a, Egypt gam mi chu nahilouham? ati." 
Acts21:39 Ahinla Paul'in, Keima Cilicia gama Tarsus khopi-a Juda mi kahi, khopi maimaija mi kahipoi: chule nahenga katao ahi, miho jah-a thu kaseina dingin phalna neipen, ati." 
Acts21:40 Chuin aman athusei ding aphalpeh phat-in, Paul leikalbi chunga chun adingin miho chu akhutnin ajapmin ahi. Chuin athipchet phatnun, ajah uva chun Hebrew paovin thu aseijin:" 
Acts22:1 Miho, Sopitele Pateho, tu-a kakihona thu kasei ding hi ngaijun, ati." 
Acts22:2 (Chuin aman ajah uva Hebrew paova thu asei ajah phatnun, ahathip chehtauvin ahi)." 
Acts22:3 Keima Juda mi, Cilicia gama Tarsus khopi-a penga, hiche khopi sunga hi Gamaliel khophang bula seilena, iputeu ipateu chonna dan kikheltah dungjuija kihildoh-a, tunia nangho banga hi Pathen lama gunchutah kahi;" 
Acts22:4 Chule hiche Lampi mihohi thina geijin kabolsen, anumei apasal'in kakanin songkul'a kakhum jin ahi." 
Acts22:5 Chujongle thempu chungnungle gamsung upaho jousen jong hiche thu chu eihetpiuvin; amaho-a kon chun sopiho henga dingin lekha kalan, Damascus-a um jouse talent peh dinga hinkana Jerusalem'a hintol dingin kachen ahi." 
Acts22:6 Chuin ahitin ahi, kachele Damascus khokom kageijin sun kim dontah-in, phulou helouvin van'a kon vah nasatah khatnin kavel ahinsalvah soh jenge." 
Acts22:7 Hichun keima tolah kalhutai, chuin kajah-a, Saul, Saul, nangin ibola keima eibolsea nahim? tia seija aw khat kajai." 
Acts22:8 Chuin keiman kadonbut nin, Pakai, Nang koi nahim? kati. Chuin aman kajah-a, Keima nabolset jing Nazareth Jesu kahi, ati." 
Acts22:9 Chuin kalhonpi ho chun vah chu amuvin, chule akichauvin, kajah-a thusei aw vangchu ajapouve." 
Acts22:10 Chuin keiman, Pakai, ipi kabol dingham? kati. Chuin Pakai chun kajah-a, thoudoh-in Damascus kho-a lutnin; chukoma chu nabol dinga kigo jouse aboncha kiseipeh ding nahi, eiti." 
Acts22:11 Chuin vah loupi jeh-a chu kho kamu lou phatnin, kalhonpihon khutnin eikaijun, Damascus kaluttai." 
Acts22:12 Chuin mi khat Anania, danthu dungjuija Pathen ngaisah, chule chukoma cheng Juda ho jouse seiphat chu kahenga ahungin, kakoma adingin kajah-a," 
Acts22:13 Sopi Saul, kho mutan, eiti. Chuin hiche pettah chun ama chu kamutan ahi." 
Acts22:14 Chuin aman, Ipu ipateu Pathen'in ama lunggot lam he dingle, Michondih tah chu mu-a, Akam sunga kon sohdoh a-aw ja dinga napansah ahitai." 
Acts22:15 Ijeh-inem itile nangman namule najah thua chu mi jouse hettohsah-a napan ding ahi. 
Acts22:16 Chule ipi dinga khongai nalai nahim? Kipatdoh inlang baptize changin, Pakai minin taovin, nachonset kisop lhah-in, eiti." 
Acts22:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, Jerusalem'a kakile kit phatnin, houin sunga kataole kagaochang tai." 
Acts22:18 Chuin, kino-in, chule Jerusalem'a konin potdoh loijin: ijeh-inem itile amahon keima thudola nangma thuhil alah lou dingu ahi, tia kajah-a thuseija chu kamun ahi." 
Acts22:19 Chuin keiman, Pakai amahotah-in nangma tahsan ho songkul'a kakhuma kikhopna intina kavohji chu aheuve," 
Acts22:20 Chule nathu hettohsah Stephen thisan aso pettah uva jong akoma kadina, thadia kaphatsah-a athat teho ponho kanachin ahi, kati." 
Acts22:21 Chuin aman kajah-a, Kipatdoh-in, Keiman nangma gamlatah-a chidang namdangho henga kasoljoh ding nahi, eititai, ati." 
Acts22:22 Chuin chuche thu gei chun angaijun, chuin aw sangtah-in, Hitobang mi hi vannoi leisetna konin sumangin, ahinga umhoi ahipoi, atitaove." 
Acts22:23 Chuin kho asamun, apon alehlhauvin, van lama leivui atheuvin ahile," 
Acts22:24 Sepai vaipipo chun ama chu kulpi sunga pui lut ding thu apen, achunga chutobang tah-a akhosapmu chu ajeh hetdohna dingin, jepma patep dingin asoltai." 
Acts22:25 Chuin savun khaova akantah phatnun, Paul'in akoma ding sepai jalamkai jah-a chun, Themmo sahna bei Rome mi jepding chu nangma dinga dan ngai hinam? ati." 
Acts22:26 Sepai jalamkai chun thu hichu ajah phatnin, sepai vaipipo henga chun agachen, Nathil bolgot nahin chigtheijin; ajehchu mipa khu Rome mi ahi, ati." 
Acts22:27 Chuin sepai vaipipo chu ahungin ajah-a, Rome mi nahim? neisei peh-in, ati. Hivhun aman, Kahi, ati." 
Acts22:28 Chuin sepai vaipipo chun, Keiman sum tamtah kapeh-a chamlhatna hi kachan ahibouve, ati. Chuin Paul'in, keivang ahisa penga kahi, ati." 
Acts22:29 Chutah-in athem amo hetdohna-a bolgim dinga kigosadem hochu hiche pettah chun akoma konin achemang taove; chule sepai vaipipo chun Rome mi ahi ahedoh-in, amatah-in akansah jeh chun akichatai." 
Acts22:30 Akit nin Juda hon Paul ahehnau thu chu hetchenna dingin sepai vaipipo chun ama chu alhamin, thempu pipuiho leh houvaipoloi aboncha kikhom dingin thu apen, Paul ahinpuilhan a-anguvah adinsahtai." 
Acts23:1 Chuin Paul'in houvaipoloi chu ave changmelin, Sopiteho, tuni geija hi imalam jouse-a ase apha hekah sohkeija Pathen anga lung thengsela um kahi, ati." 
Acts23:2 Anania thempu chungnungin akoma dingpa chu akam bengin asole. 
Acts23:3 Chutah-in Paul'in ajah-a, Vo bang kiloibang, Pathen'in nang nadenjoh ding ahi; nangma dan ngaitah-a kathu tan dinga touva chuche dan chu napal lhah-a kei deng dinga mi nasol ham? ati." 
Acts23:4 Chuin akoma dinghon, Nangman Pathen thempu chungnung chutia chu nahouset ong, atiuve." 
Acts23:5 Chuin Paul'in, sopite, thempu chungnung ahilam kahet lou ahi, ijeh-inem itile, nangin namite chunga vaipo chunga thuse sei hih-in, tin akisune, ati." 
Acts23:6 Ahivangin Paul'in amaho chu keh khat Saddukai ahia, keh khat Pharasai ahi ahet phatnin, houvaipoloi lah-a chun asamin, sopite, keima Pharasai chapa, Pharasai kahi; athiho thodoh kit kinep thua kathu kitana ahi, ati." 
Acts23:7 Chuin thu hiche chu asei phat chun Pharasai hole Saddukai ho akinelun, mipi chu akilangkhen taove." 
Acts23:8 Ajeh chu Saddukai hochun thokit, vantil, chule lhagao hicheng chu aumpoi, atiu ahin, Pharasai hovang chun hicheng chu aume tia a-oiju ahi." 
Acts23:9 Hitichun apoh vengvung jengun; chuin Pharasai mi danthu sunho phabep adingdoh-un, anelun, Keihon hichepa agitlouna imacha kamupouve; lhagaovin ahim, vantil ahimin, ajah-a thu asei hikhat hihdem, Pathen to kidoupou hite, atiuve." 
Acts23:10 Chuin hachang nela akinel phatnun, amaho chun Paul chu sattel unte tin sepai vaipipo chu akichan, kumlha suh-a alah uva kona lahpeh-a kulpi sunga pui lut dingin sepaiho chu asoltai." 
Acts23:11 Chuin hiche jan chun Pakai akoma adingin, kicha hih-in Paul; ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem'a keima thudol nahettohsah banga hi Rome khopi-a jong nahettohsah ding ahi, ati." 
Acts23:12 Chuin khovah phatnin Juda ho akihou somun Paul itha masangseuvin anneh twidon bolpouhite, tin kihahsel in akihanlho taove." 
Acts23:13 Chutia miphil dinga ki hou soma chu mi somli val hiuve. 
Acts23:14 Chuin amaho chu thempu pipuiho le upaho henga acheuvin, Keiho kihahsel khohtah-a kaki hahsel uva, Paul katha masangseuva imacha tep louhel dinga kihan lho-a kahitaove." 
Acts23:15 Hiche jeh chun tun nangho houvaipoloi toh athudol chu kichen cheh-a hettoh-a bolphat ding ngaitobeh kisao vinlang, jingle naheng uva ahinpuina dingin sepai vaipipo henga seijun; aman nangho kom ahinphah kah-a that dinga kigosa dema um kahiuve, agatiuve." 
Acts23:16 Chuin achanlhih-u thu chu Paul sopinu chapan ajan, ahungin kulpi sunga chun alutnin Paul jah-a ahung seitai." 
Acts23:17 Chuin Paul'in sepai ja lamkaiho khat ahenga akouvin, hiche gollhang hi sepai vaipipo henga puijin; ajehchu seinom khat aneije, ati." 
Acts23:18 Chuin aman apuijin sepai vaipipo henga achen, Hiche gollhang hin najah-a seinom aneije tin, sohchang Paul'in eikouvin nangma henga hin puijin eiti, tin agaseije." 
Acts23:19 Chutichun aman akhutnin atuh-in achoma apuidoh-in guhthimin adongin, Kajah-a sei ding ipi thu naneijem, ati." 
Acts23:20 Chuin aman, Paul thudol hi kichen cheh-a dongtoh ding ngaito banga, jingle houvaipoloi kikhopna-a napuina dinga nahenga thum dingin Juda ho akilol taovin ahi." 
Acts23:21 Ahin nangman amaho thu la hih-in; ijeh-inem itile mi somli valin, Paul itha masang seuvin anneh twidon bolpouhite, tin akihahselun, achanglhi jingui, chule tu-a hi kigosa dema uma, nangma thupeh mai ngah jinga um ahiuve, ati." 
Acts23:22 Chutichun sepai vaipipo chun gollhangpa chu ahilchah-in, Kajah-a naphondoh thu hicheng hi koima jah-a sei hih-in, atin alhadohtai." 
Acts23:23 Chuin aman sepai jalamkai ni ahenga akouvin, hiche thuhi apei: Jan nidan ko-a Ceasaria che ding akenga che sepai jani, sakol sepai somsagi chule tengchoi sepai jani gotsan koijun;" 
Acts23:24 Chule Paul Felix gamvaipo heng bitkeija pui lhungna dingin, ama tousahna ding sa jong gotsademin koijun, ati." 
Acts23:25 Chuin hitihin lekha asune; 
Acts23:26 Claudius Lysias'in Lal chungnung pen Felix gamvaipo henga: Salam. 
Acts23:27 Juda hon hiche mipa hi amanun, atha ding konun keima sepaihotoh kakonin, ama hi Rome mi ahi ti kahen kahuhdoh tai." 
Acts23:28 Chuin ipi jeh-a aheh-u ahi ahehnao hetdohna dingin houvaipoloi kikhopna-a kapuije. 
Acts23:29 Hia chun thina theihoi le kikanna theihoi thudolin ahehpouve, amaho chonna dan thua asuhkhel amatdoh-u ahitoh-e." 
Acts23:30 Juda hon ama hi thadinga agot uva achanlhih-u kahetdoh phatna, khongai louhela apettah-a nangma henga kahinsol pai jeng ahi, chule ahehho jong nangma ang sunga ahehnau thu sei dingin thu kapei. Damtan." 
Acts23:31 Chuin sepaihon thupeh dungjui chun ajan jan-in Paul chu apuijun, Antipatris lama achepi taove." 
Acts23:32 Ahin ajingin sakol sepaiho chu amatoh alhonsah-un, amaho kulpi lama akiletaove." 
Acts23:33 Chuin amaho Ceasaria alhunun, lekha chu gamvaipo chu apeuvin, Paul jong chu adinsah taove." 
Acts23:34 Chuin aman lekha chu asimin, hoi gampoh mi nahim, tin adongin, chuin Cilicia gam mi ahi ahetdoh phatnin," 
Acts23:35 Naheh ho jong ahung tengule nathu ngainange, ati. Chuin Herod inpia koi dingin thu apetan ahi." 
Acts24:1 Chuin ni nga jouvin thempu chungnung Anania chu upaho phabep toh, chule Tertullus atiu thukalthem khattoh acheuvin, Paul ahehnau thu chu gamvaipo jah-a chun aseijui." 
Acts24:2 Chuin Paul agakouvun ahile Tertullus'in ahehnan achunga thu aseipanin, Nangma vanga lungmon chungnunga kalung monuva, chule nangma vaihom them vanga hiche nam mite hi imalam jouse-a phatdoh sah-a aumu kamu jeh-in," 
Acts24:3 Vo lal chungnung pen Felix, a-imatih chanin hoikom hoikoma jong lung kipahtah-in kasangui." 
Acts24:4 Ahivangin nangma dinga theida um hiding kanompoi, kathu-u themcha kasei dingu hi nami lungsetna-a neingaipeh dinguva kataovu ahi." 
Acts24:5 Ijeh-inem itile keihon hichepa hi mi sugam, chule vannoi leiset chung jouse-a Juda ho lah-a vaipi chohsea, chule Nazareth chona chonho lamkai pipu ahi kaman doh-un:" 
Acts24:6 Chumale houin suhboh dinga jong agot jeh-a kamatnu ahin, kadannu dung juija athu katan diu dol ahi." 
Acts24:7 Ahin sepai sang lamkai Lysias'in in eihung buluvin, thahat sanna kakhut nuva konin ahung lahmangin," 
Acts24:8 Ahehho nahenga hung dingin thu apen ahi. Amatah chu nangman dongtohle chun kahehnao hi adih adihlou abonchan hesoh keinan nate, ati." 
Acts24:9 Chuin Juda ho jong chun ajomun, hicheng chu ahicheh-e, atiuve." 
Acts24:10 Chuin gamvaipo chun thu sei dinga Paul akhasuh phatnin, Paul'in adonbutnin: Kum sottah nangma hiche nam mite thutana panga nahitai ti kahen, lung kipahtah-in kakihona thu seijinge;" 
Acts24:11 Nangman henan natin, Pathen hou dinga Jerusalem'a kachehi ni somle nini aval hihlaije:" 
Acts24:12 Houin sunga mi khattoutoh kakinel, ahiloule kikhopnale kho sunga mihonpi katilsetna imacha eimupouve." 
Acts24:13 Tu-a eihehnao chengse jong chu aphotchenna hiche ahi ati theipouve. 
Acts24:14 Ahin keiman nangma jah-a kaseidoh hiche hi ahi, Amahon houdan chom asah-u lam dungjuija keiman kaputeu kapateu Pathen chu kahouva, danthua le themgaoho lekhabua kisun dungjuija chu thil jouse katahsana," 
Acts24:15 Amaho jongin michondih jong michondih lou jong athi thokit umding ahi tia akat jingu, hitiho chu keiman Pathen lama kinepna kanei ahi;" 
Acts24:16 Hiche jeh-a chu Pathen le mihem lama suhkhel beija, ase apha hetkahna neija umdinga a-imatih chana kihabol jing kahi." 
Acts24:17 Chuin kum tamtah nunga kanam vaipiu min ahunau thilpeh le thilto hinpo-a hunga kahin; 
Acts24:18 Hichea chun Asia gama Juda hon houin'a kakisuh theng chu eimuve; mihonpi toh kaumpoi, chule thunoh baotam imacha jong aumpoi." 
Acts24:19 Amaho chu hikoma nangma anga hin umuhen, kachunga thu eihehna ding aneijule seijule hi ding ahi." 
Acts24:20 Ahiloule hiteho hin seijuhen, houvaipoloi anga kadina chu kasuhkhel ipi amatdoh-um," 
Acts24:21 Alah uva kadina kho kasapma, athiho thokit thua tunia na-ang sunguva eikikouva eikidonga ahitai, tia kasei tailou chu, ati." 
Acts24:22 Ahivangin Felix'in chuche Lam thudol chu ahetchet jeh-in, athu tan ding chu akhongaijin, Lysias sepai vaipipo ahung tengle nathu-u ngaito chen nange, ati." 
Acts24:23 Chuin aman Paul chu sepai jalamkai khat anga sah-in, chamlhat tah-a aumsah-a, ahenga hung ajenle dingle agol apaiho jong akham lou dingin athupeh-in ahi." 
Acts24:24 Chuin ni ijat-ham jouvin Felix chu a-inneipi Juda numei Drusilla toh ahungin, Paul agakou sah-in, Christa tahsan thudol asei chu angaijin ahi." 
Acts24:25 Chuin aman chonphatna, kitim them, chule khonunga hung lhung ding thupi kitan thudol asei phatnin, Felix atija jahtan, adonbut nin, Tun chetan; keiman ka-on phatle nangma hungkousah nange, ati." 
Acts24:26 Chujongle Paul chun sum eipentin kilhadoh tante tijong akinem min, phiveng vungin akousah-in ahoulim pijin ahi." 
Acts24:27 Ahivangin kum ni nungin, Porcius Festus'in Felix panmun chu ahinkhel tai; hichun Felix chun Juda ho deija umding ngaitonan, Paul chu akanin adalhatai." 
Acts25:1 Festus chuche gamkai sunga ahunglhun, ni thum jouvin Ceasaria'a konin Jerusalem'a achetouvin ahi." 
Acts25:2 Chuin thempu pipuiho le Juda miho pipuhon ajah-a Paul chungchang thu ahilou lamin anaseijun; 
Acts25:3 Chule lampia anachanlhih uva anatha theina dingu lungthim ngaiton, ama chunga chu amaho alungsetnuva Paul chu Jerusalem'a ahinpuina dingin ataovun ahi." 
Acts25:4 Ahivangin Festus'in adonbutnin, Paul Ceasaria kikoija ahi, chule keima khu lama chevah ding kahi." 
Acts25:5 Hijeh chun ama khun suhkhel anei ahile, nalah uva thunei chengse keimatoh kilhonin hungsuh-uhen, hung heh-u hen, ati." 
Acts25:6 Chuin amaho lah-a ni som val anichon nungin Ceasaria achesuh paijin, akit nin thutan na-a atouvin, Paul gapui dingin thu apetai." 
Acts25:7 Chuin ama ahung lhun phatnin, Jerusalem'a kona hungsuh Juda ho akimvela adingun, Paul dounan thu gilou tamtah-in aheh-un, ahivanginla aphotchenna avetsah theipouve." 
Acts25:8 Chuin Paul'in ama kihonna thu aseijin, Juda ho danthu ahin, houin ahin, ahiloule Ceasar douna ahin, keiman imacha kasuhset kasuhkhel aumpoi, ati." 
Acts25:9 Ahivangin Festus chun Juda ho deija umding angaiton, adonbutnin, Paul jah-a, Nangma Jerusalem'a chetouva khukoma keima ang sunga hicheng thudol hi ngaito-a umding nanop em, ati." 
Acts25:10 Ahinla Paul'in, Keima kathu kitanna dingdol Ceasar thutanna anga dinga kahi. Keiman Juda ho ima kasusepoi, nangman jong nahe sohkeinai." 
Acts25:11 Chutia akhang gilou kahia, thina theiloma suhset nei kahile, thi ding kadapoi; amavang hicheng eihehna chengseu hi tahbeh ahiloule koiman amaho khutna eipedoh thei ponte, Ceasar henga ngehna kabole, ati." 
Acts25:12 Chutah-in Festus vaibol chengsetoh akihoutoh phatnin adonbutnin, Nangman Ceasar henga ngehna nabol ahitan, Ceasar heng nache ding ahi, ati." 
Acts25:13 Chuin ni ijat-ham jouvin Agrippa lengpa le Bernice chu Ceasaria ahung lhung lhonin, Festus chu salam ahung boh lhone." 
Acts25:14 Chuin chua sottah anichong lhonin ahile, Festus'in lengpa jah-a chun Paul thu umchan aseijin, Felix dalhah sohchang kihen khat aumin," 
Acts25:15 Ama chun Jerusalem'a kaum petnin thempu pipuiho le Juda upahon athu eihetsah-un, athu tana chai dingin kahenga athumui." 
Acts25:16 Akihehpale ahehho kimaito-a akihona thule ahehnau thudol seina neisah masanga mi koi hile thidinga pehdoh chu Rome mi chonna ngai ahipoi tia, amaho chu kana donbut ahi;" 
Acts25:17 Chuin amaho hikoma ahung kikhomun ahile, keima jong chom khatcha geisang louvin akit ni maman thutan na-a katouvin, amapa chu kagakou sahtai." 
Acts25:18 Chuin ahehho chu akim vela adingun, akhan gitlouna thun heh-unte, tia kaginchat bang chu achunga thukhoh imacha aseipouve;" 
Acts25:19 Amaho hou thudol leh Jesu atiu mithisa khat Paul'in ahing kitne ati thudola kinel ahibouvui. 
Acts25:20 Chuin chutobang thu chu atannaje kahevah hih-in, Jerusalem'a chea chuche athu chu tan ding anop anop lou kadongin ahi." 
Acts25:21 Ahinla Paul'in ama chung changthu Leng chungnung tandinga ngehna aneiphatnin, Ceasar henga kasol thei ding kahse-a koi dingin thu kapetai, ati." 
Acts25:22 Chuin Agrippa'in Festus jah-a, kei jong keimatah-in hichepa thu chu jaleng kalung ahi, ati. Aman, Jingle janavehta chun, ati." 
Acts25:23 Chutichun ajingin Agrippa Bernice toh loupitah-a ahunga, thu ngaina inpia sepai Vaipipo hotoh khopi sunga miho pipu chengsetoh ahung lut phat lhonin, Festus thusah-in Paul chu ahin puilut taove." 
Acts25:24 Chuin Festus'in, Lengpa Agrippa chule hikoma kaumpi mi jousen hichepa hi namuve, ama hi Juda mihonpin Jerusalem'a jong, hikoma jong kahenga aheh-un, ahinga umhoi ahitapoi, tin asamui." 
Acts25:25 Ahivangin athina theilom ima akhan gitlouna keiman kamudohpoi; chule aman leng chungnung henga ngehna abol jeh-in sol dinga kagot ahi. 
Acts25:26 Ahin achungchang thudol ka pakai henga gahsut ding thu kichentah ima kaneipoi. Hiche jeh-a chu na-ang uva, Vo Agrippa lengpa, nangma ang sungtah-a kahinpuidoh ahi, ijem tia athu dohtoh nunga sutding themkat kanei theina dingin:" 
Acts25:27 Ijeh-inem itile akihehna thu sun louva sohchang gahsol chu kitoh kasapoi, ati." 
Acts26:1 Chuin Agrippa'in Paul jah-a, nakihonna thu seitheijin nate, ati. Chutah-in Paul'in aban ajah-in, akihona thu aseijin," 
Acts26:2 Lengpa Agrippa, Juda hon eihehna jouseu thua tunia nangma anga kakihona thu sei dinga kaum hi lungnom kaki salheh jenge," 
Acts26:3 Ajehpen chu nangman Juda ho lah-a chonna danle kinelna thunoh jouse nahet sohkeija, nathemsoh jeh chu ahi. Hijeh chun khongai themin kathu ngaijin tia katao ahi." 
Acts26:4 Kachapan laija patna kanam mite lah-a, chule Jerusalem'a kanunchan kakhanchan chu Juda hon ahe sohkeijui;" 
Acts26:5 Atila patna ahet sohkeisao ahi jeh chun, kahou danuva chondan khelpentah dungjuija kachona Pharisai chona kachon chu sei nomleu asei thei dingu ahi." 
Acts26:6 Chule tu-a hi kapu kapateu Pathen'in athutep chu kineppi jeh-a athu kitan dinga hikoma ding kahi: 
Acts26:7 Hiche thutep chu mu ding kinema, phung somle phung ni hin gunchu tah-a asun ajana Pathen ahouvu ahi; hiche kinepna jeh-a chu, Lengpa Agrippa, Juda hon eiheh-u ahi." 
Acts26:8 Pathen'in athiho akaithouve ti ibola nanghon tahsan umlouva nangaitou ham? 
Acts26:9 Keiman jong Nazareth Jesu min douna hin thil tamtah akaleh-a bol ding ahi tin kangaiton ahi. 
Acts26:10 Chule hichu Jerusalem'a bol jong kabolin, chule thempu pipuiho-a konin thuneina kamun, mithengho tamtah songkul'a kakhumin, chule athao jong chun kaphasah-in ahi." 
Acts26:11 Chule kikhopna in jouse-a talent kape jingjin, engsanin kataitomsah-in, achunguva chun kalungsa tuntun jengin, migam dang khopi gei sanin kabolsen ahi." 
Acts26:12 Hitichun thempu pipuiho-a konin thuneina le eisolnao lekha kamun, Damascus lama kachen ahi." 
Acts26:13 Hichun, vo lengpa, sunkim tah-in lampia chun van'a kon vah khat nisa sanga vahjo kamun, hichun kakimvel le kalhonpiho chengse asalvahsoh jenge." 
Acts26:14 Chuin tolla kalhuh gam phatnun, keiman Hebrew paova kajah-a, Saul, Saul, ibola nangin neibolset jingham? nang dingin thihtul monghem lho ahahsai, eitia aw khat kajai." 
Acts26:15 Chuin keiman, Pakai, nang koi nahim? katile Pakai chun, Keima nabolset jing Jesu kahi." 
Acts26:16 Ahivangin thouvin chule nakengin pansan dingin; nangman thil namusa chengse le khonunga nahenga kaphondoh ding chengsea kathu hettohsah dingle kalhacha-a pansah dinga, hiche dinga chu nahenga kahung kilah ahi;" 
Acts26:17 Kamiteho-a konle, tu-a kasolna chidang namdang ho-a kona kahuhdoh ding nahi;" 
Acts26:18 Amitnu hadohsah dingle muthim lah-a kona khovah-a, chule Satan thuneina noija aumuva kona Pathen henga akihei theina dingule, achonsetnao akisuhbeija, keima eitahsan vanga kisuthengho lah-a gou alo theina dinguva ahenguva kasol ding nahi, eiti." 
Acts26:19 Hijeh chun, vo lengpa Agrippa, keima vanthil kamu thua chu nung louvin kaumpoi;" 
Acts26:20 Ahin amasan Damascus-a umho jah-a, chuin Jerusalem le Juda gam pumpi, chule chidang namdangho henga jong lung aheijuva Pathen lama akiheijuva, lungheitoh kilom thil abolna dingun kaseiphong letan ahi." 
Acts26:21 Hijeh-a chu Juda hon houin sunga eimat uva tha dinga eigotnu ahi. 
Acts26:22 Pathen'a kona panpina kanei jeh-a tuni geija kadina, alen aneo kahetsah ahi, thu dang ima kaseipoi, themgaoho le Mosi'n hung ding ahi tia aseiju," 
Acts26:23 Christa chun gim genthei athoh tei dingje, athiho lah-a thoudoh kit amasapen ahia; amite le chidang namdangho henga vah aphondoh dingje kaseibou chu ahi, ati." 
Acts26:24 Aman chutia akihona thu aseija adonbut chun, Festus chun aw sangtah-in, Vo Paul, angola nahi; nalekha them sangin nasuhngol ahitai, ati." 
Acts26:25 Ahin Paul'in, Vo michung nung Festus, angola kahipoi; thudihtah le chihna thu kaseijoh ahibouve." 
Acts26:26 Ijeh-inem itile lengpan jong hiche thudol hi ahei; hijeh-a chu ama ang sunga ngamtah-a kasei ahi; ajeh chu hiche hi ningkoija kibol ahilou jeh-in, ama jah-a ki-ima imacha aumpoi ti chentah-in kahei." 
Acts26:27 Leng Agrippa, nangman themgaoho thuhi natahsan em? Natahsane ti kahei, ati." 
Acts26:28 Chuin Agrippa'in Paul jah-a, thu themcha-a jollhah-a Christian hisah ding neigoi, ati." 
Acts26:29 Chuin Paul'in thu themchan hihen thu tampin hile, nangma chang hilouvin, tunia kathusei ja jouse hi kakikan naho tailou hin, abonchan keimatoh bangleu tin Pathen henga kathume, ati." 
Acts26:30 Chuin aman chutia aseiphat chun, lengpa, gamvaipo, Bernice chule atoukhompi ho setoh akipat doh-un," 
Acts26:31 Chuin achoma acheuvin akihouvun, Hichepa hin thina hoile kanna dingdol thil ima asuhkhel aumpoi, atiuve." 
Acts26:32 Chuin Agrippa'n Festus jah-a, Hichepa hin Ceasar henga ngehna abolou hile, lhadoh thei ahi, ati." 
Acts27:1 Chuin kong'a kitola Italy gama kache dingu thu akichet phatnin, Augustus sepai loi lah-a Julius atiu sepai jalamkai khutnah Paul le sohchang dangho apedoh taove." 
Acts27:2 Chuin Asia gamkolvel muntina kitol dinga kigo Adramyttium kong'a kalutnun kakitol taove; chule Macedonia gama Thessalonica mi Aristarchus toh kalhonui. 
Acts27:3 Akit nin Sidon kho-ah kong kangaove. Chule Julius'in Paul alungsetnin, agol apaiho henga chea gakithado dingin asole." 
Acts27:4 Chuin chua kon chun twi chunga kacheuvin, hui akaleh lama anun jeh-in Cyprus twikol le lam lamah kakitol taove." 
Acts27:5 Chuin Cilicia le Pamphylia depma twikhanglen kakhelun, Lucia gama Myra khopi kalhungui." 
Acts27:6 Chukoma chun sepai jalamkai chun Italy gam jon ding Alexandria kong khat amudoh-in, hi chun eikhum taove." 
Acts27:7 Chuin sottah olchachan kakitolun, hahsa tah-in Cnidus jon kagei hamhamui, huijin einan jeh-un Salmone gam Crete twikol le-a kakitolui." 
Acts27:8 Hitichun nahnah-in Lasea khopi kom Kaimunhoi atiu mun khat kalhungun ahi. 
Acts27:9 Chuin akisot behseh tahjeh le kong'a kitol setto kichat aum jeh chun (hichu an ngol kichai jou ahitan), Paul'in amaho chu akhamin," 
Acts27:10 Vo miho, hiche twi chunga icheuva hin setto hakamna inei dingu ahi kamui; hichu thilkeole kong keo jeng hilouvin, eiho ding jengin jong setto kichat aume, ati." 
Acts27:11 Ahivangin sepai jalamkai chun Paul thu sangin kong pipu thule akong neipa thu ahajop jotan ahi. 
Acts27:12 Chuin phalbi-a umna dinga kongkai mun chu akijen lou jeh-in, mi atam jon hikoma kona chu kitoldoh-a Phoenicia lhun teiteija, chukoma chu phalbi sunga umding asomtaovin ahi. Phoenicia chu Crete twikol gama kongkai mun khat ahin, lhumsah le lhumlhang angatto ahi." 
Acts27:13 Chuin lhang hui olchachan ahung nungin ahile, alunggot bangu hin angaitouvin, kong chu alhaovin Crete pam chin chinah atoltauve." 
Acts27:14 Ahivangin chujou chomkhat jouvin, chua kon chun Euroclydon atiu huipi hattah ahung nungsuh tai." 
Acts27:15 Chuin kong'a chun ahung chutan ahile malama atoljou tapouvin, kamoh lhatauvin ahile eilhoh eilhoh jengtaove." 
Acts27:16 Chuin amin Clauda atiu twikol neocha khat-ah kalhaijun, hahsa tah-in kongneo chu kahuhbit nahnah-un ahi." 
Acts27:17 Chuin hichu akhaidoh-un ahunan amangun, khaovin kong noi lamah akanbeh taove. Chuin ajole Syrtis nel lah-a kileng lut getninte ti akichauvin, pondal kikhainaho alalhauvin ahile eimoh lhoh lhohtaove." 
Acts27:18 Chuin huipi chun eisuhgim behseh jeh-u chun, akit nin thil apaidoh pantaove." 
Acts27:19 Anithum nin keihotah-in kakhut tah-un kong manchah ho chu kapai taovin ahi. 
Acts27:20 Chuin ni tamtah nisa chule ahsi ho eisalvah-u beihela huipi hat nasatah tang louhela anun anun phat chun, hichea pat chun kisohcha inte ti kinepna aumtapon ahi." 
Acts27:21 Chuin ni tamtah an nelouva aum phatnun, Paul alah uva adingin: Vo miho, nanghon hiche settole hakamna hi to louna dinga kathu nangai uva, Crete'a kona chu kong hi nalha lou dingu thu ahi." 
Acts27:22 Ahivangin tu-a jong lungmong tah-a umdinga katil nahiuve; nalah uva koiman nahinnao nachan lou dingu ahi, kong vanghi mang ding ahi." 
Acts27:23 Ajeh chu Ama-a kahia, alhacha kapan Pathen chu a-vantil tujan chun kakoma adingin," 
Acts27:24 Vo Paul, kicha hih-in; Ceasar anga nadin tei ding ahi; chule ven, nalhonpi ho chengse hi abonchauva Pathen'in nangma napehdoh ahitai, eiti." 
Acts27:25 Hiche jeh chun, vo miho, nangho lungmongun; ijeh-inem itile Pathen katahsanin, kajah-a asei bang banga chu hung soh tei ding ahi." 
Acts27:26 Amavang twikol khatna ichuh tei dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts27:27 Chuin Adria twikhanglen'a huijin eisuhtol eitoutolu ajan somle ajanli jan-in, khangkimin kong mihon gamlei kinaija hitante ti agingchauvin," 
Acts27:28 Hichun twi athuh chu ateule lam somni atedoh-ui; chuin phabep ache chonun ate kitleuvun ahile lam somle lam nga atedoh-un," 
Acts27:29 Song lah-a kikisunte ti akichauvin, kong tom lamah thihhat li aseplhaovin, khovah angahtauve." 
Acts27:30 Ahivangin kong miho chu kong mai lama thihhat seplha ding beh akisauvin, kongneo twikhanglen'a adomlhauvin, jam ding lungthim angaito taovin ahile," 
Acts27:31 Paul'in sepai jalamkai le sepaiho jah-a, amaho khu kong'a aum louvule nangho changin sohchathei pouvin nate, ati." 
Acts27:32 Chutah-in sepaihon kongneo ho khao chu asattan un, twi lah-a alhataove." 
Acts27:33 Chuin jing khovah konin Paul'in miho chu annen asolin, nanga nangaova an ngola imacha ne louhela na-umnao tuni nisom le nili ahitai," 
Acts27:34 Hijeh-a chu an ne-a kasol nahiuve, hichu nakihinsona dinguva phachom ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile nalu chunguva nasamjangu khatcha jong lou louding ahi, ati." 
Acts27:35 Hitia chu asei jouvin, aman changlhah alan mi jouse ang sungah Pathen alhaijin, changlhah ahehbalin ane pantai." 
Acts27:36 Chutah chun miho jouse chu abonchauvin alung ngamun, an anecheh taove." 
Acts27:37 Kong'a uma chu mihing jani le somsagi le gup kahiuve. 
Acts27:38 Chuin miho chun an anehva phatnun, suhlouchang chu twi lah-a apaijun, kong chu asujangkhai taove." 
Acts27:39 Chuin khovah phatnin agamlei chu ahetapouve; ahivangin twipang kong ngahna thei khat amudoh-un, ahitheile kong chu chukoma tol lut ding tin akihousom taove." 
Acts27:40 Chuin thihhat ho alhalhaovin, twikhanglen'a adalha taove; chuin hichutoh thakhatnin kongkhe kanna chu alham lha uvin, hui chena lama kong ponjal chu atungdoh-un, twipang lam chu ajon taove." 
Acts27:41 Chuin twikinong ni kisuhto na-a kalut khataovin ahile, kong monghem chu leija akiphut dentai; chuin kong mai lam chu long louhelin a-ohdentan, kong meilam chu twikinong chun hasuh-a asuhle akeh pantai." 
Acts27:42 Chuin sepaihon sohchangho chu twi jap gal kaija ajama umget inte atiuvin, tha dingin agotauve." 
Acts27:43 Ahivangin sepai jalamkai chun Paul chu huhhing agon bol dinga alung gotnu chu akhamin, twi jap thei theijan twi jap galkaihen, vapam anakai masahen;" 
Acts27:44 Adang amohse kong'a um khunpehle thil dang dangin kitol galkaihen, tin thu apetai. Chutichun abonchauvin bitkeijin asohchaovin, tolgo alhung taove." 
Acts28:1 Chuin kasochat phatnu chun twikol chu Malta kiti ahi ahedoh taove. 
Acts28:2 Chule paomah hammah ho chun khoto mainah-in eikhoto pouve; hiche pet chu gojuh lai ahin adap jeh chun mei eitipeh-un eilhunsah sohkeijui. 
Acts28:3 Ahin Paul'in thing lom khat achoma meija chu agahtoleh, meisahula kon chun gulse khat ahungdoh-in, akhut achun akikhaiden jengin ahi." 
Acts28:4 Chuin paomah hammah hochun gul akhutna akikhaiden jeng chu amuvin, khatle khat akihouvun, Hichepa hi tolthat mong ahi, twikhanglen'a asochat jeng vanga hi, thudih tannan ahinghoi dehlou ahi, atiuve." 
Acts28:5 Chuin aman gul chu mei sunga chun athinglhan, a-ima aloupoi." 
Acts28:6 Ahivangin amaho chun hung pomintin, ahiloule phulou helouvin lhuntin, thi ding ahi, tin angah jingun ahi. Ahinla sottah angauva avet jouvun a-ima alou lou chu amuvin, alung gelu akhelun, ama chu pathen ahi atitaove." 
Acts28:7 Hiche mun koma chu twikol gam pipu amin Publius atiu chun gam anei ahin; ama chun eila lutnun, khotona nei tah-in ni thum a-in'a eilhun sah-un ahi." 
Acts28:8 Chuin Publius pa chu khosih le ehthit veija luma ahin; chuin Paul akoma agalutnin, achunga akhut angamin ataovin adamsahtai." 
Acts28:9 Chutia abol jou chun, chuche twikol gam sunga midang ana nei jouse ahungun ahile adam gamtaove."
