Acts28:10 Amaho chun lamchom chomin eijabol lheh jengun, kong'a kakitol phatnun thil kangaichat ding dolchanu kong-ah eihung koipeh-ui." 
Acts28:11 Chuin lha thum jouvin phalbi sungse-a twikol'a chu cham, amelchihna Ucha Sohkop atiu Alexandria kong'a chun kakitoldoh taove." 
Acts28:12 Chuin Syrakuse'a kakingaovin, chukoma chun ni thum kaumui." 
Acts28:13 Chuin chua kon chun kache velkolun Rhegium kalhungui; chuin ni khat jouvin lhanghui anungin ahile akit nin Puteoli kalhung taove. 
Acts28:14 Hikoma chun sopiho kamudoh-un, akomuva ni sagi nichong dingin eijolui. Chuin chutichun Rome lam ngan kachetauve." 
Acts28:15 Chuin chua kon chun sopihon keiho thu ajah phatnun Appii kailhang le Jinlhun In Thum geijin eilamto diuvin ahungui. Chuin Paul'in amaho chu amu phatnin Pathen athangvah-in alung ngamtan ahi. 
Acts28:16 Chuin Rome khopi kahunglhun phatnun, sepai jalamkai chun sohchang ho chu angahho jalamkai khutna apedoh-in, ahin Paul chu achanga sepai angahpa chuto umdingin thu apetaove." 
Acts28:17 Chuin ahitin ahi, ni thum jouvin Juda ho lah-a apipuho chu akou khomin; chuin amaho ahung kikhop phatnun ajah uva: Sopiteho, keima inam miteu dounale ipu ipateu dan douna-a ima kasuhset aum lou vangin, Jerusalem'a kona Rome mite khutna sohchanga pehdoh-a um kahitai." 
Acts28:18 Kathem kathemlou aholtoh-un, thina hoi ima kachunga amudoh lou jeh-un, lhadoh dingin eigotaovin ahi." 
Acts28:19 Ahivangin Juda hon hichu anel jeh-un, kacham louvin Ceasar henga ngehna kaboltan ahi; hichu kanam mite hehna dinga ahipoi." 
Acts28:20 Hiche jeh-a chu nang hotoh kimuto-a kihoulim dinga kakou nahiuve, ijeh-inem itile Israelte kinepna jeh-a thihkhaova hi kihen kahibouve, ati." 
Acts28:21 Chuin amahon ajah-a, Keihon nangma thudol Juda gama konin lekha kamupouve; chule sopiho lah-a jong koima hikoma ahungin nangma chung changa khan gitlouna thu hung lhut aumpoi." 
Acts28:22 Ahivangin nangma lung ngaito thudol hi nanga konin kajah nomui: ijeh-inem itile hiche houchom thudol hi gamtina seisetna aum kaheuve, atiuve." 
Acts28:23 Chuin nikho ateppeh-un, aumna-a chun ahenga atama tam ahungun, aman jingkah-a pat nilhah geijin Mosi danthu le themgaoho lekhabua konin thu asodoh asodoh-in, Pathen lenggam thu ahettohsah-in, Jesu thudola ajoltan ahi." 
Acts28:24 Chuin athuseiho chu abangin atahsanun, abangin atahsan pouve." 
Acts28:25 Chuin amahole amaho akilol thei lou phatnun, Paul'in thu khat asei jouvin apotdoh taove; athusei chu hiche hi ahi. Lhagao Thengin themgao Isaiah kama napu napateu jah-a, asei chu adih lheh jenge," 
Acts28:26 Hiche mite henga hin chenlang gaseijin: nanghon ja vang ja naovin natin, nahet them lou dingu; muvang munao vin natin, nahetdoh lou dingu ahi;" 
Acts28:27 Ajehchu hiche mite lungthim hi thaova kitom ahin; ana khangun kho ajathei pon, amitnu asingun ahi, chutilou hile amitnun muvintin, anakhangun ja-intin, alunguvin hetdoh untin hung kilekit khaleu, Keiman amaho chu kadamsah khahding ahi; tia, asei chu ahi." 
Acts28:28 Hiche jeh chun hiche hi kihet un, hiche Pathen mihuhhing na hi chidang namdangho henga kisola ahitai; amahon ngai jong angai dingu ahi, ati." 
Acts28:29 Chuin thu hicheng chu aseiphat nin, Juda ho apotdoh-un amaho le amaho hatah-in akinel taovin ahi." 
Acts28:30 Chuin aman inman apeh-a achenna-a chun kum ni lhingset aumin, ahenga hung jouse chu anasangjin," 
Acts28:31 Pathen gam thu ahil lhangjin, hakattah-in Pakai Jesu Christa thudol ahiljin, koimachan akhampon ahi." 
Romans1:1 Paul, Jesu Christa soh khat, solchah khat hidia kikou, Pathen thupha seiphong ledia kisepdoh chun:" 
Romans1:2 Malaija alekhabu thenga athemgaoho kama athutepsa," 
Romans1:3 Tahsa lam dolla David chilhah-a kisim, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa, a Chapa thudol," 
Romans1:4 Thenna lhagao lama vanga chu athi-a kona athodoh kit chun Pathen Chapa chu thunei tah-a atun ahi chu aphongdoh tai. 
Romans1:5 Chidang namdangte jouse lah-a mi tahsan thua nunsah dinga ama vangle ama min jala lungsetnale solchah mun changa kahitai; 
Romans1:6 Nangho jong amaho lah-a chu Jesu Christa kouna changho nahiuve; 
Romans1:7 Rome'a cheng mithenga kikou Pathen deite jouse hengah, i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin lungsetna le lungmon nalah uva umjing hen." 
Romans1:8 Natahsanu vannoi jouse-a akithan jeh-in, nabon chaova chungah Jesu Christa vangin ka-Pathen kathangvah masan ahi." 
Romans1:9 Katao chanin tang louvin naminu kapha jingin, Achapa Thupha thua lhagaova alhacha kapan Pathen chu ahetoh ahi." 
Romans1:10 Tubeh-a hi naheng uva kahungna dingin, Pathen thusah-a phat kijen kom khat kato-a kahungjin teiteina dingin kathum jingjin ahi." 
Romans1:11 Nadetna dinguva lhagao lam thilpeh phabep nangho kapeh theina dingun, nangho mu kangah lel lheh jengin ahi." 
Romans1:12 Hichu nangho jong keima jong khat tahsana kona khat le khat ikitil khou touva, nangho lah-a lunghalna kanei theina dinga kati ahi." 
Romans1:13 Chule sopite, chidang namdangte lah-a katohgim ga kamutah banga nangho lah-a jong kamu theina dinga, tamtahvei naheng uva hung ding kakigotji chu nahet louvu kanompoi, ahivangin tu masangsen eisumo aum jingjin ahi." 
Romans1:14 Greek mitele paomah ham mahte ahin, mithemle mimol ahin, abonchauva kabat ahi." 
Romans1:15 Chutichu ahin, nangho Rome khopi-a um chengse jong Kipana Thupha kahil theichan hil dinga kigosa dema umjing kahi." 
Romans1:16 Ajehchu Christa Kipana Thupha hi kajachatpi hihhele, ajehchu koi hile atahsan chan chu huhhing na dinga Pathen thahat ahin, amasan Juda mi ahin, chule Greek mi jong ahunghi." 
Romans1:17 Ajeh iham itile asunga tahsan le tahsana kona Pathen chonphatna kilanga ahi; hiche thudol chu, Michonpha vang chu atahsan vanga hing ding ahi, tin akisune." 
Romans1:18 Ajehchu chonphat louna-a thutah doudal ho, mihemte Pathen ngaisah louna le chonphat louna jouse chunga van'a konin Pathen lunghanna ahung kilangin ahi;" 
Romans1:19 Ajeh chu Pathen lam thudol het theina chu amaho-a akilangnai; ajeh chu Pathen'in hichu ahenguva amusah ahitai. 
Romans1:20 Ijeh ham itile leiset semtila pat Pathen athahat kemloule Pathen ahije mutheilou thilteho chu athilsema kihedoh-a, kichentah-a kimu ahi jeh chun, amaho athuphatna dingu aumpoi." 
Romans1:21 Ajeh chu Pathen lah ahenauvin, Pathen bangin avahchoi pouvin, thang jong athangvahji pouve; athil ngaitou ahomkeo ahin, angol lungu athimtan ahi." 
Romans1:22 Akichihsah nau lamah angoljo taove. 
Romans1:23 Chule kemtheilou Pathen loupina chu, kemthei mihem le alha-a leng vachaho, akeng li nei gamsaho le a-opma kitholtho ganhing limin akhelun, ahou taove." 
Romans1:24 Hiche jeh-a chu alah uva atiu ja umloutah-a bol dinga, amaho lunggot lam then louna lama, Pathen'in apehdoh ahitai." 
Romans1:25 Amahon Pathen thutah chu jouvin alhengun, chule asempau khelin thilsemjoh ahouvun ajenleuvin ahi. Hiche Sempa chu tonsot geija nunnom jing ahi. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Hiche jeh-a chu Pathen'in amaho jachat umtah huhna lama apehdoh ahitai, anumeiho jongun apenpiu angai monga achonnau apaijun akaleh lamin achonun ahi." 
Romans1:27 Apasal-hou jong angai monga numeitoh achonnau apaijun, huh lama alipmun, pasal le pasal jachat umtah-in akibolun, achon gitlounao chu amahon ati chunguva akisan taovin ahi." 
Romans1:28 Alunguva Pathen hetding amaho nom lou ahiuvin, hiche bangtah-a chu Pathen'in jong amaho lung chatvaina lama apehdoh ahitai." 
Romans1:29 Amaho chonphat louna jouse; jonthanhoi, engset, papset, mi kisuhmo sah, thangset, toltha, minelnoh, dohabol, doulung poh, kihou lhih adimset nun ahi." 
Romans1:30 Guhthima miseise, mihoutom, Pathen hotlam, chonval, hoitho, kithang-at, chonset thah boldoh, nulepa thua nunglou," 
Romans1:31 Hetna neilou, thutep palkeh, hepina neilou, lhep lung damo, lungsetna neilou ahiuve." 
Romans1:32 Hitobanga chonho chu athi dinga lom mong ahiuve, hiche Pathen thutansa chu ahena saovin achuti chonun ahi, amaho chang jong hilouvin, chutia chonho chu aphasah-un ahi." 
Romans2:1 Hiche jeh chun, Mi oimo-a pang, vo mihem, koi hile chun nangman jong nadonbutna ding aumpoi; ajeh iham itile nangman mi na-oimona lama nangma themmo kichanbou nahi, ajeh chu mi oimo-a pang, nangmatah jongin chutobang chu naboljin ahi." 
Romans2:2 Chutobanga chonho chunga chu Pathen'in thutah dungjuija athu-u atan ahi, ti iheuvin ahi." 
Romans2:3 Vo mihem, chutobanga chonte oimo-a pang nangman chutobang chu nabolji-a ahile, Pathen thutan na-a chun hoinange, tia nakiginchat mong hinam?" 
Romans2:4 Ole Pathen phatna-in nalung heina dinga nangma napui chu helouva phatna, lungdehat, khongaisot ahao hi nahsah louva nahim?" 
Romans2:5 Nalungtahle lungheilou dungjuija chu, Pathen'in thudih atan ni hung kiphonle alunghan ni-a dinga chu nachunga lunghanna nakikhol khom ahi." 
Romans2:6 Pathen'in mi jouse atoh dungjui cheh-a asansah ding ahi. 
Romans2:7 Thilpha bola pontho-a lungdesot hatna, loupina, jana, chule kemlou holte chu hin kemlou apeh ding ahi;" 
Romans2:8 Kichangchuna kichamsah, thutah thua nung louva chonphatlou thua nungho vang chu achunguva lungsatle lunghan chua," 
Romans2:9 Setna bol miho jouse lhagao chunga, amasa Juda mi chule abana Greek mite lhagao chunga, hesoh gentheile lungdonna khohtah chu ding ahi." 
Romans2:10 Thilpha bol chengse vang chun loupina, choi-atna, chule lungmonna kipe ding ahi, Juda mi masan tin chule Greek mi hi ding ahi." 
Romans2:11 Ajeh chu Pathen'in mi dat aneipoi. 
Romans2:12 Ajeh chu danthu neilouva chonseteho jouse chu danthu beija manghel ding ahiuvin; chule danthu noija chonseteho jouse chu danthua athu kitan ding ahi. 
Romans2:13 Ajeh iham itile Pathen mitmu-a michonpha ho chu danthu ngaija jaho ahipouve; danthu dungjuija bolteho bouchu chonpha-a kisim ding ahi. 
Romans2:14 Danthu neilou chidang namdangte jengbonin, apenpi lungpoh-in danthun anungun, danthu aneilou vangun amahole amaho danthun akisemun ahi." 
Romans2:15 Alung sunguva danthu natoh kisun ahi ti chu atahlangun, hiche ase apha ahetnao chun ahettohsah-un, chule alunggel uva chun themosah ahiloule khat le khat themmo kichan aumsah jiuvin ahi." 
Romans2:16 Hicheng chu kathupha seiphongle dungjuija, Pathen'in Jesu Christa amanchah-a mihemte guhthim thu atan nikho leh chuti ding ahi." 
Romans2:17 Nangma Juda mi-a kisei nahi-a, danthua kinem nahi-a, Pathen'a kisong nahi-a," 
Romans2:18 Alungdei he-a, thilpha chu pha sa-a, danthua kona kihila het neija," 
Romans2:19 Chule danthua hetna le thutah umdan neija nakiginchat jeh-a, mitcho ho kaihoile leh muthim lah-a umho salvah-a," 
Romans2:20 Michinglou ho chihsah-a, naosen ho hila nakingaito ahin;" 
Romans2:21 Chuti ahile mihil-a panga nang, nangma jong nachanga kihil jilou nahim? Guchat louna dinga thu hila pang, nangman naguhji hilou ham?" 
Romans2:22 Jonthanhoi bol louna dinga thuseija, nangman jon nabolji hilou ham? Milim hou ho-a nangma, nangman milim houna in'a thil nachomji hilou ham?" 
Romans2:23 Danthu-a kisong nangman, danthu nasuhkeh-a kona Pathen nahsah mo-a nabolji hilouham?" 
Romans2:24 Akisun bang bangin, nangho jeh-in Pathen min chidang namgdangte lah-a taitomin aumin ahi." 
Romans2:25 Nangma danthua nanunle nacheptan chu phatchomna nanei ding ahin, danthua nanun lou vangle nacheptan chu tan lou ahitai." 
Romans2:26 Chuti ahi jeh-a chu cheptanlou chun danthua chonphatna thudol chu nit taleh, achep tanlou chu cheptana kisim lou dingham?" 
Romans2:27 Apena cheptanlou mong danthu nit soh chun, lekhajem'a thule cheptan dan neija jong danthu sukeh-a nangma, nathemmosah lou dingham?" 
Romans2:28 Apolama mi mu-a Juda mi hichu Juda mitah ahipoi, apolam ati chunga cheptan jong chu cheptan ahipoi." 
Romans2:29 Asunggila Juda mi hibou chu Juda mi ahin, chule lekhajem'a hilouva lhagaova lunggil lam cheptanho chu cheptan ahi; ama chu mihem pachat lo-a hilouvin Pathen pachat alojoh ahi." 
Romans3:1 Chuti ahile Juda mi hi ipi phachomam? Chule cheptan jong iham aphatna? 
Romans3:2 Imalam jouse-a phachom tah ahi, abulpen chu, Pathen thu chengse amaho kipedoh-a kichinsah anahi." 
Romans3:3 Khat touvin tahsan hih jongleu i-hiding ham? Amaho tahsan lou chun Pathen tahsan umje hi manlou asochom em? 
Romans3:4 Chuti hihhen; Pathen chu dihtah hihen lang, mi jouse chu ajou hihen; hiche thudol hi, Nangma, nangma thuseija chonpha tia nakisima, Thupitan na-a jong najo theinan, tin akisunin ahi." 
Romans3:5 Ahivangin ichonphat lounao hin Pathen chonphatna chu akichetsah cheh-a ahile, ipi isei dingu ham? Lunghanga talen peji-a Pathen dihlou ham? (Mihem dan banga kasei ahi)." 
Romans3:6 Chuti ahipoi, chuti ahile Pathen'in vannoi leiset thupi iti atan dingham?" 
Romans3:7 Keima jousei jeh-a Pathen dihje chu ama loupina khopma letset tah-a akihaphon cheh-a ahile, michonse tia themmo changa iti ka umnah lai dingham?" 
Romans3:8 Chule keiho neihehset uva, kimkhatnin kasei loubeh-u; phatna ahung umna dingin setna bolu hite, tin aseijuve, tia neingoh-u bangchun, eihonjong hiti chun seiju hite natijiu hilouham? Chutobang thusei ho themmo achanu chu dihtah ahi." 
Romans3:9 Chuti ahile, keiho Juda mi hi midang sanga phajo kahiuvem? Iti nama jongle kaphajo pouve. Ajehchu Juda mi chule Greek mi abona chonset noija um cheh ahi, tia kahilchah sa cheh-u ahitai." 
Romans3:10 Hiti jong hin akisune, Chonpha koima aumpoi, khatcha jong aumpoi." 
Romans3:11 Koima ahetoh thema aumpoi, Koima Pathen hola aumpoi," 
Romans3:12 Lam hilouva akihei sohkei taovin, abon chaovin manlou asohgam taove. Apha lama chona aumpoi, khatcha jong aumpoi." 
Romans3:13 Alol homu lhan kihong ahin; Aleijun lheplhahna thu jeng aseijun, Anel noijuvah gulse gu aumin;" 
Romans3:14 Akam sungula sapsetna le thugilouvin adimin; 
Romans3:15 Akengu thisona ding lamah ajangin; 
Romans3:16 Alampi jouseu-ah man naleh hesohna aumin; 
Romans3:17 Lungmonna lampi aheta pouve; 
Romans3:18 Amitmuvah Pathen gin aumpoi. 
Romans3:19 Mi jouse kam binna dingle vannoi leiset pumpi Pathen thutana-a aum theina dinguva, danthun asei chengse hi danthu thua nungho jah-a kisei ahi, ti iheuve." 
Romans3:20 Danthu juija thilbola mi koima a-angsunga them changa umlou ding ahi, ajehchu danthua kona chonsetna kihedoh ahi." 
Romans3:21 Ahin tu vangin danthua hilouhelin, danthule themgaoho thuhetsah Pathen chonphatna chu akilang dohtan ahi." 
Romans3:22 Chuche Pathen'a kon chonphatna chu Jesu Khrista tahsan vanga mijousele atahsante jouse chunga kilanga ahi: koima imachom aumpoi: 
Romans3:23 Ajeh chu mi jouse hi chonsea ahitan, Pathen loupina chu changlela ahiuve;" 
Romans3:24 Khrista Jesu'a kilhatdohna aum jeh-a, Pathen lungset vanga chonphat moh chonbou ahiuve." 
Romans3:25 Pathen'in alungdesot vanga masanga chonsetna kichaisaho talen pelouva aum jeh-in, achonphat vetsahna dinga tahsan vanga athisan chu kithoidamna hidinga apehdoh ahin;" 
Romans3:26 Ama chonpha ahina dingle, Jesu tahsan chan chu chonpha-a asim theina dinga, tulaija hi achonphatna avetsah ahi." 
Romans3:27 Chuti ahile kisonna hoithona hoibaham? Kinotdoh-a ahitai. Itobang danthua ham? Danthu juija natoh naham? Ahipoi, tahsanna danthu-a joh ahibouve." 
Romans3:28 Chuti ahi jeh chun danthu juija natoh vang hilouva, tahsan vanga mi chonpha kisim ahi, tia kangaitou ahi." 
Romans3:29 Pathen chu Juda mite changseh Pathen ham? Chidang namdangte Pathen jong hilou ham? Chidang namdang te-a jong ahi. 
Romans3:30 Ahin Pathen khatseh ahi jeh chun, cheptanho chu tahsana kona chonpha asima, chule cheptan louho chu tahsan vanga chonpha asim ding ahi." 
Romans3:31 Chuti ahile itahsan jeh uva hi danthu kisumanga ham? Ahipoi; danthu kiphudetjoh ahibouve. 
Romans4:1 Chuti ahile tahsa lama ipuluiju Abraham'in amu chu ipi isei dingu ham? 
Romans4:2 Ajeh iham itile ama chu natoh vanga chonpha kisim ahile kisonna anei ahi, ahinla Pathen lamah aneipon ahi." 
Romans4:3 Ajeh chu Pathen lekhabun ipi aseijem? Abraham'in Pathen atahsan jal-in atahsan chu ama dingin chonphatnin akisimtai. 
Romans4:4 Natongte sum san hi lungsetman kiti louvin, asan ding abatnin akiseijon ahi." 
Romans4:5 Ahinla Pathen helou natoh beija chonpha chansahpa tahsana chu, atahsan chu chonphatna kisima ahi." 
Romans4:6 Natong louva Pathen'in michon pha-a asimho chu phatthei achan dingjeu chu, David'in jong aseijin," 
Romans4:7 Asuhkhelnau kingaidama, Chule achonsetna kikhu khumho chu anun nomui." 
Romans4:8 Pakaiyin achonsetna asimlou dingpa chu anun nome, ati." 
Romans4:9 Chuti ahile chuche phattheina chu cheptante chung jenga ham, cheptan louho chunga jongham? Ajeh chu eihon Abraham atahsan chu ama dinga chonphatna-a kisim ahitai, itiu ahi." 
Romans4:10 Achutile iti aum petna chonpha kisim ham? Acheptan jouha, cheptan louva aum laija ham? Cheptana aum jou hilouvin, cheptan louva aum lai ahi:" 
Romans4:11 Chule cheptan louva uma atahsanho jouse pa ahi theina dingle, amaho dinga chu chonphatna-a akisim theina dinga, chule cheptan jeng jong hilouva ipuluiju Abraham cheptan louva aum laija atahsan chu," 
Romans4:12 Hiche tahsan nungjuija cheptanho pa jong ahi theina dinga, cheptan louva uma tahsan vanga chonphat chu hetna-a melchih na-a cheptan chu amu ahi." 
Romans4:13 Ajeh chu Abraham le achilhah chu, vannoi goulo ding ahi tia thutep chu danthua kon hilouvin, tahsana kona chonphat vanga joh ahibouve." 
Romans4:14 Ajeh iham itile danthua kona chonpha kisimhon alouva ahile, tahsan chu ahomkeo ahitai, chule thutep jong chu pannabei ahitai." 
Romans4:15 Ajeh chu danthun lunghan akonsah ahi; danthu beina-a chun suhkhel jong aumpoi. 
Romans4:16 Hijeh-a chu lungsetna-a ahi theina-a, danthu noija umho chang jeng hilouva Abraham tahsan noija um achilhahte jousen, hiche thutep alo dingu chu adet theina dinga, amahon alo dingu chu tahsan vanga alo dingu ahibouve." 
Romans4:17 Mithiho hinsah theija, aum louho auma banga kou Pathen, Abraham'in atahsan chu, ama angsunga Abraham chu ibon chaova ikonnao ipuluiju ahi; chule hitin jong akisune, Keiman nangma vai tamtah kona puluija kasem ahitai, ati." 
Romans4:18 Chule kiholna neilou ahivangin, nachilhah hijatpi khu hi ding ahi tia, asei thucheng dungjuija, khonungle vai tamtah pului ahung hi ding chu kiholin atahsanin ahi." 
Romans4:19 Chule kum jakhat jen alhina, athisa tobang atahsa le Sarah chin jong chu ngaiton, atahsan daideh louhelin aumin," 
Romans4:20 Pathen thutep chu tahsan lellin aumpon ahi. 
Romans4:21 Pathen'in athutep chu bol jong bol thei ahi ti ahechenin, Pathen avahchoijin atahsan ahat chehjotan ahi." 
Romans4:22 Hiche jeh-a chu atahsan chu ama dinga chonphatna kisima ahitai. 
Romans4:23 Tahsan chu ama ding jenga chonphatna-a kisima kisun ahipoi; eiho dinga jong kisun ahi. 
Romans4:24 Pakai Jesu Khrista athia kona kaithoupa tahsana eiho, eiho dinga jong chonphatna-a kisim ding ahi." 
Romans4:25 Hiche Jesu chu eiho suhkhel jeh-a kipedoh ahitai; chule eiho chonpha ikisimna dinguva kaithouva uma ahitai. 
Romans5:1 Chuti ahin tahsan vanga eiho chonpha kisim ihitah jeh-un, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga Pathen toh kichamdela um ihitaove." 
Romans5:2 Chujongle ama vanga chu hiche lungsetna idin detnaova hi tahsan vanga lut ihitaove, chule Pathen loupina-a chu kinema kipah jinga um ihitaove." 
Romans5:3 Chule chuti jengseh hilouvin, hesohna chun thohhat asosahji ihetbangun, ihesoh gentheinao jenga jong iloupi jiuve;" 
Romans5:4 Thohhat chun aphat photchena asosahjin, photchena chun kinepna asosahjin ahi, ti iheuve." 
Romans5:5 Chule hiche kinepna chun eijumso pouve, ajeh chu eipeh-u Lhagao Theng vanga chu ilung sunguva Pathen ngailutna long lut ahitai." 
Romans5:6 Ihatmo laijuvin aphatchan michonseho khelin anathitan ahi. 
Romans5:7 Michonpha chung changah koima pouvin ahinna tohponte; mipha chungchanga ahinna toh ngam jong mi khattou umkhat nante. 
Romans5:8 Ahin Pathen'in eingailutnau photchena eimusah-un ahi; ajeh iham itile eiho chonsetna i-um laitah-un Christa eiho khelin athitan ahi. 
Romans5:9 Chuti ahi jeh chun eiho tun, Christa thisan vanga chonpha kisim ihitah jeh-u chun, achungchona ama vanga Pathen lunghan na-a kona huhhing-a umtei ding ihiuve." 
Romans5:10 Ajeh chu adouva ipan laitah uva Pathen Chapa thi chun Pathen toh eisuhchamu ahitah-a ahile, akicham jeh-a chu achungchona ama hinna vanga huhhing-a umtei ding ihiuve." 
Romans5:11 Chuti jeng jong hilouvin, tun Pathen toh eisuhcham uva, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga Pathen'a pa jong ikipao ahi." 
Romans5:12 Hiti chu ahin, mi khat jeh-a vannoi'a chonset lut, chule chonset jeh-a thina lut ahi; chutima chu mi jouse chonset jeh-a thina chu mi jouse chunga lhungsoh ahitai." 
Romans5:13 Ajeh chu danthu kipeh masang peh-a chu vannoi leisetna chonset anaumsa ahin; ahivangin danthu um louna-a chu chonset jong kisim lou ahi. 
Romans5:14 Ahivangin Adam'a pat Mosi geijin Adam suhkhel banga sukhel louho chunga jong, thina chun vai analosa ahi. Adam chu ahung dingpa lim banga um ahi." 
Romans5:15 Ahivangin manbeija thilpeh chu suhkhela toh kibang ahipoi; ajeh chu mi khat suhkhel jeh-a midang jouse athia ahile, achungchon cheh-a Pathen lungset le mi khat, Jesu Christa lungset vanga thilpeh chu mi tamtah chunga letsetna chua ahitai." 
Romans5:16 Chule thilpeh chu, achonsea mi khat jeh-a chutoh akibangpoi; ajeh chu mi khatna kona chu themmo channa lama thu kitan ahin, manbeija thilpeh vang chu suhkhelna tamtah-a kona them changa kisima ahi." 
Romans5:17 Ajeh chu mi khat suhkhel jeh-a, mi khat vanga chu thina-in vai alotah-a ahile, lungsetna le chonphat thilpeh letset changho chu achungchon cheh-a, mi khat, Jesu Christa vanga hinna-a vai alo dingu ahi." 
Romans5:18 Chutichu ahin suhkhelna khat jeh-a mi jouse themmo chansahna thutana um ahi; chutima chu chonphatna thilbol khat vanga hinna lama them chansahna manbeija thilpeh chu mi jouse chunga hung uma ahitai. 
Romans5:19 Ajeh chu mikhatnin thupeh apallhah jeh-a mi tamtah chonse kisosah ahitan; chutima chu mikhatnin thupeh anit jeh-a chu mi tamtah chonpha kiso ding ahi. 
Romans5:20 Amavang suhkhel punna dinga danthu hung lutbe ahi. Ahinla chonset punna chana chu lungsetna hapun cheh-a ahi. 
Romans5:21 Chutia chu chonsetnin thina-a vai alo bangtah-a chu, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga tonsot hinkemlou geija dinga chonphat vanga lungsetna-in vai alo theina ding ahi." 
Romans6:1 Achutile ipi isei dingu hitam? Lungsetna apun chehna dinga ichonset jing dingu ham? 
Romans6:2 Chutiponte! chonset lama athisa eiho, chonsetna iti ihin jing nahlai dingu ham?" 
Romans6:3 Eiho Christa Jesu'a baptize chang chengse hi athina-a baptize changa ihiu hi nahet lou uham? 
Romans6:4 Hiche jeh-a chu Pa loupina vanga Christa athi lah-a kona akaithou banga chu, eiho jong hinkho thah lam chu ijot theina dinguva, baptize chana hi athina-a amatoh kivuitha-a ihi taovin ahi." 
Romans6:5 Ajeh chu ama thi lim banga ithiuva amatoh thikhom ihiule, atho kit lim banga jong itho kit dingu ahi;" 
Romans6:6 Tu nung kalsea eiho chonset soh-a i-um louna dinguva, chonset po tahsapum suhmanga aum theina dinga, imi luiju chu amatoh thingpel'a kikhetbeh tha-a ahitai, ti chu iheuve;" 
Romans6:7 Ijeh ham itile athia chu chonsetna kona ongthola ahitai. 
Romans6:8 Chule eiho Christa toh ithiu ahitah-a ahile, amatoh ihin dingu jong ahi, ti chu itahsan un ahi;" 
Romans6:9 Ajeh chu athi lah-a kona kikaithou Christa chu imatihchanna thi lou ding ahi, thina-in achungah thu aneitapoi, ti iheuve." 
Romans6:10 Athi chu chonset lama tonsot geija dinga khatvei thia ahitai; ahin vang chu Pathen lama hinga ahi. 
Romans6:11 Hiche bang chun nangho jong chonsetna lamah athisan kigel unlang, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa jal-in Pathen lamah ahingin kigelun." 
Romans6:12 Hijeh chun natahsa lung got lama chonna dingin, natahsa thithei chunga chun chonset vaipohsah hihhelun." 
Romans6:13 Chujongle natibah chengseu chonphat louna manchah-in chonsetna lamah pedoh hihhelun, ahin athi lah-a kona hingdoh kahi tin, Pathen'ah kipeuvin, natibah chengseu jong chu chonphatna manchah din Pathen'ah pedoh jovin." 
Romans6:14 Ajeh chu chonset chun nachung uva thu neitalou ding ahi, ijeh ham itile danthu noija um nahitapouvin, lungsetna noija umjoh nahiuve." 
Romans6:15 Iti tantem ahile? Danthu noija um louva lungsetna noija um ihi jeh uva chu, ichonset dinguham? Chutiponte." 
Romans6:16 Koi heng koi heng hijongle athua nung dinga asoh-a nalutna chu; thina dinga chonsetna lam hijongle, chonphatna dinga thua nunna hijongle, athua naumpa soh chu nahi, hichu nahet louvu ham?" 
Romans6:17 Masangin nangho chonset soh nanahiu ahin, ahivangin lunggiltah-a chutobang thu kihil chu nit dinga kipedoh-a athu noija um nahitaovin," 
Romans6:18 Chule chonsetna kona kichoidoh-a chonphat soh nahiu ahitan, hiche jeh chun Pathen thangvah-in umhen." 
Romans6:19 Natahsa pheu hatmo jeh-a keiman mihem thu banga kasei ahi; ajeh chu nanghon masang laija natibah chengu then louna dinga chonset chunga chonsetna lama soh banga napehdoh jiu ahin, hiche bangtah chun tun natibah chengseu chu thenna dingin chonphatna lamah soh bangin pedoh jengun." 
Romans6:20 Nangho chonset soh nahi laijun chonphatna lam dola onga nahiuvin ahi. 
Romans6:21 Chutichu ahin tu-a najachat piu thulam dola hi hiche laija chu aga ipi namuji uvem? Ajeh chu hitiho chu achaina thina ahibouve. 
Romans6:22 Tu vangin nangho chonsetna kona onga Pathen soh nahitah jeh-un, thenna lamah ga naneitaove, chule aleh chu tonsot hin kemlou ahi." 
Romans6:23 Ijeh ham itile chonset man thina ahi, Pathen thil mohpeh vanghi Pakai Christa Jesu vanga tonsot hinna ahi." 
Romans7:1 Ole sopite, mihem ahinlai chansebovin danthun achungah thu aneije, ti nahet louvu ham? Danthu themho kahouna ahi." 
Romans7:2 Numei jineija chu a-inneipu ahinlai chansea danthun a-inneipu toh akanbeh jing ahin, ajipa athi vangle, a-inneipu danthua kona chu ongdoh jia ahi." 
Romans7:3 Chuti ahi jeh chun a-inneipu hinpetnin midang ji hitahen hile, chutengle amanu chu ajonga kiti ding ahi. A-inneipu thi teng vangle, danthua kona onga ahitan, pasal dang ji hijongle ajonga hita lou ahi." 
Romans7:4 Nangho chungchang thua jong chutima chu ahi, sopite, Pathen lama iga theina dingule achom khat, athi lah-a kona thoudohpa-a nahi theina dinguva, Christa tahsa vanga danthu lama thisah-a um nahitaove." 
Romans7:5 Ajeh chu tahsaphe-a i-um laiseu chun danthua kona chonsetna lama chalohna chun thina lama iga theina dinguva, itibah chunguva na anatohji ahi." 
Romans7:6 Ahin tu vangin lekhajem luija hilouva, lhagao thah-a ijen theina dinguva ithiuva, eikituhnao danthua kona kilhadoh ihiuve." 
Romans7:7 Achutile ipi isei dinguham? Danthu hi chonsetna ham? Ahipoi; chonset chu ipi ahi anahe lou kahi, danthua kona kahetdoh ahibouve; ajeh chu, Papset bol hih-in, ti hi danthun asei lou hile, ipi ahi kanahet lou ding ahi." 
Romans7:8 Ahinla chonset chun agomkomcha atohkhan, chuche thupeh-a kon chun kalunga papset imajouse asosahtan ahi; ajeh chu danthu beija chonset chu athi ahi." 
Romans7:9 Masanglai chun danthu um louva anahing jing kahin, chuche thupeh ahung um phat chun chonset chu ahingdoh kitnin keima kathitai." 
Romans7:10 Chule hinna dinga thupeh chu thinajoh-in kananeitan ahi; 
Romans7:11 Ijeh ham itile chonset chun agomkomcha atokhahjia, thupeh-a chu eilheplhah-a, hiche chun eitha ahi." 
Romans7:12 Chutichu ahin danthu athenge, thupeh jong athenge, adih lheh jengin aphai;" 
Romans7:13 Ahile apha chu keima dinga thina mongham? Ahipoi. Apha chu amanchah-a chonset chun kachunga thina asodoh-a kona chu, hichu chonset ahi tia akiphon dohna dinga chule thupeh vanga chonset chu setna chungnung tah ahi chu, akichetna dinga chonset jeh joh-a ahibouve." 
Romans7:14 Ajeh chu danthu chu lhagao lam thil ahi ti iheuve, keima vang tahsa lam mi chonset soh-a kijoh-a kahi." 
Romans7:15 Ajeh chu keiman ipi kaboldoh kahepoi, ajeh iham itile kalunggot lou lam jeng kaboljin; kahot lam jengbou kabol jin ahi." 
Romans7:16 Kalunggot lou lam kabola ahile, danthu chu apha ahi tia oija kahi." 
Romans7:17 Ahivangin tun abola keima hita louva keija cheng chonset chun abol ahitabouve. 
Romans7:18 Ajeh chu keima sunga kasa chunga hin phat achengpoi, ti kahei, ajeh chu lunggotna vang chu aumin thilpha boldoh najohbou umlou ahi." 
Romans7:19 Ajeh iham itile apha kalunggot lam chu kaboljipon, aphalou kalunggot lou lambou chun kachon jingjitan ahi." 
Romans7:20 Kalunggot lou lam kabolji ahile, abola chu keima hilouva keija um chonsetjoh chu ahibouve." 
Romans7:21 Chutichun thilpha bol kagot komle, setna chu kakoma ahung umjin, hiche umdanje hi kahetan ahi." 
Romans7:22 Kami sungnungin Pathen danthua kathanom lhehji nan," 
Romans7:23 Ahivangin kalung lam danthu douva katibah chunga um, chonset danthu, soh-a eipui lutji-a katibah chunga hin danthu chom khat aum kamujin ahi." 
Romans7:24 Ohe! mi gentheitah chu kanahi! Hiche thina tahsa-a kon hin koijin eihuhdoh tantem? 
Romans7:25 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vangin Pathen kathangvah-e. Chutichu ahi jeh-a keiman kalungtah-a Pathen danthu noija kauma, kasa-a chonset danthu soh na katoh ahi." 
Romans8:1 Hitichun tuvangin, Christa Jesu'a umho, tahsa thua chonlouva lhagao thua chonho dinga themmo channa himhim umlou ahitai." 
Romans8:2 Ijeh ham itile Christa Jesu'a um hinna Lhagao danthu chun chonsetle, thina danthua kona eilhatdoh-a onga kahitai." 
Romans8:3 Ajeh chu tahsaphen asuh hatmo jeh-a danthun abol joulou chu, Pathen'in Achapa chu chonset jeh-a chonset po tahsaphe lim pu-a ahinsola; tahsaphe-a chonsetna chu themmo achan ahitan," 
Romans8:4 Hichu tahsaphe lam hilouva Lhagao lama chon eiho chunga, danthun angeh chonphatna chu aguilhun theina ding ahi." 
Romans8:5 Ajeh iham itile tahsaphe lam dana chonteho chun tahsaphe lam thudol agelun; Lhagao lam dana chonho chun Lhagao lam thudol bou agelun ahi. 
Romans8:6 Tahsa lam lunggel chu thina ahin, Lhagao lam lunggel chu hinna le lungmonna ahi." 
Romans8:7 Ajeh chu tahsa lam lunggel chu Pathen toh kidou ahi; ajehchu Pathen danthu noija um ahipon, umjong umthei louding ahi." 
Romans8:8 Hijeh chun tahsa lama chonho chun Pathen alunglhai theipouve. 
Romans8:9 Pathen Lhagao nasunguva achen vangle, tahsa lama chon hilouva Lhagao lama chon nahiu ahi. Christa Lhagao neilou vang chu Christa-a ahipoi." 
Romans8:10 Chule Christa chu nangho sunga auma ahile, chonset vanga tahsa chu athia ahin, lhagao vang chu chonphat vanga hinna ahi." 
Romans8:11 Chule athi lah-a kona Jesu kaithoupa Lhagao chu nangho sunga achenle, Christa Jesu mithi lah-a kona kaithoupa tah chun nangho sunga cheng ama lhagao vanga chu, natahsao thi thei jong chu ahinsah ding ahi." 
Romans8:12 Hijeh chun, sopite, eihon bat ineijuve, amavang tahsa henga, tahsa lama chonna dinga neija ihipouve." 
Romans8:13 Ajeh chu nangho tahsa lam dana nachonule, iti jongle nathi tei dingu ahi; Lhagaova tahsa natoh chengse chu natha vangule, nahin dingu ahi." 
Romans8:14 Ajeh chu Pathen Lhagao kaihoija umho chengse chu, Pathen chate ahiuve." 
Romans8:15 Ajeh iham itile kichat kitna dinga sohchana lhagao hilouva, cha hina lhagao changjoh nahibouvui; hiche lhagao vanga chu, Abba, Hepa, tia ikoujiu ahi." 
Romans8:16 Lhagao chun amatah-in eiho lhagaotoh kitho-a Pathen chate ihiu eihetsah-u ahi. 
Romans8:17 Chule chate ihiule gou lo ding ihiuvin, Pathen gou lo ding, chule Christa toh lo khom ding ihiuve; amatoh ithoh khomule, amatoh choi-atna iumkhom dingu ahi." 
Romans8:18 Tulaija ithohnao hi khonunga ichan dingu loupina hung kilang ding chutoh kikot hoi themin kangaito poi. 
Romans8:19 Thilsem chengse kinem ngui nguitah-a Pathen chate hung kilah ding chu angalel lheh jengu ahi. 
Romans8:20 Ijeh ham itile thilsem chengse ahomkeo thu noija aumu hi ama chama um ahipoi, kinepna-a aumsahpa thusah-a um ahibouvui." 
Romans8:21 Ajeh chu thilsem chengse hin amahotah jong kemthei soh-a auma kona lhadoh-a aumuva, Pathen chate loupitah-a noma alenaova chu alut diu ahi." 
Romans8:22 Ahin tugei hin thilsem jouse naosonat thoh banga gim thoh-a peng penga umkhom ahi ti iheuve. 
Romans8:23 Amaho jengseh ahipoi, Lhagao ga masa changa eihotah jeng jong, cha hina, itahsao lhatdoh-a umding chu ngah jinga, ilung sungu peng penga um ihiuve." 
Romans8:24 Ajeh chu kinepna in eihuhhingu ahin; ahinla mu-a kinep chu kinep ahipoi; ajehchu mihemin amusa chu ipi dinga akineppi nahlai ding ham? 
Romans8:25 Mu louva kinem ihiu vangle, lungdet tah-a ngah jinga ihiuve." 
Romans8:26 Chutichun Lhagao jongin ihatmonauvah eikaihoijun eihu jingjiuve; ajeh chu eihon adol lamtah-a ipi-a dinga itao diuham ihepouve; ahivangin Lhagaovin eiho dingin seidoh thei louvin peng pengin eitaopeh jiuve. 
Romans8:27 Chule Pathen lunglam doltah-a mithengte dinga ataopeh jeh chun, lungthimgil kholtoh-a Pathen chun Lhagao lunglam chu ahejin ahi." 
Romans8:28 Ahin Pathen ngailuho chengse, ama lunggot lam doltah-a kikouho ding vang chun, thiljouse hin aphat nadingu atongkhom sohkeije, ti chu iheuve." 
Romans8:29 Ijeh ham itile sopihon tamtah lah-a Pathen Chapa chu apeng masapen ahina dinga, Pathen'in ahet masah ho chu Achapa lim banga agot masahsa ahitai;" 
Romans8:30 Chule agot masahsaho chu kou jong akou ahi; chule akouho chu them jong achansah ahitai: chule them achansahho chu choi jong achoi-at ahitai. 
Romans8:31 Chuti ahile hicheng thua hi ipi isei dingu ham? Pathen eiho lama apanle, koiham eidou thei dinguva?" 
Romans8:32 Achapa khen louhela eiho jouse dinga pedoh jengpa chun, eiho lungset mana ama chutoh thakhatna ijakai eipeh khom lou dingu ham?" 
Romans8:33 Pathen lhenchomteho chu koiham ahehse dinga? Them chansah-a Pathen ahibouve. 
Romans8:34 Themmo chansah-a koiham? Athia, achungchon cheh-a athi lah-a kona kaithouva um Christa chu ahi; ama Pathen jet lama atouvin eiho dingin eitaopeh jinguve." 
Romans8:35 Christa ngailutna-a kona koiham eikhen dinguva? Hesoh gentheile, lungdonna, bolsetna, gilkel, pon beija um, settona, chemjam, hicheng chun eikhen thei dingham?" 
Romans8:36 Hiche dol jong hi akisune, Keiho nangma jeh-in nilhum keijin eikithat jingui; Tha dinga kigo kelngoi bangin eikisim taove." 
Romans8:37 Ahinla eingailupau vangin hicheng thua hin eiho galjou sanga galjou ihiuve. 
Romans8:38 Ajeh chu I-Pakaiyu Christa Jesu'a um Pathen ngailutna kon chun thina ahin, hinna ahin, vantil ahin, vaipo pipu ahin, thuneina ahin, tulai thudol le khonung ding thu ahin," 
Romans8:39 Chungsang ahin, noilam thuhtah hijongle, thilsem adang imachan eikhen thei lou dingu ahi, tia dettah-a katahsan ahitai." 
Romans9:1 Keiman Christa-a thutahbeh kasei ahi, kajoupoi;" 
Romans9:2 Kalunga lunghesohna nasatahle thohlel tang louhela aum hi, ase apha kahetna kalungin Lhagao Thengah eihettohpin ahi." 
Romans9:3 Ajeh chu keimatah-in tahsa lama kanam mite, kasopite khela Christa-a kona manna lama dinga sedoh-a uma, sapset lhunna-a umhel jeng ding kanagot ahi." 
Romans9:4 Israelte ahiuvin; cha hina chu amauva ahin, loupina, thulhun jouse, danthu peh, Pathen houna, chule thutep jouse la amaho-a ahin;" 
Romans9:5 Pute pate jong amaho-a bou ahin, tahsaphe lama Christa jongla amaho lah-a kon ahibouvin, ama chu imajouse chunga chungnung pen Pathen ahin, akhang akhanga pachat tohtah ahi. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Ahivangin Pathen thu chu imacha hilouva um ahipoi. Ajeh chu Israel lah-a kon jouse Israel ahipoi. 
Romans9:7 Chule Abraham chilhah ahisohkei vangun aboncha keijun achate ahipouve; Isaac'a kona bou nachilhah tia kisei ding ahi, tia asei ahi." 
Romans9:8 Hichu hiti hi ahi, tahsa-a chate chu Pathen chate ahipoi; thutep chatebou chu chilhah tia kisim ahi." 
Romans9:9 Thutep chu hiche hi ahi, Hiti phattah hile kahung ding ahin, chutengle Sara'in chapa khat ahin ding ahi." 
Romans9:10 Chucheng jeng ahipoi, ahin Rebecca jong chu mi khatna kona, ipuluiju Isaac'a kona agai laijin," 
Romans9:11 Achateni so masangin chule apha ase imacha abol masangin, toh vanga hilouva akoupa lunglam le Pathen'in alhen dungjuija, lunggotsa chu adetna dinga," 
Romans9:12 Amanu jah-a, A-upajo chun anaopa soh na atoh ding ahi, tia kiseija anahi." 
Romans9:13 Hiche thudola hin, Keiman Jacob kana ngailun, Esau vang kanahot ahi, tin akisune." 
Romans9:14 Achutile ipi isei dingu ham? Pathen'ah chonphat louna aume iti dingu ham? Ahipoi. 
Romans9:15 Aman Mosi jah-a, Keiman kalungsetpa chu lungset ningting, kahepipa chu kahepi ding ahi, ati." 
Romans9:16 Chuti ahi jeh chun hiche hi alunga tuppa vang jong hilouva, adelpa vang jong hilouva, alungsetpa Pathen vanga konjoh ahibouve." 
Romans9:17 Pathen lekhabu thun Pharaoh jah-a, Nachunga kathilbol theina kavetsah theina dingle, vannoi leisetna kamin kiphon jalna ding monga nangma katundoh nahi, ati." 
Romans9:18 Chutichu ahin Pathen'in ahepi nomchan ahepijia, alunggot chan chu alung asuhtahji ahi." 
Romans9:19 Hichea hin nangman kei jah-a, Achutile ibola eithem mosah jiham, neitin nate. Ajeh chu alunggot chu koiham akham theija?" 
Romans9:20 Ahipoi, vo mihem, Pathen douna-a donbut nang koi nahim? Thilsem chun asempa jah-a, Ibola hitia neisem ham, tintem?" 
Romans9:21 Bellei lhang khatna bel khat lutah-a dena, khat lulouva den ding, abel lei chunga chu beldengpan thu anei hilouham?" 
Romans9:22 Ahin, Pathen'in alungsat vetsahnale athil bolthei hetsahna ding lung ngaito-a, mangthah dinga gotsa um lungsatna belho chunga alung adesotle;" 
Romans9:23 Chule loupi nikho-a dinga masanga patna agotsa, ahepi belho chunga aloupina hao chu hetsah dinga," 
Romans9:24 Aman eiho jengjong, Juda lah-a kon jengseh hilouva, chidang namdangte lah-a kon jonga eikouvu hilouham?" 
Romans9:25 Chutobang chun Hosea lekhabua, Kamite hikhalouho chu keiman kamite kati ding, kadeilounu chu kadeinu kati ding ahi." 
Romans9:26 Nangho keima mite nahipouve tia ajah uva kiseina laitah-a chu, Amaho Pathen hing chate kiti ding ahiuve, tia kisei bang chu ahi." 
Romans9:27 Israelte thudol Isaiah'in asamlen, Israel chate twikhanglen kama neldi jatnin tam jongleu, amoh thembou sohcha ding ahi." 
Romans9:28 Ajehchu aman natoh chu achaija chule chonphatna-a phat asuh chom ding ahi; ajehchu Pakaiyin leisetna hi chomcha khat bou na atoh ding ahi. 
Romans9:29 Hiche thudol hi Isaiah'in masangin aseije, Janel Pakaiyin chikhai ding einakhen louvu hile, Sodom dung isun diu ahin, Gomorrah toh ibah dingu ahi, ati." 
Romans9:30 Achutile ipi isei dingu ham? Chonphatna del louhel chidang namdang ten chonphatna chu aphah-u ahitai; hichu tahsan vanga chonphatna ahi. 
Romans9:31 Ahin Chonphatna danthu dela Israel ten, hiche chonphatna dan chu aphajou pouve." 
Romans9:32 Ijeh ham? amahon tahsana hollouva, dan thilbolla ahol jeh-u ahi. Kipal lhuhna songa kipal lhu-a ahitaove." 
Romans9:33 Hiche thudol jong hi akisune, Veuvin, keiman Sion'ah kipalna song le lung lhahna songpi kakoije; koihile ama tahsan chan chu jachatna-a chulou ding ahi." 
Romans10:1 Sopite, lunga kagotle Israelte dia Pathen henga katao nomna chu, huhhing-a ahung umtheina dingu hi, ahipene." 
Romans10:2 Pathen lama agunchuve ti chu keiman kahetsah ahi; ahivangin hichu hetna neija gunchu ahipoi. 
Romans10:3 Ajeh chu amahon Pathen chonphatna ahetlou jeh-ule, amaho chonphatna phudoh ding agot jeh-un, Pathen chonphat na-ah alut tapouve." 
Romans10:4 Christa chu atahsan jouse dinga, chonphatna amu theina dinguva danthu chaina ahi." 
Romans10:5 Ajehchu Mosi'n chonphatna danthu anahilchet na-a, chonphatna nitpa bou chuche achonphat vanga chu hing ding ahi, anatin ahi." 
Romans10:6 Tahsana chonphat vang chun hitin aseije, Nangman nalung thimin, Koiham van'a kal ding? (hichu Christa gapuilhah ding aseina ahi);" 
Romans10:7 ahiloule, Koiham lei onga kumlha ding? (hichu athi lah-a kona Christa kaithou ding aseina ahi), ti hih-in." 
Romans10:8 Ahin ipi aseijem? hiche thu chu nakomah aume, nakam sungle nalung sungah aume; (hichu kasei phongleu tahsan thu chu ahi)." 
Romans10:9 Hitia chu nangman nakama Pakai Jesu chu naphon doha, chule Pathen nin ama chu athilah-a konin akaithouve ti nalunga natahsan le, asohcha ding nahi." 
Romans10:10 Ajeh chu chonphatna dinga lunga tahsan ahin, sochatna dinga kama phondoh ahi." 
Romans10:11 Pathen lekhabu thun, Koi hileh ama tahsan chan chu jachatna-a chulou ding ahi, ati." 
Romans10:12 Ijeh-inem itile Juda mitele Greek mite chu imacha chom ahipouve; abonchauva chungah Pakai khatsehbou aume, ahenga tao jouse dinga phatna haotah ahi." 
Romans10:13 Koi hile Pakai mina tao chan chu huhhing-a umding ahi. 
Romans10:14 Achutile atahsan louvu chu iti akou dinguham? Athu ajahkhah louvu chu iti atahsan dinguham? Thusei phongle beija iti ajah dinguham? 
Romans10:15 Chule akisol louvule iti asei phongle dinguham? hitijong hin akisune, chamna kipana thupha seiphong leho, thilphaho thudola kipana thu poleho keng iti hoi hitam!" 
Romans10:16 Ahivangin mi jousen Kipana Thupha angaipouve. Ajeh chu Isaiah'in jong, Pakai, kathuphonle-u koiham atahsana, ati." 
Romans10:17 Chuti ahijeh chun, jah-a kona tahsan umdoh, chule jah chu Pathen thua kona hung umdoh ahi." 
Romans10:18 Ahileh amahon ajah lou uham? Ajanauve. A-awginu gamtina athangin, Chule athu uvin kolkimvel achansoh tai." 
Romans10:19 Ahivanga kasei ahi, Israel miten ahetlou uham? Amasan Mosi'n aseijin, Keiman nangho vai neilou vai khat thangset sah-uving ting, Lungthim neilou vai khatna kona kalunghansah ding nahiuve, ati." 
Romans10:20 Isaiah'in jong hakattah-in aseijin, Eihol louten eimudoh-un, Eidong loute hengah kakiphongtai, ati." 
Romans10:21 Ahin Israel jah-a, thua nungloute le nel hatte chunga kakhut kajah nilhum keije, tin aseije." 
Romans11:1 Achutile Pathen'in amite chu apailhah hitam? Ahipoi. Ajeh chu kei jong Abraham chilhah-a Benjamin phunga Israel mi khat kahi. 
Romans11:2 Pathen'in ahet masatsa amite chu apailhapoi. Pathen lekhabu thun Elijah thu asei hi nahet lou uham? Aman Israelte chungchang thu Pathen henga alhutnin," 
Romans11:3 Pakai, amahon nangma themgaoho athatgamun, nang houna maicham asuchimun, keima changseh kaumtai, kei jong tha dingin eitup jingui, ati." 
Romans11:4 Ahivangin Pathen'in adonbutna chu ipi aseijem? Keiman keija dingin Baal anga dilsu louhel mi sangsagi kakikhen nai, ati." 
Romans11:5 Chutobangma chun tulaijin jong lungsetna kilheng amoh moh aumnai. 
Romans11:6 Amavang hichu lungset man ahile, thilbol vanga ahipoi; chuti ahiloule lungsetna hi lungsetna hita lou ahi. Ahinla, hichu natoh vang ahile lungset vang ahitapoi, chuti ahiloule natoh hi natoh hitalou ahi." 
Romans11:7 Iti hitante ahile? Israel miten aholu chu amu louvu ahin, Pathen lhentehon bou amu ahi; adang chengse chu alung tahcheh taovin ahi." 
Romans11:8 Pathen lekhabua hitin akisune, Pathen'in tuni gei hin amaho khu imutsetna lhagao apen, amu thei louna dingun mit apen, jah thei louna nakhang apen ahi." 
Romans11:9 David jongin, A-an nehnao dokhang chu amaho dingin thangle pel hihen, Chule akipalnao le akiditnao hihen." 
Romans11:10 Amu mona dingun amitnu thimhen, Chule nangman atingu bonsah jingin, tin aseijin ahi." 
Romans11:11 Keiman, ahile alhuhna dinguva kipala hiuvam, kati. Ahinaisaipoi. Amavang amaho thangset sahna dinga, amaho suhkhel vanga chu chidang namdangte dinga sochatna ahitai." 
Romans11:12 Chule amaho suhkhel chu vannoi'in haona-a aneija, chule amaho hakam chu chidang namdang ten haona-a aneija ahile, abulhin nau chu chusanga ijatna chungnung cheh ding hitam!" 
Romans11:13 Keiman chidang namdang mi nangho jah-a kasei ahi, keima chidang namdangte dinga solchah-a kapan jeh hin," 
Romans11:14 Ijem tia kanam chanpite kathangsetsah-a alah uva abang bang asochat theina dingun katin, lhacha kapana hi kaloupisah lheh jeng ahi." 
Romans11:15 Ajeh chu amaho kipaidoh vannoi'in kichamna-a aneija ahile, amaho kilah kit chu athia kona hinna ding tailou, adang ipi hi dingham?" 
Romans11:16 Chule changbong lum amasa athena ahile, changlhah tum jouse apumpia atheng ahi; chule ajung athenle, abah chengse jong athenga ahi." 
Romans11:17 Ahinla abah abang bang akiheboh-a ahile, nangho gam olive bou nahiuvin, abah lah-a kijoma nahiuve, Olive thingphung ajunga kona phattheina changkha nahitah-a nahile," 
Romans11:18 Abahho chungah kithang-at hih-in. Kithang-at jongle chun, ajung vah-a nang nahipoi, ajungbou chun nang navahjoh ahibouve." 
Romans11:19 Hichea hin nangman, Keima kijopna dinga abahho kisubonga ahitai, tin nate." 
Romans11:20 Aphai, atahsan lou jeh-a hicheho chu kisubonga ahin, nangma natahsan jala nadindet ahi. Hoitho hih-in, kichajon;" 
Romans11:21 Ajeh chu Pathen'in abah tahbeh bon akhen loule, nangma jong khenpon nate." 
Romans11:22 Chuti ahi jeh chun Pathen phatjele lungkhohje chu veuvin; alhuho dinga chu lungkhoh tah ahin, nangma ding vanga phatah ahi. Aphatna-ah um jingin, achuti loule nang jong naki satlha ding ahi." 
Romans11:23 Amaho chu tahsan louva aum jing louvule, kijom kit ding ahiuve, Pathen'in amaho chu ajop kit thei ahi." 
Romans11:24 Ajeh iham itile apena patna gam Olive phunga kona kisatlha-a nangma, angai louva Olive phung phatoh kijop nahile, apena patna abah tahbeh ho chu olive toh iti kiha jopmat cheh ding hitam!" 
Romans11:25 Sopite, hiche thuguh hi helouva naum dingu kanompoi, ajole hung kichihsah khauvinate; chidang namdangte akimsoh kahse-a Israel mite kimkhat chunga lungtahna chua ahi." 
Romans11:26 Chutichu ahin Israelte jouse huhhing-a um cheh ding ahi. Hiche thudol hi, Sion'a kona Huhhing-a hung ding ahin, chule Aman Jacob phunga kona Pathen ngaisah louna asuhmang ding ahi," 
Romans11:27 Achonsetnao kalahmang tengle, Hiche hi amahotoh kakitepnao hi ding ahi, tin akisune." 
Romans11:28 Kipana Thupha thudola amaho khu nangho jala melmate ahiuvin, lhenchom lam thudola apu apateu jala deitahte ahiuve." 
Romans11:29 Ijeh ham itile Pathen'in manbeija athilpehho le akouho chu akhelkit theihoi ahipoi. 
Romans11:30 Masangin Pathen thua nunglou nahiuvin, tu vangin amaho louchal jeh-a lungsetna mu-a nahitaove." 
Romans11:31 Chule chutobangma chu amahon jong, lungsetna namu jaluva hi lungsetna amu theina dinguva, tu-a louchala ahiuve." 
Romans11:32 Ijeh ham itile Pathen'in mi jouse alungset theina dinga thua nunlou na-a akhumchah ahitai. 
Romans11:33 Pathen chihna le hetna haoje hi athuh lheh jenge! Avaihom athutan hetphah hoi ahipoi, chule alampiho holdoh theihoi ahipoi!" 
Romans11:34 Ajeh chu Pakai lungthim chu koiham ahea? Chujongle lungthim pe-a anapanga koiham? 
Romans11:35 Alepeh kit dinga thilpha anape masa koiham? 
Romans11:36 Ajeh chu ama-a konle, ama vanga, chule ama dinga thil jouse ana uma ahi. Loupina jouse atonsot geijin ama-a hi jinghen. Amen." 
Romans12:1 Chuti ahi jeh chun, sopite, Pathen lungset vang hin natipum piu chu longlhen thengtah gan kihinglha bangin Pathen lah thei doltah-in Pathen'ah kipeuvin tia kangeh nahiuve, hichu natoh dinguva kilom tah chu ahi." 
Romans12:2 Chule nangho tulai vannoi leiset chon hin chon hih-un; Pathen lungdeilam, hichu apha, lah theile phat chamkim hi ipi ahi nahetdoh theina dingun, lung thah keng-unlang lim chom puvin." 
Romans12:3 Hijeh chun eipeh lungsetna vang hin nalah uva mi chengse jah-a kasei ahi, agel dingdol kalvalin koiman kalena ti gel hihhen, amavang Pathen'in apeh kham kham tahsanna dungjuijin kituptah-in ngaito henlang lung geltohhen." 
Romans12:4 Tipum khatnah tibah tamtah ineijui, tibah jouse thakhat ahipoi, apanna akibangpon ahi." 
Romans12:5 Hibang chun eiho jong tamtah ihiuvin, Christa-a ti khat ihiuve; khat chu khat tibah ihi cheh-un ahi." 
Romans12:6 Lungsetna eipeh bang cheh-un eithil peh-u achom cheh ineijun ahi. Thusei phongna apehpan atahsan dungjuijin seihen; 
Romans12:7 Sottola pang chu sottolin umhen; mihil chun mihil lamah; 
Romans12:8 Mitilkhou chun mitilkhouna lamah kipehen; thil homan it louhelin homhen; vaipo-a pang chun gunchu tah-in vai pohen; milungsetnan kipahtah-in lungset hen. 
Romans12:9 Ngailutna alem beihel hihen. Ase lam thet bolunlang apha chu kolchah jingun. 
Romans12:10 Kisopi ngailutna lamah kideito kisato cheh-in umun; kiginle kijana lamah amasajo ding kichu-uvin; 
Romans12:11 Gunchuna lamah thase hih-un; lhagao lamah al jingun; Pakai lhachan pangun; 
Romans12:12 Kinepna-ah thanomun; genthei hesohna-a thohhatnun; taona lamah pontho jingun; 
Romans12:13 Mithengho lhahsam huna-in kithopiuvin; jindot themun. 
Romans12:14 Nabolseteu chu phatthei boh-un; samse louvin phatthei bohjouvin. 
Romans12:15 Kipah thanomte chu kipa thanop piuvin; akapte chu kapiuvin. 
Romans12:16 Kitohdelin lungkhat nin chon cheh-un. Letna lam lung gel louvin aneo neotoh kiloijun. Nangma chang kichihsah hih-in. 
Romans12:17 Mi setna chu setna-in thuh hih-un; mi jouse mitvetna apha chu bol ding gojouvin. 
Romans12:18 Chule ahi theija ahile, najochanun, mi jousetoh kihoutheijun kichamdelin umun." 
Romans12:19 Vo deitahte, kiphulah hih-un, Pathen lunghanna chu otdoh jovin; ajeh chu Pakaiyin, Phulah chu keima kinbou ahi, keiman lethuh nange, ati, tin akisune." 
Romans12:20 Ahin, namelmao chu agil akela ahile, an nehsah-un; adang achahle twi donsah-un; chuti bolleu chun alu chunga mei-am setkhompeh nahi dingu ahi." 
Romans12:21 Setna kijosah hihhelun, setna chu phatna-in joujovin." 
Romans13:1 Thunei chungnungte thu thun mi jouse nungcheh hen; ajeh chu Pathen thusah louva thuneija aumpoi, chule aum chengse hi Pathen pansah cheh ahiuve." 
Romans13:2 Chuti ahi jeh chun chuche thuneite douva chu Pathen thu douva ahi, chule adouho chun achunguva thutanna akiloikhum dingu ahi." 
Romans13:3 Ajeh iham itile vaipoho chu thilpha bolpa dinga kichat um hilouvin, ase bolpa dingabou kichat uma ahi. Thunei ho kicha louhelin umleng ti nagotnem? Thilpha bolin, chutile apachat nachan ding ahi;" 
Romans13:4 Ajeh chu nangma phattheina dinga ama Pathen sottola pang ahi. Ase nabol vangle kichan, aman chemjam adop khu moh-a adop ahipoi; ajeh chu ama Pathen sottol ahin, ase bolpa chunga lunghanga phula-a pang ahi." 
Romans13:5 Hijeh chun lunghanna ding ahipon, ase apha hetna jala jong athua nun ding ahi." 
Romans13:6 Hiche jeh-a chu kai jong napehjiu ahi; ajeh chu amaho Pathen sottol hiuva hiti chu abol jing jengu ahi. 
Romans13:7 Peh dingdol jouse chu peuvin; kai pehdol kai peuvin; se choina dolah se choijun; gin dingdol chu ginun; ja dingdol chu jauvin. 
Romans13:8 Khatle khat kingailutto cheh tailouvin koima imacha bat hih-un; ajeh chu michom dang ngailu-a chun Pathen danthupeh chu asuhbulhit ahitai. 
Romans13:9 Ajeh iham itile, Jon bol hih-in, Tol that hih-in, Gucha hih-in, hetphotna dihlou mang hih-in, Papse hih-in, ti thupeh dang um jongle, Nangman nangma naki ngailut bangin naheng nakoma ngailun, tia hin akai khom sohkeijin ahi." 
Romans13:10 Ngailutna-in hengle kom setna abolpoi; hijeh chun ngailut hi danthu bukipna ahi. 
Romans13:11 Chule chuche ti louvin phat umchan hi naheuve; tu hi nangho dingin imutna kona khah phat ahitai; ajeh chu eihon itahsan tiluva sang chun tu hin isochatnao anaitan ahi. 
Romans13:12 Jan asotjo achetai, sun ahung naitai; hiche jeh chun khaije, muthim natoh pailhau hitin khovah vonin kivonuhite." 
Romans13:13 Suna bangin hoitah-in umu hite; juneh motchonle jukhama um louvin, huhle jonthanhoi nei louvin, kinahnale kithangset beihelin umu hite." 
Romans13:14 Pakai Jesu Christa chu kivonjoh bouvun, naphe phatna dingu tahsa lam ngaichat suhbulhit ding imacha go hih-un." 
Romans14:1 Tahsana hat louva chu nalah uva lauvin, amavang atahsan bukim louna chu oimo-a nol ding ahipoi." 
Romans14:2 Mikhatnin imajouse neh theijin atahsanin, ahatmoa chun anche jengbou anei." 
Romans14:3 Anea chun anelou chu musit dahen; chule anelouvan anea chu oimo hihhen; ijeh ham itile ama chu Pathen'in alahsa ahi. 
Romans14:4 Mi insung soh oimo-a nang koi nahim? Adinle alhuh a-pakaipa-a bou ahi. Ahi, Pathen chun adinsah thei ahijeh-a chu ama chu adinsah ding ahi." 
Romans14:5 Mi abang khatnin nikho khat nikho dang dang sangin ajabol tumin, abang kimkhatnin nikho jouse kibangin ajabolin ahi. Mi jousen ama lung sunga kihetchen chehhen." 
Romans14:6 Nikho jabola chun Pakai choi-atna-a ajabol ahin; nikho jabollou chun Pakai dinga ajabollou ahi. Chule ima ne-a jong chun Pathen alhai jeh chun Pakai choi-atna-a aneh ahi; anelou jong chun Pathen athangvah-a Pakai dinga anehda ahi. 
Romans14:7 Ijeh ham itile eiho koima ama dinga hinga ihipouve, chule koima ama dinga thia ihipouve." 
Romans14:8 Ihinle Pakai dinga hing ihiuvin, ithiu jongle Pakai dinga thia ihibovui; hijeh chun hing jong leuhen Pakai dinga hing ihiuvin, thi jong leuhen Pakai dinga thia ihiuve." 
Romans14:9 Ajeh chu athi le ahing Pakai ahikop theina dinga, Khrista thia, chua thoudoh kitna, chule hing kitna ahi." 
Romans14:10 Ahin ibola nangin nasopi na-oimo ham? Chujongle nangin nasopi ibola musit nahim? Ajeh chu Khrista laltouna anga ibon chaova idin dingu ahinalaije. 
Romans14:11 Ajehchu, Pakaiyin aseije, Keima hingjing kahito lhonna, khup jouse ka anga dilsu cheh ding, chule lei jousen Pathen henga aphondoh ding ahi; tin akisune." 
Romans14:12 Chuti ahi jeh-a chu ibon chaova Pathen henga eima chonchan cheh ikisei dingu ahi. 
Romans14:13 Hijeh chun tukal ki-oimoto tapou hite; hiche sang chun hiche hi ngaito jovin, sopi anga lung lhahna le kipal lhuhna koi lou ding ahi." 
Romans14:14 Thil angai monga thenglou aumpoi, ti hi Pakai Jesu'ah kahechenin katahsan lheh jengin ahi; amavang mi khattouvin thilboh ahi tia angaito chu, ama dinga hichu athenglou ahiji." 
Romans14:15 Na nehle chah chunga nasopi alung phatmole, ngailutna thua chonta lou nahi. Adinga Khrista thia ahitan, ama chu nangman naneh nachah-in sumang hih-in." 
Romans14:16 Hijeh chun naphatnao chu seisetnin um hihhen; 
Romans14:17 Ajeh chu Pathen lenggam chu anneh twidon thua ahipoi; chonphatna, lungmonna, Lhagao Thenga kipana joh bou chu Pathen gam thupi ahi." 
Romans14:18 Ajeh iham itile koi hileh chuti thua Khrista lhacha-a pang chu Pathen lung lamtah ahin, mihemin jong, Aphai, tia aphot chen ahi." 
Romans14:19 Hijeh chun kichamdela umna dingle khantou theina kibolpehto lam juiju hite. 
Romans14:20 Nehle chah jeh-in Pathen natoh suse hihhelun. Thil jouse athengnai, ahinla ikhat neh-a lung lhahna chu anepa dinga setna ahi." 
Romans14:21 Sa neh hijongle, lengpitwi don hijongle, adang ipi hijongle, nasopi kipal lhuhna ahiloule lhasetna, ahiloule thalhomna chu bolda hela pha ahi." 
Romans14:22 Tahsana nanei jem? Nanei chu Pathen angah nangman hetnin nei jingin; aphalam ahi ti ngaito-a themo-a kingaito loupa chu mi nunnom ahi. 
Romans14:23 Amavang lungsa-ih puma nepa chu themmo changa ahitai; ajeh iham itile tahsanna neija aneh ahipoi; chule ipi hijongle tahsanna nei louva bol chu chonset ahi. 
Romans15:1 Chuti ahin eiho ahat cheng hin eima lunglhaina hol louva, ahatmote hatmona chu ipohhu joh dingu ahi." 
Romans15:2 Eiho khat cheh-in iheng ikoma houthu lama khantousahna dinga aphatna dingu ngaito-a, lunglhaisah ding ahi." 
Romans15:3 Ajeh chu Christa jeng jong ama kilunglhai lou ahi; ahin, Nahouse hon nahouset nao chu keima chungah achutai, tia kisun bangjoh chu ahibouve." 
Romans15:4 Ajeh chu nidang laija thu kisun chengse chu, lekha kisun Pathen thua kona thohhat le lungmonna imuva kinepna inei theina dinguva, eiho kihilna dinga kisun ahi." 
Romans15:5 Thohhat le lungmon kona Pathen'in, Christa lunglam doltah-in khatle khat lungkhat naputsah cheh-uhen;" 
Romans15:6 Chutia chu nanghon lungkhat le kam khatna I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa Pathen nachoi-at theina dingun. 
Romans15:7 Hichena ding chun Pathen loupi choi-atna dinga Christan nangho nalah bangu chun, khatle khat kilatouvin." 
Romans15:8 Ijeh-inem itile keiman hiche kisei hi, Iputeu ipateu athutep chu phutdet dingle Pathen lungset jala chidang namdang ten Pathen achoi-at theina dinguva, Pathen thu adih chu hetsah dinga, Jesu Christa chu cheptanho lhacha-a hung panga ahitai." 
Romans15:9 Hiti jong hin akisune, Hiche jeh chun keiman chidang namgdangte lah-a Nangma kipah-in phonging ting, Chule nangma minin la jong sange." 
Romans15:10 Hitin ati kitleuve, Vo chidang namdangte, amitetoh kipah thanom khomun." 
Romans15:11 Chukitle, Vo chidang namdangte, nabonchaovin Pakai chu vahchoijun, Chule mi jousen ama vahchoi uhen, ati." 
Romans15:12 Chule Isaiah'in jong, Jesse jung chu umding ahin, Chule chidang namdangte chunga vaipo dinga hung sohdoh ding ahi; Ama chu chidang namdang ten kinepna-a anei dingu ahi, ati." 
Romans15:13 Lhagao Theng thahat vanga kinepna nanei letset theina dingun, kinepna Pathen'in natahsan naochu kipa thanop le chamna lungmon na-in dip letset tahen." 
Romans15:14 Kasopite ho, nangho chungchang thua chun, nangmahotah phatna dimset le hetna bukip sohkei nahiuvin, khatle khat kitilkhouto thei nahiuve, ti keimatah-in kahetchen ahi." 
Romans15:15 Ahivangin Sopite, chidang namdangte lah-a Christa Jesu lhacha-a kapan theina dinga Pathen'in eipeh lungsetna vanga hi nangho geldohsahna dinga, akah lahlah-a hakat cheh-a naheng uva kahinsut ahi." 
Romans15:16 Chutia chu chidang namdangte dinga Jesu Christa lhacha kahia; chidang namdangte kilhaina chu lahthei ahia, Lhagao Theng suhtheng ahina dinguva, Pathen Thupha lhacha-a kapan ahi." 
Romans15:17 Hijeh chun tun Pathen dinga natohna lama hin Christa Jesu'ah kisonna kaneije. 
Romans15:18 Ajeh chu chidang namdangte Pathen thua nunsahna dinga Christan keima eimanchah-a, thu le natoh-a abol chengse tailou chu imadang kasei ngam poi;" 
Romans15:19 Hichu Pathen Lhagao thahat na-a melchihna thaneitah le thilbol kidanga kon ahi; hitichun Jerusalem le akimvela kipat Ilyricum geijin Christa Thupha kaphongjal tan ahi. 
Romans15:20 Ahi, hijeh-a chu Christa min kiphah poh louna mun'a kipana thupha lhangsap dinghi kalungtup ahi, achuti loule midang bulphusa chunga insa kahi khah ding ahi:" 
Romans15:21 Ahin Ama thudol kiseipoh khah lounate chun amu dingu: chule ajakhalou ten ahet dingu ahi, tia kisun bang ahi nading joh ahi." 
Romans15:22 Hiche jehtah-a jong chu hijatvei naheng uva kahung dinga kon, hiche chun eisuhmo jingji ahi." 
Romans15:23 Tu vangin hiche gamkai sungah kanatohna ding mun aumtapoi; kum sotna patna nangho henga hung ding kagot jingma ahin," 
Romans15:24 Spain gam lama kache phat phatle naheng uva kahung ding ahi. Ajehchu nangho mupa ding kakinemin, chule amasan nang hotoh chomkhat kivop khom ingting, chule kache teng jongle nanghon neihung thahleu chun kati." 
Romans15:25 Tu vang hin mithengte gahu dinga Jerusalem'a chetadi ding kahi. 
Romans15:26 Ajeh chu Macedonia le Achaia gama mihon Jerusalem'a um mithengte lah-a migenthei vaichaho huna-a sumto ding aphasah uvin ahi. 
Romans15:27 Ahi, pha asah tahbeh-u ahin, chule abatnu jong hija ahi; ajeh chu lhagao lama chidang namdangte akikop piuva ahile, leiset thil lama jong amahon abatnu ahin, ahu dingdol mongu ahi." 
Romans15:28 Chuche jeh chun chuche kin chu kachai tengle asumdonu chu phatecha kapehdoh joule, nangho kom hinjot pangting Spain gam lama kachepai peh ding ahi." 
Romans15:29 Chule naheng uva kahung tengle chun, Christa Kipana thupha-a kon phattheina chamkim keija hinpo-a hung ding kahi, ti kahei." 
Romans15:30 Sopite, Juda gama cheng sei ngailouho khutna kona kahoi theija, Jerusalem'a kin neija kachena hi," 
Romans15:31 Mithengten analah theina dingun, chule Pathen phatsah-a kipahtah-a nangho heng lama kahunga nang hotoh kakicholdo theina dingin," 
Romans15:32 Pathen henga taona-a hahun neihuvin tia Pakai Jesu Christa le Lhagao Thengin eipeh-u ngailutna vanga, nangho kahin ngeh nahiuve." 
Romans15:33 Chamnale lungmon kona Pathen'in nabonchaovin umpiuvin. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Isopinu-u Phoebe, Cenchria houbung lhachanu hi Pakai minin mithengte chonna-in lomtah-a analauvin;" 
Romans16:2 Chule nahunao angaichatna chan-ah anahuvin tia nangho amanu hitoh kakihettosah nahiuve; ajeh iham itile amanu hin mi tamtah ahun chule keimatah jeng jong eihun ahi. 
Romans16:3 Jesu Christa-a katoh khompi kahinkho huhna-a alol do-a Priscilla le Aquila kasalam anapeuvin; 
Romans16:4 Kei chang hilouvin chidang namdangte lah-a houbung mi jousen jong apahchauvin ahi. 
Romans16:5 Chule a-in'a kikhom houbung mite jong chu salam anapeuvin. Kasahtah Epaenetus Asia gama Christa tahsan masapen chu salam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:6 Nangho dinga na hatoh-a tonggim Mariam jong kasalam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:7 Ka-inkote kasoh chanpi Andronicus le Junia solchah ho lah-a minchepen keima sanga Christa-a lut masa amani jong chu kasalam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:8 Pakaiya kasahtah Amplias chu kasalam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:9 Christa-a itoh gimpiu Urbane le kasahtah Stachys salam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:10 Christa-a mi kitah kichen Apelles salam peuvin. Aristobulus te insung miho jong salam peuvin. 
Romans16:11 Ka-inko Herodion kasalam anapeuvin. Narcissus te inko Pakaiya um cheng chu kasalam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:12 Pakaiya na hatohgim Typhene le Tryphosa salam anapeuvin. Dei umtah Persis Pakaiya na ahatoh lheh jengin, ama chu kasalam anapeuvin." 
Romans16:13 Pakaiya lhen Rufus le kanu tobang anu chu salam anapeuvin. 
Romans16:14 Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermas, Patroba, Hermes, hicheng chule aumpiu sopite chengse salam anapeuvin." 
Romans16:15 Philologus le Julia, Nereus le asopinu, Olympus, chule amahotoh kikhom mithengte chengse salam anapeuvin." 
Romans16:16 Khatle khat salam kiboh tovinlang thengtah-in kichopmun, Christa houbung mite jousen salam napeuve." 
Romans16:17 Vo sopite, kangehnao ahi, thu nakihil chengu chu akaleh-a, kikhen chehna dingle kipal lhuhna semteho chu anamelgel unlang, amaho-a konin anachom umun." 
Romans16:18 Ijeh-inem itile chutobang miho chun I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa lhacha na tong louvin, a-oisung dingu lhacha na tong jengbou ahiuve; chule kamthemle thungei ngeijin suhset neilouho lung dohan alhemlha jiuvin ahi." 
Romans16:19 Nasei ngaijeu chu vannoi'ah akithang dohtan ahi. Hiche jeh chun nachung uvah kakipah lheh jenge; amavang nangho apha lama chingunlang ase lamah lunglhom leu chun kalung ahi. 
Romans16:20 Chule chamna lungmonna Pathen'in Satan chu nakengto noijuva achil ngemvah ding ahinai. Pakai Jesu Christa lungset chu nalah uva umjing hen, Amen." 
Romans16:21 Katoh khompi Timothy chule ka-inko Lucius, Jason chule Sosipater hiteho chun salam nahinpeuve." 
Romans16:22 Chule hiche lekhasun Tertius, keiman Pakaiyah nangho salam nahinpeuve." 
Romans16:23 Keimale houbung mite jouse lhunna Gaius chun salam napeuve. Hiche khopi-a sumdol Erastus le sopi Quartus'in salam napeuve. 
Romans16:24 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungsetna chun nabon chaovin umpiuvin, Amen." 
Romans16:25 Kathupha hille Jesu Christa thuphon bangtah-a, tonsotna patna ki-im thuguh chu tu-a akiphondoh bangtah-a," 
Romans16:26 Tahsan thua ahung nunna dinguva tonsotna Pathen thupeh dungjuitah-a, themgaoho lekhabun aphondoh-a, chitin le namtin jouse ahetsah ahitan;" 
Romans16:27 Nangho sudet thei Pathen chinga khatseh chu Jesu Christa vangin tonsot geijin loupi jinghen, Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Pathen phasah-a Christa solchah dinga kikou Paul leh sopi Sosthenes," 
1Corinthians1:2 Corinth-a um Pathen houbung, Christa Jesu'a kisuthenga, mitheng dinga kikoute henga, gamtina I-Pakaiyu (amahole eiho Pakai) Jesu Christa min pan chengsetoh;" 
1Corinthians1:3 I-Pau Pathen le Jesu Christa-a konin lungsetna leh lungmon naheng uvah umhen. 
1Corinthians1:4 Christa Jesu'a Pathen lungset nangho henga kipeh jeh chun nangho chungchang thuah Pathen kathangvah jinge. 
1Corinthians1:5 Ijakai-ah, thuseina tincheng leh, hetna tichenga aman nahaosah-u ahitai." 
1Corinthians1:6 Nangho lah-a Christa thu kahettohsah chu kiphut det ahitai. 
1Corinthians1:7 Chutia chu nangho thilpeh lhasam louhela, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung kit ngah-a umjing nahiuve." 
1Corinthians1:8 Chule aman nangho akhon ni geija nakoidet jing dingu, chutengle nangho I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa nikho ni chuleh themona beihela naum dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians1:9 Pathen tahsan umtah ahi, aman Achapa I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa kithopi dinga nakoulut-u ahitai." 
1Corinthians1:10 Tun sopite, nangho thukhat kisaovin, nalah uva kikhen telna umlouvin, lungkhat le lung ngaito khat na lolhing tah-in kipunkhom mun, tia I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mina katem nahiuve," 
1Corinthians1:11 Ijeh-inem itile, kasopite ho, nachung chang thu-u nalah uva kinel noh baotam aume, ti Chloe te inko seinan kajai." 
1Corinthians1:12 Tu-a kasei chu hiche ahi, nangho amilipmin, Keima Paul'a kahi, keima Apollo'a kahi, keima Cephas'a kahi, keima Christa'a kahi, nati sohkeijun ahi." 
1Corinthians1:13 Christa chu nahop khen khenu hitam? Paul chu nangho dinga thingpel'a kikhenbeh mongam? Ole Paul mina baptize nachan mongum? 
1Corinthians1:14 Crispus leh Gaius tailou, adang koimacha baptize kachansah lou jeh chun Pathen kathangvah-e;" 
1Corinthians1:15 Achuti loule keiman keima mina baptize kachan ahi, tia sei umkha ding ahi." 
1Corinthians1:16 Chule keiman Stephanas insung mite chu baptize kachansah ahin, chuche tailou chu adang koima baptize kachansah kahepoi." 
1Corinthians1:17 Baptize chansah dinga hilouva, Kipana Thupha hille dinga bou Christan eisol ahi; chihna thua seiding hilouvin, achuti loule Christa thingpel chu imacha hilou sohkha ding ahi." 
1Corinthians1:18 Thingpel thu chu amangthai dingho dingin ngolna ahi; asohcha eiho ding vangin Pathen thahat ahi. 
1Corinthians1:19 Hiti jong hin akisune, Keiman michingho chih chu kasuhmanga, Lungthim themho lungthim moh kahisah ding ahi." 
1Corinthians1:20 Miching hoiham? Lekha sun mihil hoiham? Tukhanga minel kala hoibaham? Vannoi leiset chihna chu Pathen'in asuh ngol hilouham? 
1Corinthians1:21 Ajehchu Pathen chihna-in, leiset mihem ten amaho chihna-a Pathen ahetlou phatnuva, ngolhoi thu hila atahsanho huhhing chu Pathen'in pha asah ahi." 
1Corinthians1:22 Juda ten melchihna angeh jiuvin, chule Greek miten chihna aholjiuve;" 
1Corinthians1:23 Keihon vang thingpel chunga Christa kikhetbeh thu kahilleu ahin, hichu Juda te dingin kipal lhuhna ahin, chule Greek te dingin ngolna ahi;" 
1Corinthians1:24 Amavang Juda hihen Greek hileh, akikouho ding vangin Christa chu Pathen hatna le Pathen chihna ahi." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen ngolna chu mihem sanga gamchenga chingjo ahin, chule Pathen hatmona chu mihem sanga gamchenga hatjo ahi." 
1Corinthians1:26 Ijeh-inem itile, sopite, nanghon nakikou dolu hi ngaito temun, leiset tahsa phe lama miching tamtah, thanei tamtah, chule milun tamtah akikou pon ahi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Ahivangin Pathen'in michingho jachat sahna dinga, vannoi'a angolteho alhena; ahat apaoho jachat sahna dinga, vannoi'a hatmoteho alhen ahi." 
1Corinthians1:28 Vannoi leisetna thil kidah um le thil noinung cheng chu Pathen'in alhena, chule aumlou jong chu aumsaho imacha hilou sona dinga alhen ahi;" 
1Corinthians1:29 Hichu ama angsunga leiset mihem akisonga koima aum louhelna ding ahi. 
1Corinthians1:30 Nangho vang chu ama vanga Christa Jesu'a um nahiuve, amachu Pathen'a kona eiho dinga chihna, chonphatna, kithensona, kilhatdohna-a kisem ahi." 
1Corinthians1:31 A kisun dung juijin, Koi hile akisonga chu Pakaiya kisonghen, ati." 
1Corinthians2:1 Chule, sopite, keima vang naheng uva Pathen thu hettohsah seiphonga kahung chun, thusei themna le chihna toh thon kahungpoi." 
1Corinthians2:2 Jesu Christa thu le thingpel chunga akikhetbeh thu tailou, nalah uva thudang hehih helinge tia kangaito ahi." 
1Corinthians2:3 Chule keima nalah uva hatmotah, kichatah, chule kihot hot jinga kana um ahi." 
1Corinthians2:4 Kathusei le kathu lhangsap chu mihem chihna-a jollhah themna ahipon, amavang Lhagao le athahatna-a phot tohna ahijon ahi:" 
1Corinthians2:5 Chutia chu natahsan naochu mihem chihna-a dinga hilouva, Pathen thahatna joh-a ding ahina ding ahi." 
1Corinthians2:6 Amavang apilhing saho jah-a vang chihna thun jong kaseiji naove, ahivangin hiche vannoi leiset chihna thu ahipoi, hiche vannoi leiset vaipo mangthah dingho chih thu jong ahipoi." 
1Corinthians2:7 Ahin Pathen chihna thuguh, iloupina dinguva Pathen'in vannoi leiset um masanga agot masah chihna thu ki-im chu, kaseijoh-u ahi." 
1Corinthians2:8 Hichu hiche vannoi leiset vaipoho him himin ahetoh pouve, heleu loupina Pakai chu thingpel'a akhetbeh louhel dingu ahi. Hijongle," 
1Corinthians2:9 Ahin mit mukhah lou, na jahkhah lou, Mihem lunga lutkha lou, Pathen'in angailuho dinga agotsa chengse chu, tin akisune." 
1Corinthians2:10 Ahivangin Pathen'in eiho hengah Lhagaovin aphongdoh tai, Ajehchu Lhagaovin imajouse akholdoh jia, Pathen thuguh jong akholdohji ahi." 
1Corinthians2:11 Mi lung sunga thu um mihem'a um lhagao tailou adang mihem koiham ahea? Chuche bang chun Pathen thu jong Pathen Lhagao tailou koima dangin ahepoi. 
1Corinthians2:12 Tun Pathen'in manbeija eipeh chengseu hi hetna dinga, eiho vannoi leiset lhagao changa hilouva Pathen'a hungkon Lhagao changa ihiuve." 
1Corinthians2:13 Hitiho chu mihem chihna-in ahil thua sei louva, Lhagao Thengin ahil thu chu, lhagao le lhagao tekah-a kahilu ahi." 
1Corinthians2:14 Tahsa lam mihem ten Pathen Lhagao thuhi alajipouve; ajehchu amaho dinga ngol thu ahi, chule hichu lhagaova hetkhenbou ahi jeh chun athudol chu ahekhen thei himhim pouve." 
1Corinthians2:15 Lhagao mi vang chun thil ijakai ahekhenjin, ama chula koiman ahekhen jipoi." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ajehchu Pakai lungthim he-a, ama hil thei dinga koiham? Eiho vang chu Christa lung pu-a ihiuve." 
1Corinthians3:1 Sopite, keiman lhagao lam mite henga sei bangin nangho henga kasei theipon, tahsa lam mite henga sei banga, Christa lama naosen ho jah-a seibanga kasei ahi." 
1Corinthians3:2 Keiman nangho an guma vah louva noitwija kavah-bou nahiuve, ajehchu tuchan hin nane thei hih-un, tu jengin jong nane thei hih laijuve;" 
1Corinthians3:3 Nangho tu geijin tahsa mi nahi nalaijui. Ijeh-inem itile nalah uva kithangset to, kinah kiphun kikhentel aum nalaije; ahile, natahsa chonu hilouham? chule mi chon chona chon nahi lou uham?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ijeh inem itile khatnin, Keima Paul'a kahi, nati uva; adang khatnin, Keima Apollo'a kahi, nati laiseuva chu; tahsa-a nahi lou uham?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Apollos chu koiham? Chule Paul chu koiham? Pakaiyin mijouse apeh dungjuija, alhacha-a pang, amani-a kona nanghon natahsanu ahibouve." 
1Corinthians3:6 Keiman kaphu ahin, Apollon twi achap ahi, Pathen bouvin akhansah ahi." 
1Corinthians3:7 Chuti ahin aphutpa jong ima ahipon, atwi chappa jong ima ahidehpoi; akhansah-a Pathen chubou ahipen ahi." 
1Corinthians3:8 Tun aphutpa le atwi chappa chu thakhat ahi lhone, ahivangin atohgim lhon dungjui juija tohman asan gel lhon ding ahi." 
1Corinthians3:9 Ajehchu keini Pathen tohkhompi kahi lhonin, nangho Pathen lou nahiuve, Pathen in-sah nahiuve." 
1Corinthians3:10 Pathen lungset vanga eikipeh dungjuija insa themtah banga abul kaphu ahitai, achunga chu midangin asah ahi. Amavang chuche chunga sa ding chengsen asah danje ding chu chingthei chehhen." 
1Corinthians3:11 Ijeh inem itile abul phudohsa tailou chu abul dang koiman aphutdoh theitapoi, chuche abul kiphut chu Jesu Christa ahi." 
1Corinthians3:12 Chuche bul kiphut chunga chun koi hijongle sana-a sanoman sahen, dangka-a sanoman sahen, song mantama sanoman sahen, thinga sanoman sahen, bi-a sanoman sahen, pola sanoman sahen;" 
1Corinthians3:13 Atoh cheh-u chu hung kiphongdoh cheh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile nikho chun aphondoh ding, hiche ni chule meija kiphongdoh ding ahijeh chun, meijin mijouse anatoh aset aphat apatep ding ahi." 
1Corinthians3:14 Achunga insaho chu koi koi hile a-insah chu adin jinga ahile, ama chun toh phatman asan ding ahi." 
1Corinthians3:15 Chule koi hile a-insah akahvama ahile, ama chu hakam ding; amatah vang huhhing-a umding ahi, ahivangin meikong lah pal galkaija bang ding ahi." 
1Corinthians3:16 Pathen in theng nahiuva chule nasunguva Pathen Lhagao achen chu nahet lou uham? 
1Corinthians3:17 Pathen in theng suhboh-a chu Pathen'in ama chu asuhmang ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itile Pathen in chu thengtah ahi, nangho jong chutichu nahiuve." 
1Corinthians3:18 Koimacha amale ama kilhemlha hihhen. Nalah uva khattou, tulai khang thua hi kachinge, ti aumle, ama chu achihna ding chun ngol hen." 
1Corinthians3:19 Ajeh chu hiche vannoi leiset chihna hi Pathen dinga ngolna ahi. Ajehchu, aman michingho chu ajonchih naovah amanjie, tin akisune." 
1Corinthians3:20 Chujongle, Pakaiyin michingho lunggel le thil ngaito chu moh ahi ahenai, ati kitleuve." 
1Corinthians3:21 Hijeh chun koima mihem'a kisong hihhen. Ijeh-inem itile thiljouse nangho-a ahi; 
1Corinthians3:22 Paul hihen, Apollos hihen, Cephas hihen, vannoi leiset hijongle, hinna hihen, thina hihen, tupetle khonung hijongle, aboncha nangho-a ahi;" 
1Corinthians3:23 Nangho jong Christa-a nahiuve, Christa chu Pathen'a ahi." 
1Corinthians4:1 Keiho hi Christa lhacha le Pathen thuguh chingin min eingaitou hen. 
1Corinthians4:2 Gou ching jenga jonghi, tahsan umtah mi ngaija ahi." 
1Corinthians4:3 Ahivangin, nanghon kaumchan nakhol diu, ahiloule mihem thutan na-in akhol ding chu keima dinga thilneocha bou ahi. Henge keiman jong kaumchan kaki kholpoi." 
1Corinthians4:4 Ajeh chu keiman kachungah imacha kakihetpoi, ahinla hichea hin them eichanpoi; ajeh chu kaumchan khola Pakai joh ahibouve." 
1Corinthians4:5 Chuti ahi jeh chun Pakai hung kahsen aphat masangin thu tanloi hih-un; aman muthima thilsel chu khovah-a ahinphondoh ding, chule mihem lung sungin ipi agelem hi jong chu aphondoh ding ahinai. Hiche teng chule amitakipmin pachatna achan ding dol cheh Pathen'a kona asan ding ahi." 
1Corinthians4:6 Sopite, akisun chengse kalvala koiman angaito louding; chutia chu nalah uva khatnin khat asona, achomkhat chunga hoithona aneilou ding ti thuhil hi keinia kona nahetdoh nadiuva, keima le Apollos hi tekah na-a kahinsei ahi." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ajeh chu koiham midanga kon nachom khenuva? chule nakisan louvu thil ipi nanei juvem? Nasan uva ahile ibola asang lou banga hoithoa nahiu vem? 
1Corinthians4:8 Nangho tun nava taove, tun nahautaove, keiho beija lengho banga vai nahomu ahitai. Keiho jong nang hotoh thakhatna vai ihomkhom theina dinguvin, vai hom tahtah hileu chun kati." 
1Corinthians4:9 Pathen'in keiho solchah ho hi, athi dinga kigo-a banga anukhah pena eikoiju hinte tin kangaitoi; hijeh-a chu vannoi le, vantil teho, chule mihem vetchah-a um kahiuve." 
1Corinthians4:10 Keiho vang Christa jala angola kahiuvin, nangho vang Christa-a achinga nahiuve; keiho kadoijun, nangho vang nahatnui; nangho mi jatah nahiuvin, keiho vang mi nahsahmo kahiuve." 
1Corinthians4:11 Tugei jong hin kagilkel, kadang chah-un, ponsil nihchen bei kahiuvin, jepmin ka-umuvin, chennabih neilou kahiuvin;" 
1Corinthians4:12 Kakhut uvin na kakitoh uvin; eihouseuva phatthei kabohjiuvin, eikibolset tengule kathoh hamhamun;" 
1Corinthians4:13 Eikihehset tengule kalhem lungdamjiuvin ahi; keiho vannoi bohsele thil jouse nen bangin tu geijin kaum nalai uve. 
1Corinthians4:14 Nangho jachat sahna dinga hicheng thuhi kahinsut ahipoi, kacha deitahte banga hilchahnajoh-a kasut ahibouve." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ajeh chu nanghon Christa-a chun nahiluva sangsom nei jeng jongleu chun, pa khat kal naneipouve; ajeh chu Kipana Thupha vanga Christa Jesu'a kahinsa kachate nahiuve." 
1Corinthians4:16 Hijeh chun kangeh nahiuve, keima dungsun hiuvin." 
1Corinthians4:17 Hiche dinga chu Pakaiya tahsantah kachapa deitah Timothy naheng uva kahinsol ahi; keiman muntina houbung tina kahil banga, Christa-a kaum thudol aman nangho nageldohsah dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians4:18 Tun nangho lah-a kimkhat keima hi naheng uva hungponte, tin nahoitho taovin ahi." 
1Corinthians4:19 Ahivangin Pakai lunglam ahile naheng uva hung vahnange; chutengle chuche ahoitho cheng thu hilouvin athaneinao henang kate. 
1Corinthians4:20 Pathen lenggam chu thua hilouvin, thanei na-a ahibouve." 
1Corinthians4:21 Hoiche ham nadeijoh-u? Naheng uva mol kachoija kahung dingha, ngailut neija lungnempu-a lhagaova kahung dingham?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Nalah uva jon thanhoi aume, ti kichentah-in akijan ahi, chidang namdangte lah jenga jong kiminphah khalou jon thanhoi aume; mikhatnin apa ji jin aneije." 
1Corinthians5:2 Chutobanga chonpa chu nalah uva kona nodoh-a aum ding lhadaina-a neitah sangin, hoithonan naneijo taove." 
1Corinthians5:3 Keimatah katahsa alhah lou vangin kalhagao nalah uva alhan, chutobanga chonpa thu chu katanin, hitihin kaki chaisah tai;" 
1Corinthians5:4 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mina, keima lhagaotoh, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa thaneina toh nakikhop tengule," 
1Corinthians5:5 Chutia chon mi chu atahsa manna dinga Satan khutna pedoh-un, I-Pakaiyu Jesu nikho nileh alhagao huhhing-a aum theina dingin." 
1Corinthians5:6 Nangho nakisonnao chu aphapoi; chol themchan changbong lum apumpin achansohjin ahi ti nahet lou uham? 
1Corinthians5:7 Tu-a nangho cholsolou nahi bangu chun, changbong lum thah nahina dingun chol lui chu then ngimun paidoh-un. Ijeh-inem itile ikalchuh kut satha dingun Christa tah chu akithat tan ahi." 
1Corinthians5:8 Hijeh chun chol lui mang louvin kut boluhite, engsetle khan gitlou chola kut bol louvin lung thengselle kitahna-in cholsolou changlhah-in kut boluhite." 
1Corinthians5:9 Keiman nangho kahinthot lekha-a chun jon panhotoh kivopkhom hih-un, tin kahin suntan ahi." 
1Corinthians5:10 Achutinai tin vannoi'a jon panho neipap kiloseho, misumang ho, thilha houho toh nakivop khom louhel dingu ahipoi, chutile vannoi leiset hi nachanhel dingu ahitai." 
1Corinthians5:11 Amavang sopi-a kisimsa khattou ajona, neipap kiloset abola, thilha ahouva, ataitoma, ju akhama, mi anam bola ahile, ama chu kivoppi hih-un, hitobang mi chu an jeng jong neh khompi hih-un, tia kahinsut ahibouve." 
1Corinthians5:12 Polamaho thu tanding ka-ikin tahham? Houbung sunga mite thu natanji hih-um? 
1Corinthians5:13 Polama miho thu vang chu Pathen'in bou atan ahi. Hijeh chun nalah uva konin chuche michonse chu paidoh-un. 
1Corinthians6:1 Nangho khatnin khat chunga boina thu naneijule, mithengho anga hehta louva michonpha lou anga gaheh ji nangam um?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Mithengten vannoi thu atan dingu hi nahet louvu ham? Chule vannoi thu nangho tanding ahile, thu neopen tan dinga kilom lou nahiu ham?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Eiho hin vantil teho thu kisan itan dingu ahi hi helou nahiuvem? Achutile tulai hinkho chungchang thuhi itanda dingu ham? 
1Corinthians6:4 Chutia chu tu hinlai thudola thu tan ding nahiule, houbung in imacha-a asimlouho chu thutan na mun'a itousah dinguham?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Najachatna dinguva hiche thuhi kahinsei ahi. Sopicha kah-a thu tanlha thei nalah uva miching khatcha beh jong umlou hellaham? 
1Corinthians6:6 Ahinla nangho asopin asopi chunga thuboi neija heh-an jong atahsan louho angabou nahehjiuve. 
1Corinthians6:7 Nangho khatle khat nakiheh tou chu nangho dingin losamna lentah ahitai. Themmo nakichan joh jenguva pha hilouham? Lheplhah-a naum joh jenguva phajo hilouham? 
1Corinthians6:8 Achutipoi, nangho mama-in aphalou nabolun chule mi nalhem uvin, chule hicheho chu nasopi hou chunga nabol uve." 
1Corinthians6:9 Ole michonpha lou hon Pathen lenggam alo lou dingu ahi, ti hi nahet lou uham? Nangho lheplhah-in um hih-un; mijong, milim hou, mijigem, mihuh, palepa kikoi," 
1Corinthians6:10 Gucha, neipap kilose, jukham, mihanse, minambol; hiteho chun Pathen lenggam alo louhel dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians6:11 Nangho abang hiti chu nahiuvin, ahivangin Pakai Jesu Christa minle Pathen Lhagaova kisil ngim nahitaovin, akisuthenga, them changa nahitaove." 
1Corinthians6:12 Keima dingin ijakai bol ngai ahi, ahivangin ijakai aphasohkei poi; imajouse keima dingin bolngai ahi, ahivangin imacha noija umponge." 
1Corinthians6:13 Oisung dinga an, an dinga oisung ahi; ahivangin Pathen'in agoma beihela ahinlha ding ahi. Chule itahsao hi jonna ding ahipoi, Pakaiya ding joh ahin, chule Pakai jong tahsa-a ding ahi;" 
1Corinthians6:14 Chule Pathen'in athahatna-a Pakai chu akaithou ahin, eiho jong eikaithou dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians6:15 Natahsao chu Christa tibah ahi ti nahet lou uham? Chuti chu ahile Christa tibah ho chu kalah manga noti tibah ho-a kasem dingham? Chutiponte. 
1Corinthians6:16 Chule noti'a beh chu amanu chutoh ti khat ahi ti hi nahet lou uham? ajehchu Pathen'in, amani chu tikhat hilhon ding ahi, ati ahi." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ahin Pakaiya beh-a vang chu amatoh lhagaova khat hia ahitai. 
1Corinthians6:18 Jon thanhoija konin jamun. Mihem chonsetna jouse hi atahsa polama ahi; jonthanhoi bol vang chu koi hile ama tahsa chunga chonsea ahi. 
1Corinthians6:19 Ahilou jongle Pathen'a kona naneiju Lhagao Theng nalung sunguva chenga chu natahsao hi a-in theng ahi ti nahet lou uham? Nangho nangho-a tum nahipouve; 
1Corinthians6:20 Nangho man kipe-a kicho dohsa nahitaove, hijeh chun natahsao le na lhagao un Pathen choi-an nun, hichu Pathen na ahi." 
1Corinthians7:1 Tun imama thudola kahenga dinga nahin lekha sutnu chu kahindon butna hiche ahi, Pasal'in numei atohkhah louvin aphai;" 
1Corinthians7:2 Ahivangin jon louna dingin pasal'in numei khat cheh jin neihen, chule numei khatcheh injong pasal khatcheh jin neihen." 
1Corinthians7:3 Ajipan ajinu chu achan dingdol chansahhen, chutobang machun ajinun jong ajipa chansah hen."
