1Corinthians7:4 Numei chun ama tahsa chunga imacha thu aneipoi, apasal'in bou aneije; chutobangma chun pasal jong ama tahsa chunga thu aneipoi, anumeijin bou anei ahi." 
1Corinthians7:5 An ngolla taona-a nakipeh theina dinguva, chomcha khat kikhena chule kivop khomloi kit dinga nakiphasah geluva ahi tailouvin, kikhen kah hih-un; achuti loule kitimlel jeh-in Satan'in lhemlha getnun nate." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ahivangin hiche hi thupeh bangtah-a kasei ahipoi, kaphatsah thua kaseijoh ahibouve." 
1Corinthians7:7 Mi jouse keima tobang cheh hile kati; ahivangin mikhatnin achom, khatnin achom dang, hitobanga chu min Pathen'a kona Phattheina chom cheh anei ahi." 
1Corinthians7:8 Jinei louva umho dingle, meithaiho dinga hiche hi kahinsei ahi, amaho chu keima banghin umleu phante." 
1Corinthians7:9 Amavang akitim jou lou ule ji neiju hen; ajehchu huh-a jon sangin jinei aphajoi. 
1Corinthians7:10 Ji neisaho vang hiche thuhi kapeh ahi, keima kahipon Pakaiyin apeh ahi, numei jin ajipa dalha hihhen." 
1Corinthians7:11 Adalhah tahjongle jinei louvin umhen, ahiloule ajipatoh kihoucham kit hen. Chule pasal'in ajinu da hihhen." 
1Corinthians7:12 Chule adangho thu dingdol vang chu Pakai hilouvin, keima sei ahi: Sopi khat touvin numei atahsanlou ji aneija, a-inneipu chutoh umkhom anople, ama chu a-inneipun da hihhen;" 
1Corinthians7:13 Chule numei khattouvin pasal atahsanlou aneija, ajipan amanutoh chenkhom ding anople, ama chun a-inneipu chu da hihhen." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ijeh-inem itile chuche tahsanlou pasal chu ajinu jala chu kisuthenga ahitai; chule numei tahsanlou jong chu ajipa jala chu kisuthenga ahi; chutilou hile nachateo jong aboh ding ahiuve, tunla amaho athenguve." 
1Corinthians7:15 Hijongle atahsanlou chun adalhahtah-a ahile achele chetante; sopipa ahin ahiloule sopinu ahin hitobang thudola hin kikana aumtapoi; hijongle Pathen'in lungmonga umdinga eikouvu ahi. 
1Corinthians7:16 Ajehchu, Vo numei, nangman na-inneipu huhhing-a naumsah jou ding iti nahetnam? Ahiloule pasal, nangman jong na-inneipi huhhing-a naumsah jou ding iti nahetnam?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Ahivangin Pathen'in mijouse ahoppeh bangle, Pakaiyin mijouse akou bang cheh-in, chon cheh-u hen. Chule hitobanga chu houbung jouse-a kathupeh ahi." 
1Corinthians7:18 Cheptansa kikou umam? cheptan chun chuti umhen. Cheptan louva kikou umam? Cheptan louvin chuti umhen. 
1Corinthians7:19 Cheptan chu imacha ahipon chule cheptanlou jong ima ahidehpoi; Pathen thupeh nitbou hi thupipen ahi. 
1Corinthians7:20 Mijouse akikouva aum bang bang cheh-in um chehhen. 
1Corinthians7:21 Soh nahi puma kikou nahim? hichu khohsa hih-in; amavang ongthol nahung hithei ding vangle, hichu mangchajon." 
1Corinthians7:22 Ijeh inem itile soh hipuma Pakaiya kikou chu, Pakaiya dinga ongthol ahi; chutobang chun a-ongthola kikou chu Christa soh ahi." 
1Corinthians7:23 Nangho aman kipe-a kichoa nahitaove; miho soh hihih-un. 
1Corinthians7:24 Sopite, mijouse akikou uva aum bang cheh-un, Pathen to umkhom cheh uhen." 
1Corinthians7:25 Nungah thengho thudol vang, keiman Pakaiya kon thupeh mong kaneipoi; hijongle tahsan umtah hidinga Pakaiya kona lungsetna mu-a kahi dungjuija, kangaito danje kasei ahi." 
1Corinthians7:26 Chutichu ahin tu laija hesohna jeh hin, hiche hi phante tin kagingchai, mi aum ngaijin um chehhen." 
1Corinthians7:27 Numeitoh kicheng nahim? Ondoh ding ngaito hih-in. Numeija kona ongdoh nahim? Jinei lung gul hih-in. 
1Corinthians7:28 Ahivangin jinei jongle chun achonsea nahipoi, nungah theng jong chun ji neijongle achonsea ahipoi. Amavang chutobang miho chu tahsa lama hesoh genthei athoh dingu ahi; hijongleh thohda leuchun kati ahi." 
1Corinthians7:29 Ahivangin, sopite, hiche phat chu kisuchoma ahitai; tu-a kalin jineija chu jineilou bangin," 
1Corinthians7:30 Akapte akap lou bangin, akipahte akipah lou bangin, thil cho-a anei lou bangin umuhen," 
1Corinthians7:31 Chule leiset chonna mangcha-a chun avala mang lou bangin umuhen. Ijeh-inem itile hiche leiset umchan danhi achemang jinge. 
1Corinthians7:32 Ahin ima khohsah louhelin umleu chun kalung ahi. Jineilou chun itile Pakai chu kalung lhaidem tin, Pakai lam thil jengbou akhohsah-in ahi." 
1Corinthians7:33 Ahin jineija vang chun hiche leiset thil, itile ka-inneipi kalunglhai theidem, ti jengbou akhohsah-in ahi." 
1Corinthians7:34 Numei jinei le nungah theng kikah-a jong akikhehna aume. Numei jineilou chun tahsale lhagao agoma thengsela um theina dingin Pakai lam thil jengbou akhohsah jin ahi; jinei vang chun leiset lam thil, itile ka-inneipu kalunglhai sah theidem, ti jengbou ageljin ahi." 
1Corinthians7:35 Hichu nangho thangkola khina dinga kasei hilouvin, naphatchomna dinguva kaseijoh ahi, umchan phakeicha naum uva, baotamna beija Pakai kin nabol theinajoh dinguva kasei ahi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Amavang mi khat touvin acha nungah theng khat kathilbol hi adihpoi tia agela, amanu chu akul ahitah-a, aji neilou akhohsah-a ahile, alung got gotnin bol jenghen; hichea chun setna aumpoi; jineisah jeng hen." 
1Corinthians7:37 Amavang koi hile lung dettah po-a, khohsahna neilouva, alungthim aki thunun jouva, achanu thenna tuhdet peh jingdinga gelha-a chun, thilpha abol ahi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Hijeh chun achanu jineisah-a chun apha abol ahin; ahivangin jineisah loujo chun aphajo cheh abol ahi. 
1Corinthians7:39 A-inneipu ahin lai chansea a-inneipi chu danna kihen jinga ahi, a-inneipu athi teng vangle amanu a-onga ahitan, Pakai tahsan ahipou le anop nop napa chutoh kicheng thei ahi." 
1Corinthians7:40 Amavang keima ngaito danin, achuti um jeng theija ahile, amanu chu minun nomjo ahi, kei jong Pathen Lhagao changin kakingaitoi." 
1Corinthians8:1 Milim houna-a kikatdoh thilho thudola chun: ibon chaovin hetna inei cheh uve ti iheuve. Hetna-in mi ahoitho sahjin, ngailutna hin mi akhantou sahjin ahi." 
1Corinthians8:2 Mi khat tou, ijakai he-a akingaitoa ahileh, ama chun ahet ding dol imacha ahetlou ahi." 
1Corinthians8:3 Amavang khat touvin Pathen angailut le, amatah chu Pathen het ahi." 
1Corinthians8:4 Milim houna-a kikatdoh thil nehding thudol vang chu, vannoi'a hin milim hi imacha ahipon, chule Pathen khatseh tailou chu Pathen dang aumpoi, ti iheuve." 
1Corinthians8:5 Ijeh-inem itile vanlaijola jong, leiset chunga jong, Pathen tia kiminvoho uma ahi, (chutia chu pathen tamtah uma, pakai tamtah uma ahi;)" 
1Corinthians8:6 Eiho ding vangin thil jouse kona, eiho jong ama-a ihiu, Pa, Pathen khatbou aumin, chule thil jouse kona, chule eiho jong ama vanga ihinu, Pakai Jesu Christa khat bou aume." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ahivangin mi jousen chuche hetna chu aneipoi, chuti chun akimkhatnin tu geija masanga achonnau milim hou thu chu achin jeh-un, amaho chun milim houna-a kitohdoh thil ahi tin anejiuvin; chua chun ase apha hetkhenna alungu ahat lou jeh chun, akisubohji taove." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ahin an neh hin Pathen to eikinaisah dingu ahipoi; eihon ineh uleh aphajep ihi pouvin, ineh louvule jong aphamopen ihideh pouve." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ahivangin chingtheijun, nachamlhatnao hi ijem itile ahatmo ding chun kipal lhuhna higet ninte." 
1Corinthians8:10 Hetna neija nangma milim houna-a ankong naum chu khat touvin muhen lang hileh, sele pha hetkhenna-a lhasam ama chun milim houna-a kikatdoh thilchu neh ngam nadinga hansanna aneilo louding ham?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Chutile ajala Christa thia chuche sopi hatmo chu, nangma hetna nei jeh-a manthah lo louding ham?" 
1Corinthians8:12 Ahinla sopite chunga nangho chutia nachonset uva, ase le pha hetkhennau hatmo chu namavo tengule, nangho Christa douna-a chonse nahiuve." 
1Corinthians8:13 Hijeh chun an neh-in kasopi akipal lhuhsah-a ahile, kasopi lhuh louna dingin, a-imatih chanin sa-a san nehdange." 
1Corinthians9:1 Solchah khat hilou kahim? Chamlhat hilou kahim? I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mulou kahim? Nangho jong Pakaiya kanatoh nahi lou uham? 
1Corinthians9:2 Adang dangin solchah hilou jongleng, nangho dingbeh-in kahi; Pakaiya solchah kahi het kichetna mohor nangho nahiuve." 
1Corinthians9:3 Hiche hi kathem kathemlou eikholtohho lekalna kihonna-a kasei ahi. 
1Corinthians9:4 Nehna ding le donna dinga thuneina neilou kahiuvem? 
1Corinthians9:5 Solchah danghole, Pakai sopite, chule Cephas banga khu sopinu khattou ji-a neija kipuile mo kahiuvem?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Ahiloule Barnabas le kei bouhi kanatoh lhonna-a kon haimo kahi lhonem? 
1Corinthians9:7 Koiham ama sum kineh-a sepai na tonga? Lengpithei hon sema aga nelou koiham? Gancha honpi vula anoi ne lou koiham? 
1Corinthians9:8 Chucheng chu mihem ngaidan jenga kasei ham? Danthun jong hicheng chu asei hilouham? 
1Corinthians9:9 Mosi danthua, Bongchal chang chil pet amuh kan hih-un, tin akisune. Pathen'in bongchalho ding jengbou agel ham?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Ahiloule eiho dinga jong asei ham? Eiho ding monga hiche thuhi kisuna ahi; lou kaija chun kinepna neija akai ding; chule kinepna neija chang vo-a chun akinepna banga amu ding ahi. 
1Corinthians9:11 Keihon nangho dinga lhagao muchi katu uva ahile, na tahsalam thilu ga kalo dingu chu thil lentah hajaham?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Midanghon nachung uva thuneina chu aneija ahile, keihon kahanei chehjoh lou uham? Hijongle hiche thuneina chu kamang pouve; Christa Kipana Thupha thu kadoudal louna dingun, ijakai abonchan kathoh hamham jovin ahi." 
1Corinthians9:13 Thiltheng lhacha-a panghon houin'a thilho chu anehjiuva, chule maichama lhachahon maichama kitoh chan aneijiu khu nahet lou uham?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Chutobangma chu, Kipana Thupha lhangsama panghon, Kipana Thupha-a kona aneh dingu ahi, tia Pakaiyin chonnadan asem ahi." 
1Corinthians9:15 Ahivangin keiman hicheng chu khatcha jong kamangchapoi; chule chutia chu eikibolna dinga hicheng thuhi kahinsut jong ahipoi; kakisonna hi khattouvin ahomkeo asosah sangin, keima thimaleng keima dingin aphajoi." 
1Corinthians9:16 Keiman Kipana Thupha thu kahille vangin kisonna ding ima kaneipoi; bollou theilou kinkhoh kachunga eikisekhum ahijeh-in; Kipana Thupha lhangsamle lou hileng kachung gih ding ahi. 
1Corinthians9:17 Keima lungchama bola kahile tohphat man kasan ding ahi; keima lungchama bola kahilou vangle, Kipana Thupha gouchinga eikipansah hinte." 
1Corinthians9:18 Achutile tohphat man kasan ding chu iham? Kipana Thupha kalhangsap leteng Kipana Thupha-a hi kathuneina kamanchah khel louna dinga, Christa Kipana Thupha man beija kahopjal hi ahi." 
1Corinthians9:19 Keima mi jouse-a kona ongthola kahi vangin, mi tamcheh kalah lut theina dinga, mi jouse soh-a kakisem ahi." 
1Corinthians9:20 Chutichun Juda te kalah lut theinan, Juda te henga Juda mi um bangin kaumjin: danthu noijate kaloi lut theinan, danthu noija umte hengah, danthu noija um bangin kaumjin ahi." 
1Corinthians9:21 Dan neiloute kaloi lut theinan, dan neiloute hengah, dan neilou bangin kaumjin, ahin Pathen dan mang louva um kahipoi, Christa danthu noija um kahi." 
1Corinthians9:22 Ahatmote kaloi lut theina dingin, ahatmote henga ahatmo kahi: itilam hijongle themkhat beh kahuhhing thei teina dinga, mi jouse dinga ijakai kasoji ahi." 
1Corinthians9:23 Kabolchan hi Kipana Thupha khohsah na-a kabol ahin, nangho toh chan kaneikhom theina ding ahi." 
1Corinthians9:24 Lhaitet golsehna-a khu mi jouse lhaicheh ji-a ahi, ahivangin khatbouvin hatman asangjin ahi, hichu nanghon nahet lou uham? Nasan theina dingun lhaijun." 
1Corinthians9:25 Chule koi hijongle golseh jouving tia guttena chu, ijakaija akitim hatjin ahi. Amaho chun lallukhuh kem mangthei lona-a abolu ahin, eihovang kemmang theilou lallukhuh lo-a ihiuve." 
1Corinthians9:26 Hijeh-a chu hitia chu lhaija kahi, abidoi kichen nei louva lhaija kahipoi; hitia chu chuma kahi, onghom lai chuma kahipoi," 
1Corinthians9:27 Kati hi kachup kachupjia kathua kanunsah ahi; achuti loule midangho thu kahille nungin, keimatah ijemtin paidoh-in um khange." 
1Corinthians10:1 Vo sopite, hiche hi helouva naum dingu kalung anompoi, Ipute Ipateu chu abonchauva meibol noija ana umuva, chule twikhanglen apal galkaiju ahi." 
1Corinthians10:2 Abon chaovin Mosi-a chun meibol le twikhanglen'ah baptize achangun," 
1Corinthians10:3 Chule abon chaovin lhagao an thakhat aneuvin; 
1Corinthians10:4 Abonchauvin lhagao twi thakhat anadonun ahi. Hichu anungsang chenguva chea lhagao songpi-a kona chu amahon adonu ahi; chule hiche songpi chu Christa ahi. 
1Corinthians10:5 Ahivangin amaho atamjo chunga chun Pathen alunglhaipon ahi; ajeh chu gamthip gama chun alhukam gamtaovin ahi. 
1Corinthians10:6 Thilphalou alunggot banguva chu eihon jong thilphalou ilunggot louna dinguva, chuti chu eivetsah nau ahi." 
1Corinthians10:7 Chule amaho lah-a kimkhat milim hou ahi bangu chun nangho um hih-un; hiche thudol chu hitin akisune, Miho chu an neding le don dingin atouvun, chuin alam dingin akipatdoh taovin ahi." 
1Corinthians10:8 Chule amaho lah-a kimkhatnin jon apat uva, nikhat sunga sangsomni le sangthum athilo bangu chun, eihon jong jon pan pouhite." 
1Corinthians10:9 Chule amaho lah-a kimkhatnin apatep jeh uva gul'in asumang bangun; eihon jong Christa patep pouhite. 
1Corinthians10:10 Alah uva kimkhat aphunchel jeh-un, suhmang na-in asumangun ahi; chutobang chun phunchel hih-un." 
1Corinthians10:11 Tu-a thil hicheng hi avetsahna dinga achunguva soh-a ahi; chule vannoi leiset kichaina hung lhun nading eiho, kithuhilna dinga kisuna ahi." 
1Corinthians10:12 Hiche jeh chun koi hile adinga kingaito-a chu alhuh louna dingin chingtheihen. 
1Corinthians10:13 Mihem dou thei kalval lhepna nachung uva achukhapoi; Pathen tahsan umtah ahin, nathan adou jou kalvalin lhepna nachung uva chuhsah ponte; hijeh chun nathoh jouna dingun, lhepna chutoh kilhona nakihuhdohna dingu lampi jong nasempeh dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians10:14 Hijeh chun, kasopi ngaiteho, milim hou jamsanun." 
1Corinthians10:15 Keiman nangho mi lungching nahiu kahetna kasei ahi, kathusei hi nanghon kikhollun." 
1Corinthians10:16 Phatthei channa khon phatthei iboh-u khu, Christa thisan ikiloi khompi nau hilouham? Chule changlhah ihebaljiu khu Christa tahsa ikiloi khompi nau hilouham?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Ijeh-inem itile eiho mi tamtah hi changlhah lum khat ihiuvin, ti khat ihiuve; ajeh chu changlhah lum khatna chu ibon chaova chan ineiju ahi." 
1Corinthians10:18 Tahsa lama Israelte khu veuvin, kithoina sa neho khu maicham toh chan neikhom hilouham?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Achutile ipi kaseijem? Milim houna an chu ikhat ahi, ahiloule milim hou jong hi ikhat ahi, katim?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Chuti ahipoi, chidang namdang ten akithoinao chu Pathen lama atou hilouvin, thilha dingjoh-a atou ahibouve; nangho thilha toh nakiloikhom dingu chu kalung nahipeh pouve." 
1Corinthians10:21 Nanghon Pakai khon le thilha khona nadonkop thei lou dingu ahi, Pakai ankong le thilha ankong na-umkop thei lou dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians10:22 Ole thangset sahna dinga Pakai chu isuh lunghangu ham? Ama sanga hatjobeh ihiuvem? 
1Corinthians10:23 Thil ijakai keima din bol ngai ahin, ahivangin ijakai phatna ahipoi; ijakai keima din bol ngai ahin, ahivangin ijakai phattouna ahipoi." 
1Corinthians10:24 Koiman ama chang phatna hol louvin, aheng akoma dingjoh hol-hen." 
1Corinthians10:25 Kailhanga kijoh thiljouse chu ne jengun, sele pha hetna jeh-in ima dong hih-un;" 
1Corinthians10:26 Ijeh-inem itile leiset le asunga umjouse hi aboncha Pakaiya ahi. 
1Corinthians10:27 Atahsan louho khattouvin an ne-a nakouva nache nomle, sele pha hetna jeh-in ima dong hih-un, na-anga alui chan chu ne jengun." 
1Corinthians10:28 Amavang khattouvin, hiche hi milimho henga kithoina kitoh ahi, tia naseipeh-a ahivangle, ahetsahpa jeh le sele pha hetna jeh chun nehdaovin, ijeh-inem itile leiset le asunga thil um jouse hi Pakaiya ahi." 
1Corinthians10:29 Nangma sele pha hetna kati hilouvin ama-a joh chu kati ahi. Kacham lhatna chu midang sele pha hetna-in ibola ei-oimo dingham? 
1Corinthians10:30 Ajehchu thangvahna neija kaneh leh, ibola thangvahna kanei chunga chu oimo-a um kahim?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Chuti ahi jeh chun naneh jongule, nadon jongule, nabol jouseu Pathen loupina ding jengin bolun." 
1Corinthians10:32 Juda mi hihen, Greek mi hitale, Pathen houbung mite hitale, akipal lhuhna dingun ima bolhih helun," 
1Corinthians10:33 Keiman keichang phatchomna ding hol louva, huhhing-a aum theina dinguva mi tamtah phatchomna holnajoh-a, thil jouse-a mi jouse kalung lhaisah banghin, nanghon jong bollun." 
1Corinthians11:1 Keima Christa dungsuna kaum bang hin nangho keima dungsuna umun. 
1Corinthians11:2 Tun sopite, nanghon imajousea keima neigeldoh jinguva, chonna ding thugou kapeh bang banga dettah-a nachin uva nanit jeh-un kapahchauve." 
1Corinthians11:3 Ahivangin Christa chu pasal jouse luchang ahia, pasal chengse numei luchang ahi, chule Christa luchang Pathen ahi chu, heleu chun kalung ahi." 
1Corinthians11:4 Koi hile pasal lukhuh khuhpuma taova ahim, lhagaova thu seidoh ahim chun alu ajabol lou ahi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ahin numei lukhuh khuh louva taole lhagaova thu seidoh chun alu ajabol lou ahin, alu chu akiveltol tobang ahi." 
1Corinthians11:6 Numei lukhuh khuh lou aumle kivomui ngal hen; alu veltol le asam kivomui chu numei dinga jachatna ahile, lukhuh kikhuh hen." 
1Corinthians11:7 Pasal vang chu Pathen lim bangle aloupina ahi jeh chun lukhuh khuh lou dingdol mong ahi. Numei vang chu pasal loupina ahi. 
1Corinthians11:8 Ajeh chu pasal hi numeija kona ahipoi; numei joh hi pasal'a kona jo ahibouve. 
1Corinthians11:9 Chujongle pasal hi numei dinga kisem ahipoi; numei bou pasal dinga kisemjoh ahi. 
1Corinthians11:10 Chuti ahi jeh chun vantil teho jala numei jin thaneina alua achin ding dol thu ahi. 
1Corinthians11:11 Ahivangin Pakaiyah pasal beijin numei aumpon, numei beijin pasal aumpoi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Pasal'a kona numei ahi banga chu numeija kona pasal uma ahi; ahivangin thil jouse Pathen'a kon ahi. 
1Corinthians11:13 Nalungin gelunlang ngaitouvin, numei jin lukhuh khuh louva Pathen henga atao hi kilomnam?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Pasal'in asam akihoisaova ahile, ama dingin minah sahmo aume, ti hi chonna ngaimong jongin nahil lou uham?" 
1Corinthians11:15 Numei vang asam asaole ama dingin hichu aloupina ahi; ajehchu asam chu akhu dinga kipe-a ahi. 
1Corinthians11:16 Ahivangin anela aumle, eihon hitobang dan mong chu ineipouve; Pathen houbung miten jong aneipoi." 
1Corinthians11:17 Amavang hiche thu kahilchah naova hin kapahcha pouve; nangho phatcheh nadinga kikhomji nahipouvin setna cheh joh dinga kikhomji nahiuve. 
1Corinthians11:18 Ajeh chu amasa penin, nangho houbung'a nahung kikhop tengule, nalah uva loitum tumin nakikhen jiuve ti kajan, chule tah jong katahsan thim thime." 
1Corinthians11:19 Nalah uva mikitahtah ho ahung kiphondoh theina dinga, ginchat chom chom nei jong umding mong ahi." 
1Corinthians11:20 Chuti ahi jeh chun nangho mun khatna nakikhop tengule, Pakai jan anjon nehna hoi ahijipoi;" 
1Corinthians11:21 Amikipmin adang neh masangin ajan an akineh masahjiuvin, chule khat gilkelin aumin, khat ju akhamjin ahi." 
1Corinthians11:22 Nanehna dingule nadonna dingu na-in'u um louham? Ole Pathen houbung chu nahsahmo-a bola chule ima neiloute chu jachatsah nahiuvem? Ipi kaseipeh ding nahiuvem? Hiche thua hin nangho pahchau vingem? Pahcha pong kate. 
1Corinthians11:23 Pakaiya kona kalah nangho kapehsonu thuhil chu hiche ahi, Pakai Jesu amatsah ding jan-u chun, hiche janlele chun aman changlhah alan," 
1Corinthians11:24 Athangvah jouvin ahehbal balin, kilah-un, neuvin, Hiche hi katahsa nangho dinga kihehbal chu ahi; keima neigeldoh jingna dingun hichehi bolun, ati." 
1Corinthians11:25 Chutima chun, a-anneh jouvun khon jong chu alan, Hiche khon hi kathisana kitepna thah ahi; nanghon nadon chanuva keima neigeldoh na dingun bolun, ati." 
1Corinthians11:26 Ajehchu hiche changlhah naneh uva, hiche khona nadon lai chanuva, ahung kit kahse-a Pakai thina chu naphondoh jingu ahi." 
1Corinthians11:27 Hijeh chun koi hile anehoi hilouva changlhah chu ne-a ahim, khona chu dona ahim chu, ama chu Pakai tahsale athisana themmo chang ding ahi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Amavang mi ama kikholtoh chehhen, chule changlhah chu nehen, khona jong chun donhen." 
1Corinthians11:29 Chuche Pakai tahsa chu geltoh lou hella, chule lomlou hella ne-a donna chun, oimo achana dinga adonna, aneh ahi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Hiche jeh chu ahi, nalah uva mi tamtah lhasama chule veise-a ahin, chule nena nen a-imumil tapouve." 
1Corinthians11:31 Eimale eima kikholtoh cheh vangleu hen oimo ichan lou dingu ahi. 
1Corinthians11:32 Oimo ichan tengule, vannoi toh themmo ichantha louna dingun, Pakaiya konin engbolin iumjiuve," 
1Corinthians11:33 Hiche jeh chun, kasopite, ane dinga nahung kikhop tengule khatle khat kingah kimun." 
1Corinthians11:34 Nahung kikhopnau chu oimo-a aum louna dingin, khattou agilkela aumle a-in'a hin nehen. Adang chengse vang kahung tengle sujang soh nange." 
1Corinthians12:1 Chule, sopite, lhagaolam thilpeh thuho chu nahet lou dingu kanompoi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Chidang namdang nahi laiju chun, puilea naumna chanuva milim pao theilou anga chu puimanga na-umjiu ahin, hichu naheuve." 
1Corinthians12:3 Hiche jeh chun nangho kahetsah nahiuve, Pathen Lhagao thuseija chun koiman Jesu chu sapset chang ahi, atipoi, chule Lhagao Thenga kon louvin, koiman, Jesu chu Pakai, ati theipoi." 
1Corinthians12:4 Thilpeh chan gotchom chom tamtah ahi, ahivangin Lhagao khatsehbou ahi;" 
1Corinthians12:5 Chule lhacha gotchom chom tamtah ahin, ahivangin Pakai khatsehbou ahi;" 
1Corinthians12:6 Chule natoh gotchom chom aumin, ahivangin ijakaija ijakai bola chu Pathen khat jengbou ahi." 
1Corinthians12:7 Ahivangin mijousen aphattoupina dinga, mi khatcheh chu Lhagao phondohna khat cheh kipe-a ahi." 
1Corinthians12:8 Ijeh-inem itile Lhagaova kona mikhat chu chihna thu kipe-a, chuche Lhagao mama-a chu khat hetnanei thu kipe-a ahi;" 
1Corinthians12:9 hiche Lhagaoma-a chu khat tahsan kipe-a; chule chuche Lhagaoma-a chu achom khat mi damsah theina thilpeh kipe-a; 
1Corinthians12:10 Achom khat bolmo kidang bol theina kipe-a; chule achom khat lhagao thusei dohna; chule achom khat Lhagaoho hetkhen theina; chule achom dang khat paotin paotang tho theina; chule achom dang khat pao ledoh theina kipe-a ahi. 
1Corinthians12:11 Ahivangin hicheng na kitong jouse chu, Lhagao khatmama chun abolsah ahi; aman ama lunglam dola achom choma miho khat khatna ahoppeh cheh ahi." 
1Corinthians12:12 Tipum khatseh ahin, tibah tamtah ahi, tipum khatna tibah tamtah aum vangin, tipum khatbou ahi; Christa jong chutobang ahi." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ajeh chu eiho Juda mi ahin, Greek mi hijongle, soh hihen, chamlhat hi jongle, ibon chaova tipum khat ihi theina dinguva, ibon chaova tahsapum khat sunga umdinga Lhagao khatna iki baptize-u ahi; chule ibon chaova Lhagao khat eiki don khom sah-u ahitai." 
1Corinthians12:14 Ajehchu tipum hi ti khatseh ahipoi, bah tamtah ahi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Kengphang hin, Keima khut kahi lou jeh-in tipuma kahipoi, tile hiche jeh-a chu tipuma hida dingham?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Chule bilkol jong hin, Keima mit kahi lou jeh-in tipuma kahipoi, tile hiche jeh-a chu tipuma hida ding ham?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Tipumpi abonchan mit hisohkei tale, hoija khojahna umta dingham? Tipumpi khojahna hisohkeile hoija gimnam jahna umta dingham?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ahinla Pathen'in tibah chengse hi, alung deilam cheh-a tipuma akoi ahi." 
1Corinthians12:19 Chule aboncha hin tibah khatseh hitale, tipum hoija umtantem?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Tun vang tibah tamtah, ahivangin tipum khatsehbou ahi." 
1Corinthians12:21 Chule mit hin khut jah-a, Imacha kangaichatna na-umpoi, ti theilou ahi; luchangin jong kengteni jah-a, Imacha kangaichatna naum lhonpoi, ti thei lou ahi." 
1Corinthians12:22 Titah sangin, tibah hatmoa kigel chengse hi, akhohpena pang cheh ahi." 
1Corinthians12:23 Chule nahsahmo-a igelu tibah ho chengse hi gamchengin ijabolun; chule itibah hoilouho chengse hi gamchengin ahoijoji tai. 
1Corinthians12:24 Chule itibah hoiho chengseu hin hicheng chu angaipoi, ahinla Pathen'in tipum hi asuhto khoma alhing lou alhasama chu gamchenga jabola aumsah ahi;" 
1Corinthians12:25 Hitia chu tipum sunga hi akitumkhen um louhela, kitumkhen tah sanga tibah ho chengse hi thakhat tah-a akikhohsah to sohkei dingjoh ahi." 
1Corinthians12:26 Chutia chu tibah khatnin athohgima ahile, tibah dang chengsen jong athoh gimpi jiu ahi; chule tibah khat choi-at achanle, tibah dang chengsen akipapi jiu ahi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nangho Christa tipum nahiuvin, mi khat khat chu atibah khat cheh nahiuve." 
1Corinthians12:28 Chule Pathen'in houbung-ah amasatah-a solchah ho, anina themgaoho, athumna thuhil ho, abana bolmo kidang bolthei, chua mi damsah theina thilpeh, kithopina, vaipohna, chule paochom paochom thona apeh ahi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Aboncha solchah hiuvam? Aboncha themgao hiuvam? Aboncha thuhil hiuvam? Aboncha bolmo kidang bola hiuvam? 
1Corinthians12:30 Abonchauva midamsah thilpeh chang hiuvam? Abonchauva paochom tho hiuvam? Abonchauva pao hilchena pang uvam? 
1Corinthians12:31 Ahin thilpeh pha chungnung deho chana dingin kihabolun. Chule akalvala pha chungnung lampi kavetsah ding nahiuve. 
1Corinthians13:1 Keiman mihemho paole vantil ho paovin thu sei jeng jongleng, ngailutna kanei loule, sum-eng kivogingle khutbeh kibeng bangbou kahi ding ahi." 
1Corinthians13:2 Lhagao thu seidoh theina thilpeh neijingting, thugil jouse hettohna le hetna jouse nei jongleng, chule mol tolmang theina tahsan nei jongleng, ngailutna kanei loule imacha kahilou ahi." 
1Corinthians13:3 Chule mivaicha gentheiho vahna dingin kanei jouse toh jeng jongleng, govam jeng dingin katahsa pumpi toh jeng jongleng, ngailutna kanei loule imacha phatchomna aumpoi." 
1Corinthians13:4 Ngailutna hin ni sottah athohjin, he jong ahepin ahi; ngailutna hin thangset abolpoi; ngailutna hin kichang vahchoi abolpoi, hoi jong ahoithopoi," 
1Corinthians13:5 Nunset abolpoi, amachang phatchomna abolpoi, alungsa baipoi, setna agelpoi;" 
1Corinthians13:6 Chonsetna kipah louhelin thutah akipapiji; 
1Corinthians13:7 Ima jouse-a athoh hatnin, imajouse atahsanin, imajousea akinemin, imajouse athoh hatjin ahi." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ngailutna hi imatih chana mangthah lou ding ahi; lhagao thu seidoh vang chu mangthah ding ahi; paochom het jong chu mang ding ahi; hetthemna jong chu mang ding ahi. 
1Corinthians13:9 Ijeh-inem itile eihon kim louva ihetnu ahin, kim louma lhagao thu iseidohjiu ahi." 
1Corinthians13:10 Abulhing chamkim ahung tengle, akim lou chengse hi kisubeisoh ding ahitai." 
1Corinthians13:11 Kachapan laijin chapang paovin kapaojin, chapang lunggelin kageljin, chapang thu ngaiton kangaiton ahi; kakhanlhit phat vangin chapang thu jouse chu kapailhatai." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ijeh-inem itile tu-a hi eihon phatvet sunga kichen louva imu-u ahi; chuteng vangle kimaito-a imu dingu ahi. Tunvang kahet akimpoi, chuteng vangle eihet kimsoh banga hi kahet kimsoh ding ahi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Tun tahsan, kinep, ngailut hicheng thum hi aumin; ahin hicheng lah-a hin ngailut achungnung pene." 
1Corinthians14:1 Ngailut chu delun; ahin lhagaolam thilpehho chengse chan ding ponpanun, adeh setnin lhagao thu naseidoh theina dingun." 
1Corinthians14:2 Paochom dangkhat tho-a thuseija chu mi jah-a seidoh hilouva, Pathen jah-a seijoh ahi; ajeh chu koiman ahetpehpoi, ahinla aman lhagaova thugil chengse chu asei ahi." 
1Corinthians14:3 Lhagao thu seidoh vang chun miho khan tousah nale, tilkhouna, chule lungmon sahna thu asei ahi." 
1Corinthians14:4 Paochom dangkhat tho-a thuseija vang chu ama changa khantouna-a anei ahi; lhagao thu seidoh vang chun houbung chu akhantou sah ahi. 
1Corinthians14:5 Nanghon nabon chaovin paochomin thu seileu chun kalung ahi; ahivangin chusang jong chun lhagao thu seidohleu chun kalung ahijoi; chule paochom tho-a thuseija chun houbung khantou sahna dinga, athusei chu aledoh louva ahile, chusanga chu lhagao thu seidoh chu chungnungjo ahi." 
1Corinthians14:6 Tun, sopite, keiman naheng uvah hunging ting paochom hung tholeng; thu phondoh ahim, hetna ahim, lhagao thu seidoh ahim, thuhilna lam ahim, kasei loule ipi phatchomna nanei ding uham?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Thil gingthei lah jenga jong kuli ahim, selangdah ahim, aginteng a-aw akikhel loule; kuli ahi, selangdah ahi kon ahetkhen dingham?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ahiloule sumkon gin akichet loule, koiham gal kon dinga kigothei dinga?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Chutobangma chun nanghon mihet bai ding pao natho louvule, ipi naseiju ahi iti kihet dingham? Nangho huijah-a thu sei tobang nahiu ahi." 
1Corinthians14:10 Ija kihem, vannoi'a hin paochom paochom tamtah aume, ahivangin ikhat kiseina hilou khatcha jong aumpoi." 
1Corinthians14:11 Chuti ahijeh chun chuche pao chu ipi kiseina ahi kahet louva ahile, athusei ngaija keima chu ama dinga paomah kahiding, thuseipa jongchu keima dinga paomah tobang hiding ahi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Chuti chun nangho jong, lhagao thilpeh chan chom chom nei ding naha lunggulu ahin, hichu houbung in khantou na-a aneina dingin aletsetna nanei theina dingun holun." 
1Corinthians14:13 Hiche jeh chun paochom tho-a chun athu jong ale theina dingin taohen. 
1Corinthians14:14 Paochomin taoleng, kalhagao chu taova ahinan, ahinla kahetna hin ga aso jipon ahi." 
1Corinthians14:15 Chuti ahile apipen iham? Keima lhagaovin taovingting, hetna-a jong taovinge; lhagaovin jong la sangting hetna-in jong la sange." 
1Corinthians14:16 Achuti loule nangman lhagaovin thangvahna seile chun, amuna tou ima he loulaiho chun nathang vahna chu, Amen, iti ati thei dingham? Nathusei chengla he louva?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Nangma vang chun phate tah-a thangvahna nanei ahin, ahivangin midang akhantou sahpoi." 
1Corinthians14:18 Nangho nabonchao sanga paochoma thu kasei tamjoh jeh hin, Pathen kathangvah-e;" 
1Corinthians14:19 Ahivangin houbung sunga midangho kahil theina dingin, paochoma thu cheng sangsom kasei sangin, hetna-a thu cheng nga seidoh ding kadeijoi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Sopite, nangho hetna-a chapang hihih-un; amavang nunsetna lama chapang hiuvinlang, hetna lama pilhingun." 
1Corinthians14:21 Dan lekhabua hitin akisune, keiman hetphah lou paochom thohole gamdang miho kama, hiche mite jah-a hi thu kasei ding ahi, hiti chun bol jongleng amahon kathu angaideh lou dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
1Corinthians14:22 Hiche jeh chun paochom tho hi atahsan dinga hilouvin, atahsan louho dinga melchihna ahi; lhagao thu seidoh ho vang chu atahsan louho dinga hilouvin, atahsanho dinga melchihna ahi." 
1Corinthians14:23 Hiche jeh chun houbung chengse kikhom henlang, chule ami takipmin paochom thohen, chu-a chun mi maimaile tahsanna neilouho khattou hung lutle, Nangho chu angola ahi, ati lou dinguham?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Amavang nabonchaovin lhagao thu seidoh sohkeileu chun, atahsanlou ahim, milham ima helou khattou hung lutle, hichengpi chun asetna sosal intin, hichengpi chun oimo achan ding;" 
1Corinthians14:25 Chule chutia chun alunggila thuguh jouse chu kiphong doh sohkei ding; chule chutia chu akhupbo-a lhu-a Pathen ahou ding, nangho lah-a Pathen aum chu aphonjal ding ahi." 
1Corinthians14:26 Achutile, sopite, iti danham? Nangho nakikhop tengule khat cheh-in la ahim, thuhil ahim, thuphondoh khat ahim, paochom tho ahim, chule khatnin athu aledoh ding nanei chehjiove. Hitiho jouse chu khantouna dinga kibol hihen." 
1Corinthians14:27 Khattouvin paochoma thu aseija ahile, ni hijongle atampena thumin, kilhah lhah-in seijuhen, chule khatnin athu ledoh hen." 
1Corinthians14:28 Athu ledoh ding aum lou vangle, ama chu houbung'a thipbeh chan umhen, ama chang jahle Pathen jah ding maijin thu seihen." 
1Corinthians14:29 Lhagao thu seidoh nile thumin thu seihen, chule adang chengse ngaitohen;" 
1Corinthians14:30 Ahivangin akoma touho khatpen pen henga thu kiphong aumle, amasapa chu umthim hen." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ijeh-inem itile mi jouse athep theina dingle mi jouse alungmon theina dinga, khatchenga kilha kilha-a lhagao thu naseidoh theiju ahi." 
1Corinthians14:32 Themgaoho lhagao chu themgaohobou thua nung ahi. 
1Corinthians14:33 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen chu thunoh lungjin kona ahipoi, mithengte houbung ho jouse-a ahi banga, lungmon kona ahibouve." 
1Corinthians14:34 Na numei hou chu houbung kikhop na-ah thipbeh chan umthim uhen; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu thusei kipe-a ahipouve, chusang chun danthua kisei bangin, thu noija umuhen." 
1Corinthians14:35 Amahon ikhat het nom aneijule, a-inmun uvah ajite cheh kidoh uhen, ajeh chu houbung kikhopna-a numei dinga thusei hi jachat umtah ahi." 
1Corinthians14:36 Iham? Pathen thuhi nangho-a kona hung sohdoh ham? Ahiloule nangho changseh heng jengabou hungaham? 
1Corinthians14:37 Khattou ama themgaova akingaitoa ahiloule lhagao mi-a kingaito aumle, naheng uva kalekhasut chengse chu Pakai thupeh ahi ti hehen." 
1Corinthians14:38 Amavang khattouvin ahet loutah-a ahile, ahe louvin um jenghen." 
1Corinthians14:39 Hiche jeh chun, kasopite, Pathen lhagao thu seidoh guttenin ponpanun, paochoma thusei jong kham hih-un." 
1Corinthians14:40 Amavang imajouse hoitahle kituptah-in bolcheh-un. 
1Corinthians15:1 Vo sopite, kahetsah nahiuve, najah uva kalhangsap Kipana Thupha chu san jong nasanu ahitan, chujongle hia chu nadinu ahitai;" 
1Corinthians15:2 Najah uva kathu lhangsap chu nachin jingule, hichea chu huhhing-a um nahitaove; chuti ahi lou vangle natahsanu chu moh ahi." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ajeh chu amasapena Pathen lekhabu dungjuija eiho chonset jala Christa thia ahitai, ti thuhil pipen kamu chu nangho kapehdoh ahitai;" 
1Corinthians15:4 Chule ama avuijun, ani thumnin Pathen lekhabua kisei dungjuijin athoudoh kittan ahi." 
1Corinthians15:5 Chuin ama Cephas henga akilah masapenin, chuin somleni ho henga." 
1Corinthians15:6 Chujouvin mi janga valjen sopiteho henga khatvei lah-in akilah-in ahi; amaho atamjo tu gei hin aum nalaijui, akimkhat vang a-imu taove." 
1Corinthians15:7 Chuin Jacob henga akilah-in, chujouvin solchah ho chengse henga akilah-in ahi." 
1Corinthians15:8 Akhonna-in aphat louva peng tobang keima henga ahung kilah-in ahi. 
1Corinthians15:9 Keima solchah ho lah-a alhumpen kahin, chule Pathen houbung kabolset jeh chun solchah min pu dinga jong kilom kahipoi." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ahivangin Pathen lungset vangin kahibep chu kahinai; chule ama lungsetna eitona chu moh-in aumpoi, amaho chengse sangin katong gim jon ahi; ahivangin keima kahipoi eiumpia, Pathen lungsetna chu ahibouve." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ahinla keima kahin, amaho ahiuvin, hitia chu thupha chu samphong cheh kahiuvin, nanghon chutia chu natahsanu ahitai." 
1Corinthians15:12 Ahin tu-a, Christa chu athi lah-a konin kaithouvin aumtai tia kilhangsama ahile, nalah uva mi kimkhat chun, athi thokit himhim aumpoi, iti nati uham?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Athi thokitna himhim aum loule, Christa jong chu kaithouva umlou hinte;" 
1Corinthians15:14 Chule Christa chu kaithouva umlou ahile, kathu hil lhangleu jong hi moh ahin, natahsanu jong moh ahi." 
1Corinthians15:15 Mithi thokitna umlou ahileh, keiho hi Pathen lama jouthu hettohsah-in kakilangui; ajehchu keihon Pathen'in akaithoulou Christa chu akaithouve tin, kahettoh sah-un ahi." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ijeh-inem itile mithi thoukit lou ahile, Christa jong chu thoukitlou ahi;" 
1Corinthians15:17 Christa chu thoukit lou ahile, nanghon natahsanu jong moh ahi; nangho tu-a jong chonsetna umjing nalai nahi dingu ahi;" 
1Corinthians15:18 Chuti chu ahile Christa-a imu milteho chu amangthahgam ahitaove. 
1Corinthians15:19 Tu hinlai sung ding jenga Christa chu kinepna ineiju ahile, mi jouse sanga khoto umpentah ihi dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ahivangin tun Christa chu a-imuho lah-a aga masapenin apangin, athiho lah-a konin athoudoh tan ahi." 
1Corinthians15:21 Mihem'a kona thina aum jeh chun, Mihem'a kon maman thokitna aumtan ahi." 
1Corinthians15:22 Ijeh-inem itile Adam'a mi jouse athi banga chu, Christa-a mi jouse hinsah-a umding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ahivangin, mijouse ama phatdol cheh-a umding ahi, Christa agamasa hintin, chu joule Christa ahung teng amite hidiu ahi." 
1Corinthians15:24 Chujoutah chule kichai ding ahi; chutengle aman vaipoh, thuneina, thahatna jouse asuhmang sohkeija, Pa Pathen khutna gam apehdoh ding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:25 Aman agalte jouse akengto noija akoi masangse-a, aman vai apoh ding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:26 Gal nukhah pen thina ahi, hi jong chu asuhmang ding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:27 Ajeh chu aman, imajouse akengto noija akoi ahitai. Ahin, imajouse athu noijah akoije, atia hin, athu noija koipa chu chucheho lah-a chu kisimthalou ahi, ti kichenin akilange." 
1Corinthians15:28 Imajouse ama thu noija aum phat chule, Pathen chu ijakaija ijakai ahi theina dinga, ijakai athu noija umsahpa thu noija chu Chapa jong umding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:29 Chutobang chu ahiloule athiho dinga baptize changho iti taovintem? Athiho kaithouva aum louhel uva ahile, chuteho chu amaho dinga ibola baptize changji hiuvintem?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Chule keiho jeng jong ibola nidan takipma settoh-a kaum jinguham? 
1Corinthians15:31 Sopite, Pakai Jesu Christa-a nangho chungchanga kakisonna kapatna kanela kasei ahi, keima niseh-in kathi jinge." 
1Corinthians15:32 Keiman mihem ngai banga Ephesia gamsaho toh kisat kahile, phat chomna-a kanei dingham? Athiho kaithouva aum loule, hungun, neuhite donuhite; jingle kithita dingan." 
1Corinthians15:33 Lheplhah-in um hih-un: kivoppi phalouvin mi nunphat asusen ahi. 
1Corinthians15:34 Chonphatna lama khangun lang, chonse hih-un; ijeh-inem itile abang khat Pathen hetna nei lou ahi. Hiche hi jahcha naovin nate tia kasei ahi." 
1Corinthians15:35 Ahin mi khat touvin, Athiho kaithouva iti umham? Itobang tahsa vou po-a hungji aham, tinte." 
1Corinthians15:36 Vo lungthimbei, nangman muchi natu chu athi loule akehpoi;" 
1Corinthians15:37 Khonunga akung abah ahung umding chu nangma tu ahipoi; kolbu hihen, chang dang hijongle, nangman achangbou natu ahi." 
1Corinthians15:38 Pathen'in alung chama tahsa apeh ahibouve; achang takip chu ama dol cheh tahsa apehji ahi. 
1Corinthians15:39 Amavang sa jouse akithakhat poi, mi-a hihen, sa-a hijongle, vachale nga-a hijongle, got chomcheh ahi." 
1Corinthians15:40 Van vou aumin, leiset vou jong aume; ahivangin van tipum loupina achom ahin, leiset vou loupina achom ahi." 
1Corinthians15:41 Nisa loupina achom ahin, lhathah loupina achom ahi; chule ahsi loupina jong achom ahi, ahsi le ahsi jong aloupina achom chom ahi." 
1Corinthians15:42 Chutobangma chu athiho thokit jong hi ding ahi. Monmang theija kitu-a ahin, monmang thei louva kikaithou ahi;" 
1Corinthians15:43 Manmo-a kitu-a ahin, loupia kikaithou ahi, hatmoa kitu-a ahin, thahat tah-a kikaithou ahi;" 
1Corinthians15:44 Tahsa vou kitu-a ahin, lhagao vou kikaithou ahi. Tahsa vou uma, lhagao vou jong uma ahi." 
1Corinthians15:45 Chule hitihin akisune, mi masa Adam chu mi hing anahi; Adam nunung joh vang chu hinna pe-a lhagao ahi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ahivangin lhagao lam chu amasajopoi, mihing joh chubou aum masai; chujouvin bou lhagao lam chu aume." 
1Corinthians15:47 Mihem masa chu leija kisem leija kon ahin, mihem nina vang chu van'a hungkon Pakai ahi." 
1Corinthians15:48 Leija kisem mite jong hi leija kisem mipa chutoh bang cheh ahi; van mite chu van'a Pa tobang cheh ahiuve. 
1Corinthians15:49 Chule leija kisempa lim ilo banguva chu, van'a Pa lim jong ilo dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians15:50 Ahivangin, sopite, Tahsale thisan hin Pathen lenggam alo theipoi, monmang thei hin monmang thei lou chu alo theipoi, tia kasei ahi." 
1Corinthians15:51 Veuvin, keiman nangho thugil khat kaseipeh nahiuve, ibon chaova ina-imut lou dingu ahi;" 
1Corinthians15:52 Ahinla sumkon gin nunung pena chu, hai khat sunga, mitphet kah louva, ibon chaova ikikhel sohkei dingu ahi; ajeh chu sumkon hung ging ding, chule athiho chu monmang thei louva kaithouva umding, chule eiho ikikhel dingu ahi." 
1Corinthians15:53 Ijeh-inem itile hiche monmang thei hin monmang thei lou chu akivona, thi thei hin thi thei lou chu akivon ding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:54 Chutia chu monmang theijin monmang thei lou chu akivona, thi theijin thi thei lou chu akivon tengtah chule, jona-in thina chu aval lhumtai, tia kisun thu chu guilhung ding ahi." 
1Corinthians15:55 Vo thina, namidena hoiham? Vo lhankhuh, na jona hoiham?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Thina mide-na chu chonset ahi, chonset thaneina chu dan thupeh ahi." 
1Corinthians15:57 Ahinla I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga jona eipeuva Pathen chu thangvah-in umhen. 
1Corinthians15:58 Hijeh chun, sopi deitahte, dettah-in suhlong hoi hilouhelin pangun, gunchu tah-in Pakai na tong jingun; natohgimnao chu Pakaiya moh ahipoi ti naheuve." 
1Corinthians16:1 Chule mithengte dinga tolom thudol vang chu, Galatia houbung ho thu kapeh bang chun, nanghon jong bolun." 
1Corinthians16:2 Chule kahung teng tolom donna aumlouna dingin, hapta nimasa ni leh Pathen'in phatthei aboh dungjuijin, amitakipmin atojoukham chehi-in dong khomun, anakhol khomun." 
1Corinthians16:3 Keima kahung phatle, koihijeng jongle pha nasah penpenu chu nathilpeh hou gathah dingin, nalekha thot utoh Jerusalem'ah solnange." 
1Corinthians16:4 Keima chea alom jongle, amaho chu keitoh lhonnao vinge." 
1Corinthians16:5 Chule Macedonia kachotsoh phatle, naheng uva hung ding kahi; ajeh chu Macedonia gam chonle ding kigo-a kahi." 
1Corinthians16:6 Kachena channa neithah le thei na diuva naheng uva phat chomkhat kacham ding, ijem itile phalbi sungse-a bon kacham den ding ahi." 
1Corinthians16:7 Tu chunga palama kimuto kanompoi; Pakai phatsah ahile, nangho koma chomkhat chamleng ti kakineme." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ahivangin Pentecost geijin Ephesia kho-a hin chaming kate. 
1Corinthians16:9 Ajeh chu kadingin kot lentah toh machal theina tah akihonge, chule eidouva atame." 
1Corinthians16:10 Chule Timothy chu ahunga ahile, kicha louhela nalah uva aum theina ding ana ngaito uvin; ajeh chu ama keima toh bang banga Pakai na tonga ahi;" 
1Corinthians16:11 Hijeh chun koiman nahsahmon bol hihhen. Kaheng ahung lhun theina dingin, achena-a lungmonga avalena dingin thahleuvin; ijeh-inem itile sopite toh ahungna ding lam kat jinga um kahiuve." 
1Corinthians16:12 Chule sopi Apollos thu vang chu, sopite toh kilhona naheng uva hung dinga katem jing ahi; ahin tupettah-a hung ding vang anompoi, ahivangin ahung thei phat phatle hung ding ahi." 
1Corinthians16:13 Kihongun, tahsanna-a dingdet jingun, pasal pha bangtah-in pangun hatnun." 
1Corinthians16:14 Nabol jouseu chu ngailutna-a kibol hihen. 
1Corinthians16:15 Sopiteho, Stephanas inkote sung hi Achaia gama Pathen thua ga masapen ahiuvin, mithengte jennan akipeuvin ahi, ti naheuve;" 
1Corinthians16:16 Nangho jong hitobangho le keiho natoh huna-a tong gimho chengse thu noija umun, tia naheng uva katao ahi." 
1Corinthians16:17 Stephanas, Fortunatus, chule Achaicus teho hilama ahungu hi kakipah lheh jenge; ajeh chu amahon nangho lhinlelna chu asubulhit taovin ahi." 
1Corinthians16:18 Amahon keima lung jong, nangho lung jong akidosah ahi. Hitobang mite hi hethemuvin." 
1Corinthians16:19 Asia gama houbung hon salam naboh-ui, Aquila le Priscilla le a-in lhona kikhom chengsen Pakaiya salam tamtah naboh-uve." 
1Corinthians16:20 Sopite jousen Salam naboh-uve. Kichop thengin khat le khat kisalam to cheh-un. 
1Corinthians16:21 Kasalam bohna hiche hi keima Paul'in kakhut tah-a kasut ahi. 
1Corinthians16:22 Khattou Pakai Jesu Christa ngailu lou aumle, ama chu Anathema hihen, Maranatha." 
1Corinthians16:23 Pakai Jesu Christa lungsetna chun umpiuvin. 
1Corinthians16:24 Jesu Christa-a kangailut nao chu nabon chaova chunga umhen. Amen. 
2Corinthians1:1 Pathen lungcham tah-a Jesu Christa solchah-a pang Paul leh, sopi Timothy'in Corinth-a um Pathen houbung te, chule Achaia gam sunga um mithengte jouse henga," 
2Corinthians1:2 i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin, lungsetnale lungmonna chun umpiuvin." 
2Corinthians1:3 Pathen, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa chu vahchoijin umhen, Ama lungsetnaho Pa leh lungmonna jouse Pathen ahi." 
2Corinthians1:4 Keihon Pathen'a kona lungmonna kaneiju, hiche lungmon na-a chu hesoh gentheija umteho kalungmonsah theina dingun, hesoh gentheina lah-a jong aman eilung monsah jingjiuve." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ajehchu Christa thohgimna chengse keiho-a adimset bangin, Christa vangin lungmon na-a kadimset jingui." 
2Corinthians1:6 Ahin keihon hesoh genthei kathoh-u aumle, hichu nangho lungmonna dingle huhhing-a naumna dingu ahi; lungmonga kaumu jongle, hichu nangho lungmonna dingle huhhing-a naumna dingu ahi; hichu keiho thohjiho tobang hesoh gentheina lungneng tah-a nathoh naova kona nahetdoh-u ahi." 
2Corinthians1:7 Chule nanghon hesoh genthei thohna lama chan naneiju banga, lungmonna lama jong chan nanei jingu chu kahen, kakineppi nau adet jinge." 
2Corinthians1:8 Sopite, Asia gama kachunguva hesoh genthei chua chu nahet lou dingu kanompoi, thohjouhoi hilou kathauvin ajo kalvalin nasatah-a eidelpha jengu ahin, hing dinga jong kakihol louvu ahitan ahi." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ahin keihon kalung sungun, keihole keiho-a kitahsan louva athiho kaithouva Pathen chu katahsan johna dingun, kathina dingu ahung lhunge, katiu ahitai." 
2Corinthians1:10 Ama chun chutobanga len thina-a kona chu eina huhdoh-u ahin, chujongle eihuhdoh dingu ahi; ama chun tu-a jong eihuhdoh dingu ahinalaije, tia ama-a chu kakinepnao phutdet kahiuve." 
2Corinthians1:11 Mi tamtah vanga lungsetna thilpeh eikipeh jeh uva hi, mi tamtah-in keiho chungchanga athangvah theina dinga, nangho jong nataonaova eikithopia nahiuve." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ijeh-inem itile kakisonnao chu hiche hi ahi, kalung sunguva ase apha hetnan eihettohsah-u chu, vannoi mite hengah, chule atamjo cheh-a nangho lamah, tahsaphe lam chihna hilouva, Pathen lungset vanga Pathen thenna le kitahna-a kanachon jingu ahi." 
2Corinthians1:13 Nanghon sim jong nasim uva, het jong nahetchet sao thu tailou chu keihon nangho henga thu dang ima kasunpouve. Chule akhon ni geijin heuvin nate tin kakineme." 
2Corinthians1:14 Nanghon keiho neihet phot thimu banga chu, Pakai Jesu nikho nileh nangho kisonna ding keiho kahiu banga, nangho jong keiho keisonna ding nahiuve." 
2Corinthians1:15 Chule hiche tahsanna-a hi, nivei phatchomna nanei theina dinguvin, nangho henga hung masaleng kati ahi;" 
2Corinthians1:16 Macedonia kacheteng nangho kom hin hopangting, Macedonia'a konin nangho henga hungkit ingting, chule nanghon Juda gam lama neithah leuchun kati." 
2Corinthians1:17 Hijeh-a chu, hitia lung kaput hi, thil neocha dana kalahham? ahiloule kalunggot chengse hi, tahsaphe dungjuija, ahile ahi, ahi loule ahilou, tia kahim?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ahinla Pathen athutah bangin, nangho lama kathu-u chu, ahile ahi, ahi loule ahilou, ahipoi." 
2Corinthians1:19 Ajeh iham itile nalah uva keihon, keimatah le Silvanus chule Timothy'n, kalhangsap leu Pathen Chapa Jesu Christa-a chun, ahi leh ahilou, aumpoi, ama-a chun Ahi aumbouve." 
2Corinthians1:20 Ajeh chu Pathen thutep jouse chu Ama-a chu Ahi chu uma ahi; hijeh-a chu keiho-a kona Pathen loupina dinga, ama vanga Amen hijia ahi." 
2Corinthians1:21 Chule Christa-a nang hotoh eiphutdoh, chule thao einua chu Pathen ahi." 
2Corinthians1:22 Ama chun namdet einam khumuva, chule ilung sunguva Lhagao khamgah na-a eipeh-u ahi." 
2Corinthians1:23 Nangho hoidohna dinga tu geija Corinth-a hung louva kahitai, hiche thua hin kahinna chunga ahetoh dingin Pathen kakouvin ahi." 
2Corinthians1:24 Keiho nangho tahsanna chunga vaipo-a kahipouve, nakipanao chu hujoa kahibovui. Ijeh-inem itile nangho tahsana-a nading detnaove." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ahin keima changtumin hiti hin kangaitoi, tukallin lungphamon naheng uva hungtaponge." 
2Corinthians2:2 Ajeh chu keiman nangho lung phatmo sahleng, kalung phatmo sahte tailou chu keima eikipasah dinga koiham?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Keima kipana-a nangho kipah uvin nate ti kagingchan, eikipasah dingho chengse chun kahungteng eilung phatmosah khante tia, hiche thu chu kahinsut ahitai." 
2Corinthians2:4 Chule nalung phatmona dinguva hilouvin, keiman nangho kangailut jeu hi nahetdohna dinguva, lunghesoh, lungkham chule mitlhi tamtah puma hiche thu chu kahinsut ahi." 
2Corinthians2:5 Ahinla, lung phatmo sah-a mi khattou auma ahile, keima eilung phatmosah ahipoi, kahabol khoh behseh louna dinguva, ichanham khatna nabon uva nalung phatmo sah-u ahi." 
2Corinthians2:6 Mi atamjoa kona chutobang mihemin talent amuchu, ama dinga phaset ahi." 
2Corinthians2:7 Chuti ahi jeh chun nanghon nangaidam uva, nalungmonsah joh uva pha ahi; ajole chutobang mi chu lungphatmo behseh-in val lhum getninte." 
2Corinthians2:8 Hijeh-a chu naheng uva katao ahi, nanghon ama nangailut nao chu sudetnun." 
2Corinthians2:9 Nangho imalam jouse-a thungai nahiule, nahilouvu photchetna dinga jong kahinsut ahi." 
2Corinthians2:10 Nanghon nangaidamu chu keiman jong kangaidam ahi. Keiman kangaidam-a ahile, Christa maikoh-a nangho jala kangaidam ahi;" 
2Corinthians2:11 Hichu Satan'in ichunguva machalna thei agomkom atokhah louna ding ahi; ajeh chu eihon ama doha lungthim ihaiju ahipoi. 
2Corinthians2:12 Christa Kipana Thupha hila Troas'a kahunga, chule Pakaiyin keima dinga kot khat ahon chun," 
2Corinthians2:13 Kasopi Titus chu kamudoh lou jeh-in, lung olna kaneipon ahi; ahin amaho-a konin kakilha doh-in, Macedonia gam lama kachetan ahi." 
2Corinthians2:13 Kasopi Titus chu kamudoh lou jeh-in, lung olna kaneipon ahi; ahin amaho-a konin kakilha doh-in, Macedonia gam lama kachetan ahi." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ahin a-imatih chana keiho Christa-a galjona-a eipuile jinguva, Pathen chu thangvah-in umjing hen; aman keiho eimangun ama hetna gimnam chu muntin-ah aphong jallen ahi." 
2Corinthians2:15 Huhhing-a umhole amangthahho dingin, Pathen lama Christa gimnamtui kahiuve;" 
2Corinthians2:16 Loi khat dinga thina-a kona thina gimnam kahiuvin, loi khatte dingin hinna-a kona hinna gimnam kahiuve. Chule hicheng dinga lhinga koiham?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Mi tamtah-in Pathen thuhi miho doha bola sumkolveinan amang chaovin, keiho vang chutobang kahi pouve; kitahtah-a Pathen thupeh bangbanga, Christa-a Pathen mitmu-a thu kaseiju ahi." 
2Corinthians3:1 Keiho kiseipha pan kit kahiuvem? Ahiloule midangho banga, nangho henga ahim, nangho-a kon ahima, seiphatna lekha ngaija kahiuvem?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Nanghotah chu kalung sunguva kisun kalekha thotnu, mi jouse het le sim nahiu ahi;" 
2Corinthians3:3 Nangho Christa lekha thot nahiuve, keiho lhacha natoh-a kon; lekha twija kisun hilouva, Pathen hing Lhagaova kisun; songphenga hilouva, lungthim tahsa phenga kisunjoh nahiuve ti kichentah-in akilange." 
2Corinthians3:4 Chule Christa vanga Pathen lama hitobang tahsan hi kaneiju ahi. 
2Corinthians3:5 Hichehi keiho-a kona ahi ti dingin keiho chang kalhingjou pouve, kabulhinnao hi Pathen'a kon ahibouve;" 
2Corinthians3:6 Amatah-in kitepna thah lhachale-a eibulhin sah-u ahi; lekhajem'a hilouvin lhagao kitepna lhachajoh ahi. Ajehchu lekha jem chun athatjin, lhagao vang chun ahinsahji ahi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ahin thina lhacha-a panna, songa kikhena kisun jengbon chubang tah-a chu aloupi-a, avah kemsuhsuh ding Mosi mai chu avahpempum jeh-a Israel chatehon hoitah-a avet thei lou uva ahileh;" 
2Corinthians3:8 Achutile Lhagao lhacha natoh chu iti haloupi johcheh louding ham? 
2Corinthians3:9 Ijeh-inem itile themmo channa lhacha natoh bon aloupi-a ahile, chonphatna lhacha natoh chu nasajo cheh-a loupia ahi." 
2Corinthians3:10 Ijeh-inem itile loupi kisa-a chu loupina nasajo chun akhokheltah jeh chun, hichea hin loupina aneitapon ahi." 
2Corinthians3:11 Amang theija bon chutia aloupi-a ahile, imatih chana umjing ding chu gamchenga loupijo cheh ahi." 
2Corinthians3:12 Chutobang kinepna kanei jeh uva, hakat tah-a thu kaseijiu ahi." 
2Corinthians3:13 Akemsuhsuh chu Israel chaten avet lhumkei louna dinguva ponlu kikhua, Mosi tobang chu kahipouve;" 
2Corinthians3:14 Ahinla amaho chu alungu atahjo chehtan ahi: ajeh chu tulai gei jong hin Kitepna lui chu asimlai chanun chuche ponlukhuh chu hodoh louvin aumjing nalaije; ajehchu hiche ponlukhuh chu Christa-a lahdoh-a uma ahitai. 
2Corinthians3:15 Ahin tuni gei hin Mosi lekhabu asimlai chanun, alunguva chuche ponlukhuh chu aum jinge." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ahivangin mihem khat chu Pakai heng lama akihei teng, aponlukhu chu kilamangji ahi." 
2Corinthians3:17 Tun Pakai chu Lhagao ahi; chule Pakai Lhagao umna chana chu, chamlhatna uma ahi." 
2Corinthians3:18 Eiho chengse vang, maikhu louva phatvet sunga kive-a banga, Pakai loupina chu ivet jinguva, Pakai Lhagaova kon, loupina-a kona loupina lima kikhela ihiuve." 
2Corinthians4:1 Hiche jeh-a chu keiho hepina kachan uva, hiche lhacha-a panna kaneiju hi, keiho kalhadah hihhelui;" 
2Corinthians4:2 Ahin jachatna thil kisel chengse kapai lhaovin, doha lungthimin kachonpouvin, chule Pathen thu chu mi lhep lhahnan kamangpouve; ahin thutah chu kaphongjalun, Pathen mitmu-a amitakip sele pha hetna henga kaum chanu photchena musah kahiuve." 
2Corinthians4:3 Chule kakipana Thupha jong hi maikhu kikhua ahile, amangthahho dinga maikhu kikhua ahin;" 
2Corinthians4:4 Pathen lima um Christa Kipana Thupha loupitah chun amaho chu asalvah louna dinga, amaho sunga chu hiche vannoi pathen'in atahsan louho lungmit asuhchot ahi." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ajeh chu keihon keiho hilouva, Christa Jesu chu Pakai ahi tia, chule keiho Jesu jala nangho soh kahiu chu kalhang sapleu ahibouve." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ajehchu, Muthim lah-a kona vah hung vahdoh dinga thupeh neijachu Pathen ahin, Jesu Christa maija Pathen loupi hetna chu avahdohna dinga, ama chun kalungu asalvah ahi." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ahivangin thilboltheina chungnung tah chu keiho-a kon hilouva, Pathen'a konjoh ahina dinga, hiche gou chu keihon leibela kachinu ahi." 
2Corinthians4:8 Hoima lam jouse-a nehchinton kaum un, ahinla kisudongin kaumpouve; lungdongin kaumuvin, ahinla kalunglha pouve;" 
2Corinthians4:9 Suh gentheijin kaumun, ahivangin dalhah-in kaumpouve; eikivolhu vin, ahivangin suhset helin kaumpouve." 
2Corinthians4:10 Kavalena chanuva katichung uva Jesu hinna chu akiphon theinan, katichungu vah Pakai Jesu thina chu kapole jingui." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ijeh-inem itile keiho ahing chengse hi katahsao thi theija hi Jesu hinna akiphondoh theina dinga, Jesu jala athi dinga pehdoh jinga um kahiuve." 
2Corinthians4:12 Chutia chu keiho-a hi thinan na atoh ahin, nangho-a hinnan atoh ahi." 
2Corinthians4:13 Katahsan jeh-a thu kasei ahi, tia kisun banga chu, hiche tahsanna lhagao mama chu kaneijuva, keihon jong katahsan jeh uva thu kaseiju ahi." 
2Corinthians4:14 Pakai Jesu kaithouva chun, keiho jong Jesu toh thakhatna eikaithou dingu, chule nang hotoh a-anga eidinsah dingu ahi chu kaheuve." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ajehchu mi tamtah thangvahna jala Lungsetna ahapuna, Pathen choi-atna-a aumna dinga, imajouse nangho jala kibol ahi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Hijeh chun kalhadah hihhelui; kami ponungu akem jing jeng vangin, kami sungnungu aniseh-in athah cheh athah cheh jon ahi." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ijeh-inem itile chomkhat jengcha dinga kathohjiu hesoh gentheina jangkhai hin, tonsot kemlou loupina chu hasema eisempehbe jing jengu ahi;" 
2Corinthians4:18 Muthei thilho ve louvin, mulou thilho chu kave jouve; muthei thil chu chomcha khat dinga ahin, mulou thil vang chu tonsotna dinga ahi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Hiche pon in tobang kaleiset inu hi kiphelha jongle, khutna kisa hilou tonsot in, Pathen'a kona kisa indet chu van'ah kaneijuve, ti kaheuve." 
2Corinthians5:2 Keihon van'a kachenna dingu in chu kivon ding ngai tun tuna, hiche sunga hi peng penga um kahiuve." 
2Corinthians5:3 Chuche-a kakivon tengule, sagoh keova kaum lou dingu ahi." 
2Corinthians5:4 Ajehchu pon in'a kachen uva pohgih kapoh jeh uva peng penga kahiuve; hichu pon beija kaum nom jeh-u hilouva, athoa kakisil uva, thi theina hi hinna chun aval lhumna dinga peng penga joh kahiuve." 
2Corinthians5:5 Chule hiche dinga eigo uva chu Pathen ahin; khamgah na-a Lhagao eipeuva jong ahi. 
2Corinthians5:6 Hijeh-a chu lungngama kaum jingu ahi, chule hiche tahsa ina kachen laiseuva hi Pakaiya kona gamla kahiuve, ti kaheuve." 
2Corinthians5:7 (Ajeh chu keiho polam mu theija chon hilouva, tahsan vanga chona joh kahiuve);" 
2Corinthians5:8 Lungngama kaumu ahi, tahsa-a um louva Pakai koma um kanomjouve." 
2Corinthians5:9 Hijeh-a chu umu jongleng, umhih jongu leng, kadoiju chu ama lunglhai na-a um kahatup tenu ahi." 
2Corinthians5:10 Mitinin tahsa-a athilbol apha hile, ase hile, athilbol dungjui cheh-a atohman asan cheh theina dinga, eiho ibon chaova Christa thupi tanna anga chu ikilah cheh dingu ahi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Hijeh-a chu Pakai kichat umje kahet jeh uva miho kajolleu ahi; ahivangin Pathen anga kilang jingin kaum naove; chule nangho sele pha hetna-a jong kakilang jingui, tin kakinemui." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ajehchu nangho henga keiho kichang vahchoi kit kahipouve; lungthim thua hilouva kamsung lama kisongte chu nadonbut theina dinguva, keiho lama kisonna naneina dingu phat kapehjoh nahiuve." 
2Corinthians5:13 Ajehchu kangol-ule Pathen'a ding ahin, kachih-ule nangho-a ding ahi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Christa ngailutna chun kachamlou uva eisolu ahi, hiti hin kagelui: mi jouse thi khela khat athia ahile, mi jouse chu athia ahitai;" 
2Corinthians5:15 Chule ahingho chu amaho dinga hing hitalouva, athi kheluva thia thoukitpa ding joh-a hing ahi theina dinguva, mi jouse thi khela thia ahi." 
2Corinthians5:16 Chuti ahi jeh chun tukala lhah-in, tahsa lam dola koima kahetapouve; chuti chu ahin masangin Christa chu tahsa lam dolin he jonguleng, tunvang hitobang chun kahetapouve." 
2Corinthians5:17 Hijeh chun koi hile Christa-a um chu akisemthah ahi; alui chengse chu amang gama ahitai; veuvin, athah ahitai." 
2Corinthians5:18 Chule thil jouse hi Pathen'a kon ahin, Aman Jesu Christa jala eikicham piuva, chule kichamna thu lhachale-a chu eipansah-u ahi." 
2Corinthians5:19 Hitia chu Pathen chu Christa-a uma, vannoi leiset mite themona-a sun louva, amatoh kichamna aboljoh ahi; chule chuche kichamna thu chu keiho eipehdoh-u ahi." 
2Corinthians5:20 Hiche jeh-a chu Keiho Christa palai kahiu ahin, Pathen'in keiho-a kona naheng uva angeh banga, Pathen toh kichamun tia, Christa thalhenga naheng uva kangeh-u ahi." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ama-a chu Pathen chonphatna ichan theina dinguva, chonset helouhelpa chu eiho khela chonsea asem ahitai." 
2Corinthians6:1 Chule Christa toh natong khom kahiuvin, Pathen lungsetna chu phatchomna beija mu-a nahi louna dinguva kajolu nahiuve;" 
2Corinthians6:2 (ijeh-inem itile aman hitin ati, Keiman san phatchan, nataona kasange; Chule huhhing nikho nin nangma kahun ahi. Veovin, tuhi lahphat tah ahi; tuhi huhhingna nikho ahi)." 
2Corinthians6:3 Hiche lhachale-a kapannau hi nolna aum louna dingin, keihon ilam ilam thu hile kipal lhuhna ding kaumsah pouvin ahi." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ahin imalam jouse-a Pathen lhacha kahiu hi, hatah-a lungdehat nin, hesoh gentheina thoh-in, lhasama umin, setto lungkhamna toh-in." 
2Corinthians6:5 Kijepna thoh-in, songkul'a kihenin, thunoh lungjinna thoh-in, thohgimna thoh-in, imulouva umin, an ngola umin," 
2Corinthians6:6 Thenin, hetna in, thohhat sotnin, hepina neijin, Lhagao Thengin, alhem hilouhel ngailutna-in," 
2Corinthians6:7 Thutah thun, Pathen thahatnin, jetle veija chondihna galvon kivonin," 
2Corinthians6:8 Gunchuna le jalouna-in, seisetle seiphat chanin, aphot chenna kavetsah jingui; mi lhemlha ho kabangun ahinla kitahtah kahiuve;" 
2Corinthians6:9 Hetkhamlouho kabangun ahinla minchetah kahiuve; athikon kabangun ahinla, veuvin, kahingnaove; engbolin kaumun ahinla eikithat pouve;" 
2Corinthians6:10 Lunghemtah kabangun, ahinla kipah thanom jing kahiuve; vaichatah kabangun, ahinla tamtah kahaosah taove; imacha neilouhel kabangun, ahinla imajouse kanei kimui." 
2Corinthians6:11 Vo Corinth miteho, nangho dingin kakamu akan kalungu akihonglene." 
2Corinthians6:12 Nangho keiho-a nehchinto-a uma nahipouve, nangho kichang lunggela nehchinto-a na-umu ahibouve." 
2Corinthians6:13 Chuti chu ahin kapeh bang neipeh theina dingun (chate jah-a sei banga kasei ahi) nangho jong kihong lennun. 
2Corinthians6:14 Atahsan louho toh kitoh louvin namkoljon pokhom hih-un; chonphat le chonset akikopna ipi umam? Muthimle khovah akibahna ipi umam? 
2Corinthians6:15 Belial le Christa akitona ipi umam? ahiloule atahsanan atahsanlou toh ipi chan anei khomem? 
2Corinthians6:16 Chule Pathen intheng le milimho kihoutohna ipi umam? Ijeh-inem itile nangho Pathen hing intheng nahiuve. Chutichun Pathen'in jong hitin aseije, Keima amaho lah-a kachena chule kavale ding ahi; chule keima amaho Pathen kahi ding, amaho kamite hi ding ahi." 
2Corinthians6:17 Chuti ahi jeh chun Nangho amaho lah-a kon chun hung potdoh-un, chule achomin umun, tin Pakaiyin aseije; Thilboh tongkha hih-un; Chule keiman nangho kasan ding nahiuve," 
2Corinthians6:18 Chule keima napau hingting, chule nangho kachapate le kachanute nahi dingu ahi, tin hat chungnung Pakai chun aseije." 
2Corinthians7:1 Hijeh chun, sopi ngaite, thutep hicheng chu ineiju ahi jeh chun, lhagao le tahsa kisuh bohna jouse-a konin kisuthengu hitin, Pathen gingin thenna-a chamkimin umu hite." 
2Corinthians7:2 Keiho-a dingin nalungthimu hongun; keihon koimacha alam louvin kabolpouve, koima kasuse pouve, koima dohan kalhemlha pouve." 
2Corinthians7:3 Nangho themmo sahna dinga hiche hi kasei ahipoi; ithile thikhomsap, ihinle hingkhom dingin kalungsung uva nacheng uve tia, masanga kaseisa ahitai." 
2Corinthians7:4 Nangho lama kahakat lheh jenge, chule nangho lama kakisonna jong anasai; chuti chun kahesohna jouseuva lungmonna kadimsetnin, chule kipana-in kaletset jingin ahi." 
2Corinthians7:5 Ijeh-inem itile Macedonia gama kahungu jong chun, tahsa-a choldona neilou kahiuve; hoima lam jouse-a hesoh genthei toh jinga umjing jeng kahiu ahi; polama eidouva, lung sunga kichat kanei jing jengjiu ahi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahinla mi kisunemte lungmonsah Pathen'in, Tita hung lhun vang chun eilung monsah taove;" 
2Corinthians7:7 Chule ama hung vang jenggoh jong hilouvin, aman nangho-a lungmonna anei, hiche lungmonna chun eilung monsah taovin ahi; nanghon neingaichat jeu, neilhaset piu, kei dinga nagunchujeu, thu ahung seijin ahile, hichea chun hatah-in kakipah kathanom lheh jengtan ahi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ajeh chu keiman kahin lekhathotna chu nangho kasuh lunghem jeng vangun kakisihpoi; kana kisih jeng vangin; ajehchu kalekhathot chun nangho chomkhat kahsung hijongle, nalunghemsah lheh jengun ahi;" 
2Corinthians7:9 Keima tun kakipah kathanome, nangho suhlunghema naum jeh-u chu hilouvin, nalunghem nao chun lungheina aso jeh chu ahi. Ijeh inem itile nanghon keiho-a hakamna imacha nanei louhelna dinguva, Pathen lam dola kisu lunghema nahiu ahi." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ajeh chu Pathen lam dola lunghem chun huhhing-a umna dinga lungheina asoji ahi; hichun kisihna asojipoi; vannoi leiset lam dola lunghem chun thina asojin ahi. 
2Corinthians7:11 Ajeh chu, veuvin, Nalunghem nao chu Pathen lunglam dol ahi; nangho-a itobanga kihatup chehna asodoh hitam! nangho dingin: nakisuh thengnao, lungsouna, kichatna, ngaichatna, gunchuna, chule phulahna, asodoh-in; hiche thiljouse-a hi nangho thengsoh nahiu chu naphot chetnu ahitai." 
2Corinthians7:12 Hiche naheng uva kahinsut jeng vang chun, alam louva bolpa jeh-a kahinsut ahipon, alam louva kibolpa jeh-a jong kahinsut ahidehpoi; Pathen mitmu-a nachunga kagun chujeu chu naheng uva akiphon dohna dinga, kahinsut joh ahibouve." 
2Corinthians7:13 Hijeh chun nalungmon naova lung mongin kaum taove. Chule Titus kipana-a kaha kipa cheh-un ahi; nanghon nabon chaova alung nakidosah jeh-u chun. 
2Corinthians7:13 Hijeh chun nalungmon naova lung mongin kaum taove. Chule Titus kipana-a kaha kipa cheh-un ahi; nanghon nabon chaova alung nakidosah jeh-u chun. 
2Corinthians7:14 Ajeh chu ama komah nangho-a kakisonna ima a-umtah jeng jongle, jachatnan kaneitapoi; ahin nangho henga kathu sei jouseu thutah ahi banga chu, Titus anga kakisonao jong chu thutah mong ahi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ajeh chu ama komah nangho-a kakisonna ima a-umtah jeng jongle, jachatnan kaneitapoi; ahin nangho henga kathu sei jouseu thutah ahi banga chu, Titus anga kakisonao jong chu thutah mong ahi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Chule nangho nathu nunnao, itobanga kichatah le kithing thinga nanalem jengu hitam, ti ageldohjile nangho nakhoto nao anasacheh cheh jengin ahi." 
2Corinthians7:16 Hijeh chun thiljouse-a nangho chunga tahsana kanei hi kakipah thanomin ahi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Sopiteho, Macedonia houbung ho kipe-a Pathen lungsetna chu nangho kahetsah nahiuve." 
2Corinthians8:2 Ajeh chu hesoh gentheija kipatepna nasatah lah jenga jong akipanao adimin, avaichat thuhlheh jeng vangun, athilphal uva kon aletset jengtaovin ahi." 
2Corinthians8:3 Keiman kahet tohsah-a kasei ahi, amahon athao toh kithuh-in, athaovin ajokalvalin jong, amaho lungcham tah-in apeuvin;" 
2Corinthians8:4 Athilto-u chu kasan nadingu leh, mithengte lhachakin bolna-a akithokhom theina dingun eino gangun ahi" 
2Corinthians8:5 Chule hichu kakinepna bangu hilouvin, Pathen lunglamin amaho-a Pakaiyah akipe masaovin, chuin keiho henga akipeuvin ahi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Chutichun Titus'in masanga abol pat banga chu, tu-a jong chuche lungsetna chu nangho lah-a abulhit sohna dingin katiltil jiuvin ahi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Chutichun Titus'in masanga abol pat banga chu, tu-a jong chuche lungsetna chu nangho lah-a abulhit sohna dingin katiltil jiuvin ahi." 
2Corinthians8:7 Amavang, tahsanna, seidohna, hetna, gunchuna jouse le keiho ngailutna nanei letset banguva chu, hiche lungsetna jong hi nanei letsetna dingu gelun." 
2Corinthians8:8 Hiche hi thupeh bangtah-a kasei hilouvin, midangho kihabolna-a kona, nanghon ngailutna tahbeh naneiju chu patepna-a kasei ahibouve." 
2Corinthians8:9 Ajeh chu ama vaichat vanga nangho nahaodoh theina dinguva, ahaonasa nangho jala vaicha jenga, hiche Pakai Jesu Christa lungset chu nanghon naheuve." 
2Corinthians8:10 Hiche thudola hi lungthim kapehbou nahiuve; achuti chu nangho dinga apha ahi; kum khat masanga bol pan masa nangho nahiuve, nabol pat jenggoh-u hilouva bol jong nabolphat nomu ahi." 
2Corinthians8:11 Ahin bol ding nalung got bangu chun, than ajochanin bulhit sohkeija aum theinan, tun jong bol bulhingun." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ajeh chu lung got masah auma ahile, aneija chu anei dungjuija, chule aneilou chu aneilou dungjuija kilajia ahi." 
2Corinthians8:13 Mi dang noma aumuva nangho hesoh-a naum dingu katina ahipoi; 
2Corinthians8:14 Chamgola umna ding ahi, amaho nei letset chu nangho lhahsam bulhitna-a ahung hi theina dinga; tu-a nangho neiletset hi amaho lhahsam bulhitna-a chamgola umna dinga kitoh ahibouve;" 
2Corinthians8:15 Hitia chu, atam lokhoma chu aval aum chomdehpon, chule alhom lokhoma jong chu alhasampoi, tia kisun bang chu ahi." 
2Corinthians8:16 Ahin Tius lungsunga chutobanga gunchu tah-a nangho khotona neisah Pathen chu thangvah-in umhen. 
2Corinthians8:17 Ajeh chu keiho tilkhouna jop chu ahinan, ahinla amatah mong lunggut tena ama lung chama nangho henga hunga ahi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Chule Kipana Thupha lama houbung ho jouse lah-a akipachatna kithangsoh chu, amatoh lhon dingin kahinsol thaove." 
2Corinthians8:19 Chuti jenggoh chu hilouvin; Pakai loupina dingle, kalunggot tenjiu hi vetsahna-a alhachalea kapanu, hiche lungsetna thu lamdola hi kalhonpile dinguva, houbung in agotsa mongu jong ahi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Alhachalea kapanu hiche thilpeh letset thudola hi koiman eidem louna dinguva, chingtheitah-a chona kahiuve;" 
2Corinthians8:21 Pakai mitmu jenga hilouva mihem mitmu-a jong thil ja umdol chu kangaitou ahi. 
2Corinthians8:22 Chule keihon tamtah vei thil tamtah-a agunchuje kaphottohsao isopipao chu, amaho toh kahinsol thaovin ahi, ahin tun nangho-a tahsan dettah anei jeh-in ahagunchu cheh jengtan ahi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus thudol hi kiseile, ama hi nangho chungchanga kakivopi le katoh khompi ahi; chule sopi niteni vanghi, houbung ho solchah chule Christa loupina ahi lhone." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus thudol hi kiseile, ama hi nangho chungchanga kakivopi le katoh khompi ahi; chule sopi niteni vanghi, houbung ho solchah chule Christa loupina ahi lhone." 
2Corinthians8:24 Chuti ahi jeh chun nangailut nao le nangho jeh-a kisonna kaneiju photchetna chu, amaho kom le houbung ho angsunga amaho chu kivetsah-un." 
2Corinthians9:1 Mithengte kinbol thudol vang naheng uva kahinsutlo angaipoi; 
2Corinthians9:2 Ijeh-inem itile nalunggot danu chu kahenai, hiche dol chu, Achaia kigosa aumna kumkhat ahitai, tia Macedonia mite anga nangho kapaopi ahi; chule hiche nagunchu nau chun mi tamtah achoh thouvin, agunchu sahtan ahi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Hitilam thudola nangho kakisonpinao chu ahomkeo ahi louna dinga, kasei banga chu kigosa dema naumna dingun, tia sopiho phabep khat kahinsolu ahitai." 
2Corinthians9:4 Achuti loule ajole Macedonia mi khattou kei lhonpi dingin hunghen, kigo louva na-umu hungtoh tale, keiho chang jenggoh hilouva, kinep pitah nangho dinga jong jachat umding ahi." 
2Corinthians9:5 Hijeh-a chu masanga pat nakitep nasao thilpeh kitoh chu cham louva lah hilouva, hongphal tah-a peh ahia, gotsadema nakoina dinguva; aphat masanga naheng uva hung dinga sopiho chu tilkhou angaije tia kageltoh ahi." 
2Corinthians9:6 Ahivangin hiche thudola hin alhom tu-a chun alhom at ding, chule atam tu-a chun atam at ding ahi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Lung phatmo pumpumle peh louva, phamo tia pe louvin, nalung got bangtah cheh-in peuvin; ijeh-inem itile lunglhai sela pe-a chu Pathen'in angailui." 
2Corinthians9:8 Chule imalam jouse-a imatih chana ijakaija bulhingsoh nahiuva, natohpha tintang natoh theina dinguva, Pathen'in lungsetna letset nangho napeh theiju ahi." 
2Corinthians9:9 Hiche thudol chu hitihin akisune, Aman athejalin, mivaichate atoi; Achonphatna chu a-imatih chana umjing ahi." 
2Corinthians9:10 Chule muchi tu-a chu muchi pe-a chule anneh dinga changlhah pepa chun, nangho muchi napeuvintin apunsah ding, chule nachon phatnao ga chu akhantou sah ding ahi." 
2Corinthians9:11 Thil phal dinga imalam jouse-a haodoh-a nahitaovin, alhacha-a keiho vangin Pathen vahchoijin aume;" 
2Corinthians9:12 Ajeh chu hiche phatna dingbol lhachale-a panna vanga hi, mithengte lhahsamna bulhinsah jenggoh hilouva, thangvahna tamtah-a kona, Pathen lama jong letset jenga ahitai." 
2Corinthians9:13 Hiche lhacha kin kibola kon, nangho Christa Kipana Thupha phondohna dinga nathu man-ule, amahole adangho jouse tona-a nathilpeh-u jehchun amahon Pathen avahchoijui." 
2Corinthians9:14 Amahotah jong nangho dingin Pathen henga atao ataovun, nachung uva Pathen lungset lentah chuh jeh chun nangai lheh jengui." 
2Corinthians9:15 Athilpeh sei theilou jeh hin Pathen thangvah-in umhen. 
2Corinthians10:1 Keima, Paul, naum naova lungnem chule naum lounaova nangho lama hakat chun, Christa chonnemna le nunnem na-a keimatah-in katem nahiuve." 
2Corinthians10:2 Hijongle keiho hi tahsa lam thua chon ahi tia eingaitoho mi koi koiham chunga, hakat tah-a chon dingdol ahi tia kageltoh chu, kaum tengle hiche hakat chu kamanchah louna dinga, naheng uva katao ahi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ijeh-inem itile keiho tahsa-a chonle kahivangun, tahsa lam thudolin gal kasatpouve;" 
2Corinthians10:4 (Ajeh chu kagalsatnau manchah hi tahsa-a ahipoi, ahivanga, kulpi suhjalna dinga Pathen lama hattah);" 
2Corinthians10:5 Keihon, lungsuhto-a mi nel na, chule Pathen lam hetna douna-a kigel thil sangtah tah kasuh chim jiuva, lungthim ngaito jouse gal hinga kamat jiuva, Christa thua kanunsah jiu ahi." 
2Corinthians10:6 Chule nangho thua nanun bulhin tengule, thua nunglouho phula dinga jong kigosa jing kahiuve." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nanghon namaikoh uva um thil chu navet uvam? Koi hile mi khattou ama, Christa-a kahi tia amachang kitahsana aumle, ama chun hiche hi ngaito kit-hen; ama Christa-a ahi bang chun keiho jong kahiuve." 
2Corinthians10:8 Ajeh chu nangho phet lhahna hilouva sahphatna dingjoh-a Pakaiyin eipeh-u kathuneinao hi hatah-in song jongleng, kajachat lou ding ahi." 
2Corinthians10:9 Lekhaho-a chun nangho tijatsah tobang hidange. 
2Corinthians10:10 Ajeh chu alekhaho athu agihsan, hat jong ahat ngeije, ahinla amunah atahsa ahatmon, athusei taimo aume, atiuve." 
2Corinthians10:11 Chutobang miho chun heuhen, keiho kaum lou tenguva lekha-a thu banga chu, kaumu jongle thilbola chutima chu kahiuve." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ajeh iham itile amachang kivahchoi mi abang khattouho toh kisimtha dingle kitekah ding kangampouve; amaho vang chu amahole amaho akitekah jiuvin, imacha helou helin aumui." 
2Corinthians10:13 Keiho vang eikitepeh kalvalun kisong pouvinge, Pathen'in gamkol eitepeh bang bangabou kisong ding kahiuve, gamkol chun nangho jong nahomui." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ajeh chu keiho nangho kom hung lhunglou toh kabah jeng vangun, eikitepeh kalvala kilhonsao kahipouve, ajeh chu Christa Kipana Thupha hille-a, nangho kom geipeh jong kahung lhunu ahi;" 
2Corinthians10:15 Eikitepeh kalvaluva midang tohnasa-a kisonga kahipouve; natahsanu akhantoule kavai hom dungjuiju hin nangho vangin hatah-a keh let cheh-in umunge, ti kakineme." 
2Corinthians10:16 Nangho gam kalpeh geija Kipana Thupha hi kaseiphongle theina dinguva, kakhut uva dinga gotsa um thil dola hi mi gamkol sung kason louna dingu, katiu ahi." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ahin khattou akisonga aumle Pakaiyah kisonghen. 
2Corinthians10:18 Ajeh chu ama kiseipha-a chu hilouvin, Pakai seiphat chubou apha tia kisei ahi." 
2Corinthians11:1 Kangolna themthema neinangai themleu chun kalung ahi; ahin neinangai themsam naove. 
2Corinthians11:2 Pathen tomlah na-a nachung uva katomlah ahi, nungah theng banga Christa khutna kapeh theina dinguva, nangho inneipu khatseh Christa dinga kaholsa nahiuve." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ahivangin gul chun alepthol doha-a Evi alheplhah bangchun, Christa lama nalungput dihnauva nalung gelu chu ijemtin suchavai getnun nate ti kakichai." 
2Corinthians11:4 Ajehchu keihon athu kasei louvu Jesu chom dang khat thu ahung seija auma, ahiloule nachankhah ngai louvu lhagao chomdang changa auma, ahiloule najop khah ngai louvu Kipana Thupha jop auma, ahile ama chu angai themleu chun aphai." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ijeh-inem itile solchah pipui chung nungho sanga neokhat chajong neojo-a kingaito lou kahi. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ahinla thuseija kalhahchom vangin hetna lama chun kalhachom poi. Ahin imalam jouse-a nangho henga tahlangin kaumun ahi. 
2Corinthians11:7 Ole, nangho choisanga naumna dinguva, keima kaki suhnema, lo beija nangho Pathen Thupha kahilu hi achonsea kahim?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Nangho kinbolna dinga, houbung dangdang kachoma, amaho-a kona lo kasan ahi;" 
2Corinthians11:9 Chule nangho koma kaum laisen kalhahsamna aum jongle, koima dinga gihsatna hilouhel kahi; ajeh chu Macedonia konin sopiho ahungun, kangaichat chengse ahung subulhittaove; chule imalam jouse-a nangho gihsatsah louna dinga kihongdoh jing kahin, kihongdoh jing ding kahi." 
2Corinthians11:10 Christa thutah jouse keima-a aum jehchun, Achaia gamkol sunga kakisonna chu koiman eikhahtan thei ponte." 
2Corinthians11:11 Ipi jehham? nangho kangailut lou jehham? Pathen'in ahenai. 
2Corinthians11:12 Ahinla agomkom holteho chu, akisonao chu keiho tobangbang ahung hi theina dinguva, agomkom atokhah dingu chu kasuhhai theina dinga, kabol hi kaboljom jing ding ahi." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ijeh-inem itile chutobang miho chu solchah lhem ahiuve; doha bola milhemlha natong ahiuve; amaho Christa solchah ho lima kisema ahiuve. 
2Corinthians11:14 Hichu thu kidang ahipoi, ajeh chu Satan'in amatah jengin jong avah-a vah vantil mel aputji ahi." 
2Corinthians11:15 Chuti chu ahin, alhachahon chonphat lhachaho mel aput chu thupi ahipoi; ahivanga akichainiu chu athilbol dungjui cheh-u hiding ahi." 
2Corinthians11:16 Keiman kasei kit ahi, koiman angolin eingaito hihhen; ahin neingaito ujongleh, themkhat beh kakison theina dingin mingol bangin neisangun." 
2Corinthians11:17 Hicheng kasei hi Pakai thuseija kasei hilouva, hiche kisonna-a hi kisonga, mingol thusei banga kasei ahibouve." 
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tamtah tahsaphe lama akison jeh-a, kei jong kakison ding ahi." 
2Corinthians11:19 Nangho achinga nahi jeh uva, mingol ho chu kipahtah-a nangaithem-u ahi." 
2Corinthians11:20 Nasohchan sah uva jong, nabah gamuva jong, gal hinga naman uva jong, ama le ama kichoisanga jong, chule nangeipheu benga jong, nangai themu ahi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Keiho hichea ding chun kalhasamui tia jahcha puma kasei ahi! Ahivangin ilam ilam thua hile, midang ngamna-a chun (Mingol thuseija kasei ahi)kei jong kangame." 
2Corinthians11:22 Amaho Hebrew mi hiuvam? kei jong kahi. Amaho Israel mite hiuvam? kei jong kahi. Amaho Abraham chilhah hiuvam? kei jong kahi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Amaho Christa lhacha hiuvam? (Mingol thuseija kasei ahi) keima kaha hidehjoi, na hatohgimin, songkul lut tamin, teptena kalvala kivoh tamin, thina thei setto tamin;" 
2Corinthians11:24 Ngavei Judah ho-a konin somli-a khat lhan eiki jepmin; 
2Corinthians11:25 Thumveina molin eikivon; khatvei songin eikisepmin, thumveina kongke kathoh, jan khatle sunkhat twi thuh laija kaumin;" 
2Corinthians11:26 Kakholjin lena-a, tamtahvei luipi-a setto, gucha michoma setto, kanam chanpite-a kona setto, chidang namdang ho-a kona setto, khopi sunga setto, gamthip dunga setto, twikhanglen'a setto, sopi lhemho lah-a setto;" 
2Corinthians11:27 Tohgimle hesoh gentheijin, hah jinga imu louva umin, gilkel dangchah thoh-in, an ngola umin, khosih thoh-a pon sillouva umin, hicheng chu kaha hidehna ahi." 
2Corinthians11:28 Hicheng vang chu chutitante, ahivangin apipenin houbung chengse kakhohsah hi niseh-a eidelpha-a ahi." 
2Corinthians11:29 Koi hatmona kahatmopi lou umam? koi kiselhuh na-a katompi lou umam? 
2Corinthians11:30 Kithang-at go-a hileng, kahatmona tamtah-a hi kakithang-at ding ahi." 
2Corinthians11:31 Jou sei lou kahi, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa-le Pathen tonsot nunnoma chun ahenai." 
2Corinthians11:32 Damascus-a Aretas lengpa noija gamvaipopan, keima man dingin Damascus miho khopi chu angasah jeng ahi;" 
2Corinthians11:33 Ahivangin bangkot homa bomin kulpanga eikhai lha uvin, akhutna konin kasohchatan ahi." 
2Corinthians12:1 Keima dingin kiletsahhi ima phachom hihjongle, gaothilmu le Pakai kilahna thuho seijinge." 
2Corinthians12:2 Keiman Christa-a mi khat kahei, kum somle kum li ahitai (tahsa pumaham kahepoi, tahsa puma hilouham kahepoi, Pathen'in ahei) van athumna geijin lahtouvin aumin ahi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Keiman hitobang mi chu kahei (tahsa pumaha, atahsa pum hilouham, hi chu kahepoi, Pathen'in ahei)." 
2Corinthians12:4 Ama chu gam loupi-a lahtouvin aumin, tho thei louhel paochengho agajai, hichu mihem dinga thodoh hoi dan hilouhel ahi." 
2Corinthians12:5 Chutobang mi dinga chu kisong ding kahi; keima chang thua vang, kahatmo naho tailouvah kisongponge." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kison ding lung go jongleng angolla hiponge, keiman thutahbeh kasei ding ahi; min keima eimu-a chule kathu ajah-a itobanga eingaitom, hi sanga chu chungnung-jo-a eingaito louna dinga, kakitim ahi." 
2Corinthians12:7 Chule thil kilahho anatsat behseh jeh-a chu kakichoisang behseh louna dingin, Satan thangkou khat eichum dingin, kakichoisang louhelna dingin, kati chungah ling khat eikipen ahi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Keija kona achemangna dingin Pakai anga thumvei kataotan ahi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Chutah chun aman, Kalungsetna hi nangma dinga lhingset ahi; ajehchu hatmona-a kathahat kisucham kimjia ahi, ati. Hijeh-a chu Christa thahat keija achen theina dinga, kahatmona-a hi kipahtah-a kakison johding ahi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Chuti ahi jeh-a chu Christa jala hatmona tincheng, suhlema umna, vaichatna, bolsetna, settona hichenga hi lunglhaija um kahi; ajeh chu kahatmo komle kahatjin ahi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Kison na-a ngol kanahi ahitai; nanghon ngollou theijin neilhapouve; ajeh chu nangho choi-at dingjoh kahi; ijeh inem itile keima solchah pipuiho sanga imacha-a nunung jolou kahi. 
2Corinthians12:12 Tahtah-a seijin, solchah hina melchihna ho jouse nangho lah-a thohhattoh kitho-a, melchihna tintang kibola, mu kidang dang chule thilbol theina-a kiboldoh ahi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ahile houbung dangho sanga noinungjo-a na-umnao ipi umam, keiman nangho gihsatsah louva kaum ti lou chu? Hiche kasuhkhel chu neingaidam un." 
2Corinthians12:14 Veuvin, nangho henga hung kakigot hiche hi athumveina ahi; chule nangho gihsatsah lou ding kahi; ajeh chu keima nangho-a ima hola hilouvin, nangho bou kahol ahi; ajeh chu anule apa dinga chatehon sum akhol chu adol ahipoi, anule apanbou chate dinga akhol ding dol ahi." 
2Corinthians12:15 Chule keiman kipahtah-a nangho hinna dinga kakiman ding, chule kakiman jouhel ding ahi. Keiman nangho kangai lutnao asanlheh jeh-a, nangho neingailut nao lhasam dingham." 
2Corinthians12:16 Ahoi hitale ahihi hitante, keiman nangho pohgihsa kapoh sahpoi; ahin lungthim thema doha kamat nahiuve."
