2Corinthians12:17 Naheng uva kahinsol teho lah-a khattou nangho doha bolna-a kaman chah umam? 
2Corinthians12:18 Titus chu keiman kajola, sopiho chu amatoh kahin soltha ahi; ole Titus'in doha nabolnao umam? Keiho lhagao khat hilou kahiuvem? kalson kibanga sepkhom hilou kahiuvem?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Titus chu keiman kajola, sopiho chu amatoh kahin soltha ahi; ole Titus'in doha nabolnao umam? Keiho lhagao khat hilou kahiuvem? kalson kibanga sepkhom hilou kahiuvem?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Tuchan geija hi keiho kithenhon na-a najah uva thuseija neingaito nahlaiju ham? Keiho Pathen maikoh-a Christa thu seija kahiuve. Chule, ngaitahte, imajouse hi nangho sadoh-a phattou sahna-a kabollu ahi." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ajeh chu nakomu kahung lhun tengle, ajole kamu nom bangin muhih khau vingting, chule nanghon jong neimu nom bangin neimu hih khauvinate, ti kagingmoi; ijem itile nalah uva, kibaotam, kithangset, lunghan, kilungdou, kiseiset, kihou lhih, hamhoitho, thunoh lungjin umkhante kati;" 
2Corinthians12:21 Chule ajole kahung kit tengle, ka-Pathen'in keima nangho angah eisunem khantin; chule tu masanga chonsea, thenlouna, jonthanhoi, huh aboluva kon lungheilou mitamtah hochu lhasetpi khagetning kate." 
2Corinthians13:1 Nangho henga kahung tu chunga hi athum veina ahi. Ahetoh ni ahim, thum ahim, kama thu ijakai tun dinga umding ahi." 
2Corinthians13:2 Amasanga kanaseisa ahi, chule aniveina-a kaum petna kanaseisa banga chu, tu-a kaum louva jong, tu masanga chonse hole adang dangho jouse henga kasut ahi, kahung kit tengle, khen nei lou ding kahi;" 
2Corinthians13:3 Nanghon Christan keima-a thu asei photchena nahol jeh-u chun; ama chu nangho lama hatmoa ahipoi, nangho-a hattah ahi." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ijeh-inem itile hatmona jeh-a thingpel'a akikhetbeh jeng vangin, Pathen thahat vangin ahing jinge. Ajeh chu keiho jong ama-a hatmoa kahiuve; ahinla Pathen thahat vanga nangho lama amatoh hingkhom ding kahiuve." 
2Corinthians13:5 Tahsana um nahiu nahi louvu nangho kikholun; photchena dingin nangho kikholun. Ahiloule Jesu Christa nangho-a aum chu nangho tah-in helou nahiuvem? aphai tia lah hilou nahilou ngaluleh. 
2Corinthians13:6 Ahinla keiho hi aphai tia lah hilou kahilou hi nanghon nahet dingu kakineme. 
2Corinthians13:7 Ahivangin nangho thilphalou nabol louna dingun Pathen henga kataojiuve; hiche aphai tia lah kahiu chu kilahdohna ding hilouva, keiho aphai tia lah hiloutoh kabah jeng vangun, nanghon thil ja um chu nabolna dingu ahijoi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Ajeh chu keiho thutah-a ding tilou, thutah dounan ima kabol thei pouve." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ijeh-inem itile keiho kahatmo uva nangho nahat tengule kathanom jiuve, chule nachamkim na dingun jong, kataojiuve." 
2Corinthians13:10 Hiche jeh chun asuse ding hilouvin, houthu lama khantou sahna dinga Pakaiyin thuneina eipeh hi, kathunei bangtah-a kahung tengle, kabol khoh louna ding lungthima kahung masanga hicheng hi kahinsut ahi." 
2Corinthians13:11 Achaina keijin, sopite, nangho kipah thanomun, chamkim keijun, lungmongun, lungkhat hiuvin, kitohdelin umun; chutile ngailutle lungmon kona Pathen'in naumpi dingu ahi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Thengtah-a kibeng chop cheh-in khatle khat kisalam un. 
2Corinthians13:13 Mitheng jousen nasalamui. 
2Corinthians13:14 Pakai Jesu Christa lungsetnale, Pathen ngailutna, chule Lhagao Theng kithopina chun nabonchaovin umpiuvin. Amen." 
Galatians1:1 Mihem'a kon hilou, mihem vanga jong hilou, Jesu Christa le athi lah-a kona kaithouva Pa Pathen pansah solchah keima Paul," 
Galatians1:2 Chule kaumpi sopite chengsen Galatia'a um houbung ho hengah. 
Galatians1:3 Pa Pathen le I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa-a konin lungset le lungmon nachung uva umhen; 
Galatians1:4 Ama chu i-Pathen'u le i-Pau lunggot bangtah-in, tulai vannoi phat louva kona hi eiho eihuh dohna dingun, eiho chonset manin ama akipetan ahi;" 
Galatians1:5 Loupina chu a-imatih chanin ama-a hijinghen. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Tule tu kahseh-a Christa milungsetna-a nakou paova kona thupha chombeh lama nakai jengu chu kidang kasa lheh jenge. 
Galatians1:7 Hichu thupha chomdang jong ahisampoi; ahinla mi phabep khat aumun, amaho chun nangho nasuh boijuva chule Christa Thupha hi akaleh-a hei ding agotnu ahi." 
Galatians1:8 Ahin keihon nangho henga kahung seiju Kipana Thupha hilou, akalvala thupha chomdang hung seija aumle, keiho hiuving, van'a hungkon vantil khattou hijeng jongle, ama chu sapset chang hen." 
Galatians1:9 Masanga kasei banguva kasei kit ahi, nanghon najopsao kipana Thupha chu hilouva, thupha chomdang naheng uva hung seija aumle, ama chu sapset changhen." 
Galatians1:10 Keima tu-a hi mihem jola kahim, Pathen jola kahim? Ole mihem lunglhaisah ding go-a kihabol kahim? Mihem lunglhaina ding holnalai kahile, Christa soh hilou kahi ding ahi." 
Galatians1:11 Chuti chu ahin, sopite, keiman kahil Thupha thudol hi kahetsah nahiuve, hiche hi mihem lam dol thu ahipoi." 
Galatians1:12 Mihem'a kona kamu jong ahipoi, min eihil jong ahipoi, Jesu Christan aphondoh-a kona kamu ahibouve." 
Galatians1:13 Malaija Juda mite houdan-a kachon laija kanunchan kakhanchan thu chu najakhataove, Pathen houbung chu teptena kalvala bolsea sumang dinga bola kahi;" 
Galatians1:14 Chule kapu kapate hou lama katompan behseh jeh-a, Juda te hou danthu lama kanam sunga kakhang golpi tamtah kakho khel ahi." 
Galatians1:15 Ahivangin kanu oisunga kaum laija pat eisepkhena leh amilungsetna-a eikou Pathen'in," 
Galatians1:16 Kipana Thupha chidang namdangho lah-a kaphon jal ding adeija, achapa keija phondoh ding agotchun, keiman tahsaphe le thisan kadongpai jengpon," 
Galatians1:17 Jerusalem'a keima sanga solchah himasaho henga jong kachepoi; ahin Arabia gama kachen, chuin Damascus'a kahung kile kittan ahi." 
Galatians1:18 Chujou kum thum nungin Jerusalem'a Peter toh kimuto dingin kagache touvin, chule nisom le ninga akomah kaga ume." 
Galatians1:19 Ahivangin solchah ho lah-a khatcha kamupoi, Pakai naopa Jacob bou kamui." 
Galatians1:20 Thu hicheng naheng uva kahinsut hi, veuvin, Pathen maikoh-a kasei ahi, jou seija kahipoi." 
Galatians1:21 Chuche jou chun keima Syria le Cilicia gamkol sunga kachetan ahi. 
Galatians1:22 Chule hiche geija chu Juda gama Christa-a um houbung ho mel het louva umnalai kahi; 
Galatians1:23 Masanga eiho eibol sepao chun, tun khatvei suhmang dinga anagotsa tahsan thu chu alhang samlei, tibou chu ajah-u ahi;" 
Galatians1:24 Chule keima jeh-a Pathen achoi-atnu ahi. 
Galatians2:1 Chujou kum somle kum li jouvin Titus jong kapuijin Barnabas toh Jerusalem'a kagachetou kit lhonin ahi. 
Galatians2:1 Chujou kum somle kum li jouvin Titus jong kapuijin Barnabas toh Jerusalem'a kagachetou kit lhonin ahi. 
Galatians2:2 Chule akilangdoh dungjuija gachetouva kahi; chuin Kipana thupha chidang namdangho lah-a kaseiphongle hi, chua um miho jah-a chun kakhelhan kaseitan ahi, ahinla ginle ja umho jah-a vang chun atum beh-in kaseijin ahi, hichu ajole kalhai hi ijem tia moh lhaija hikhange tia kahi." 
Galatians2:3 Ahin kalhonpi Titus chu Greek mi ahi jeng vang chun, cheptansah ding agokhoh pouve;" 
Galatians2:3 Ahin kalhonpi Titus chu Greek mi ahi jeng vang chun, cheptansah ding agokhoh pouve;" 
Galatians2:4 chule hichu eisoh chansah theina dinguva, Christa Jesu'a ontholna ineiju velhiho dinga guhthima sopi lhemho hinpoh lut ahibouve." 
Galatians2:5 Kipana thupha thutah hi nangho-a aum jom jing theina dingin, nidan kah khat jengcha jong athu noijuva anakikhum lut louhel kahiuve." 
Galatians2:6 Ahivangin ginle ja uma kiseiho lah-a chun (itobang hijongleu, kei kakin akhohpoi; Pathen'in mi koima adatpoi), ginle ja uma kiseiho chun imacha eiseipehbe chompouve;" 
Galatians2:7 Seipehbe tah sangin cheptanho dinga Peter ahi banga, cheptan louho dinga keima kahia, Kipana Thupha chu ginchat tah-a eikipeh-a eikinganse chu aheuvin." 
Galatians2:8 (Cheptanho solchah-a pang dinga Peter dinga thilbola chun, chidang namdangho solchah-a pang dinga keima dinga thil eibolpeh ahin);" 
Galatians2:9 Lungsetna eikipeh chu ahettoh phatnun, Jacob, Cephas, chule John aminche houbung khomho chengsen keimale Barnabas amaho kithopi tin, amaho cheptanho henga acheuve, keini cheptan louho henga kache lhonna dingin, akhut jet lamin eisangjovin ahi;" 
Galatians2:9 Lungsetna eikipeh chu ahettoh phatnun, Jacob, Cephas, chule John aminche houbung khomho chengsen keimale Barnabas amaho kithopi tin, amaho cheptanho henga acheuve, keini cheptan louho henga kache lhonna dingin, akhut jet lamin eisangjovin ahi;" 
Galatians2:10 Mivaichate geldoh jingna ding thu themkhat eiseipeh-un, hichu kei jong abolding kalunggot lheh ahinai." 
Galatians2:11 Ahivangin Antioch kho-a Peter ahung chun themona anei jeh-in kanapho lon ahi. 
Galatians2:12 Ajeh chu aman Jacob koma kona mi koi koiham phabep ahung masangun, chidang namdangho toh an anekhomjin; amaho hung phatnin, cheptanho akichan akinung khinin akitum sahtan ahi." 
Galatians2:13 Chule Juda mi dangho chengse jong amatoh hitobangtah chun aphalhemun, aphat lhemnao chun Barnabas kisan jong amaho lamah akai tan ahi." 
Galatians2:14 Ahivangin amaho Kipana Thupha thutah dola chu lungkitah-a achon louvu chu kamun, mi jouse maikoh-a Peter kasosalin, Nangma bon Juda mi hija Juda mi chona chon louva chidang namdangho chona chona chu, ibola chidang namdangho Juda mi chona chonsahtei go-a nahim? katin ahi." 
Galatians2:15 Eiho apena Juda mi ihiuve, eiho chidang namdang michonseho ihipouve;" 
Galatians2:16 Ahinla eihon danthu lam thilbol vanga hilouva, Jesu Christa-a tahsan vangabou michonpha tia kisim ahi, ti iheuve; hiche jeh-a chu eiho jong Jesu Christa itahsanu ahi, chutia chu danthu lam thilbol vanga hilouva, Christa tahsan vanga chonpha tia ikisim dingu ahi; ajeh chu danthu lam thilbol vanga koima chonpha tia kisim lou ding ahi." 
Galatians2:17 Ahin Christa vanga chonpha-a kisimna dinga ikihabol vanguva jong chonset na-a ilhahjiu ahin, ahile Christa chu chonset lhachaham? Ahipoi." 
Galatians2:18 Keiman kaphetsa chu sapha kitleng asukhela kahi, ti chu photchen sah kahi." 
Galatians2:19 Ijeh-inem itile Pathen lama kahinna dinga, danthu dola danthu lama athia kahitai." 
Galatians2:20 Keima Christa toh thingpel'a kikhetbeh tha-a kahitai; keima ahinga kahitapoi, Christa chu keija hinga ahibouve; tu-a tahsaphe-a kahin hi keima eingailua, keima dinga kipedoh Pathen Chapa tahsan vanga chu hinga kahibouve." 
Galatians2:21 Pathen milungset moh kahisahpoi; ijeh-inem itile chonphatna chu danthu lam thilbol vanga ahile, Christa chu ajeh beija moh thia ahitai, kati." 
Galatians3:1 Vo lungthimbei Galatia miho, namitmu tah uva Jesu Christa thingpel'a akikhetbeh chu kichentah-a nalah uva kiphongdoh ahitai; thutah-a nunlou nadia koiham najol lha uva?" 
Galatians3:2 Keiman nangho-a konin hiche thu maicha hi kahet nome, Lhagao nachanu chu danthua chona konham, tahsan thu najah uva konham?" 
Galatians3:3 Nangho chutobang loma chu lungthimbeija nahiuvem? Lhagaova kipanna tahsa phe-a kichaija nahiu hitam? 
Galatians3:4 Nanghon mohjen seh-a hesoh genthei nathoh-u hitam? hitichu ahile, moh jenseh tahbeh ahi." 
Galatians3:5 Lhagao napeuva chule nalah uva thilbol kidang boljia chun, danthua nachon jeh uva abol jiha, tahsan thujah jeh-a abolji ham?" 
Galatians3:6 Chutia chu, Abraham'in Pathen atahsana ahile, hichu ama dinga chonphat tia kisuna ahitai." 
Galatians3:7 Hiche jeh chun atahsanho chengse chu Abraham chate ahiuve, ti heuvin." 
Galatians3:8 Pathen'in chidang namdangho chu tahsan vanga them achansah ding ahi ti chu ahemasan, Pathen lekhabun, Nangma-a kona chitinle namtin phattheina chang ding ahi, tia masang peh-a hiche thupha hi Abraham ana hetsahsa ahitai." 
Galatians3:9 Chuti ahi jeh chun tahsana kon chengse chu mi tahsan umtah Abraham chutoh phattheina chang khoma ahitaove. 
Galatians3:10 Ajeh chu danthua chon chengse chu sapset changa ahiuve; ajeh chu hitin akisune, Koi hile danthubua kisun chengse nitjom jinglou chu sapset chang ding ahi." 
Galatians3:11 Ahivangin danthua chonin Pathen anga koima them achangpoi, ti akichene; ajeh chu, Michonpha chu atahsan vanga hing ding ahi, kitia ahi;" 
Galatians3:12 Chule danthu chu tahsana kon ahipoi; ahinla danthu-a chona chu hichea chu hing ding ahi. 
Galatians3:13 Christa chun danthu sapset chana-a kona eiho eihung lhatdoh-u ahitai, ajeh chu ama eiho khela sapset hung changa ahi; ijeh-inem itile, Thinga kikhai sang tapou chu sapset chang ahi, tin akisune;" 
Galatians3:14 Hichu Abraham phatthei chu Christa Jesu'a chidang namdangho heng alhuna, eihon tahsan vanga Lhagao chu ichan theina dinguva ahi." 
Galatians3:15 Sopite, keiman mihem thu seija kasei ahi; mihem kitepna mai mai ahivangin, min aphudet nungle koiman moh ahisah jipoi, chule koiman jong abelap jipoi." 
Galatians3:16 Chuti ahi, thutep ho chu Abraham le achilhah kipe-a ahi. Aman tamtah seina bangin, Chule nachilhah ho, atipoi; khatseh seina bangin, chule nachilhah, atibouve; hichu Christa ahi." 
Galatians3:17 Tun hiche hi kasei ahi, Pathen'in amasanga kitepna khat Christa-a aphudetsa ahin, hichu kum jali le kum somthum nunga umdoh danthu chun kitepna chu moh ahi louna dingin, ason mangpon ahi." 
Galatians3:18 Goulo ding chu danthu vanga ahile, thutep vanga hilouhela hi ding ahi; ahinla Pathen'in thutep vangin Abraham apetan ahi." 
Galatians3:19 Chuti ahile danthu hi ipi phatchomna ham? Thutepna chilhah chu ahung kahse-a dinga, suhkhel jeh-a hichu kibelap ahi; hichu vantil teho kimanga palai khat khutna kitungdoh ahitai." 
Galatians3:20 Palai chu khat changa dinga palai ahipoi, Pathen vang khatsehbou ahi." 
Galatians3:21 Chuti ahile, danthu hi Pathen thutep douvaham? Chuti ahipoi. Hinna pethei danthu kipe-a hile, dih tah-a chonphatna chu danthua kon hitei ding ahi." 
Galatians3:22 Ahin Jesu Christa tahsan vanga thutep chu atahsanho akipeh theina dinga, Pathen lekhabu thu chun ijakai chonset noija akhachah ahitai." 
Galatians3:23 Tahsan thu hung lhun masanga chu danthu noija eina kikoijuve, ahung kilang dinga um tahsan chu ngana-a kikha khuma inahiu ahi." 
Galatians3:24 Hitia chu tahsan vanga chonphat ichan theina dinguva, Christa henga eipui dinguva, danthu chu eikaihoi juva anapanga ahibouve." 
Galatians3:25 Tahsan thu hunglhun kal vang hin, chuche eikaihoi juva noija chu ihi tapouve." 
Galatians3:26 Christa Jesu'a natahsan uva kona chu nangho nabon chaova Pathen chate nahiu ahi. 
Galatians3:27 Nangho Christa-a baptize chang chengse chun nabon chaova Christa chu nakivonu ahitai. 
Galatians3:28 Hichea chun Juda mi Greek mi aumtapoi, soh leh sohlou aumtapoi, chule numei le pasal jong aumtapoi; Christa Jesu'a chun nabon chaovin pumkhat nahitaove." 
Galatians3:29 Chule nangho Christa-a nahiule Abraham son nahiuve, thutep bangtah-a chu gou lo ding nahiuve." 
Galatians4:1 Ahin keiman kasei chu, goulo ding chu chapang ahi laisen, imajouse pakai ahi jeng vangin, ama chu sohtoh imachom ahipoi;" 
Galatians4:2 Ahin apan athutep alhin phat kahsen, akaihoile a-inngahho thu noija aumjin ahi." 
Galatians4:3 Eiho jong chutobanga chu ichapan laijuva, vannoi leiset lekhajem bul noija sohchanga ina-umu ahi;" 
Galatians4:4 Ahivangin phat ahung lhintah-in, Pathen'in achapa chu numei sunga soh, danthu noija peng dingin ahin soltan;" 
Galatians4:5 Chapate hina ichan theina dinguva, danthu noija umho lhatdoh dingin." 
Galatians4:6 Chule nangho chate nahi jeh uva chu, Abba, Hepa, tia kouji Achapa Lhagao chu Pathen'in nalung sunguva ahinsol ahi." 
Galatians4:7 Hiche jeh-a chu nangma soh hita louva, chapa nahi ahitai; chule chapa nahile, Christa vanga Pathen goulo ding jong nahi." 
Galatians4:8 Ahi jeng vangin Pathen nahet lou laijuva chu, apen umchana pathen hilouho soh nanahiu ahi." 
Galatians4:9 Ahin tun Pathen nahet nunguva, ahiloule Pathen hetjong nahi nunguva, i-atileh lekhajem bul hatmotah soh-a lutkit dinga nakihei kit jenguham?" 
Galatians4:10 Nanghon ni, lha, kum kihei, kum nanit jiuvin ahi." 
Galatians4:11 Nangho dinga katohgimna ijem tin moh hinte, ti nangho dingin katijan ahi." 
Galatians4:12 Sopite, keima nangho banga kaumtah banghin, nangho keima bang hin umun tia kangeh nahiuve. Nanghon ahilouvin neibol pouvin ahi." 
Galatians4:13 Ahin katahsaphe hatmo jeh-a amasa-a Kipana Thupha nangho kahil chu nanghon naheuve. 
Galatians4:14 Kasa chunga nangho dinga lhepna um chu nahsahmon nabolpouvin, the jong nathe pouve; Pathen vantil khat bangle, Christa Jesu bang helin neinalem jouvin ahi." 
Galatians4:15 Chuti ahile chuche laija naseiju vangpha nakisah nao chu hoilam hitam? Na-umchan dol thu-u kahettohsah-a kasei ahi, hi theile namitchang sanu nakaldoh uva neipeh dingu ahi." 
Galatians4:16 Chuti ahile keiman najah uva thutah kasei jeh-a hi, nagalu kahi hitam?" 
Galatians4:17 Amahon apha lama tompan tah-a nangho naholu ahipoi; nanghon amaho nahol theina dinguva, nangho chu polama kha khumden ding angaitou ahibouve." 
Galatians4:18 Ahin a-imatih chana apha lam hola tompan hi aphai; nakom uva kaum pet jenga hilouvin, imatih chanin aphai." 
Galatians4:19 Kanaote, nangho-a Christa lim asodoh kahse-a, keiman nangho dinga naosonat kathoh kit ahi;" 
Galatians4:20 Chule tun nangho koma hunga aw chombeh-a thusei kanom ngeijin ahi; ajeh chu nangho chungchang thu kadatmoi. 
Galatians4:21 Vo danthu noija umnom teho, seijun, nanghon danthu hi najah khah lou uham?" 
Galatians4:22 Hitin akisune, Abraham'in chapa ni aneijin, asohnu sunga peng khat ahin, khat chu soh hilounu sunga peng ahi." 
Galatians4:23 Sohnu-a chu tahsaphe lam dola peng ahin, chamlhatnu-a vang chu thutep vanga penga ahi." 
Galatians4:24 Hiche thuhi tekahna ahi; ajehchu hiche hi kitepna ni ahi; khatjoh chu Sinai mola kon chule soh-a vul dinga cha hinga ahi; hichu Hagar ahi. 
Galatians4:25 Arabia gama min Hagar kiti chu Sinai mol kiseina ahi; chule tulaija um Jerusalem jong khu aseina ahi; amanu chu achate toh soh hitha-a ahi. 
Galatians4:26 Chunga um Jerusalem vang chu ongthola chamlhatnu chu ahin; hichu ipiu ahi. 
Galatians4:27 Ajehchu hitin akisune, Achinga chasoh lounu nangma kipah-in; Naosonat thoh lounu sangtah-in khosamin; Pasal neijonu sangin ahomkeova umnu chate atamjoi." 
Galatians4:28 Sopite, eiho jong Isaac banga thutep chate ihiuve;" 
Galatians4:29 Amavang chulai tahsaphe lam dola pengpa chun lhagao lam dola pengpa chu suhmang agot ahin, tu-a jong chutobang chu ahi." 
Galatians4:30 Ahinla Pathen lekhabun ipi atim? Sohnu chu achapatoh kaidohtha tan; ajehchu sohnu chapa chun chamlhatnu chapatoh gou lokhom ponte, ati." 
Galatians4:31 Chuti ahi jeh chun, sopite, sohnu hin chate ihipouve, chamlhatnu hin chatejoh ihiuve." 
Galatians5:1 Soh ihi louna dinguva Christan eilhatdoh-u ahitai: chuti ahi jeh chun dingdet jingun, soh namkoljona chun kihen oh kit hih-un." 
Galatians5:2 Veuvin, kei Paul'in kahinsei ahi, nanghon chep natan uva ahile, Christa chu nangho dinga imacha aphatchom sah louding ahi." 
Galatians5:3 Cheptan ho chengse hettohsah na-a kahinsei ahi, ama chun danthu apumpia bol ding abat jing ahi nalaije." 
Galatians5:4 Nangho danthua chonphat chan goho chengse chu, Christa-a kona kisepkhen nahitaove; nangho lungsetna kona pul lha-a nahitaove." 
Galatians5:5 Ajeh iham itile eiho Lhagao vanga tahsana chonphat chan kinema ngah ihiuve. 
Galatians5:6 Ajeh chu Christa Jesu'ah cheptan hi aphatsahna aumpon, cheptanlou jong hi ima ahidehpoi; ahin tahsan ngailutna-a tonga chu phachoma ahibouve." 
Galatians5:7 Nangho nalhaiju aphaname; thutah thua nun louna dinga koiham nasumovah? 
Galatians5:8 Hitobanga kijol lhah hi nakou paova kon ahipoi. 
Galatians5:9 Chol themkhat chan changbong lum apumpia apomsah ahi. 
Galatians5:10 Nanghon lung adang imacha neipouvinate, tia Pakaiya katahsan lheh nahiuvin ahi; ahinla nangho nasulonguva chu koi hile, achunga thu kitanna talen athoh tei ding ahi." 
Galatians5:11 Sopite, tu-a hi keima cheptan thu dol seile-a hileng, ibola bolsetna hi kathoh dingham? chutileh thingpel'a kipal lhuhna hi kisubei ding ahi." 
Galatians5:12 Nangho sulonga pangho chu amahole amaho kitanbongleu pha kasai. 
Galatians5:13 Sopite, nangho soh hilou ongthol dinga kikou nahiuve; amavang soh nahilounao na-onthol nao chu tahsa lama dingin agomkomin neidaovin, ahin ngailutna-in khatle khat kijento uvin." 
Galatians5:14 Naheng nakoma nangma bangtah-in ngailun, ti thua hi danthu jouse bukimsoh keija ahi." 
Galatians5:15 Amavang nangho kiketto saosaole kivalto saosao nahiu vangle, khat bola khat namanthah louna dingun chingtheijun." 
Galatians5:16 Keima vangin, Lhagaovin chonun, kati ahi, chutile tahsaphe lam lungtup chu subulhit lou ding nahiuve." 
Galatians5:17 Ijeh-inem itile tahsaphe lam lungtup chu Lhagao douna ahin, Lhagao tup tahsaphe lam douna ahi; chutia chu nanghon nalunggot bangu chu nabol louna dinguva, hiteni chu kidouva ahi lhone." 
Galatians5:18 Ahin nangho Lhagao pui nahiu vangle, danthu noija um louva nahiuve." 
Galatians5:19 Chule tahsaphe lam thilbol chengse vang chu akilange; hichu miji toh jon, jonthanhoi, thenlou, huh," 
Galatians5:20 Milim hou, doichoi, kidou, kinah kinel, kimitthip, lunghan, kiloset, kibungkhen, tahsan dihlou," 
Galatians5:21 Kithangset, toltha, jukham, eltol golnop bol, chule chutobang adang dang jong chu ahi; hichenga chu masanga kahilchah banguva chu masang peh-a kahilchah masah nahiuve, chutobanga chonho chun Pathen gam alo lou dingu ahi." 
Galatians5:22 Lhagao ga vang chu ngailut, kipa, cham, thohhat, mihepi, phat, tahsan umtah hi," 
Galatians5:23 Lungneng, amachang kitim, hicheng hi ahi; hitobangho chunga vang danthu aumpoi." 
Galatians5:24 Christa-a hiho chengse chun tahsaphe chu alungtuple, angaichat puma thingpel'a akhetbehthao ahitai." 
Galatians5:25 Eiho Lhagaova hinga ihiule, Lhagaovin chonuhite." 
Galatians5:26 Khatnin khat lunghan sah-in, chule khatle khat kithangset ton, panna beijin hoitho pouhite." 
Galatians6:1 Sopite, mi khattou suhkhel neija auma athemona kimandoh aumle, lhagao mi nanghon lungnem tah-in chutobang mi chu boldamun, nangma kiven ajole nangma jong lhepna-a lhakha nate." 
Galatians6:2 Nangho khatle khat pohgih kipohhu uvin, chutichun Christa danthu nit bukim sohkeijun." 
Galatians6:3 Mi khattou ikhat hia kingaito-a, imachala hilou chu, ama kilhemlha-a ahi." 
Galatians6:4 Ahin, mitinin ama ama natoh kipatep chehhen, chutile ama changa thua kisonna ding mun anei ding ahi, mi dang thua hilouvin." 
Galatians6:5 Ajeh chu mitinin ama ama poh cheh akipoh ding ahi. 
Galatians6:6 Pathen thu kihila mi chun ahilpa chu thilpha lam dol jouse chankhom pihen. 
Galatians6:7 Nangho dohan lha hih-un; Pathen chu nelpeh dan ahipoi; ajeh iham itile mihemin aman atu tu chu a-at ding ahi. 
Galatians6:8 Ajeh chu tahsa lam dola tupa chun tahsaphe-a kona kemmang thei ga alo ding; Lhagao lama tupa vang chun Lhagaova kona tonsot hin kemlou ga chu alo ding ahi. 
Galatians6:9 Thilpha bolna lamah chimtih nei louvin umu hite, ilhahdah louvule aphatcha ilo dingu ahi." 
Galatians6:10 Hiche jeh chun hungun, aphat achang agomkom inei bang dol cheh-in, mi jouse chunga thilpha boluhite; ahideh-in eima insung mi atahsanho chungah haboldeh uhite." 
Galatians6:11 Veuvin, keima kakhut tah-in jem khoutah-in nangho henga lekha kahinsune." 
Galatians6:12 Atahsa vet hoisah goho chengsen cheptan dinga nabol khoh-u ahi; hichu imadang dinga ahipoi, Christa thingpel jala bolset chu athoh louna dinguva ahibouve." 
Galatians6:13 Ajeh chu cheptan tah mongho jeng jongin danthu anitdeh pouve, natahsao chu kisonna-a anei theina dinguva, cheptansah dinga nagotjiu ahibouve." 
Galatians6:14 Keivang I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa thingpel tailou chu thu dang imacha song hihhel ingkate; Ama vanga chu vannoi keima dinga chule keima vannoi dinga thingpel'a kikhenbeh kahitai. 
Galatians6:15 Ajeh iham itile cheptan chu imacha ahipoi, cheptanlou jong imacha ahipoi; Christa Jesu'a kisem thah bou chu thu ahi." 
Galatians6:16 Chule chuto bang chona-a chonte chunga le, Pathen mi Israelte chungah lungmon chule lungset umhen." 
Galatians6:17 Tu-a kalvang koiman eisulung gim tahih hen; ajeh chu kati chunga hi Pakai Jesu melchihna pole-a kahi. 
Galatians6:18 Sopiteho, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungset chu nangho lhagaotoh umhen. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Pathen lungchama Christa Jesu solchah Paul'in Ephesia'a um mithengho chule Christa Jesu'a tahsanteho hengah. 
Ephesians1:2 I-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin lungsetnale lungmon naheng uva umhen. 
Ephesians1:3 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pale Pathen vahchoijin umhen; aman eiho lhagao phattheina tintangin Christa-a vanho-ah phatthei eichanui; 
Ephesians1:4 Ajeh chu aman vannoi bul phudoh masanga pat, ama anga ngailutna le thenga chule nolna beihela i-um theina dinguva, eiho einalhen dohsao ahin;" 
Ephesians1:5 Jesu Christa vanga alamcha dinga einagot masahsao ahi; hichu ama lunggotle lungdeilam bang dungjuija," 
Ephesians1:6 Amilungset loupi vahchoi dinga, hichea chu adeitah te hidinga, lahtheija eisemu ahitai." 
Ephesians1:7 Hiche alungdei vanga chu eiho, athisana kilhatdoh ihiuva, lungsetna ahao dungjuija, ichonsetnao jouse ngaidam ichanu ahitai;" 
Ephesians1:8 Hiche lungsetna-a chu, aman chihnale lunggel themtah chu eivuhdimu ahitai." 
Ephesians1:9 Chutia chu aman alung ngaitole alung deilam dol dungjuija, alunggil thuguh chu eiho eihetsah-un, aphat lhin tenga dinga ama-a gotsa akoi ahi;" 
Ephesians1:10 Hichu van ho-a thil chengsele leija um thil chengse, ania Christa-a gop khomsohna dinga ahi." 
Ephesians1:11 Chule masanga patna Christa-a kinema kingaija eiho, eihoa kona ama loupi vahchoina aso theina dinga," 
Ephesians1:12 Alunggot dungjui tah-a ijakai bolpa chun, ama lunggot dolla einagotsao ahijeh-in, eihon jong ama jal-in goulo theina imutaove." 
Ephesians1:13 Ama chu nanghon jong thutah, huhhing-a umna Thupha chu najah uva, ama natahsan uva, thutepsa Lhagao Thenga mohor kinama nahitaove;" 
Ephesians1:14 Hichu, achohsa ho lhatdoh nikho kahse-a, aloupi vahchoi dinga, igoulo diu khamgahna ahi." 
Ephesians1:15 Hijeh chun Pakai Jesu'a natahsan naole, mithengte nangailut nao thu kajan," 
Ephesians1:16 keiman jong nangho jal-in katao chanin tang louvin kathangvah jinge; 
Ephesians1:17 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pathen, loupina Pa chun, ama hetna lama chihnale, thukilah hetdoh them theina lhagao napehna dingun," 
Ephesians1:18 Eikounao kinepna hi ipi ahi, mithengho lah-a goulo ding loupina ahaoje chu ipi ahi," 
Ephesians1:19 atahsana eiho dinga athahat, athilbolthei chungnunje nahet theina dinguva, nalung mitnu vahsah-a auma, athahat athilbol theina dungjuija," 
Ephesians1:20 Aman Christa-a abola, athiho lah-a kona akaithouva van ho-a ama jet lama atousah ahitai;" 
Ephesians1:21 Vaipipu hi, thuneina, thahat thilboltheina, vainei, chule min kisah jouse chunga chungnung pen ahi, tu hiche vannoi leiset jenga hilouva, khonunga hung lhung dinga jong ahi;" 
Ephesians1:22 Chule aman thil jouse ama thu noija akengto noija akoisoh ahi, chule houbung chu thil jouse luchang hina apeh ahi;" 
Ephesians1:23 Hichu ama tahsa ahia, ama dimset banga ijakaija ijakai adimsah ahi." 
Ephesians2:1 Chule nangho nathemmo naole nachonset naova nathi pettah uva Pathen'in nahinsah-u ahitai. 
Ephesians2:2 Hichenga chu hiche vannoi leiset chon ngai dola hinga, vanlaijola thuneitah vaipo, tulai thua nungloute lah-a natonga lhagao, puilea chu masang laise-a chu anachonle-a nahiu ahi;" 
Ephesians2:3 Hicheho lah-a chu eiho jong ibon chaova tahsaphe lamle ilunggot chan suhbukima, tahsaphe ngaichat thu lama inachonu ahi; chule adang dangho banga apen monga lunghanna chate inahiu ahi;" 
Ephesians2:4 Ahivangin mihepi khotona haotah Pathen'in ngailutna lentah-a eingailutnu ahi. 
Ephesians2:5 Hiche jeh-a chu themo-a ithi laitah uva Christa toh thakhatna einahin sah-u ahitai; lungsetna vanga huhhing-a umna naneiju ahitai; 
Ephesians2:6 Chule Christa Jesu vanga eihepiu hi, khonunga phat hung lhung dinga chu amilungset hao chungnunje phongdoh dinga," 
Ephesians2:7 Hiche nadinga chu Christa Jesu vanga amatoh thakhatna eikaithouvu ahitai, chule vanmun ho-a eitousah-u ahitai." 
Ephesians2:8 Lungset mana tahsan vanga huhhing-a uma nahitaove; hichu nangho-a kon ahipoi, Pathen thilpehjoh ahibouve;" 
Ephesians2:9 Koimacha kison thei louna dinga, hichu thilbol vanga hilou ahi." 
Ephesians2:10 Ajeh chu eiho ama khutsoh ihiuve; chule ichonphatna dinguva, masanga patna Pathen'in agotsa chuche chonphatna dinga chu Christa Jesu'a kisema ihiuve." 
Ephesians2:11 Hiche jeh chun tahsaphe dola chidang namdang mi, tahsa-a khutna cheptana kona cheptan min poho lah-a cheptanlou tia kisei nangho," 
Ephesians2:12 nangho masang laija chu Christa-a kona achom nahiu ahin, Israelte toh kitimat lou nahiuvin, thutep chonna danho chengsetoh kinepna beile Pathen beija hiche vannoi leisetna hi uma nahiuve, hichu geldoh-un." 
Ephesians2:13 Tu vangin masanga nagamlat vangun, Christa Jesu'a naum jeh uva Christa thisan vanga chu anaija nahitaove." 
Ephesians2:14 Ajeh chu ama chu eiho kichamna ahi, aman daltanna banglai chu aphetlhah-a, ania chu pumkhat aso ahitai," 
Ephesians2:15 Chonna ngaidan thupeh chu, kidouna chu atahsa-a asuhbei ahitai; chutia chu aman ama-a mi ni chu mi thah khat asosahna dinga asuhcham ahi;" 
Ephesians2:16 Chule chutia chu kidouna chu thingpel'a atha-a, ania chu Pathen'a dinga akichamsahna dinga abola;" 
Ephesians2:17 Chule ama hunga, gamlatah nangho hengle anaiho henga chamna ahung seile ahi;" 
Ephesians2:18 Ajeh iham itile ama vanga chu eiho iloiniuva, Lhagao khatna Pa anga umna thei thu ineiju ahi." 
Ephesians2:19 Hiche jeh chun tu-a kalin nangho maljinle khopem nahitapouve; mithengte chenkhompi, chule Pathen insung mite nahitaove;" 
Ephesians2:20 Chule Christa amatah inning song ahin, solchah ho le themgaoho songset chunga nangho kisadoh nahiuve;" 
Ephesians2:21 In kisa jouse chu amatoh kijop cheh ahin, houin theng hidinga Pakaiya khangtou in nahiu ahi;" 
Ephesians2:22 Ama-a chu nangho chengse jong thakhatna kisakhom nahiuvin. Lhagaova Pathen chenna khat hidoh-a nahiuve. 
Ephesians3:1 Hiche jeh-a chu chidang namdang hija nangho, nangho dinga keima Paul Christa Jesu sohchang hi," 
Ephesians3:2 nangho dinga Pathen lungset eikichinsah ahia," 
Ephesians3:3 thu kilah-a kona athugil chengse keima eikihetsah chu najahsao ahitan, (hiche banga chu chunga paltana kahinsut ahi;" 
Ephesians3:4 Nanghon hichu simleu chun Christa thugil kahetje dan hi heuvin nate); 
Ephesians3:5 Tu-a solchah thenghole athemgaoho henga Lhagaova kona akiphondoh banga hi, malaija mihem chate henga chu ana kihetsah lou ahi;" 
Ephesians3:6 Hiche thugil chu Kipana Thupha vanga chidang namdangho, Christa goulo khompiho, tahsaphe-a kihoppi thutep chan khompi ahiuvin," 
Ephesians3:7 Athilbol theina-a anatoh dungjuitah-a, man beija Pathen lungsetna eikipeh bangtah-a, Kipana Thupha lhacha-a pang kahi." 
Ephesians3:8 Holdoh hoi hilou Christa haona chu chidang namdang ho henga seiphongle dinga, mithengte lah-a alhumpen sanga jong neojo keima hiche lungsetna hi eikipea ahitai." 
Ephesians3:9 Jesu Christa jala thil jouse sema Pathen na, leiset semtila patna kisella um thuguh chu mijouse musah dinga," 
Ephesians3:10 Pathen chihna jat chom chomhi van munho pipule thuneina neiho, tu-a houbung'a kona hetsahna dinga," 
Ephesians3:11 I-Pakaiyu Christa Jesu'a tonsotna dinga angaitoa aphudet dungjuija chu," 
Ephesians3:12 eihon ama itahsan vanguva ama-a chu lung ngama, chule ginchat neitah-a lut theina thu aneiju ahitai." 
Ephesians3:13 Hiche jeh-a chu hiche hi kataona ahi, nangho dinga kagenthei kahesohna jouse jal hin lungthoi hih-un kati ahi: hichu naloupi nao ahi." 
Ephesians3:14 Hiche jeh-a chu van'a le leija um phungtin-in, Pa-a kona kiminvona aneiju," 
Ephesians3:15 hiche I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa anga chu dilsua, hichenga hi taojia kahi." 
Ephesians3:16 Aman loupina ahao dungjuija, Alhagaova athahat athilbol theina-a mi sungnung chu ahatsah-a," 
Ephesians3:17 chule tahsan vanga Christa chu nangho lung sunga achensah theija, nangho ngailutna-a najungkhova nabul neijuva," 
Ephesians3:18 chule mithengte jousetoh ajaojele asaoje asanje, athuhje, nahettoh theina dinguva," 
Ephesians3:19 hetphahhoi hilou Christa ngailutna chu nahet theijuva, Pathen chamkimna jouse-a nangho nachamkim theina dingu ahi, kati." 
Ephesians3:20 Chutihen lang athahat thilbol thei eihoa natongjia chun, athahat athilbol theina dungjuija, ithumule ilung ngaito jouseu sanga nasajo-a abol theina dingin," 
Ephesians3:21 houbung'a le Christa Jesu'a atonsot atonsotnin akhang akhangin loupin umjing hen. Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 Chuti ahi jeh-a chu Pakaiya sohchang keima naheng uva kahung tao ahi, Nangho nakikou naotoh kitoh-in chonun;" 
Ephesians4:2 Chonnemna bukimin, lung nemtoh, thohhattoh thon chonun; ngailutna-in khatle khat kingaithemun," 
Ephesians4:3 Chamna-in kikanun, Lhagaova pumkhat hina dingin kihabolun." 
Ephesians4:4 Tipum khat ahin chule Lhagao khat ahi; hiche banga chu nakikouvu jong chu kinepna khatna kikou nahiuve; 
Ephesians4:5 Pakai khat, tahsan khat, baptize chan khat ahi," 
Ephesians4:6 Chule mi jouse Pa leh Pathen khatsehbou ahi; ama imajouse chunga ahin, hoima jouse-a um ahi, chule nangho sung jouse-a um ahi." 
Ephesians4:7 Ahinla Christa thilpeh teptena dan dungjuija eiho khat cheh lungsetna eipeh-u ahitai. 
Ephesians4:8 Hijeh chun Pathen lekhabun aseije, Ama chung sanga akaltou chun, Gal-hinga kiman mihonpi gal hingin akaitan ahi, Chule miho jong thilpehho apen ahi." 
Ephesians4:9 Ahile, Akaltouvin, ati hi leiset noinung geijah akumlha masan ahi, ti lou adang ipi kisei naham?" 
Ephesians4:10 Akumlha-a chu ijakai subukipsoh dinga vanho jouse chung vuma kaltouva ahi. 
Ephesians4:11 Chule aman abang solchah, abang themgao, abang Kipana Thupha lhangsam, abang chinghoi kaihoi, abang mihil hina apeh ahi;" 
Ephesians4:12 Hichu lhacha natong dinga mithengho pi lhinsahna ding, Christa tahsa chu khantousahna dinga," 
Ephesians4:13 Eiho tahsan thakhat ihiuva, Pathen Chapa thudola hetna ineijuva, mi khan kilhit ihiuva, Christa pilhin dungchan iphah masangseuva dinga ahi." 
Ephesians4:14 Chutia chu miho gitlou lungthim doha lha-a suhkhelna dinga, puichat vaija uma chule thuhil hui lhoh lonle chapang ihi thei lou dingu ahitai;" 
Ephesians4:15 Chuti sang chun luchang hija Christa ama-a chu imalam jouse-a ikhan touna dingun, ngailutna-in thutah seijuhite;" 
Ephesians4:16 Ama-a kona tahsa pumpi hi kitoh cheh-a kisuto-a kikilmat khom ahin, hichea chu gu kisuhtona chengsen tibah dangdang ho natohna apeh dan dungjui cheh-a, tahsa pum chu ngailutna-a kisadoh dinga akhantousah ahi." 
Ephesians4:17 Hijeh-a chu hiche hi kasei ahi, Pakaiya hiche hi kahettohsah nahiuve, chidang namdang ten lungchavai aput dungjuijuva achon bangun chonta hih-un;" 
Ephesians4:18 Amaho chu ahetna lungu thima ahin, Pathen hinna peh chu chang lou ahitaove, asunguva het louna auma, alungu tah jeh chun;" 
Ephesians4:19 Amaho lungmoh hiuva ahile, thilthenglou tincheng bolna dinga, lop lamle papset lama kipe-a ahiuve." 
Ephesians4:20 Nangho vang chutia chu Christa kihilla nahipouve," 
Ephesians4:21 Jesu'a uma thutah dungjuija chu athu chu jatasa nahiuva ama-a kihila nahiule; 
Ephesians4:22 Chutichun nanghon masang laija chonna dol lama chon, doha lheplhah, gitlou lung gula haset chehcheh mi lui chu pailhauvin;" 
Ephesians4:23 Chule chutichun nalhagao lungthimun kithah semun," 
Ephesians4:24 Chule Pathen lim banga chonphatna le thenna dihtah-a kisem mithah chu kivonun. 
Ephesians4:25 Hijeh chun nanghon jou pailhauvin, amitakip aheng akomtoh thutah jengchan kihou cheh hen; ajeh chu eiho khat khat hi khat tibah hicheh ihiuve." 
Ephesians4:26 Lung chu lunghangun, ahin chonse hih-un; nalunghan nao chu nisan lhumkhum hihhen." 
Ephesians4:27 Chule diabol chu mun ot hih helun. 
Ephesians4:28 Agucha-a gucha kit ta hihhen; ahin alhasama ato theina dingin, akhut tah-in napha tong gimhen." 
Ephesians4:29 Nakam uva konin thuse soh hihhen, ahin aja chan lungsetna hop theina dingin, ngaichat doltah-a hou thu lama khantou theina dingin thupha sohjohen." 
Ephesians4:30 Lhatdoh nikho-a dinga mohor nakinam nao Pathen Lhagao Theng chu, lungphat mosah hih-un." 
Ephesians4:31 Lung damlouna jouse, lunghan, lungsat, kinah, kitaitom, hichengse chule gitlou engsetna jouse nangho-a konin koimangun;" 
Ephesians4:32 Chule nangho kihepito cheh-un; lungnemun Pathen'in Christa-a nangho nangaidam bangu chun, khatle khat kingai damun." 
Ephesians5:1 Chuti ahi jeh chun chate dei bangtah-in, Pathen umchan jom hiuvin;" 
Ephesians5:2 Chule Christan nangho nangailut bangu chun, ngailutna-in chonun; ama nangho dinga Pathen lama maichama thilpeh gimnamtui banga kipe-a ahi." 
Ephesians5:3 Ahin mithengte chonna doltah-in, jon thule thenlouna tintang chule papset nalah uva kiphapoh hihhen;" 
Ephesians5:4 Chule jamo, thumotsei, totthanghoi, hicheng jong chu nalah uva um hihhen; Pathen thangvahna umjohen." 
Ephesians5:5 Ajeh chu Christa le Pathen gam sunga chu mi jonpan, mi thenglou, mi papse, milim hou, hicheng chu ima achan dingu aumpoi, ti chu kichenin naheuve." 
Ephesians5:6 Mohthu ahomkeovin koima kilhep lhahsah hih-un; hitiho jeh chun thua nunglou chateho chungah Pathen lunghan achujin ahi. 
Ephesians5:7 Hijeh chun nanghon chutiho chu kikoppi hih-un. 
Ephesians5:8 Ijeh-inem itile nangho khatvei chu muthim nahiu ahin, tu vangin Pakaiya khovah nahiu ahitai; khovah chate bangin chonun;" 
Ephesians5:9 Ajeh chu Lhagao ga chu phatna jouse, chonphatna, chule thutah ahi;" 
Ephesians5:10 Pakai lunglhaina ding lam photoh-un; 
Ephesians5:11 Ahin muthim natohho ga neilou chu kikoppi hih-un; amaho chu sosalun phohsal jovin; 
Ephesians5:12 Ajeh chu amaho guhthim natohho chu sei ding jong jachat umleu ahi; 
Ephesians5:13 Ajeh chu ijakai phongjala khovah ahijeh chun, akisosal jouse chu khovah chun aphongjal jitai." 
Ephesians5:14 Hijeh chun aman, Vo imumil, khangin, chule athi lah-a konin thoudoh-in; chutengle Christan nangma nasalvah ding ahi, ati." 
Ephesians5:15 Hijeh chun iti nachonum, chingtheijun kihongphauvin; mi lung beiho banga chon louvin, michingho bangin chonun;" 
Ephesians5:16 Tulai nikho hi aphat lou jeh hin, phat kijen petcha hi kichoh-un." 
Ephesians5:17 Hiche jeh chun lungthim beijin um hih-un, Pakai lunglam ipi ahi heuvin." 
Ephesians5:18 Chule lengpitwi jin kham hih-un; hichea chun setna aume; ahin Lhagaovin dimset jovin; 
Ephesians5:19 Tumging toh tho lan, hou lan chule lhagao lan kihoulimun; nalunggilun Pakai dingin kitohdelin longdelin la saovin;" 
Ephesians5:20 Imatih chanin imalam jouse-a dingin I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa minin Pa Pathen thangvah jingun; 
Ephesians5:21 Pathen janan khat thun khat nungun. 
Ephesians5:22 Numei ho, nangho Pakai thu noija bangin na-inneipu chengu thu noija umun;" 
Ephesians5:23 Ajeh iham itile Christa houbung luchang ahi banga chu, inneipu jong numei luchang ahi; ama tahsa huhhing-a jong ahi." 
Ephesians5:24 Ahin houbung Christa thu noija aum bang chun, numei ho jong imalam jouse-a a-inneipu cheh-u thunoija um cheh-u hen." 
Ephesians5:25 Inneipu ho Christan houbung angailut bangle, ajeh-a ama akipehdoh jeng bangtah chun, nanghon jong na-inneipite chengu ngailuvin;" 
Ephesians5:26 Aman twija asilngima, thua asuhthengna dinga, ama kipedoh jeng ahi." 
Ephesians5:27 Hichu boh beh louhel le avoi kom beihela, thengtah le nolna beihela, a houbung chu loupitah-a ama anga aumsahna dinga ahi." 
Ephesians5:28 Chuti ahi jeh chun innei puhon jong a-inneipite chengu, ama ama tahsa banga angailut dingu ahi. Koi hile a-inneipi ngailu-a chu ama kingailua ahi." 
Ephesians5:29 Ajeh chu imatih chanin koiman ama tahsa ahotbol khapoi; avah khangin ahebol bouve. Pakaiyin houbung abolna bang chun. 
Ephesians5:30 Ajehchu, eiho aphele agu-a kon, atibah ihiuve." 
Ephesians5:31 Hijeh-a chu min anu apa adalhah-a ajia beh ding ahi, chule amani chu tikhat hilhon ding ahi." 
Ephesians5:32 Hiche thugil hi giltah ahi; ahivangin keiman Christa le houbung thua kasei ahi. 
Ephesians5:33 Hijongle nangho changval cheh-in na-inneipi chengu nangma naki ngailut bangin ngailuvin; chule inneipi chun a-inneipu aja ding sumil hihhen. 
Ephesians6:1 Chateho, Pakaiyah nanu napau thun nungun; hichu chondih ahi." 
Ephesians6:2 Nanu napa jabolin; hichehi thutep togoma thupeh masa ahi; 
Ephesians6:3 Chutile naphat theija leiset chunga nahinkho sotding ahi. 
Ephesians6:4 Chule pateho, nanghon nachate chengu sulunghang hih-un; Pakai thuhila chon kichuhna le tilkhouna lamin seiletsah jovin." 
Ephesians6:5 Sohteho, nangho Christa thu noija naum bangu chun, kichatle kitihot pumpumin, lung jangkeijin tahsa lama napakai te chengu thu noija umun;" 
Ephesians6:6 Mihem lunglhaisah nadinga mitmu soh hilouvin, lungsunga kona Pathen lunglam bola Christa soh bang hiuvin;" 
Ephesians6:7 Mihem lama hilouvin, Pakai lama phatna lunggela napha tong hiuvin;" 
Ephesians6:8 Amitakip, soh hihen, soh hilou hijongle, koi hile thilpha bol chan chun, hiche mama chu Pakaiya kona asan kit ding chu heuvin." 
Ephesians6:9 Chule pakaiho, chutobangma chun amaho chu bolun, amahole nangho nagom uva na-Pakaiyu chu van'ah aumin, chule aman mi koima datle langkaina aneipoi, ti heuvin lang, hutum gihsal boldaovin." 
Ephesians6:10 Achai nakeijin, sopite, Pakaiyah chule athahat athilbol theina-a chun hatnun." 
Ephesians6:11 Diabol lungthim gilou tincheng masanga nadin jou theina dingun, Pathen galvon chengse kivonun," 
Ephesians6:12 Ajeh chu eiho tahsaphe le thisantoh kibon ihipouve; pipuho toh, thahat thuneiho toh, hiche vannoi muthim vaipoho toh, vanmun ho-a lhagao gilou engsehotoh kibonjoh ihiuve." 
Ephesians6:13 Hijeh chun nikho phalounia nalethuh jouna dingule, ijakai nabukip sohkeijuva nadindet theina dingun, Pathen galvon chengse panun." 
Ephesians6:14 Hiti chun thutah-in kong kigah-un, chonphatna ompho kiah-un;" 
Ephesians6:15 Chule gotsa chamna Kipana Thupha kengchot kiseuvin dingun; 
Ephesians6:16 Chucheng chunga chun tahsan lum panun, agiloupa thalpi meikong tobang ho jouse chu nasuhmit jouna dingun." 
Ephesians6:17 Chule huhhingna lukhuh chu kilah-un, Lhagao chemjam panun, hichu Pathen thu ahi." 
Ephesians6:18 Taona jousele thumna tintangtoh thon a-imatih chanin Lhagaovin tao jingun, chule hichena ding chun mithengte jouse dingin thohhat le thumna jouse thon hichea chun kiging jingun." 
Ephesians6:19 Chule keima dingin jong paodohna dingdola thuseidohna eikipeh theija, chutia chu Kipana Thupha thugil hi hakat tah-a kaseiphonga, kahetsah theina dingin, neitaokop jingun;" 
Ephesians6:20 Hiche dinga chu thihkhaova kihena leng palai natonga kahi, hichea hi hakat tah-a kaseidol kasei theina dingin." 
Ephesians6:21 Keima thudol, iti kaum ipi kabol, nahetna dingun Pakaiya lhacha tahsan umtah sopidei Tychicus, ama hin ijakai nahetsah naovinte." 
Ephesians6:22 Keima umchan dol thu nahetna dingule, aman nangho nalhamon theina dinguva, hiche lungngaito-a chu keiman ama hi naheng uva kahinsol ahi." 
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin, sopite henga lungmonle tahsan chule ngailut umkhom hen." 
Ephesians6:24 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa kemthei louva ngailuho chengse chu lungsetna hin umpihen, Amen." 
Philippians1:1 Jesu Christa sohteni Paul le Timothy'in Philippi'a um Christa Jesu'a mithengte jouse hengle aumpiu houvaipole lhachaho henga; 
Philippians1:2 I-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin lungsetle lungmon naheng uva umhen. 
Philippians1:3 Nangho kageldoh chanin a-imatih chanin Pathen kathangvah jingin; 
Philippians1:4 Kataona jouse-a nangho nabon chaova dingin kipahtah-in kataojin ahi. 
Philippians1:5 Amasapen nikho-a patna tuni geija Kipana Thupha-a neikiloi khompi jeh-un; 
Philippians1:6 Nangho sunga thilpha pandoh-a ama chun Christa nikho ni geija abol molso ding ahi ti dettah-in kagingchai; 
Philippians1:7 Chule nangho nabon chaova thudola keiman lung kahiti gel hi adih lam ahi; ajeh chu nangho kalung sunga kavop jing nahiuve; hiche jeh-a chu keima bulput thudola chule Kipana Thupha lama pana kihonna thuseile phudetna lam thudola, nangho nabon chaova keimatoh lungsetna kachan khompi nahiuve." 
Philippians1:8 Ajehchu Jesu Christa milungset na-a chu nangho nabon chaova iti kangaiju hitam ti eihettoh peh-a Pathen ahi. 
Philippians1:9 Chule keima hichena ding hin kataoji, nami ngailutnao chu hetna le gelkhen themna adima akhantou cheh akhantou cheh-a;" 
Philippians1:10 Chutia chu nanghon thil aphatah chu naphottoh theijuva; lung kitah-a chule suhkhel beihela Christa nikho ni geija naum uva; 
Philippians1:11 Pathen loupina le vahchoina dinga Jesu Christa-a kona umdoh chonphat ga chu nadimsetna dingun. 
Philippians1:12 Sopiteho, nanghon hiche thuhi heleu chun kalung ahi, keima chunga thu soh chengse hi Kipana Thupha chalna dingjoh-a hung soh ahi;" 
Philippians1:13 Kabulput hi leng in jouse le mundang jouse-a Christa jala ahi ti chu akiphongtan ahi; 
Philippians1:14 Chule sopite atamjon kabulput amuvin Pakai tahsan dettah-in, kicha louhelin thu asei angamui." 
Philippians1:15 Atabbeh-in abangin mitthipna le kinelnan Christa chu aseiphong leuvin, chule abangin lungngeijin aseiphong leuvin ahi;" 
Philippians1:16 Loikhat chun kabulput chunga hi bolgentheija kaumna ding ngaitonan, lungdihtah pu-a hilouvin, chonoh nadingin aseiphong leuvin:" 
Philippians1:17 Adangho vang chun keima hi Kipana Thupha honna-a kitung kahi hi aheuvin, ngailutna neijah abolun ahi." 
Philippians1:18 Achutia itiam? Phatlhemin hihen, thutah-in hijongle, itihen iti jongle Christa chu kiseiphonga ahi: chule hichea hin kakipah-e, henge, kakipa ding ahi." 
Philippians1:19 Ajehchu hiche hi nangho taona le Jesu Christa Lhagao thilpeh vanga huhhing-a kaumna hung hi ding ahi ti kahei; 
Philippians1:20 Chutengle kalung tuple kakinepna dungjuija hi imacha-a kajachat louding ahi; ahinla a-imatih chana hakat tah-a kaum jingji banga chu tu-a jong kati chunga hi thina hihen hinna hileh, Christa chu choisanga umding ahi." 
Philippians1:21 Ajeh chu keima dingin hin chu Christa ahin chule thi chu hamphatna ahi. 
Philippians1:22 Ahinla tahsa-a hin hi keima ding tohga sona ahivangle, lhen dingjoh kahepoi:" 
Philippians1:23 Ahin ni kah-a lunggima uma kahi; kipatdoh-a Christa toh umkhom chu kalung ahi; ijeh-inem itile hichu gamchenga pha chungnungjo ahi: 
Philippians1:24 Ahinla tahsa-a um chu nangho dinga khohjo cheh ahi. 
Philippians1:25 Chule nakhantouna dingule tahsan na-a nakipana dinguva kaum nalaiding, nabon chaova kaumpi ding nahiuve ti ginchat hi kaneije;" 
Philippians1:26 Chutia chu nangho henga keima hung kit vanga keima-a dinga Christa Jesu'a nakipanao chu adimsetna dingin. 
Philippians1:27 Nanun nakhannu, nakhosah danu chu Christa Kipana Thupha toh kitoh pou pouhen; chutichun keima hungin hung mu jongleng, ahiloule umhih jeng jongleng, na-umchanu lhagao khattah-a nadindet jinguva, lung khattah-a Kipana Thupha ginchatna lama kisehtena na-umu thu chu janange." 
Philippians1:28 Chule nadouteu chu imachan kisuh lung linglausah hih-un; hichu amaho dinga manthah na photchena ahi; ahin nangho ding vangin Pathen'a kona huhhing-a umna ahi. 
Philippians1:29 Ajeh chu Christa-a tahsan jenga hilouva, ama dinga hesoh gentheisan thoh dinga jong, nangho lungsetna thilpeh kipe-a nahitaove." 
Philippians1:30 Nanghon masanga kagalsatje dan chu namusao ahin, tun jong najaove, nangho-a jong chutobang chu uma ahi." 
Philippians2:1 Hijeh chun Christa-a kitilkhou na auma, lungmonsah thei ngailutna auma, Lhagao pankhompina auma, lungnema lungsetna le khoto lainatpina auma ahile," 
Philippians2:2 Kakipana hi subukimun, chutichun Lungthim kithakhat, ngailut kithakhat hiuvinlang, thukhat kisaovin, lungkhat hiuvin;" 
Philippians2:3 Kilung douna le kiloupisah na-a kona imacha bol louvin, lungnem heochan khatnin adang chu ama sanga phajoa gel cheh hiuvin;" 
Philippians2:4 Amitakipmin nangma nangma-a cheh ding jenga thil ve louvin, adangho ding jong veuvin." 
Philippians2:5 Christa Jesu'a uma hiche lungput chu nangho sunga jong neijun; 
Philippians2:6 Ama chu Pathen lima uma ahin, Pathen toh kikottena aum chu, kikolchah jing jeng lung angaitopoi;" 
Philippians2:7 Ahin ama akisunem min, soh limin aumin, mihem bangin akisemtan ahi;" 
Philippians2:8 Chule alimso amelput umchan mihem'a bang bangin aumin, ama le ama akineosah-in, thina gei, thingpel'a thina geisanin thun anunge." 
Philippians2:9 Hijeh-a chu Pathen'in sangtah-a achoisanga, chule min jouse sanga min chungnung chu apeh ahitai:" 
Philippians2:10 Hitia chu Jesu mina mijouse van'a cheng hihen, leisetna cheng hihen, leinoi'a cheng hijongle, akhup uva dilsu uva;" 
Philippians2:11 Pa Pathen loupina dinga lei jousen Jesu Christa chu Pakai ahi ti aphondoh ding ahi. 
Philippians2:12 Hijeh chun kangaitah te, nanghon sei nangai jing bangu chun, keima um petna bang hilouvin, tu keima umlou pet hin kicha le kithing thingin huhhing-a na-umnao chu tongdoh-un." 
Philippians2:13 Ajeh chu alung deilam tupna dingle tohdoh nadinga nasunguva natonga chu Pathen ahi. 
Philippians2:14 Phunchel louhel le kinel baotam louhelin imajouse bolun; 
Philippians2:15 Chutia chu nolna beile suhsetbei Pathen chate nahidoh theijuva, khang lamvaile vahkoiho lah-a nolna beihela naum uva, vannoi'a alah uva meivah banga kilang nahina dingun," 
Philippians2:16 Hinna thu chu dom sangun; chutia chu moh lhaija kahilou, moh tohgim jong kahilou chu Christa nikho nileh kisonna kanei theina dingin." 
Philippians2:17 Ahi, na ganlhaina chungu le natahsan pehdohna uva chun todoh-in um jongleng kipah ding kahi; chule nangho jouse toh kakipa ding ahi." 
Philippians2:18 Chule chutima chun nangho kipah-un, keima jong neikipa piuvin." 
Philippians2:19 Nangho umchan kahettoh-a keima jong kalungmon nadinga chomkhat joule Timothy naheng uva hinsol dinghi Pakai Jesu'a kakinepna ahi. 
Philippians2:20 Ajehchu keima tobanga lungtheng sela nangho khankho ding gel ama tobang koima aumpoi. 
Philippians2:21 Ijeh inem itile mijousen Jesu Christa-a ding hol louvin, amaho deilam cheh aholun ahi." 
Philippians2:22 Ahin nanghon ama chu kipatepma aphat kiphochen ahi chu naheuve, hichu chapan apa atohhu banga ama hi keimatoh kitho-a Kipana Thupha jala natong ahi." 
Philippians2:23 Chuti ahi jeh chun ikati akihet phat phatle ama hi hinsol leng tin kakineme; 
Philippians2:24 Keima jeng jong chomkhat joule hunginge ti hi Pakaiya katahsan lheh jenge. 
Philippians2:25 Ahivangin kangaichat koma eijenlea pang nangho thupole, kasopi, kanatoh na-a kakithopi, kasepai chanpi Epaphroditus, ama hi naheng uva hinsol khoh kasatai." 
Philippians2:26 Aman jong nangho nabon chaova mu alunggot lheh jeng ahi; nanghon ama anai ti thu najah-u chu alunghimo lheh jenge. 
Philippians2:27 Chule tahtah-a na-a thita vang ahi: ahivangin Pathen'in alungsetnin; ama chang jeng hilouva keima jong eilungset ahi; achuti loule keiman kagenthei hesohna chunga genthei hesoh kathoh ding ahi. 
Philippians2:28 Hijeh-a chu nanghon ama namu kitnuva nakipa theina dingu le, kalung hesoh jong alhomdomna dinga ama hi kahinsol loi jeng ahi." 
Philippians2:29 Hijeh chun kipana kimkeijin Pakaiyah analemun, chule hitobang mi hi jabolun;" 
Philippians2:30 Ajeh chu keima neijenlenao lhinglou bangkhai chu subulhit dinga ama habola kibola, Christa natohna-a ahinkho jengjong khohsa louva thidehchet ahi." 
Philippians3:1 Achaina keijin, kasopite ho, Pakaiyah kipah thanomun. Thu thakhat mama chu hinsut kit ding hi keima kachimpoi; nangho dingin jong aphachome." 
Philippians3:2 Uichate holah-a chun chingtheijun, kihongphauvin, achon gilou lah-a chun chingtheijun kihongphauvin, chule kitumsahho lah-a chun chingtheijun kihongphauvin;" 
Philippians3:3 Ajeh iham itile eiho Lhagaova Pathen hou ihiuvin, chule Christa Jesu'a kipah, tahsa lama kingai lou cheptan chu ihiuve;" 
Philippians3:4 Keima tahsa lama kingai jeng jongleng kingai thei kahi; midang tahsa lama kingai theija akingaitoa ahile chuche sanga chu keima kingai thei cheh ding kahi. 
Philippians3:5 Keima niget ni-a chepkitan, Israel chi, Benjamin phunga mi, Hebrew miho lah-a Hebrew; danthu lama Pharisai;" 
Philippians3:6 Tomlahna lama houbung bolsele-a; chule danthu dola chonphatna-a themona neilou kahi. 
Philippians3:7 Ahivangin phatchomna kanei chengse chu Christa ding lama hakamna-a kangaito ahitai. 
Philippians3:8 Ahi, tah mong mongin ka Pakai Christa Jesu hetna aphat jeh chun abonchan hakam nanbou kagel jing jenge; ama jala chu imajouse hakamna kathoh ahi, chule Christa chu phatchom na-a kanei theina dinga, hichu eh tobanga kagel ahitai." 
Philippians3:9 Ama-a chu keima eikimudoh-a, danthua kona hidoh keima chonphatna chu nei louva, Christa-a tahsan vang, tahsana vanga Pathen'a kon chonphatjoh chu kaneija;" 
Philippians3:10 Chutia chu amale athokitna thilboltheina thahat chu kahet theija, athohgim naho chu kikoppia kahia, chule ama thitoh kithakhat kahidoh theija;" 
Philippians3:11 Ijem tia athia kona thokitna chu kachan khah theina ding kati ahi. 
Philippians3:12 Keiman tu-a hi kanei ahitai, chule achamkima kahitai kati ahipoi; Christa Jesu'n keima eimat bangma chu keiman jong hichu kamat theina dinga hadela kadel ahi." 
Philippians3:13 Sopiteho, keiman kamantai tin kakigel hih laije: ahin hiche thilkhat hi kabole, nung lama um thil chengse chu kasumilin, masang lama um thil chu kadelin ahi;" 
Philippians3:14 Jesu Christa-a Pathen kouna sang lama hatman sanna dinga abimun chu hadela del kahi. 
Philippians3:15 Chuti ahi jeh chun eiho apilhingsa chengse hitobang lung chu vop cheh-u hite; chule ijem tia lungchom vop na-umule hi jong chu Pathen'in nangho chungah phongdoh nante. 
Philippians3:16 Hijongle eihon iphahna chan chengseu hin chonu hite, hiche chu lunga vop jinguhite." 
Philippians3:17 Sopiteho, nanghon keima umchan thovin, chule navetkah dinguva um keiho, keiho banga chonho chengse chu veuvin." 
Philippians3:18 (Ajehchu mi tamtah achombeh-in achontan ahi: amaho umchan chu najah uva kasei matchetsa ahitai, tu-a jong kap pumpuma kaseipeh nahiuve, amaho chu Christa thingpel douva ahiuve;" 
Philippians3:19 Amaho chu akichainao manthah ahi, atumpiu chu amaho Pathen ahi, aloupinao chu ajachat naova uma ahi; amaho chun leiset thubou agelui)." 
Philippians3:20 Ijeh-inem itile eiho vangam mite ihiuve; chule chua kona chu huhhing-a I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa chu ahung ding kinema ngah jinga ihiuve. 
Philippians3:21 Aman athilbol theina-a ijakai athua anunsah thei ahi, hiche dungjuija chu eiho tahsa manmo hi akhela ama tahsa loupitah lima chu aumsah ding ahi." 
Philippians4:1 Chuti ahi jeh chun kasopi deitahteho le kangaitah teho, kakipana le kalukhuh, sahtahteho, hiti hin Pakaiyah umdet jingun." 
Philippians4:2 Keiman Euodias le Suyntyche chu Pakaiya lungkhat hi dingin kajole. 
Philippians4:3 Kanam koljon putkhompitah, nangma jong kangeh nahi, nangman hiche numei ho chu anahun; ajeh chu amaho hi Kipana Thupha-a keimatoh kitho-a tonggim ahiuve. Clement le katoh khompi dang danghon jong chutia chu abolu ahi, amaho min chu hinna lekhabua kisuna um ahi." 
Philippians4:4 Nangho Pakaiyah kipah thanom jingun; ti kitleuvinge, Kipah thanom jingun." 
Philippians4:5 Nangho nachonnemu chu mi jouse het hihen. Pakai anaije. 
Philippians4:6 Imacha lungkhamna nei hihhelun; ahin imalam jouse-a taonale thumna mangin, thangvah toh thon, nathum jouseu chu Pathen hetsah-un." 
Philippians4:7 Chutengle Pathen lungmonna, hetna jouse khokhel sohkeija chun, nalungu le nalungthimu Christa Jesu'a ahon ding ahi." 
Philippians4:8 Achaina-in, sopiteho, thutah chacha, ja umdol chacha, adihlam chacha, atheng chacha, dei um chacha, seiphat chacha, phatna nei ima auma chule pachat channa auma ahile, hitiho dol chu lung gelun." 
Philippians4:9 Nanghon keija kona nakihil uva najopsao, najahsao, namusao chengse chu bolun: chutile lungmonna Pathen chun naumpi jing jeng dingu ahi." 
Philippians4:10 Hitih chanpi nunga ka phatna ding nangaito nao nahin thahbol kitleuvu hi Pakaiya hapan kakipah lheh jenge; hiche dinga chu nagotsao vang ahinan, ahivangin hiche pet chun agomkom namupouve." 
Philippians4:11 Kalhahsam mana hichu kasei ahipoi, ajehchu keima itobanga iti kaum-em, kaum bang banga lunglhaija umje kakihet ahitai." 
Philippians4:12 Nemcha umje jong kahen, haotah-a ninglhinga umje jong kahei; imajousele thil jouse-a, vatah-a umle keltah-a umje, ninglhinga umjele lhasama umje thuguh chu kakihetdoh ahitai." 
Philippians4:13 Eihat sahpa Christa vanga chu ijakai bol thei kahi. 
Philippians4:14 Ahi jeng vangin kagenthei hesohna-a neikithopiu hi nabol pha lheh jengui. 
Philippians4:15 Chule nangho Philippi'a miho, Thupha hung lhun tila keima Macedonia gama kona kapotdoh lai chun, nangho tailou houbung khatcha jong pehle lah thudola eikithopia aumpoi ti nanghon nahenaove." 
Philippians4:16 Ajeh chu Thessalonica kho-a kaumlai jong chun, kalhah samna khatvei jeng hilouvin kakhohna nagelun eihunan neithot kit leuvun ahi." 
Philippians4:17 Thilpeh chu kahol ahipoi, aga nangho lama apung ding chu kaholjoh ahi." 
Philippians4:18 Ijakai kaneikime, kahaove; nangho-a kona thil gimnamtui doija kilha-a Pathen lah theidol le lunglhaina chu Epaphroditus khutna kanamun, hiche chun kaning lhingset tan ahi." 
Philippians4:19 Chule ka-Pathen'in loupina-in Christa Jesu'a ahao dungjuijin nangaichat jouseu pekim naovin nate. 
Philippians4:20 Tun i-Paule i-Pathen'u chu atonsot atonsot geijin loupi jinghen, Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Christa Jesu'a um mithengte chengse kasalam anapeuvin. Kaumpi sopitehon salam napeuve. 
Philippians4:22 Mithengte jouse, ahideh-in Ceasar insung mitehon salam napeuve." 
Philippians4:23 Pakai Jesu Christa milungset chun nabonchaovin umpiuvin. Amen. 
Colossians1:1 Pathen lunggot lama Christa Jesu solchah Paul chule sopi Timothy'n," 
Colossians1:2 Colossia'a um mithengte le Christa-a sopi ginchat tahho hengah, i-Pau Pathen le I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa-a konin nachung uva lungset le chamna umhen." 
Colossians1:3 Keihon I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa Pathen chu kathangvah-un, a-imatih chanin nangho dingin katao jingjiuve," 
Colossians1:4 Christa Jesu'a natahsanu chule mithengho jouse ngailutna naneiju thu chu kajauvin; 
Colossians1:5 Masanga kipana Thupha thutah-a kona najahsao, nangho dinga van ho-a kinepna koisa ahi jeh-a;" 
Colossians1:6 Hiche kipana thupha chu najah niuva pat le Pathen milungsetna chu thutah-a nahet niuva pat, vannoi leiset pumpi kom alhuna ga asodoh banga, nangho-a kom jong hung lhunga ga asohdoh ahitai:" 
Colossians1:7 Hiche thutah chu kasahtah-u, kasohchan khompiu Epaphras'in nahilsao ahitan; ama hi nangho dinga Christa lhacha tahsan umtah ahi;" 
Colossians1:8 Ama mama hin lhagaova ngailutna naneijeu chu keiho henga aphondoh ahi. 
Colossians1:9 Hiche jeh-a hi thu kajah pat niuva patna chu keiho jong nangho dinga taopeh le thumpeh tang louhel kahiuve; chutia chu nangho chihna le lhagao lam hetna tinchenga ama lunggot lam hetna-a nadim uva; 
Colossians1:10 Chule hichea chu Pakaiya dinga kiloma imalam jouse-a dei um lama nachon uva, thilpha bolna tintanga naga uva, chule Pathen hetna lama nakhantou uva;" 
Colossians1:11 Kipah thanoma thohhat le lungdehat phong dinga, aloupi athahat dungjuija nahatdohna dingun;" 
Colossians1:12 Vah-a cheng mithengte chan, chan khompia loma eiho eisemuva Pa chu thangvah jingun:" 
Colossians1:13 Ama chun muthim thahat thunei na-a kona eihuhdoh uva, Achapa ngailut gam mi eisou ahi;" 
Colossians1:14 Ama-a chu eihon athisan vanga kilhatdohna ineijuva, chonset ngaidamna jeng jong ineiju ahi." 
Colossians1:15 Ama chu mutheilou Pathen lima um ahin, thilsem jouse lah-a apeng masapen ahi;" 
Colossians1:16 Ajehchu ama-a chu thil jouse kisema ahi, van chunga hihen, leiset chunga hijongle, muthei hihen mumo hijongle, laltouna hihen, vaihomna gam hihen, piputna hihen, thahat thuneina hijongle: thil jouse ama sem ahin, ama-a dinga kisema ahi;" 
Colossians1:17 Chule ama thil jouse masanga anaum jingsapeh ahi, chule ama-a chu thil jouse umsoh ahi." 
Colossians1:18 Ama chu tahsa (hichu houbung) luchang ahi; ama chu abul ahin, imalam jouse-a chungnung pen ahina dinga, athiho lah-a apeng masapen ahi." 
Colossians1:19 Ijeh ham itile ama-a chu chamkimna tincheng aum ding chu Pa lunglam ahi; 
Colossians1:20 Chule athingpel thisana chu chamna asema, ama vanga leija um thil jouse hihen, van'a um thil jouse hijongle, amatah-in amatoh suhchama aumsah ahi." 
Colossians1:21 Chule nangho, masang nachon gitlounao jeh-a ama-a kona pampaija uma, nalung sungva melma nahiu ahin, hijongle tun," 
Colossians1:22 Ama mitmu-a athengle, boh beh louhel, chule nolna beija nadinsah theina dinguva, ama tahsa athi jala nakichampiu ahitai:" 
Colossians1:23 Nangho tahsanna-a chu najung khouva, naki phudet uva, nanghon najahsao chule vannoi'a thilsemho jouse henga kiseiphong, chule keima Paul alhacha le-a kapana hichea kipana thupha kinepna'a kona hi kichondoh louva naum uva ahileh nadinsah dingu ahi." 
Colossians1:24 Tun keiman nangho dinga hesoh genthei kathoh hi kakipapin, chule Christan atahsa, hichu houbung ahin, khohsahna jala ahesoh genthei thoh bangkhai chu kasa-a hin kabulhit jingin:" 
Colossians1:25 Pathen thu subulhit dinga, nangho-a dinga keima eikipe Pathen gouchin dungjui bangtah-a, chuche lhachale-a chu eikipansah ahi;" 
Colossians1:26 Chuche thugil chu akhang akhanga ki-ima thuguh chu ahin, tu-a vang amithengte henga kiphong jala ahitai." 
Colossians1:27 Chidang namdangho lah-a chuche thuguh gou loupi chu ipiham ti chu Pathen'in amaho henga hetsah nom ahi; hiche gou loupi chu nangho-a um Christa chu ahi, ama chu kinepna loupi ahi." 
Colossians1:28 Ama thu chu kahilu ahi, mi jouse hi Christa Jesu'a aphat chamkima Pathen anga kadinsah theina dinguva, kachihna jouseuva amitakip kapholeuva ami jouse kahilu ahi:" 
Colossians1:29 Chutia chu keima-a nasatah-a athilbol thei thahat dungjuija chu, keima jong thohgima hatah-a kiseh kahi." 
Colossians2:1 Ajeh chu nangho le Laodicea umho, chule tahsa-a kamel muloulai ho chengse dinga keima nasatah-a kaki habol hi heleu chun kalung ahi;" 
Colossians2:2 Chutia chu alungu lhep lungmonga aumuva, ngailutna-a akikhi gom theijuva, hetchenna dimset gouva chu ahaodoh theijuva, Pathen thugil, Pa le Christa chu ahetdoh theina dingun;" 
Colossians2:3 Ama-a chu chihnale hetna gou jouse kisela ahi. 
Colossians2:4 Hiche hi koiman seithema nalhep lhah louna dinguva kasei ahi. 
Colossians2:5 Tahsa-a nalah uva kaum lou jeng vangin lhagaovin kaume, kipahtah-in nachondih jeule Christa-a natahsan detjeu kamu jinge." 
Colossians2:6 Chuti ahi jeh chun nanghon Christa Jesu, Pakai chu, nalah bangu chun, ama jengah chonun;" 
Colossians2:7 Ama-a chun jungkhovin chule kisadoh-un, chule natahsan naova chun kiphut doh-un, nakihilu bang chun, hichea chun thangvahna dimin umun." 
Colossians2:8 Chingtheijun, achuti louva ahile khat touvin Christa thua tobang hilouvin, mihem thugouchin le vannoi leiset lekhajem bul ho-a kon chihgut lekha themna le doha lhahna moh thua nasuse getnunte." 
Colossians2:9 Ajeh chu Ama-a chu Pathen hina jouse chamkimna tahsa-a banga cheng ahi; 
Colossians2:10 Chule nangho hichea chu kisuchamkima nahiuve, ama chu piputle thuneina jouse luchang ahi." 
Colossians2:11 Ama-a chu nangho khutna cheptan hilouva cheptan nahiu ahi, tahsaphe chonset naho tahsa chu ponsil pailhah banga kipai lha-a, Christa-a cheptan nahiu ahitai." 
Colossians2:12 Na baptize chanuva chu amatoh lhana kivuitha-a nahitaove, chuche baptize chan vang mama-a chu athi lah-a kona ama kaithouva Pathen thilbol tahsan vanga amatoh kaithoutha-a um nahitaove." 
Colossians2:13 Chule suhkhelna leh tahsa-a cheptan louva thia nangho chu, Pathen'in nathemmonao jouse angaidama, thakhat tah-a ama chutoh nahinsah thau ahitai." 
Colossians2:14 Chule eidoudal uva ichunguva batna lekhasut danthua kisun chu anoimanga, athingpela thingkila akhetbehtha-a asuhbei ahitai;" 
Colossians2:15 Chule piputna le thu neina jouse alelhah-a, hichengse chu ajoa, amaho chengse chu kilangtah-a avetsah ahitai." 
Colossians2:16 Chuti ahi jeh chun anneh thua ahim, don thua ahim, kut nikho thua ahim, lhathah nikho thua ahim, chule cholngah ni thua ahimin, koiman nangho na-oimo daohen." 
Colossians2:17 Hitiho jouse chu khonunga hunglhung ding thudol lim ahibouve: ahin tahsa chu Christa-a ahi. 
Colossians2:18 Nasan dingu tohphat man chu chonnemna lhem le vantil ho hou, athil mulou houva chengdena, atahsa lungu ahomkeova kimoh choisang," 
Colossians2:19 Atahsa pumpi kivah khangna, agu kisuhto na-a kikilmat tona, Pathen khansah-a akhana aluchang chu atuhdet louva mihem koimacha chom mangsah hihhelun." 
Colossians2:20 Chutia chu vannoi leiset lekhajembula kona chu Christa toh thitha nahitah uva ahile, leiset hinna-a hingnalai banga ibola danthu noija lutna," 
Colossians2:21 (Tham hih-in, tep hih-in, tongkha hih-in tiho;" 
Colossians2:22 Hichengse chu imanchah laija mangthah jeng ahi;) mihem thuhil hole thupeh noija um nalai nahiuvem? 
Colossians2:23 Hiche thilho hin lungchama hou, chonnemna, chule tahsa khoto louna thilbola chihna aneijin; ahinla tahsa ngaichat kitimna lama imacha phatchomna aneipoi." 
Colossians3:1 Hijeh chun nangho Christa toh kaithoutha-a um nahiule, Pathen jet lama tou jinga Christa umna chung lam thu jengbou chu ha holun." 
Colossians3:2 Leiset thu geldaovin, chung lam thu jengbou gelun." 
Colossians3:3 Nangho athisa nahiu ahin, nahinnao chu Christa toh Pathen'a kisela ahi." 
Colossians3:4 Ihinnao Christa ahung kilah tengle, amatoh thakhat tah-a nangho jong loupitah-a kilangdoh ding nahiuve." 
Colossians3:5 Hijeh chun nanghon leiset chunga natibah chengseu: jon, thenlou, huh, gitlou lungtup, papset, hichu milim hou ahin, hicheng chu thisah gamun." 
Colossians3:6 Hicheng jeh chun thua nunglou chate chunga Pathen lungsat achujin ahi. 
Colossians3:7 Masanga nangho chuchenga nahin laijuva chu, nangho jong chutihoa chu anachonjia nahiu ahi." 
Colossians3:8 Ahin tun lungsat, lunghan, mitthip, houset, taitom, kam sunga kona thujahmo sei, hicheng jong chu paimangun." 
Colossians3:9 Khatle khat thujouvin kihou hih-un; ajeh chu nanghon hicheng chu anatoh puma mi lui chu ponse lelhah banga nalelhahsao ahitai. 
Colossians3:10 Chule nasempao lim banga hetna-a kona kisemthah mithah chu nakivonu ahitai. 
Colossians3:11 Hichea chu Greek mi le Juda mi, cheptan le cheptanlou, paomah hammah, Scythia mi, soh le ongthol umlouva ahitai; Christa chu ijakaija ijakai ahi." 
Colossians3:12 Hiche jeh chun Pathen lhenchom mithengte le deitahte bangtah-in, khotona, hepina, kineosah, nunnem na, thohhat, hicheng chun kivonun;" 
Colossians3:13 Nangho khatle khat kidemdaito cheh-un; khatnin khat chunga themosahna ding thu naneijule kingaidam touvin; Christan nangho nangaidam bangu chun nanghon jong ngaidamun; 
Colossians3:14 Hicheng jouse chunga chun ngailutna kivonun; hichu kikankhomna chamkimpen ahi. 
Colossians3:15 Chule Pathen lungmonna chu nalunguva vaihom hen; hiche dinga chu nangho tipum khatna kikou nahiuve; chule thangvahna dimin um jingun. 
Colossians3:16 Chihna jouse-a Christa thu chu nasunguva cheng dimset jinghen; tumgingtoh tho lan, hou lan, chule lhagao lan khatle khat kihilun kitilkhou touvin, lungsetna thua nalung gilun Pakai choiatnan la saovin." 
Colossians3:17 Chule thu lam ahin, natoh lam ahin, nabol chanu Pakai Jesu minin bolun; chule ama vangin Pa le Pathen thangvah jingin umun." 
Colossians3:18 Numei ho, Pakaiya lomtah-in napasal teo thunoija umun." 
Colossians3:19 Pasal ho, na-inneipiteu ngailuvin, chule nunbol hih-un." 
Colossians3:20 Chateho, nangho imalam jouse-a nulepa thun nungun; hichu Pakai lunglam ahi." 
Colossians3:21 Pateho, nanghon nachate chengu phin lunghang hih-un, ajole lunglhah nan neiget unte." 
Colossians3:22 Sohteho, nangho mitvet soh banga mihem lunglhaina hilouvin, lung thengsel le Pathen ging pumin, tahsa lam thudol ijakaija napakai te chengu thun nungun:" 
Colossians3:23 nabol chanu chu mihem dinga bol tobang hilouvin, Pakai dinga bol bangin lung gilin tah-in bolun;" 
Colossians3:24 Pakaiya kona goulona thilpeh nachan dingu chu heuvin; ajehchu Pakai natong nahiuve. 
Colossians3:25 Amavang koi hijongle thil dihlou bola chun athilbol dihlou man chu asan ding ahi: hichea hin maiphavet na aumpoi. 
Colossians4:1 Pakai teho, nanghon jong van'a Pakai khat naneiju chu heuvin lang, nasohteu dihkeicha le hoikeichan bolun." 
Colossians4:2 Nangho taona-a pangdet jom jingin, thangvah toh thon kiging jingin umun." 
Colossians4:3 Chujongle ajeh-a henna kaumna Christa thugil hi kaseiphong theina diuva Pathen'in kot eihonpeh nadingun keiho dingin jong neitaokop jingun; 
Colossians4:4 Chutile kaseiding bangtah-a kaphonjal thei ding ahi. 
Colossians4:5 Chule phat kijenpet chu kichoh unlang, polama um miho lama chun chingtheijin chonun." 
Colossians4:6 Chule mijouse chu iti donbut ding ahi chu nahet theina dingun, nakihounao chu lungset thu beh jinghen, chi altoh bang jinghen." 
Colossians4:7 Pakaiya sopi deitah chule lhacha tahsan umtah le kasoh hikhompi Tychicus hin kaumchan jouse nangho hetsah naovin nate: 
Colossians4:8 Kaumchan thu nahetna dinguva, chule ama hin nalungu amonsah theina dinga, hichena dinga chu ama hi naheng uva kahinsol ahi;" 
Colossians4:9 Nangho lah-a khat, tahsan umtah le sopi deitah Onesimus toh kahin solthan ahi. Amanin hikom thu umchan ijakai nahetsah naovinte." 
Colossians4:10 Kasoh chanpi Aristarchus'in salam napeuve, chule Barnabas tupa Mark jongin salam napeuve, (ama chungchang thua thupeh namutaovin; ama naheng uva ahunga ahile analemun;)" 
Colossians4:10 Kasoh chanpi Aristarchus'in salam napeuve, chule Barnabas tupa Mark jongin salam napeuve, (ama chungchang thua thupeh namutaovin; ama naheng uva ahunga ahile analemun;)" 
Colossians4:11 Chule Justus kiti Jesu'n jong salam napeuve, amaho hi cheptanho lah-a kon ahiuve. Hiteho bouhi Pathen gam chalna dinga kakithopi ahiuve; kalung monna amaho hi ahiuve." 
Colossians4:12 Nangho lah-a khat Christa soh Epaphras'in salam napeuve; nangho Pathen lunglam jouse-a bukimle tahsan kichenna napandet theina dinguva, ama nangho dinga taona-a ponpan tah ahi." 
Colossians4:13 Ajeh chu nangho dingle Laodicea chule Hierapolis'a umho dinga ama hi gunchu lheh jeng ahi, ama thudol kahettohsahna hichu ahi." 
Colossians4:14 Louthem deitah Luke le Demas'in jong salam napeuve. 
Colossians4:14 Louthem deitah Luke le Demas'in jong salam napeuve. 
Colossians4:15 Laodicea um sopiteho, chule Nymphas le a-in'a kikhom houbung chu salam anapeuvin." 
Colossians4:16 Chule nangho koma hiche lekha nasimjou tengule, Laodicea-a um houbung jong anasim sah-un; chutobang chun nanghon jong Laodicea'a kona lekha jong chu anasimun." 
Colossians4:17 Chule Archippus jah-a, Nangman Pakaiya namu lhacha natoh chu namolsona dingin chingtheijin, tin ana seijun." 
Colossians4:18 Kasalam bohna hiche lekha hi keima Paul'in kakhut tah-a kasut ahi. Nanghon kabulput hi geldoh jingun. Lungsetna-in na-umpiu hen. Amen. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paul, Silvanus chule Timothy'n, Pa Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a um Thessalonica houbung mite hengah: i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a kon lungsetna le chamna naheng uva umhen." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Katao chanun nangho kamin phah uvin, nangho nabon chaova dingin Pathen kathangvah jingjiuve;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 Keihon tahsana nathilbolu, ngailutna-a nathohgimu, chule I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa-a kinepna neija nathohhatnau chu i-Pathen'u le i-Pau anga sumil louhelin kageldoh jingui." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Pathen'a sopi deitahho, lhendoh nahiu chu kaheuvin," 
1Thessalonians1:5 Kathu hilu Kinepna Thupha hi thu keo jenga nahengu hung lhunga hilouvin, thilbol thei thahat le Lhagao Thenga hetna kichentah-a hungjoh ahi, keiho nangho dinga itobang mi kahiu nanghon nahenaove." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Chule nangho hesoh gentheina nasatah lah-a Lhagao Theng Kipana-a thu chu anasanga, keihole Pakai umchan tho-a nahitaove." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Chutia chu Macedonia le Achaia gama um atahsanho dinga vettoh-a jui dinga uma nahitaove. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ajeh chu nangho-a kona Macedonia leh Achaia gam sunga Pakai thu chu jaldoh ahi, chule hiche jeng chu hilouvin, Pathen lama natahsan jeu chu gamtinah akithangtan ahi; keiho seisei angaipoi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ajeh chu amahotah-in keiho umchan thudol nangho kom kahung lutjeu umchan, chule nangho Pathen hingle dihtah chu hou dinga," 
1Thessalonians1:10 chule khonunga hung lhung ding lunghana kona eihuhdoh uva Achapa Jesu, athia kona akaithou chu, van'a kona ahung ding ngah dinga, milim houva kona Pathen lama nakiheijiu chu ahillhangleu ahi." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Chuti chu ahin, sopiteho, naheng uva kahungu chu moh ahipoi, ti nangho tah-in nahenaove;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 Ahin amasanga Philippi khopi-a hesoh genthei kathoh-a chule jachat umtah-a eikibol jenga jong, hichu nahetsao ahi; hangsana no-a Pathen Thupha chu nangho jah-a sei dinga ka Pathen uva hangtah-a kanapan-u ahi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ajeh chu kathu hilu hi suhkhela kon ahipoi, thenlouva kon jong ahipoi, doha-a jong ahipoi:" 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ahin Pathen'in aphai tia eitahsan jeh-a thupha vopsah dinga eigot bangtah-a thu kaseiju ahibouve; mihem lunglhaisah louva kalung sungu photoh Pathen lunglhaina kaseiju ahi. 
1Thessalonians2:5 Imatih chana pachat lhem pan lou kahiuve, hichu nanghon naheuve, papset khuna-a jong mangji lou kahiuve, Pathen ahetoh ahi;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 Christa solchah kahiu hi, thu neitah hiding kahiuvin, ahivangin nangho nahiuvin, mi dang ahin koimacha-a konin ginle ja kahol pouve." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Nalah uva nunnem tah numei anaonoi pelaijin achate akhoukhah banga," 
1Thessalonians2:8 nangho kakhoto jeh uva Pathen Thupha jeng hilouva, nangho kadeitah-u nahitah jeh uva, keihon kahinna chengu kisana nangho peh ding kalungu ahi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ajeh chu, sopiteho, katohgimle kagun chunao nalunguva aumnai; nangho koima chunga pohgih pohsah louna dinga, asun ajana na katoh jiuva najah uva Pathen Thupha kaseijiu ahi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Chule atahsan nangho lah-a thengtah-a, chonphatah-a, themona beija iti kachonum, ahetoh-a nangho nahiuvin, Pathen jong ahi;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 Chule Pathen gama dingle aloupina-a dinga nakou paova dinga lomtah-a nachonna dingu tia apan achate ahil banga," 
1Thessalonians2:12 Keihon jong nangho amichangkima thu kahiluva, katilkhoujiuva, chule kahet tohsahjiu nahiuve, hichu nanghon naheuve." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Chule hiche jeh jong hin tang louhelin Pathen kathangvah jingui, nanghon keiho-a kona thu, Pathen thu najah uva chu, mihem thu ahi tia hilouva, Pathen thu tia nalah-u ahibouve; hichu tahmong ahi, chujongle hiche chun atahsan nangho lah-a na atonge." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ajeh chu, sopiteho, nangho Juda gama Christa-a um Pathen houbung ho umchan joma nahitaove; amahon Juda miho-a kona athoh banguva nanghon jong nagam miteuva kona chuto bangma chu nathoh-u ahitai:" 
1Thessalonians2:15 Amaho chun Pakai Jesu jong athemgaohou jong athaova, chule keiho jong einomangu ahin, Pathen alunglhaisah louvu ahi, chule mi jousetoh kilekal ahiuve:" 
1Thessalonians2:16 Amahon keiho chidang namdangho huhhing-a aumna dinguva, thu kaseipeh dingu eikhamui; achonsetnao bukip molso jing ahiuve; ahinla lunghan khonna achunguvah achunai." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ahin, sopiteho, lunga hilouva tahsa lama nang hotoh kikhena kaum tahdi jeh hin, kangai lutnun namaiju mu ding kaki habol chehjin ahi." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Hichena ding chun, keiho ahideh chu keima, Paul, khatvei, nivei nangho heng lama hung ding kakigot ahitai, ahin Satan'in eisumojin ahi." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ajehchu I-Pakaiyu Jesu ahung tengle a-angsunga kakinepnao, ahiloule kakipanao, ahiloule loupina lallukhuh chu ipi hiding ham? nangho nahi lou uham?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ijeh inem itile tahbeh-in kaloupinaole kakipana dingu nangho nahiuve. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Hiche jeh-a chu kathoh jou loutah phatnuva, Athen kho-a kachanga eikida lhah pha kasa taovin ahi;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 hiche hesoh thoh jeh-a chu koima alunglao naum louna dinguva, nangho phutdet dingle tahsan thu lama nalungmon sah dinguva, Christa Thupha lama Pathen lhacha le isopiu chule itoh khompiu Timothy naheng uva kahinsolu ahi." 
1Thessalonians3:3 Ajeh chu hesoh thoh dinga pang kahiuve, hichu nanghon nahenaove." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Hesoh thoh ding ihiuve, tia masanga nangho koma kaum laijuva kaseisao ahi; chujouvin kati bang chun asohtan ahi, chule hichu nanghon naheuvin ahi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Hiche jehtah chun keiman jong kathoh theilou phatna, ajole lhem chun nangho lhemlha taleu chun katohgim nau moh hikhante, tia hiche jeh-a chu natahsan jeu chu he dinga kahinsolu ahi." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ahin tun Timothy nangho koma konin ahungin, Kipana Thupha, natahsan jeule nangailut jeu, chule nangho mu katup banga nanghon neimu nomu phatecha neigel doh jingu thu ahinpoh phat hin," 
1Thessalonians3:7 sopiteho, nangho tahsan thudola keiho kahesoh genthei naova kalung mongui;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ajeh chu tu-a nangho Pakaiya na-umdet jingule, keiho ahinga kahitaove." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ajehchu i-Pathen'u anga nachung uva kakipanao jouse jeh-a hi, nangho chungchanga Pathen itobang tah-a kathang vah dingu hitam?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Namaiju kamu theina dingu le natahsan bulhin lounao kasuhbulhit theina dingun, asun ajanin kaha tao dehset jengui." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Tun i-Pau Pathen'in chule I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christan nangho heng lama eipuijuhen. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Chule nangho kangailut bangu hin, Pakaiyin nangho khatle khat kingailutna le mi jouse ngailutna-a nabelap uhen lang, naletset sah-u hen." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Chutile I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa amithengte jousetoh ahung tengle, i-Pau Pathen anga nalungthimu thenna lama themona beija aphudet ding ahi." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Chuti ahile, sopite, achaina keijin, keihon Pakai Jesu'a nangho chu kajoluva katilkhou nahiuve, chutia chu Pathen lunglhaisah nadinga iti chon dingham ti thudol chu keiho-a kona nalah bangu chun chon jom jingun, neiletset jing jengun." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Ajeh chu Pakai Jesu'a nangho ipi thupeh kapeh-u nanghon nahenaove. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Nangho jon na-a kona nakikangse uva naki suhtheng dingu chu Pathen lunglam ahi: 
1Thessalonians4:4 Nangho amitakipmin thengsel le jabolin nabel cheh-u phatea kivopje heleu chun ahi; 
1Thessalonians4:5 Pathen helou chidang namdangho banga huh pan louvin: 
1Thessalonians4:6 Chutichun chonvalin koiman hiche lamdola hin asopi dohan boldahen; ajeh chu masanga nangho kaseipehsao, kahettohsahsao banga chu, hitiho phula-a chu Pakai ahi." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pathen'in eiho aboh dinga hilouva, atheng ding joh-a eikouvu ahibouve." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Hijeh chun ajop lou chun mihem ajop lou hita louvin, A-Lhagao Theng napepao Pathen chu ajop lou ahi." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kisopi ngailut thudola vang hinsun hih jong leng akhoh poi; ajeh chu khatle khat kingailut dingje Pathen'a kona kihilsate nahiuve. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Chule Macedonia gama cheng sopite chunga hichu nabolu ahi. Ahivangin, sopite, katil nahiuve, haletnin neilet chehleu chun kati;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 Chule kathu peh bangu chun kangkhen cha umje kichuh-un, nangma kincheh kibolun chule nakhut tah-a nakitoh kihabol leuchun kati," 
1Thessalonians4:12 Chutile polama um miho chunga ngeikeicha naumthei dingu ahi, chule lhahsamna nanei louhel dingu ahi." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Sopiteho, kinepna bei midangho banga nangho lungkhama naum louna dingun, a-imumil teho thudol helouva naum dingu kanompoi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Jesu athin athoudoh kit tai, ti hi itahsan uva ahile, Pathen'in Jesu'a ihmumil teho jong chu amatoh thakhatna ahinpui ding ahi, ti iheuve." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Hiche jeh-a chu Pakai thua kona hiche thuhi kaseipeh nahiuve, eiho Pakai hung geija anahing nalai chengse hi, a-imusaho sanga iti nama jongle masajo lou ding ihiuve." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ajeh chu Pakai chu amatah a-awtoh, vantil pipui awgintoh, chule Pathen sumkon gintoh kitho-a van'a kona hung kumlha ding ahi; chule Christa-a thisaho chengse thoudoh ding ahiuve;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 Chujoule eiho ahingnalai amoh chengse hi, amaho chengse chutoh vanlaijola Pakai lamto dinga mei kong'a toltouva i-um khom dingu; chule chutia chu a-imatih chana Pakai toh i-um khom jing dingu ahi." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Hiche jeh chun hiti thu hin nangho khatle khat kilhamon touvin. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ahivangin, sopiteho, hiche chu anikhole aphat thudol naheng uva hinsut ding angaipoi;" 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ajeh chu jana gucha ahung banga, Pakai nikho chu hung ding ahi, hichu nanghon kichenin naheuve." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Mihon, Chamnale lungmon, chule bitna aume, tia asei laitah-ule, numei naoso nat banga, phulou helouva manthah na chu achunguva hung chu phung jeng ding ahi; hitia chu amaho chu iti nama jongle sohcha louding ahiuve." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ahivangin, sopiteho, gucha banga hiche nikho chu nachung uva ahung lhun ding chu, nangho muthima uma nahipouve;"
