1Thessalonians5:5 Nangho nabonchaovin khovahle sunlai chate nahiuve; eiho janle muthim mi ihipouve. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Hiche jeh chun, sopiteho, midangho banga imu louvin, limgehchan kihongpha jingin umu hite." 
1Thessalonians5:7 A-imuho khu janlebou imujia ahiuve; chule jukhamho jong janlebou akhamjiuve. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Eiho vang sunlai chate ihi jeh-un, tahsan leh ngailut ompho kivon thou hite, chule huhhinga um kinepna chu lukhuh-a neijin limgehchan hah jingin umu hite." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Ajeh chu eiho lungsat chuhna dinga hilouva, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga huhhing chu ichan theina dinguva, Pathen'in eipansah-u ahi;" 
1Thessalonians5:10 Eiho hah jing jongleu hen imu jongleu hen, Christa toh ihinkhomna dinguva, ama eiho dinga thia ahitai." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Hijeh chun nabol bangu chun khatle khat kitilkhou touvin, kisadohton umun." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Sopiteho, naheng uva kahung tao ahi, nalah uva natong gima, chule pakaiya nachung uva kitunga nangho natilkhou ho chu heuvin." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Amaho chu anatoh jal-u chun ngailutna-in hajan jabolun. Nangho kitohdel chehchan umun. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Chule, sopiteho, kahintil nahiuve, angai dol louva chonho chu phohsalun, hilchah-un, alung doija tilkhou vun, ahatmo athadoi huvin lang, mijouse koma kido hatnun." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Chingtheijun, koiman setna chu setnan thuh hihhen; ahin khatle khat chule mijouse phatna ding bolnan kihabol cheh-un." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Kipah thanom jingun; 
1Thessalonians5:17 tantih neilouvin taojingun; 
1Thessalonians5:18 imajousea thangvah jingin umun; hichu Jesu Christa-a nangho chunga Pathen lunglam ahi. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Lhagao Theng chu sumit hih-un. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Lhagao thu seidoh ho chu musit hih-un. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Imalam jouse patep cheh-unlang apha chu tuhdet jingun: 
1Thessalonians5:22 aphalou jouse-a konin kikhin mangun. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Chule cham kona Pathen'in nangho kimkeijin thensah-un; chule I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung tengle nangho chengse lhagao, nahinnao chule natahsao themona beijin koihen." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Nangho nakoupao chu tahsan umtah ahi, ama chun hichu bolpeh naovin nate." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Sopiteho, keiho dingin neitao peh-un." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Kibengchop thengin sopite jouse salam-un. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Keiman nangho Pakaiya kahahsela hiche thuhi kapeh nahiuve, hiche lekha hi sopithengte jouse angah anasimun." 
1Thessalonians5:28 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungsetnan umpiuvin, amen." 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paul, Silvanus, chule Timothy'n i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Khrista-a um Thessalonica houbung mite hengah:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa Pathen le Pakai Jesu Khrista-a konin naheng uva lungsetna le lungmonna umhen. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Sopiteho, natahsanu hakhana akhantouva chule nangho khatle khat kingailutna aletset tahjeh hin, nangho chungchanga Pathen kathangvah dingu hi kabol ding dolu ahin, kakin mongu ahi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Hichea chun nanghon bolsetnale bol hesohna nathoh chengseova nathoh hatnaule natahsan jeh-u chun, keihon Pathen houbung ho chengsea nangho paopin kaneijui." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Pathen lenggama dinga lomma sim nahitheina dinguva, Pathen gam jeh-a nanghon hesoh genthei nathoh-u ahin, hichu Pathen chonphatna thutan dihtah kiphon dohna melchihna ahi." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Nahin sugenthei hochu gimhesoh na-a lethuh ding chu Pathen'a dinga thil dihtah mong ahi: 
2Thessalonians1:7 Chule nangho suhgentheija umho chu, Pakai Jesu athahat loupina vantil chengsetoh van'a kona ahung kilah teng, keiho toh thakhatna icholdo khom dingu;" 
2Thessalonians1:8 Pathen helouhole I-Pakaiyu Jesu Khrista Thupha joplou chengse chunga meikong deujeju-a phu alah ding," 
2Thessalonians1:9 Pakai ang sunga konle athahat aloupina-a kona amaho chun tonsot manthah na talent athohgim dingu ahi. 
2Thessalonians1:10 Hiche nikho chule ama amithengte-a loupi dingle atahsanho chengsea (Keiho thu hettohsah natahsanu ahitan) kidangtah-a choi-atna umdinga hungding ahi. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Hichejeh chun i-Pathen'un nangho nakikou nao toh kilom ahi tia ataija, chule thilpha jousele tahsan natohho jouse athahat athilbol theina-a alolhinsah theina dingin, keihon nangho dingin kataopeh jingui;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 chule i-Pathen'ule I-Pakaiyu Jesu Khrista milungsetna dungjuija, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Khrista min chu nangho-a choi-atna auma, chule nangho jong ama-a choi-atna naum theina dingu, katiu ahi." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Sopiteho, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung dingle ama koma ikikhop dingu thudola hichea hi naheng uva kangeh ahi," 
2Thessalonians2:2 lhagao khattou sei ahiloule, keiho sei hi ahi, tia thu kiseija konin hijongle, keiho sut hi ahi, tia kei lekhathot khattou ahima kon hijongle, lunglinglao loi hih-un; Christa nikho chu ahung lhunga ahitai ti gel loujenun; lung jong lunggim hihhelun." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Koima imachan kilhep lhahsah hih-un; ajeh chu lhahmang na hung lhung masa ding, chule dan suse-a chonsepa, mangthah chapa chu, hung kiphongdoh ding," 
2Thessalonians2:4 ama chun dou apat ding, Pathen minpu jousele hou jouse chunga ama kichoi sanga, Pathen houin kisana jong hung touva hung ki pathen sah ding ahinalaije." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Nakom uva kaum laija hiti thuho kasei jouse chu nageldoh lou uham? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Chule ama chu ama phattah-a akiphondoh ding, ipin akham ahi nanghon naheuve." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ajeh chu dan suhsetna thuguh chun tu-a jong hi na atoh jingsa ahi; lahmanga aum kahse-a hi atuhtanga khat uma ahibouve. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Chule hiche teng chule dan suse-a chu hung kiphongdoh ding ahi; ahinla Pakai kama kon lhagao chun ahalvam ma chule ama hung kilah-a chu asuhmang ding ahi. 
2Thessalonians2:9 Hichepa hung chu Satan natoh dungjuija thilbolthei thahat le melchihna chule jouthil kidang bol chengsetoh hung kitho ding ahi," 
2Thessalonians2:10 chule amangthahho chengse chu chonphat louna jouse-a doha lhep lhah-a um ahiuve; hichu amahon huhhing-a aumna dinguva, ngailutna thutah chu alah lou jeh-u ahi." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Chule hichena dinga hi Pathen'in amaho chunga chu suhkhel lamvaina natoh alhunsah ahi; chutia chu amahon thujou chu atahsan dingu; 
2Thessalonians2:12 thutah tahsan louva chonset alunglam hijoho jouse thu kitan ding ahi. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Amavang, Pakai ngailut sopiteho, nangho chungchanga imatihchana Pathen thangvah hi kakinu kabol ding dolu ahi; ajeh chu Lhagaova kona thenna-a chule thutah chu tahsan vanga atil abula pat Pathen'in huhhing-a umdinga nangho nalhenu ahi;" 
2Thessalonians2:14 Chule chuche lung ngaito-a chu I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa loupina chu chang thei dinga kathuhil-u Kipana Thupha-a nakouvu ahi. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Hijeh chun, sopiteho, pangdet jingun, kathuseiju hijongle, lekha thot hijongle, kahilna chengseu hi abonchan tuhdet jingun." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Tun I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa amatah-in, chule eingailua tonsot lungmonnale kinepna phatah lungset tah-a eipe-a, Pa Pathen chun nalungu monsah hen," 
2Thessalonians2:17 chule thilpha bolna lam jouse-ale thupha seijah nalungu chu phutdet jingun. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ajona-in, sopiteho, nangho lah-a banga chu Pathen thu gangtah-a achala aloupidohna dingin," 
2Thessalonians3:2 michonsehole migilouho khutna kona kasochat theina dingun, keiho dingin neitaopeh jiuvin; ajeh chu koijakai jousen tahsan na aneipoi." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ahivangin Pakai chu tahsan umtah ahi; amatah chun naphudet dingu chule agilouva kona chu nahuhdoh dingu ahi. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Chule kathupeh chengseu chu nanit jingui, chule nit jong nit jingunate, ti Pakaiyah nangho thudol ginchat kaneijui." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Chule Pakai chun nalungu Pathen ngailutna lamale Christa thohhatna lama kaihoihen. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Sopite, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mina nangho hiche thuhi kapeh nahiuve, sopi koi hile dan ngailouva chona, chule keiho-a kona nakihilnao banga chon lou chu kivoppi hih-un." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Nanghon keiho umchan natho dingu adol ahi chu nanghon nakihet naove; ajeh chu keiho nangho lah-a dan ngailouvin kachonpouve; 
2Thessalonians3:8 Chule aman beijin koimacha an kanepouvin ahi; ahin nangho koima chunga poh gih pohsah louna dingin, sunle jan-in katong gimun pontho tah-in na katongun ahi;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 Hichu kahi thei lou jeh-u ahipoi; nanghon keiho umchan nathona dingu, nangho anga vettoh-a tho dinga kachuti chonu ahi." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Natong nom lou chun an jong nehdahen, tia nalah uva kaum laija nangho thu kapehsa nahiuve." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ajeh chu nangho lah-a abang khat dan ngailouvin achonun, natong louvin mi natoh sinmon avahlen ahi, ti kajauve." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Hitobang mi chu Pakai Jesu Christa mina thu kapeh-a katil nahiuve, thipkhen chan na tonghen lang ama an kinehhen." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Sopiteho, nangho vang thilpha bol chimtih nei hih-un." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Chule hiche kalekha thot sunga kisun keiho thu ngailou chu nanghon ama chu melgelun, ama chu kivoppi, kiloipi daovin, ajachatna dingin;" 
2Thessalonians3:15 ahivangin melmah lungin gel hih-un; sopi tin tilkhoujovin. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Tun chamle lungmon kona Pakai amatah-in imajousea nangho chamle lungmon pe jingun. Pakai chun nabonchaovin umpi jingun. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Kasalamna hiche lekha hi keima Paul'in kakhut tah-a kasut ahi; lekha thot jouse amelchihna ahi, hitia hi kasutji ahi." 
2Thessalonians3:18 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungset chun nabonchaovin umpi jingun, Amen." 
1Timothy1:1 Eihuh hinguva Pathen le kinepna Pakai Christa Jesu thupeh dungjuija, Christa Jesu solchah, Paul'in," 
1Timothy1:2 tahsana kachapa tahbeh Timothy hengah, i-Pau Pathen le Christa Jesu'a konin lungsetle khotona chule lungmon nachunga umhen." 
1Timothy1:3 Macedonia gama kache kona, mi abang khatnin thuhil lamdang ahil louna dingule, moh thusim chule tan thei lou khanggui thu, hichun tahsanna Pathen gou chinna lama phatchomsah tahsih-a kinelna akonsahjoh ahi." 
1Timothy1:4 Angaisah louna dinguva, nahilchah theina dinga, Ephesus kho-a umin, tia kangeh banga chu, tu-a jong kati ahi." 
1Timothy1:5 Ahivangin thu kipeh lona pen chu lungthengle ase apha hetna pha chule tahsan kichen tah-a kon ngailut chu anei theina dinguva ahi. 
1Timothy1:6 Hichenga kon chun mi kimkhat akihei mangin moh houlimna lama avah koitaove. 
1Timothy1:7 Athuseijula adih ahimonge tia atahtinao jong chu he louhelin, danthuhil ahi nomui." 
1Timothy1:8 Ahin dan hi adoltah-a nitpa ding chun aphai ti iheuve; 
1Timothy1:9 Ahinla dan hi michonpha dinga hilouva, dan sukeh thua nunglou, Pathen ngaisahlou chonseho, abohho athenglou, pathat, nuthat, mithat;" 
1Timothy1:10 mijong, palepa kikoi, mihem gu, mijou, chule jouva kihahsel; hiteho chengse dinga chule adang thuhilpha kicheh kaleh-a chon aumle, amaho chengse dinga chu kiphut ahi;" 
1Timothy1:11 Hiche hi pachat umtah Pathen loupina Kipana Thupha keima eikivopsah dungjuija ahi. 
1Timothy1:12 Keima thahat eipe-a I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa chu kathangvah jinge, ajeh chu Aman keima ginchat uma eingaitoa, alhacha-a eipansah ahitai;" 
1Timothy1:13 Tu masanga hou taitom kanahia, abolsea kanapana, susehat kanahi ahin: hinla tahsanlou jeh-a hettoh louva kanabol ahi jeh chun hepina kamutan ahi." 
1Timothy1:14 Chule Christa Jesu'a tahsanna le ngailuttoh kitho-a I-Pakaiyu milungset chu hadima dimlet ahitai. 
1Timothy1:15 Michonseho huhhing-a Jesu Christa vannoi leisetna hunga ahi, ti tahsan umtah hi mi jousen san cheh ding doltah ahi; hicheho lah-a chu keima apipen kahi;" 
1Timothy1:16 Ahin tonsotna hinna dinga Ama hintahsan dingho chun avettoh-a ajom dinguva, Jesu Christa'n athohhatna chengse chu apipen keija hi alahdoh theina dinga eihepi ahi." 
1Timothy1:17 Tun tonsot Leng kem theilou, mu theilou, chule Pathen chingtah khatseh, ginnale jana chule aloupina chu atonsot atonsot khangin umjinghen. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Kachapa Timothy, nangma tahsan neitahle ase apha hetna phatah neija, nangma umchan ding thudol masanga kiseisa chengse chu, hiche dungjuija chu phatah-a gal nasat theina dinga, hiche thupeh chu nangma kapeh nahi;" 
1Timothy1:19 Abang bangin chuche tahsan leh ase apha hetna chu apailhah jeh-un atahsan kong-u akehgamtai. 
1Timothy1:20 Amaho lah-a Hymenaeus le Alexander chu taitomna akisin lhon louna dinga, keiman Satan khutna kapehdoh ahitai." 
1Timothy2:1 Hijeh-a chu amasapena katilkhou nahiuve, mijouse-a dingin taona, thumna, chule taopehna toh thon thangvah jingin umu hite;" 
1Timothy2:2 Lengho dingin, chule panmun len tuhho dingin; chutia chu eiho Pathen ngaisahna le jabolna lam jouse-a chamdel le lungmong ikhosah theina dingun." 
1Timothy2:3 Hichu eihuh hinguva Pathen mitmu-a phatah le lahthei ahi; 
1Timothy2:4 Aman mijouse huhhing-a aumding le thutah hetna lama ahungcheh diu adei ahi. 
1Timothy2:5 Pathen khatsehbou ahin, chule Pathen le mihem kah-a palai jong khatsehbou ahi; ama chu mihem, Christa Jesu chu ahi;" 
1Timothy2:6 Ama chu aphat cha-a hettohsah hidinga, mi jouse lhatdoh na-a hung kipe-a ahi." 
1Timothy2:7 Hiche dinga chu aseiphongle dingle solchah, (Christa-a thutah kasei ahi; jou kaseipoi); tahsa le thutah-a chidang namdangho hil dinga eikipansah ahi." 
1Timothy2:8 Hijeh chun pasal hon lunghang louhel le kinel baotam beihelin, muntin-ah khut theng domuhen lang taovuhen, hichu kalunggot ahi." 
1Timothy2:9 Chutobangma chun numei ho adol bepchan kijem uhen, kiphalam khenchan ging gehchan umuhen; sampheh jeppah, sana twikohchanga chule thil man tama kijem louvin," 
1Timothy2:10 thilpha bolin kijemleu kati; hichu Pathen gin phonga numei chonna doltah ahi. 
1Timothy2:11 Imalam jouse-a numei chu thu noija umhen, gingkhen chan thu kihiljohen." 
1Timothy2:12 Mi hil dingle pasal chunga thunei dingin numei thu kapepoi; thipkhenin umthim ngetnget johen katibouve. 
1Timothy2:13 Ajeh chu amasa Adam kisema, chujouva bou Eve kisema ahi;" 
1Timothy2:14 chule Adam chu lheplhah-a um hilouva, numeinu johchu bou lheplhah-a uma, suhkhelna-a lhalhut ahi." 
1Timothy2:15 Hijeng jongle tahsana, ngailutna, thenna, chule umchan phatah-a aum jom jinguva ahile, amanu chu acha neina-a sohcha ding ahi." 
1Timothy3:1 Koi hile houbung lam kaija pan nom chun natoh pha alunggot ahi, tia kisei hi thudih tah ahi." 
1Timothy3:2 Hijeh-a chu houbung lamkai chu nolna bei, numei khat ji-a nei, kitimthei, lunglimtah, kituptah, jindot them, mi hil them," 
1Timothy3:3 Juheh lou, miden mang lou; alamlouva phatchomna ding ngaito-a kilose mi hilou, mi nunnem hi ding, dou hollou, sum ngailu lou;" 
1Timothy3:4 Ama insung phatecha potup thei, jana neitah-a achate athua nunsah thei mi hi ding ahi." 
1Timothy3:5 (Ama insung chunga vaipohje he lou chun Pathen houbung ho chu iti avetsuija akaitup thei dingham?) 
1Timothy3:6 Atahsan thah hilou ding ahi, ajole kiletsah hoithontin Diabol themmo sahna-a chu getninte;" 
1Timothy3:7 Chulou jong chu, polama mite seiphat jong hiding ahi; achuti loule seisetnin umintin Diabol thangah oh khante." 
1Timothy3:8 Chutobangma chu houbung lhacha-a pang ding jong chu migun ja-umtah hiding, mi kamtam hilou ding, ju-a lop hilou ding, alam louva sum veikan lung go mi hilou ding;" 
1Timothy3:9 Chule sele pha hetna thenga tahsanna thuguh tuh mi hi ding ahi. 
1Timothy3:10 Amaho chu kipatep masahen, chujoule nolna bei ahiu lebou, lhacha na tonguhen." 
1Timothy3:11 Chutobangma chu aji teo jong migun ja umtah, mihehse hatlou, kitim them, chule ijakaija tahsan um hiding ahi." 
1Timothy3:12 Lhachaho chu numei khatseh ji hicheh hen, achate chengule a-insungu phatecha potup them cheh hiuhen." 
1Timothy3:13 Ajeh chu houbung lhacha na phatecha tongho chun amaho dinga Christa Jesu'a um tahsan na-a chun dinmun pha le hansana nasatah akilodoh jiuvin ahi. 
1Timothy3:14 Chomkhat joule naheng lama hung ding kinema, hiche hi kahinsut ahi;" 
1Timothy3:15 Ahinla kahung gei khatle, thutah khom le abul Pathen hing houbung, Pathen insunga chu mi itobanga iti umchan dingdol ahi nahetna dinga kahin sut ahi." 
1Timothy3:16 Pathen ngaisahna thuguh chu nelkalna beihela lena ahi; Pathen chu tahsa-a ahung kiphongin, Lhagaova them changin, Vantil ten amuvin, Chidang namdang lah-a seiphongin aumin, Vannoi'a tahsanin aumin, Loupia lahtouvin aumtan ahi." 
1Timothy4:1 Ahin Lhagao Thengin kichentah-in aseije, ni nunung lamle mi kimkhat tahsana kona pul lha-a, lhagaoho misuh lamvaina doha leh thilhaho thuhila hung lunglut diu;" 
1Timothy4:2 Hichu ama sele pha hetna thisa kidep tobang miphalhem thujou seiho-a kona sohdoh ding ahi; 
1Timothy4:3 Amaho chun kichen akhamun; atahsanale thutah hetohhon thangvah puma aneh dingu, tia Pathen thilsemho chu neh ding ajadauve." 
1Timothy4:4 Ajeh chu Pathen thilsem jouse chu phasoh keija ahin, pai ding imacha umlou ahi, thangvah puma ikisanle;" 
1Timothy4:5 Ajeh chu Pathen thua konle taona-a kisuthenga ahi. 
1Timothy4:6 Hicheng thu chu sopiho lunga nakhuma ahile, Christa Jesu lhacha phatah nahi-a, tu geija nahinjuipeh tahsanna thu le thuhilpha-a chu kivah khang ding nahi;" 
1Timothy4:7 Amavang hou seisetnale nupi tehse ho houlimna moh thusim chu la hih-in, Pathen ngaisahna lama them kiha sinin." 
1Timothy4:8 Ajehchu tahsa lam thil kisin hi phatchomna themcha khatcha ahin; Pathen ngaisahna lama kisin hi imajousea phatna ahi; ajeh chu hichu tu hinkho-a dinga jong, khonunga hinkho dinga jong thutep uma ahi." 
1Timothy4:9 Hiche thu kiseihi tahsan umtahle jop sohkei ding doltah ahi. 
1Timothy4:10 Ajeh chu eiho tu chana hi Pathen hinga ikinep jeh uva tonggima kiseh ihiuve; ama chu mi jouse huhhing-a ahin, ahideh-a chu atahsanho huhhing-a ahi." 
1Timothy4:11 Nangman hicheho hi thupeh-in lang chule hilin. 
1Timothy4:12 Nakum lhom nachapan chu koima nahsahmon umsah hih-in; ahin nangman thu lamin, houlim na lamin, mikhoto lamin, lhagao lamin, tahsanna lamin chule thenna lamin atahsanho vetjui dingin umin." 
1Timothy4:13 Keima kahung kahsen, nangma lekha simin, mi suhhalin, mi hilin anaponthon." 
1Timothy4:14 Upahon akhut angapma kiphongdoh dungjuija nakipeh thilpeh nanga um chu lhadoh loujenin. 
1Timothy4:15 Nangma hichenga hin gen ngaijin ponthon, chule hichenga chun umjing jengin; mi jouse henga nakhantou akiphondoh theinan." 
1Timothy4:16 Nangmale nathuhila chun kigingphan chingtheijin; chule hichenga chun umin; hiti chun bolle chun nangmale nathuhil ngaiho agoma nahuhhing ding ahi. 
1Timothy5:1 Upa tehse phohsal hih-in, napa tobangin jolthon; khangdongho nasopi bangin;" 
1Timothy5:2 Nupi tehse ho nanu tobangin, chule numei khangdongho chu nanaonu teho tobangin lung thengselin ngaiton." 
1Timothy5:3 Meithai kichehtah ho chu jabolin. 
1Timothy5:4 Amavang meithai achate ahiloule atute uma chu amaho chun amasan a-insunguva ngailut vetsahje heuhen, chule ahinguva nule pate phatna-a lethuhje kisinu hen; hichu Pathen anga aphale lah theitah ahi." 
1Timothy5:5 Ahin meithai kichehtah achanga uma vang chu Pathen'a kinema, sunle jana thumle taona jenga beh jingji ahi." 
1Timothy5:6 Amavang atahsa nomsahna lam jenga kipenu vangchu ahinpet jenga jong athisa ahi. 
1Timothy5:7 Amaho chu seiset achan louna dingun thupeh hicheng hi pen. 
1Timothy5:8 Ahivangin koi hijongle ama mite ding ngaito lou, ahideh chu ama insung mite ding ngaito lou chun, tahsan chu aledoh ahitai, atahsanlou sanga chonsejo ahi." 
1Timothy5:9 Kum somgup noija mi hilou, pasal khat ji hisa," 
1Timothy5:10 thilpha bolnatina seiphat changsa, chate khoukhahsa, jindot themsa, mithengte keng silpehsa, ahesoh gentheiho phatna bolsa, chonphatna jouse nungjuisa hitobang louse chu meithaijin sun hih-in." 
1Timothy5:11 Ahin nutil meithai vang chu meithaijin sun hih-in; amaho chun Christa douna-in atahsa nomsahna dingu angaito jeh-un jinei ding agojiuve; 
1Timothy5:12 chule akipehnao masa apailhah jeh-un themmo achangjiuve. 
1Timothy5:13 Chule chuche tailou jong chun, intina alengleuvin, thaset apanjiuve; chutigoh jong hilouvin, amuhthem akamjaovun, minatoh taimon, seilou ding ding aseijiuve." 
1Timothy5:14 Hijeh chun, chutobang nutil meithai chun ji neihen, cha hinghen, inneinu na tonghen, melma chun aseisetna dingu kom beihelin umleu kati." 
1Timothy5:15 Ajeh chu tu jengin jong mi kimkhat Satan nungjui jin akihei mangtaove. 
1Timothy5:16 Atahsana pasal ahiloule numei khattou meithai neija aumle, ama chun kithopi hen; houbung pohgihsah hihhen; houbung chun meithai kichentah chu akithoipi theina dingin." 
1Timothy5:17 Upa vaihom themho, thusei lamle mihil lama ponpana gunchuho chu, ajat ni-a ginle jan umuhen." 
1Timothy5:18 Ajeh chu Pathen lekhabun, bongchal chang chil pet amuh som hih-un; chule Natongan athaman asanding chu adol ahi, ati." 
1Timothy5:19 Upadol hehna chu ahetoh nile thum ahi loule, la hih-in." 
1Timothy5:20 Adangin kichatna anei theina dingin, achonseho chu japi angsung tah-a sosalin." 
1Timothy5:21 Pathen toh, Pakai Jesu Christa, chule vantil kilhengho mitmu-a hiche thuhi kapeh nahi, kichentah-a hetoh loule jachen louva thu tan louvin kathupeh cheng hi mangin; langneijin imacha bol hihhelin." 
1Timothy5:22 Koima chunga nakhut ngampai jeng hih-in; chule midang chonset chan khompi hih-in; chule kisutheng jingin. 
1Timothy5:23 Na-oisung jehle nadammo jing jeh chun twisihkeo jeng don louvin, lengpitwi themkhat khat anamangjitan." 
1Timothy5:24 Khattou chonsetna kilangtah ahin, thutan na-a lhung masa jengji ahi; chule abang khattou setna vangin amaho nung ajuijon ahi;" 
1Timothy5:25 Chonphat najong chutobangma chu kilangtah ahi; chule chutobang dang dang chu im thei imacha aumpoi. 
1Timothy6:1 Pathen min chule athuhil chu taitoma aum louna dingin, namkoljon poh noija um soh ho chengsen a-pakaite chengu chu jabolna changdinga lom ahiubang tah-in bulhing setnin jaboluhen." 
1Timothy6:2 Chule atahsana pakai neihon amaho chu sopi ahi jeh chun nahsahmon boldao hen; chusangin hajen chehjohen, ajeh chu anatoh naova kon phatchomna muho chu atahsana le amaho dinga dei umtah ho ahiuve. Hitiho thuhi hil inlang tilkhouvin." 
1Timothy6:3 Mi khattou thuhil chomdang hila auma, thupha kicheh, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa thu leh Pathen ngaisahna lam thuhilpha chu asan louleh;" 
1Timothy6:4 Ama chu ahoithojin, imachala ahejipoi; hettah sangin kinelna, thu nelkalna hivei aveijin, hia kon chun kithangset, kinah, kiseisetto, kiginmo, nelhatna asohjin ahi;" 
1Timothy6:5 chutobang miho lung chu sesohjia ahin, thutah neilou ahiuvin, Pathen ngaisahna hi sumlam phatchomnan angaito jiuve, hitobanga kon chun kikangsen." 
1Timothy6:6 Ahin lunglhaisela Pathen ngaisah hi phatchomna tah chu ahi; 
1Timothy6:7 Ajeh chu eihon vannoi'a hin imacha ihinpo lutpouve, chule atahbeh-in hichea kona jong imacha ipohdoh thei dingu ahipoi;" 
1Timothy6:8 Ahinla eihon anneh chule nihchen ponsil ineijule hichea chu ilunglhai jeng dingu ahi. 
1Timothy6:9 Hao lung goho vang chu lhepna-a leh thangkola chule ngolna tintangle suhset nomna lam tamtah-a alha lutjiuvin, miho suhgamnale manthah na-a alhah lhumsah jiuve." 
1Timothy6:10 Ajeh chu sum ngailut hi setna jouse bul ahi; hichu mu ding akihabolna lama mi kimkhat tahsana-a konin avah mangun, amahole amaho lunghemna tamtah-in akisun jiuve." 
1Timothy6:11 Ahin, Pathen mi, nangma vang hichenga kon chun jamin; chule chonphatna, Pathen ngaisahna, tahsan, ngailutna, thohhatna, nunnem na, hicheng chu delin." 
1Timothy6:12 Tahsan kisehna pha-a kihaseh-in ponpanin, tonsot hin kemlou chu tuh jingin; hiche dinga chu kikou nahi; chule ahetoh tamtah ang sunga phondohna phatah chu naphondoh ahitai." 
1Timothy6:13 Imajouse hinsah Pathen leh Pontius Pilate ang sunga phondoh phatah phongdoh-ah Christa Jesu mitmu-a, hiche thupeh hi kapeh nahi," 
1Timothy6:14 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung kilah kahsen, nangman thupeh hi boh beh louhelle seisetna um louhelin chingin." 
1Timothy6:15 Thunei khatseh, lengho Leng leh pakaiho Pakai, pachat umtah chu aphatcha hung kilah ding ahi;" 
1Timothy6:16 Ama changsehbou chu thilouna neija ahin, nailut theihoi hilou vah-a chenga ahi; ama chu koiman mukha lou chule mu jong mu thei lou ahi, ama jenga chun choi-at le tonsot thilbol thei thahat chu umjing hen. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Tu hinkho-a vannoi leiset thila haoho chu ahoitho louna dingun hilchah-in, kichetna bei suma kingai louvin, thil jouse imanchah dinga eipeuva Pathen joh-a kingaijuhen;" 
1Timothy6:18 Amahon thilpha boluhen, thilpha bola chun hao uhen; hop ding jong phaluhen, mi tonan jong thanomuhen;" 
1Timothy6:19 Tonsot hinna chu atuhchah theina dingun, khonung hinkho-a dinga bulpha neija akikhol theina dingun hilin." 
1Timothy6:20 Vo Timothy, nangma nakichin sah chengse hi hongphan; chule hou seisetna thumotsei amahon chihna atiu, alam loutah-a kinelna-a kon chun kihei mangin;" 
1Timothy6:21 Mi kimkhat hiche chihna chu ahoitho piuvin, tahsan nalama abidoiju akheltaove. Lungsetna chu nachunga umhen, Amen." 
2Timothy1:1 Christa Jesu'a um hinna thutep dungjuija Pathen lunggot tah-a kipansah Jesu Christa solchah, Paul'in," 
2Timothy1:2 kacha ngaitah Timothy hengah; Pa Pathen le I-Pakaiyu Christa Jesu'a konin lungset, hepi chule lungmon nachungah umhen." 
2Timothy1:3 Kapute kapatea kona sele pha hetna thenga kahou Pathen chu thangvah jia katao lai chana nangma geldoh jinga um kahi; 
2Timothy1:4 Namit lhi lon chu kageldoh jingin, kipana kadim theina dinga, nangma mu noma asun ajana tao jing jeng kahi." 
2Timothy1:5 Tahsan kijentah nanga aum chu kageldoh jinge, masanga napi Lois lung sungle nanu Eunice lung sunga chenga chu, nang lung sunga jong achen kagingchai." 
2Timothy1:6 Hijeh-a chu keima khut ngap vanga Pathen thilpeh nanga umchu nakonsah jing theina dinga, kahin geldohsah kit nahi." 
2Timothy1:7 Ajeh chu Pathen'in eiho kichatsetna lhagao eipepouve, thilbolthei thahat le ngailut, chule lungthim themna lhagaobou eipeh-u ahi." 
2Timothy1:8 Hijeh chun I-Pakaiyu thu hettohsah thulam dolle asohchang keima chungchang thudola jong jahcha hih helin; ahin Pathen thilbolthei thahat dungjuijin Kipana Thupha jala thoh hahsa hi neithohpin; 
2Timothy1:9 Amatah chun eihuhhingu ahi, chule kouna thenga eikouvu ahi; eiho natoh dungjuija ahipoi, ama lunggotle amilungset dungjui-a bou ahi; hiche lungsetna chu tonsot tonsot masang peh-a Christa Jesu'a eiho eina pehsao ahi;" 
2Timothy1:10 Ahin tu-a vang Eihuh hinga Christa Jesu hung kilah-a kona kilangdoh ahitai, aman thina asubeijin Kipana Thupha-a hinna le thilouna chu vah-a ahinpoh ahi;" 
2Timothy1:11 Hiche Kipana Thupha lama chu keima chidang namdang te henga lhangsamle solchah chule houhila panga kahi. 
2Timothy1:12 Hijeh-a chu hesoh genthei hichengpi hi kathoh ahi; ahinla kajahchapoi; ajeh chu katahsan chu keiman kahei; chule avop dinga akhutna kapehdoh chengse chu chuche nikho-a dinga chu voppha-a hongbit thei ahi, ti katahsan kichene." 
2Timothy1:13 Keima-a kona najah thupha kichehho vettoh-a jui ding dol chengse chu Christa Jesu'a um ginchatnale ngailutna chun tuh jingin. 
2Timothy1:14 Nangma kipe-a thilpha chu eihoa chenga Lhagao Theng chun hongphan. 
2Timothy1:15 Phygellus le Hermogenes teho Asia gama um chengsen einung ngatsoh taove, hichu nangin nahenai." 
2Timothy1:16 Onesiphorus insung mite chu Pakaiyin hepihen; ajeh chu aman kalung asuhal matchet jingjin ahi; chule kabulput jong ajachat pipoi; 
2Timothy1:17 Ahin Rome kho-a ahungin jong gunchu tah-in eiholin eihung holdoh jengin ahi. 
2Timothy1:18 Pakaiyin ama chu hiche phattheina hi pehen, hiche nikho ni chule Pakai koma hepina changhen; chule Ephesus kho-a alhacha natoh nasatje chu nangman nahenai." 
2Timothy2:1 Chuti ahi jeh chun, kacha, nangma Christa Jesu'a uma lungsetna-a chun thilboltheina thahat neijin umin." 
2Timothy2:2 Chule ahetoh tamtah ang sunga keima-a kona najah chengse chu ginchat um miho chu pedoh-in, amaho jong chun midangho ahil thei dingu ahi." 
2Timothy2:3 Nangman Christa Jesu sepai phatah bangin ahahsa kathohgim hi neithohpin. 
2Timothy2:4 Sepai galsat pet koima tu hinkho-a khankho ding gelnan akisunoh jipoi, pha sa-a sepaija apansahpa lunglhaisah dingbou alung ahi." 
2Timothy2:5 Chule golseh kitetna jenga jong khattouvin gol jona dingin kihabol nama jeng jongle, dan ngaitah-a abol loule, lal lukhuh akhuhjipoi." 
2Timothy2:6 Loubol mi natongima chu agam ga chang masapen dingdol ahi. 
2Timothy2:7 Kasei hi ipi ahi geltohin; ajeh chu Pakaiyin imalam jouse-a lungthim napeh ding ahi. 
2Timothy2:8 Kathuhil Kipana Thupha dungjuija, athi lah-a kona thoudoh kit, David chilhah Jesu Christa chu geldoh jing jengin;" 
2Timothy2:9 Hiche Kipana Thupha jeh-a chu keima akhanggilou banga bulput geija hesoh genthei kathoh ahi; ahivangin Pathen thu chu akihentang dehpoi. 
2Timothy2:10 Hijeh-a chu keiman lhenchom ho dinga, amaho Christa Jesu'a um huhhingna chu achan theijuva tonsot loupina chutoh anei theina dinguva, hichengpi hi kathohgim ahi." 
2Timothy2:11 Hiche kisei hi ginchat umtah kisei ahi, Athina-a ithiule ahinna-a jong ihin dingu;" 
2Timothy2:12 Athoh chu ithohpiule avaipoh jong ipohpi dingu ahi; eihon ama seilepleu hen, aman jong eiseilep dingu ahi;" 
2Timothy2:13 Eiho ginchatna bei ihiule, ama chu ginchat umtah hijing ahi; ajeh chu ama kiseilep thei lou ahi." 
2Timothy2:14 Nangman thu hicheng hi geldohsah jingin; phatchomna bei moh thu pouva akinel baotam louna dingun, Pakai anga hilchahjin; amaho dinga mansuhna ahibouve." 
2Timothy2:15 Nangma kipatep themchang banga Pathen'a kipehna dingin, gunchun ponpanin, jachatna beihel natong mi hin, thutah thu chu jangkeichan homjallin." 
2Timothy2:16 Amavang Pathen jalouna, hou seisetna, moh thu mai maija konin kihei mangin; ajeh chu chutobang deiho chu Pathen ngaisahmo na lama chal tou cheh cheh ding ahiuve;" 
2Timothy2:17 Chule athu-u jong chun masemon nehkem banga aneh dingu ahi: alah uva lha-a chu Hymenaeus le Philetus ahilhone; 
2Timothy2:18 Amaho chu thutah lampia kona petmanga ahiuvin, amahon Thokitna chu kichaisa ahitai atiuvin, mi kimkhat tahsanna alehei taove." 
2Timothy2:19 Ahinla Pathen khombul phu dettah chu ading jingnai; achunga hiche thuhi Kinama ahin, koi koi ama-a ahi Pakaiyin ahenai. Chule, koi hile Christa min pana chu chonphat louva konin kikhin manghen." 
2Timothy2:20 Amavang inpi sunga khun sanale dangka bel jeng uma ahipoi, thingle leibel jong aumin, hicheho chu abang sahlut dol aumin, abang sahlut lou dol aume." 
2Timothy2:21 Hichenga kona kithensodoh chu ama chu sahlut doltah ahi, akisutheng ahin, Pakai natonga lomtah ahin, chule thilpha bolna lam jouse-a dinga kigosa ahi." 
2Timothy2:22 Nangma vang gollhanlai lungtup lungngaija konin jamin; chule chonphatna, tahsan, ngailut, lungmon, chule lungthengsela Pakai henga taoho toh pumkhat hina hicheng chu hadelin," 
2Timothy2:23 Ahin ngolkaile lungthimbeiho kinelna-a lhah ding nom hihhelin; hichea kon chun kinahna asohjin ahi, nahei." 
2Timothy2:24 Pakai soh chun doubol angai ahipoi; chusanga chu mi jouse dinga nunnema, mihil thema, lungdehat ding," 
2Timothy2:25 Chule lungnema adouho chu apuijang dingjoh ahibouve; chutia chu Pathen'in ijem tia thutah hetna lama lungheina apeh khatle; 
2Timothy2:26 Ama lunggot lama Diabol'in gal hinga amatnao thangkola kon chun kiteldoh thei khat nunte. 
2Timothy3:1 Amavang hiche hi heuvin, ni nunung lamle phat hahsa khohtah hung lhung ding ahi." 
2Timothy3:2 Hiche teng chule mi amachangmai kingailua, sum ngailut, nomham, huset le hoitho, taitomhat, nu thu pa thu ngailou, phatna ngaisah lou, then louna," 
2Timothy3:3 Lungsetna neilou, kihou champi mohel, hehset hat, ti kitimlou, kichat um, phatna ho-a," 
2Timothy3:4 Tahsan pailha, kichamsah,kiletsah, chule Pathen ngailut sanga nopsah ngailut johna;" 
2Timothy3:5 Pathen ngaisah lhem-a athahat athilbol thei janom lou, hicheng chu hung umding ahi; hichenga kon jong chun kihei mangin." 
2Timothy3:6 Amaho lah-a kimkhat doha lungthimin mi ina alutjiuvin, chonset pohgih po-a, lung ngaichat tamtah puilonle," 
2Timothy3:7 Chule akihil jing vanga thutah hetheilou numei lungthimbeiho chu alhem lhaovin, gal hingin amanjiovin ahi." 
2Timothy3:8 Chule Jannes le Jambres in Mosi adoudal lhon bang banga chu hiteho jong hin thutah chu adoudalu ahi; lungput sesa, tahsan lam thua Pathen deimo mi ahiuve." 
2Timothy3:9 Ahivangin amaho chu gamlatah mason lou ding ahiuve; khatteni banga chu amaho jong angolnao chu mi jouse jah-a kisei phongle ding ahi. 
2Timothy3:10 Nangma vang kathuhil, kanun kakhan, kalunggot, tahsan, thohhat, ngailut, lungdehat, bolsetna tintangle, hesoh genthei kathoh nungjuija nahi tai." 
2Timothy3:11 Antioch kho-a, Iconium'a chule Lystra kho chengsea kachunga itobang thu sohtam, bolsetna ijat kathoh hitam, ahin Pakaiyin chutiho jouse-a kon chun eihuhdoh tai." 
2Timothy3:12 Chule koi hile Pathen ngaisah kijentah-a Christa Jesu'a hinding lung go chan chun bolsetna athoh ding ahi. 
2Timothy3:13 Ahin migilouho chule milhemlhaho vang chu setna lama khangtou cheh cheh ding ahiuve; amaho doha kilhemlha ahiuvin, doha alheplhah dingu ahi." 
2Timothy3:14 Ahin nangma vang nakihilsa chengsele naphotchensa chengsea chun dingdet jingin; koi koija kona kihila nahi nangman nahenai. 
2Timothy3:15 Chule huhhing-a umna dinga nachihsah thei Pathen lekhabu theng chu nachapan laija patna nahin hetsapeh ahitai. 
2Timothy3:16 Pathen'in ahaikhum Pathen lekhabua thu kisun chengse chu kihilna-a, kiphona-a, kipuijangna-a, chonphat kisinsahna dinga phatah ahi;" 
2Timothy3:17 chutia chu Pathen mi chu pha chamkim keija, thilpha bolna lama chamkim keija kigosa dema um thei ding ahi." 
2Timothy4:1 Hijeh-a chu keiman Pathen anga ahingle athiho thu tan dinga Pakai Jesu Christa anga, ama hung kilahna le alenggam chu pana guntah-a kahilchah nahi;" 
2Timothy4:2 Thu chu hil lhanglen; aphatle aphat louva jong kigosan umjing jengin; lungnengin hiltoh thonlang, athemo nao hetsahjinlang, sosaljin chule tilkhoujin." 
2Timothy4:3 Ajeh chu hitobang phat hi hung lhung ding ahi, mihon thuhilpha kicheh chu angai thei lou ding, akolu thah tuntuna ama ama lung ngaichat dungjuija, mihil akikhop khom dingu ahi;" 
2Timothy4:4 Chule thutah-a kona anau ahei manguva, moh thusim lama lamvai dingu ahi." 
2Timothy4:5 Ahin nangma vang imalam jouse-a limgehchan um jingin; thohhahsa thoh-in, evangelist na chu tongin; nalhacha natoh chu bulhit molson." 
2Timothy4:6 Ajeh chu tu-a hi keima eikipedohsa ahitai, kapotdoh phat hung lhunga ahitai." 
2Timothy4:7 Golseh phatah chu kaseh joutai, kalhaitetna kachaitai, tahsan chu kamolsoi," 
2Timothy4:8 tu-a kipat hi keima dinga chonphatna lal lukhuh chu koisa uma ahitai; chondih-a thutan Pakai chun hiche nikho ni chule eipeh ding ahi; keima chang jenggoh hilouva, ama hung kilah ngailu chengse jong chu apeh ding ahi." 
2Timothy4:9 Kaheng lama hungvahna dingin hung kihabolin; 
2Timothy4:10 Demas'in tulai vannoi leiset angailut jeh-in, keima eidalhan Thessalonica'a achetai; Crescen Galatia lama achen, chule Titus Dalmatia lama achei;" 
2Timothy4:10 Demas'in tulai vannoi leiset angailut jeh-in, keima eidalhan Thessalonica'a achetai; Crescen Galatia lama achen, chule Titus Dalmatia lama achei;" 
2Timothy4:11 Luke changseh keimatoh kaume. Mark hinpuijin hung lhonin; ama chu lhacha natohna-a kadinga phachom tah ahi. 
2Timothy4:11 Luke changseh keimatoh kaume. Mark hinpuijin hung lhonin; ama chu lhacha natohna-a kadinga phachom tah ahi. 
2Timothy4:11 Luke changseh keimatoh kaume. Mark hinpuijin hung lhonin; ama chu lhacha natohna-a kadinga phachom tah ahi. 
2Timothy4:12 Tychicus vang Ephesus lama kasoltai. 
2Timothy4:13 Troas khopi-a Carpus khutna kasangkhol len kadalhah chule lekhabu ho, ahideh-a savun lekhabu ho chu, nahung tengle hinpon." 
2Timothy4:14 Alexander sumsan kheng chu kachunga akhang gilou lheh jenge; athilbol dungjuijin Pakaiyin lethuh nante. 
2Timothy4:15 Nangjong ama lama chun hung kihongphan; ama chun ithu-u hi hadouvin adoudalin ahi. 
2Timothy4:16 Keima kakihona thu kasei masahpen chun koimacha eipanpi aumpon, mijousen eidalha sohkeijun ahi; hichu amaho themon kisim hihhen tia Pathen henga katao ahi." 
2Timothy4:17 Achuti vangin keima vanga thu chu hillhanga aum sohkeija, chidang namdangho jousen ahet theina dingun, Pakai chun eidinpin eihat sahtai; hichun keipi kam sunga kon chun kasohchatan ahi." 
2Timothy4:18 Pakai chun gitlou thilbol jouse-a konin eihuh doh-intin, avan gama dingin eihuhhing nante; Minlet loupi chu tonsot tonsot geijin ama-a hi jinghen. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Priscilla le Aquila chule Onesiphorus insung mite chu salam'in. 
2Timothy4:20 Erastus Corinth-a aumdentai; Trophimus vang anat jeh-in Miletus-a kadalhatai. 
2Timothy4:21 Nangma phalbi kah-a hung dingin hung kihabolin. Eubulus teho, Puden teho, Linus teho, chule sopite jousen nasalamui." 
2Timothy4:22 Pakai Jesu Christa'n nalhagao umpihen. Nabonchao chunga Pathen lungsetna umhen, Amen." 
Titus1:1 Paul, Pathen soh, Pathen milhen tahsana dungjui le Pathen ngaisahna tolhona thutah hetna lama Jesu Christa solchah;" 
Titus1:2 Tonsot hinna kinepna-a chu jou sei theilou Pathen chun tonsot tonsot masanga atepsa ahitai; 
Titus1:3 Ahinla aphatcha athu chu kihil lhanga kiphongdoh ahi; Eihuh hinguva Pathen thupeh dungjuija chuche hillhangna chu eikichinsah ahitai. 
Titus1:4 Tahsan lhangpi thudola kacha tahtah Titus henga: Pa Pathen le Eihuh hinguva Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin lungset, khoto chule lungmon lhunghen." 
Titus1:5 Thil kibol bulhing lou chengse chu naboltup sohkeija chule khopi tinchenga upaho napansah ding, hiche dinga chu Crete'a kadalhah nahi." 
Titus1:6 Mi chu koi hile nolna bei, numei khatseh ji-a neija, chule achate chu Pathen tahsan hia chon chatvaina lamle thua nun louna lama seiset changlou hi ding ahi." 
Titus1:7 Ajeh chu iham itile houbung lamkai chu Pathen gou chinga ahi jeh-a chu nolna bei hi dingdol ahi; kichamsah, lungsabai, ju-a lop, mideng-ah, alam louva phatchomna ding ngaito-a kilose mi hilou ding;" 
Titus1:8 Amavang jindot them, phat ngailu-a, lung limgeh, chondih, atheng, ama chang kitimthei mibou hi ding ahi;" 
Titus1:9 Chule thuhilpha kicheh-a chu mi thuhil athepma, mi nelkal hat teho chu athemo nao ahetsah theina dinga, akihil dungjuija tahsan umtah thu chu tuhchah mi hiding ahi." 
Titus1:10 Thua nung louva thumot seile dohapan mi tamtah aume, ahideh-a chu cheptanho lah-a mi ahiuve;" 
Titus1:11 Amaho chu akamu huhbing ding ahi; alam louva phatchomna ding gutnan ahildol louhelu thu ahilun, mi kimkhat insung achoh chavaitaove." 
Titus1:12 Amaho thudol mi themgao khatnin ahiti seije, Crete miho chu a-imatih chana jou jing sahang ahiuvin, thasea annehhat ahiuve, ati." 
Titus1:13 Hiche het tohsahna hi adihtah mong ahi. Chuti ahi jeh chun amaho tahsan kicheh mi ahina dingun nasatah-in phohsalin," 
Titus1:14 Thutah-a kona mi heimanga Juda miho moh thusimle miho thupeh-a lunglut daohen. 
Titus1:15 Atheng dinga imajouse thengsoh ahi, ahin akisuboh atahsan louho ding vanga athenga khatcha umlou ahi, thentah sanga alungule ase apha hetnau agoma bohjia ahi." 
Titus1:16 Pathen kahei, tin akam sungun aseidoh naovin, anatoh lama ajanom pouve; amaho chu thet umtah, thu ngailou ahiuvin, thilpha bolna lama pannabei ahiuve." 
Titus2:1 Nangma vangin thuhilpha kicheh chutoh kitoh thu seijin; 
Titus2:2 Upaho chu kitim thei, ja umtah, lunglimtah, chule ngailutna le ginchat, chule lungdehat kichehtah mi ahi theina dingun, hilin;" 
Titus2:3 Chutima chun nupi tehse ho jong chu mi ja um gingkhen hiuhen, mi hehsehat le lengpitwi tamtah sohnu hilouva, thilpha lama mihil hiuhen;" 
Titus2:4 Chutia chu amaho chun nutil khangdongho chu a-inneipute chengu ngailutle achateu ngailutje kisinsah uhen; 
Titus2:5 Alung limgeh, chon thengtah, inmun natong mi ahiuva, mihepi them ahiuva, a-inneipute chengu thu amanuva, chutia chu Pathen thu chu taitoma aum louna dingin, hilin." 
Titus2:6 Chutobangma chun gollhangho chu lunglim gehcha aumna dingun tilkhouvin; 
Titus2:7 Imalam jouse-a amahon thilpha bolna lama avettoh-a ajui dingun umin; nathuhila chun bohbehlou nahidan, nabukim dan, nakitahje dan musah-in," 
Titus2:8 Seiset oimo-a aum louna dingin, chutia chu akaleh lama panga chu ichunguva thuse sei ding nei louva ajachat theina dingin." 
Titus2:9 Soh ho chu a-pakai ho chengu thu noija aumna dingule imalam jouse-a amaho lunglhaina lama aumna dingun tilkhouvin; nelkal louhel hiuhen; 
Titus2:10 Imacha kiseldoh nei louvin tahsanpha kichehtah musah hiuhen; chutia chu imalam jouse-a Eihuh hinguva Pathen thuhil chu ajephoi theina dingun. 
Titus2:11 Ajeh chu Pathen milungset hung kilah-a mi jouse huhhingna chu ahinlhut ahitai; 
Titus2:12 Hitia chu eiho, Pathen ngaisah lounale vannoi leiset lung ngaichat jouse pumpaija, lunglima chondih-a chule Pathen ngaisahna neija tu khanga hi ikhosah dingu ahi," 
Titus2:13 Chule kinepna thanop um tah chule Pathen loupi chungnungle Eihuh hinguva Jesu Christa loupina hung kilah dinga chu kat jinga i-um dingu ahi chu, eihilu ahitai;" 
Titus2:14 Chonphat louna jouse-a kona aman apeh-a eiho eilhatdoh theina dingule, ama-a hi dinga thilpha bola tompan mi vai khat ama dinga akisuhtheng theina dinga, ama chu eiho dinga kipedoh ahitai." 
Titus2:15 Nangman thu hicheng hi seijin, thunei kimkei tah-in tilkhouvin, phohsalin; koimacha kinahsahmosah hihhelin." 
Titus3:1 Nangman amaho chu vaipoho le thunei ho thu noija umdingin, sei ngaija thua nung dingin, thilpha bol lam jouse-a kigosa dema umdingin," 
Titus3:2 chule mi koima seise louhela, mi koima setna hol louva, chonnema, mi jouse chunga nunnema chon dingin jong hilphan." 
Titus3:3 Ajeh chu eiho jong masanga chu lungthimbei, sei ngailou, thua nunglou, lheplhah, lungngai chatle nomsahna tamtah soh anahia, kimitthiple kithangset to-a uma, hot hattah-a khatle khat kihoto-a inahiu ahi." 
Titus3:4 Ahinla Eihuh hinguva Pathen mihepile mihem angailutna ahung kilahdoh phat hin," 
Titus3:5 Eihon eiho chama ibolu chonphat thilbol vanga hilouva, aman amilungset dungjuija eihuhdoh uva, penthahna-a asila, lhagao thenga athah sema;" 
Titus3:6 Eihuh hinguva Jesu Christa-a kona ichunguva letset tah-a asunlhah-a eihuhhingu ahi; 
Titus3:7 Hichu amilungset vanga themchanga i-um uva, tonsot hin kemlou kinepna dungjuija gouloa eikisem theina dingu ahi." 
Titus3:8 Hiche thu kiseija hi ginchat umtah ahi; chule nangman hiti thu dola hin thu akichetje chu seijin; Pathen tahsan ho chun thilpha bol jing leu kalung ahi. Hitiho hi miho dinga aphale phatchomna ahi. 
Titus3:9 Amavang ngolhoi thudohhole khanggui thu kinel baotam, danthu dola kinah, hichenga kon chun nangma kiheimangin; hicheng chu phatchomna ahipoi, mohseh ahibouve." 
Titus3:10 Loitumbol mi chu khatvei nivei nahilchah kalin lata hih-in; 
Titus3:11 Hitobang mi chu lamvaija chule chonsejia ahi ti nahei, amale ama themlou kichan ahi." 
Titus3:12 Keiman naheng lama Artimas ahiloule Tychicus kahinsola ahile, Nicopolis'a kahenga hung dingin hung kihabolin; chukoma chu phalbi sungse-a umding kagel lhuh ahitai;" 
Titus3:13 Dan thusun Zenas le Apollos ima alhahsam lhon louna dingin, lungthim themtah-in hinlha doh-in." 
Titus3:14 Imiteu jong chu aboithei louna dingle thil ngaichat lhahsam louna dinga, thilpha bolna-a amakai theina dingun kisin uhen." 
Titus3:15 Kaumpi chengsen abonchauvin nasalamui. Tahsan na-a eingailuho chengse salam'in. Nabon chaova chunga lungsetna umhen, Amen." 
Philemon1:1 Christa Jesu jala sohchang Paul le sopi Timothy'n katoh khompiu kadeitah Philemon," 
Philemon1:2 chule ingailutnu Appia chule kasepai chanpi Arkhippa, chule na ina kikhom houbung hichengse henga chun;" 
Philemon1:3 i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa-a konin nachung uva lungsetle lungmon umhen. 
Philemon1:4 Keiman kataona-a namin kaphan ka Pathen kathangvah jingin ahi; 
Philemon1:5 Ajeh chu Pakai Jesu le mithengho jouse nangailut le tahsan thu chu kanajan ahi; 
Philemon1:6 Nangma-a um chule Christa Jesu'a um thilpha jouse hetsahna hin natahsan chu thilpha bolthei asona din katao jinge. 
Philemon1:7 Ajeh chu nangma ngailut chu hapan kakipapin kalungmonge; ajeh chu, sopi, nangma vangin mithengho alunghalui." 
Philemon1:8 Hijeh-a chu angai doltah-a bol dinga nangma thu peh ding Christa-a kangam jeng vangin," 
Philemon1:9 ngailutna jala, tehse keima Paul Christa Jesu jala sohchang hi kahung taothojoh ahi;" 
Philemon1:10 Kakihen na sunga kahin kachapa Onesimus dinga kahung tao ahi; 
Philemon1:11 Ama hi khatvei chu nadinga phachom lou ahin, tu vangin nangma dinga jong, keima dinga jong, phachom ahitai." 
Philemon1:12 Amatah chu kalungtohtah ahin, nangma henga kahin solkit tai; hijeh chun ama anasangin." 
Philemon1:13 Kipana Thupha jala kakihenna-a hi nangma thakhela eijenlea apantheina dinga keima kina dinga lhoden kagot ahin; 
Philemon1:14 Ahivangin nangma lung hina louvin ima kabol nompoi; naphatna chu khoh bola kon hilouva, nangma chamchama ahinajoh dinga kati ahi." 
Philemon1:15 Amapa hi tonsot geija nanei theina dinga, chomkhat dinga nakoidoh hikhat hinte;" 
Philemon1:16 Soh bang hita louva, soh sanga chungnungjo, sopi deitah bang hijohen, kei dingtah-a bon ahile, nangma dinga tahsa-a le Pakaiya gamchenga ha hicheh ahi." 
Philemon1:17 Chuti chu ahile nangman keima hi tohkhompi tia neigela ahile, ama hi keima neilem ding khelin analemin." 
Philemon1:18 Chule ama nangma chunga suhkhel nei ahi jongle, ahilouva nabat aum jongle, hichu keijan simjengin," 
Philemon1:19 Keima Paul'in kakhut tah-a kasut ahi, keiman sanange: hichu, nangma tah-in keima neibat chu neisan, tia kasei ahipoi." 
Philemon1:20 Ahi, sopi, nanga konin keima Pakaiyah phatchomna neineisah-in; nangman keima Christa-a neisulung halin." 
Philemon1:21 Naseingai gingcha tah-a kahinsut ahi, kathusei chu akalvala phajon bolinate, ti kahei." 
Philemon1:22 Chujongle kalhunna ding mun gotsan anakoijin; ajeh chu nangho taona vangin nangho henga peh-in uminge ti kakineme. 
Philemon1:23 Christa Jesu'a kasohchanpi Epaphras'in nasalame; 
Philemon1:24 Marcus, Aristarchus, Demas chule Luke, kakithopiho hicheng hin nasalamui." 
Philemon1:24 Marcus, Aristarchus, Demas chule Luke, kakithopiho hicheng hin nasalamui." 
Philemon1:25 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungsetna chun nalhagaovu umpihen. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Masang laijin Pathen'in abung abungin got chom got chomin themgaoho kamin iputeu ipateu hengah thu aseijin," 
Hebrews1:2 tulai ni nununga hin Achapan eiho hengah thu aseitai; hiche Achapatah chu imajouse gouloa atun ahitai, chule thilsem jouse jong hi ama khutna asemsah ahi." 
Hebrews1:3 Hiche Chapa chu aloupina vah le aumje kibahpi ama limtah ahin, athahatna thua ijakai tuh dinga ahin, amatah chun chonsetna asuthengin chungnunga Lal Chungnung pen jet lamah atoutai." 
Hebrews1:4 Chule aman vantil ho sanga min phajo gou alo bangtah-in amaho sangin achungnung jotai. 
Hebrews1:5 Ijeh-inem itile vantil ho koipen jah-a itih pena, Nangma ka-Chapa nahi, Tunia keiman kahin nahitai? chujongle, Keima a-Pa kahi ding ahin, Ama ka-Chapa hi ding ahi tia aseikhah-em?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ahin hiche apeng masapen chu vannoi leisetna ahinpui kit ding tenga ding chun, Pathen vantilte jousen ama chu chibai bohhen, ati." 
Hebrews1:7 Chule vantilte chungchang thua hitin aseije, Aman avantilho lhagao asosahjin, Alhachate chu meikong asosahjin ahi." 
Hebrews1:8 Chapa chungchang thua vang chun hiti hin aseije, Vo Pathen, nalaltouna chu tonsot tonsot geija umjing jeng ahi; Chule chondihna tengdop chu nagam tengdop ahi." 
Hebrews1:9 Nangman chonphat nangailun, khan gitlou nahon ahi; Hijeh chun Pathen'in, na-Pathen'in, naloite chengse chungvumah kipana thao nanutan ahi." 
Hebrews1:10 Chule, Pakai, atil abula nangman vannoi leiset bul naphudoh ahi; Chule vanho jong nangma khutsoh ahi." 
Hebrews1:11 Hiteho chu mangthah ding ahi, nangma vang umjing jeng nahi; Hichengse chu ponsil banga lui ding ahi;" 
Hebrews1:12 Hiteho chu nangman ponlhe banga najel lom ding ahi; Hichengse chu ponsil banga kikhel ding ahi; Nangma vang nabang nahi jinge; Nakum jong bei lou ding ahi. 
Hebrews1:13 Ahivangin keiman, Namelmate nakeng chotpha kaneisah masangsen, Kajet lamah tou jingin, tia vantil ho koipen jah-a aseikhah-em?" 
Hebrews1:14 Amaho chengse chu lhachale lhagao, sochatna gouloding teho jenle ding hinkisoldoh hilouham?" 
Hebrews2:1 Hijeh-a chu ithu jah chengseu hi lunglut tah-a igut cheh dingu ahi; achuti loule ajole chucheng chu kitolmang sah khau hite. 
Hebrews2:2 Ijeh-inem itile vantil ho kama asei thu chu dettah-a, chule suhkhelnale thua nunlouna jouse man adoltah cheh-a asanuva ahile," 
Hebrews2:3 huhhingna loupi hi nahsahmo leuhen eiho iti isochat dinguham? Hiche huhhingna hi amasa Pakai kama asei, ajahon eiho dinga aphudet ahin," 
Hebrews2:4 melchihna le thilmu kidang chule bolmo kidang got tamtah toh tho-a, alunggot doltah-a Lhagao Theng phathei kihoma chu Pathen'in jong ahettoh sahpiu ahi." 
Hebrews2:5 Ijeh ham itile khonunga hung umding vannoi leiset thu iseiju chu aman vantil ho noijah akoipoi. 
Hebrews2:6 Ahinla khatnin mun khatnah ahettohsah-in, Mihem chu ipiham, nangman nalung viltenin? Chujongle Mihem Chapa chu ipiham, nangman navil jingin?" 
Hebrews2:7 Nangman ama chu vantil ho sangin themcha khatbou nanoinun sah-in ahi; Loupitah-in gunchena lal lukhuh-in najemin ahi; Nakhutsoh jouse chunga vaipon natungin," 
Hebrews2:8 Chule imajouse abonchan akengphang noija nakoijin anoija na-umsahtai, tin aseijin ahi. Chutichun ijakai aboncha anoija akoi jeh chun, aman anoija akoi lou imacha aumtapoi. Ahivangin tu geijin eihon imajouse anoija alutsoh imu hih laijuve." 
Hebrews2:9 Ahin vantil ho sanga themcha khat anoinunsah Jesu vang chu imutaove, Pathen lungset vanga mi jouse dinga thina atepkhah tei ding mong ahin, thina athoh jeh chun choi-at nale loupina lukhuh-in akijemtan ahi." 
Hebrews2:10 Ijeh-inem itile ama dinga thil ijakai uma, ama vanga thil ijakai um, ama dinga chu chate tamtah loupina-a apuilut jouse-a chu, ahuhhingnau lamkaipa chun athohgima asuhchamkim ding thu ahi." 
Hebrews2:11 Ijeh-inem itile asuthengpale asuhthengho chu aboncha khatna konbou ahiuve. Hijeh chun aman amaho chu sopi sah ding jahcha louvin," 
Hebrews2:12 Keiman kasopite henga namin seiphong lengting, Houbung ho lah-a navahchoi la sange, atin;" 
Hebrews2:13 mun chom khatna, Kagin chatna ama jenga kangah ding ahi, atin; chukitman, Ven, keimale Pathen'in eipeh chapangte hi, ati." 
Hebrews2:14 Chuti ahi jeh chun chapangteho chu thisanle tahsa chang khom ahi jeh-u chun, thina-a thina thu neipa, hichu diabol ahi, asuhpoi theina dingle," 
Hebrews2:15 thi kichatmana hinlai sungse-a soh-a umteho jouse chu ahuhdoh theina dinga, amatah jong hichu changa ahitai." 
Hebrews2:16 Atahbeh-in aman vantil ho umchan tho louvin Abraham chilhahte umchan athojotan ahi. 
Hebrews2:17 Hiche jeh chun miho chonset thensona dinga, ama Pathen lama dinga thempu chungnung mi khototah le tahsan umtah ahina dinga chu, ijakaija asopite bangbanga ahung umding chu adoltah ahi." 
Hebrews2:18 Ajeh chu aman lhepna atoa hesoh genthei athoh jeh chun, lhepna tohho phatna bola hu thei ahi." 
Hebrews3:1 Hijeh chun, van kouna changkha sopi thengteho, itahsanu Solchah le Thempulen Chungnung Christa Jesu lam chu ha ngaitouvin." 
Hebrews3:2 Pathen insung jouse lah-a Mosi tahsan umtah ahi bang chun ama jong apansahpa lama tahsan umtah ahi. 
Hebrews3:3 Ajeh chu in sanga in sapa achoi-at joh bangtah-a chu, ama chu Mosi sanga gamchenga loupijo cheh dingdol ahi, tia kisima ahitai." 
Hebrews3:4 In jouse chu mi khat sahdoh ahi cheh-in, ahin imajouse sadohpa chu Pathen ahi." 
Hebrews3:5 Chuin khonunga thu hung kisei dingho hettohsahna dinga, Mosi chu Pathen insung jouse lah-a lhacha panga tahsan umtah ahi;" 
Hebrews3:6 Christa vang chu chapa ahin, ama insung chunga tahsan umtah ahi. Akhon ni geija iha kat naole kinepna ikisonao hi ituhdet pou ule, eiho hi a-insung mite ihiuve." 
Hebrews3:7 Chuti ahi jeh chun Lhagao Thengin asei bangin, Tunia nanghon a-awgin najah uva ahile," 
Hebrews3:8 Lunghansah na-a bang chun nalungu tahsah hih-un, Gamthipma kipatep laija bang chu bol hih-un." 
Hebrews3:9 Chukoma chun naputeu napateu vin patepnan eideh-un ahi, Chule kathilbolho kum somli amuvin ahi." 
Hebrews3:10 Hiche jeh-a chu hiche phung mite chunga hi kalung lhai lou ahi, Amaho hi imatihchana lungchavai te mong ahiuve; Ahinla amahon kalampi ahepouve;" 
Hebrews3:11 Chua kalung hanga kahahsel ahi, Hiteho kacholngah na-a lut lou ding ahiuve, kati ahitai." 
Hebrews3:12 Vo sopiteho, chingtheijun, ajole ijemtin Pathen hinga kona pul lhahna dingin, nangho lah-a jong tahsanlou lung giloupo um khauvinate." 
Hebrews3:13 Ahin chonset lheplhah-a khattou lungtah chehcheh nalah uva aum louna dingin, Tuni kiti phat chu aumlai sungin khatle khat niseh-in kitilkhoutouvin." 
Hebrews3:14 Ijeh-inem itile eihon ikinepnao tahbeh kipana hi akhon ni geija ituhdet jinguva ihipouvule, Christa kikoppi ihiu ahitai." 
Hebrews3:15 Tunia a-awgin najah uva ahile, Lunghansahna-a bang chun nalungu tahsah hih-un, akitin ahi." 
Hebrews3:16 Hiche ati hi, athu ajah jouva lunghansah chu koi koiham? Egypt gama kona Mosi khutna ahinpuidohho chengse chu hilouham?" 
Hebrews3:17 Chule kum somli sunga alung himona koi chungham? Gamthip laija along lum, hiche chonseho chunga chu hilouham?" 
Hebrews3:18 Chule hiteho kacholngah na-a lut lou ding ahiuve, tia ahahselna chu koi chungchang thua aseiham? Thu ngailouho chungchang thua hilouham?" 
Hebrews3:19 Hichea hin amahon atahsan loujeh uva lut thei lou ahitaove, ti chu imuvin ahi." 
Hebrews4:1 Hiche jeh chun eiho kichau hite, achuti loule ajole ama cholngahna-a lut theina ding thutepsa aum jeng vangin, nalah uva khattou chua lut dinga kona athona umle akilome." 
Hebrews4:2 Ijeh-inem itile Kipana Thupha ijah uva akisei chu eihon ijah mong mongu ahitan, amaho jong chutobangma chu ahi; ahivangin athu jahotoh tahsana akigop lou jeh-u chun, athujah-u chu amahon phatchomnan anei tapouve." 
Hebrews4:3 Ajeh chu atahsan eiho chengse vanghi cholngahna-a chu ilut laiju ahi; Kalunghana kahahsel banga chu, Kacholngah na-a lut lou ding ahiuve, tia, asei bang chu ahi: vannoi leiset bul aphudoh tila aman anatoh ajosohsa ahitah vangin." 
Hebrews4:4 Mun khatna aman ni sagini thudol aseijin, Chuin ni sagi nin Pathen anatoh jouse-a konin akicholngah tan ahi, ati." 
Hebrews4:5 Chukitman hikoma chun ahiti sei kitleuve, Hiteho kacholngah na-a lut lou ding ahiuve," 
Hebrews4:6 Chuti ahi jeh chun mi kimkhat cholngahna-a alut dingu aumnahlai jeh chun chule masanga Kipana Thupha kisei jasa hon ajoplou jeh uva alut lou jeh-u chun," 
Hebrews4:7 khonung sottah nungin, Tuni tin nikho khat atep kittan, David kama masanga kisei bangma chun, Tunia nanghon a-aw najah uva ahile, Nalung tahsah hih-un, ati kitnin ahi." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua'n amaho chu acholngahsah hitahenlang hile, khonunga nikho chom thu chu asei lou ding ahi." 
Hebrews4:9 Hiche jeh chun Pathen mite dingin cholngah ni-a kicholngahna aumnalai jinge. 
Hebrews4:10 Ajeh chu Pathen anatoh-a kona akicholngah banga chu acholngahna-a lut jong chu anatoh-a kona kicholngah ahitai. 
Hebrews4:11 Hijeh chun koiman chuche thua nunlou umchan chu athoa alhua aum louna dingin, cholngahna-a chu lutna dingin ponpanu hite." 
Hebrews4:12 Ajeh chu Pathen thuhi hing jingle natonghat jing ahi, chule hemto chemjam jouse sanga jong hemjo ahi, hinna le lhagao gu kisuhtohna le lhin hichengse chu sukhen theihela sunthei ahi, chule lunggel le lungthim ngaito hetoh paijen jeng thei ahi." 
Hebrews4:13 Chule thilsem ama mitmu-a langlou imacha aumpoi; ichon nao isuhtouva ilhutna dingpao mitmu-a chu imajouse asagohkeo le kihongsa ahi. 
Hebrews4:14 Vanho chengse jotpaija chea Pathen Chapa Jesu thempulen chungnunga inei jeh-u chun, itahsan iphonu hi ha tuh det jinguhite." 
Hebrews4:15 Ajeh chu ihatmonau eihetpia eithohpi phah lou thempu chungnung neija ihipouve, eibanga imalam jouse-a lhepnale patepna tohkha-a thohkha-a, ahi jenga jong chonsetna nei louheljoh ineiju ahi." 
Hebrews4:16 Hiche jeh chun hepina ichan theina dingule, panpina ingaichat phat ule lungset nale panpina imu theina dingun, hakattah-in lungsetna laltouna chu neijuhite." 
Hebrews5:1 Ijeh ham itile thempu chungnung jouse chu chonset thensona-a thilto le gan kithat alhakop theina dinguva, mi lah-a kona kilachoma mihemte dinga Pathen lam thila chu kipansah ahiuve." 
Hebrews5:2 Amaho chu ima helouho le sukhelteho chunga nemheocha lungde thei ahiuve; ajeh chu amahotah jeng jong hatmona-in aum kimvel chehjiu ahi; 
Hebrews5:3 chuti chu ahin miho dinga abol banga chu, amahotah dinga jong chonset thensona dinga kilhaina abol louthei ahipoi." 
Hebrews5:4 Chule hiche choi-atna chu Aaron banga Pathen'in akoulousen koiman ama chamin akilahpoi. 
Hebrews5:5 Hiche bang chun Christa jongin thempu chungnung hi dingin amale ama akichoi anpoi; ajah-a, Nangma ka-Chapa nahi, Tunia kahin nahi, tipajoh chun achoi-at ahibouve." 
Hebrews5:6 Chutima chun mun chom khatnah, Melchizedec umdan banga Tonsot thempu nahi, tin aseije." 
Hebrews5:7 Ama chun tahsaphe-a aumlai ni chun thina-a kona ama huhdoh theipa hengah hapena pengle mitlhi lha-a taona le thumna atoh-in, chule a-Pathen gin jeh chun ngaipeh-in aumtan ahi;" 
Hebrews5:8 Chapatah ahi jeng vangin athohna chengsea chu thua nunje kisinna ahitai. 
Hebrews5:9 Chuin ama chamkimsah sohkeijin aumin, athua nungho jouse dingin tonsot sochatna bulpi asohtan ahi." 
Hebrews5:10 Chule Melchizedec umchan banga thempu chungnung ahi, tin Pathen'in asahtai." 
Hebrews5:11 Ama thudol chu thu tamtah sei ding kaneijun, nakolsehtah jeh-un ahilchet jong ahahsai." 
Hebrews5:12 Hitih chanpia hi, nangho mihil thei nahi dingu thu ahitan chutitah sangin, khat touvin Pathen thubul kipatna jemho nahildiu nangai chaovin ahi; chule anham hilouva, bongnoi ngainalai mitoh nabangtaove." 
Hebrews5:13 Bongnoi anna neija chun, naosen ahi jeh-in, chonphatna lam thu hetna imacha ineipoi." 
Hebrews5:14 Anham vang chu mi kikhan lhitho dingbou ahi, chuteho chun ahet theinao chu aman jing jeh-un, ase apha hetkhenin athem lhehtauve." 
Hebrews6:1 Chuti ahi jeh chun Christa thuhil kipatna api lam donta louvin; chule natoh thisa-a kona lung heile, Pathen tahsan," 
Hebrews6:2 Baptize chan gotchom chom, chule khut ngap, athisaho hindoh kit, chule tonsot thutan vaihom thudol lam thuhilna bulphut kit ta louvin, pilhina lam dela masotna dingin kihaboluhite." 
Hebrews6:3 Chule Pathen'in eiphat sah uva ahile, hicheho chu ibol dingu ahi." 
Hebrews6:4 Ajeh chu khatvei khovah changsaho chun van thilpeh chu atep khataovin, Lhagao Theng changa ahitaovin," 
Hebrews6:5 chule Pathen thupha le khonunga hung soh ding thilboltheina chu tepkhasa ahitaovin; 
Hebrews6:6 Amaho chu alhuhtah uva ahile, alung heina dinguva semphat thah theihoi ahipouve; ajeh chu amahon Pathen Chapa chu amaho tuma thingpel'a khenbeh kit ahiuvin, chule lhangphong tah-ah taipongin aumsah jiuve." 
Hebrews6:7 Ajeh chu leisetnin, achunga ju jing go twi tintang anadona, adinga lei kigitpehho dinga nehdol anche louhing apensah ahin, hiche leiset chu Pathen'a konin phattheina achangin ahi." 
Hebrews6:8 Ahin ling phungle ham lingnei apendoh vangle, hichu pannabei ahin, chule sapset anaijin, akhonna chu meija govam ahi." 
Hebrews6:9 Ahin, deitahteho, chutia kasei vangun, nangho umchan chu hiche sanga phajo leh huhhing-a umnatoh kithokhom thilho nabol dingu kagingcha lheh jengui." 
Hebrews6:10 Ijeh ham itile nanghon mithengte nanajenleu ahitan; tun jong najenleuvin, hiche Pathen min lama natohgimnao le ngailutna kilanga nalhanao Pathen'in asuhmil ding chu, ama chutobanga chondihlou ahipoi." 
Hebrews6:11 Chule akhon ni geija kinepna chamkim kichentah chu mu dingin, nahapan ngai bangu chun hapan cheh-un," 
Hebrews6:12 Thase louvin tahsan leh thohhat vanga thutep mun loho chu, amaho chonnung chu jui chehleu chun, kalungu ahi." 
Hebrews6:13 Pathen'in Abraham athutep chun kihahselna ding ama sanga lenjo aum lou jeh-in, ama changin akihahselin," 
Hebrews6:14 Thon louva keiman nangma phatthei kaboh ding nahi, chule pun jong kapunsah ding nahi, ati." 
Hebrews6:15 Hiti chun aman angahat, athohhat jeh-in thutep ga chu amutan ahi." 
Hebrews6:16 Ijeh-inem itile mihon ama sanga chungnungjo chu kihahsel na-a aneijiu ahi, chule thu kichetna dinga akihahselu chu akinelnao jouse kichaina ahi." 
Hebrews6:17 Chutobanga chu Pathen'in athutep gou lo dingho chu, alung ngaito long lou ahi chu nasacheh tah-a vetsah ding lung agotna, kihahselna chu asuhdet ahi." 
Hebrews6:18 Pathen jou ahi louna kikhel lou thil ni vanga, eiho kihuh dohna dinga ima sang uva um kinepna kikoi chu tuh dinga lhaija eihon kitilkhou na nasatah ineina dinguva, abol ahi." 
Hebrews6:19 Hiche kinepna chu hinna thihhat-aija ineiju ahi; hichu kichentah, dettah ahin, chule pondal sung lam geija lut ahi;" 
Hebrews6:20 Hikom mun'a chu Jesu anamasa-a Melchizedec umchan dungjuija tonsot thempu chungnung hia, eiho dinga analut masa-a ahitai." 
Hebrews7:1 Hiche Melchizedec, Salem lengpa chu, Chungnung pen Pathen thempu ahin, chule Abraham'in lengho agatha jouva ahung kile kit chun lampia agalamton phatthei agaboh-in ahi." 
Hebrews7:2 Ama chu Abraham'in thil jouse hopsom-a hopkhat apen ahi. Amin chu amasa chonphat Leng kitina ahin, chuin Salem Lengpa ahi, hichu chamna lungmonna Lengpa kitina ahi." 
Hebrews7:3 Ama chu nu neilou, pa neilou, chilhah guilhah neilou, ahinkho kipatle ahinkho lhinna bei ahin, Pathen Chapa banga kisem ahin, hiche Melchizedec chu a-imatih chana thempu-a umjing ahi." 
Hebrews7:4 Lung gelun ngaitouvin: ipului bulpiu Abraham'in athilchom aphalai chengse hopsom-a hopkhat apehpa chu itobanga len hitam! 
Hebrews7:5 Chule Levi chate lah-a thempu dinmun changho chun, danthu nungjuija miho lah-a kona, Abraham taiguija peng ahi jeng vangin asopitehoa kona, hopsom-a hopkhat lahna ding thu aneiju ahi;" 
Hebrews7:6 Amaho phung guija kona akhanggui thu kisimtha loupa vang chun Abraham'a konin hop soma hop khat akilah-in, thutep neipatah chu phatthei aboh tan ahi." 
Hebrews7:7 Chule mineojon achunga mi-a kona bou phatthei boh amu chu kinelna bei ahi. 
Hebrews7:8 Hiche hin hopsom-a hopkhat muho vang chu thina thu noija um ahiuve; khat joh hopsom-a hopkhat mupa vang chu hing jing jeng ahi, ti hettohna kineija ahitai." 
Hebrews7:9 Chule hopsom-a hopkhat mupa Levi chun amatah-in Abraham'a konin hopsom-a hopkhat apei tilehen ti thei ahi; 
Hebrews7:10 Ajeh iham itile Melchizedec chun apu agalamtoa chu Levi atai sunga umnalai ahi. 
Hebrews7:11 Chuti chu ahin, Levi ho themputna chu chamkim sohkei thei hile (ajeh chu chua kona chu mihon chonna danthu amu-u ahi), Aaron umdan banga kisei louva, Melchizedec umdan banga ding thempu got chom khat umdoh lou i-khohta dingham?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ajeh chu thempu akikhele danthu jong khel tei ding thu ahi. 
Hebrews7:13 Aumchan thu kiseipa chu phung chom mi ahi; chuche phunga mi koimacha maicham mun'a natonga aumpoi. 
Hebrews7:14 Ijeh ham itile I-Pakaiyu chu Juda phunga penga ahi chu kichentah-in akilange; ahin hiche phung thua chun Mosi'n thempuho thudol ima aseipoi. 
Hebrews7:15 Chule tahsaphe thupeh danthu dungjuija hilouvin, mantih neilou hinna thahat dungjuijoh ahin," 
Hebrews7:16 Melchizedec lim banga thempu chombeh khat hung uma ahile, kathu seiju hi kichen cheh ahi." 
Hebrews7:17 Ajeh iham itile hichu hettohsahna chun, Melchizedec umdan dungjuijin, Nangma tonsot thempu nahi, ati." 
Hebrews7:18 Ajeh chu ahatmole phatchomna bei ahi jeh-in chonna dan thupeh amasa chu amangthah tai. 
Hebrews7:19 Ajeh iham itile chonna dan thupeh chun imacha asucham kimpon ahi; ama mun'a chu kinepna pha chungnungjo kipolut ahitai; hiche chu eihon Pathen kom inailutnao ahi. 
Hebrews7:20 Chule achuti jeng vang chun ama chu hahsel louva thempu-a kipansah ahipoi," 
Hebrews7:21 (ijeh-inem itile amaho chu hahsel louva thempu-a kisema anahitauvin; hijongle ama vang ajah-a, Pakai chun akihahsele alung hei kit lou ding ahi, Melchizedec umdan bangin nangma tonsot thempu nahi)." 
Hebrews7:22 Chuti chu ahi jeh-in Jesu chu kitepna chungnungjo-a panga ahitai. 
Hebrews7:23 Chule amaho chu thina-in asuhmo uva apan jing thei lou jeh-un, thempu chu ana tamlheh-un ahi;" 
Hebrews7:24 Ama vang chu tonsot geija umjing ahi jeh chun khel louhel thempu mun changa ahitai. 
Hebrews7:25 Hijeh chun ama vanga Pathen kom nai lut teho chu, taopeh dinga ama hing jing jeng ahi jeh-a chu, amaho chu huhhing chamkimsoh thei ahi." 
Hebrews7:26 Ijeh ham itile chutobang thempu chungnung athena theng, lepthol neilou, boh behlou, chonsete lah-a kona kisepdoh, vanho sanga chungnung-jo-a kisema chu eiho dinga kilom mong ahi." 
Hebrews7:27 Ama chun aniseh-a thempu chung nungho banga chu, amasa ama chonset thensona-a, gan kithat alha masah ding chu akin akhohpon ahi; ijeh ham itile aman hichu amatah akilha jeng jeh chun khat veijin aseibulhit sohkeitan ahi." 
Hebrews7:28 Ajeh chu danthun apansah thempu chung nungho chu hatmona nei mihem ahiuve; danthu nunga um hahselna thu chun tonsot geija dinga kisucham kimsoh Chapa chu apansah ahi. 
Hebrews8:1 Chunga thu kisei chengse lah-a athupipen hiche ahi, Van'a Chungnung pen laltouna jet lama tou," 
Hebrews8:2 Chule mihem tundoh hilouva, Pakai tundoh houbuh tahbeh le mun theng lhachale-a pang Thempu Chungnung ineijun ahi." 
Hebrews8:3 Thempu chungnung jouse chu thilto le kithensona ganlha dinga kitung cheh ahiuve; chuti ahi jeh chun hiche Thempu Chungnung jong hin ikhat khat todoh anei tei ding thu ahi. 
Hebrews8:4 Ama vannoi leiset chunga anaum hile, thempu hilouhel ding ahi; ijeh ham itile danthu dungjuija thilto tohdoh dinga chu aum naovin ahi." 
Hebrews8:5 Amaho lhachale-a apannau chu, Mosi'n houbuh sah dinga agot laija, Pathen'in ahilchah-a ajah-a, Chingtheijin, vetkah dinga mol chunga nakivetsah lim bang bang chun bol sohkeijin, tia asei banga chu van'a thil limdanle ale ahibouve." 
Hebrews8:6 Tu vangin kitepna phajo cheh palaija apan dungjuija, kitepna chu thutep phajo chunga ahisah-a, lhacha mun phachung nung jo-a panga ahitai." 
Hebrews8:7 Ajeh chu kitepna masah chu themona beihel hile, aninapa mun ding chu kingaito lou ding ahi;" 
Hebrews8:8 ajeh iham itile amaho chu a-oimon, Veuvin, Pakaiyin hitin aseije keiman Israel phung mite leh Juda phung mite dinga, Kitepna thah kasemdoh ding nikho hung lhung ding ahitai," 
Hebrews8:9 Aputeo apateu Egypt gama kona puidoh ding ni-a akhutnuva katuh-a, Amahotoh kitepna kasemdoh, hiche kitepna tobang chu ahitapoi, Ajeh chu amaho kakitep naovah aum jompouvin ahi; Chuti ahi jeh-a chu keiman jong amaho kadon lou ahitai, tin Pakaiyin aseije." 
Hebrews8:10 Hiche nikhoho nunga Israelte toh kitepna kaphudoh ding chu Hiche hi ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseije; Alungthim uva kachondan thupeh pengting, Chule alung sunguva kasut ding ahi; Chule keima amaho Pathen hingting, amaho jong kamite hi ding ahiuve;" 
Hebrews8:11 Chule amitakipmin aheng akom le asopite chengu, Pakai chu heuvin, tia ahil lou dingu ahitai; Ajeh chu aneopena pat alenpen geija eihetsohkei dingu ahitai." 
Hebrews8:12 Asuhkhelnauva jong kahepi ding ahi, Achonsetnao le akhangitlou nau jong geldohta lou ding kahi, ati." 
Hebrews8:13 Hiche kitepna hi aman athah ahi atia ahile, amasa chu aluisah ahitai. Chutichu ahin aluija le atehta-a chu, amang ding kon ahitai." 
Hebrews9:1 Chule kitepna masa-a jong chu Pathen lhachale-a pandanle mun theng, hiche vannoi leisetna mun theng ana uma ahi." 
Hebrews9:2 Ahoubuh semu chu adan masapena chu meivah tunna, dokhang, vetsahna changlhah to uma ahin, hichu Mun Theng atiu ahi." 
Hebrews9:3 Chule pondal nina dan sunga chu houbuh Mun Theng Chungnung atiu chu uma ahin; 
Hebrews9:4 Hikoma chu gimnam twi halna sana maichamle, kitepna thingkhong sana kilonkhum chu uma ahin, kitepna thingkhong sunga chu manna umna sana bel leh, Aaron tenggol pahmum, chule kitepna songpheng ni chu uma ahi;" 
Hebrews9:5 chule achung vuma chu hepi touna lekhu-a Cherub loupitah ni uma ahin; hitiho thu chu tun akip akoijin sei joupouhite. 
Hebrews9:6 Chuti chun thil hicheng chu akisemin, thempuho Pathen houna lhachale dingin houbuh masa sunga chun alut jingjiuvin ahi;" 
Hebrews9:7 Adan nina sungnunga vang chun thempu chungnung changsehbou kum khat sungin khatvei alutjin ahi; ahivangin ama dingle miho-a ding, het louva achonsetnao thensona ding, thisan chu choi louvin alutjipoi." 
Hebrews9:8 Houbuh masa chu aumlai chansea mun theng sunga lutna lam chu kilangsoh lou ahi, tin Lhagao Thengin aphonge." 
Hebrews9:9 Chule hichu tu laija dinga tekahna ahibouve; hiche dungjuija chu thilto le kithensona jong alhajiu ahin, hitiho chun ase apha hetna lama ahouho chu achamkimsah thei lou ahi;" 
Hebrews9:10 Neh dan, don dan, kisil gotchom chomtoh tahsa polam thudan jeng ahin, semphat kah-a dinga anakingaitoa ahibouve." 
Hebrews9:11 Christa vang chu khonunga hung umding thilpha thempu chungnunga hung panga khutna sah lou, hiche thilsem lah-a hilou, alen chungnung jole gamchenga chamkimjo houbuh-a chu lut ahin," 
Hebrews9:12 Kelchale bongnou thisana hilouva, ama thisana Mun Thenga khatveiseh lutna, eiho dinga tonsot geija lhatdohna kemlou eipeh-u ahitai." 
Hebrews9:13 Ijeh ham itile kelchale bongchal thisan chule bongla vutvam kithe khuminbon akisuboho atahsa polamu athensah-a ahile: 
Hebrews9:14 Christa tonsot kemlou Lhagaova, nolna beihela, ama Pathen'a kipedoh jenga thisan chun Pathen hing lhachale-a pang dinga, thina natoh-a kona ase apha nahetnao chu gamchenga asuhtheng cheh ding ahi." 
Hebrews9:15 Chule hiche jeh-a ama chu kitepna thah palai hija, kitepna masa noija suhkhel neija themoho lhatdoh na-a athitah jeh-a chu, akikouho chu tonsot kemlou gou lo ding ahitaove." 
Hebrews9:16 Ajeh chu kitepna umna-a chu kitepna sempa chu athi lounaje umlou ahi. 
Hebrews9:17 Ajeh chu thi nunglebou thulhun chu hatjia ahi: athuteppa hinlaise vangin ahatjipoi. 
Hebrews9:18 Hiche jeh-a chu kitepna masa jong chu thisan beija kiphut det lou ahi. 
Hebrews9:19 Mosi'n danthu dungjuija thupeh miho jah-a aseichai phatnin, bongnoule kelcha thisan chu twitoh ponsan toh hyssop toh alan, lekhabule miho jouse chu athekhumin," 
Hebrews9:20 Hiche hi Pathen'in nangho napeh-u thupeh kitepna thisan chu ahi, ati." 
Hebrews9:21 Chucheng kalval jongin houbuh chule lhachaleho manchah chengse jong chu chutima chun thisan chu athekhumin ahi. 
Hebrews9:22 Danthu dungjuija chu imajouse aboncha thisana suhtheng soh himaija ahi, chule thisanso louva ngaidamna umlou ahi." 
Hebrews9:23 Hiche jeh chun hichenga chu van'a thil lima um chu hitia hi suhtheng dingdol mong ahi, van thil tahtah ho vang chu chucheng sanga longlhenna phajo cheh-a suhtheng dingdol thu ahi." 
Hebrews9:24 Atabbeh lima um khutna kisa mun thenga Christa alutpon ahi; ahin tun eiho jala Pathen anga ding dingin van'a alutjotan ahi. 
Hebrews9:25 Thempu chungnungin kumtina ama thisan hilou achoija, Mun Thenga alutji banga chu, ama thensona gan lha dinga lut matchet ahipoi;" 
Hebrews9:26 Chuti chu hile vannoi kisemtila patna aman tamtahvei athohgim ding ahitai; ahivangin tun aman amatah longlhengin akitoh jengin chonset suhbeina dingin tu khang nunungpen hin khatveiseh ahung kilahtan ahi. 
Hebrews9:27 Chule mihemte dinga khatvei thia chujoule thutanna hung umding chu gotsa ahin; 
Hebrews9:28 Hiche banga chu Christa jong mi tamtah chonset pomang dinga kitoh ahitan, aniveina-a chonsetna beihela ama ngah jingho huhhing dinga hung kilang ding ahi." 
Hebrews10:1 Danthu chu khonunga thilpha hung umding lima hi umbou ahin, alim tahbeh ahi lou jeh chun, akumtina longlhenna alhajiu chun ahin naiho chu achamkimsah joupouvin ahi." 
Hebrews10:2 Chuti lou hile longlhenna alhajiu chu tangta lou dingham? Ahouho chu khatveija kisutheng hileu setna ahetnao chu umtalou ding ahi. 
Hebrews10:3 Ahinla hicheng chun kumtin in achonsetnao ageldohsah jotaovin ahi. 
Hebrews10:4 Ajeh iham itile bongchal le kelcha thisana chonset suhbeihoi hilou ahi. 
Hebrews10:5 Hijeh chun Christan vannoi leisetna ahung lut laijin, Nangman longlhenle thilto nanadeipon, Ahin keima dingin tahsa neigot pehtan ahi;" 
Hebrews10:6 Ganpumgo thilto le chonset thensona longlhenna chun nana lunglhai tapon ahi; 
Hebrews10:7 Chuin keiman, Ven, keima kahungtai (Lekhabua keima thudola hitin akisune). Vo Pathen, keiman nangma lungdeilam bol dinga hung kahi kati, tin aseije." 
Hebrews10:8 Aman hicheng chu aseijin, Nangman longlhenna le thilto chule ganpumgo thilto chule chonset thensona longlhen chu nanadeitapon, hichenga chun lung jong nana lunglhai pon ahi, (hichu danthu dungjuija kitoh ahi jeh-in):" 
Hebrews10:9 Chujouvin, o Pathen Ven, keima nangma lungdeilam bol dinga hung kahi, ati. Hiche anunungjo hi aphudohna dinga amasajo alahdoh ahitai." 
Hebrews10:10 Hiche lungdei lama chu Jesu Christa tahsa akitoa a-imatih chana dinga khatveija akitodoh jeng vanga chu eiho suhthenga uma ihitaove. 
Hebrews10:11 Chule thempuho chengse adingun niseh-in hou lhachalen apangun, imatih chana chonset sumang theilou longlhen chu avel avelin atohdoh jiuvin ahi." 
Hebrews10:12 Ama vangin chonset thensona longlhen khatseh chu tonsot geija dingin atohdoh-in, Pathen khut jet lama atouvin," 
Hebrews10:13 Hiche kalse chun amelmaho akeng chotpha akisem masang seuvin angah jingin ahi. 
Hebrews10:14 Ijeh-inem itile suhthenga umho chu thilto khatseh-in tonsot geija dinga achamkimsah ahitai. 
Hebrews10:15 Chule Lhagao Theng jongin eihet tohsah naove; 
Hebrews10:16 ajeh iham itile Chuteng chuche ninung le chun amahotoh kitepna Kaphudoh ding chu hiche ahi, tin Pakai chun aseije: Keiman alung sunguva kachondan thupeh pengting, Chule alunguva kasut ding ahi, tia aseijouvin, hiche aseijouma chun," 
Hebrews10:17 Chule achonsetnao le asuhkhelnau geldoh taponge, ati kitleuve." 
Hebrews10:18 Chutia chu chonsetna chengse ngaidama um ahitan, chonset thensona thilto umtalou ahi." 
Hebrews10:19 Hiche jeh chun, sopiteho, Jesu'n pondal ajotpaija atahsa puma hinna lam thah eisempeh uva chu," 
Hebrews10:20 Jesu thisan vanga Mun Thenga lut ngamna ineiju ahin," 
Hebrews10:21 Pathen insung chunga kitung thempulen chungnung ineiju ahin," 
Hebrews10:22 Chule ase apha ihetnao ilung sunguva aphalou chengse atheh ngima, itahsao twi thenga kisilngima ahitah jeh chun, lung dihtah pun tahsan kichentah-in Pathen kom naiju hitin," 
Hebrews10:23 Itahsan, ikinepnao hi long louhelin tuh det jinguhite; (ajeh chu thutep pa chu tahsan umtah ahi.)" 
Hebrews10:24 Chule ngailutna le thilpha bolna lama lungsoudohna dingin kingaitopeh chehjiu hite; 
Hebrews10:25 Abang khattou chonna bangin ikikhop hai louvin, nikho chu ahungnai tultulle ti ihet chanun, khatle khat kitilkhouto chehjiuhite." 
Hebrews10:26 Ajeh chu eihon thutah hetna inei nungun, ihenasale ijanasan chonset bol leuhen, chonset jala longlhenna akikheh umtalou ahin;" 
Hebrews10:27 Thutanna kichat umtah ngah jinga chule adouho kavam gam dingkon lungsatna meikong bou uma ahi. 
Hebrews10:28 Koi hile Mosi danthu nahsahmo-a chu ahetoh mi ni le thum kam sung thua kona hepina beihela thia ahi. 
Hebrews10:29 Chuti ahile Pathen Chapa akengtoa chotpha, chule akisuh thengna kitepna thisan chu atheng louva ngaito-a, chule lungsetna Lhagao nahsahmo-a bola chu nangho lunggela, hiche sanga chu ichana khoh chungchon talent man ding dola nakilomsah um?" 
Hebrews10:30 Ajeh iham itile, Phulah ding chu keija ahi; keimanbou phuba chu kasah ding ahi tin Pakaiyin aseije; chukitle, Pakai chun amite thu atan ding ahi, tia hicheng seija chu keihon kaheuve." 
Hebrews10:31 Pathen hing khutna chuh chu kichat umtah ahi. 
Hebrews10:32 Ahi vangin nanghon masanga khovah namu nunguva hesoh genthei thoh hahsa nathoh laiju chu geldoh jingun. 
Hebrews10:33 Langkhatna housetle hesoh genthei thoh hahsa thoh laiju, chule alangkhatna hesoh genthei thoh lah-a nahung pannu chu geldoh jingun." 
Hebrews10:34 Ajeh chu nanghon kakihenna ho-a jong neina khotouvin, chule gamchenga phajole imatih chana umjing van'a gou naneiju chu naheuvin, naneiju kichom chu kipahtah-in nanatoh jengtaovin ahi." 
Hebrews10:35 Hiche jeh chun chonphatman lentah nei dinga nahakat nao chu pailha hihhelun. 
Hebrews10:36 Ajeh iham itile nanghon thutep chu nasan theina dinguva, Pathen lung deilam nabol uva pontho tah-a nathohhat dingu angaije." 
Hebrews10:37 Ajeh iham itile chomcha khat joule Ahung dinga chu hung ding ahi, Hung geisang lou ding ahi." 
Hebrews10:38 Michonpha vang chu atahsan vanga hing ding ahi; Chule anungchon vangle achunga kalung lhai lou ding ahi, ati." 
Hebrews10:39 Ahin eiho vang manthah na lama nungchon ho lah-a mi ihipouvin, lhagao huhhing-a umna dinga tahsan ho lah-a joh ihibovui." 
Hebrews11:1 Tahsan hi kinepna thilho hetchetna, mu lou thil aum monge ti photchena ahi." 
Hebrews11:2 Ajeh chu hiche thua hi upahon hettohsahna ananeiju ahi. 
Hebrews11:3 Tahsan vangin vannoi leiset hi Pathen thua kisuto-a kisema ahi ti iheuve; chuti chu ahin, thil kimuho chengse hi thil kilanghoa kona kisem ahipoi." 
Hebrews11:4 Tahsan vangin Abel'in Cain sangin thensona longlhen phajo alhan, ama chu michonpha ahi ti hettohsahna ananeijin, athilpeh thudol Pathen'in ahettohsah-in: chule hiche vang chun ama athisa ahivangin thu aseije." 
Hebrews11:5 Tahsan vangin thina amu louna dingin Enoch chu lah mangin aumtan; Pathen'in alah mangtah jeh chun ama chu akimutapon ahi; lah manga aum masangin Pathen lungtoh mitah ahi ti hettohsahna ananeijin ahi. 
Hebrews11:6 Ahin tahsan beija vang Pathen lung tohoi ahipoi; ajeh chu Pathen aume chule ama holte chu tohphat man apei ti chu ama kom naijan atahsan dingdol thu ahi. 
Hebrews11:7 Tahsan vangin Noah'in mu loulai thilsoh ding thuah hilchahna thu amun, Pathen ngaisahna neijin akichan, ama insung mi huhhingna dingin kong innei khat asan ahi; chule hiche vang chun vannoi themmo achansah-in ama tahsana chonphat chu achangtan ahi." 
Hebrews11:8 Tahsan vangin Abraham, akikou chun, alo dinga um mun'a chu lut dingin potdohna ding thun anungin ahi; chule hoilama ache ding jong helouvin akipatnin achedoh jengtan anahi." 
Hebrews11:9 Tahsan vangin gamtep gama chun mi gama pem bangin apem jengtan ahi; chuche gamtep chu alopi ding Isaac le Jacob toh pon in'ah acheng khomin anahi. 
Hebrews11:10 Ajeh iham itile aman, abul nei khopi, asemtohle asadoh Pathen, hichu anga jing ahi." 
Hebrews11:11 Tahsan vangin Sara'in jong ateh nungin, athuteppa chu tahsan umtah-a angaito jeh chun nao vop theina aneitan, chule chapang khat apengtan ahi." 
Hebrews11:12 Hiche jeh chun athikon khatna konin van'a ahsi jatle twikhanglen kama neldi jatna tam, simsenlou apengdoh jengtan ahi." 
Hebrews11:13 Hiteho chengse chu tahsan neijin athigam taovin ahi, thutep thilteho chu achang lou ahitaove, ahivangin hiteho chu gamlatah-a pangin amuvin, akolchah-un, chule amaho chu leiset chunga kholjinle gamdang mi ahiu chu aseidoh uvin ahi." 
Hebrews11:14 Ijeh ham itile chutobanga thusei ho chun amaho gamtum ding aholu ahi ti chu aphondoh-u ahi. 
Hebrews11:15 Amahon ahung kondohnao gam chu lunga agel jingleu, akile kitna dingu phat gomkom anei dingu ahi." 
Hebrews11:16 Ahin tun amahon chuche sanga phajo nomjo khat atupmu ahin, hichu vangam ahi. Hiche jeh-a chu amaho Pathen tia kisei ding chu Pathen kijapi lou ahi; ajeh iham itile amaho dinga chu khopi khat gotsa akoi ahi." 
Hebrews11:17 Abraham patepmin aumin ahile, tahsan vangin Isaac atoh jengtan ahi; chule kipahtah-a thutep changpa chun, ajah-a," 
Hebrews11:18 Isaac'a kona nachilhah kisei ding ahi, tia kisei achapa changkhatseh chu peh dingin ago jengin ahi;" 
Hebrews11:19 Ajeh chu Pathen'in athi lah-a kona jong akaithou thei ahi ti agel ahi; chule tekahnan ama chu achang kittan ahi. 
Hebrews11:20 Tahsan vangin Isaac'in khonunga hung lhung ding thuah Jacob le Esau phatthei aboh-in ahi. 
Hebrews11:21 Tahsan vangin Jacob chun athi konin Joseph chapateni phatthei aboh gelin ahi; atenggol chunga akingamin Pathen alhaijin ahi. 
Hebrews11:22 Tahsan vangin Joseph'in khonunga Israel chate Egypt gama kona apotdoh dingu thu aseijin ama gu thudolah thu apen ahi. 
Hebrews11:23 Mosi apenin, naosen chu hoi asa lhonin tahsan vangin anule apan lha thum asel lhonin; chule lengpa thupeh jong akicha lhonpon ahi." 
Hebrews11:24 Chuin Mosi akikhanlhit phatnin, tahsan vangin Pharaoh chanu chapa tia kiminvo ding adan;" 
Hebrews11:25 Aman chomkhat chonsetna nomsah sangin Pathen mite toh bol hesoh thoh khom ding chu alhengjotan ahi. 
Hebrews11:26 Egypt gama gou jouse sangin Christa ahousetnau chu chung nungjon agelin ahi; ajeh chu aman tohphat man asan ding lam jeng chu avet ahi. 
Hebrews11:27 Tahsan vangin aman lengpa lungsat ding chu kicha louvin Egypt gam adalhan ahi; ajeh iham itile aman mu theiloupa chu amu bangin athoh lhumkei jengin ahi. 
Hebrews11:28 Chule asoh masa chengse that chun amaho asuhkhah louna dingin, tahsan vangin kalchuh kut asemin, chule thisan thekhum abolin ahi." 
Hebrews11:29 Tahsan vangin amahon tolgo bangin twikhanglen San chu ajot gal kaijun, Egypt miten chutia bol ding chu agouvin ahile, twijin achuplih gamtaovin ahi." 
Hebrews11:30 Tahsan vangin Jeriko khopi kul, ni sagi avelun ahile, akulpi chu achimtai." 
Hebrews11:31 Tahsan vangin Rahab notinun gam velhiho lungmong tah-in a-in'a alhunsah-in ahile, thua nunglouho toh amantha tapon ahi."
