Hebrews11:32 Akal ipi kasei dingham? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, chule themgaoho, hiteho thu umchan seisohkei leng phatnin ato lou ding ahi." 
Hebrews11:33 Amaho chun tahsan vangin gamtin loinemin alauvin, chonphat abolun, thutep ga achangun, keipi bahkai kam ahuh uvin," 
Hebrews11:34 Meihat achen daijun, chemhema konin asohchaovin, hatmoa konin ahat taovin, galsatnin hattah ahitaovin, apang khom agalteu anojam gamun ahi." 
Hebrews11:35 Numei hon amithisa chengu hingdoh kit akimu kit taovin ahi; chule adangho chu thokitna phajo chungnung aneina dinguva, ahuhdoh dingu chu anom pouvin ahile, bol gentheijin aumtaovin ahi." 
Hebrews11:36 Abang kimkhatman engbol le jep athoh-un, bulputle songkul'a khumin patepmin aumun ahi." 
Hebrews11:37 Amaho chu songin asepjiuvin, thing atnin a-at tanun, patepmin aumun, chemjamin athatnun, kelngoi vunle kelvuna kivonin avahleuvin, lhasamle hesoh gentheijin bolsetnin anaumun" 
Hebrews11:38 (vannoi leiset amaho umnahoi ahipon), gamthip laija, molle lhang-ah, songko ho-a, chule leiko homa avahleuvin ahi." 
Hebrews11:39 Hicheteho chun tahsan vanga hettohsahna anei vangun thutep ga achang tapouvin ahi: 
Hebrews11:40 Ajeh chu eiho beija amaho chu suhchamkima aum louna dinguva Pathen'in eiho dinga thilphajo khat gotsa akoi ahi. 
Hebrews12:1 Chuti ahi jeh chun eihon jong hettohsahna meipi nasatah-in eium kimvel jeh-u hin einoh phahsah jouseule ichunguva kai jing chonsetna hi pailhau hitin imasanguva um kilhaitetna lampia hin thohhat tah-in lhaijuhite; 
Hebrews12:2 Chule itahsan suhchamkim leh lamkai pipuipen Jesu lam kat jingu hite; aman amasanga thanopna aum jeh chun jumle maimohna nahsah louvin, thingpel geijin athoh lhumkeijin Pathen laltouna jet lamah atoutan ahi." 
Hebrews12:3 Hijeh chun lhagao lama nalel uva nalhahdah louna dingun, chonse hon ama douna-a nelkalna thu aseiju thoh lhumpa chu gelun." 
Hebrews12:4 Nangho chonset douna-in thisan sohleuvin napang hih laijuve; 
Hebrews12:5 chule, tilkhouna dinga nangho chapate dolla nakiseipeh nao nasuhmilu ahitai. Kachapa, Pakai gimbolna ngaisah louvin bol lou jenin, Chule aman nasosal tengle lhahdah nan neihih helin," 
Hebrews12:6 Ajeh chu Pakaiyin angailut chu agimbolji ahi, Chule aman alah chapa chengse chu ajepjin ahi, tia chapa houva nahounao tilkhouna chu nanghon nasumil taovin ahi." 
Hebrews12:7 Nanghon nathoh-u chu nakisungse nao ahi; Pathen'in achapate bola nabolu ahi; ajeh iham itile apa sungse lou chapa koiham? 
Hebrews12:8 Chate jousen athoh cheh sungsena-a chu naum louvule, nangho jaocha nahiu ahi, chatetah hilou nahiuve." 
Hebrews12:9 Chuche kalvalin, eihon tahsa lama eisungse dingu pate inaneijun, amaho chu inaging lhehji uvin ahi: chuche sanga chu ihinna dinguva, lhagaoho Pa thua chu ihanun cheh lou dinguham?" 
Hebrews12:10 amaho chun ni chomcha khat dinga amaho phasah sah-a eina sungse tahbehjiu ahin, ama vang chun eiho phatchomna dinga, ama thenna chu ichan theina dinguva eigimboljiu ahi." 
Hebrews12:11 Gimbolna jouse hi apetle lungnopna ahipoi, lhasetnan akigelbove; ahivangin khonungle hichea kon chun chutia gimbolna umho ding chun aga lungmon umtah chonphat asohjin ahi." 
Hebrews12:12 Hiche jeh chun nanghon khut kikhailha leh khup ngoite chu je jangun; 
Hebrews12:13 chule elbai lamvaite lampia kona nodoh-a um louva, boldama aumjohna dingun, nakho lhahna diu lampi kisem jangun." 
Hebrews12:14 Mi jousetoh kichamdela umnale thenna chu delun, hiche thenna tailouva chu koiman Pakai chu amu lou ding ahi." 
Hebrews12:15 Kihong phaovin, ajole mikhat tou Pathen lungset changlel umkhantin; thilkha jung hungdon doh-in sumovin natin, mi tamtah suh boh-in umget inte;" 
Hebrews12:16 Ahi loule khatvei neh mana apenpi agou lo ding joh-a Esau banga Pathen ja loule akideija, ajonga, umget inte." 
Hebrews12:17 Ajeh chu Esau chun khonungin phattheina gou chu lo ding alunggot tena mitlhi puma gunchu tah-a ahol vangin, lungheina gomkom amu lou jeh-in, paijin aumtan ahi, ti naheuve." 
Hebrews12:18 Nangho molsang tohkhah theile meija ka, meivom, muthim, khopihui," 
Hebrews12:19 sumkon gin chule thu kisei awginna-a hung nahipouve. Hiche awgin jateho chun ajah uva thu dang kiseibe louna dingin ataovun ahi: 
Hebrews12:20 Ajeh chu ganhing jengin jong mol chu atohkhah-a ahile, songa selih jeng ding ahi loule tenga sutlih jeng ding ahi tia thupeh chu amahon athoh thei louhelu ahi;" 
Hebrews12:21 Chule hiche thilmu chu kichat um behseh jeng ahin, Mosi'n, keima kakicha behseh jengin kakihot hot jengin ahi, ati." 
Hebrews12:22 Ahivangin nangho vang Sion mol, Pathen hing khopi, van Jerusalem, vantil sangsom sangja umna mun'a hunga nahiuvin," 
Hebrews12:23 Van'a amin kisun apeng masaho khoppi len le houbung heng, mi jouse thutan Pathen heng, chule michonpha lhagao suhchamkima umho henga," 
Hebrews12:24 Kitepna thah palai Jesu henga, chule Abel'a sanga phatna chungnungjo thusei thisan thekhum henga hungjoh nahibouvui." 
Hebrews12:25 Chingtheijun, thuseipa chu jopda khauvinate. Ajeh chu leiset chunga thupepa jop loubon asochat louva ahile, van'a kona van thupepa akon chun kiheimang leuhen, sohcha louhel ding ihiuve." 
Hebrews12:26 Hichea chu a-aw ginin vannoi leiset aho ling jeng ahi; tu vangin aman thu atepmin, Keiman khatvei vannoi leiset jengseh hilouvin, van jong kaho ling kit ding ahi, ati." 
Hebrews12:27 Hichea, Khatvei kaho ling kit ding ati hin, long lou thilteho chu aum jingna dinga; thil kisem, thil longho chonmanga umding ahi, ti hetsahna ahi." 
Hebrews12:28 Hijeh hin eiho long lou gam changa ihitah jeh-u hin, lungsetna neijuhite, hiche vanga chu eihon ginle ja tho-a Pathen lunglhaina lhacha ipan theiju ahi;" 
Hebrews12:29 Ajeh chu eiho Pathen chu kavamthei mei ahi. 
Hebrews13:1 Sopi kingailutna hi umjompeh jinghen. 
Hebrews13:2 Nanghon maljin phatbol ding chu sumil hih helun; ijeh-inem itile chuti bola konin mi kimkhatnin het louhelin vantil alhunsah-un ahi. 
Hebrews13:3 Akihenteho chu nakihenpin gel unlang he jingun; nangho jong tahsa-a um nahiu heuvin lang hesoh genthei thohte chu he jingun. 
Hebrews13:4 Mi jouse lah-a kichen hi ja umhen, chule ajalkhun jong suhboh-in umdahen; jonpanle miji toh jongho thu Pathen'in achung thu atan ding ahi." 
Hebrews13:5 Sum ngailut lung po hih helun; nanei sunuva chun lunglhaijun; ajeh chu amatah-in, Keiman nangma iti nama jongle lhaponge, changlha jong changlha pong-e, ati." 
Hebrews13:6 Hijeh chun eihon, hakat tah-a, Pakai chu eipanpi ahi, keima kichaponge, Mihemin keima i-eilo dingham? iti thei dingu ahi." 
Hebrews13:7 Pathen thu nahiluva nachung uva navaipo teo chu geldoh jingun; chule amaho nunle khana kona sohdoh gelunlang, amaho tahsan umchan chu thovin." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Christa chu janhi, tuni, chule atonsotnin abang ahi jingin ahi." 
Hebrews13:9 Thuhil kidang got chomchom kilhoh mangsah loujenun; lung hi lungsetna-a phudet aphai; anneh-a phudet ding ahipoi, hiti anneh thua chonna lungkhamteho chun phatchomnan aneidehpouve." 
Hebrews13:10 Houbuh sunga lhachalehon aneh thei lounao, maicham ineijun ahi." 
Hebrews13:11 Thempu chungnungin chonset thensona-a Mun Theng sunga achoi lutji ganchaho long chu kulpi polama agouvam jiuvin ahi. 
Hebrews13:12 Hiche jeh-a chu Jesu'n jong ama thisan mihemte suhthengna dinga khopi kotpi polama thina athoh ahitai. 
Hebrews13:13 Hijeh chun hungun, ama ahousetnau chu pou hitin, kulpi polamah ama hengah cheohite." 
Hebrews13:14 Ajeh iham itile hikoma hin khomundet ineipouve, khonunga khopijoh chu iholu ahibouve." 
Hebrews13:15 Chuti ahi jeh chun ama vangin vahchoina kithoina chu Pathen henga pe jinguhite, hichu amin jala kipathu iphon dohnao ikamuva kona aga chu ahi." 
Hebrews13:16 Ahin phatna bolle thilpeh phala kihomdela thilbol chu sumil loujenun; ijeh-inem itile chutobang kithoina chunga chun Pathen alunglhai behsehjin ahi. 
Hebrews13:17 Nachung uva vaipoho thun nungun, anoijuvah lutnun; amaho chu umchan thu seitoh-a pang ding ahi jeh-u chun, hichu lung nommo-a bol louva lunglhaisela abol theina dinguva, nangho lhagao ahon jingu ahi; lungnom mon nachung uvah thu seileu, nangho dinga khoh ding ahi." 
Hebrews13:18 Keiho neitao peh-un; ajeh chu keihon ase apha hetna thengtahle ijakaija kituptah-a chondih tup lung kaneijui, ti kakihet chenun ahi." 
Hebrews13:19 Chule nangho heng lama eiki lhadoh vah chehna dinga eitaopeh dinga, nangho atumbeh-a kahin ha ngehdeh nahiuve." 
Hebrews13:20 Chamna Pathen tonsot geija umjing kitepna thisana kelngoi ching pipu I-Pakaiyu Jesu chu athi lah-a kona puidoh kit chun, ama lunggot lam bol dingin," 
Hebrews13:21 nangho phatna lam jouse-a sucham kimun; ama mitvetna alunglhaina lam jouse-a Jesu Christa vang chun nangho-ah molsohen; loupina atonsot atonsot geijin umjing hen, Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Sopite, naheng uva kahungtao ahi, kitilkhou na thuhi angai themun; ijeh-inem itile keiman nangho henga paltana kahinsut ahi." 
Hebrews13:23 Isopiu Timothy alhadoh taove, hichu anaheuvin; ama ahung vah-a ahile, keima amatoh hung lhoningting nangho mutange." 
Hebrews13:24 Nachung uva vaipoho le mithengho chengse chu kasalam anapeuvin. Italy gam mihon salam napeuve. 
Hebrews13:25 Nabon chaova chungah lungsetna umhen. Amen. 
James1:1 Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa soh Jacob'in, akithe cheh-a phung somle phung ni henga, salam." 
James1:2 Kasopiho, nangho patepna tintanga nachuh tengule, hichu kipanan gelun;" 
James1:3 Natahsanu kipatep chun thohhat asosah chu heuvin. 
James1:4 Ahin nangho lhahsamna beihela nacham kimuva, napum lhin theina dingun, thohhatna chun anatoh tong chamkim molsohen." 
James1:5 Nalah uva khattou chihna-a lhasama aumle, it louhel le house louhela peji-a Pathen henga thumhen; chuteng kipe ding ahi." 
James1:6 Amavang ginchat lelna neilouhelin, tahsanna neitah-in thumhen; agingcha lela chu twikhanglen kinong hui mut lonle tobang ahi." 
James1:7 Chutobang mi chun Pakaiya konin ima mu neijinge tin kinepda hen. 
James1:8 Lungtho nei michu achonna lam jouse-a detna nei lou ahi. 
James1:9 Dinmun nemcha neija sopi chun choisanga aum jehchun kipah hen; 
James1:10 Ahin mihao chun suhnema aum jehchun kipah hen: ajeh chu hampa pah banga ama chu mangthah ding ahi. 
James1:11 Ajehchu nisa satah-a ahung soteng, asat chun hampa louhing asanggojin, chule apah apul lhan, alimso hoi jong chu amangthah jitan ahi; chutobanga chu mihao jong alamlhah tinchenga molmang diu ahi." 
James1:12 Lhepna thoh ham hama chu anunnom ahi; ajeh chu lhep patepna chu ajoa them achan jouva ahile Pakaiyin ama ngailuho peh dinga athutepsa hinna lallukhuh chu apeh ding ahi. 
James1:13 Ahin lhepna-a nachuh tengule, Pathen'in eilhep ahi tin koiman seida hen: ajehchu Pathen chu ase lama kilhem patep theilou ahin, chule amanjong koimacha alhep patep lou ahi." 
James1:14 Mi ama ama lung ngaichat thillin ajol lhah-a, aloi lutji-a, lhepna-a chujia ahibouvui." 
James1:15 Chule alung ngaichat phalou chu naovop banga avopji teng chonset ahinji ahi; chule chonset chu apilhin tengle thina sohjia ahi. 
James1:16 Kasopi ngaiteho dohan lhalou jenun. 
James1:17 Thilpeh pha jousele phattheina chamkim chu chunga kon ahi, chule kikhelna le le-lim banga kihei jilou vahho Pa-a kona hung kumlhaji ahi." 
James1:18 Athilsemho lah-a eiho hi aga masa loi khat ihi theina dinguva, aman ama lunggot doltah-a thutah-a chu eihinu ahi." 
James1:19 Hijeh chun, kasopi ngaitahho, amitakip angaina lama gang cheh hen, thu sei lama ngaikham cheh hen, chule lungsatna lama jong ngaikham cheh hen;" 
James1:20 Mihem lunghanin Pathen chonphatna asodoh sahpoi. 
James1:21 Hiche jeh chun nanghon thenlouna jousele chon gitlouna long let chu puilhau vinlang, nalhagao huhhing theija thu kiphutsa chu lungnemin sangun." 
James1:22 Ahin nangho nangmale nangma kilhem lha-a thu chu angai mai jeng hilouvin, thu chu abolajoh hiuvin." 
James1:23 Ijeh ham itile thu angai mai mai hia abola hilou mi khattou aumle, ama chu phatvet maija apenpi alim vea mi tobang ahi:" 
James1:24 Ajeh chu ama akiven achemangjin, chule ama chun alim itobang ahi apettah chule asumil jitan ahi." 
James1:25 Ahin chamkimkei chamlenna danthu chu vea, chua aum jom jinga, athu chu ngaija sumil mi hilouva, abola pang mi vang chu, hiche mipa chu athilbola chu nunnom ding ahi." 
James1:26 Nalah uva mi khattou ama hou ngaisah mi-a kingaito-a, alei tuhtang louva, ama lungthim kilheplhah-a aumle, hiche mipa chun ahou chu moh ahi." 
James1:27 Pa le Pathen anga houdan thengle kisuhboh lou chu: Nulou palouho le meithaiho agenthei ahesoh naova vila, chule vannoi leisetna kona boh beh louhela kithenso chu ahi." 
James2:1 Kasopite ho, loupi Pakai, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa tahsanna chu mi dat neilou jennun." 
James2:2 Ajehchu naki khopnao in'a mi khat sana khutjem kibua, ponhoi lul kisil hunghen lang; chule pon sedihdeh kisil mivaicha khat jong hunghen lang;" 
James2:3 Nanghon ponhoi lul silpa chu jabolun lang, Nangma hilaija hin nomtah-in touvin, tiuvinlang, mivaichapa jah-a chun, Nangma khukoma khun gadingin, ahiloule, kakeng todopma hin touvin, tileu chun:" 
James2:4 Nangho nanghole nangho lah-a mi dat nanei uva, lung gilou pu-a vai nahomu hilou dingham?" 
James2:5 Kasopi ngaiteho, ngai phaovin, vannoi leisetna mi vaichaho chu Pathen'in tahsan na-a hao dingle, ama ngailuho peh dinga atepsa gam chu lo dinga alhendoh hilouham?" 
James2:6 Ahinla nanghon mivaicha chu noise tah-in nabol uvin ahi. Mihaoho chun nabolset jiuva, thutan na-a nakai lutjiu hilou ham?" 
James2:7 Chule amaho chun nakikou nao min ja umtah chu ataitomu hilouham? 
James2:8 Pathen lekhabu dan thu dungjuija, Naheng nakoma chu nangma naki ngailut bangin ngailun, ti Leng dan chu subulhit nahiu vangle, nabolu apha lheh jenge;" 
James2:9 Ahin dat naneiju vangle achonsea nahiuvin, chule dan sukhel tia danthu dungjuija themmo changa nahiuve." 
James2:10 Ahin mikhatnin dan thupeh chengse nitsoh hen, khatpenah kisumo taleh, aboncha chunga themmo changa ahitai." 
James2:11 Ajehchu, Jon pan hih-in tia seipa chun, Tolthat hih-in, tia jong asei ahi. Hijeh chun tun nangman jon panhih-in lang, ahin tolthat lechun, nangma danthu suhkeh chu nahi ahitai." 
James2:12 Chamlenna danthu-a athu kitan dingho thusei bangin thu seijun lang, chutima chun bolun." 
James2:13 Mi chunga hepina neilou chu, hepina neilou hela athu kitan ahi; hepina chun thutanna chunga jona anei ahi." 
James2:14 Kasopite ho, mi khattouvin katahsan aume tihen lang, anatohla um hihhen hile, hichu ipi-a phachom dingham? Hiche atahsan chun huhhing theijintem?" 
James2:15 Sopipa khat ahim, sopinu khat ahim pon beijin umhen, chule anikho anneh lhasamin umhen," 
James2:16 Nangho khatnin amaho jah-a chun, Lung mongin chen, lum sanlang vaset tan, tiuvin; amaho chu tahsa ngaichat thil pe louvin umleu chun, hichu ipi-a phachom dingham?" 
James2:17 Hiche banga chu tahsan jong anatoh beija chu achanga athisa ahi. 
James2:18 Ahin mi khattouvin, Nangma natahsan aumin, keima kanatoh aume tinte: nanatoh beijin natahsan chu neivetsah temin, chule keiman natoh-a konin katahsan vetsah inge." 
James2:19 Nangman Pathen khatseh aumme ti natahsane; nabol hoije: thilhahon jong atahsanui, agina kihot hot ahiuve." 
James2:20 Ahin, vo mi gichanglou, nangman anatoh beija tahsan athisa ahi chu nahet nom em?" 
James2:21 Ipuluiju Abraham'in achapa Isaac maicham chunga atodoh-a chu, hiche anatoh chu ama dinga chonphatna-a kisima hilou ham?" 
James2:22 Itobanga tahsan chun anatoh chu ahua, chule natoh vanga tahsan chu kisu chamkima ahi ti namuvem?" 
James2:23 Hichea chu, Abraham'in Pathen atahsanin, chule ama dingin hichu chonphatnan akisimtan ahi, ti Pathen lekhabua thu chu guilhunga ahi; chule ama chu Pathen jol tia kikou ahi." 
James2:24 Tahsan jengseh vang hilouva, natoh vanga mi chonpha tia kisim ahi chu namuvin ahi." 
James2:25 Chule chutobangma chu Rahab notinu jong chun thupole ho chu a-in'a alhunsah-a, chua lam chom danga asolmanga ahile, hiche anatoh vanga chu amanu chu achonpha-a kisima hilouham?" 
James2:26 Lhagao beija tahsa athisa ahi banga, tahsan jong natoh beija athisa ahi." 
James3:1 Kasopite ho, midangho sanga eiho gihsajoa mo ichan dingu chu heuvin lang, tamtah mihil-in pang hih-un." 
James3:2 Ajeh chu eiho ibon chaovin thil tamtah-a ikipaljiuve. Thua kipalna neilou chu mipha chamkim ahi; ama chu ati apumpia jong tuhtanga athua hei thei ahi. 
James3:3 Veuvin, sakol khu ithu nun theina dinga akama kamdal ivo-u ahi; chuteng apumpia igot gotna-a kihei thei ahi." 
James3:4 Kong-innei jong khu veuvin, lentah ahia, hui hat nasatah-in atol ahivangin, hichengpi chu ahehna neocha-a chu aheh heipan agotna lam lama aheile ahi." 
James3:5 Chutobanga chu lei jong hi tibah neocha khat ahi jeng vangin, hoithona thu nasatah aseijin ahi. Veuvin, mei themhal chan gam lentah iti akahsetji hitam!" 
James3:6 Lei hi mei ahi; tibah lah-a lei hi chonsetna dim vannoi leiset ahi; hichun ti pumpi hi asuhbohjia, penpi hinkho lampi chevelkolna hi akahsetjia, chule amatah damun meija kaji-a ahi." 
James3:7 Sa namkim, alha leng vacha namkim, ganhing namkim, gul namkim, twija cheng ganhing namkim vahngoi thei ahi sohkeijun, mihem vahngoi jin aumun ahi:" 
James3:8 Ahin lei vanghi koiman avahngoi theipoi; ama hi umthim thei lou gitlouna le thina gu dimset ahi. 
James3:9 Hichea chun Pathen le Pa chu ivahchoi jiuvin; hiche mama chun Pathen lima kisema mihemho isamse jiuve. 
James3:10 Kamsung khatseh-a kon chun pachatna le sapsetna asoh khomjin ahi. Kasopite ho, hichu chuti dingdol ahipoi." 
James3:11 Twinah kohom khatseh-a khu twi atwi le akha put khomji am? 
James3:12 Kasopite ho, theichang phunga Olive ga theijam? lengpi guija theichang ga theijam? hitichun twinah khat na konin chitui le twitheng aput khom theipoi." 
James3:13 Nalah uva michingle hetthem theina nei koiham? Ama chun umchan themin anatoh chu nunnem na le chihna-in vetsahhen. 
James3:14 Ahinla nalung sunguva kithangset hat le kilungdou naneiju vangle, kithang-at loujenun, chule thutah douna jou seihih-un." 
James3:15 Chutobang chihna chu chunga kona hung kumlha-a ahipoi; amavang leiset le tahsa-a chule Diabol'a kon ahibouve. 
James3:16 Kithangset le kilungdou umna-a chu kinahna le gitlouna um tei ahi. 
James3:17 Chunga kona hung kumlha-a chihna vang chu amasapena atheng ahin, chule abana kichamdel, lungnem, houlung dambai, hepina-a dim, chule ga pha, dat neilou le, phatlhemna umlou ahi." 
James3:18 Chule chonphatna ga chu chambolteho chunga kichamdela kitu-a ahi. 
James4:1 Nalah uva gal kisatle kinahna hi hoija konham? Natibah lah uva nomsah ngaichatnaho kisatto-a kon chu hilouham? 
James4:2 Nanghon nangaichauvin ahinla naneiji pouve; tol nathat jiuvin, neiding nagojiuvin, nanei theiji pouve; nakinaovin nakisatto jiuvin, ahinla nathumji lou jeh-un naneipouve." 
James4:3 Nathumun ahinla namu pouve; nangma nangma nomsah-a manchah nagotji jeh uva, nathumu nakhel jiu ahi." 
James4:4 Vo numei le pasal jongho, vannoi toh kihouthei hi Pathen to kigalna ahi ti helou nahiuvem? Hijeh chun koihile vannoi toh kihouthei go-a chu Pathen melma ahi." 
James4:5 Isunguva cheng Lhagao hin thangthipna angaichat ahi, tia Pathen lekhabua kisei khu kimohsei hija nangaitou ham?" 
James4:6 Chuti sangin lungsetna eipehbe jobovui. Hijeh-a chu aman, Pathen'in mi kiletsahho chu alethuhjin, mi kineosah ho lungsetna apei, tia asei ahi." 
James4:7 Chuti ahi jeh chun nangho Pathen henga kipelut un. Diabol vang chu lethuh-un, chutile nakom uva konin jammang tante." 
James4:8 Pathen kom naijun, chutile Ama nangho kom hung nai ding ahi. Vo michonseho, nakhut suthengun; chule lungtho neihon, nalung sungu suthengun." 
James4:9 Kisih-un, lunghemun, chule kapmun; nanuiju chu kana chule nakipao chu lungkhamna soh hen." 
James4:10 Pakai mitmu-a kisunem mun, chutile aman nachoi sang dingu ahi." 
James4:11 Kasopite ho, kiseiseto hih-un. Koi hile asopi seise-a chule asopi thu khola oimo-a chu, dan thupeh seise-a, dan thupeh khola oimo-a ahi: ahin nangman danthu chu nakhola na-oimo vangle athu nit hilouva athu tanjoh nahi." 
James4:12 Danthu pe-a khatsehbou aume, Ama chu huhhing thei jong sumang thei jong ahi. Ahin nangma koi nahi-a, midang thu natan ham?" 
James4:13 Tun veuvin, nangho mi kimkhatsen, Tunin ahim, jing ahimle, hiche khopi-a khun cheohitin kum khat gathamu hitin, kiveiju hitin, kivei kanu hite, nati uve." 
James4:14 Jinga ipi ahung so ding nanghon nahepouve. Nahinkhou chu ipiham? Twimei chomkhat kimu-a chujoule kimujita lou tobang khu nahiuve. 
James4:15 Chusangin, Pakai lunglam ahile, hingjing ungting, hiche na hi, khuche na khu tonging kate, tijovin." 
James4:16 Ahinla tun nanghon naham hoithonao chu naki thang-at piuve; hiche kithang-at naho chu phalou ahi. 
James4:17 Hiche jeh chun mi koi hile thilpha bolje hena-a bol lou chu achonse ahi. 
James5:1 Tun, veuvin, mihaoho, nangho chunga hesoh gentheina hung chu ding chengpi jeh hin kapmun lang pengun." 
James5:2 Nanei chengseu amon mangtai, naponu lungin anese joutai." 
James5:3 Nasana nadangkau thih-eh souvin aneheng gamtan; chule chuche thih-eh chu nathemmonao hettohsah-a hungpanga, chule mei banga nasao aneh ding ahi. Nanghon ni nununga dinga gou nakholu ahi." 
James5:4 Veuvin, nalouva chang at sum thalo ho thaman, doha nabol uva napeh dahou chun kho asamun; chule chuche sum thalo chang at teho khosap chu Janel Pakai nabeng sunga aluttai" 
James5:5 Nangho vannoi leiset chunga nomsa le ninglhinga nachengun; kitha nikho-a bangin nalungu nasuthao vun ahi. 
James5:6 Nanghon michonpha chu themmo nachanun nathatnun; chule aman nangho nadou thuhpouve. 
James5:7 Chuti ahi jeh chun, sopiteho, Pakai hung masangsen lungdehat jingun. Veuvin, loulhou mi khun aleiset ga lutah chu angahjin, gotwi lha masale gotwi lha nunung amu kahsen alungdehat jin ahi." 
James5:8 Nangho jong lungdehat jingun; nalungu detsah jingun: ajeh chu Pakai hungna ding anaitai. 
James5:9 Vo sopiteho, oimo nachan louna dingun khatle khat kiphun loujenun; veuvin, thutanpa chu kot bula ading jinge." 
James5:10 Vo sopiteho, Pakai mina thu seidoh themgaoho chu hesoh genthei thoh le lungdehatna lama vettonin neijun." 
James5:11 Veuvin, dingdet jinga thoh lhumho khu eihon anunnom itiuve. Nanghon Job thohhat thu chu najaove; chule Pakaiya achaina umchan jong namu taove; Pakai chu khotonale mihepina-a dimset ahi." 
James5:12 Ahin, sopiteho, imajouse lah-a apipen chu hiche ahi, kihahsel hih-un, van panin hijongle, leiset panin hijongle, kihahsel hih-un; chusang chun ahi natiu chu ahi hihen, hilou natiu chu hilou hijenghen; achuti loule themmo changin umkhaovin nate." 
James5:13 Nalah uva athohgima umam? Ama chu taohen. Kipah thanoma umam? Vahchoina la Sahen. 
James5:14 Nalah uva ana damlou umam? Ama chun houbung upaho kouhen; chule amahon Pakai minin ama chu thao nu-uhen, achunga taovuhen;" 
James5:15 Chutile tahsana taona chun anapa chu damsah-intin, chule Pakaiyin ama chu akaithou ding; chule achonse ahi jongle, hichu suhbeija umding ahi." 
James5:16 Hijeh chun nadam theina dingun, khatnin khat komah nasuhkhelnao phongun, khatle khat kitaopeh jiuvin. Michonpha mi taopehna chu thil nasatah bol thei ahi." 
James5:17 Elijah chu eiho penpi ngai banga hesoh genthei thoh mi ahivangin, gojuh louna dinga lunglut tah-a ataole, leiset chunga kum thumle lha gup gam sung go ajutapon ahi." 
James5:18 Chuin atao kitnin ahile, van'a konin go ahin juhsah-in, leijin aga asodohtan ahi." 
James5:19 Kasopite nalah uva khattou thudih-a kona lamvaija auma, ama chu khattou ahinlepui lut kit aumle," 
James5:20 Michonse alamvaina-a kona hinlepui kitchun thina-a kona lhagao khat ahuhhing ding ahin; chule chonset tamtah akhu ding ahi, ti kihet hen." 
1Peter1:1 Jesu Christa solchah Peter'in; Pontus gam, Galatia gam, Cappadocia gam, Asia gam, chule Bithynia gama kithecheh khopemho," 
1Peter1:2 Thua nung dingle Jesu Christa thisan thekhuma umdinga, Pa Pathen lunggot masah dungjuija, Lhagao suhtheng na-a kilhengdohho hengah: nachung uva lungsetnale lungmonna punghen." 
1Peter1:3 I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa Pathen chu vahchoijin umhen; Jesu Christa athia kona athokit vanga amihepina chungnung dungjuija kinepna hing chang dinga eihinu ahin," 
1Peter1:4 Gou setheilou, thengsel, chule toi theilou nangho chan dinga van'a kikheh khola," 
1Peter1:5 Huhhing-a umdinga tahsan vanga Pathen thahat na-in achintup, phat nunung lamle hung kilangdoh dinga gotsa nahiuve." 
1Peter1:6 Tu chomcha khat dinga, akhoh dungjuija, lhepna tintang jeh-a nalunghem jeng vangun, hiche-a hin hatah-in nakipah-un ahi:" 
1Peter1:7 Meija akipatep jeng vanga jong mang thei sana sanga manlujo, natahsan nao kipatepna chu, Jesu Christa hung kilah teng vahchoina, choi-atna, chule loupina-a akimu theina ding ahi." 
1Peter1:8 Ama chu mukha louhela ngailu-a nahiuve; tun jong ama chu namu louhel vangun natahsanun, kipana seitheilou le loupina-in nadimun ahi;" 
1Peter1:9 Natahsan nao bulhina, nalhagaovu huhhingna ngeichu namu jeh-un." 
1Peter1:10 Nachung uva lungsetna hung chuding hiche huhhingna thudol hi, gaova anaseidoh themgaoho chun akholuva, chule gunchu tena anaholuva;" 
1Peter1:11 Christa thohgim dingje le nungle loupina-in ajom ding thudol Christa Lhagao amaho lung sunga uma chun aseipeh masah laijuva chu, itobang mi ahiloule itobang phat ahi ding anakholu ahitai." 
1Peter1:12 Hiche chu amaho henga kiphong doh-a ahin, amaho le amaho changa dinga hilouva, tu-a van'a kona hinkisol Lhagao Thenga kona Kipana Thupha hillhang lehon najah uva aseiju thil chengsea hi amaho eiho lhachale-a pangjo-a ahiuve; thil hitiho hi vantil ten jong vet atupmu ahi." 
1Peter1:13 Hijeh chun nalung kong kigah-unlang lung limgehchan umun, Jesu Christa ahung kilah tengle nachung uva lungsetna hung kilhut ding chunga chun nakinepnao ngaichamkimun." 
1Peter1:14 Malai nangol laijuva nalung ngaichat dungjuija nachonjiu banga chu chon louvin; sei ngaija thua nung chate chon doltah-in chonun; 
1Peter1:15 Ahin nakoupa athen bangin, nangho jong nunle khan jouse-a thengun;" 
1Peter1:16 Ajeh chu, Keima kathen jeh hin nangho thengun, tin akisune." 
1Peter1:17 Chule dat nei louhela mi jouse ama ama natoh dungjui cheh-a thutana chu Pa tia nakouvu ahile, hiche mun'a nakholjin lai sungseu hin ging khenchan hinkho mangun;" 
1Peter1:18 Napute napateuva kona kilason chonna homkeova kona namu-u mangthei thil, sana le dangka-a kilhatdoh nahipouve;" 
1Peter1:19 Amavang boh beh louhel le nolna beihel kelngoinou, Christa thisan lutah-a chu kilhatdoh jo-a nahi bouvui:" 
1Peter1:20 Ama chu leiset kiphudoh masanga gotmasah sa anahin, amavang hiche phat kichai kona hi nangho dinga hung kilah ahi," 
1Peter1:21 Ama vanga chu nangho athi lah-a kona ama kaithou le loupina pe-a Pathen tahsan mite nahiu ahi; hichu natahsanu le nakinepnao chu Pathen'a aum theina ding ahi. 
1Peter1:22 Lhagao jala sopi ngailutna daithei lou dinga, thutah thua nanun uva kona nahinnao nasuhthengu ahitah jehchun; khohsahna neitah-in khatle khat lungtheng selin kingailuto cheh-un;" 
1Peter1:23 Ajeh chu nangho kem mang thei chia kon hilouva, kem mang theilou chi, tonsotna hingjing le umjing Pathen thua kona thah penkit nahiu ahi." 
1Peter1:24 Ajeh chu, Mihem jouse hampa tobang ahi, Aloupina jouseu jong hampapah tobang bep ahi. Hampa agopjin, apah jong apuljitai;" 
1Peter1:25 Pakai thu vang tonsot geija umjing jeng ahi. Najah uva kihil lhangle-a Kipana Thupha chu hiche hi ahi. 
1Peter2:1 Hijeh chun gitlouna jouse, doha lheplhahna jouse, phatlhemna, thangset, chule kiseisetna jouse pailhauvin," 
1Peter2:2 Naosen sohthah bangin, thua kon bongnoi thengset chu ngaijin umun, hichea chu nakhan tou theina dingun;" 
1Peter2:3 Nanghon Pakai chu milungset them ahi chu natep khah-u ahitah-a ahivangle. 
1Peter2:4 Mihem paija um hijongle, Pathen dinga lhentum le manlutah ahin, Ama henga chu songpi henga hung banga nahungu ahi," 
1Peter2:5 Nangho jong songhing ho banga, Jesu Christa vanga Pathen san thei doltah-a lhagao ganlhaina tohdoh-ah thempu theng hidinga, lhagao in'a kisadoh nahitaove." 
1Peter2:6 Hijeh chun Pathen lekhabua hitin akisune, Veuvin, Sion'ah inning song pipen, lhentum, man lutah chu kadoi; Ama tahsana chu iti nama jongle jachatna-a chu lou ding ahi, ati." 
1Peter2:7 Hichu atahsana nangho dinga man lutah ahi; atahsan louho ding vanga hiti hi ahi, Insahon apaiju song chu Aninga apipena panga ahitai;" 
1Peter2:8 chule, kipalna songle suhkhelna songpi soh-a ahitai; amahon thu chu angai loujeh uva kipala ahiuve; hiche dinga chu amaho gotsa jong ahiuve." 
1Peter2:9 Ahin muthima kona ama vah kidangtah sunga lut dinga nakoudohpao phatna chu naphondoh theina dinguva, nangho nam lhenchom, leng thempu, vaipi theng, chule ama-a tum hi dinga Pathen mite nahiu ahitai:" 
1Peter2:10 Masanga chu mite hilou nahiu ahin, tu vangin Pathen mite nahitaove; hepina changlou nahiu ahin, tu vangin hepina changa nahitaove." 
1Peter2:11 Ngaitah teho, nangho mi gama cheng le kholjin tobang nahijeh uva naheng uva kahungtao ahi, tahsa ngaichat thil chengsea konin kikangseuvin; hitiho chu lhagaotoh kidou ahi." 
1Peter2:12 Chule chidang namdangho lah-a nanun nakhanu phatsah-un; chutile akhang gilou tia amahon nangho naseisetnao chu amittah-in nathilpha bolu chu muvintin, hiche thudol chu vettoh-a aum nile Pathen avahchoi dingu ahi." 
1Peter2:13 Pakai jal-in mihem phudoh chondan thun nungun: mijouse chunga vaipo ahito lhonin, Lengpa thu ahin;" 
1Peter2:14 Ahiloule mikhang gilouho chunga phula dingle, mi thilpha bolho pachatna pedinga ama hinsol gamvaipoho thun nungun." 
1Peter2:15 Ajeh chu nanghon nathilpha boluva konin lungthim beiho ngolna chu thiphelin lhaleu chun, hichu Pathen lunglam ahi:" 
1Peter2:16 Nangho chamlen chonin chonun, ahivangin hiche nacham len nao chu gitlou khunan nei hih-un; ahin Pathen sohte um doltah-in umjouvin." 
1Peter2:17 Mi jouse jabol sohkeijun. Sopi tapou chu ngailuvin. Pathen gingun. Lengpa chu jabolun. 
1Peter2:18 Sohteho, nangho gingkhen chan napakai te chengseu thunoija umun; apha le anunnemho heng jenga hilouvin, lunggilou puho thunoija jong umun." 
1Peter2:19 Mi khattou Pathen ahet jeh-in thohdol louhel thohgimhen, dihlou tah-a akibolna thohham hamle, Hichu pachat umtah ahi." 
1Peter2:20 Nathemmona jeh-in min navo henlang, lungneng tah-in thohle chun, ipi pachatna nachan dingham? ahin thilpha nabola, hiche jeh-a chu nahesoh gentheija, lungneng tah-a nathoh-a ahile, hichu Pathen deilam ahi." 
1Peter2:21 Ajehchu hiche-a dinga chu kikou nahiuve: ijeh inem itile Christan jong eiho dinga hesoh genthei athoh ahin, nangho akhonung jui nahina dinguva, hichu vettoh-a jui ding akoija adalhah ahi." 
1Peter2:22 Ama chu achonsepon, akam sunga jong doha lheplhahna kimulou ahi:" 
1Peter2:23 Houset achanin ahouse thuhpon; athohgim pet jong chun koima agihsalpon; ahin chonpha tah-a thutanpa khutna akingaijon ahi. 
1Peter2:24 Eiho chonset lama ithiuva chonphat lama ihinna dingun, Aman eiho chonset jouse atahsa chunga apon, thingleh geijin apodohtan ahi: ama kijepna maha-a chu nangho kiboldama nahitaove." 
1Peter2:25 Ajeh chu nangho kelngoi hon banga lamvaija nahiu ahin, tu vanga hi nalhagao chingpao le nakaihoipao henga hung kile kit nahitaove." 
1Peter3:1 Hiche bang chun, inneipiho jouse na-inneipute cheh-u thunoija kipelut un; amaho abang khattou thua nunglou hijongleu, thua hilouva, a-inneipite chengu khanthem vanga akijo theina dingun;" 
1Peter3:2 Nangho ging gehcha na-umu nanun nakhannu thengsel chu amit tah-a mu-u hen. 
1Peter3:3 Sampheh hoi, sana khi-o, nihchen ponsil got chomchom tho-a polam jem-a kijem louvin," 
1Peter3:4 Lung sunga guhthim mi, nunnem le lungnem kem theilou jem chun kijem jouhen; hichu Pathen mitvetna man lutah ahi." 
1Peter3:5 Ajeh chu malaija numei theng Pathen'a kingaiho jong chu chutia chu kijema, a-inneipute chengu thunoija kipelutnu ahiuve:" 
1Peter3:6 Hitia chu Sara'in Abraham chu pakai asah-a athua ananun banga; nanghon kichase louhela thilpha nabol uva ahile, ama chanuteho nahiu ahi." 
1Peter3:7 Chutobangma chun, inneipu teho, natao nao daltana aumlouna dingin, hinna lungsetna nachankhompiu ahiuto lhonin, numei chu belkehbai bangin jabolun lang, hetna dungjuijin amaho chu chenkhom piuvin." 
1Peter3:8 Achainan, nangho nabonchaovin lungkhat hiuvin, kilainatto cheh-un, sopi khat bangin kingailuvin, kilungsetto themun, nunnem tah hiuvin." 
1Peter3:9 Set phu lahnan set bolhih helun; chule houset phu lahnan house thuh hih-un: chusangin phatthei bohjouvin; ajeh chu phattheina chu lo dinga nangho kikouva nahiuve ti heuvin. 
1Peter3:10 Ajeh chu Mi koi hile hinkho ngailut ding noma, nikho phaho mu noma chun Gitlouna-a konin alei, chule milhep lhahna thu seija konin amuh tuhtanghen;" 
1Peter3:11 Ama chu gitlouna konin kileheihen, thilpha bolhen; Chamna hol henlang, hichu nungdel peh hen." 
1Peter3:12 Ajehchu Pakai mit chu michonpha ho chunga aumin, Ataonao ngaina-a ana asungin ahi; Ahin Pakai mai chun thil gilou bolho lam angat jingin ahi." 
1Peter3:13 Nangho apha chu juija nahi vangule, koiham nabol engse dinguva?" 
1Peter3:14 Ahinla chonphat jala hesoh genthei thoh nahi vangule, anunnom nahiuve: chule amahon nasuh kichatnao chu kicha loujenun, lung jong lungdong hih-un;" 
1Peter3:15 Chusangin nalunggil uvah Pakai Pathen chu sutheng jouvin: khattou nasunguva um kinepna thudol chu adonga auma ahile, amaho chu lungnemle ging gehcha donbut dingin phasademin um jingun:" 
1Peter3:16 Sele pha hetna pha neijun; chutile Christa-a nahinkho manu adihlou tah-a seisehon thilphalou bol banga nachung uva athuseiju chu jahchatna anei dingu ahi. 
1Peter3:17 Ajeh chu thilphalou nabol jeh uva genthei hesoh thoh sangin, Pathen lunggot lam ahile, thilpha nabol jeh uva nathoh gimu chu gamchenga phajo ahi." 
1Peter3:18 Ajeh chu Christa'n jong chonsetna chengse jeh-a, chonphatah chun chonpha louho dinga, eiho chengse hi Pathen kom eilhut theina dinguva, khatvei hesoh genthei athohgim ahi; ama chu tahsa-a kithat ahin, amavang lhagaova hinga ahi:" 
1Peter3:19 Chujongle lhagaova chea kul-a kihen lhagaoho henga thu agasei ahi; 
1Peter3:20 Amaho chu phatkhat lai, Noah nikho laija kong kisem lai sungse-a, Pathen lungdehatna-in anga laija chu thua nunglou anahiuva ahin, hiche kong'a chu mi themcha khat, miget sehbou twija anasohcha-a ahi." 
1Peter3:21 Hichu Jesu Christa thokit vanga isochatnao baptize channa lima kibol (hichu tahsa nen pailhah hilouva, Pathen heng lama sele pha hetna pha donbutna ahi;)" 
1Peter3:22 Ama van'a akaltouvin Pathen jet lama aumtai; vantil chengsele, thuneina, chule thilboltheina thahat jouse ama thu noija uma ahitai." 
1Peter4:1 Chuti chu ahin, Christa'n tahsa-a eihodia athohgim jeh chun, nangho jong chutobang lungput chun kivonun; ajeh chu tahsa-a thohgima chun chonsetna adalhah ahin;" 
1Peter4:2 Chutia chu aphat umnalai chengse chu mihem lung ngaichat lama tahsa-a hing talouva, Pathen lunggot lama ahin johna ding ahi." 
1Peter4:3 Ajehchu nomsahna lung ngaichat, huh, juneh hat, julhang neh, nehkhom, thet umtah milim houna-a i-um laijuva chu, chidang namdangho lunggot lam bolna dinga iphatnu tamtah inamanu ahitan;" 
1Peter4:4 Nanghon setna lama amaho chu nachon khompitah loujeh uva kidang asah uva, nahouset jiu ahi." 
1Peter4:5 Ahingle athi thutan dinga kigopa anga chu amahon achonnau asuhtoa apeh cheh dingu ahi. 
1Peter4:6 Hiche jeh-a chu amaho mihem dola tahsa-a athu-u akitana, lhagaova Pathen lungdeija ahin nadinguva, athisaho jahdinga jong Kipana Thupha chu kiseija ahitai." 
1Peter4:7 Ahinla thil jouse hi abeina ding nikho anaitai; hiche jeh chun lunglim gehchan umun lang taojing dingin chingtheijun. 
1Peter4:8 Imajouse chungvuma gunchu tah-in khatle khat kingailutto nalah uva habolun; ajeh chu ngailutna hin chonset tamtah akhujin ahi; 
1Peter4:9 Phunchel louhelin khatle khat kilhun sahton umun: 
1Peter4:10 Amitakip lungsetna thilpeh achan dungjui cheh-in, Pathen milungsetna gotchom chom tamtah gouching phaho bangin, khatle khat kijento jingin umun." 
1Peter4:11 Thuseija aumle, ama chun Pathen kamsoh seijin seihen; chule mi jenlea aumle, Pathen'in apeh thahat dungjuijin jenlehen: chutia chu thil imajousea Jesu Christa vanga Pathen vahchoija aum theina dingin; Vahchoina le thuneina tonsot geija ama-a ahi. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Ngaiteho, nangho patepna ding patepna meikong chu thil kidang nachung uva hung chua bangin kidang sahih-un;" 
1Peter4:13 Nangho Christa hesoh genthei thohgim thoh khompi-a nahiu bangtah chun kipahjo uvin; chutia chu aloupina hung kilah tengle, kipana nasatah-a nakipa theina dingun." 
1Peter4:14 Nangho Christa min jala houset nachanuva ahile, anunnom nahiuve; ajeh chu loupina Lhagao chule Pathen Lhagao chu nachung uva aume: amaho jal-in Ama seiset nin aumin, nangho jallin Ama choiat nin aume." 
1Peter4:15 Nalah uva koiman toltha jeh ahim, guchat jeh ahim, khan gitlou jeh ahim, midang tohna chunga khut lha jeh ahimin, hesoh genthei thoh hihhen;" 
1Peter4:16 Christian hi jeh-a hesoh genthei thohgima aum vangle, ama chun jachatnan nei hihhen; ahin hiche min jehchun Pathen choi-an johen." 
1Peter4:17 Ajeh chu Pathen insunga kona thutanna ahung kipat nading phat chu ahitai: chule hichu eihoa akipatna ahile, Pathen Kipana Thupha thua nunglouho kichaina chu iti tantem?" 
1Peter4:18 Michonpha bon huhhing-a aum ahahsatna ahile, Pathen ngaisah louho le michonse hon hoija amaiju alahdoh dingu hitam?" 
1Peter4:19 Chuti ahi jeh chun Pathen lunglam dola hesoh genthei thohgimho chun thilpha bolin alhagaovu chu tahsan umtah asempa henga bangin ama henga pedoh-u hen. 
1Peter5:1 Nalah uva um upaho chengse chu, Christa hesoh gentheina hettohsah-a, chule loupina hung kilang ding chankhompi, na-upat chankhompiu keiman kahin til nahiuve:" 
1Peter5:2 Nalah uva Pathen kelngoi hon umho chu phaten chingphaovin, bollou phamo tia bol louvin, lung chamin bolun; alam louva phatchom ngaichatna-a jong hilouvin, lung guttenin bolun;" 
1Peter5:3 Chule Pathen gouloho chunga kipipuisah louvin, ahon chun avettoh-a ajui dingu joh-in umun, kaihoijun." 
1Peter5:4 Chutile Aching pipupa hung kilah tengle, nanghon chul theilou loupina lallukhuh chu nasan dingu ahi." 
1Peter5:5 Chutobangma chun khangdong ho, nangho upaho thunoija kipelut un. Chule nangho nabonun khatle khat kithununto cheh-un lang, kineosah na-in kivonun: ajeh chu Pathen'in mikiletsah ho adoudalin, mi kineosah ho lungsetna achanjin ahi." 
1Peter5:6 Hijeh chun Aman aphatcha nangho nachoisang theina dingun, Pathen khut thahat tah noija chun nem heochan umun:" 
1Peter5:7 Nalungkham najouseu ama chunga sep lha uvin; ajeh chu aman nakhankho dingu agelnai. 
1Peter5:8 Limgehchan umun, kihongphauvin, ajehchu nakidou piu diabol chu keipi bahkai kituma banga, koi kaval lhum theidem, tia hollea vahlea ahi;" 
1Peter5:9 Tahsan dettah-in ama chu douvun; vannoi leiset chunga um nasopi ho chengseu chunga jong chutobang thohgim chu chusohkeija ahi chu heuvin. 
1Peter5:10 Chule lungsetna jouse Pathen, tonsot tonsot geija um aloupina-a dinga Christa Jesu jala nakoupao tahchun, chomkhat nathohgim jou tengule, nasuh chamkimuva, naphudet uva, nahatsah uva, chule nachendet sah dingu ahi." 
1Peter5:11 Tonsot atonsot geijin loupinale thuneina chu ama-a hijinghen, Amen." 
1Peter5:12 Tahsantah sopi-a kangaito Silvanus khutna, nangho tilkhouna le hiche idin naohi Pathen lungset dihtah ahi ti jong hettohsah na-a, chomcha kahinsut ahi." 
1Peter5:13 Nakilhen khompiu Babylon'a um houbung le, kachapa Mark'in nasalamui." 
1Peter5:13 Nakilhen khompiu Babylon'a um houbung le, kachapa Mark'in nasalamui." 
1Peter5:14 Kingailut na-a kichopton khatle khat kisalam un. Christa Jesu'a um nangho, nabonchaova chungah lungmona umhen. Amen." 
2Peter1:1 Jesu Christa soh le solchah Simon Peter'in, Pathen le eihuh hinguva Jesu Christa chonphat vanga tahsan lutah kachan bang changho hengah:" 
2Peter1:2 Pathen le I-Pakaiyu Jesu hetna-a konin nachung uva lungsetle lungmon hapunin punghen. 
2Peter1:3 Aloupina le aphatna-a eikoupau hetna vanga Pathen thahat chun hinna le Pathen ngaisahna lam thudolla thil jouse eipeh-u ahitai: 
2Peter1:4 Chule hicheng vanga chu thutep lentah le manlutah chu eipeh jengu ahitai; hitia chu ngaichatna jeh-a vannoi leisetna um suhbohna-a kona chu nahoidoh uva, Pathen nunle khan chankhompi nahina dingu ahi." 
2Peter1:5 Hiche jehtah chun nanghon potthona kimkei pandoh-un, natahsanu chun phatna, naphatnao chun hetna;" 
2Peter1:6 Nahetna-u chun tibah timthem, natibah timthemu chun thohhat, chule thohhat chun Pathen ngaisahna;" 
2Peter1:7 Pathen ngaisahna chun sopi hepina, chule sopi hepina chun ngailutna sodoh hen." 
2Peter1:8 Ajeh chu hichengse chu nangho-a auma, aum dimset jinga ahile, I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hetna thudolla nangho hatmo le ga beija naumsah lou dingu ahi." 
2Peter1:9 Ahin hicheng neilou chu amitchoa ahin, gamla mulou ahin, masanga achonset luiho chengse-a kona kisu ngim ahi chu asuhmil ahitai." 
2Peter1:10 Hijeh chun, sopiteho, nangho nakikou nao le naki lhennao chu kichetsahna dingin kihabolun; nanghon hichu nabol uva ahile, a-imatih chana nalhuh lou dingu ahi:" 
2Peter1:11 Chutia chu I-Pakaiyu le eihuh hingpao Jesu Christa tonsot lenggama chu lut theina thu letset tah-a nakipe dingu ahi. 
2Peter1:12 Hiche jeh chun nanghon hichenghi hejongleu chun, chule tu-a nangho-a uma thutah-a chun umdet jing jongleu chun, hicheng thudol hi nangho geldohsah jing ding ngaisah louva kaum louhel ding ahi." 
2Peter1:13 Chule hiche pon in'a hi kaum laichanse-a, nangho chu geldohsah jinga hah jinga umsah dinghi adihlam in kagele." 
2Peter1:14 Ajeh chu I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christan eihetsah banga, hiche pon in hi kadalhah vah ding ahi ti kahei." 
2Peter1:15 Chule kadalhah nung tengle hicheng thudol hi nageldoh jing theina dinguva jong kihabol kahi. 
2Peter1:16 Keiman Pakai Jesu Christa thuneina le ahung ding thu nangho kahetsah laija chu, lungthim thema suhto-a semthu thusim juija hilou kahipouve, Leng Chungnung loupitah ahije mittah-a mu-a hettohsahjoa kahibouve." 
2Peter1:17 Ama hi ka-Chapa deitah ahi, achunga kalung alhai tangeije, tia Leng Chungnung loupina-a ahenga aw ahung lhuna chu, Pa Pathen'a kona choi-atle jabol changa ahi." 
2Peter1:18 Van'a kon hiche aw hung ging chu molsang theng chunga ama toh kaumuva kajah-u ahi. 
2Peter1:19 Chule themgaoho thu chu kichet chehna-a kahengu hung lhunga ahi; nangho chuche thua lunglut tah-a na-umu hi apha lheh jenge; jingkho ahung vah-a nalung sunguva jing niso ahung sodoh masangse-a, muthim lah salvah jing vah tobanga chingthei tah-a na-umu chu nabol hoi lheh jengun ahi." 
2Peter1:20 Pathen lekhabua gaothu kisei jouse hi koiman ama chang tuma ahilchet ahipoi ti hemasao vin. 
2Peter1:21 Ajeh chu malaija gaothu kiseidoh hochu mihem lungchama kona sohdoh-a ahipoi: ahin Pathen mitheng hon Lhagao Thengin amanchah dung juijuva aseiju ahibouve. 
2Peter2:1 Ahin miho lah-a themgao lhem asodohtah banga chu, nangho lah-a jong mihil lhem hung sohdoh-a, guhthima misumang thei thuhil ki dang ahinpoh lut dingu, amaho achopau Pakai tah jeng jong chu ajahda uva, chule poh phunga achunguva manthah na akiloi khum dingu ahi." 
2Peter2:2 Chule mi tamtah-in amanthah nao lampi chu ahinjui dingu; amaho jeh-a chu thutah lampi hi seisetna hung umding ahi. 
2Peter2:3 Chule kilosetna-a jou thua ki sumkol veina-a nahinnei dingu ahi; ahinla malaija patna achunguva thu kitan chu khongai sot lou, chule amanthah nau jong chu lulhu lou ahi." 
2Peter2:4 Ajeh chu Pathen'in vantil chonseho jengbon chu khen louhela, damuna ale lut jenga, athu-u kitan ding ngah-a kokhuh thima akhum jenga;" 
2Peter2:5 Chule Pathen ngaisah lou vannoi chunga twisang aletsah-a chu vannoi lui chu khen louhela, adang sagitoh chonphat thu seile-a Noah chubou akhena;" 
2Peter2:6 Chule Sodom le Gomorrah khopi teni chu vutvai asosah-a, themmo chan na-a alekhupma, chule Pathen ngaisah louho chunga itobang ahung chuh ding vetsahna-a asema;" 
2Peter2:7 Chule mi engseho khan gitlouna-a kona thoh gentheija michonpha Lot chu ahuhhinga ahile: 
2Peter2:8 (Ajehchu hiche michonpha chu amaho lah-a chenga, achonsetnao chu amua ajah-a, achonset jeh uva chu ama chonphat lung sunga chu niseh-a lungphamo lhehji-a ahi);" 
2Peter2:9 Pakaiyin Pathen ngaisahho chu lhepna-a kona huhdohje ahen, chonpha louho chu thupi kitan ni kahse-a dinga talen matsah-a koije ahei:" 
2Peter2:10 Ahideh-a kisuhbohna lam ngaicha-a tahsa lama chonteho le, gamvaipo nahsahmoho. Amaho chu ngol hanle ama lungchama chon ahiuvin, amahon loupina changho jengsan jong houset ding atijapouve." 
2Peter2:11 Vantil ho chu thahat le thilbol theija chungnungjo ahi jeng vangun, amaho dounan oimona thu Pakai anga alhut pouvin ahi." 
2Peter2:12 Ahin hiteho vanghi lungel neilou sahemho tobanga achonnau dungjuija kimana kisumang ding ahiuvin, ahet phah louhelu thu chu aseiseu vin ahi; chule amaho asetnaova chu mangthah ding ahiuvin;" 
2Peter2:13 Chule amahon suna kivah nehnop hi nomsah na-a angaito jeh uva, chonphat louna tohman chu asan dingu ahi. Amaho chu boh beh le nol uma ahiuvin, nangho toh kivahna-a ankong aumkhom ji tengule adoha lungthim uva akisuboh jiuvin;" 
2Peter2:14 Jon thanhoina dimset mit aneijun, chonsetna ngathei lou ahiuvin; mi lungdet louho ajol lhajiuve: alungu chu thangset bolna lama kichuh ahin, sapset chang chate ahiuve:" 
2Peter2:15 Amahon lamdih adalhaovin, lam hilouva avahmangun, chonphat louna thaman ngailu-a Beor chapa Baalam lampi chu ajuijun ahi;" 
2Peter2:16 Ahin ama chu achonkhel jeh chun pho sal-in aumin; pao theilou sangan chu mihem paova apaodoh-in themgaopa ngolna chu akhamtangin ahi. 
2Peter2:17 Hitiho hi twi umlou twikul ahiuvin, khopi huijin asemmang meilhang ahiuve; muthim lhangkhal kiheh chu amaho dinga a-imatih chana dinga kikheh khol ahi." 
2Peter2:18 Ajeh chu amahon hamhoi thona thumanlou asei tengule, lamvaina-a umho lah-a kona hung jamdoh ho chu tahsa lam ngaichat huhna lama ajol lha jiuvin ahi." 
2Peter2:19 Amahon chamlen athutep jiuvin, ahinla amahotah kemmang soh ho ahiuve: ajeh chu mi jo-a aumna-a chun, soh-a akailut jiuvin ahi." 
2Peter2:20 Pakai le huhhing-a Jesu Christa het vanga, vannoi leiset kisuhbohna tincheng ajamsan nunguva, chuche thenlouna-a akikhi oh kitnuva, jo-a aum kitnuva ahile, aumchan amasa sanga anunung chu sejocheh ahi." 
2Peter2:21 Ajeh chu ahet nunguva, amaho kipe-a thupeh thenga kona akiheimang sangun, chonphat lampi chu ahet louhelu hile, amaho dinga phajoa ahi." 
2Peter2:22 Ui jin aloh lhahsa ajon kitjin, vohpi kisilngimsa jong bonlhoh lah-a kibolin akilejie, ti paochamtuh hi amaho chunga lhung ahitai." 
2Peter3:1 Ngaitahteho, keiman nangho lekha kahinthot hiche hi anina ahi; anigela chu nangho geldohsah na-a kona nalung thengu chu kahinsuh thou ahi;" 
2Peter3:2 Nanghon malaija themgao thengho thusei chengsele, Pakai le Huhhingpa solchah keiho thupeh najahsao chu nageldoh jingna dinguva kahinsut ahi." 
2Peter3:3 Amasan nanghon hiche hi heuvin, ni nunungle jontaina manga jontai hatteho hung umdoh ding ahiuve, amaho chu ama tahsa ngaichat lama chonuntin," 
2Peter3:4 Ahung dinga thutepna chu hoibaham? Iputeu ipateu athiuva kipat tu gei hin, thilsem jouse hila semtila aum ngai bangbangin aumnan, atiuva nahin jontai dingu ahi." 
2Peter3:5 Ajeh chu amaho hicheho-a hi kihetmo sah uva ahin, malaipeh-a patna Pathen thusah-a vanho chengse le twi chunga le twinoija um leiset hohi um ahi." 
2Peter3:6 Chuche laija vannoi leiset chu twisanglen'in asuhmang ahitai: 
2Peter3:7 Hiche thuma ma-a chu tulai van le leiset hi Pathen ngaisah louho thu kitanle akisuhmang niu geija dinga meija dinga kikheh kholla ahi ti hi," 
2Peter3:8 ahin, sopi ngaiteho, nanghon hiche thuhi sumil loujenun, Pakai dingin ni khat chu kum sangkhat tobang ahin, kum sangkhat chu ni khat tobang ahi." 
2Peter3:9 Mi khattouvin geisang asah chu Pakai athutep lam dola geisang ahipoi, koima amangthah um louva mi jousen lung aheiman nading angaitoa, eiho jala khongai sot ahibouve." 
2Peter3:10 Amavang Pakai nikho chu janna gucha banga hung ding ahi; hiche ni chule vanho chengse ha gina ginglul lula manghel ding ahi, chule thilbul chengse meijin akah jola kavam gamhel ding ahi; chule vannoi leisetle asunga thil um jouse aboncha kavam sohkei ding ahi." 
2Peter3:11 Chu chengse chu chutia mang ding ahile, nunle khan then lamle Pathen ngaisahna lama itobang mi nahi ding dol uham!" 
2Peter3:12 Pathen nikho hung lhung ding chu pontho tah-a kat jinga kinema umding dol ahi; hiche ni chu ahung lhun jeh-a vanho meija kong'a kavamhel ding, chule thilbul chengse meisa-a jolmang sohding ahi." 
2Peter3:13 Ahinla eihon vang ama thutep dungjuija vanthah hole leithah kinema ingau ahi; hichea chu chonphatna chenga ahi. 
2Peter3:14 Hijeh chun, sopi ngaiteho, hicheng chu kat jinga nangho ama anga boh beh louhel le nolna beihela lungmonga nakimudoh theina dingun kihabolun." 
2Peter3:15 Chule Pakai mi khongaisot hi huhhinga umna ahi ti gelun; isopiu deitah Paul'in jong ama kipe-a hetna dungjuija, chutobangma chu nangho henga ahinsutsa ahitai;" 
2Peter3:16 Alekhathot chengsea chu hiche thu chu aseija, chutobangma chu asut ahi, hichenga chun het hahsatahtah thu aume; hichu mi lunglhomho le lungdet louhon Pathen lekhabua thu dang dang angai koiji bangun, angai koijiuvin amale ama akisumang jiuve." 
2Peter3:17 Hijeh chun, ngaiteho, hichengse chu nahet masatsao bangin, kihongphauvin, achuti loule nangho jengjong michonseho lamvaina lama puimangin umun natin, napandet phapet lhaso khauvin nate." 
2Peter3:18 Ahin I-Pakaiyu le Huhhing-a Jesu Christa milungset le hetna-a khangtou jingun. Ama-a chun tu le tonsot geijin loupina umhen. Amen.

1John2:15 Nanghon vannoi leiset le vannoi leiset lam dol thil chengse ngailu hihhelun. Koi hile vannoi leiset ngailu-a chu alung sunga Pa ngailutna cheng lou ahi. 
1John2:16 Ajeh chu vannoi'a umho jouse: tahsa lam ngaichat, mitvet deichat, hinkho kiletsah, hicheng hi Pa-a kona ahipoi, vannoi'a kona ahibouve."

1John2:17 Vannoi leiset le athil ngaichat mangthah ding kon ahitai; ahin Pathen lung lama chonpa chu imatih chana umjing ding ahi.

Jude1:1 Jesu Christa soh, Jacob naopa Juda'n, Pa Pathen suhtheng chang teho chengse, chule Jesu Christa-a kikheh le kikouho chengse hengah," 
Jude1:2 Hepina, chamna, chule ngailutna nachung uva hapunin punghen." 
Jude1:3 Ngaiteho, lhangpi huhhingna thudola naheng uva lekha hinsut kagot laijin, masanga mithengho anakipedohsa tahsan lama chu ponpan dinga nangho tilkhou na-a naheng uva hinsut ding khoh kasatan ahi." 
Jude1:4 Ajeh chu mi koi koiham guhthima hung kithol lut aumui; amaho chu hiche themona hi chang dingdol ahiuve tia masanga patna gotsa, Pathen ngaisah lou, i-Pathen'u milungset chu huhna lama sodoh ho, Pakai Pathen khatseh leh I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa janomlou ahiuve." 
Jude1:5 Pakaiyin Egypt gama kona amite ahuhdoh-a, chuche nunga atahsan louho asuhmang jeng thudol hi khatvei nahetsao hita jongle kahin geldohsah kit nomui." 
Jude1:6 Chule achanvou masa-u kolchah louva achennao dalha-a vantil ho chu, aman niloupi chungnung ni-a athu tan dinga tonsot muthim noija henna-a ahen ahi." 
Jude1:7 Sodom le Gomorrah, chule akimvela amaho tobang khopiho chengse, huhle jon thanhoi patna lama kipumpeh-a, chule tahsa lamdanna nung juiho chun vetton dinga phulahna tonsot meisa athohgim bangu chun." 
Jude1:8 Chutobangma chun hiche mang kidah um manho jonghin tahsaphe asuboh-un, thuneina nahsahmon abolun, loupinaho chu aseiseuvin ahi." 
Jude1:9 Ahinla Mosi long chungchang thudola vantil pipuipen Michael diabol toh akinel chun, oimo-a houset ding angampon, ahin, Pakaiyin nahouse hen, atin ahi." 
Jude1:10 Hinla hiteho vang hin ahettoh louhelu aseiseuvin ahi: ahin lungthim neilou gamsaho bangin, angaija ahetsao hitiho-a chun amaho le amaho akisuboh-un ahi." 
Jude1:11 Amaho chu ada ahiuve! ajeh iham itile amahon Cain lampi chu ahovin, kipaman duchatnan Baalam lamvaina lama loptah-in alhaijun, chule Korah golkehna-a chu amangthah taovin ahi." 
Jude1:12 Amaho chu nangho toh an naneh khom komu le nakidei vahnauva chu twi noija kisel songpi ahiuvin, kichatna neilou ama kivah kelngoi ching ahiuve; amaho twi ko lou meilhang, hui mut lonle; chavang kichai kona thingphung ga lou, nivei thi, ajunga kibotdoh ahiuve;" 
Jude1:13 Twikhanglen kinong, ajachatnau twiphon sodoh; ahsi vahle ho ahiuvin, amaho dinga chu muthim lhangkhal tonsot geija dinga kikheh ahi." 
Jude1:14 Chule Adam'a pat khang sagina Enoch jong chun hiteho chungchang thudola hi gaothu anaseidoh-in, Veuvin, Pakai chu amitheng sangsom sangja toh," 
Jude1:15 Mijouse chunga thutan dingle, alah uva Pathen ngaisah louho jousen Pathen angaisah lounao thudola a-Pathen ngaisah louna thilbolu, chule Pathen ngaisah lou chonse hon ama chunga thu hamtahtah aseiju chungchanga themmo chan dingin ahunge, ati." 
Jude1:16 Amaho chu phunchel hat, oimo-a seiset hat, ama lung ngaichat lam cheh-a chona ahiuve; chule akam sungun hamhoitho thu aseijun, phatchom ngainan kam sungin mi ajabolun ahi." 
Jude1:17 Ahin, ngaiteho, masanga Pakai Jesu Christa solchah hon aseisao thuho chengse chu nanghon geldoh jingun;" 
Jude1:18 Amahon, Ni nunung lamle mi nuisat nelpeh hat, Pathen ngaisah louva ama ama lung ngaichat dungjui cheh-a chonteho hung umdoh dingu ahi, tia asei bangu chun:" 
Jude1:19 Amaho chu loitum sem, tahsahing, Lhagao neilou ahiuve." 
Jude1:20 Ahin, ngaiteho, nangho vang natahsanu theng chungnung chunga chun nangmaho kisadoh-un, Lhagao Thengah tao taovun," 
Jude1:21 Pathen ngailutna-a chun kihongun, chule tonsot hin kemlouna dingin I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa mihepina-a kinemin kat jingin umun." 
Jude1:22 Chule mi abang agingchalela chu hepiuvin," 
Jude1:23 Abang meija konin loidoh-un; tahsaphen asuboh nihchen ponsil sana thetbol pumin, kicha gehchan huhhingun." 
Jude1:24 Tun nakipal lhuh louna dinguva nangho hongbit theile, ama loupina ang sunga themona beihela kipahtah-a lhut theija," 
Jude1:25 Eihuhhing pau Pathen ching khatseh henga chun, loupina, chungnunna, thahat thuneina, tu le atonsot geijin umjing tahen. Amen."
